audio_visual_equipment.label: Audio-Visual Equipment
audio_visual_equipment.description: Devices, cabling, and rigging used for multimedia presentations and events.

ck13_gid_seed_blend.label: CK13-GID Seed Blend
ck13_gid_seed_blend.description: These genetically-modified barley seeds were banned because of their aggressive growth and high-levels of cross-pollination that has frequently ravaged any neighboring plant life. However, the plant's high yield and ease of growth have continued to make it a sought-after commodity.

construction_material.label: Construction Materials
construction_material.description: Various supplies used to build, repair, and maintain buildings and structures.

dcsr2.label: DCSR2
dcsr2.description: An organically derived terpenoid lipid, dicylasterone (commonly known as DCSR2), has been banned from use in biomedical applications. Currently, it is most typically used in the manufacture of illegal narcotic 'SLAM.'

fireworks.label: Fireworks
fireworks.description: Colorful pyrotechnic devices used at celebrations and special events.

gasping_weevil_eggs.label: Gasping Weevil Eggs
gasping_weevil_eggs.description: The eggs of this small beetle are commonly held to be an aphrodisiac, but when allowed to hatch the weevils themselves will eat through sealants used in space station construction. Transport of the insect or its eggs is banned in the UEE.

hlx99hyperprocessors.label: HLX99 Hyperprocessors
hlx99hyperprocessors.description: Commonly known as "Helixes" these Banu manufactured processing chips were designed for fullcore crypto-cracking and are used in the manufacture of computer system infiltration devices.

human_food_bars.label: Human Food Bars
human_food_bars.description: Despite what the label on the packaging declares, the Banu manufactured "Human Food Bars" have been shown to contain multiple additives deemed unsafe for Human consumption.

iron_ore.label: Iron (Ore)
iron_ore.description: Element Fe, strong, malleable, highly susceptible to rust and found in large volume across most star systems.

lifecure_medsticks.label: LifeCure Medsticks
lifecure_medsticks.description: The use of these imitation CureLife Medpens has resulted in numerous deaths.

moldsamples.label: Molina Mold Samples
moldsamples.description: Samples of the deadly Molina Mold securely sealed in biohazard containers to ensure its toxic fungal spores can't get airborne.

moldtreatment.label: Molina Mold Treatment
moldtreatment.description: A lifesaving treatment for those suffering from exposure to Molina Mold.

partyfavors.label: Party Favors
partyfavors.description: Small items used to help encourage a festive mood. Typically given or sold to celebrants in attendance at an event or party.

rs1odyseyspacesuits.label: RS1 Odysey Spacesuits
rs1odyseyspacesuits.description: These imitation RSI Odyssey undersuits are cheaply made counterfeits that are hazardous to use.

redfinenergymodulator.label: Redfin Energy Modulators
redfinenergymodulator.description: Made by various Banu manufacturers, this energy modulator is distinct for its red-hued heatsinks. Though it can be installed into most Human component subsystems to reduce power draw, its extremely dangerous fail rate has caused it to be banned for import into the UEE.

souvenirs.label: Souvenirs
souvenirs.description: Mementos purchased to commemorate visiting a location or attending an special event.

stims.label: Stims
stims.description: Composed of various combinations of tobacco, caffeine, and mood-enhancer, stims are smoked as a cigarette.

ventfilters.label: Molina Ventilation Filters
ventfilters.description: Special filters developed by Gyson to replace faulty units and purify the air of Molina Mold spores.

acryliplex.label: AcryliPlex Composite
acryliplex.description: This composite is a moldable material used in the construction of explosives. In addition to being commonly used in demolition applications for heavy industry and mining, it is also used to create small potent warheads. Care must be taken while transporting larger quantities of the composite as it is impact and heat sensitive.

agricium.label: Agricium
agricium.description: A rare and valuable silvery metal with a blue-green sheen. Malleable, ductile, and largely non-reactive.

agricium_ore.label: Agricium (Ore)
agricium_ore.description: A rare and valuable silvery metal with a blue-green sheen. Malleable, ductile, and largely non-reactive.

agriculturalgoods.label: Agricultural Goods
agriculturalgoods.description: Unprocessed crop and animal products used in the production of foodstuffs, textiles and bio-organic fuels.

agriculturalsupplies.label: Agricultural Supplies
agriculturalsupplies.description: Items required for agricultural production. Includes fertilizers, feed, and pesticides.

altruciatoxin.label: Altruciatoxin
altruciatoxin.description: Created by chemically processing the pollen of Revenant Tree (altrucia lacus), common effects of ingesting or smoking altruciatoxin include relaxing of the muscles, sensory enhancement, and lethargy. Heavy usage can cause staining of the tongue.

altruciatoxin_unprocessed.label: Revenant Tree Pollen
altruciatoxin_unprocessed.description: The pollen of Revenant Tree (altrucia lacus).

aluminum.label: Aluminum
aluminum.description: A chemically reactive, gray metal that is malleable, lightweight, ductile, strong, and resistant to corrosion. Capable of superconductivity.

aluminum_ore.label: Aluminum (Ore)
aluminum_ore.description: A chemically reactive, gray metal that is malleable, lightweight, ductile, strong, and resistant to corrosion. Capable of superconductivity.

amiantpod.label: Amiant Pod
amiantpod.description: Harvested from the amiant tree, the fibrous husks of these seed pods are used to make heat resistant textiles. Once removed, the husks must first be soaked in a chemical solution before the fibers can be separated out.

amioshiplague.label: Amioshi Plague
amioshiplague.description: Not nearly as ominous as its name, the Amioshi Plague is an invasive lichen that grows in the cracks of rocks. While the core of the lichen burrows out of sight to try and absorb as much moisture as it can find, the part near the surface sprouts hooded scales that eject spores to spread to other rocks. It's relatively short maturation period is the origin of its name.

anti_hydrogen.label: Anti-Hydrogen
anti_hydrogen.description: The antimatter counterpart of hydrogen. Contains one positron and one antiproton.

aphorite.label: Aphorite
aphorite.description: Decorative jewel crystal prized for its multi-hued tones.

apoxygenite.label: Apoxygenite
apoxygenite.description: Also commonly known as TXA (trifold explosive accelerant), apoxygenite is an odorless and tasteless chemical additive used in the production of explosives and in various industrial processes. Energetic and highly brisant, apoxygenite is an oxygen rich accelerant that is often added to more stable elements to increase their reaction rate.

argon.label: Argon
argon.description: Chemically inert under most conditions, argon is an odorless, colorless gas that is as soluble in water as oxygen. Appears lilac in a discharge tube.

arsenic.label: Arsenic
arsenic.description: A brittle, dense semimetal that is poisonous in large quantities.

aslarite.label: Aslarite
aslarite.description: Aslarite is a naturally-occurring mineral that is most commonly found on asteroids. Sought for its natural thermal insulation properties, it can be processed and used in the construction of personal armor to help the wearer withstand extreme temperatures.

astatine.label: Astatine
astatine.description: A dangerously radioactive, highly unstable halogen. Some of its isotopes have half-lives of one second or less.

atlasium.label: Atlasium
atlasium.description: This very strong metal alloy is often one of the few materials salvageable from severe wreck sites.

beradom.label: Beradom
beradom.description: Formed when sap from the Beraber Fir is crystalized during forest fires, this transparent deep blue "gemstone" is often polished smooth and used in jewelry. While it can be manufactured by growing trees and then doing a controlled burn, the time investment for the trees to reach the proper maturity still make this a rare commodity.

beryl.label: Beryl
beryl.description: A mineral that creates natural hexagonal crystals. Colorless in its pure form, its impure forms include the gems emerald and aquamarine.

bexalite.label: Bexalite
bexalite.description: This mineral harvested from worlds with no natural magnetic core, has found widespread use in electrical systems.

bioplastic.label: Bioplastic
bioplastic.description: A plastic replacement material created when fossil fuels began running low in Sol. It is derived from renewable biomass sources, often from vat grown bacteria but can be derived from industrial byproducts as well.

bluebilva.label: Blue Bilva
bluebilva.description: NDR: 23 HEI: 10 Effects: Hydrating, Energizing The Blue Bilva is known for its distinctive rich flavor; which is highly astringent, aromatic and very high in fructose. The fruit can also be identified by its slightly pointed, ovoid shape, and dark blue to indigo skin. The fibrous flesh of the bilva clings firmly to its large stone which is so hard that it can only be cracked through mechanical means. It takes about 11 months to ripen on the tree. It is commonly eaten dried or turned into brandy.

borase.label: Borase
borase.description: This highly thermally conductive material is often formed from cosmic ray spallation and is most typically found in younger star systems.

borase_ore.label: Borase (Ore)
borase_ore.description: This highly thermally conductive material is often formed from cosmic ray spallation and is most typically found in younger star systems.

boron.label: Boron
boron.description: A metalloid element produced by supernovae and cosmic ray spallation. A semiconductor in its pure crystalline form.

cadmiumallinide.label: Cadmium Allinide
cadmiumallinide.description: This refined form of cadmium has great energy potential and is used frequently in reactors and batteries.

carbon.label: Carbon
carbon.description: Owing to carbon's ability to form a variety of allotropes with vastly different properties and its sheer abundance in the universe, this element is used in a wide variety of applications.

carbonsilk.label: Carbon-Silk
carbonsilk.description: This light, flexible and incredibly strong material is woven from carbon strands collected from the secretions of specially bioengineered worms.

carinite.label: Carinite
carinite.description: A rare mineral because the extreme pressure needed for its formation is very uncommon, it is in high demand thanks to its use in advanced computer processors and other cutting-edge electronics.

carinite_pure.label: Carinite (Pure)
carinite_pure.description: Typical carinite sources feature various impurities. However, under certain extremely rare conditions, carinite veins that are more than 90% pure can form. Computing hardware that demands exacting precision will usually seek out pure carinite.

chlorine.label: Chlorine
chlorine.description: A light gas with a high electron affinity and a yellow-green tone at room temperature. One of the halogens.

coal.label: Coal
coal.description: A combustible sedimentary rock primarily composed of carbon. Thought to originate from ancient peat.

compboard.label: Compboard
compboard.description: A main processing unit used inside various computers and electronics.

consumergoods.label: Consumer Goods
consumergoods.description: Commodities that are purchased by an individual to satisfy their wants or needs.

copper.label: Copper
copper.description: A soft red-orange colored metal with high conductivity. Prone to oxidation unless properly treated.

copper_ore.label: Copper (Ore)
copper_ore.description: A soft red-orange colored metal with high conductivity. Prone to oxidation unless properly treated.

corundum.label: Corundum
corundum.description: The crystalline form of aluminum oxide. Used as a gem. Varieties include ruby, sapphire, and padparadscha.

countermeasures_decoy.label: Ship Decoy Countermeasures
countermeasures_decoy.description: Flares, decoys and other countermeasure supplies for ships of any size

countermeasures_noise.label: Ship Noise Countermeasures
countermeasures_noise.description: Noise, chaff and other countermeasure supplies for ships of any size

crude_oil.label: Crude Oil
crude_oil.description: A compound composed of hydrocarbons and other organic molecules. Also referred to as unprocessed petroleum.

decari_pod.label: Decari Pod
decari_pod.description: A large spore pod harvested from the decari that can be collected and used as a food source. However, the decari pod cannot be consumed directly. It must have its thick out layer and spiny filaments removed, and the fibrous hymenium cooked for a long time before it can be safely digested by Humans.

degnous_root.label: Degnous Root
degnous_root.description: Degnous root is a macroalgae that was discovered in the shallow coastlines of Prime on Terra. Once harvested, degnous can be utilized as an ingredient in medical and health products thanks to its unique blend of amino acids.

detatrine.label: Detatrine
detatrine.description: Refined from the natural toxin found within the rare detatium fruit, this chemical has numerous medical applications.

diamond.label: Diamond
diamond.description: An allotrope of the element carbon, diamonds form over billions of years under high heat and pressure. Extremely hard and thermally conductive.

diamond_laminate.label: Diamond Laminate
diamond_laminate.description: One of the hardest manufactured materials today, this glass-like substance is frequently used in the construction of cockpit windows.

diluthermex.label: Diluthermex
diluthermex.description: An extremely heat resistant epoxy often used in the mounting and repair of ship thrusters. It is considered very difficult to transport in its uncured state as it becomes explosively unstable when exposed to Chan-Eisen fields during quantum travel. Specialized containers must be used to safely transport the epoxy long distances. Once set and cured, the Diluthermex is no longer reactive.

distilled_spirits.label: Distilled Spirits
distilled_spirits.description: A purified beverage produced through the distillation of fermented substances. Possesses at least 20 percent of alcohol by volume.

dolivine.label: Dolivine
dolivine.description: A dull green gemstone that is used decoratively but also can be used for industrial purposes thanks to its resistance to weathering and high density.

dopple.label: Dopple
dopple.description: A dissociative drug that creates a strong feeling of separation. People, places, and objects familiar to the user take on a distorted and unreal quality. Some users report a detachment from emotions. Doplencyethorphine is used in small dosages medically to help with extreme emotion issues and rage management problems. Recreational users take it for the effect of resetting the mundane and everyday into something new and different. Side effects include memory loss, panic attacks, paranoia, and psychotic episodes.

dymantium.label: Dymantium
dymantium.description: One of the toughest known metal alloys that can be forged. It is extremely difficult to manufacture and must be used with care in order to avoid accidentally weakening the material during application.

dynaflex.label: DynaFlex
dynaflex.description: Developed for use by the military, this absorptive material can withstand severe stress owing to its flexibility.

elespo.label: Elespo
elespo.description: A brand name of a light sponge-like material that has exceptional electrical absorption properties.

eriesium.label: Eriesium
eriesium.description: An actinide element that is extremely rare in the UEE, eriesium is theorized to be an incredible power source if harnessed properly, but can also be deadly in its refined state.

e_tam.label: E'tam
e_tam.description: Created from the leaves of indigenous plants, E'tam is an organic hallucinogenic drug used by the Xi'an to slow body function and focus in order to achieve a deeper meditative state. For Humans, the effects are much more severe. E'tam causes hyper awareness, cognitive enhancement and improved focus. Users can be so engrossed in tasks that they neglect to eat, sleep or take care of other body functions.

europium.label: Europium
europium.description: The most reactive of the rare earth metals. Europium compounds are often phosphorescent.

feynmaline.label: Feynmaline
feynmaline.description: The paramorphic crystalline structure of this mineral is extremely volatile. When extra energy is introduced, as is typical with modern mining, the ore will often explosively degrade into the more stably structured Janalite. This instability makes Feynamline very dangerous to acquire but also extremely valuable as an industrial anti-matter precursor if it can be properly harvested.

flareweedstalk.label: Flareweed Stalk
flareweedstalk.description: Flareweed is a hearty plant that can survive in harsh environments. With a natural ability to filter out harmful elements from its water supply, flareweed stalks are frequently harvested to be used in filtration systems.

fluorine.label: Fluorine
fluorine.description: A toxic and highly reactive gas that appears pale yellow in its natural state. Very easily forms compounds with almost all other elements.

fotiascrub.label: Fotia Seedpod
fotiascrub.description: The fotia scrub relies on solar flares for its reproduction. Rather than having traditional stamen and pollen, it allows radiation from flares to mutate its genetics before releasing its seedpod. Some enterprising individuals seek out and collect the seedpods because of their natural radiological properties that can be utilized in various ways.

freeze.label: Freeze
freeze.description: A synthetic tranquilizer used for muscle therapy that causes very heavy sedation in the user while also activating the nerve endings in their muscles. Originally created as a way to rebuild damaged/rebuilt muscle tissue, it found another use as a sedative weight-loss supplement, and when in a concentrated form, as a party drug.

fresh_food.label: Fresh Food
fresh_food.description: Various meats, grains and produce that have not yet been cooked, dried, salted, frozen, pickled, or otherwise preserved.

glacosite.label: Glacosite
glacosite.description: As glaciers form, heavier mineral contents sink over time and are then crushed by the weight above as the ice deforms and flows. When the glacier recedes, Glacosite deposits are left behind. White and blue in color, the crystals form in long shiny strands that almost are cotton-like in appearance. Glacosite has found specialized commercial use since it is an extremely light and durable insulator.

glow.label: Glow
glow.description: A variant of the street drug known as "Neon," Glow is formulated to create more euphoric feelings and less hallucinations than are normally associated with other members of its chemical family. The telltale sign of a user is that swallowing the capsule often leaves glowing residue on the tongue. Some people microdose Glow to help them maintain a more positive attitude (being careful to drip the dose directly onto the back of their throat). The main risk is that once the effect wears off people can become suicidally depressed for a short while before their brain chemistry normalizes.

gold.label: Gold
gold.description: A commonly found ductile metal favored for its conductivity. Though it falls in and out of fashion, it is often used for decorative purposes as well.

gold_ore.label: Gold (Ore)
gold_ore.description: A commonly found ductile metal favored for its conductivity. Though it falls in and out of fashion, it is often used for decorative purposes as well.

golden_medmon.label: Golden Medmon
golden_medmon.description: NDR: 39 HEI: 19 Effects: Energizing, Hydrating Grown in temperate climates on the Maru Ebony Tree, Golden Medmons are left to fall off the tree when ripe and collected. The fruit at that stage is extremely firm and astringent. They only become edible after being 'bletted' or softened through ethylene ripening.

hadanite.label: Hadanite
hadanite.description: A crystal oscillator sought out for its extremely high frequency of vibration which makes it useful in various applications.

heart_of_the_woods.label: Heart of the Woods
heart_of_the_woods.description: NDR: 31 Effects: Toxic This fungus produces fleshy deep-red caps that grow in a pattern resembling a internal structure of a heart. Found in cold climates, it typically grows on trees and decaying logs. Not yet successfully cultivated commercially, this deep flavored mushroom is prized by epicureans across the 'verse and can fetch a high price in the right markets. It does contain a mild toxin that is destroyed when cooked, so consuming raw should be avoided.

helium.label: Helium
helium.description: An inert noble gas that is colorless, tasteless, and non-toxic. The second most abundant element in the universe. Produced within stars during the nuclear fusion of hydrogen.

hephaestanite.label: Hephaestanite
hephaestanite.description: Found often near volcanic outcroppings, this mineral is commonly used for a thermal insulator.

hydrogen.label: Hydrogen
hydrogen.description: The most abundant element in the universe. The building block of stars. Highly flammable in its pure form.

inert_materials.label: Inert Materials
inert_materials.description: Non-valuable materials collected during the mining process.

iodine.label: Iodine
iodine.description: The heaviest stable halogen. Sublimes from a purple-black metallic solid into a violet gas.

iron.label: Iron
iron.description: Element Fe, strong, malleable, highly susceptible to rust and found in large volume across most star systems.

jaclium.label: Jaclium
jaclium.description: A naturally occurring rare metal form of jahlium, it is used in the production of extremely strong alloys with incredible tensile strength. Originally confused with common jahlium when first discovered, the above average results when used lead to researchers to realize its value.

jaclium_ore.label: Jaclium (Ore)
jaclium_ore.description: A naturally occurring rare metal form of jahlium, it is used in the production of extremely strong alloys with incredible tensile strength. Originally confused with common jahlium when first discovered, the above average results when used lead to researchers to realize its value.

jahlium.label: Jahlium
jahlium.description: This naturally occurring metal has found use in several industrial applications and in the production of steel alloys that were favored during 28th century space station construction.

janalite.label: Janalite
janalite.description: This rare mineral is valued as an industrial anti-matter precursor. While more stable than other precursors like Feynmaline, it's tougher structure and energy resistance makes it much more difficult to utilize as well as collect.

jumpinglimes.label: Jumping Limes
jumpinglimes.description: NDR: 09 HEI: 06 Effects: Dehydrating Grows on a cactus in the deserts of Yar (Centauri II). A local variant that developed naturally after terraformation was complete, the spiny fruit start off purple and turn green when they are ripe. They acquired their name because of the ease in which they fall off the cactus and attach themselves to clothing and skin, as if they "jumped" there. The leathery, barbed skin must be peeled back to reveal the juicy flesh of the interior. The taste is sweet, extremely tart and astringent. Locals warn that if you become lost in the dessert you should be careful using jumping limes for hydration as they can make you feel even more thirsty.

kopionhorn.label: Kopion Horn
kopionhorn.description: The horn of the kopion is made of a unique combination of bone and naturally-occurring carbon nanomaterials. When properly processed, it can be used to aid in bone regeneration with a far greater rate of success than lab-grown materials. This application has made it a valuable commodity.

kopionhorn_irradiated.label: Irradiated Kopion Horn
kopionhorn_irradiated.description: The horn of the kopion is made of a unique combination of bone and naturally-occurring carbon nanomaterials. This horn was exposed to radiation over a long period of time and has developed unusual coloration.

krypton.label: Krypton
krypton.description: A colorless, tasteless noble gas that appears white in a discharge tube. One of the products of uranium fission.

laranite.label: Laranite
laranite.description: A somewhat radioactive, crystalline gemstone. Black with streaks of dark red, it can only be used as jewelry if shielded.

lastaprene.label: Lastaprene
lastaprene.description: An advanced synthetic polymer designed with optimal properties for several commercial applications. It has greater viscoelasticity than most commonly produced rubbers.

lindinium.label: Lindinium
lindinium.description: A versatile metal that has been successfully alloyed with numerous other elements, miners in the Nyx system have been known to go to great lengths to procure it.

lindinium_ore.label: Lindinium (Ore)
lindinium_ore.description: A versatile metal that has been successfully alloyed with numerous other elements, miners in the Nyx system have been known to go to great lengths to procure this ore.

lithium.label: Lithium
lithium.description: A soft metal with a silvery-white hue. In its natural state, it is highly reactive. Tarnishes quickly when exposed to air.

lycara.label: Lycara
lycara.description: A extremely light and strong carbon composite material first developed for racing ship rudders.

magnesium.label: Magnesium
magnesium.description: An alkaline earth metal with a low melting point. Produced within giant, aging stars, it is ninth most abundant element in the universe.

mala.label: Mala
mala.description: Digestion of the unique toxins found in the Mala fly causes confusion of the congnitive pathways of the brain and results in synesthesia where different sensory experiences cross and mix. Effects described by users range widely; from being able to see music to tasting colors. Since pain does not register the same way while under the influence of the toxin, many people of have been severely injured while "sense swapping." For example, one user lost their arm after perceiving the heat from a thruster engine as pleasurable.

marok_gem.label: Marok Gem
marok_gem.description: The marok has a gizzard, which takes food that has been previously swallowed from the stomach and "chews" it before passing it back into the stomach to be digested. To help this process, the marok's body secretes a substance that hardens into a large crystalline stone that stays in the gizzard and helps food get pulverized more efficiently. The stone has unique conductive properties that make it sought-after for use in computer chips.

maze.label: Maze
maze.description: Street name for a tranquilizer and knock-out hallucinogen that's Tevarin in origin. Dosing up is like taking a massive journey into your own mind. To the outside world, you’re nearly comatose, but to you, it’s a wild trip. A handful of religions have been started after a user took a trip into the maze. Aside from the toxic element, there’s a chance you won’t come down from the high. They call this ‘getting disconnected.’ Users stay locked in their own head until their brain decays. Maze was originally used as a near religious experience for Tevarin warriors to find their path in life. Since the fall of the Tevarin empire, it's become corrupted into a purely recreational drug. The Tevarin who once treated this drug with reverence and ritual, now make boatloads of credits selling it to anyone who wants to risk a potentially dangerous trip.

medgel.label: MedGel
medgel.description: Consumed by medical beds, MedGel provides the key resources needed for cloning and healing.

medpens.label: MedPens
medpens.description: The MedPen from CureLife is a complete multi-function individual first-aid system designed and constructed for the rigors of field use.

medical_supplies.label: Medical Supplies
medical_supplies.description: A variety of items produced primarily to treat injury or illness.

methane.label: Methane
methane.description: A highly flammable gas composed of carbon and hydrogen. It is colorless and odorless in its natural state.

militarysupplies.label: Combat Supplies
militarysupplies.description: A variety of items assembled to support combat forces, such as ammunition, structural repair tools and clothing.

mixedmining.label: Mixed Mining
mixedmining.description: A mixed collection of commodities obtained by mining

mobyglass.label: mobyGlass Personal Computers
mobyglass.description: These knock-off mobiGlas use pirated software and are often infected with spyware and malicious programming.

neodymium.label: Neodymium
neodymium.description: A reactive lanthanide that quickly oxidizes in air, forming layers of tarnish that can be readily peeled.

neograph.label: Neograph
neograph.description: A recently discovered form of graphene, this complicated lattice structure of carbon molecules produces an extremely light and strong material.

neon.label: Neon
neon.description: A psychoactive designer drug known for increased energy, euphoria, and mild hallucinations (particularly how the body processes light). Due to its chemical complexity, it's much more expensive than other street drugs, but is very popular in club culture.

nereus.label: Nereus
nereus.description: Utilizing the dense mineral content of the soil on Pyro II, the nereus coats its spiral shaped seed pods with a shiny metallic-like outer coat. This extremely durable coat protects the seed from damage and ensures that it doesn't sprout until conditions are right.

nitrogen.label: Nitrogen
nitrogen.description: A low-density, diatomic gas with no color or odor in its natural state. A necessary element in human respiration.

omnapoxy.label: Omnapoxy
omnapoxy.description: Durable and resistant, this resin quickly sets when applied to form a hardened polymer.

organimass.label: Organics
organimass.description: PH - Organics are formerly living organisms that have been prepared for other purposes. This includes meat, plant and animal parts, biofuel, and other such items.

osoian_hides.label: Osion Hides
osoian_hides.description: The tanned skins from Osoians, a Fair Chance protected species from Oso II.

ouratite.label: Ouratite
ouratite.description: Notable for its ability to withstand kinetic impacts, ouratite is a solid hydrocarbon that is found only in the Stanton system. Once refined, this rare material can be used as combat armor plating.

oxypens.label: OxyPens
oxypens.description: The OxyPen is an easy-to-carry disposable first-aid system designed by CureLife to refill pressure suit oxygen reserves in emergency situations.

oxygen.label: Oxygen
oxygen.description: The third most abundant element in the universe, oxygen is a highly reactive chalcogen gas that readily forms oxides with other materials.

oza.label: Oza
oza.description: NDR: 09 HEI: 07 Effects: Hydrating A hybrid citrus first grown in Croshaw, it's hardiness, ease of transport, and juice yield has seen it rapidly spread across the Empire. It features thick, bumpy dark green skin, bright orange flesh ribbed with heavy pithing, and no seeds. Tart, sweet and bitter, the taste of Oza often described as being a combination of all the other citrus types rolled into one fruit. Difficult to peel and fibrous, its pulp is not often eaten. Typically it is split open and sucked on, its flesh being discarded. It is also popularly used in many cocktail recipes.

phosphorus.label: Phosphorus
phosphorus.description: Elemental phosphorous is highly flammable and volatile. It readily forms compounds with other materials.

pingala.label: Pingala Seeds
pingala.description: Every aspect of the pingala follows the golden ratio resulting a visually arresting plant. This include its seeds which are highly sought after by plant collectors. Especially since attempts to cultivate the pingala in greenhouse environments has proven extremely difficult.

pitambu.label: Pitambu
pitambu.description: NDR: 25 HEI: 10 Effects: Hydrating, Hypo-Metabolic, Immune Boosting The skin of the pitambu is thin and waxy and easily peeled away using its green leaf-like growths. Inside is a is crisp and watery, bright red flesh which is filled with tiny white seeds that have a mild, nutty taste. The flesh and seeds are traditionally consumed together.

polonium.label: Polonium
polonium.description: A volatile, highly radioactive metal with no stable isotopes. It has a half-life of around 138 days.

praseodymium.label: Praseodymium
praseodymium.description: A malleable and ductile rare earth metal. Highly reactive. Pure praseodymium develops a green coat upon oxidizing.

pressurized_ice.label: Pressurized Ice
pressurized_ice.description: Ice that has been purified and compressed to transparent by restricting natural expansion. This allows for more efficient transport in bulk.

processed_food.label: Processed Food
processed_food.description: A nutritional substance that has been transformed trough physical or chemical means into food.

prota.label: Prota
prota.description: A resilient slime mold that can form in extremely corrosive environments and pressure, Prota secretes a strong adhesive that can be distilled into a commercial-grade glue.

quantainium.label: Quantainium
quantainium.description: A highly unstable mineral used in the production of quantum fuel.

quartz.label: Quartz
quartz.description: A chiral crystal composed of silicon and oxygen that can be found in a wide variety of forms and colors.

quasigrazeregg.label: Desert Quasi Grazer Egg
quasigrazeregg.description: A gourmet egg that is renowned for its complex flavor, it is always in demand from restauranteurs and gourmands alike. The flavor of the egg can vary depending on diet and environment. After the eggs are laid, their shells chemically bond to specialized pouches located on the Quasi grazer's belly, where they are carried until they hatch.

quasigrazertongue.label: Quasi Grazer Tongue
quasigrazertongue.description: The tundra Quasi grazer has evolved a long coat and insulating fat reserves that allow it to stay warm at arctic-level temperatures. The animal's tongue is especially renowned for the fat it contains, which can be rendered into a lubricant that remains fluid in extreme cold.

ranta_dung.label: Ranta Dung
ranta_dung.description: A dry cube-shaped dung that comes from a large isopod-like crustacean known as a Ranta. It has recently been discovered that the dung contains a unique bacterial biome that helps the Ranta process and digest minerals and some researches are hopeful will lead to industrial or medical innovations.

raw_ice.label: Raw Ice
raw_ice.description: Raw Ice can be refined into Hydrogen and Oxygen

raw_ouratite.label: Raw Ouratite
raw_ouratite.description: Notable for its ability to withstand kinetic impacts, ouratite is a solid hydrocarbon that is found only in the Stanton system. Once refined, this rare material can be used as combat armor plating.

raw_silicon.label: Raw Silicon
raw_silicon.description: A strong and brittle element with good thermal conductivity. Crystalizes in a diamond form.

revenant_pod.label: Revenant Pod
revenant_pod.description: Contrary to its ominous name, the Revenant is actually a variety of the Altrucia Tree, an indigenous plant of Terra known for its thick and colorful leaves. Geoengineers introduced fields of Altrucias to Hyperion in an effort to break up the dust storms. Although the project failed, the Altrucia trees adapted to the perpetual wind patterns, shedding its leaves and thickening the wood in the trunk. Botanists initially believed that the Altrucias had died, but on closer inspection, discovered that they were quite alive and thus, the name was born.The pods are collected because the pollen is processed and turned into Altruciatoxin.

riccite.label: Riccite
riccite.description: Found on worlds with heavy seismic activity, this metal is extremely flexible and has some self-healing properties.

riccite_ore.label: Riccite (Ore)
riccite_ore.description: Found on worlds with heavy seismic activity, this metal is extremely flexible and has some self-healing properties.

rubidium.label: Rubidium
rubidium.description: A slightly radioactive metal containing an isotope with a half-life of 49 billion years. Ductile and soft.

sadaryx.label: Sadaryx
sadaryx.description: A durable crystal, sadaryx is commonly used in the production of industrial focal lenses in laser applications.

saldynium.label: Saldynium
saldynium.description: A rare metal that has traditionally been extremely difficult to find in large quantities owing to the particular environmental requirements for its formation. It is sought after for its use in the production of high-powered lasers. It also shows some antimicrobial properties though its scarcity has seen it used less for medical purposes.

saldynium_ore.label: Saldynium (Ore)
saldynium_ore.description: A rare metal that has traditionally been extremely difficult to find in large quantities owing to the particular environmental requirements for its formation. It is sought after for its use in the production of high-powered lasers. It also shows some antimicrobial properties though its scarcity has seen it used less for medical purposes.

sarilus.label: Sarilus
sarilus.description: A material first introduced into Human manufacturing after trade with the Banu. It is extremely distortion resistant. Though Human made Sarilus does a good job, many hold that the Banu manufactured product is superior.

savrilium.label: Savrilium
savrilium.description: This metal, first discovered in the Nyx system, was a main economic driver for early miners of the system thanks to its unique alloyed properties.

savrilium_ore.label: Savrilium (Ore)
savrilium_ore.description: This metal ore, first discovered in the Nyx system, was a main economic driver for early miners of the system thanks to its unique alloyed properties once refined.

scr.label: SCR
scr.description: After centuries of production, this common form of rubber emerged as the the industry standard. Standard Commercial Rubber (SCR) can be produced rapidly and cost effectively.

scrap.label: Scrap
scrap.description: Waste that is ready to be converted into new materials for reuse.

selenium.label: Selenium
selenium.description: A chalcogen often found in combination with heavy metals. In its refined form, it increases in electrical conductivity when exposed to light.

shipammo_size_1.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 1
shipammo_size_1.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 1 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_2.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 2
shipammo_size_2.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 2 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_3.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 3
shipammo_size_3.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 3 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_4.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 4
shipammo_size_4.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 4 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_5.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 5
shipammo_size_5.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 5 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_6.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 6
shipammo_size_6.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 6 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_7.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 7
shipammo_size_7.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 7 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_8.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 8
shipammo_size_8.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 8 ship weaponry, based on volume.

shipammo_size_9.label: Ship Ammunition - Size 9
shipammo_size_9.description: Bulk ammunition servicing size 9 ship weaponry, based on volume.

silicon.label: Silicon
silicon.description: A strong and brittle element with good thermal conductivity. Crystalizes in a diamond form.

silnex.label: Silnex
silnex.description: An advanced silica ceramic developed by early RSI researchers to allow ships to better withstand atmospheric reentry.

slam.label: SLAM
slam.description: Most commonly ingested as a gas. Vials of SLAM are cracked and inhaled. Initially developed as a performance enhancer for athletes, SLAM targets the user's nervous system acting as a fear-inhibitor and painkiller. Once the severe physical side effects were discovered, the drug went underground and found popularity among mercs and outlaws who relied on it to provide that slight edge in combat. Unfortunately, SLAM is also heavily addictive, so many of these mercs ended up getting burned out on the drug. Heavy-duty SLAM junkies are easily identifiable in public; they have ‘the shakes’ -- involuntary muscle twitches. Important to note that this is not a sign of withdrawal, simply a side effect.

sodium.label: Sodium
sodium.description: Soft, shiny and silvery-white, the highly reactive sodium cannot be found as a native metal. It must be extracted from compounds.

special_holidaybox.label: Luminalia Gift
special_holidaybox.description: A small, wrapped package meant to get you in the Luminalia spirit. Banu merchants celebrating the holiday used to hide small gifts aboard their ship to encourage revelers to explore all their wares. As the holiday grew in popularity within the UEE, Human merchants modified this tradition by hiding empty gift-wrapped packages around a space station or landing zone that could be exchanged for credits if returned unopened. The increased foot traffic into their stores spurned holiday sales and became a tradition in its own right. Stow this gift for sentimental value, or sell it at a commodities terminal and spend the credits on a holiday gift for yourself.

special_lunar_envelope_1_dog_a.label: Year of the Dog Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_dog_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Dog. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

special_lunar_envelope_1_monkey_a.label: Year of the Monkey Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_monkey_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Monkey. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

special_lunar_envelope_1_pig_a.label: Year of the Pig Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_pig_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Pig. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

special_lunar_envelope_1_ram_a.label: Year of the Ram Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_ram_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Ram. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

special_lunar_envelope_1_rat_a.label: Year of the Rat Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_rat_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Rat. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

special_lunar_envelope_1_rooster_a.label: Year of the Rooster Envelope
special_lunar_envelope_1_rooster_a.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Rooster. Exchanging these envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need. Stow the envelope as a token of luck, share it with a friend or loved one to spread good fortune, or exchange it at a commodities terminal and use the credits for a prosperous beginning to a new cycle.

special_lunar_envelope.label: Year of the Horse Envelope
special_lunar_envelope.description: A gilded red envelope celebrating the Year of the Horse. Exchanging gilded red envelopes is one of the most popular ways of celebrating Red Festival. Often the envelope may include a small amount of credits inside to help those you care about have a strong start in the upcoming cycle. Growing in popularity is the newer tradition of hiding the envelopes as a way of spreading good fortune and prosperity to those that fate has deemed in need.

spiral.label: Lunes (Spiral Fruit)
spiral.description: NDR: 23 HEI: 10 Effects: Hydrating The Lunes is a deciduous tree native to the warmer areas of Osha in Kilian system. It bears an edible fruit known as a Lunes fruit or a Spiral Fruit based on the circular ridges that can form once the fruit begins to ripen. The fruit’s skin is covered with a short fuzz that is generally removed before consumption. When ripe, the Lunes is a very sweet and juicy flavor and have become a very popular summer delicacy, commonly found in ice cream and other desserts.

steel.label: Steel
steel.description: An alloy of iron and carbon, this ancient material is still in uses thanks to its affordable price and high tensile strength.

stileron.label: Stileron
stileron.description: This metal is ideally suited to the rigors of physical-based warfare. It is favored by defense manufacturers in armor construction for its ability to take a beating. However, it does not handle distortion well and is notoriously difficult to refine.

stileron_ore.label: Stileron (Ore)
stileron_ore.description: This metal is ideally suited to the rigors of physical-based warfare. It is favored by defense manufacturers in armor construction for its ability to take a beating. However, it does not handle distortion well and is notoriously difficult to refine.

stonebugshell.label: Stone Bug Shell
stonebugshell.description: Known to curl into a tight ball when threatened, the stone bug is sought after for its tough shell, which can be removed and used as a durable material that has even been utilized in certain armor composites.

sulfermoss.label: Sulfer Moss
sulfermoss.description: Found near warm vents, this algae feeds off the planets nutrient rich but extremely hard ground by slowly dissolving layers of the rock away. Grows in large textured patches, could potentially be like large grassy plains.

sunset_berries.label: Sunset Berries
sunset_berries.description: NDR: 08 HEI: 06 Effect: Toxic These sunset-hued berries grow best in cold climates. They are toxic and not suitable for Human consumption. Eating them can result in symptoms such as vomiting and extreme cramping. Higher dosages have been known to be fatal. While the raw unprocessed berries are very bitter and tannic, once fermented, the resulting poisonous brew has a very sweet taste and is more commonly known as "Death Wine." Recently, medical researchers are investigating if the toxin in sunset berries could be used to help treat nerve damage or neurological diseases.

taranite.label: Taranite
taranite.description: Extremely conductive, this mineral was first discovered when a researcher noticed a breed of electrosensitive hermit crab using pieces of it to form its shell.

tellurium.label: Tellurium
tellurium.description: Tellurium is a brittle, mildly toxic metalloid that is sometimes found in a chemical compound with gold. Has the highest melting and boiling points of the chalcogens.

thermalfoam.label: ThermalFoam
thermalfoam.description: A light and flexible heat insulating foam. Must be stored under very high pressure to avoid it setting before application.

thorium.label: Thorium
thorium.description: A naturally occurring, weakly radioactive metal. Easily forms alloys with other metals. When exposed to oxygen, its silvery surface turns black.

thrust.label: Thrust
thrust.description: This cocktail of chemicals provides the user with a massive boost of energy, increased sociability, euphoria, and heightened tactile sensitivity. Rumored to have been developed as an energy drink base, this drug has proven popular among those wishing for extra energy or to "party longer." However, owing to the risk of heart attack, deadly dehydration, and seizures, the mix has been banned in most areas. Users can be identified by their stuttering, rambling speech, flushed skin, and sweating.

tin.label: Tin
tin.description: Tin is a pliable, soft metal, with a silvery white-blue tint. It is conductive and resistance to corrosion.

tin_ore.label: Tin (Ore)
tin_ore.description: Tin is a pliable, soft metal, with a silvery white-blue tint. It is conductive and resistance to corrosion.

titanium.label: Titanium
titanium.description: This silver-colored chemical element is excellent at producing strong, lightweight alloys.

titanium_ore.label: Titanium (Ore)
titanium_ore.description: This silver-colored chemical element is excellent at producing strong, lightweight alloys.

torite.label: Torite
torite.description: Found throughout the Nyx system, this common metal has been mined by local inhabitants for a variety of uses though it has yet to be adopted wider.

torite_ore.label: Torite (Ore)
torite_ore.description: Found throughout the Nyx system, this common metal ore has been mined by local inhabitants for a variety of uses though it has yet to be adopted wider.

tungsten.label: Tungsten
tungsten.description: Used in many different alloys, tungsten in its pure form becomes malleable while maintaining its hardness.

tungsten_ore.label: Tungsten (Ore)
tungsten_ore.description: Used in many different alloys, tungsten in its pure form becomes malleable while maintaining its hardness.

type_hpmc.label: HexaPolyMesh Coating
type_hpmc.description: This liquid hexagonal lattice bonds readily to surfaces when electrically charged, solidifying almost instantaneously to create an incredibly strong and durable polymer mesh that maintains integrity at a range of temperatures and pressures.

type_mineral.label: Mineral
type_mineral.description: Naturally occurring abiogenic compounds that are typically crystalline in nature with an ordered atomic arrangement.

rmc.label: Recycled Material Composite
rmc.description: Recycled Material Composite, commonly referred to as RMC, is the end result of low-tier salvaging where a myriad of alloys and polymers are mixed together during the collection process.

agricultural_supplies.label: Agricultural Supply
agricultural_supplies.description: Items required for agricultural production. Includes fertilizers, feed, and pesticides.

type_alloy.label: Alloy
type_alloy.description: Substances that are compounds of two or more metals or other materials with improved properties over the base ingredients.

type_consumergoods.label: Consumer Goods
type_consumergoods.description: Commodities that are purchased by an individual to satisfy their wants or needs.

type_food.label: Food
type_food.description: Any substance that can be safely consumed by a living organism for the purpose of nutritional support.

type_gas.label: Gas
type_gas.description: A substance that when under standard pressure has vast distance between particles with weaker intermolecular bonds than other phases of matter.

type_manmade.label: Man-made
type_manmade.description: Commodities manufactured or constructed through industrial processes rather as opposed to being naturally occurring.

type_medicalsupply.label: Medical Supply
type_medicalsupply.description: A variety of items produced primarily to treat injury or illness.

type_metal.label: Metal
type_metal.description: A solid material that typically shiny and opaque and possesses good electrical and thermal conductivity.

type_militarysupply.label: Military Supply
type_militarysupply.description: A variety of items assembled to support combat forces, including ammunition, structural repair tools and clothing.

type_natural.label: Natural Materials
type_natural.description: Materials that are naturally occurring and can be extracted directly from the environment.

type_nonmetals.label: Nonmetals
type_nonmetals.description: These elements do not display the properties of a metal and are generally poor conductors of heat and electricity.

hydrogen_fuel.label: Hydrogen Fuel
hydrogen_fuel.description: Hydrogen that is energized and then used by thrusters to propel vehicles.

type_processedgoods.label: Processed Goods
type_processedgoods.description: Items that are manufactured or assembled from a conglomeration of components.

quantum_fuel.label: Quantum Fuel
quantum_fuel.description: Fuel used by quantum drives to propel ships at high speeds or, if equipped with a jump module, through jump tunnels to other systems.

type_scrap.label: Scrap
type_scrap.description: Waste that is ready to be converted into new materials for reuse.

type_vice.label: Vice
type_vice.description: Items that are regarded as immoral or harmful by society.

type_waste.label: Waste
type_waste.description: Unwanted and unusable materials that are designated to be discarded.

uncutslam.label: Uncut SLAM
uncutslam.description: Initially developed for athletes before being outlawed, SLAM acts as a combat performance enhancer, targeting the user's nervous system as a fear-inhibitor and painkiller. Uncut SLAM is the concentrated form of the drug, and must be diluted to non-lethal dosages before it can be packaged into dispersal vials and consumed.

uranium.label: Uranium
uranium.description: Once enriched, radioactive uranium is commonly used in energy production. Though once depleted, its hardness lends itself to structural uses like plating.

valakkarfang.label: Valakkarfang
valakkarfang.description: The valakkar continually sheds its teeth throughout its lifetime. As the animal burrows through the sand and catches prey, its teeth are frequently damaged. Once a new tooth finishes forming, it severs the connective tissue that was holding the old tooth in place, causing it to break off and fall to the ground. The fangs of the valakkar can also be extracted from the animal's mouth after its death. Collectors seek out the valakkar fangs for use in crafting various luxury items.

valakkarfang_irradiated.label: Valakkarfang Irradiated
valakkarfang_irradiated.description: The valakkar continually sheds its teeth throughout its lifetime. As the animal burrows through the sand and catches prey, its teeth are frequently damaged. Once a new tooth finishes forming, it severs the connective tissue that was holding the old tooth in place, causing it to break off and fall to the ground. The fangs of the valakkar can also be extracted from the animal's mouth after its death. This fang was exposed to radiation over a long period of time and has developed unusual coloration.

valakkarhide_irradiated.label: Irradiated Valakkar Hide
valakkarhide_irradiated.description: Thick skin that the grows over a forming valakkar pearl.

valakkarpearl_irradiated.label: Valakkarpearl Irradiated
valakkarpearl_irradiated.description: The valakkar pearl is harvested from the skin of the valakkar. As the valakkar moves through its environment, a large piece of grit will sometimes penetrate its thick hide. If the grit is unable to be expelled on its own, the valakkar's skin will grow to encase it. Layers of organic matter will then coat the piece of grit, isolating it from the valakkar's vulnerable dermis, thus ensuring that it will not cause infection. These "pearls" can become substantial in size over time. Because the valakkar that grew this pearl was exposed to radiation over a long period of time, it has developed unusual properties.

ventslug.label: Vent Slug
ventslug.description: NDR: 19 HEI: 05 Effects: Toxic, Cognitive Impairing These slugs live in moist environments and eat mold that grows there. They can frequently be found inside and near life support vents where condensation can accumulate and are often brought aboard stations to help keep systems clean. Can be consumed, but they often can be mildly toxic to Humans owing to their diet.

waste.label: Waste
waste.description: Unwanted and unusable materials that are designated to be discarded.

waste_rock.label: Rock
waste_rock.description: Excess rock which is a by-product of the mining process.

widow.label: WiDoW
widow.description: Thick, ink-black synthetic opioid commonly used as a recreational drug. WiDoW has spread like wildfire throughout the Empire thanks to the fact that it's relatively easy to produce. This also creates a wide variety of quality between batches of the drug. Designed to be injected as a liquid directly into the bloodstream, the name derived from one of the main side effects from extensive use, the drug stains the veins black, creating web-like subcutaneous patterns through the body. Illegal inside the UEE.

wuotanseed.label: Wuotan Seed
wuotanseed.description: Harvested from the wuotan plant, these seed pods become bioluminescent when ripe to draw attention and encourage their spread. They are often collected to utilize as a natural light source.

xapyen.label: Xa'Pyen
xapyen.description: Only recently used in Human manufacturing, this complex alloy of Xi'an origin is a jack of all trades that is extremely useful in numerous applications.

xenon.label: Xenon
xenon.description: A dense, odorless, colorless noble gas that is generally unreactive. Exhibits a bluish glow when excited by electrical discharge.

yormandi_eye.label: Yormandi Eye
yormandi_eye.description: Able to thrive in a wide variety of environments, the yormandi has a robust immune system that responds to unknown pathogens at incredible speed. Its eyes contain antibodies that are much sought-after by medical researchers.

yormandi_tongue.label: Yormandi Tongue
yormandi_tongue.description: The yormandi uses its sensitive tongue to taste its surroundings and detect prey from great distances. Renowned for its complex, subtle flavor, the tip of this organ is sought after by culinary enthusiasts throughout the Empire.

zeta_prolanide.label: Zeta-Prolanide
zeta_prolanide.description: This chemical is an industrial reactant that has found widespread use neutralizing irradiated materials. Because of how volatile it is, it must be kept in an electrically charged state or else a rapid exothermic reaction may occur before desired.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: Zip is a hyper-accelerant that when added directly to the bloodstream, "supercharges" the user's nervous system causing sensory hallucinations such as colors become more vivid and hearing sounds that aren't there. These effects tend to make users seem to be in constant motion and easily distracted.

behr_lasercannon_s4.label: M6A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 4 Behring's M6A is a versatile high velocity energy autocannon, designed to provide to keep your enemy at range without sacrificing your stopping power.

flair_mug_stella_fortuna_1_a.label: 2954 Tempt Fate Tankard
flair_mug_stella_fortuna_1_a.description: Featuring a clover motif with an antique finish, this pewter and brass tankard is perfect for making a traditional Stella Fortuna toast to "Tempt Fate."

flair_mug_stella_fortuna_1_b.label: 2954 Luck's Favor Tankard
flair_mug_stella_fortuna_1_b.description: Beautifully crafted from genuine wood with pewter accents, this Stella Fortuna themed tankard features a compass star and a reminder that "Luck Favors the Bold."

grin_craftingstation_001.label: ReCast Station
grin_craftingstation_001.description: Item Type: Manufacturing Station Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Class: Industrial The ReCast ship-based manufacturing station that can store raw materials into custom crafted containers, as well as use those same resources to craft several useful items, like multitools, allowing for longer expeditions and more sustainable operations.

grin_salvagefield_001.label: Renovar XTR Salvage Beam
grin_salvagefield_001.description: Item Type: Field Emitter Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Class: Industrial Designed to easily break down debris and vehicles into material composite, the Renovar XTR Salvage Beam has become the industry-standard for structural salvage. It alternates between two field modes: Fracture, which uses high-frequency vibrations to break objects apart, and Disintegration, which reduces the pieces into a usable resource.

hornet_f7cr_mk2_paint_green_orange.label: Hornet Mk II Bracken Livery
hornet_f7cr_mk2_paint_green_orange.description: Mark the occasion with a splash of color thanks to the Bracken livery featuring a sage green hull paired with deep orange accents.

hornet_f7cs_mk2_paint_black_grey.label: Hornet Mk II Blacksmith Livery
hornet_f7cs_mk2_paint_black_grey.description: While few would describe the Hornet Mk II as understated, the sleek two-tone black and grey finish of the Blacksmith livery comes close.

hornet_f7cs_mk2_paint_green_gold.label: Hornet Mk II Regalia Livery
hornet_f7cs_mk2_paint_green_gold.description: Not every pilot was meant to fly a Hornet Mk II. Mark your distinction with the Regalia livery's emerald green hull paired with eye-catching gold accents.

moth_paint_green_grey_orange.label: MOTH Juniper Livery
moth_paint_green_grey_orange.description: Make the MOTH green with grey and orange highlights by equipping the Juniper livery.

reclaimer_craftingstorage.label: Reclaimer Material Depot
reclaimer_craftingstorage.description: Item Type: Storage Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Capacity: 360 SCU This internal storage space contains all raw materials a Reclaimer collects until they are fed into the ship’s manufacturing stations.

reclaimer_salvageclaw.label: Midas Salvage Claw
reclaimer_salvageclaw.description: Item Type: Manipulator Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Class: Industrial This heavy-duty claw allows an onboard technician to manipulate and collect salvage.

stor_opencontainer_shared.label: Stor*All 1 SCU Self-Storage Container
stor_opencontainer_shared.description: Designed by one of the most trusted names in cargo pods, the Stor*All Self-Storage Container provides a convenient place to keep anything too cumbersome to carry on your person. Its durable impact-resistant construction is sealed to survive the vacuum of space.

syulen_paint_chiing_whitegold.label: Syulen Ch.iing Livery
syulen_paint_chiing_whitegold.description: Make your Syulen stand out from the crowd with the Ch.iing livery that's white marbled with gold accents.

syulen_paint_chuia_bluegold.label: Syulen Chui'a Livery
syulen_paint_chuia_bluegold.description: Make your Syulen stand out from the crowd with the Chui'a livery that's blue marbled with gold accents and evokes passing waves.

syulen_paint_taomoa_blackbronze.label: Syulen Tao'moa Livery
syulen_paint_taomoa_blackbronze.description: Make your Syulen stand out from the crowd with the Tao'moa livery that's obsidian black marbled with bronze accents.

syulen_paint_thlun_purplebronze.label: Syulen Thlun Livery
syulen_paint_thlun_purplebronze.description: Make your Syulen stand out from the crowd with the Thlun livery that's purple marbled with bronze accents.

vulture_craftingstorage.label: Vulture Material Depot
vulture_craftingstorage.description: Item Type: Storage Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary Capacity: 14 SCU This internal storage space contains all raw materials a Vulture collects until they are fed into the ship’s manufacturing station.

987_shirt_04.label: Tempus Tank Sable
987_shirt_04.description: This classic tank by 987 is made with moisture-wicking fabric to keep you cool when you're at your most active. Each shirt comes with a bracer and a bandolier to create a bold and aggressive style.

nvy_flightsuit_light_core_01_01_01.label: Sol-III Core Aviator
nvy_flightsuit_light_core_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU Backpacks: Light Inspired by the original flight suits worn by Earth's Air Force, this replica stays true to the historical design while incorporating modern comforts. The Aviator edition is primarily green-beige with light green accents.

nvy_flightsuit_light_core_01_02_01.label: Sol-III Core Bombardier
nvy_flightsuit_light_core_01_02_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU Backpacks: Light Inspired by the original flight suits worn by Earth's Air Force, this replica stays true to the historical design while incorporating modern comforts. The Bombardier edition is primarily a stone color with dark brown accents.

sch_monocle_01.label: Jacopo Monocle
sch_monocle_01.description: As part of their Dafne collection, Derion is proud to present the Jacopo monocle. This diamond-laminate accessory features a tungsten chain and features the latest upgradable optiVis interface for unmatched comfort.

sch_tophat_01.label: Jacopo Tophat
sch_tophat_01.description: As part of their Dafne collection, Derion is proud to present the Jacopo tophat. Perfect for an elegant night on the town, this gossamer-lined top hat was commissioned in honor of the Port Renatus Metropolitan Opera House Quincentennial.

srvl_armor_heavy_arms_02.label: Dust Devil Armor Arms
srvl_armor_heavy_arms_02.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -85 / 115 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Salvaged pieces of disused protective gear were welded together to make this intimidating armor set.

vpw_bouncer_gloves_01_01_01.label: 2Tuf Gloves
vpw_bouncer_gloves_01_01_01.description: The 2Tuf features an ultrasoft cloth lining paired with a durable lab-grown leather exterior for comfort and unrestricted mobility. Thanks to a simple design with reinforced stitching, the glove can survive a rough night on the streets and still be ready for elegant evening out.

nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1_lamp.label: Gamma LL (1x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Whether under the blazing sun or on the dark side of a moon, the NV-TAC Gamma projects an easy to see reticle to help ensure your shot finds its mark. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

nvtc_optics_holo_x2_s1_lamp.label: Gamma Duo LL (2x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x2_s1_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 NV-TAC extensively tested the Gamma Duo across a range of extreme temperatures to assure that thermal drift doesn't affect the accuracy of this 2x magnifier sight. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1_lamp.label: Gamma Plus LL (3x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 NV-TAC's Gamma Plus is a 3x magnifier sight that utilizes ReadyBrite projection for quick target acquisition. Its durable design makes it perfect for any tactical situation. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1_lamp.label: Delta LL (1x Reflex)
nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Reflex Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Ideal for civilians and professionals, the Delta non-magnifying reflex sight from NV-TAC provides a precise illuminated target marker, visible across a wide range of light levels. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2_lamp.label: Tau Plus LL (4x Telescopic)
nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 4x Aim Time: +25% Size: 2 The Tau Plus 4x telescopic sight from NV-TAC uses a proprietary optics coating to ensure a crystal clear image regardless of light levels and conditions, allowing you to precisely engage targets at medium range. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

nvtc_optics_tsco_x8_s3_lamp.label: Theta Pro LL (8x Telescopic)
nvtc_optics_tsco_x8_s3_lamp.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 8x Aim Time: +0% Size: 3 Carefully crafted and calibrated, the Theta Pro delivers precise and effective long distance combat engagement capabilities thanks to its powerful 8x telescopic sight. This version of the scope includes low-light functionality suitable for operations in dim environments.

qdrv_tars_s03_ranger_scitem.label: Ranger
qdrv_tars_s03_ranger_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Rely on the Ranger to guide you through the stars. The quality and reliability of this classic Tarsus quantum drive has made it a ship staple for centuries.

aegs_manned_turret_s07_missile_rack_besp.label: IFR-MS7 Turret
aegs_manned_turret_s07_missile_rack_besp.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 7 This manned turret, designed by Aegis to be used in tandem with the IFR-532 missile rack, is bespoke to the Idris frigate.

100_series_luminalia_green_red.label: 100 Series Deck the Hull Livery
100_series_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

100_series_luminalia_white_blue.label: 100 Series IceBreak Livery
100_series_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your 100 Series with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

100_series_paint_fleetweek_level1_milita.label: 100 Series Timberline Livery
100_series_paint_fleetweek_level1_milita.description: Customize your 100 series ship with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

100_series_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: 100 Series Frostbite Camo Livery
100_series_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your 100 series ship.

100_series_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: 100 Series Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
100_series_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your 100 series ship a striking style.

100_series_paint_unity.label: 100 Series Foundation Fest Livery
100_series_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

100i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.label: 100i 2954 Auspicious Red Dog Livery
100i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dog livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dog.

100i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_drag.label: 100i 2954 Auspicious Red Dragon Livery
100i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_drag.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dragon livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dragon.

100i_paint_black_orange.label: 100 Series Flame Livery
100i_paint_black_orange.description: Customize your Origin 100 series ship with this grey and orange livery.

100i_paint_blue_gold.label: 100 Series Blue Ametrine Livery
100i_paint_blue_gold.description: Customize your Origin 100 series ship with this blue and yellow livery.

100i_paint_blue_pink.label: 100 Series Melrose Livery
100i_paint_blue_pink.description: Customize your Origin 100 series ship with this teal and pink livery.

100i_paint_camo_black.label: 100 Series Slate Camo Livery
100i_paint_camo_black.description: Customize your Origin 100 series ship with this gray camo livery.

100i_paint_sand_red.label: 100 Series Sand Wave Livery
100i_paint_sand_red.description: Customize your Origin 100 series ship with this sandstone, grey and orange livery.

10mm_pistol_ballistic.label: 10mm Ammo
10mm_pistol_ballistic.description: Traditional gun powder based ammunition that fires slugs from a shell, detonated by a firing pin. The slug trails down a barrel to help guide its trajectory.

10mm_rifle_laser.label: PC-FF
10mm_rifle_laser.description: The Plasma Coil - Field Fusion tangles 2 streams of plasma energy into a dense coil before unraveling it, allowing it to shoot far distances with intense energy. Unfortunately this process creates a lot of sound for the user, even though many muffle mechanics are usually built within the chamber of weapons that use this type of plasma energy.

12g_electric.label: 12G PS-10
12g_electric.description: Pulse Slug 10 is a small focused energy that molds into the shape of a small ball of energy. The projectile shocks biotics and disrupts electronics. It can be clustered or shot in single form, but the chaotic nature of how the slugs are created from the energy can cause chaotic formations in its execution, much like a bubble gun.

25mm_special_ballistic.label: 25mm mX Shatter Rocket
25mm_special_ballistic.description: The mX-Shatter Rocket is a rocket that scatters small explosives on impact or after a very brief period of time. Whenever the rocket shoots out the smaller explosives fire off in random directions, excellent for clearing out areas. Every shatter rocket has a cluster of about 20 small explosives that aren't as powerful as frag grenades on their own, but combined are about the same as a frag grenade.

2ghz_microwave_energy.label: UC
2ghz_microwave_energy.description: Uranium Core ammunition stabilizes uranium for portable weapon usage in small doses. Each 'magazine' contains a set charge of power with the uranium and can be safely disposed of/stored after use. When used, it controls an intense amount of radioactive energy from whatever method the radiation is disposed. The condensed radiation is powerful enough to get through most armor types except Heavy/TITAN armor.

300i_hapr_vp_rmi_s3_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HE 5.3
300i_hapr_vp_rmi_s3_q2.description: The Hammer Propulsion HE5.3 features a high output, fuel efficient design. Its thrust output and low fuel consumption make it ideal for long hauls though it has been reported to be somewhat of a missile magnet on occasions where owners have been subject to pirate activity.

325a_hapr_vp_rmi_s3_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HE 5.3
325a_hapr_vp_rmi_s3_q2.description: The Hammer Propulsion HE5.3 features a high output, fuel efficient design. Its thrust output and low fuel consumption make it ideal for long hauls though it has been reported to be somewhat of a missile magnet on occasions where owners have been subject to pirate activity.

350r_hapr_vp_esi_s3_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HM 4.3
350r_hapr_vp_esi_s3_q2.description: The Hammer Propulsion Twin HM4.3 is notable for the fact that it utilizes 2 high-performance TR3 thrusters in a small package. An unusual application, the original design was a joint collaboration between Hammer Propulsion and the Origin Jumpworks racing team. With the additional thrust provided by a second thruster the Twin HM4.3 is ideal for applications where speed is the goal. Speed comes at a cost, however; this configuration has a thirst for fuel that rivals much larger single thruster systems, and with all of its available space being taken up by the thruster internals not much space is left for durability reinforcement. This makes the HM4.3 ideal for most racing pilots, but less suitable for combat-oriented missions.

400i_paint_2952fortuna_green_grey.label: 400i Fortuna Livery
400i_paint_2952fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

400i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.label: 400i 2954 Auspicious Red Dog Livery
400i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dog livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dog.

400i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_drag.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dragon livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dragon.

400i_paint_afterglow_black_orange.label: 400i Afterglow Livery
400i_paint_afterglow_black_orange.description: Black envelopes most of the Afterglow livery for the 400i while orange accent lines provide a pop of color.

400i_paint_calacatta_black_white.label: 400i Calacatta Livery
400i_paint_calacatta_black_white.description: Balancing black and white, the Calacatta livery for the 400i accentuates the unique shape of the ship.

400i_paint_citcon_meridian.label: 400i Meridian Livery
400i_paint_citcon_meridian.description: The Meridian livery gives the 400i a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

400i_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: 400i Stormbringer Livery
400i_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom 400i livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

400i_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: 400i Polar Livery
400i_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your 400i with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.
