400i_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

400i_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: 400i IceBreak Livery
400i_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your 400i with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

400i_paint_penumbra_black_gold.label: 400i Penumbra Livery
400i_paint_penumbra_black_gold.description: Inky black and shimmering gold combine for the Penumbra livery, making it an elegant option for the 400i.

400i_paint_stratus_grey_yellow.label: 400i Stratus Livery
400i_paint_stratus_grey_yellow.description: The Stratus livery for the 400i punctuates the grey wings and white main body with a vibrant yellow accent border.

5mm_rifle_ballistic.label: 5.56mm Gauss AP
5mm_rifle_ballistic.description: The size of a traditional 5.56mm x 45mm but built for Gauss mechanics, providing very high accuracy and extremely fast projectile speeds. The 5.56mm slug is made out of a dense tungsten and lightweight carbon mixture, to allow maximum penetration in this Armor Penetration form.

600i_paint_2952fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

600i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dog livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dog.

600i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_drag.label: 600i 2954 Auspicious Red Dragon Livery
600i_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_drag.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dragon livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dragon.

600i_paint_bis2951.label: 600i 2951 Best in Show Livery
600i_paint_bis2951.description: Celebrate the 600i being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2951 with this special blue and black livery.

600i_paint_bis2953_purple_blue_cyan.description: Celebrate the Origin 600i being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2953 with this pearlescent purple and cyan livery.

600i_paint_iae_2952_black_red.label: 600i Cold Forge Livery
600i_paint_iae_2952_black_red.description: Give your 600i a classic metallic tint with stylish red and black highlights with the Cold Forge livery.

600i_paint_iae_2952_metal.description: The Sterling livery gives the 600i a simple yet striking metallic finish with blue highlights.

600i_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

6mm_pistol_laser.description: Pulse Slug 10 is a small focused energy that molds into the shape of a small ball of energy. The projectile shocks biotics and disrupts electronics. It can be clustered or shot in single form, but the chaotic nature of how the slugs are created from the energy can cause chaotic formations in its execution, much like a bubble gun.

890j_paint_black_gold.label: 890 Jump Penumbra Livery
890j_paint_black_gold.description: Inky black and shimmering gold combine for the Penumbra livery, making it an elegant option for the 890 Jump.

890j_paint_blue_red.label: 890 Jump Skyline Livery
890j_paint_blue_red.description: The Skyline livery for the 890 Jump is a beautiful blue with red highlights.

890j_paint_steel.description: The Meridian livery gives the 890 Jump a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

aegs_avenger_shop.label: Aegis Avenger
aegs_avenger_shop.description: Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamic Focus: Interdiction The Aegis Avenger has had a long and storied life as the standard patrol craft of the UEE Advocacy. Although aging, the Avenger features a sturdy, reliable hull and the capacity for larger-than-expected engine mounts.

aegs_emp_device.label: REP-8 EMP Generator
aegs_emp_device.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: EMP Generator The REP-8 is a highly regarded EMP-focused burst generator from Behring. It balances a manageable charge time with a strong blast of distortion damage that knocks out electronic components caught within its radius. Solid engineering and centuries of use have made this a standard non-lethal deterrent across the Empire.

aegs_emp_sentinel_s4.label: REP-VS EMP Generator
aegs_emp_sentinel_s4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Burst Generator Size: 4 Damage Type: EMP Deliver distortion damage with the REP-VS burst generator built specifically for the Aegis Vanguard Sentinel. Behring modified the technology used in their reputable REP-8 to design an effective non-lethal weapon that integrates seamlessly with the Sentinel.

aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s03.label: Aegis Eclipse 20xS3 Bomb Rack
aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s03.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S3 Built specifically for the Eclipse, this bomb rack carries 20 S3 bombs.

aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s05.label: Aegis Eclipse 4xS5 Bomb Rack
aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s05.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S5 Built specifically for the Eclipse, this bomb rack carries 4 S5 bombs.

aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s10.label: Aegis Eclipse 1xS10 Bomb Rack
aegs_eclipse_bombrack_s10.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S10 Built specifically for the Eclipse, this bomb rack carries 1 S10 bombs.

aegs_gladius_nose_s2.label: S3 Gimbal - Nose
aegs_gladius_nose_s2.description: Class 2 Scorpion GT-215 turret mount description

aegs_gladius_shop.label: Aegis Dynamics Gladius
aegs_gladius_shop.description: Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Focus: Light Fighter The Gladius is an older design which has been updated over the years to keep up with modern technology. In military circles, the Gladius is beloved for its performance and its simplicity. A fast, light fighter with a laser-focus on dogfighting, the Gladius is an ideal interceptor or escort ship.

aegs_idris_scitem_turret_large.label: IFR-A77 Turret
aegs_idris_scitem_turret_large.description: Item Type: Manned Turret Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 7 This manned turret, designed by Aegis to be equipped with two size 7 weapons, is bespoke to the Idris frigate.

aegs_idris_scitem_turret_large_p.label: IFR-W57 Turret
aegs_idris_scitem_turret_large_p.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 7 This manned turret, designed by Aegis to be equipped with two size 5 weapons, is bespoke to the Idris frigate.

aegs_mrck_s05_bespoke.label: IFR-532 Missile Rack
aegs_mrck_s05_bespoke.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 5 Missiles: 3x32 Designed to bolster the offensive capabilities of the Idris, this missile rack was made by Aegis Dynamics specifically for the famed frigate.

aegs_mrck_s08_bespoke.label: IFR-810 Missile Rack
aegs_mrck_s08_bespoke.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 8 Missiles: 5x10 Designed to bolster the offensive capabilities of the Idris, this missile rack was made by Aegis Dynamics specifically for the famed frigate.

aegs_manned_turret_s07_ballistic_cannon_.label: IFR-BC7 Turret
aegs_manned_turret_s07_ballistic_cannon_.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 7 This manned turret, designed by Aegis to be used with ballistic cannons, is bespoke to the Idris frigate.

aegs_redeemer_shop.label: Aegis Dynamics Redeemer
aegs_redeemer_shop.description: Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Focus: Gunship Now you can own the Next Great Starship! Designed by Star Citizen's backers, the Aegis Redeemer is a powerful fighting ship capable of holding its own in combat with a powerful weapons payload. Dotted with turrets and missiles, the Redeemer also doubles as an armored landing craft capable of delivering armored soldiers for first person combat!

aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s03_front.label: Aegis Retaliator 64xS3 Front Bomb Rack
aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s03_front.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S3 Made to fit the front of the Retaliator, this rack can carry 64 S3 bombs.

aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s03_rear.label: Aegis Retaliator 48xS3 Rear Bomb Rack
aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s03_rear.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S3 Made to fit the rear of the Retaliator, this rack can carry 48 S3 bombs.

aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s05_front.label: Aegis Retaliator 8xS5 Front Bomb Rack
aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s05_front.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S5 Made to fit the front of the Retaliator, this rack can carry 8 S5 bombs.

aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s05_rear.label: Aegis Retaliator 8xS5 Rear Bomb Rack
aegs_retaliator_bombrack_s05_rear.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: S5 Made to fit the rear of the Retaliator, this rack can carry 8 S5 bombs.

aegs_retaliator_shop.label: Aegis Retaliator
aegs_retaliator_shop.description: Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Focus: Heavy Bomber This civilian refit of the Retaliator trades the ship's massive torpedo bays for equally massive cargo capacity.

aegs_s1_rack_x2.label: Aegis S1 Double Platform
aegs_s1_rack_x2.description: Manufacturer: Aegis Item Type: Missile Rack Size: 2 Missiles: 2xS1 Designed for compatible Aegis ships, the Double Platform will carry two S1 missiles and sync seamlessly with the weapons system for reliable launch every time.

aegs_s2_rack_x1.label: Aegis Single Platform
aegs_s2_rack_x1.description: Designed for compatible Aegis ships, the Single Platform will carry one S2 missile and sync seamlessly with the weapons system for reliable launch every time.

aegs_s2_rack_x2.label: Aegis Double Platform
aegs_s2_rack_x2.description: Designed for compatible Aegis ships, the Double Platform will carry two S2 missiles and sync seamlessly with the weapons system for reliable launch every time.

aegs_s2_rack_x3.label: Aegis Triple Platform
aegs_s2_rack_x3.description: Designed for compatible Aegis ships, the Triple Platform will carry three S2 missiles and sync seamlessly with the weapons system for reliable launch every time.

aegs_s2_rack_x4.label: Aegis Quad Platform
aegs_s2_rack_x4.description: Designed for compatible Aegis ships, the Quad Platform will carry four S2 missiles and sync seamlessly with the weapons system for reliable launch every time.

aegs_s3_rack_x1.label: Aegis Single Platform

ambx_behr_ballisticcannon_s4_he.description: Ammunition case for the Behring Ballistic Autocannon S4.

ambx_behr_ballisticrepeater_s2.description: Ammunition case for Behring's Ballistic Repeater S2.

ambx_behr_flares_48.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Decoy Count: 48 These decoy countermeasures from trusted manufacturer Behring provide dependable IR signal spoofing to ably counter a wide range of ordnance.

ambx_gats_ballisticcannon_s2.description: Ammunition case for the Gallenson Tactical Ballistic Autocannon S2.

ambx_gats_ballisticcannon_s3.label: Gallenson Tactical Ballistic Autocannon S3 Ammo Box

ambx_gats_ballisticgatling_s2.label: Gallenson Tactical Ballistic Gatling S2 Ammo Box

ambx_gats_ballisticgatling_s3.label: Gallenson Tactical Ballistic Gatling S3 Ammo Box
ambx_gats_ballisticgatling_s3.description: Ammunition case for the Gallenson Tactical Ballistic Gatling S3.

ambx_jokr_chaff_16.label: Joker Noise x 16
ambx_jokr_chaff_16.description: Manufacturer: Joker Type: Noise Count: 16 Trouble brewing? Missile breathing down your neck? Get yourself out of tough spot with these CS-spoofing noise countermeasures from Joker.

ambx_jokr_chaff_24.description: Manufacturer: Joker Type: Noise Count: 24 Trouble brewing? Missile breathing down your neck? Get yourself out of tough spot with these CS-spoofing noise countermeasures from Joker.

ambx_jokr_flares_16.description: Manufacturer: Joker Type: Decoy Count: 16 If you hate blowing up, Joker's got you covered. These decoy countermeasures are just the thing to get IR missiles off your back.

ambx_kbar_ballisticcannon_s1.label: KnightBridge Arms Ballistic Autocannon S1 Ammo Box
ambx_kbar_ballisticcannon_s1.description: Ammunition case for the KnightBridge Arms Ballistic Autocannon S1.

ambx_kbar_ballisticcannon_s3.label: KnightBridge Arms Ballistic Autocannon S3 Ammo Box
ambx_kbar_ballisticcannon_s3.description: Ammunition case for the KnightBridge Arms Ballistic Autocannon S3.

ambx_klwe_massdriver_s10.label: Klaus & Werner Mass Driver S10 Ammo Box
ambx_klwe_massdriver_s10.description: Ammunition case for Klaus & Werner's Mass Driver S10 Ammo Box

ambx_klwe_massdriver_s2.label: Sledge II Ammo Box
ambx_klwe_massdriver_s2.description: Ammunition case for Klaus & Werner's Sledge II.

ambx_krig_ballisticgatling_s2.label: Kruger Intergalactic Ballistic Gatling S2 Ammo Box
ambx_krig_ballisticgatling_s2.description: Ammunition case for the Kruger Intergalactic Ballistic Gatling S2

ambx_rsi_ballisticrepeater_s9.label: RSI Ballistic Repeater S9 Ammo Box
ambx_rsi_ballisticrepeater_s9.description: Ammunition case for RSI's Ballistic Repeater S9.

ambx_taln_chaff_16.label: Talon Noise x 16
ambx_taln_chaff_16.description: Manufacturer: Talon Type: Noise Count: 16 Effectively redirect CS seeking missiles with these noise countermeasures from Talon.

ambx_taln_chaff_24.label: Talon Noise x 24
ambx_taln_chaff_24.description: Manufacturer: Talon Type: Noise Count: 24 Effectively redirect CS seeking missiles with these noise countermeasures from Talon.

ambx_taln_chaff_32.label: Talon Noise x 32
ambx_taln_chaff_32.description: Manufacturer: Talon Type: Noise Count: 32 Effectively redirect CS seeking missiles with these noise countermeasures from Talon.

ambx_taln_chaff_48.label: Talon Noise x 48

ambx_taln_chaff_8.label: Talon Noise x 8
ambx_taln_chaff_8.description: Manufacturer: Talon Type: Noise Count: 8 Effectively redirect CS seeking missiles with these noise countermeasures from Talon.

amrs_lasercannon_s1.label: Omnisky III Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 1 The Omnisky III is the base model in A&R's line of laser autocannons for small ships and has a comparable rate of fire, damage output and range to other weapons in its size class. It uses mid-grade components in its design, offering a marked increase in power efficiency over some of its less expensive competitors.

amrs_lasercannon_s2.label: Omnisky VI Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 The Omnisky VI is the mid-sized laser autocannon from manufacturer A&R. It boasts increased damage and range and power consumption over its smaller brother, the Omnisky III, and utilizes many of the same components resulting in middle-of-the-road power efficiency.

amrs_lasercannon_s3.label: Omnisky IX Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 3 The Omnisky IX is the size three version of Amon & Reese's popular laser autocannon. The weapon's low rate of fire is offset by its effective range, which allows it to deliver a powerful shot from afar.

amrs_lasercannon_s4.label: Omnisky XII Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s4.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 4 Amon & Reese's dependable line of laser autocannons continues with the Omnisky XII. Though slow firing, this size four laser is able to efficiently deliver devastating laser beam blasts from a considerable range.

amrs_lasercannon_s5.label: Omnisky XV Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 5 Amon & Reese's reputation for making powerful and reliable weapons is embodied by their Omnisky line of laser autocannons. The Omnisky XV is the size five version of the weapon that's helped defend the Empire for centuries.

amrs_lasercannon_s6.label: Omnisky XVIII Cannon
amrs_lasercannon_s6.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 6 Nicknamed 'Augustus' by Amon & Reese engineers after the Roman Emperor who founded the notable 'Eighteenth Legion,' this massive size six laser autocannon hits hard over great distances, making the Omnisky XVIII an effective way to keep enemies at bay.

amrs_scattergun_s3.label: PyroBurst Scattergun
amrs_scattergun_s3.description: Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Item Type: Plasma Scattergun Size: 3 You ship will spread havoc with A&R’s PyroBurst plasma shotgun. Effective in close quarters, the PyroBurst sprays self-detonating plasma projectiles, sacrificing pinpoint accuracy for area saturation.

anvil_hornet_f7c_shop.label: Anvil Hornet F7C
anvil_hornet_f7c_shop.description: Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Focus: Medium Fighter To the enemy, it is a weapon never to be underestimated. To allies, it's a savior. The F7C Hornet is the same dependable and resilient multi-purpose fighter that has become the face of the UEE Navy. The F7C is the foundation to build on and meet whatever requirements you have in mind.

anvl_arrow_turret.label: Anvil Arrow Turret
anvl_arrow_turret.description: Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace The Gestonne turret system for Anvil's Arrow allows precise independent tracking of targets and features mounts for two Size-1 weapons.

anvl_fixed_mount_hornet_ball_s4.label: Specialty Hornet S5 VariPuck Mount
anvl_fixed_mount_hornet_ball_s4.description: Manufacturer: Flashfire Systems Item Type: Weapon Mount Size: 5 A ‘special mission’ weapon mount from Flashfire Systems designed to allow the Hornet to attach weapons the same size as the hardpoint the VariPuck is mounting to.

anvl_gladiator_bombrack_s3.label: Anvil Gladiator S3 Bomb Rack
anvl_gladiator_bombrack_s3.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: S3 Outfit the Gladiator with this S3 bomb rack that carries 6 payloads.

anvl_gladiator_bombrack_s5.label: Anvil Gladiator S5 Bomb Rack
anvl_gladiator_bombrack_s5.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: S5 Outfit the Gladiator with this S5 bomb rack that carries 2 payloads.

anvl_hornet_f7a_mk1_ball_turret.label: C4-163f S5 Hornet Mk I Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7a_mk1_ball_turret.description: Give your Hornet's firepower a boost with the C4-163f. Designed by Anvil specifically for its F7 Mk I series, this S5 ball turret can equip two S3 ship weapons.

anvl_hornet_f7a_mk1_nose_turret.label: Anvil F7A Hornet Mk I Nose Turret
anvl_hornet_f7a_mk1_nose_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 3 This nose turret was designed specifically for Anvil's F7A Hornet Mk I to allow for mounting two Size-2 weapons and precise gimbaled tracking of targets.

anvl_hornet_f7a_mk2_ball_turret.label: C5-173f S5 Hornet Mk II Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7a_mk2_ball_turret.description: Give your Hornet Mk II a boost in firepower with the C5-173f ball turret. Designed by Anvil specifically for its F7 Mk II series, this S5 ball turret can equip two S3 ship weapons.

anvl_hornet_f7a_mk2_nose_turret.label: Anvil Hornet Mk II S3 Nose Turret
anvl_hornet_f7a_mk2_nose_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 3 This military-grade nose turret was designed specifically for the Mk II versions of Anvil's F7A and F7C-M to allow for mounting two Size-3 weapons and precise gimbaled tracking of targets.

anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret.label: Anvil F7C-M Mk II Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 5 Give your Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II a boost in firepower with this bespoke ball turret able to equip two S3 ship weapons and eight S1 missiles.

anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret_bespoke.label: TMSB-5 Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret_bespoke.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ball Turret Size: 5 Designed in conjunction with Anvil Aerospace for use on the F7C Hornet Mk II, this turret featuring a fully integrated gimbal mount to allow for adaptive targeting and is fitted with bespoke twin ballistic gatling guns.

anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret_single.label: Anvil F7C-M Hrtskr. Mk II Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_ball_turret_single.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 5 Give your Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk II a boost in firepower with this bespoke ball turret able to equip a S4 ship weapon.

anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_nose_turret.label: Anvil Hornet Mk II S2 Nose Turret
anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2_nose_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 2 This nose turret was designed specifically for Anvil's F7C Hornet Mk II to allow for mounting two S2 weapons and precision target tracking.

anvl_hornet_f7cr_shop.label: Anvil Hornet F7CR Tracker
anvl_hornet_f7cr_shop.description: Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Focus: Pathfinder If the Ghost is made to hide, the Tracker is made to seek. The F7C-R Tracker boasts an advanced radar suite making it ideal for deep-space explorers who require depth and accuracy in their scan packages. Local militia and larger merc units will also repurpose Trackers to act as mobile C&C ships for their squadrons.

anvl_hornet_f7cs_shop.label: Anvil Hornet F7CS Ghost
anvl_hornet_f7cs_shop.description: Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Focus: Stealth Fighter Through a combination of low-emission drives, low-draw weapons, and Void Armor technology capable of diffusing scans, the F7C-S Ghost is built for the pilot who wants to keep a low profile. The Ghost is capable of slipping past the most ardent of observers to accomplish whatever goal you need to accomplish. Don't worry, we won't ask.

anvl_hornet_f7c_ball_turret.label: C4-160f S5 Hornet Ball Turret
anvl_hornet_f7c_ball_turret.description: Give your Hornet's firepower a boost with the C4-160f. Designed by Anvil specifically for its F7 series, this S5 ball turret can equip two S2 ship weapons.

anvl_hornet_f7c_mk2_cargo_door.label: Stor*All Big Box Model H2
anvl_hornet_f7c_mk2_cargo_door.description: Manufacturer: Stor*All Item Type: Storage Designed for the Hornet F7C Mk II, the Stor*All Big Box model H2 replaces the turret system of the military-spec craft with a respectable cargo hold.

anvl_hornet_f7c_nose_turret.label: Anvil Hornet F7C Nose Turret
anvl_hornet_f7c_nose_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 3 This nose turret was designed specifically for Anvil's F7C Hornet to allow for mounting two Size-1 weapons and precise gimbaled tracking of targets.

anvl_lightning_f8c_turret.label: Anvil Lightning F8C Turret
anvl_lightning_f8c_turret.description: This remote turret provides mounts for two Size 2 weapons, an expansive field of fire, and precise control to give F8C pilots a comprehensive weapon system to get out of any situation.

anvl_s5_rack_x2.label: Anvil Gladiator Double Torpedo Mount
anvl_s5_rack_x2.description: Talon Weapon Systems Belly Bay Pylon Mount, Max Size 5

apar_ballisticgatling_s4.label: Revenant Gatling
apar_ballisticgatling_s4.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 4 If it ain’t broke, don’t fix it. And if you want it broke, aim a Revenant at it. Solidly built on a foundation of centuries-old tech, Apocalypse Arms puts an innovative spin on battle-tested designs to create a rugged ballistic Gatling that can steadily hurtle death across the void. Though it’s slow to spin up and cool down, the Revenant’s dependability makes it a favorite for those expecting to find trouble.

apar_ballisticgatling_s6.label: Draugar Gatling
apar_ballisticgatling_s6.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 6 Reminiscent of a bygone era of space combat, this brutal size six ballistic Gatling from Apocalypse Arms is a very deliberate weapon. Take a moment as the Draugar's drum spins up to speed to savor the ruin and destruction that you are about unleash.

apar_ballisticrepeater_s4.label: Shade Repeater
apar_ballisticrepeater_s4.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 4 Apocalypse Arms' Shade repeater is a semi-automatic ballistic weapon, capable of providing sustained, accurate fire on target. Its multiple barrels allow the Shade to have an increased rate of fire over similar weapons of its class.

apar_ballisticrepeater_s5.label: Eventide Repeater
apar_ballisticrepeater_s5.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 5 When you need to send a message loud and clear, you'd be hard pressed to find a more intimidating courier than the Eventide. This size five ballistic repeater from Apocalypse Arms provides sustained, accurate fire with enough stopping power to equalize any fight.

apar_ballisticrepeater_s6.label: Nightfall Repeater
apar_ballisticrepeater_s6.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 6 Rain down devastation with Apocalypse Arms' Nightfall ballistic repeater. This massive size six gun offers punishment at distance and up close, unleashing higher caliber rounds than other repeaters of its size.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s1.label: Havoc Scattergun
apar_ballisticscattergun_s1.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 1 Sow dread across the battlefield with the Havoc from Apocalypse Arms. This size one scattergun deals massive damage at close range, making it the perfect weapon for finishing a fight.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s1_shark.label: Havoc Scattergun Sharkmouth Edition
apar_ballisticscattergun_s1_shark.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 1 With its devastating effectiveness at close range, the exclusive Sharkmouth Edition Havoc Scattergun from Apocalypse Arms features aggressive styling that is sure to make a lasting impression on your enemies as you unleash fire and hell.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s2.label: Hellion Scattergun
apar_ballisticscattergun_s2.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 2 Apocalypse Arms' Hellion is a size two scattergun that saturates targets with ballistic ammo in close quarters. The gun's smart ammo functionality allows it to switch between standard and specialty rounds.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s2_shark.label: Hellion Scattergun Sharkmouth Edition
apar_ballisticscattergun_s2_shark.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 2 With its devastating effectiveness at close range, the exclusive Sharkmouth Edition Hellion Scattergun from Apocalypse Arms features aggressive styling that is sure to make a lasting impression on your enemies as you unleash fire and hell.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s3.label: Predator Scattergun
apar_ballisticscattergun_s3.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 3 The Predator scattergun preys upon nearby opponents with an overwhelming barrage of ballistic ammo. The size three version of Apocalypse Arms' feared scattergun trades effective range for a wide spread.

apar_ballisticscattergun_s3_shark.label: Predator Scattergun Sharkmouth Edition
apar_ballisticscattergun_s3_shark.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun Size: 3 With its devastating effectiveness at close range, the exclusive Sharkmouth Edition Predator Scattergun from Apocalypse Arms features aggressive styling that is sure to make a lasting impression on your enemies as you unleash fire and hell.

apar_massdriver_s2.label: Strife Mass Driver Cannon
apar_massdriver_s2.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 2 It always pays to be prepared, and if misfortune ever does strike, you’re going to be glad you have an Apocalypse Arms Strife Mass Driver handy. Its electromagnetic accelerators may be a little power hungry, but it makes up for it with how rapidly it can fire its high velocity projectiles. Watching it tear through your target is enough to make any bad day a little bit better. Just be careful not to let it overheat.

arco_arcduo_400_engine_freelancer.label: Arc Duo 400
arco_arcduo_400_engine_freelancer.description: ArcCorp's Arc Duo 400 was recently named one of Whitley's Ten Best Commercial Grade Thruster value buys. Designed to handle the payload requirements of larger class vessels, the Arc Duo 400 continues ArcCorp's design philosophy of lower signature and better efficiency.

argo_tractorbeam_s1_cargo.label: Durus Tractor Beam
argo_tractorbeam_s1_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m Made specifically for the ATLS power suit, the Durus tractor beam from Argo Astronautics has been carefully tuned for loading and unloading cargo.

asad_distortionrepeater_s1.label: DR Model-XJ1 Repeater
asad_distortionrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: Associated Science & Development Item Type: Distortion Repeater Size: 1 Power is the life blood of every ship, and the DR Model-XJ1 from ASD is the ideal choice to bleed hostiles dry. This cutting-edge distortion repeater allows you to disrupt power on targets, disabling threats efficiently.

asad_distortionrepeater_s2.label: DR Model-XJ2 Repeater
asad_distortionrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: Associated Science & Development Item Type: Distortion Repeater Size: 2 Advancing the field of distortion weapons, the DR Model-XJ2 repeater from ASD provides tactical energy disruption that will severely limit any targeted ships operational capacity.

asad_distortionrepeater_s3.label: DR Model-XJ3 Repeater
asad_distortionrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Associated Science & Development Item Type: Distortion Repeater Size: 3 Shutdown hostile actions and target power supplies with the DR Model-XJ3, a well-ranged distortion repeater developed by the advanced weapons research labs of ASD.

asas_soloshield.label: Ascension Astro Soloshield
asas_soloshield.description: Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Ascension Astro's Soloshield is a baseline shield generator, projecting a single-field bubble to offer an additional layer of protection for your ship's hull and armor. The low electromagnetic emissions will also help minimize your ship's presence on scans.

atls_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.label: ATLS 2956 Auspicious Red Rat Livery
atls_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Rat livery. Outfit your power suit with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a rat.

atls_paint_black_grey_darkgrey.label: ATLS Thunderhead Livery
atls_paint_black_grey_darkgrey.description: The Thunderhead livery for the ATLS is black with grey stripes across the arms.

atls_paint_black_grey_grey.label: ATLS Carbon Black Livery
atls_paint_black_grey_grey.description: The Carbon Black livery gives the ATLS power suit a sleek and professional appearance.

atls_paint_blue_black_red.label: ATLS Nightshift Livery
atls_paint_blue_black_red.description: Featuring a diffuse blue, subtle reds, and black accents, the Nightshift livery shows that style goes hand in hand with strength.

atls_paint_blue_blue_grey.label: ATLS Monsoon Livery
atls_paint_blue_blue_grey.description: The Monsoon livery brings a bold blue tint to your ATLS power suit.

atls_paint_blue_grey_white.label: ATLS Cobalt Livery
atls_paint_blue_grey_white.description: The Cobalt livery is a vibrant blue with white lettering across the side of the ATLS.

atls_paint_olive_black_orange.label: ATLS Foreman Livery
atls_paint_olive_black_orange.description: Blending elements of olive green and saffron orange, the Foreman livery is completed with bold black accents.

atls_paint_olive_olive_grey.label: ATLS Tectonic Livery
atls_paint_olive_olive_grey.description: Outfit your ATLS power suit in earth tones with the Tectonic livery.

atls_paint_orange_grey.label: ATLS Safety Orange Livery
atls_paint_orange_grey.description: Ideal for bustling work sites, the Safety Orange livery brings a bright orange base and white stripes to the ATLS.

atls_paint_pale_yellow_grey.label: ATLS Lionheart Livery
atls_paint_pale_yellow_grey.description: Remain highly visible in the ATLS power suit with Lionheart livery, which is primarily light yellow.

atls_paint_redfestival_red_gold.label: ATLS Auspicious Red Livery
atls_paint_redfestival_red_gold.description: The Auspicious Red livery brings a bold red base paint and striking gold accents to the ATLS power suit.

atls_paint_silver_grey_lime.label: ATLS Granite Livery
atls_paint_silver_grey_lime.description: A base of grey is elevated with lime lettering across the side of the ATLS Granite livery.

atls_paint_steel_steel_black.label: ATLS Ironside Livery
atls_paint_steel_steel_black.description: Embody the strength of the ATLS power suit with Ironside livery.

atls_paint_white_black_teal.label: ATLS Cold Snap Livery
atls_paint_white_black_teal.description: Combining bright white with a cool teal, the Cold Snap livery delivers a striking appearance to the ATLS suit.

atls_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.label: ATLS Keystone Livery
atls_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

alienaa_fragment_1_large_damaged_a.label: Large Artifact Fragment (Damaged)
alienaa_fragment_1_large_damaged_a.description: A large artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Broken and considered damaged, intricate etchings that subtly glow can still be seen on the fragment, though the gold-colored metallic banding is in poor condition.

alienaa_fragment_1_large_flawed_a.label: Large Artifact Fragment (Flawed)
alienaa_fragment_1_large_flawed_a.description: A large artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Broken and considered in flawed condition, the fragment features intricate etchings that subtly glow green and is overlaid with gold-colored metallic banding.

alienaa_fragment_1_large_pristine_a.label: Large Artifact Fragment (Pristine)
alienaa_fragment_1_large_pristine_a.description: A large artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Though broken, it's otherwise considered in pristine condition. The fragment features intricate etchings that subtly glow green and is overlaid with gold-colored metallic banding.

alienaa_fragment_1_medium_damaged_a.label: Medium Artifact Fragment (Damaged)
alienaa_fragment_1_medium_damaged_a.description: A medium-sized artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Though broken and considered damaged, intricate etchings that subtly glow can still be seen on the fragment.

alienaa_fragment_1_medium_flawed_a.description: A medium-sized artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Broken and considered in flawed condition, the fragment features intricate etchings that subtly glow green and is overlaid with dark-colored metallic banding.

alienaa_fragment_1_medium_pristine_a.label: Medium Artifact Fragment (Pristine)
alienaa_fragment_1_medium_pristine_a.description: A medium-sized artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Though broken, it's otherwise considered in pristine condition. The fragment features intricate etchings that subtly glow green and is overlaid with dark-colored metallic banding.

alienaa_fragment_1_small_damaged_a.label: Small Artifact Fragment (Damaged)
alienaa_fragment_1_small_damaged_a.description: A small artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Broken and considered damaged, it features intricate etchings that subtly glow.

alienaa_fragment_1_small_flawed_a.label: Small Artifact Fragment (Flawed)
alienaa_fragment_1_small_flawed_a.description: A small artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Broken and considered in flawed condition, it features intricate etchings that subtly glow green.

alienaa_fragment_1_small_pristine_a.label: Small Artifact Fragment (Pristine)
alienaa_fragment_1_small_pristine_a.description: A small artifact fragment of unknown origin and made of an unidentified material. Though broken, it's otherwise considered in pristine condition, and features intricate etchings that subtly glow green.

alienfish.label: Menarik
alienfish.description: A striking kingfish that’s capable of adapting to many types of environments. It was ‘presented’ to Humanity by the Xi’An from their preserves in Ealus System.

ammobox_ballistic_krig_25mm.label: Kruger Intergalactic Ammo Box Ballistic 25mm

ammobox_xian_scout_flares.description: Ammunition box for decoy countermeasures for the Aopoa Khartu-al.

apollo_paint_black_gold.label: Apollo Delphi Livery
apollo_paint_black_gold.description: The Delphi livery turns the Apollo black with shimmering gold highlights.

apollo_paint_blue_orange.label: Apollo Shockwave Livery
apollo_paint_blue_orange.description: The subtle style of the Shockwave livery brings an appealing blue with orange highlights to the Apollo.

apollo_paint_clean_air_red_teal_gold.label: Apollo Alliance Aid Red Livery
apollo_paint_clean_air_red_teal_gold.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this red livery.

apollo_paint_clean_air_red_teal_gold_b.label: Apollo Alliance Aid Red & Gold Livery
apollo_paint_clean_air_red_teal_gold_b.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this red livery with golden accents.

apollo_paint_grey_red.label: Apollo Frontline Livery
apollo_paint_grey_red.description: Make the Apollo more discreet with the Frontline livery, which turns the front half grey with a white back half and red highlights.

apollo_paint_silver_blue.label: Apollo Olympian Livery
apollo_paint_silver_blue.description: Be a beacon of hope with the Olympian livery for the Apollo with its striking silver and blue paint.

apollo_paint_teal_red.label: Apollo Lifeline Livery
apollo_paint_teal_red.description: Swoop in to save the day in style with the Lifeline livery for the Apollo. It features a base white paint with teal and red highlights.

archimedes_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: P-72 Archimedes Deck the Hull Livery
archimedes_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

archimedes_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: P-72 Archimedes IceBreak Livery
archimedes_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your P-72 Archimedes with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

arrow_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Arrow Tan and Green Livery
arrow_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Customize your Arrow with this multi-tone tan and green livery featuring gold accents.

arrow_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Arrow Light Green and Grey Livery
arrow_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Arrow with this multi-tone green livery.

arrow_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Arrow Metallic Grey Livery
arrow_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Arrow with this sleek grey livery.

arrow_paint_2950invictus_4.label: Arrow Twilight Livery
arrow_paint_2950invictus_4.description: Customize your Arrow with this fragmented grey livery.

arrow_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.label: Arrow Headhunters Reaper Livery
arrow_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.description: The Headhunters Reaper livery lets you proudly proclaim your allegiance to the gang. It features the gang's name and highlights in red on a beige and grey paint scheme.

arrow_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Arrow Nightbreak Livery
arrow_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Arrow with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

arrow_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.label: Arrow Citizens for Prosperity Liberation Livery
arrow_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.description: Be a beacon of hope by equipping the Citizens for Prosperity Liberation livery, which features the group's name and symbol atop a green, black, and grey paint job.

arrow_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Arrow Lovestruck Livery
arrow_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Arrow.

arrow_paint_unity.label: Arrow Foundation Fest Livery
arrow_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

asgard_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orange.label: Asgard Best in Show 2955 Livery
asgard_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orange.description: Commemorate the Asgard making the final four of the 2955 Ship Showdown with this striking metallic orange and black Best in Show livery.

asgard_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Asgard Nightbreak Livery
asgard_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Asgard with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

asgard_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skull.label: Asgard Skullcrusher Livery
asgard_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skull.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Asgard, which features a massive skull across the top.

asgard_paint_clean_air_green_green_yello.label: Asgard Alliance Aid Green Livery
asgard_paint_clean_air_green_green_yello.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this green livery with yellow accents.

asgard_paint_beige_black_red.label: Asgard Sand Sea Livery
asgard_paint_beige_black_red.description: The Sand Sea livery for the Asgard is primarily beige with black and red accents.

asgard_paint_black_black_yellow.label: Asgard Last Light Livery
asgard_paint_black_black_yellow.description: Wrap your Asgard in a black base with yellow accents with the Last Light livery.

asgard_paint_blue_black_red.label: Asgard Sky Forge Livery
asgard_paint_blue_black_red.description: Mainly blue, the Sky Forge livery for the Asgard also features black and red accents.

asgard_paint_green_black_yellow.label: Asgard Savannah Livery
asgard_paint_green_black_yellow.description: Make the Asgard green with black and yellow accents with the Savannah livery.

asgard_paint_vip_copper.label: Asgard Valhalla Livery
asgard_paint_vip_copper.description: The Valhalla livery melds a dazzling copper finish with green accents to give the Asgard a truly distinct appearance.

aurora_mk2_paint_black_black_black.label: Aurora Mk II Shade Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_black_black_black.description: Featuring a deep black and soft gray elements, the Shade livery ensures you'll soar through space in style.

aurora_mk2_paint_blue_blue_yellow.label: Aurora Mk II Caspian Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_blue_blue_yellow.description: The Caspian livery is primarily a pale, water-like blue with crisp yellow accents.

aurora_mk2_paint_green_green_bronze.label: Aurora Mk II Medallion Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_green_green_bronze.description: Merging grays, greens, and bronze, the metallic Medallion livery emphasizes the sturdiness of the ship's shape.

aurora_mk2_paint_pink_green_purple.label: Aurora Mk II Shimmerscale Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_pink_green_purple.description: Combining deep purples and blue, the Shimmerscale livery is finished with a subtle green offering an ethereal shimmer.

aurora_mk2_paint_white_blue_yellow.label: Aurora Mk II Cloudbuster Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_white_blue_yellow.description: The Cloudbuster livery utilizes a contrasting pale gray against a rich blue, finished with playful yellow highlights.

aurora_mk2_paint_white_gray_red.label: Aurora Mk II Obscurity Livery
aurora_mk2_paint_white_gray_red.description: Mainly gray with select white features, the sharp reds of the Obscurity livery cut through an otherwise brooding appearance.

aurora_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Aurora Mk I Green and Gold Livery
aurora_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Customize your Aurora with this green and gold livery.

aurora_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Aurora Mk I Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
aurora_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Show your support for the newest batch of Navy recruits by customizing your Aurora with this special Blue and Gold livery to commemorate the 2950 Invictus Launch Week.

aurora_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Aurora Mk I Light and Dark Grey Livery
aurora_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Aurora with this two-tone grey livery.

aurora_paint_bigbenny.label: Aurora Mk I Big Benny Livery
aurora_paint_bigbenny.description: Take that kacho to go with this official Big Benny livery, just don't blame us when you're assaulted by hordes of hungry Humans.

aurora_paint_black_green_gold.label: Aurora Mk I High Roller Livery
aurora_paint_black_green_gold.description: Ready to shut up the naysayers and show the 'verse that you made it big? Roll up with your Aurora decked out in this green and gold livery checkered with credit symbols.

aurora_paint_black_green_orange.label: Aurora Mk I SXSW15 Commemorative Livery
aurora_paint_black_green_orange.description: Strike out boldly into the universe with this vibrant livery commemorating the iconic 2945 festival that celebrated community spirit and expansion.

aurora_paint_black_grey_yellow.label: Aurora Mk I UEE Distinguished Service Livery
aurora_paint_black_grey_yellow.description: Your love of the Empire will be clear to all when you emblazon your ship in this patriotic livery, inspiring honor and dedication in those you fly with.

aurora_paint_black_red_white.label: Aurora Mk I Dread Pirate Livery
aurora_paint_black_red_white.description: Boldly show your true colors with this black and red livery, letting all know that you do as you please, and are pretty pleased with what you do.

aurora_paint_black_silver_red.label: Aurora Mk I False Colors Livery
aurora_paint_black_silver_red.description: Become a force to be reckoned with thanks to this livery which features a black finish, red and silver accents, and the intimidating visage of a skull.

aurora_paint_black_white_gold.label: Aurora Mk I Exploration Livery
aurora_paint_black_white_gold.description: This Aurora livery is perfect for those ready to go forth boldly with a black finish, white accents, and a large citizen emblem emblazoned on one side.

aurora_paint_black_yellow_red.label: Aurora Mk I Pitchfork Livery
aurora_paint_black_yellow_red.description: Strike fear into the heart of the Vanduul with this Operation Pitchfork livery commemorating the brave pilots who have dedicated their lives to defeating this deadly foe.

aurora_paint_blue_black_red.label: Auorora Mk I Disco Livery
aurora_paint_blue_black_red.description: Equip the ship livery used by ace pilot Disco in the classic children's cartoon Rory Nova. While it turns the Aurora Mk I metallic dark blue, black, and red, whether you turn into the 'dynamic, instinctive spacecraft operator' that inspired the livery's name is up to you.

aurora_paint_blue_blue_grey.label: Aurora Mk I Electric Blue Livery
aurora_paint_blue_blue_grey.description: Switch the appearance of your Aurora with this bold livery in electic blue with gray accents.

aurora_paint_blue_blue_grey_electro.label: Aurora Mk I Shocking Blue Livery
aurora_paint_blue_blue_grey_electro.description: Liven up the Aurora with this slick blue livery that is sure to earn you a second look.

aurora_paint_crashtest.label: Aurora Mk I Hazard Livery
aurora_paint_crashtest.description: Keep a lookout with this hazard-themed livery for your Aurora.

aurora_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Aurora Mk I ArcCorp Livery
aurora_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Aurora features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

aurora_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Aurora Mk I Crusader Livery
aurora_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Aurora features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

aurora_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Aurora Mk I Hurston Livery
aurora_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Aurora features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

aurora_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Aurora Mk I microTech Livery
aurora_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Aurora features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

aurora_paint_grey_silver_silver.label: Aurora Mk I Record Breaker Livery
aurora_paint_grey_silver_silver.description: Show the 'verse that you're ahead of the pack and ready to shatter expectations with this sleek gray and silver livery.

aurora_paint_luminalia_2021_white_blue.label: Aurora Mk I IceBreak Livery
aurora_paint_luminalia_2021_white_blue.description: Equip your Aurora with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

aurora_paint_midnight.label: Aurora Mk I Midnight Livery
aurora_paint_midnight.description: Not everybody likes to make a statement when flying around. This Midnight livery features a monochromatic color scheme that oozes elegance and sophistication.

aurora_paint_signature.label: Aurora Mk I UEE Signature Livery
aurora_paint_signature.description: Celebrate Humanity's freedom from the oppressive Messers with this signature blue-and-white themed livery.?

aurora_paint_starkitten.label: Aurora Mk I Star Kitten Livery
aurora_paint_starkitten.description: This custom livery features the intrepid lead character of Genady Kuzo's beloved animated series in a sea of bold pink.

aurora_paint_unity.label: Aurora Mk I Foundation Fest Livery
aurora_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

aurora_pirate.label: Aurora Mk I Dread Pirate Livery
aurora_pirate.description: Boldly show your true colors with this black and red livery, letting all know that you do as you please, and are pretty pleased with what you do.

avenger_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Avenger Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
avenger_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Show your support for the newest batch of Navy recruits by customizing your Avenger with this special Blue and Gold livery to commemorate the 2950 Invictus Launch Week.

avenger_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Avenger Olive Green Livery
avenger_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Avenger with this woodland green livery featuring silver accents.

avenger_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Avenger Splinter Livery
avenger_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Avenger with this fragmented green livery.

avenger_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skul.label: Avenger Skullcrusher Livery
avenger_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skul.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Avenger, which features a massive skull across the top.

avenger_paint_copernicus_lightblue.label: Avenger Copernicus Livery
avenger_paint_copernicus_lightblue.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Avenger. Named in honor of famed astronomer Nicolaus Copernicus, the livery mixes two shades of blue with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the Copernicus livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

avenger_paint_debiasio_orange_grey.label: Avenger De Biasio Livery
avenger_paint_debiasio_orange_grey.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Avenger. Named in honor of former ICC Director Loretta De Biasio, this livery mixes orange and grey with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the De Biasio livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

avenger_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Avenger Nightbreak Livery
avenger_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Avenger with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

avenger_paint_fleetweek_black_chrome.label: Avenger Ironweave Livery
avenger_paint_fleetweek_black_chrome.description: The Ironweave livery gives the Avenger a black hull with chrome highlights.

avenger_paint_fleetweek_grey_beige_tiger.label: Avenger Shroud Livery
avenger_paint_fleetweek_grey_beige_tiger.description: Give the Avenger an utterly unique look with the Shroud livery, featuring a light grey hull with beige and darker grey contrails over it.

avenger_paint_kepler_blue_orange.label: Avenger Kepler Livery
avenger_paint_kepler_blue_orange.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Avenger. Named in honor of famed astronomer Johannes Kepler, the livery mixes dark blue and orange with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the Kepler livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

avenger_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Avenger Deck the Hull Livery
avenger_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

avenger_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Avenger IceBreak Livery
avenger_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Avenger with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

avenger_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.label: Avenger Solar Winds Livery
avenger_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.description: Fly in style with the Solar Winds livery that gives the Avenger a metallic silver finish with maroon highlights.

banu_tachyoncannon_s1.label: Singe Cannon (S1)
banu_tachyoncannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Tachyon Cannon Size: 1 Made popular by a Banu souli, the Singe tachyon cannon consistently delivers devastating energy damage across vast distances. Though slow to fire, the lightning-fast tachyon projectile strikes targets almost instantaneously, making the Singe a favorite choice for Banu security ships. Although the Banu have long forgotten the origin of this high tech weapon, several unique design choices have led scholars to suspect that the Banu might have appropriated the tech into their culture, instead of inventing it themselves.

banu_tachyoncannon_s2.label: Singe Cannon (S2)
banu_tachyoncannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Tachyon Cannon Size: 2 Made popular by a Banu souli, the Singe tachyon cannon consistently delivers devastating energy damage across vast distances. Though slow to fire, the lightning-fast tachyon projectile strikes targets almost instantaneously, making the Singe a favorite choice for Banu security ships. Although the Banu have long forgotten the origin of this high tech weapon, several unique design choices have led scholars to suspect that the Banu might have appropriated the tech into their culture, instead of inventing it themselves.

banu_tachyoncannon_s3.label: Singe Cannon (S3)
banu_tachyoncannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Tachyon Cannon Size: 3 Made popular by a Banu souli, the Singe tachyon cannon consistently delivers devastating energy damage across vast distances. Though slow to fire, the lightning-fast tachyon projectile strikes targets almost instantaneously, making the Singe a favorite choice for Banu security ships. Although the Banu have long forgotten the origin of this high tech weapon, several unique design choices have led scholars to suspect that the Banu might have appropriated the tech into their culture, instead of inventing it themselves.

behr_ballisticcannon_s4.label: C-788 Cannon
behr_ballisticcannon_s4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 4 Hurtling high caliber rounds with devastating velocity, Behring’s C-788 Ballistic Autocannon was built to punch through ship armor. Extremely durable with exceptional heat resistance, the “Combine” can handle a heavy workload that, even with the weapon’s slower rate of fire, makes it an ideal choice for taking on larger, less maneuverable targets.

behr_ballisticcannon_s5.label: C-810 Cannon
behr_ballisticcannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 5 Hurtling high caliber rounds with devastating velocity, Behring’s C-810 Ballistic Autocannon was built to punish ship armor. Extremely durable with exceptional heat resistance, the S5 variant of Behring's “Combine” line offers a steadier rate of fire, making it an ideal choice for taking on larger, less maneuverable targets.

behr_ballisticcannon_s6.label: C-912 Cannon
behr_ballisticcannon_s6.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 6 Hurtling high caliber rounds with devastating velocity, Behring’s C-912 Ballistic Autocannon was built to punish ship armor. Extremely durable with exceptional heat resistance, the S6 variant of Behring's “Combine” line offers a steadier rate of fire, making it an ideal choice for taking on larger, less maneuverable targets.

behr_ballisticcannon_s7_tiburon.label: C-07T Cannon
behr_ballisticcannon_s7_tiburon.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 7 A dedicated anti-capital ship weapon adjusted to meet the combat demands of the Tiburon, the C-07T Ballistic Cannon delivers overwhelming offensive power, proving Behring continues to innovate in all areas of battlefield technology.

behr_ballisticcannon_vng_s2.label: CVSA Cannon
behr_ballisticcannon_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 2 Behring designed the CVSA to be their Vanguard only ballistic cannon variant. This weapon features a slower rate of fire delivers a higher velocity round that is ideal for dealing major damage to targets at medium to long ranges.

behr_ballisticgatling_hornet_bespoke.label: TMSB-5 Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_hornet_bespoke.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Gatling (x2) Size: 5 These twin ballistic gatling was designed in conjunction with Anvil Aerospace for use on the F7C Hornet Mk II and are intended to be gimbal mounted onto a ball turret for adaptive targeting.

behr_ballisticgatling_nova_s5.label: NV57 Ballistic Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_nova_s5.description: Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Gun Manufacturer: Behring Size: S5 Break the ranks with the NV57 Ballistic Gatling Gun designed to replace the standard Tumbril Nova tank canon. Be ready to face overwhelming ground forces head on using this high powered weapon with superior damage output and a devastating rate of fire.

behr_ballisticgatling_pdc_s1.label: MRX "Torrent"
behr_ballisticgatling_pdc_s1.description: Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Turret Manufacturer: Behring The latest generation of point-defense technology, the MRX "Torrent" utilizes advanced search, detection, and tracking software to unleash a swift barrage of ballistic fire, protecting ships from incoming missiles, torpedoes, and other high-speed threats.

behr_ballisticgatling_s4.label: AD4B Ballistic Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_s4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 4 The AD4B, Behring's take on the classic ballistic gatling, includes a crystal cycle firing mechanism in the the high speed rotary system to maximize efficiency for sustained engagements with minimal misfires. Next time an aggressor escalates a hostile situation, make them regret the decision by spinning up this overwhelming and effective weapon.

behr_ballisticgatling_s5.label: AD5B Ballistic Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_s5.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 5 The AD5B, Behring's take on the classic ballistic gatling, includes a crystal cycle firing mechanism in the the high speed rotary system to maximize efficiency for sustained engagements with minimal misfires. Next time an aggressor escalates a hostile situation, make them regret the decision by spinning up this overwhelming and effective weapon.

behr_ballisticgatling_s6.label: AD6B Ballistic Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_s6.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 6 The AD6B, Behring's take on the classic ballistic gatling, includes a crystal cycle firing mechanism in the the high speed rotary system to maximize efficiency for sustained engagements with minimal misfires. Next time an aggressor escalates a hostile situation, make them regret the decision by spinning up this overwhelming and effective weapon.

behr_ballisticgatling_sf7b_s7.label: SF7B Gatling
behr_ballisticgatling_sf7b_s7.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 7 Slug it out with large spacecraft and swiftly shred smaller ships with the SF7B ballistic Gatling. Built specifically for the Ares Inferno Star Fighter, the weapon seamlessly integrates into the body of the ship. The weapon's impressive rate of fire unleashes high-density rounds that tear through armor and shields, making it a perfect choice for situations where target saturation is key.

behr_ballisticrepeater_s1.label: SW16BR1 “Buzzsaw” Repeater
behr_ballisticrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 1 Firing from two barrels, the SW16BR1 "Buzzsaw" can overwhelm aggressors at medium to close range. Behring's expert craftsmanship allows the weapon to engage in sustained firefights before needing a cooldown, making it an excellent entry level ballistic repeater.

behr_ballisticrepeater_s2.label: SW16BR2 “Sawbuck” Repeater
behr_ballisticrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 2 The SW16BR2 Sawbuck is Behring’s contribution to the expanding Ballistic Repeater market. Its sequential-firing double barrel configuration offers an effective middle-ground for operators looking for a higher rate of fire than a cannon, but without the fear of overheating that you would get with a gatling.

behr_ballisticrepeater_s3.label: SW16BR3 “Shredder” Repeater
behr_ballisticrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 3 Blast your way out of trouble with this Behring size three ballistic repeater. The SW16BR3 "Shredder" distributes heat across both barrels to keep it firing when needed most. The weapon's shot grouping and damage falloff make it most deadly at medium or close range.

behr_ballisticrepeater_vng_s2.label: BRVS Repeater
behr_ballisticrepeater_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Ballistic Repeater Size: 2 Only Vanguard owners can equip this unique version of Behring's line of ballistic repeaters to the nose of their ship. The BRVS is carefully calibrated so its ballistic barrage would fire fast enough to provide maximum target saturation while its improved venting reduces frequent overheating.

behr_bombrack_s3.label: CST-313 "Castillo"
behr_bombrack_s3.description: Item Type: Bomb Rack Manufacturer: Behring Size: S3 Designed to fit a wide variety of ships, the CST-313 "Castillo" bomb rack is able to store a single S3 bomb and makes for a good alternative on ships that can support a S3 missile rack.

behr_distortioncannon_vng_s2.label: EVSD Cannon
behr_distortioncannon_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Distortion Cannon Size: 2 Disable ships without hurting their crew or cargo with the EVSD from Behring. This distortion cannon features much of the same industry-leading technology used in other Behring weapons, but is specifically designed to be mounted on the nose of an Aegis Vanguard.

behr_distortionrepeater_vng_s2.label: ATVS Repeater
behr_distortionrepeater_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Distortion Repeater Size: 2 Mess with an aggressor's electrical system with the ATVS from Behring. This disruptive, non-lethal distortion repeater is only compatible with the nose-mount on the Aegis Vanguard.

behr_lasercannon_s1.label: M3A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 1 The M3A is Behring's entry level laser autocannon. The autocannon configuration offers modest damage per projectile and a fairly low rate of fire. As the most basic offering in Behring's weapons lineup, it features low power consumption, but poor power efficiency. It makes up ground for its shortcomings by being cheap, a feature many pilots are looking for when outfitting their ships on a budget.

behr_lasercannon_s1_cleanair.label: M3A Cannon Defense Division
behr_lasercannon_s1_cleanair.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 1 The M3A is Behring's entry level laser autocannon. The autocannon configuration offers modest damage per projectile and a fairly low rate of fire. As the most basic offering in Behring's weapons lineup, it features low power consumption, but poor power efficiency. It makes up ground for its shortcomings by being cheap, a feature many pilots are looking for when outfitting their ships on a budget. The Defense Division edition features a gray, urban camo pattern and was given to those who assisted Alliance Aid's Defense Division during Levski's time of need.

behr_lasercannon_s2.label: M4A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 The M4A is Behring's second tier laser autocannon. Its bigger size means more power consumption in exchange for packing a bigger punch. Fire rate and power efficiency are comparable to the M3A model.

behr_lasercannon_s2_cleanair.label: M4A Cannon Defense Division
behr_lasercannon_s2_cleanair.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 The M4A is Behring's entry level laser autocannon. The autocannon configuration offers modest damage per projectile and a fairly low rate of fire. As the most basic offering in Behring's weapons lineup, it features low power consumption, but poor power efficiency. It makes up ground for its shortcomings by being cheap, a feature many pilots are looking for when outfitting their ships on a budget. The Defense Division edition features a gray, urban camo pattern and was given to those who assisted Alliance Aid's Defense Division during Levski's time of need.

behr_lasercannon_s3.label: M5A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 3 When energy autocannons are designed, Behring's M5A provides the standard to which they are measured against, owing to its long range of engagement and low damage fallout.

behr_lasercannon_s3_cleanair.label: M5A Cannon Defense Division
behr_lasercannon_s3_cleanair.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 3 The M5A is Behring's entry level laser autocannon. The autocannon configuration offers modest damage per projectile and a fairly low rate of fire. As the most basic offering in Behring's weapons lineup, it features low power consumption, but poor power efficiency. It makes up ground for its shortcomings by being cheap, a feature many pilots are looking for when outfitting their ships on a budget. The Defense Division edition features a gray, urban camo pattern and was given to those who assisted Alliance Aid's Defense Division during Levski's time of need.

behr_lasercannon_s5.label: M7A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 5 This versatile long distance energy autocannon is the latest in Behring’s M-Series. The M7A is designed to act as a high impact deterrent effective at medium to long range. The new AC8 Lens system minimizes stopping power loss over distance, making each shot equally effective at longer ranges.

behr_lasercannon_s6.label: M8A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s6.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 6 The M8A laser autocannon exemplifies Behring's extensive history designing and constructing ship armaments. The result is a dependable and effective energy weapon capable of handling large skirmishes or precise defensive maneuvers.

behr_lasercannon_s7.label: M9A Cannon
behr_lasercannon_s7.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 7 Strike at the very heart of your enemies with the devastating impact of Behring's M9A energy autocannon. When fully charged, the massive stopping power of this laser weapon has the potential to halt even capital ships in their tracks.

behr_lasercannon_sf7e_s7.label: SF7E Cannon
behr_lasercannon_sf7e_s7.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 7 Engineers from Behring and Crusader collaborated to make the SF7E laser cannon the ideal weapon for the Ares Ion Star Fighter. A custom shell allows the massive weapon to seamlessly integrate into the body of the ship. Ideal for long-range engagements involving large and capital-class spacecraft, the SF7E's impressive accuracy and high damage-per-round make it a devastating weapon in the hands of a skilled shooter.

behr_lasercannon_vng_s2.label: MVSA Cannon
behr_lasercannon_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 The classic M4A has been specially retooled by Behring to create the VS (Vanguard Special), a laser weapon designed to meet the Aegis' unique requirements. The default nose-mounted weapon on the Vanguard Warden, the MVSA can only be loaded onto other Vanguard variants.

behr_laserrepeater_pdc_s1.label: M2C "Swarm"
behr_laserrepeater_pdc_s1.description: Item Type: Laser Turret Manufacturer: Behring The latest generation of point-defense technology, the M2C "Swarm" utilizes advanced search, detection, and tracking software to unleash a swift barrage of laserfire, protecting ships from incoming missiles, torpedoes, and other high-speed threats.

behr_laserrepeater_vng_s2.label: GVSR Repeater
behr_laserrepeater_vng_s2.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 2 Aegis commissioned Behring to design a laser repeater specifically for their Vanguard line-up. The result was the GVSR, which met Aegis exacting standards by delivering a steady rate of fire without overtaxing the ship's power plant.

behr_mount_gimbal_ballisticgatling_horne.label: TMSB-5 Gimbal Mount
behr_mount_gimbal_ballisticgatling_horne.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Gimbal Mount Size: 5 Designed in conjunction with Anvil Aerospace for use on the F7C Hornet Mk II, this gimbal mount allows for adaptive targeting and is fitted with bespoke twin ballistic gatling guns.

behr_pdc_missilelauncher.label: PPB-116 "Pepperbox"
behr_pdc_missilelauncher.description: Item Type: PDC Manufacturer: Behring Storing sixteen S1 missiles, the PPB-116 "Pepperbox" is as disruptive as it is deadly, excelling at both inflicting damage and overwhelming evasive maneuvers.

behr_pdc_turret.label: M2C "Swarm"
behr_pdc_turret.description: Item Type: Laser Turret Manufacturer: Behring The latest generation of point-defense technology, the M2C "Swarm" utilizes advanced search, detection, and tracking software to unleash a swift barrage of laserfire, protecting ships from incoming missiles, torpedoes, and other high-speed threats.

behr_torpedolauncher_s10.label: HMF-T12 "Hammerfall" Torpedo Launcher
behr_torpedolauncher_s10.description: Item Type: Torpedo Launcher Manufacturer: Behring Size: 10 Torpedoes: 20xS12 Offering an alternative to the stock Aegis Idris nose gun, this set of four torpedo launchers are able to store twenty S12 torpedoes, four in each launcher and four in reserve.

behr_groundturret_aa_s4.label: AAT-21 Turret
behr_groundturret_aa_s4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Anti-Aircraft Turret With dual S4 weapons at the ready, the AAT-21 anti-aircraft turret is primed to protect your territory. Utilizing a sweeping patrol arc and precision targeting, this durable design is able to provide suppressive fire where and when you need it most.

behr_grounturret_mp.label: AMP-81 Turret
behr_grounturret_mp.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Missile Turret Control the skies with the MPT-81 missile pod turret. With a wide sweeping range, precise targeting, and adaptable power options, this turret provides offensive security where you need it most.

bomb_s03_fski_thunderball.label: Thunderball Bomb
bomb_s03_fski_thunderball.description: Manufacturer: FireStorm Kinetics Item Type: Explosive Bomb Size: 3 Target ground forces from a safe distance above with the Thunderball. Despite the small size, these S3 bombs pack a powerful payload, allowing users to either deploy multiple bombs to overwhelm a stationary target or drop them at intervals to hit moving targets. The Thunderball uses FireStorm Kinetics' patented Atmo-Xact fins that deploy once dropped to provide additional guidance en route to target.

bomb_s05_fski_stormburst.label: Stormburst Bomb
bomb_s05_fski_stormburst.description: Manufacturer: FireStorm Kinetics Item Type: Explosive Bomb Size: 5 Wreak havoc on ground forces from the skies above, with the Stormburst. Designed by FireStorm Kinetics to maximize destructive impact at a more moderate size, these S5 bombs feature a mixed composite ordnance to decimate armored targets. The Stormburst also utilizes FireStorm Kinetics' patented Atmo-Xact fins to ensure the payload reaches its target.

bomb_s10_fski_colossus.label: Colossus Bomb
bomb_s10_fski_colossus.description: Manufacturer: FireStorm Kinetics Item Type: Explosive Bomb Size: 10 Foes below won't stand a chance against a Colossus. FireStorm Kinetics designed this massive S10 bomb to devastate ground targets, whether they're vehicles or structures alike. Meant to be dropped from high altitude, the Colossus features patented Atmo-Xact fins that deploy to provide additional guidance en route to target.

braa_groundturret_aa.label: AAT-34 Turret
braa_groundturret_aa.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Anti-Aircraft Turret Maintain order with the AAT-34 anti-aircraft turret. This rugged design is ideal for perimeter protection and can survive long exposure to the elements with minimal maintenance while still providing first class defensive fire from its S10 weapon and dual S7 missile launchers. Its custom targeting software also helps to maximize area coverage while keeping placement numbers reasonable; protecting more sky with fewer turrets.

braa_groundturret_ap_s1.label: APT-18 Turret
braa_groundturret_ap_s1.description: Manufacturer: Broad & Rabiee Item Type: Anti-Personnel Turret Size: 1 Damage Type: Ballistic Maintain order with the APT-18 anti-personnel turret. This compact design is ideal for interior locations to provide an obvious, but not intrusive presence. The turret features a special rotary design that provides excellent lateral and vertical rotation to minimize blind spots and maximize target coverage. It's also made with reinforced plating and parts to keep maintenance to a minimum.

brra_hornetcanard_s2_q1.label: N4-160f Turret
brra_hornetcanard_s2_q1.description: Manufacturer: Broad & Rabiee Every combat pilot knows that the difference between a miss and a hit can be a couple of degrees. Broad & Rabiee’s N4-160f turret system is designed to put those degrees of precision in your hands by allowing canard mounted Size 1 and 2 weapons to accurately and effectively track mobile targets without changing the path of your ship.

banu_cube_1_a.label: Banu Lockbox Replica
banu_cube_1_a.description: This replica Banu lockbox mimics the look and feel of these rare and highly sought after collector's items. Usually owned by the heads of soulis to hold valuable items or documents, this realistic replica version was produced as a purely decorative item for Humans and can't be opened.

behring_marksman_hs_platform_x1.label: BEHR Single Platform
behring_marksman_hs_platform_x1.description: Manufacturer: Behring This Single Platform is a single-missile transport system that can add that extra edge for your ship in combat.

behring_marksman_hs_platform_x2.label: Behring Marksman HS Double Platform
behring_marksman_hs_platform_x2.description: Manufacturer: Behring The Behring Marksman heat seeking missile utilizes an enemy's heat signature to obtain and maintain a lock on the target. This tried-and-true method of target acquisition has a few drawbacks: it is easily confused by flares and it may be difficult to establish lock on ships with low heat signatures. These issues aside, the Marksman is the go-to missile of choice for many independent operators and pilots. Rack of two (2).

behring_marksman_hs_platform_x4.label: Behring Quad Platform
behring_marksman_hs_platform_x4.description: Manufacturer: Behring Behring's Quad Platform is a complete four-round missile system that can be mounted on any compatible hardpoint for reliable and effective weapon launch.

behring_marksman_quad.label: Behring Quad Platform
behring_marksman_quad.description: Manufacturer: Behring Behring’s Quad Platform is a complete four-round missile system that can be mounted on any compatible hardpoint for reliable and effective weapon launch.

bobble_cds_medium_01a.label: Sakura Fun Green ORC-mkX Armor Bobblehead
bobble_cds_medium_01a.description: Like the armor set it features, the Green ORC-mkX Bobblehead is exquisitely detailed and made with high quality materials. Place Sakura Sun's latest edition to the Sakura Fun line of bobbleheads on a ship's dashboard for an ideal cockpit companion ready to ride along on daring space adventures.

bobble_cds_medium_01b.label: Sakura Fun Blue ORC-mkX Armor Bobblehead
bobble_cds_medium_01b.description: Like the armor set it features, the Blue ORC-mkX Bobblehead is exquisitely detailed and made with high quality materials. Place Sakura Sun's latest edition to the Sakura Fun line of bobbleheads on a ship's dashboard for an ideal cockpit companion ready to ride along on daring space adventures.

bobble_cds_medium_01c.label: Sakura Fun White ORC-mkX Armor Bobblehead
bobble_cds_medium_01c.description: Like the armor set it features, the White ORC-mkX Bobblehead is exquisitely detailed and made with high quality materials. Place Sakura Sun's latest edition to the Sakura Fun line of bobbleheads on a ship's dashboard for an ideal cockpit companion ready to ride along on daring space adventures.

buccaneer_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Buccaneer Nightbreak Livery
