buccaneer_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Buccaneer with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

buccaneer_paint_green_black.label: Buccaneer Ghoulish Green Livery
buccaneer_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Buccaneer livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

buccaneer_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Buccaneer Stormbringer Livery
buccaneer_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Buccaneer livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

buccaneer_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Buccaneer Polar Livery
buccaneer_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Buccaneer with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

buccaneer_paint_red_red_black.label: Buccaneer Redline Livery
buccaneer_paint_red_red_black.description: Featuring a fierce red base paint with black highlights, the Redline livery gives the Buccaneer a bold new look.

c8_pisces_paint_nightbreak.label: C8 Pisces Nightbreak Livery
c8_pisces_paint_nightbreak.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the C8 Pisces with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

c8_pisces_paint_noble_blue.label: C8 Pisces Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
c8_pisces_paint_noble_blue.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold Livery will give your C8 Pisces a striking style.

c8_pisces_paint_scrubland_camo.label: C8 Pisces Scrubland Camo Livery
c8_pisces_paint_scrubland_camo.description: Use the Scrubland Camo livery to outfit the C8 Pisces in green camo. A classic and commanding look that's also ideal for excursions across forests and grasslands.

cnou_magma_s2_q1.label: Magma Jet (Outer Engines)
cnou_magma_s2_q1.description: With an emphasis on strength through efficiency, Consolidated Outland’s design team went back to the drawing board when creating their Magma Jet line of thrusters to really focus on propulsion fundamentals. Burning clean and hot, like the core of a planet, the Magma Jet’s proprietary molten-state injectors provide a surprising amount of power.

cnou_magma_s2_q1_center.label: Magma Jet (Center Engine)
cnou_magma_s2_q1_center.description: With an emphasis on strength through efficiency, Consolidated Outland’s design team went back to the drawing board when creating their Magma Jet line of thrusters to really focus on propulsion fundamentals. Burning clean and hot, like the core of a planet, the Magma Jet’s proprietary molten-state injectors provide a surprising amount of power.

cnou_mustang_alpha_shop.label: Mustang Alpha
cnou_mustang_alpha_shop.description: Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland Focus: Cargo Inspired by Consolidated Outland CEO Silas Koerner’s cutting edge vision, the Mustang Alpha is a sleek, stylish spacecraft that uses ultralight alloys to push power ratios to the limits, albeit sometimes unsafely. And now, with the optional Cargo Carrier, you can have the Alpha’s advantages without sacrificing carrying capacity.

cnou_mustang_beta_shop.label: Consolidated Outland Mustang Beta
cnou_mustang_beta_shop.description: Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland Focus: Pathfinder The Mustang Beta, with its unprecedented range, is made for long duration flights. The factory standard Tarsus Leaper Jump Engine enables the Beta to travel to the galaxy’s farthest systems with ease, while the ship’s unique Com4T living quarters will make the journey feel like you never left home.

cnou_mustang_gamma_shop.label: Consolidated Outland Mustang Gamma
cnou_mustang_gamma_shop.description: Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland Focus: Racing Consolidated Outland’s design and engineering teams have managed to tweak and refine the Mustang into an admirable racer. The end result, the Mustang Gamma, has smooth acceleration, and power on demand thanks to an innovative package featuring three powerful Magma Jet engines for maximum thrust.

cool_acom_s01_iceplunge.label: IcePlunge
cool_acom_s01_iceplunge.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition When you’re pushing your ship to the limit during that frantic last lap, you’ll be glad you have ACOM’s IcePlunge to keep things cool.

cool_acom_s01_quickcool.label: QuikCool
cool_acom_s01_quickcool.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Competition The QuikCool provides superior performance over other coolers in its class. This competition grade component from ACOM sacrifices stealth and some durability to be one of the most powerful entry-level coolers around.

cool_acom_s02_absolutezero_scitem.label: AbsoluteZero
cool_acom_s02_absolutezero_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Competition Originally designed for racers, the AbsoluteZero cooler pushes performance to the limits. This high quality component from ACOM features a new coolant cycling system to keep your ship’s systems cool over everything else.

cool_acom_s02_icedive_scitem.label: IceDive
cool_acom_s02_icedive_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Competition The IceDive delivers peak performance over other medium coolers of its grade, though it does come at the cost of generating high IR and EM signatures.

cool_acom_s02_rapidcool_scitem.label: RapidCool
cool_acom_s02_rapidcool_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Competition ACOM brings its performance first philosophy to this medium cooler. The RapidCool trades signature strength and durability for better performance.

cool_aegs_s01_bracer.label: Bracer
cool_aegs_s01_bracer.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military For those looking for a solid, dependable mid-line cooler, you can’t do much better than Aegis’ Bracer. This small-frame cooler system offers solid performance and durability to keep your ship firing on all cylinders.

cool_aegs_s01_bracer_scitem.label: Bracer
cool_aegs_s01_bracer_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military For those looking for a solid, dependable mid-line cooler, you can’t do much better than Aegis’ Bracer. This small-frame cooler system offers solid performance and durability to keep your ship firing on all cylinders.

cool_aegs_s01_glacier_scitem.label: Glacier
cool_aegs_s01_glacier_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military Your weapons, your shields, your thrusters. All vital during combat, all generating heat. Enter the Glacier cooler from Aegis Dynamics. A best-in-class heat management system designed to keep you cool as the pressure mounts.

cool_aegs_s01_polar.label: Polar
cool_aegs_s01_polar.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Built to the high demands of daily military service, Aegis’ Polar cooler features a reinforced frame for increased durability. You can rest assured that when you drop into the fires of combat, the Polar will keep your ship cool.

cool_aegs_s01_tundra.label: Tundra
cool_aegs_s01_tundra.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military Constructed by Aegis with military performance in mind, the Tundra’s reliable performance has made it a standard cooler of the UEE Navy.

cool_aegs_s02_arctic.label: Arctic
cool_aegs_s02_arctic.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military Providing the kind of durability that made Aegis products a mainstay with the military, the Arctic is an economic mil-spec cooler capable of withstanding the rigors of combat without sacrificing performance.

cool_aegs_s02_boreal.label: Boreal
cool_aegs_s02_boreal.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Military Designed to disperse the heat of battle, Aegis Dynamics’ Boreal cooler is a military standard with the capacity to survive stressful situations.

cool_aegs_s03_blizzard_scitem.label: Blizzard
cool_aegs_s03_blizzard_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Navy mechanics worked with Aegis engineers to ensure the Blizzard met their specific needs. When it reached the commercial market, this top of the line, military-grade cooler became one of Aegis’ top selling components.

cool_aegs_s03_galinstan_scitem.label: Galinstan
cool_aegs_s03_galinstan_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Military The Galinstan is an older model cooler originally developed for the UEE Navy. Its specs won’t knock your socks off but it remains a solid entry level, large cooler.

cool_aegs_s03_mercury.label: Mercury
cool_aegs_s03_mercury.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military In combat situations, even the smallest advantage can lead to big gains. With Aegis’ Mercury cooling system onboard, you’ll be able to push your ship hotter for longer when you need it most.

cool_aegs_s04_idris.label: AEGS Idris Cooler
cool_aegs_s04_idris.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 This capital-class cooler was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

cool_aegs_s04_reclaimer.label: Algid
cool_aegs_s04_reclaimer.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Industrial The Reclaimer is a ship renowned for its ability to work long and hard. To help support even the most arduous salvaging projects, Aegis develop the bespoke Algid cooler.

cool_aegs_s04_tundra.label: Tundra
cool_aegs_s04_tundra.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military Constructed by Aegis with military performance in mind, the Tundra’s reliable performance has made it a standard cooler of the UEE Navy.

cool_jspn_s00_froststarsl.label: Frost-Star SL
cool_jspn_s00_froststarsl.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian Whether cruising across the ground or sailing through space, there’s a J-Span cooler perfect for you. The Frost-Star SL is a mid-tier cooler designed to bring the line’s reliability to ground and open-canopy vehicles.

cool_jspn_s00_winterstarsl_scitem.label: Winter-Star SL
cool_jspn_s00_winterstarsl_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Civilian The latest in J-Span’s Winter-Star line of coolers, the SL’s new Kivo system offers a unique dispersal method, allowing your vehicle to manage heat better than ever before.

cool_jspn_s01_cryostar.label: Cryo-Star
cool_jspn_s01_cryostar.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian J-Span’s consumer-grade Cryo-Star cooler has become a common sight across the Empire thanks to its reliable heat absorption that won’t strain your ship’s power-plant.

cool_jspn_s01_froststar.label: Frost-Star
cool_jspn_s01_froststar.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Noted for its consistent performance, the Frost-Star cooler from J-Span has many admirers for its well-balanced power to heat ratio.

cool_jspn_s01_winterstar.label: Winter-Star
cool_jspn_s01_winterstar.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian Join the J-Span family by snagging the Winter-Star cooler for your ship. This entry-level model lacks flash but its strong performance record and price point make it a popular choice for pilots across the UEE.

cool_jspn_s02_cryostarex.label: Cryo-Star EX
cool_jspn_s02_cryostarex.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian With its EX line, J-Span has brought the same reliable heat absorption of their popular Cryo-Star cooler to pilots looking to outfit larger ships.

cool_jspn_s02_froststarex.label: Frost-Star EX
cool_jspn_s02_froststarex.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Frost-Star EX cooler comes to you from J-Span, a manufacturer with a well deserved reputation among ship owners for constructing coolers that can reliably handle heat exchange wherever you may fly.

cool_jspn_s02_winterstarex_scitem.label: Winter-Star EX
cool_jspn_s02_winterstarex_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Winter-Star EX is a baseline cooler you can trust. Built by the experts at J-Span, it’s ready to handle whatever conditions you encounter.

cool_jspn_s03_froststarxl_scitem.label: Frost-Star XL
cool_jspn_s03_froststarxl_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian As your ship flies, components generate heat that can be damaging and even lead to system failures unless properly dealt with by a dependable and properly designed cooler like the Frost-Star XL from J-Span.

cool_jspn_s03_winterstarxl_scitem.label: Winter-Star XL
cool_jspn_s03_winterstarxl_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian For two centuries, J-Span has dedicated itself to manufacturing coolers. The Winter-Star XL is their entry level large cooler. What it lacks in features, it more than makes up for in solid craftsmanship.

cool_just_s01_ecoflow.label: EcoFlow
cool_just_s01_ecoflow.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial A standard for centuries, Juno Starwerk’s industrial Eco-Flow cooler is a favorite of haulers for being easy to maintain even when carrying the heaviest cargo loads.

cool_just_s01_hydrocel.label: Hydrocel
cool_just_s01_hydrocel.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial Keep your ship working harder for longer with the durable Hydrocel, an entry-level industrial cooler from respected manufacturer Juno Starwerk.

cool_just_s01_thermax.label: Thermax
cool_just_s01_thermax.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk has done it again. With the Thermax line of coolers, Juno raised the bar on economical industrial coolers made to fit any budget. These small coolers offer above average performance and durability but without breaking the bank.

cool_just_s02_coolcore.label: CoolCore
cool_just_s02_coolcore.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial The name CoolCore says it all. Designed by Juno Starwerk to be as hardworking as you are, this cooler helps ensure that your entire ship operates well within desired temperature parameters.

cool_just_s02_hydrojet.label: HydroJet
cool_just_s02_hydrojet.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Industrial When your ship overheats, it makes just about any task not only more difficult, but potentially dangerous for you and your crew. With the entry-level HydroJet from Juno Starwerk installed, you can be confident that your heat levels are being controlled by a cooler designed by one of the most trustworthy names in the industry.

cool_just_s02_snowpack_scitem.label: Snowpack
cool_just_s02_snowpack_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Industrial Medium-sized industrial coolers don’t get any better than the Snowpack from Juno Starwerk. Outstanding performance and durability have made it a favorite of haulers for centuries.

cool_just_s03_chillmax_scitem.label: Chill-Max
cool_just_s03_chillmax_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Industrial The Chill-Max name is as straightforward as the design on this Juno Starwerk cooler. This highly-rated industrial cooler has been a favorite of haulers for centuries.

cool_just_s03_hydropulse_scitem.label: Hydropulse
cool_just_s03_hydropulse_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Industrial An entry level option to Juno Starwerk’s brand of coolers, the Hydropulse sacrifices some durability and utilizes some design tricks to make this large industrial cooler an option for those unable to afford one of their top of the line models.

cool_just_s03_thermalcore.label: ThermalCore
cool_just_s03_thermalcore.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Industrial When you’re in the middle of an important job, you don’t want to waste time wondering if your cooler is doing its part. Now you don’t have to. With the dependable mid-level ThermalCore cooler from Juno Starwerk onboard, you can take all the guesswork out of heat management.

cool_lplt_s01_arcticstorm.label: ArcticStorm
cool_lplt_s01_arcticstorm.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian If you’re after a cooler that balances performance, durability and stealth, then look to the ArcticStorm. This mid-grade cooler from Lightning Power Ltd uses their centuries old technology to provide performance that can be relied upon.

cool_lplt_s01_blastchill.label: BlastChill
cool_lplt_s01_blastchill.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian The BlastChill is a consumer-grade cooler from Lightning Power Ltd. It keeps your ship running without straining its signature, but is best known for a much mocked 2945 ad campaign that promised it was “Built to bring the chill.”

cool_lplt_s01_flashfreeze.label: FlashFreeze
cool_lplt_s01_flashfreeze.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian With the FlashFreeze, Lightning Power makes sure that no matter how hot things get, you can rely on its proven cooling technology to keep you flying.

cool_lplt_s02_coldsnap.label: ColdSnap
cool_lplt_s02_coldsnap.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Well-balanced performance is the hallmark of the ColdSnap cooler from Lightning Power Ltd., thanks to its ability to easily process the extra heat your ship generates during your day-to-day travels.

cool_lplt_s03_coldsurge_scitem.label: ColdSurge
cool_lplt_s03_coldsurge_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lighting Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian Make no mistake, the ColdSurge may not win any awards, but this large cooler from Lighting Power Ltd provides a good entry-level option for most civilian ships without breaking the bank.

cool_lplt_s03_frostburn.label: FrostBurn
cool_lplt_s03_frostburn.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Lightning Power Ltd. has put its years of design expertise and manufacturing know-how to craft the FrostBurn, an effective cooler that can handle the large scale heat management needs of a wide variety of ships on the market.

cool_orig_s04_890j_scitem.label: Serac
cool_orig_s04_890j_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Civilian Only available for Origin Jumpworks' luxury liner, Wen/Cassel specially designed the Serac cooler to keep the 890 Jump operational through the diverse conditions typically encountered while cruising the stars.

cool_tydt_s01_heatsafe.label: HeatSafe
cool_tydt_s01_heatsafe.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Stealth Pilots looking to keep their IR signature low rely on Tyler Design & Tech. As an entry level cooler, the HeatSafe not only limits emissions, it is built with Tyler’s satisfaction guarantee.

cool_tydt_s01_vaporblock.label: VaporBlock
cool_tydt_s01_vaporblock.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth Few coolers can match the stealth performance of the VaporBlock. The team at Tyler Design & Tech have crafted a cooler that keeps your ship’s signature low while delivering acceptable durability and performance.

cool_tydt_s02_heatsink_scitem.label: HeatSink
cool_tydt_s02_heatsink_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth The HeatSink produces low signatures without sacrificing too much performance or durability, making it a reliable stealth component.

cool_tydt_s02_icebox_scitem.label: IceBox
cool_tydt_s02_icebox_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Stealth The IceBox is an upgrade to the company’s standard medium cooler, as the team at Tyler Design & Tech made a number of subtle modifications and material upgrades that lowered the component’s signatures without greatly affecting its durability.

cool_tydt_s02_nightfall_scitem.label: NightFall
cool_tydt_s02_nightfall_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Stealth Run silent and safe with the NightFall from Tyler Design & Tech. Few coolers can match the way this component manages your ship's heat while also keeping its signatures low.

cool_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Mauler Cooler
cool_vncl_s04_mauler.description: This Vanduul cooler processes the excessive heat generated by the Mauler during intense combat.

cool_wcpr_s00_fridan.label: Fridan
cool_wcpr_s00_fridan.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Fridan is Wen/Cassel Propulsion’s entry-level vehicle cooler. It has proven time and again that it can withstand even the worst environmental conditions, making it an ideal component for your vehicle.

cool_wcpr_s00_tepilo_scitem.label: Tepilo
cool_wcpr_s00_tepilo_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 0 Grade: A Class: Civilian Few can top the cooling power of Wen/Cassel’s Tepilo. This top of the line cooler provides stellar durability and performance for ground vehicles.

cool_wcpr_s01_berian.label: Berian
cool_wcpr_s01_berian.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Berian delivers Wen/Cassel’s signature look and performance in an introductory cooler that will meet and surpass pilot’s expectations.

cool_wcpr_s01_endo.label: Endo
cool_wcpr_s01_endo.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian A cooler for discerning ship-owners who are looking to push their craft further, Wen/Cassel’s Endo features above average cooling performance and thoughtful design.

cool_wcpr_s02_aufeis_scitem.label: Aufeis
cool_wcpr_s02_aufeis_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian Impeccable design and unmatched attention to detail from Wen/Cassel Propulsion makes the Aufeis one of the premiere civilian coolers on the market.

cool_wcpr_s02_graupel.label: Graupel
cool_wcpr_s02_graupel.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Graupel not only provides the top of the line cooling technology that larger ships need to maintain optimal performance, it does it with Wen/Cassel’s signature craftsmanship.

cool_wcpr_s02_taiga_scitem.label: Taiga
cool_wcpr_s02_taiga_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Wen/Cassel has worked long and hard to develop quality coolers like the latest edition Taiga, which can process and manage excess heat while consistently maintaining the high standards that they have become known for.

cool_wcpr_s03_draug_scitem.label: Draug
cool_wcpr_s03_draug_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Draug balances performance, durability, and stealth. Making this large Wen/Cassel cooler ready to respond to any situation you find yourself in.

cool_wcpr_s03_elsen_scitem.label: Elsen
cool_wcpr_s03_elsen_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Wen/Cassel engineers used many of the same parts found in the Draug, only fine tuned to deliver improved performance and durability without greatly enhancing its signature. That makes the Elsen large cooler a worthy upgrade for those that can handle the extra heat.

cool_wcpr_s03_kragen_scitem.label: Kragen
cool_wcpr_s03_kragen_scitem.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian When you go big, get nothing but the best. The Kragen from Wen/Cassel Propulsion has consistently been rated among the best large, commercial coolers available on the market.

crus_star_runner_front_turret.label: Crusader Mercury Star Runner Nose Turret
crus_star_runner_front_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Crusader Industries Size: 3 This pilot-controlled, dual-linked nose turret is mounted to the belly of the Mercury Star Runner. Bespoke to the ship, the turret is outfitted with two size-3 laser repeaters ready to help keep your flight path clear.

crus_game_chess_1_a.label: Crusader White Bishop
crus_game_chess_1_a.description: Included with the Mercury Star Runner from Crusader Industries, this minimalist white chess piece has a marble base.

crus_game_chess_1_b.label: Crusader White Bishop
crus_game_chess_1_b.description: Included with the Mercury Star Runner from Crusader Industries, this minimalist black chess piece has a marble base.

csv_paint_brown_black_grey.label: CSV Granite Livery
csv_paint_brown_black_grey.description: A heavy workload deserves a livery that means business. Outfit your Argo CSV with the dark grey Granite livery and show the 'verse you're ready to get the job done.

csv_paint_white_black_black.label: CSV Primer Livery
csv_paint_white_black_black.description: A clean worksite is a point of professional pride for many in the industry, and nothing says neat and tidy like the pristine white Primer livery for the Argo CSV.

csv_paint_yellow_black_black.label: CSV Jolt Livery
csv_paint_yellow_black_black.description: When you're working on building your latest settlement, be sure you stand out on even the harshest landscapes with the bright yellow Jolt livery for the Argo CSV.

carrack_paint_2953redfestival_red_gold.label: Carrack 2953 Auspicious Red Rooster Livery
carrack_paint_2953redfestival_red_gold.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Rooster livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a rooster.

carrack_paint_bis2950.label: Carrack 2950 Best In Show Livery
carrack_paint_bis2950.description: Customize your Carrack with this special 2950 Best in Show livery that is white with grey and gold accents.

carrack_paint_bis2952_black_red.label: Carrack Red Alert Livery
carrack_paint_bis2952_black_red.description: Explore new frontiers in style with the Red Alert livery, which gives the Carrack an audacious metallic red and black look.

carrack_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Carrack Nightbreak Livery
carrack_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Carrack with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

carrack_paint_copernicus_lightblue.label: Carrack Copernicus Livery
carrack_paint_copernicus_lightblue.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Carrack. Named in honor of famed astronomer Nicolaus Copernicus, the livery mixes two shades of blue with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the Copernicus livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

carrack_paint_debiasio_orange_grey.label: Carrack De Biasio Livery
carrack_paint_debiasio_orange_grey.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Carrack. Named in honor of former ICC Director Loretta De Biasio, this livery mixes orange and grey with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the De Biasio livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

carrack_paint_expedition_white.label: Carrack Expedition Livery
carrack_paint_expedition_white.description: The base livery for Anvil's Carrack Expedition model is a civilian-modified version of the original military paint scheme.

carrack_paint_halloween2024_blood.label: Carrack Purple Haze Livery
carrack_paint_halloween2024_blood.description: Celebrate Day of the Vara in style with the Purple Haze livery, featuring a glimmering metallic purple base paint splattered in green.

carrack_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Carrack Stormbringer Livery
carrack_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Carrack livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

carrack_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Carrack Polar Livery
carrack_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Carrack with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

carrack_paint_kepler_blue_orange.label: Carrack Kepler Livery
carrack_paint_kepler_blue_orange.description: To honor the brave explorers that brought us to space and support those currently seeking new frontiers, the Interstellar Cartography Center (ICC) commissioned this special livery for the Carrack. Named in honor of famed astronomer Johannes Kepler, the livery mixes dark blue and orange with black highlights. All proceeds from the sale of the Kepler livery goes directly to the ICC to support their efforts in "Charting the Way Ahead."

carrack_paint_reward_faction_cfp.label: Carrack Citizens for Prosperity Garnet Livery
carrack_paint_reward_faction_cfp.description: Join the Citizens for Prosperity in their mission to bring peace to the frontier with this dark grey and burgandy livery featuring the group's signature logo.

carrack_paint_reward_faction_frontierfig.label: Carrack Frontier Fighters Camo Livery
carrack_paint_reward_faction_frontierfig.description: Be ready to battle in the untamed wilds with this green camo livery featuring the logo of the Frontier Fighters vigilante group.

carrack_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.label: Carrack Headhunters Trauma Livery
carrack_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.description: Show your loyalty to the Headhunters gang with this livery featuring their logo emblazoned on a dark grey hull accented with a vibrant purple.

carrack_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.label: Carrack XenoThreat Purge Livery
carrack_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.description: Let Humanity know you won't bow down to alien invaders with this XenoThreat livery featuring a muted teal with bright red accents.

carryable_1h_cy_armor_vanduul_1_a.label: Vanduul Plating
carryable_1h_cy_armor_vanduul_1_a.description: A piece of plating typically worn by Vanduul as armor.

carryable_1h_cy_armor_vanduul_1_b.label: Vanduul Metal
carryable_1h_cy_armor_vanduul_1_b.description: A piece of metal of Vanduul origin.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_a.label: Covalex Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_a.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features Covalex Shipping branding with the company's logo and brown and grey color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_b.label: Ling Family Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_b.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features Ling Family Hauling branding with the company's logo and red and blue color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_c.label: Red Wind Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_c.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features Red Wind Linehaul branding with the company's logo and grey and red color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_d.label: T.A.B.A. Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_d.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features T.A.B.A. Freightline branding with the company's logo and grey color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_e.label: UDM Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_e.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features Unified Distribution Management branding with the company's logo and white and purple color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_f.label: Interstellar Transport Guild Container Model
carryable_1h_cy_cargo_model_1_f.description: There's no need for a tractor beam to move this cargo container. This finely detailed model features Interstellar Transport Guild branding with the guild's logo and black and grey color scheme.

carryable_1h_cy_flair_hurston_statue_1_a.label: Archibald Hurston Figurine
carryable_1h_cy_flair_hurston_statue_1_a.description: A brushed bronze scale replica of the statue commemorating the late Archibald Hurston, former CEO of Hurston Dynamics, that can be seen prominently displayed in the Lorville Central Business District.

carryable_1h_cy_flair_poster_ht_atmo2956.label: Enter Atmosphere 2956 Poster
carryable_1h_cy_flair_poster_ht_atmo2956.description: Show your pride for the 2956 Enter Atmosphere competition with this wall display featuring an Aegis Gladius flying against the event's colors.

carryable_1h_sq_flair_coin_1_luminalia_a.label: Luminalia '55 Coin
carryable_1h_sq_flair_coin_1_luminalia_a.description: Have an extra happy Luminalia celebration with this green and red tinted coin featuring season greetings in both common and Banu on one side, while the other features the year.

carryable_1h_sq_flair_coin_1_lunar_rat_a.label: Year of the Rat Coin
carryable_1h_sq_flair_coin_1_lunar_rat_a.description: A gilded red coin celebrating the Year of the Rat. Said to bring good fortune and prosperity in the upcoming cycle, coins like these have become a popular gift during the annual Red Festival.

carryable_2h_cy_flair_arccorp_statue_1_a.label: ArcCorp Cog Sphere Replica
carryable_2h_cy_flair_arccorp_statue_1_a.description: A miniaturized version of Memphis Avery's iconic sculpture displayed in Area18's plaza, representing the innovative and aesthetic nature of ArcCorp's technology.

carryable_2h_cy_flair_newbabbage_statue_.label: Wally's Bar Hologram Replica
carryable_2h_cy_flair_newbabbage_statue_.description: This replica of the holographic center piece at the infamous Wally's Bar in New Babbage features warm oranges and yellows that evoke the feeling of a tropical sunset in your personal habitat.

carryable_2h_cy_flair_orison_statue_1_a.label: Stormwal Sculpture Replica
carryable_2h_cy_flair_orison_statue_1_a.description: With careful attention to detail, this scaled down version of the famed "Until Again" sculpture that graces Orison's skyline captures the majesty and grace of the endangered stormwal.

carryable_2h_cy_harvestable_turtle_1_a.label: Leyland's Tortoise
carryable_2h_cy_harvestable_turtle_1_a.description: Leyland’s tortoise is a species of tortoise indigenous to Earth (Sol III). Extremely docile, they are kept as pets by Humans, especially long-haul spacers. Over-collection and habitat destruction have made them nearly extinct in the wild.

carryable_2h_cy_harvestable_turtle_2_a.label: Leyland's Tortoise
carryable_2h_cy_harvestable_turtle_2_a.description: Leyland’s tortoise is a species of tortoise indigenous to Earth (Sol III). Extremely docile, they are kept as pets by Humans, especially long-haul spacers. Over-collection and habitat destruction have made them nearly extinct in the wild.

carryable_2h_cy_lamp_heart_1_a.label: Pink Heart Lamp
carryable_2h_cy_lamp_heart_1_a.description: Emitting a soft, sensual pink glow, the curvaceous Pink Heart Lamp is sure to shine a light on any romantic evening.

carryable_2h_cy_plushy_coramor_1_a.label: Red Heart Plushie
carryable_2h_cy_plushy_coramor_1_a.description: Huggable, lovable, and thoroughly squashable, this red heart plushie will fill your heart with joy. With a firm but springy filling, this plush cushion consist of a synthetic leather casing dyed with a passionate scarlet coloring.

carryable_2h_fl_05x05x05_carrayblelootab.label: Luminalia Gift Box
carryable_2h_fl_05x05x05_carrayblelootab.description: Wrapped in elegant sky blue paper adorned in stars and topped with a smart silk ribbon, this large gift box makes the ideal festive storage solution.

carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_coin_case.label: Coin Display Case
carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_coin_case.description: Proudly display your coins with this handsome case featuring a red velvet setting for up to ten coins and a pristine glass front so all can enjoy your collection.

carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_medgun_1_.label: Field Medic Kit
carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_medgun_1_.description: Medical emergencies can happen any time, any place. Be prepared with this Field Medic Kit from Curelife which provides convenient and portable storage for a ParaMed Medical Device, Pancea MedGel refills, and additional medicine injectors.

carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_multitool.label: Field Medic Kit
carryable_2h_fl_container_anim_multitool.description: Medical emergencies can happen any time, any place. Be prepared with this Field Medic Kit from Curelife which provides convenient and portable storage for a ParaMed Medical Device, Pancea MedGel refills, and additional medicine injectors.

carryable_2h_fl_painting_constellation_a.label: RSI Constellation Painting
carryable_2h_fl_painting_constellation_a.description: Rendered with incredible detail, this beautiful painting features RSI's iconic ship sailing through a tempestuous stretch of unexplored space.

carryable_2h_fl_ball_basketball_1_a.label: Basketball
carryable_2h_fl_ball_basketball_1_a.description: This inflatable ball features an orange synthetic composite with black ribbing that provides excellent bounce and control ideal for jamming while traveling in space.

carryable_2h_fl_guncase_pistol_briefcase.label: PSX Pistol Case
carryable_2h_fl_guncase_pistol_briefcase.description: Remain discreet yet ready with this sleek case capable of holding a pistol and several attachments. It features a hard outer shell and an inside lined with a special, rigid polyurethane foam designed to securely hold a wide variety of attachments.

carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_itg_cargo_1_a.label: Interstellar Transport Guild Cargo Plushie
carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_itg_cargo_1_a.description: Here's a haul you can hug. This plushie shaped like a cargo container features Interstellar Transport Guild branding with the guild's logo and blue and grey color scheme.

carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_covalex_cargo.label: Covalex Cargo Plushie
carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_covalex_cargo.description: Here's a haul you can hug. This plushie shaped like a cargo container features Covalex Shipping branding with the company's logo and brown and grey color scheme.

carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_ling_cargo_1_.label: Ling Family Cargo Plushie
carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_ling_cargo_1_.description: Here's a haul you can hug. This plushie shaped like a cargo container features Ling Family Hauling branding with the company's logo and red, blue, and white color scheme.

carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_redwind_cargo.label: Red Wind Cargo Plushie
carryable_2h_fl_toy_plushy_redwind_cargo.description: Here's a haul you can hug. This plushie shaped like a cargo container features Red Wind Linehaul branding with the company's logo and grey and red color scheme.

carryable_2h_missionitem_evidencebox.label: Evidence
carryable_2h_missionitem_evidencebox.description: This box is specifically designed for use with evidence in order to help prevent tampering and properly ensure the chain of custody.

carryable_2h_sq_gladius_model_1_stand_a.label: Gladius Dunlevy Model
carryable_2h_sq_gladius_model_1_stand_a.description: This exquisitely detailed Gladius model honors the light fighter that's been protecting the UEE for centuries. Soaring above a stand featuring the UEE logo and ship's name, the Dunlevy variant of the Gladius was crafted to honor Captain Alexandra Dunlevy, who shaped the course of the Navy's elite Squadron 42.

carryable_tbo_fl_4scu_commodity_organic_.label: CryoPod (Vanduul)
carryable_tbo_fl_4scu_commodity_organic_.description: A Vanduul corpse preserved within a CryoPod.

carryable_tbo_inventorycontainer_1scu_pi.label: Salvaged Skull 1 SCU Container
carryable_tbo_inventorycontainer_1scu_pi.description: It may be used to transport “goods”, but this battered and scarred 1 SCU container is anything but thanks to its vivid skull markings.

carryable_tbo_inventorycontainer_2scu_pi.label: Salvaged Skull 2 SCU Container

carryable_tbo_missionitem_tsg_fueltank.description: This container from the QV Extraction Facility's operational days contains quantanium fuel that has been improperly stored causing a chemical anomaly in the fuel.

caterpillar_paint_bis2949.label: Caterpillar 2949 Best In Show Livery
caterpillar_paint_bis2949.description: Customize your Caterpillar with this special 2949 Best in Show livery.

caterpillar_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Caterpillar features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

caterpillar_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Caterpillar Crusader Livery

caterpillar_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Caterpillar Hurston Livery
caterpillar_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Caterpillar features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

caterpillar_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Caterpillar microTech Livery
caterpillar_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Caterpillar features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

caterpillar_paint_green_black.label: Caterpillar Ghoulish Green Livery
caterpillar_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Caterpillar livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

caterpillar_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Caterpillar Stormbringer Livery
caterpillar_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Caterpillar livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black and electric blue with white accents to give the ship a cool new look.

caterpillar_paint_iae2950_grey_white.label: Caterpillar Polar Livery
caterpillar_paint_iae2950_grey_white.description: Modify your Caterpillar with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

caterpillar_paint_luminalia_2021_green_r.label: Caterpillar Deck the Hull Livery
caterpillar_paint_luminalia_2021_green_r.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

caterpillar_paint_luminalia_2021_white_b.label: Caterpillar IceBreak Livery
caterpillar_paint_luminalia_2021_white_b.description: Equip your Caterpillar with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

caterpillar_paint_mistwalker_grey_camo.label: Caterpillar Mistwalker Livery
caterpillar_paint_mistwalker_grey_camo.description: Become one with the clouds with the Caterpillar Mistwalker livery and its grey camo pattern.

caterpillar_paint_pirate.label: Caterpillar Pirate Livery
caterpillar_paint_pirate.description: This fearsome Pirate livery for the Caterpillar features an intimidating finish with skull decals and an accounting of nefarious deeds.

caterpillar_paint_unity.label: Caterpillar Foundation Fest Livery
caterpillar_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

centurion_paint_beachhead_camo.label: Centurion Beachhead Camo Livery
centurion_paint_beachhead_camo.description: Become one with the landscape with the Beachhead Camo livery that gives the Centurion a light tan camo pattern.

centurion_paint_icestorm_camo.label: Centurion Ice Storm Camo Livery
centurion_paint_icestorm_camo.description: The Ice Storm Camo livery will break up the silhouette of your Centurion with its white and grey camo pattern.

centurion_paint_sandstorm_camo.label: Centurion Sandstorm Camo Livery
centurion_paint_sandstorm_camo.description: Outfit the Centurion in dark tan and green camo with the Sandstorm Camo livery. The looks allows this battlefield beast to blend into a wide variety of terrains.

charm_rooster_01.label: Wooden Rooster Charm (Small)
charm_rooster_01.description: Give the gift of good fortune and prosperity with this charm, handcarved by frontier settlers in honor of the Year of the Rooster. This considerate gift is crafted from wood to represent one's efforts to put down roots in a new world while the rooster design represents hard work and resourcefulness.

charm_rooster_02.label: Wooden Rooster Charm (Medium)
charm_rooster_02.description: Give the gift of good fortune and prosperity with this charm, handcarved by frontier settlers in honor of the Year of the Rooster. This thoughtful gift is crafted from wood to represent one's efforts to put down roots in a new world while this particular rooster design, larger than most of its counterparts, represents courage and confidence.

charm_rooster_03.label: Wooden Rooster Charm (Large)
charm_rooster_03.description: Give the gift of good fortune and prosperity with this charm, handcarved by frontier settlers in honor of the Year of the Rooster. This generous gift is crafted from wood to represent one's efforts to put down roots in a new world while the robust and ornate rooster design represents those with ambition and fierce loyalty.

cleanerfish.label: Vindel
cleanerfish.description: Generally found in shallow waters in the temperate regions of Locke, this species of fish feeds on waste and algae that collects at the bottom of rivers. The tentacles allow the fish to sift through the loose rock and soil. Though technically edible, most avoid eating them because they taste pretty terrible.

clipper_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Clipper Nightbreak Livery
clipper_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Clipper with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

clipper_paint_black_cream_red.label: Clipper Basalt Livery
clipper_paint_black_cream_red.description: Mainly black, the Basalt livery also brings red and cream highlights to the Clipper.

clipper_paint_blue_black_white.label: Clipper Cerulean Livery
clipper_paint_blue_black_white.description: Bring a beautiful blue with black and white accents to the Clipper with the Cerulean livery.

clipper_paint_green_khaki_brown.label: Clipper Holt Camo Livery
clipper_paint_green_khaki_brown.description: The swirling green and khaki camo pattern of the Holt Camo livery makes it an ideal choice when you want to make the Clipper a bit more inconspicuous.

clipper_paint_red_black_white.label: Clipper Firewall Livery
clipper_paint_red_black_white.description: The Firewall livery brings a bold and brash red appearance to the Clipper.

clipper_paint_white_black_red.label: Clipper Regatta Livery
clipper_paint_white_black_red.description: The dynamic stylings of the Regatta livery features a white base paint with black highlights and stripes plus bold red accents.

clipper_paint_yellow_black_white.label: Clipper Apis Livery
clipper_paint_yellow_black_white.description: Predominantly yellow with black highlights and stripes, the Apis livery gives the Clipper a distinct look worthy of its name.

common_advocacybadge.label: Advocacy Badge (Replica)
common_advocacybadge.description: A high quality replica Advocacy Agent badge featuring solid construction and authentic detailing. This item is intended for decorative or recreational purposes only.

common_datapad.label: Datapad
common_datapad.description: A portable tablet computing device featuring a touchscreen display.

constellation_bottom_turret.label: RSI Constellation Bottom Turret
constellation_bottom_turret.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 0 Featuring a three-barrel sequential fire design, the Klaus & Werner CF-007 Bulldog repeater is capable of high rates of fire while maintaining accuracy. It has low damage per projectile and, although it has relatively low power consumption over-all, several publications have commented on its somewhat lackluster efficiency. Even so, the CF-007 remains a favorite among new pilots who are outfitting their first ship.

constellation_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Constellation Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
constellation_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Show your support for the newest batch of Navy recruits by customizing your Constellation with this special Blue and Gold livery to commemorate the 2950 Invictus Launch Week.

constellation_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Constellation Dark Green Livery
constellation_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Constellation with this stunning green livery.

constellation_paint_2952redfestival_red_.label: Constellation 2952 Auspicious Red Monkey Livery
constellation_paint_2952redfestival_red_.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Monkey livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a monkey's head.

constellation_paint_blackheron.label: Constellation Black Heron Livery
constellation_paint_blackheron.description: Embrace the darkness of space in style with the Constellation Black Heron livery that blends grey with green and orange highlights.

constellation_paint_fw2955_grey_black_re.label: Constellation Nightbreak Livery

constellation_top_turret.label: RSI Constellation Top Turret
constellation_top_turret.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 0 Featuring a three-barrel sequential fire design, the Klaus & Werner CF-007 Bulldog repeater is capable of high rates of fire while maintaining accuracy. It has low damage per projectile and, although it has relatively low power consumption over-all, several publications have commented on its somewhat lackluster efficiency. It also features branding from Pyrotechnic Amalgamated, the now defunct mining company that found and named the system.

corsair_paint_black_black_gold_camo.label: Corsair Downburst Camo Livery

corsair_paint_black_black_red.label: Corsair Eternity Livery
corsair_paint_black_black_red.description: Become one with the darkness of space with the Eternity livery for the Corsair, which is black with subtle red accents.

corsair_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Corsair Nightbreak Livery
corsair_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Corsair with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

corsair_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skul.label: Corsair Skullcrusher Livery

corsair_paint_red_white_black.label: Corsair Flashpoint Livery
corsair_paint_red_white_black.description: Bright red and crisp white combine in the Flashpoint livery to deliver a dynamic look to the Corsair.

cup_insulated.label: Insulated Cup
cup_insulated.description: Used to hold warm beverages, this drinking vessel has a layer of insulation to prevent scalding your hand while holding.

cup_mug.label: Mug
cup_mug.description: A small, handled drinking vessel made from insulating ceramic to help keep bevarages warm.

cup_mug_orison_1_a.label: Orison Mug
cup_mug_orison_1_a.description: A small, handled drinking vessel made from insulating ceramic to help keep bevarages warm. Features a unique Orison theme.

cup_plastic.label: Plastic Cup
cup_plastic.description: A sturdy plastic cup with a wide lip and two ridges to make it easy to grip.

currency_bar_1_damaged_a.label: UNE Gold Ingot (Damaged)
currency_bar_1_damaged_a.description: A heavily damaged gold ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE). These ingots were used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. Broken but still rare, an elaborate, textured pattern is still apparent on the ingot.

currency_bar_1_damaged_b.label: UNE Silver Ingot (Damaged)
currency_bar_1_damaged_b.description: A heavily damaged silver ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE). These ingots were used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. Broken but still rare, an elaborate, textured pattern is still apparent on the ingot.

currency_bar_1_flawed_a.label: UNE Gold Ingot (Flawed)
currency_bar_1_flawed_a.description: A gold ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE) that is rated as being in flawed condition. These ingots were used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. This rare item features the a worn three ring, six star logo used by the UNE within a circular recess and an elaborate, textured pattern across the rest of it.

currency_bar_1_flawed_b.label: UNE Silver Ingot (Flawed)
currency_bar_1_flawed_b.description: A silver ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE) that is rated as being in flawed condition. These ingots were used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. This rare item features a worn three ring, six star logo used by the UNE within a circular recess and an elaborate, textured pattern across the rest of it.

currency_bar_1_pristine_a.label: UNE Gold Ingot (Pristine)
currency_bar_1_pristine_a.description: A gold ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE) that has remained in pristine condition. These ingots were used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. This rare item features the three ring, six star logo used by the UNE within a circular recess and an elaborate, textured pattern across the rest of it.

currency_bar_1_pristine_b.label: UNE Silver Ingot (Pristine)
currency_bar_1_pristine_b.description: A silver ingot cast by the United Nations of Earth (UNE) that has remained in pristine condition. These ingots were considered official currency and used in areas of the UNE where technological issues often hampered secure and instant money transfers. This rare item features the three ring, six star logo used by the UNE within a circular recess and an elaborate, textured pattern across the rest of it.

cutlass_paint_blue_blue_gold_gothic.label: Cutlass Elysium Livery

cutlass_paint_cypress_lightgreen_camo.label: Cutlass Cypress Livery
cutlass_paint_cypress_lightgreen_camo.description: The Cypress is a light green camo livery made for the Cutlass.

cutlass_paint_skullandcrossbones_black_r.label: Cutlass Skull and Crossbones Livery
cutlass_paint_skullandcrossbones_black_r.description: Deemed by Drake's public relations team as a ?tongue-in-cheek reference to the overblown controversy,? the Skull and Crossbones livery leans into the perception that the Cutlass is marketed toward those on the wrong side of the law. The livery embraces classic pirate iconography by featuring several skull and crossbones symbols across it grey frame with red highlights.

cutlass_paint_special_asia.label: Cutlass Destiny Livery

cutter_paint_ochre_metal.description: Bright and bold yellow balanced by black highlights makes the Light Beam livery for the Cutter standout from the crowd.

cutter_paint_olive_white_orange.label: Cutter Caiman Livery
cutter_paint_olive_white_orange.description: Green and white with orange highlights, the Caiman livery brings a distinct and dramatic look to the Cutter.

cutter_paint_orange_grey_stripe.label: Cutter Rockslide Livery
cutter_paint_orange_grey_stripe.description: Bring a unique style to the Cutter with the Rockslide livery, which adds orange stripes and brown highlights to compliment the ship's grey body.

cutter_paint_pearl_silver.label: Cutter Wind Chill Livery
cutter_paint_pearl_silver.description: The Wind Chill livery for the Cutter features crisp white paint with black highlights.

cutter_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.label: Cutter Hosanna Livery
cutter_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.description: Inspired by the gorgeous clouds that enshroud Orison, the Hosanna livery blends red, ivory, and pink to give the Cutter a distinct appearance. It also features a silhouette of the landing zone's famous Hosanna tree complete with its pink flowers.

cutter_paint_reward_faction_cfp.label: Cutter Citizens for Prosperity Garnet Livery
cutter_paint_reward_faction_cfp.description: Join the Citizens for Prosperity in their mission to bring peace to the frontier with this dark grey and burgandy livery featuring the group's signature logo.

cutter_paint_reward_faction_frontierfigh.label: Cutter Frontier Fighters Camo Livery
cutter_paint_reward_faction_frontierfigh.description: Be ready to battle in the untamed wilds with this green camo livery featuring the logo of the Frontier Fighters vigilante group.

cutter_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.label: Cutter Headhunters Trauma Livery
cutter_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.description: Show your loyalty to the Headhunters gang with this livery featuring their logo emblazoned on a dark grey hull accented with a vibrant purple.

cutter_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.label: Cutter XenoThreat Purge Livery
cutter_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.description: Let Humanity know you won't bow down to alien invaders with this XenoThreat livery featuring a muted teal with bright red accents.

cutter_paint_sand_orange_hurston.label: Cutter Central Tower Livery
cutter_paint_sand_orange_hurston.description: Give the Cutter a dramatic new look with the Central Tower livery. The orange and black color scheme is inspired by the furnaces of industry powering Lorville, and also features a representation of the landing zone's iconic Central Headquarters and Shared Services Center, aka Central Tower.

cutter_paint_unity2952_metal_teal_grey.label: Cutter Foundation Fest Livery
cutter_paint_unity2952_metal_teal_grey.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

cutter_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.label: Cutter Aspire Livery
cutter_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.description: With the Aspire livery, blue and white combine to evoke both the colors and frigid temperatures of New Babbage. In honor of the landing zone that inspired it, the livery also features a depiction of the Aspire Grand building that dominates the city's skyline.

cyclone_paint_dustdevil.label: Cyclone Dust Devil Livery
cyclone_paint_dustdevil.description: Featuring a non-reflective matte black paint, the Dust Devil livery is perfect for land-based operations that require speed and discretion.

cyclone_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Cyclone Timberline Livery
cyclone_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Cyclone with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

cyclone_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Cyclone Frostbite Camo Livery
cyclone_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Embody the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Cyclone.

cyclone_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Cyclone Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
cyclone_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Cyclone a striking style.

cyclone_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Cyclone Lovestruck Livery
cyclone_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Cyclone.

cyclone_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tige.label: Cyclone Whirlwind Livery
cyclone_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tige.description: The Whirlwind livery mixes various shades of blue in a memorable animal stripe pattern to give the Cyclone a daring look.

cyclone_paint_racing_blue_white.label: Cyclone Slipstream Livery
cyclone_paint_racing_blue_white.description: The Slipstream livery will have your Cyclone ready and raring to race with this sleek blue and white paint scheme.

cyclone_paint_racing_purple_white.label: Cyclone Turbocharged Livery
cyclone_paint_racing_purple_white.description: The Turbocharged is a distinct, purple racing livery for the Cylcone that will make you stand out from the rest of the field.

cyclone_paint_racing_red_silver.label: Cyclone Overdrive Livery
cyclone_paint_racing_red_silver.description: Blast past other racers in your Cyclone with the Overdrive livery, which features a stylish blend red and silver coloring.

cyclone_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_s.label: Cyclone Finish Line Livery
cyclone_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_s.description: Give the Cyclone a classic racing design with the Finish Line livery. It features a yellow stripe across the front, a white one through the middle, and a grey one on the back.

drak_buccaneer_dual_s2.label: Drake Buccaneer Spinal Mount
drak_buccaneer_dual_s2.description: Ward off attacks from any angle by installing this gimballed spinal mount. Designed by Drake for the Buccaneer, this S4 turret can equip two S2 weapons to keep the heat on aggressors.

drak_cutlass_black_shop.label: Drake Cutlass Black
drak_cutlass_black_shop.description: Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary Focus: Medium Fighter / Medium Freight Drake Interplanetary claims that the Cutlass Black is a low-cost, easy-to-maintain solution for local in-system militia units. The larger-than-average cargo hold, RIO seat and dedicated tractor mount are, the company literature insists, for facilitating search and rescue operations.

drak_cutlass_red_sensor_turret.label: Nav-E7 Echo Scanner
drak_cutlass_red_sensor_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Size: 4 The Echo scanner from Nav-E7 utilizes enhanced long-range sensor capabilities and the manual precision of a remote turret mount to become an indispensable tool during search operations.

drak_cutlass_red_shop.label: Drake Cutlass Red
drak_cutlass_red_shop.description: Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary Focus: Medical The Cutlass Red converts the standard cargo hold to a well-equiped medical facility including an Autodoc. This starbound ambulance features the Nav-E7 Echo Transponder, a long range scanner, and a Secure Plus Docking Collar, making it ideal for search and rescue. This model also features a unique Red Crossbones skin.

drak_cutlass_steel_remoteturret.label: Drake Cutlass Steel Remote Turret
drak_cutlass_steel_remoteturret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary Size: 2 This remote-operated turret comes factory-equipped with two Klaus & Werner laser repeaters.

drak_s2_rack_x2.label: Drake Double Platform
drak_s2_rack_x2.description: The Double Platform fits any Drake ship to carry up to two missiles while connecting effortlessly to the ship's launch control.

drak_trirememain_s3_q1.label: Drake Trireme S-3
drak_trirememain_s3_q1.description: Drake's proprietary Trireme S Series of maneuvering thrusters is a low emission propulsion system to give pilots absolute control of their ship while minimizing your profile on outside scanners.

drak_trireme_s1_q1.label: Drake Trireme S-1
drak_trireme_s1_q1.description: Drake's proprietary Trireme S Series of maneuvering thrusters is a low emission propulsion system to give pilots absolute control of their ship while minimizing your profile on outside scanners.

drak_trireme_s3_q1.label: Drake Trireme Thruster
drak_trireme_s3_q1.description: Drake's proprietary Trieme S Series of maneuvering thrusters is a low emission propulsion system to give pilots absolute control of their ship while minimizing your profile on outside scanners.

dstc_fp_g4gi_s2_q1.label: Dragon STC Blue Main Thruster
dstc_fp_g4gi_s2_q1.description: The STC Blue by perrenial thruster manufacturer Dragon Stellar Transit Company offers high output and low emissions, great for pilots wishing to close the distance while maintaining a low profile. The smallest thruster in the STC lineup, the Blue has a thrust rating of 2.

dstc_fp_g4gi_s3_q1.label: Dragon STC Red Main Engine
dstc_fp_g4gi_s3_q1.description: The Dragon Stellar STC Red is a great choice for pilots of small ships. Despite its lack of fuel and power efficiency it boasts a respectable thrust output that really shines on low mass ships such as the Aurora. As an added benefit, Dragon Stellar recently developed new technology that reduces the output signature, great for pilots who don't wish to call a lot of attention to themselves. Its thrust rating of 3 gives it more thrust than the Blue, at the cost of higher power consumption and signature.

dstc_fp_g4gi_s4_q1.label: Dragon STC Silver Main Engine
dstc_fp_g4gi_s4_q1.description: The STC Silver from Dragon Stellar Transit Company is a TR4 engine noted for its high thrust ouput and low EM emissions. It has been rumored that Dragon Stellar has been using inferior components, but for some pilots the decreased power and fuel efficiency is worth the extra boost, especially at this price point.

defender_paint_alienweek_green_red.label: Defender Ocellus Livery
defender_paint_alienweek_green_red.description: The Ocellus livery adapts and updates the iconic colors and design used on some Tevarin ships to bring a striking new look to the Defender. The livery gives the fuselage a prominent red section while shimmering green covers the rest of the ship. Thick grey lines swoop through both colors to provide a unique geometric pattern.

defender_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver.label: Defender Wanderer Livery
defender_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver.description: The Wanderer livery features crisscrossing purple and grey lines over a platinum foundation. Inspired by the sacred Xi'an gardens of R.aip?uang, famous for its trails that wander in surprising ways and encourage a focus on the journey instead of the destination.

defender_paint_harmony.label: Defender Harmony Livery
defender_paint_harmony.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with aliens with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Banu Defender owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

defender_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Defender Stormbringer Livery
defender_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Defender livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

defender_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Defender Polar Livery
defender_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Defender with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

defender_paint_platinum_silver_red.label: Defender Platinum Livery
defender_paint_platinum_silver_red.description: The Platinum livery uses several shades of silver to accentuate the Defender's unique look.

defibrillator.label: HeartStone PDS
defibrillator.description: This single-use mobile defibrillator unit is perfect for military and law enforcement field applications, simply place the electrodes and press the button.

dragonfly_paint_citcon2953_beige_tan_bei.label: Dragonfly Roustabout Livery (Modified)
dragonfly_paint_citcon2953_beige_tan_bei.description: This version of the livery has been modified from its original form with the addition of graffiti. Released in 2893 to celebrate the 400th anniversary of Pyro's discovery, the Roustabout livery gets it look and name from the ship whose scans led to the discovery of the first jump point into the system. It also features the logo of Pyrotechnic Amalgamated, the now-defunct mining company that named the system.

dragonfly_paint_coalfire_red_black.label: Dragonfly Coalfire Livery
dragonfly_paint_coalfire_red_black.description: Style and speed meet with the Dragonfly Coalfire livery that blends red and grey for an alluring look.

dragonfly_paint_green_black.label: Dragonfly Ghoulish Green Livery
dragonfly_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Dragonfly livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

dragonfly_paint_mistwalker_grey_camo.label: Dragonfly Mistwalker Livery
dragonfly_paint_mistwalker_grey_camo.description: Become one with the clouds with the Dragonfly Mistwalker livery and its grey camo pattern.

dragonfly_paint_racing_blue_white.label: Dragonfly Slipstream Livery
dragonfly_paint_racing_blue_white.description: The Slipstream livery will have your Dragonfly ready and raring to race with this sleek blue and white paint scheme.

dragonfly_paint_racing_purple_white.label: Dragonfly Turbocharged Livery
dragonfly_paint_racing_purple_white.description: The Turbocharged is a distinct, purple racing livery for the Dragonfly that will make you stand out from the rest of the field.

dragonfly_paint_racing_red_silver.label: Dragonfly Overdrive Livery
dragonfly_paint_racing_red_silver.description: Blast past other racers in style on your Dragonfly with the Overdrive livery, which blends red and silver coloring.

drink_bottle_synergy_01_plus_a.label: Synergy+
drink_bottle_synergy_01_plus_a.description: HEI: 48 NDR: 06 Effects: Energizing, Hydrating Synergy+ is formulated to deliver balanced active rehydration for an extended duration, allowing for continued harmony in motion.

drink_bottle_synergy_01_sport_a.label: SynergySport
drink_bottle_synergy_01_sport_a.description: HEI: 48 NDR: 06 Effects: Energizing, Hydrating SynergySport is formulated to deliver balanced active rehydration to replenish and restore so that you can get back to your body's peak performance sooner.

drink_can_guc_01_a.description: HEI: 15 Effects: Dehydrating, Cognitive Boosting Get Up Coffee is roasted with care to ensure a smooth blend of rich coffee flavor brewed to perfection. A splash of milk rounds out the flavor and emphasizes its natural sweetness.

drink_glass_highball_01_screwdriver_a.label: Screwdriver
drink_glass_highball_01_screwdriver_a.description: HEI: 07 Effects: Cognitive Impairment, Dehydrating A blend of grain vodka and citrus juice.

drink_glass_highball_01_whiskycoke_a.label: Whiskey & Cola
drink_glass_highball_01_whiskycoke_a.description: HEI: 07 Effects: Cognitive Impairment, Dehydrating Whiskey blended with a dark cola.

drink_glass_pint_01_a.label: Smoltz (Pint)
drink_glass_pint_01_a.description: HEI: 20 Effects: Cognitive Impairment, Dehydrating Crafted from select rice and barley for a traditional flavor passed down by generations of brewmasters. That’s the taste of Smoltz.

drink_glass_tumbler_01_a.label: Whiskey (Glass)
drink_glass_tumbler_01_a.description: HEI: 5 Effects: Cognitive Impairment, Dehydrating Distilled from fermented grains, whiskey is carefully aged to produce the drink's signature flavor.

espr_ballisticcannon_s1.label: Deadbolt I Cannon
espr_ballisticcannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 1 Spread dread with the Deadbolt I ballistic cannon. Feared for its firepower at short range, this notorious Tevarin weapon earned its intimidating reputation during the First Tevarin War as part of the Tevarin fleet's devastating arsenal. Esperia has painstakingly recreated the Deadbolt I out of respect to the original weapon and warriors who used it so effectively.

espr_ballisticcannon_s2.label: Deadbolt II Cannon
espr_ballisticcannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 2 Spread dread with the Deadbolt II ballistic cannon. Feared for its firepower at short range, this notorious Tevarin weapon earned its intimidating reputation during the First Tevarin War as part of the Tevarin fleet's devastating arsenal. Esperia has painstakingly recreated the Deadbolt II out of respect to the original weapon and warriors who used it so effectively.

espr_ballisticcannon_s6.label: Deadbolt VI Cannon
espr_ballisticcannon_s6.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 6 Spread dread with the Deadbolt VI ballistic cannon. Esperia has painstakingly recreated the Deadbolt VI out of respect to the original weapon and warriors who used it so effectively.

espr_lasercannon_s1.label: Lightstrike I Cannon
espr_lasercannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 1 The Lightstrike I takes the attack to distant targets by delivering focused, high damage blasts that will make any aggressor think twice before coming too close. Capable of providing powerful overwatch options during troop deployments or engaging targets in outer space, it's easy to see why the Lightstrike I was feared by UPE forces during the First Tevarin War.

espr_lasercannon_s2.label: Lightstrike II Cannon
espr_lasercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 The Lightstrike II takes the attack to distant targets by delivering focused, high damage blasts that will make any aggressor think twice before coming too close. Capable of providing powerful overwatch options during troop deployments or engaging targets in outer space, it's easy to see why the Lightstrike II was feared by UPE forces during the First Tevarin War.
