espr_lasercannon_s6.description: Manufacturer: Esperia Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 6 The Lightstrike VI takes the attack to distant targets by delivering focused, high damage blasts that will make any aggressor think twice before coming too close. Capable of providing powerful overwatch options during troop deployments or engaging targets in outer space, it's easy to see why the Lightstrike VI was feared by UPE forces during the First Tevarin War.

espr_prowler_remote_turret.label: Esperia Prowler Turret
espr_prowler_remote_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Esperia This faithful recreation of the original Tevarin design features modern mounts for precise target acquisition.

espr_prowler_utility_turret.label: Prowler Utility Tractor Turret
espr_prowler_utility_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Esperia Size: 1 This turret allows for the mounting of a turret beam to facilitate the transfer of cargo aboard the Prowler.

eclipse_paint_bis2950.label: Eclipse 2950 Best In Show Livery
eclipse_paint_bis2950.description: Customize your Eclipse with this special 2950 Best in Show livery that is primarily white with gold accents.

eclipse_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Eclipse Nightbreak Livery
eclipse_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Eclipse with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

eclipse_paint_iae_2952_blue_red_camo.label: Eclipse Ambush Camo Livery
eclipse_paint_iae_2952_blue_red_camo.description: Make the Eclipse harder to spot with the Ambush Camo livery, featuring a camouflage pattern to help break up the visual perception.

eclipse_paint_iae_2952_green_yellow.label: Eclipse Knockout Livery
eclipse_paint_iae_2952_green_yellow.description: The Knockout livery gives the Eclipse a green tint to make it less visible when in verdant landscapes.

eclipse_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.label: Eclipse Meridian Livery
eclipse_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.description: The Meridian livery gives the Eclipse a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

f8_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.label: F8 Lightning 2956 Auspicious Red Rat Livery
f8_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Rat livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a rat.

f8_paint_redfestival_red_gold.label: F8 Lightning Auspicious Red Livery
f8_paint_redfestival_red_gold.description: The Auspicious Red livery brings a bold red base paint and striking gold accents to the F8 Lightning.

fl_dice_1_d20_iae2954_a.label: Twenty-Sided Die Ship Manufacturers
fl_dice_1_d20_iae2954_a.description: When you have too many choices in your hangar, this fun novelty die is a great way to decide what to pilot. Rolled along a surface, this twenty-sided die will display the logo of a ship manufacturer or the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. If you get the IAE logo, we suggest taking your newest vehicle out for a ride.

fski_s1_rpod_3x_s3.label: Yebira I
fski_s1_rpod_3x_s3.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Size: 1 Rockets: 3xS3 The Yebira I rocket pod is the perfect system for efficient deployment of S3 ordnance. Manufactured by Firestorm Kinetics, this rocket pod carries three rockets and attaches to any size one hardpoint.

fski_s2_rpod_6x_s3.label: Yebira II
fski_s2_rpod_6x_s3.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Size: 2 Rockets: 6xS3 The Yebira II rocket pod is the perfect system for efficient deployment of S3 ordnance. Manufactured by Firestorm Kinetics, this rocket pod carries six rockets and attaches to any size two hardpoint.

fski_s3_rpod_9x_s3.label: Yebira III
fski_s3_rpod_9x_s3.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Size: 3 Rockets: 9xS3 The Yebira III rocket pod is the perfect system for efficient deployment of S3 ordnance. Manufactured by Firestorm Kinetics, this rocket pod carries nine rockets and attaches to any size three hardpoint.

f_bangs_hair_01.label: Bangs
f_bangs_hair_01.description: A straight cutting on the front part of the hair that hangs over the forehead.

f_bobcut_hair_01.label: Side Bob
f_bobcut_hair_01.description: Classic single length bob with a side part.

f_bobcut_hair_02.label: Wavy Bob
f_bobcut_hair_02.description: A somewhat longer bob with natural-looking waves.

f_formal_hair_01.label: Long Choppy Bob
f_formal_hair_01.description: Not technically a bob, but definitely a nice look.

f_hayes_shr_hair_01_shared.label: Styled Pixie
f_hayes_shr_hair_01_shared.description: A longer pixie styled with pomade.

f_ponytail_hair_01_shared.label: Low Ponytail
f_ponytail_hair_01_shared.description: Straight hair pulled back into a low ponytail.

f_pusher_shr_hair_01.label: Buzzed Mohawk
f_pusher_shr_hair_01.description: A mohawk featuring completely buzzed sides.

f_undercut_hair_01.label: Asymetrical Undercut
f_undercut_hair_01.description: Taller on one side and shorter on the other.

f_webster_shr_hair_01.label: Pixie
f_webster_shr_hair_01.description: The platonic ideal of the pixie haircut.

flair_actn_figure_outpost_worker_cen.label: Armin Trask Action Figure
flair_actn_figure_outpost_worker_cen.description: Not every hero can be found dogfighting through space, some heroes can see every day. Part of Takuetsu’s Citizen Series, this exquisitely crafted figure depicts an outpost worker doing what they do best: surviving. Modeled with a Gyson softshell helmet and multitool, this worker’s ready to tackle all the hardships and repairs needed to maintain an outpost in an inhospitable environment.

flair_actn_figure_outpost_worker_imp.label: Armin Trask Action Figure (Imperator Edition)
flair_actn_figure_outpost_worker_imp.description: Not every hero can be found dogfighting through space, some heroes can see every day. Part of Takuetsu’s Citizen Series, this exquisitely crafted figure depicts an outpost worker doing what they do best: surviving. Modeled with a Gyson softshell helmet and multitool, this worker’s ready to tackle all the hardships and repairs needed to maintain an outpost in an inhospitable environment.

flair_actn_figure_sm_b_team_tank_cen.label: Bravo Team Tank Action Figure
flair_actn_figure_sm_b_team_tank_cen.description: Bring your favorite Star Marine character into your home with this collectible statue. Developed in close conjunction with Electronic Access and using the original assets from the smash video game, this meticulously detailed model is crafted out of polyresin and fiberglass and features the CDS’ devastating ADP-mk4 heavy armor recently added to the game.

flair_actn_figure_sm_b_team_tank_imp.label: Bravo Team Tank Action Figure (Imperator Edition)
flair_actn_figure_sm_b_team_tank_imp.description: Bring your favorite Star Marine character into your home with this collectible statue. Developed in close conjunction with Electronic Access and using the original assets from the smash video game, this meticulously detailed model is crafted out of polyresin and fiberglass and features the CDS’ devastating ADP-mk4 heavy armor recently added to the game.

flair_actn_figure_uee_recon_marine_cen.label: Recon Marine Action Figure
flair_actn_figure_uee_recon_marine_cen.description: Outside of outright planetary invasion, the UEE Marines’ Recon Division train extensively in infiltration operations when a smaller footprint is needed. These highly-trained soldiers are experts in sabotage, intelligence gathering, and close-quarter combat. This exclusive figure in Takuetsu’s Military Might series depicts one of these ghost-like marines. Adorned in period accurate combat suit, this Recon Marine’s ready to cause trouble wherever you put them.

flair_actn_figure_uee_recon_marine_imp.label: Recon Marine Action Figure (Imperator Edition)
flair_actn_figure_uee_recon_marine_imp.description: Outside of outright planetary invasion, the UEE Marines’ Recon Division train extensively in infiltration operations when a smaller footprint is needed. These highly-trained soldiers are experts in sabotage, intelligence gathering, and close-quarter combat. This exclusive figure in Takuetsu’s Military Might series depicts one of these ghost-like marines. Adorned in period accurate combat suit, this Recon Marine’s ready to cause trouble wherever you put them.

flair_actn_figure_vncl_shipkiller_cen.label: Vanduul Shipkiller Action Figure
flair_actn_figure_vncl_shipkiller_cen.description: Get closer than you’d ever want with this stunning replica Vanduul Warrior. Meticulously sculpted with a keen attention to detail, this poseable fighter was released as part of Takuetsu’s Universe Series of replica figures and comes with a fearsome lance used during Vanduul boarding attacks.

flair_actn_figure_vncl_shipkiller_imp.label: Vanduul Shipkiller Action Figure (Imperator Edition)
flair_actn_figure_vncl_shipkiller_imp.description: Get closer than you’d ever want with this stunning replica Vanduul Warrior. Meticulously sculpted with a keen attention to detail, this poseable fighter was released as part of Takuetsu’s Universe Series of replica figures and comes with a fearsome lance used during Vanduul boarding attacks.

flair_coin_1_levski_a.label: Levski Coin
flair_coin_1_levski_a.description: This collectible coin features the message "Welcome to Levski" on one face and the symbol of the People's Alliance and their motto "Stronger Together" on the reverse.

flair_coin_1_f.label: Zeus Coin
flair_coin_1_f.description: A coin crafted to honor the RSI Zeus, the first commercial spaceship to feature a quantum drive. The historical exploration craft graces one side of the coin while the other side is embossed with the Roberts Space Industries logo.

flair_coin_1_g.label: Year of the Dog Coin
flair_coin_1_g.description: A gilded red coin celebrating the Year of the Dog. Said to bring good fortune and prosperity in the upcoming cycle, coins like these have become a popular gift during the annual Red Festival.

flair_coin_1_p.label: First Contact Day ’54 Coin
flair_coin_1_p.description: Celebrate the diversity of our universe with this special coin commissioned for the 2954 anniversary of First Contact Day. One side of the coin features “First Contact” written in Xi’an while the opposing side displays the same escribed in Banu.

flair_coin_1_q.label: Foundation Festival '54 Coin
flair_coin_1_q.description: This 2954 Foundation Festival coin honors those volunteers who endeavor to strengthen their community through charitable acts and features the program's distinct winged torch logo.

flair_coin_1_r.label: Day of the Vara '54 Coin
flair_coin_1_r.description: Featuring a skeletal handshake on one side and the emblem of the UEE on the other, this green and purple embossed coin has been struck in honor of the spookiest day of the year.

flair_coin_1_s.label: Death Mask '54 Coin
flair_coin_1_s.description: Carried by outlaws as way to show their elite standing in the pirate underworld, the Death Mask coin features a fierce Human skull on one side and a defaced UEE symbol on the other.

flair_coin_1_t.label: CitizenCon '54 Coin
flair_coin_1_t.description: Remember the 2954 CitizenCon with this collectable coin featuring the UEE logo on one side and the conference logo on the reverse.

flair_coramor54_coin.label: Coramor '54 Coin
flair_coramor54_coin.description: Celebrate 2954's Coramor holiday with this golden coin featuring pink, hearts on one face and two spacefaring lovers on the other, promising that not even the vastness of space can keep love apart.

flair_dashboard_cockpit_bot_1_a.label: Emoto Dashbot
flair_dashboard_cockpit_bot_1_a.description: Made to sit neatly on your dashboard, this companion Dashbot reacts during your travels with a large range of humorous facial expressions. Whether it's happy to see you or silently judging your piloting skills, the Emoto Dashbot is sure to make your next flight a little more fun.

flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_a.label: United Nations of Earth Mini-Flag
flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_a.description: Fly the flag of the first united Human government, the United Nations of Earth (UNE). First revealed in 2380, the inaugural flag design features interlocking circles symbolizing Humanity's three main populations centers (Earth, Mars, and Croshaw system) and six stars representing the ambition to continue expanding into space. This small metal stand flies a holographic version of the UNE flag, making it an ideal accessory for history buffs to place on their desk or aboard their ships.

flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_b.label: United Planets of Earth Mini-Flag
flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_b.description: This small metal stand flies a holographic flag of the United Planets of Earth (UPE). Designed in 2523 when Humanity replaced the United Nations of Earth (UNE) with a new political system better suited for its expanding governance over multiple systems. To symbolize this progression, the UPE flag kept the interlocking rings from the UNE flag while adding a circle with breaks to represent the continued desire to expand and laurel branches symbolizing the success of Humanity's space exploration.

flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_c.label: United Empire of Earth Mini-Flag
flair_dashboard_flag_uee_1_c.description: Celebrate the United Empire of Earth (UEE) wherever you go by flying a holographic version of the flag. The small and sleek stands makes it an ideal accessory for a desk or ship. Featuring a vibrant blue color offset by white, this iconic symbol incorporated iconography from the previous UPE flag to represent the next phase of Humanity's united government as it grew into a massive empire.

flair_dashboard_heart_teddy_1_a.label: Codi the Coramor Bear
flair_dashboard_heart_teddy_1_a.description: Never fly alone with Codi the Coramor Bear. With adorable pink fur, tender faux-leather paws, and a soft belly full of love, Codi will make a faithful flight companion for your cockpit.

flair_discount_cot.label: Cot
flair_discount_cot.description: Catch a few Z's between flights with this stylish Star Citizen cot!

flair_double_bed_basebuilding_citcon_1.label: CitizenCon 2954 Double Bed
flair_double_bed_basebuilding_citcon_1.description: It's never too early to start dreaming about next year's CitizenCon with this supremely comfortable double bed with two-toned blue CitizenCon linens and duvet.

flair_drink_screwtop_tumbler_1_a.label: Magnus IV Water Bottle
flair_drink_screwtop_tumbler_1_a.description: Boast about your trip to the UEE's most exclusive and elusive destination, Magnus IV. While some still question if the planet actually exists, this refillable water bottle is irrefutable proof that you've totally been there.

flair_drink_screwtop_tumbler_1_b.label: "Quantainium" Water Bottle
flair_drink_screwtop_tumbler_1_b.description: Make others believe you have the ability to tap into the awesome power of quantainium with this novelty water bottle. Unscrewing the lid produces a eerie blue glow that will make others truly wonder what you've got inside.

flair_fishtank_001.label: Fish Tank
flair_fishtank_001.description: This beautifully decorated tank comes from the Ten Thousand Seas Corporation. Stock it with exotic fish from across the 'verse to build a collection that will be the envy of all your friends.

flair_fishtank_referral.label: Kai Habitats
flair_fishtank_referral.description: The galaxy’s leader in habitat design and construction, Kai offers a variety of prebuilt environments for your home, office, hangar or business as well as custom tanks. Our talented sales associates work directly with biological consultants to provide you with the ideal living conditions for your organisms.

flair_flare_medivac_1_a.label: Medivac Rescue Light
flair_flare_medivac_1_a.description: Manufacturer: RSI Utilizing multiple vibrant lights housed in a compact durable frame, the Rescue Light is capable at being seen from all directions in all kinds of hazardous atmospheric conditions, letting rescue teams know exactly where you are.

flair_glowstick_luminalia.label: Luminalia Light Stick
flair_glowstick_luminalia.description: Put the glow into "Glow Festival" with this festive Luminalia light stick. Turn it on and watch any room magically transform into a holiday wonderland.

flair_hanger_flag_uee_1.label: UEE Holographic Flag
flair_hanger_flag_uee_1.description: Show your empire pride with this large standing holographic UEE flag.

flair_headhunterrelic_citizencon_2023.label: Headhunter Head Lamp
flair_headhunterrelic_citizencon_2023.description: Light your way with this reproduction of the iconic Headhunter seal of authority. Crafted at the promotion of a new Chief, this lamp is constructed using four skulls, one provided by each of the Chief's four Counselors as a sign of their loyalty, and serves as a symbol of the Chief's new authority.

flair_hologram_selfie_standee_1_a.label: Pink Heart Hologram
flair_hologram_selfie_standee_1_a.description: Let your love proudly shine with this deployable hologram that displays a large, glowing pink heart. Makes an ideal backdrop for your next romantic evening or Coramor photoshoot.

flair_lamp_001.label: Lamp
flair_lamp_001.description: Get your own Lamp from the original 24 hour livestream!

flair_miningdrill.label: Retired Drill Head
flair_miningdrill.description: While this retired drill head may no longer be boring holes in asteroids, mounted on a secure frame, guests are sure to "dig" this conversation piece when displayed in your personal space.

flair_model_carrack_b.label: Carrack Model "2952 Best in Show"
flair_model_carrack_b.description: This highly detailed model celebrates the Carrack being named Best in Show at the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. Takuetsu worked with Anvil Aerospace to get the dimensions and details precisely right so this beloved exploration ship could find a home on shelves across the empire.

flair_model_carrack_toy_a_1h.label: Carrack Miniature
flair_model_carrack_toy_a_1h.description: Takuetsu has finally set their expert eye on the Carrack. Using schematics supplied by Anvil Aerospace, this intricately detailed miniature captures the look and spirit of the beloved exploration ship that's spawned countless adventures across the empire.

flair_model_carrack_toy_b_1h.label: Carrack Miniature "2952 Best in Show"
flair_model_carrack_toy_b_1h.description: This highly detailed miniature celebrates the Carrack being named Best in Show at the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. Takuetsu worked with Anvil Aerospace to get the dimensions and details precisely right so the handheld version of this beloved exploration ship can join you on adventures across the empire.

flair_model_caterpillar_bis_2019.label: Caterpillar Model "2949 Best in Show"
flair_model_caterpillar_bis_2019.description: This Caterpillar model celebrates the venerated hauler being voted Best in Show at the 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. Now your hangar can display this highly detailed scale replica of the popular mercantile vessel adorned with the 2949 IAE logo and accompanying pink accent line across the top of the ship.

flair_model_hullc_1_a.label: Hull C Model "Extended"
flair_model_hullc_1_a.description: Celebrate the workhorse of the hauling world with this finely detailed Hull C model. It's been expertly crafted by Takuetsu with help from MISC to make sure every last detail matches and honors the original. The "Extended" edition features the ship with its iconic spindles exposed and ready to receive cargo.

flair_model_hullc_1_b.label: Hull C Model "Collapsed"
flair_model_hullc_1_b.description: Celebrate the workhorse of the hauling world with this finely detailed Hull C model. It's been expertly crafted by Takuetsu with help from MISC to make sure every last detail matches and honors the original.

flair_model_hullc_2_takuetsu_box.label: Hull C Model Box
flair_model_hullc_2_takuetsu_box.description: A collector's edition box for Takuetsu's Hull C Model, featuring an image of the iconic ship on the front along with details about the model.

flair_model_hullc_toy_a_1h.label: Hull C Miniature
flair_model_hullc_toy_a_1h.description: Hold an iconic hauling ship in the palm of your hand with this Hull C miniature. Takuetsu carefully recreated the Hull C with exacting detail to honor what is believed to be the most common ship in the galaxy.

flair_multitoolbox_citizencon_2023.label: Pyrotechnic Amalgamated Toolbox
flair_multitoolbox_citizencon_2023.description: Proudly put your multi-tool on display with this toolbox reclaimed from the Pyro system that's not only withstood the star's dangerous flares but also the ravages of time.

flair_piano_phoenix.label: Hartwell Music Sentinel 88G
flair_piano_phoenix.description: The Sentinel 88G from Hartwell Music features a full 88-key digital piano in a molded grand piano frame. The 88G features fully responsive, real hammer weighted action on the keys with a variety of customizable sounds based on actual recordings of classic instruments creating a classical experience for the modern age.

flair_poster_001.label: Be A Hero Poster
flair_poster_001.description: Be a hero with this iconic poster, perfect for hanging on the wall of your hangar!

flair_poster_002.label: We Want You Poster
flair_poster_002.description: Hang this dynamic recruiting poster from the UEEN on your wall and show your support for the United Earth Empire Navy!

flair_poster_003.label: 350R Poster
flair_poster_003.description: Display your racing spirit by hanging this Origin Jumpworks 350r poster on your wall!s

flair_poster_004.label: Cutlass Poster
flair_poster_004.description: The flagship of the pirate community, the Drake Cutlass, and the iconic Vanduul raider, the Scythe, circle each other on a silent battlefield of tumbling rock.

flair_poster_005.label: Freelancer Poster
flair_poster_005.description: Got the itch to live a life of freedom among the stars? This MISC Freelancer poster will showcase your adventurous spirit!

flair_poster_006.label: Hornet Poster
flair_poster_006.description: The F7A Hornet is one of the most iconic space superiority fighters ever developed. Celebrate its heritage with this fantastic poster!

flair_poster_ht_bis_1_a.label: Vulture 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_1_a.description: Celebrate the Vulture, Drake Interplanetary's rugged wreck-ripper, making the final four of the 2953 Ship Showdown with this poster of the ship mid-flight.

flair_poster_ht_bis_1_b.label: Corsair 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_1_b.description: Congratulations to the Corsair for winning the 2953 Ship Showdown. This poster celebrates the victory of this iconic, asymmetrical Drake Interplanetary ship by capturing it mid-conflict with guns blazing.

flair_poster_ht_bis_1_c.label: Redeemer 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_1_c.description: A poster commemorating the Aegis Dynamics Redeemer blasting its way in the final four of the 2953 Ship Showdown. It captures the ship not just surviving, but thriving in its natural environment: the heat of battle.

flair_poster_ht_bis_1_d.label: 600i 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_1_d.description: Combining exquisite style and cutting-edge technology, it's easy to understand why Origin's 600i sailed into the final four of 2953's Ship Showdown. This poster celebrates the accomplishment with an image of the multi-role luxury liner soaring through the clouds.

flair_poster_ht_feb2023_1_a.label: Heartseeker Poster
flair_poster_ht_feb2023_1_a.description: A poster featuring the iconic image of a spacesuit clad pilot sitting amidst a heart that can be found on the F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker. Evoking the imagery and language of the historic holiday Valentine's Day, the image is intentionally faded to replicate the wear and tear it experiences on ships.

flair_poster_ht_feb2023_1_b.label: 2954 Red Festival Poster
flair_poster_ht_feb2023_1_b.description: Celebrate the Red Festival and 2954 being the year of the dog with this colorful poster. It features adorable dogs and stormwals set against a stylized red and blue background. It also honors the festival's historic ties to Earth with "Happy New Year" written in two languages that originated on Humanity's homeworld.

flair_poster_hullc_ht_static.label: Hull C Poster
flair_poster_hullc_ht_static.description: Honor an industrial workhorse with this unique and visually stunning poster of the MISC Hull C. Featuring the ship's silhouette set against a colorful swirling spacescape, the poster highlights the Hull C's iconic design by having its spindle extended.

flair_radegast_whiskey_concierge.label: Radegast Distillery 2947 Homeward Collection
flair_radegast_whiskey_concierge.description: With an unparalleled reputation for crafting phenomenal whiskeys of uncompromising quality for over four centuries, Radegast Distillery is proud to announce the 2947 release of its Homeward Limited-Edition Collection 40 SEY. Award-winning Master Distiller Hanshi Wilkes skillfully hand-blends the Martian spirit before it is re-barreled in Angeli casks and transported along a unique homeward flight path to maximize specific astronomical conditions which develop a peppery smoke-forward expression underpinned with charcoal, mace, ripe gooseberries, and citron notes. Once it has safely returned to Mars, the blend is aged for several more years to ensure it has the distinct smooth and mellow profile Radegast is known for. The result is a 40-year-old dram that embraces the adventurous flavor profiles of Angeli with the traditional personality of a Martian whiskey; a drink worthy of coming home for.

flair_sf54_coin.label: Stella Fortuna '54 Coin
flair_sf54_coin.description: With Stella Fortuna 2954 on one side and the other featuring a lucky clover embossed with the words ‘Tempt Fate,’ this golden coin dares anyone to take luck into their own hands.

flair_schematic_aegs_hammerhead.label: Aegis Hammerhead Schematic "Best in Show Finalist 2949"

flair_schematic_aegs_reclaimer.label: Aegis Reclaimer Schematic "Best in Show Finalist 2949"

flair_schematic_aegs_vanguard_hoplite.label: Aegis Vanguard Hoplite Schematic
flair_schematic_aegs_vanguard_hoplite.description: Thanks to Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series, you can examine the schematics for the Vanguard Hoplite to see what Aegis did to convert this deep space fighter into a dedicated boarding ship.

flair_schematic_aegs_vindicator.label: Aegis Sabre Schematic
flair_schematic_aegs_vindicator.description: PH Schematic: This schematic reveals the design Aegis used to allow the Sabre to be both a rapid responder and a deadly dogfighter.

flair_schematic_anvl_hurricane.label: Anvil Hurricane Schematic
flair_schematic_anvl_hurricane.description: See how Anvil engineers modernized the Hurricane’s classic design by Casse Aerospace with this official schematic generously donated by Anvil Aerospace, which is a part of Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series.

flair_schematic_anvl_terrapin.label: Anvil Terrapin Schematic
flair_schematic_anvl_terrapin.description: This schematic penetrates the layers of armor protecting the Terrapin to show what makes this scanning ship one tough nut to crack. This is thanks to Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series, which shares classic ship schematics from their extensive archive.

flair_schematic_argo_mpuv.label: Argo MPUV Schematic
flair_schematic_argo_mpuv.description: See what makes the Argo MPUV the classic, utilitarian cargo carrier found in every corner of the Empire; from civilian use to military service. All thanks to this detailed schematic from Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series.

flair_schematic_bis_2019_caterpillar.label: Caterpillar Schematics "2949 Best in Show"
flair_schematic_bis_2019_caterpillar.description: Explore every millimeter of Drake Interplanetary's massive Caterpillar with this schematic celebrating its victory as Best in Show at the 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo.

flair_schematic_bis_2019_cutlass.label: Cutlass Schematics "2949 Best in Show"
flair_schematic_bis_2019_cutlass.description: Dig into the details of Drake's distinct Cutlass design with this schematic, created in conjunction with the 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo to celebrate the ship being a Best in Show finalist.

flair_schematic_bis_2019_hammerhead.label: Hammerhead Schematics "2949 Best in Show"
flair_schematic_bis_2019_hammerhead.description: This schematic allows you to count every turret aboard the intimidating Aegis Hammerhead. It was released to commemorate the ship being a Best in Show finalist at the 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo.

flair_schematic_bis_2019_reclaimer.label: Reclaimer Schematics "2949 Best in Show"
flair_schematic_bis_2019_reclaimer.description: This schematics showcases the sheer size and scope of the Aegis Reclaimer. This beloved deep-space salvage ship was voted a Best in Show finalist at the 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo.

flair_schematic_drak_caterpillar.label: Drake Caterpillar Schematic
flair_schematic_drak_caterpillar.description: Try not to get lost in the detailed schematic for Drake’s massive cargo ship, the Caterpillar. These blueprints are a part of Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series, which shares classic ship schematics from their massive archive.

flair_schematic_drak_caterpillar_2.label: Drake Caterpillar Schematic "Best in Show Champion 2949"

flair_schematic_drak_cutlass.label: Drake Cutlass Schematic "Best in Show Finalist 2949"

flair_schematic_drak_dragonfly.label: Drake Dragonfly Schematic
flair_schematic_drak_dragonfly.description: Check out how Drake packed everything into the compact, open-canopy Dragonfly space bike with this schematic, which is the final entry into Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series.

flair_schematic_drak_herald.label: Drake Herald Schematic
flair_schematic_drak_herald.description: This schematic, faithfully restored and displayed as part of Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series, exposes the secrets that make the speedy Drake Herald an excellent data runner.

flair_schematic_misc_prospector.label: MISC Prospector Schematic
flair_schematic_misc_prospector.description: Dig behind the hull of the MISC Prospector, one of the UEE’s preeminent solo mining vessels, with this detailed schematic. Esperia’s “Masters of Design” official blueprint, faithfully reproduced from the original MISC archive, goes under the panels to show all the systems of this durable worker.

flair_schematic_misc_razor.label: Mirai Razor Schematic
flair_schematic_misc_razor.description: The schematic for this endurance racer shows off the distinctly Xi’an engines and thrusters used by the Mirai Razor. It’s a welcome addition to Esperia’s “Masters of Design” series, as the ship beautifully blends both Human and Xi’an technology.

flair_schematic_orig_85x.label: Origin 85X Schematic
flair_schematic_orig_85x.description: PH Schematic: Get to know every inch of the Origin 85X with the schematics for this agile and luxurious racer from Origin.

flair_schematic_rsi_polaris.label: RSI Polaris Schematic
flair_schematic_rsi_polaris.description: Next in the “Masters of Design” series from Esperia are schematics for RSI’s latest Corvette-class capital ship which has quickly become popular with both the military and militias for its aggressive torpedo loadout.

flair_sextant_1h.label: Celestial Sextant
flair_sextant_1h.description: High tech innovators microTech pay homage to the past with this sextant, an ancient Earth instrument used for celestial navigation. It was designed with modern materials that help stabilize the device and stop warping due to extreme weather conditions.

flair_sextant_luminalia_1h.label: Luminalia Sextant
flair_sextant_luminalia_1h.description: Set your sights on holiday cheer with this Luminalia sextant. This ancient Earth instrument used for celestial navigation was designed with modern materials that help stabilize the device and stop warping due to extreme weather conditions. Making it an eye-catching and ideal gift to give at any Luminalia celebration.

flair_space_mushroom.label: Pleurotus Cornusymphonia (Opera Mushroom) Plant
flair_space_mushroom.description: Created by a team of genetic researchers at the University of Rhetor, the opera mushroom is unique in the fungus genus for the various audible tones that it produces. The hollow central chamber of the cap acts as a reverberation chamber amplifying the sounds caused by it’s unique cell structure stretching and compressing as water moves through its mycelium.

flair_tephra_mine.label: Deactivated Tephra Mine
flair_tephra_mine.description: Aegis Dynamics decommissioned this former weapon of war and turned it into a work of art to celebrate 400 years of service for the UEE's most celebrated minelayer, the Nautilus. Now this Tephra homing mine from Firestorm Kinetics can be safely displayed in hangars across the UEE, allowing you to get up close and personal with this big, bold beast without being blown to bits.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2015.label: CitizenCon 2945 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2015.description: A commemorative trophy celebrating CitizenCon 2945. It features a simple yet stylish design that's mainly silver around a central black column displaying the logo and year.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2015_subscriber.label: CitizenCon 2945 Special Edition Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2015_subscriber.description: A commemorative trophy celebrating CitizenCon 2945. It features a simple yet stylish design that's mainly silver with gold fluting around a central black column displaying the logo and year.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2016.label: CitizenCon 2946 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2016.description: Memorialize the 2946 CitizenCon with this distinct and angular trophy. Constructed with three panels, the front one displays the event's logo and year and is framed by two black and silver panels.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2016_subscriber.label: CitizenCon 2946 Special Edition Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2016_subscriber.description: Memorialize the 2946 CitizenCon with a special edition of this distinct and angular trophy. Constructed with three panels, the gold front panel displays the event's logo and year and is framed by two black panels.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2017.label: CitizenCon 2947 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2017.description: Brag about attending CitizenCon 2947 with this commemorative trophy. Rounded edges and a slanted top create a distinct design that showcases the logo in teal on top and the event name and year on the right side.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2018.label: CitizenCon 2948 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2018.description: The trophy for CitizenCon 2948 melds the physical and digital. A curvy red and grey base projects a hologram of the event's logo above it.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2018_a.label: CitizenCon 2948 Special Edition Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2018_a.description: Citizencon 2948's trophy melds the physical and digital with a curvy red and grey base projects a rotating hologram of the event's logo above it.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2019.label: CitizenCon 2949 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2019.description: A commemorative trophy celebrating CitizenCon 2949. It features a holographic projection of the logo and the event's name and year engraved into its metal base.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2021.label: CitizenCon 2951 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2021.description: Commemorate CitizenCon 2951 with this unique trophy. A gold and silver metallic casing holds a piece of green marble with the year and CitizenCon logo intricately etched into it.

flair_trophy_citizencon_2023.label: CitizenCon 2953 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon_2023.description: Commemorate CitizenCon 2953 with a trip to the dark side with this unique trophy fashioned from debris extracted from the dangerous Pyro system.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2943.label: Gamescom 2943 Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2943.description: The Gamescom 2943 trophy features a silver central column enwrapped by bands of gold. Atop is a hologram of the Star Citizen logo with the year carved into a gold band above the base.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2944.label: Gamescom 2944 Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2944.description: A gold and silver trophy commemorating Gamescom. The Star Citizen logo is engraved near the top and the year at the bottom.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2945.label: Gamescom 2945 Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2945.description: A silver and black trophy celebrating Gamescom. Its unique design features a teal dividing line between its two sides, with the Star Citizen logo engraved on the front of the base and flanked on each side by the year.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2945_pg.label: Gamescom 2945 Special Edition Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2945_pg.description: A special edition silver and black trophy celebrating Gamescom. Its unique design features a teal dividing line between its two sides, with the Star Citizen logo engraved on the front of the base and flanked on each side by the year.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2946.label: Gamescom 2946 Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2946.description: A silver trophy celebrating Gamescom with a solid central column flanked by fluting. Etched into the central column is the Star Citizen logo and year.

flair_trophy_gamescom_2946_pg.label: Gamescom 2946 Special Edition Trophy
flair_trophy_gamescom_2946_pg.description: A special edition silver trophy celebrating Gamescom with a solid central column flanked by fluting. Etched into the central column is the Star Citizen logo and year.

flair_trophy_zeus.label: Zeus Trophy
flair_trophy_zeus.description: Commemorate the legendary flight of the RSI Zeus with this superbly detailed scale model. A must-have for any serious collection.

flair_workbench.label: Workbench
flair_workbench.description: This workbench is the standard across UEE space. Get yours today and never borrow your neighbor's tools again!

flair_xian_stone_1.label: Hui’a Puzzle
flair_xian_stone_1.description: Half toy and half meditation device, this small trinket showcases the Xi’an’s mastery of gravity and is meant to inspire the user to contemplate the forces that bind us together.

flair_banu_tholo_1_a.label: Tholo (Translated)
flair_banu_tholo_1_a.description: A small three-sided token representative of Cassa, the Banu patron of luck. Spinning the tholo reveals an answer meant to help guide the user during decision-making. This particular tholo has been translated into common.

flair_banu_tholo_1_b.label: Tholo
flair_banu_tholo_1_b.description: A small three-sided token representative of Cassa, the Banu patron of luck. Spinning the tholo reveals an answer meant to help guide the user during decision-making.

flair_biscuit_jar_1_a.label: Luminalia Cookie Jar
flair_biscuit_jar_1_a.description: The perfect place to stash all your favorite holiday treats, this cookie jar features Luminalia greetings along with red and green trim.

flair_dice_1_a.label: Six-Sided Rotating Die White
flair_dice_1_a.description: This white six-sided die houses a green rotating core that features the numbers one through six. When rolled along a surface, a random number will display on the upper face of the die as the rotating core comes to rest.

flair_dice_1_b.label: Six-Sided Rotating Die Red
flair_dice_1_b.description: This red six-sided die houses a rotating core that features the numbers one through six. When rolled along a surface, a random number will display on the upper face of the die as the rotating core comes to rest.

flair_dice_1_c.label: Six-Sided Rotating Die Orange
flair_dice_1_c.description: This orange six-sided die houses a rotating core that features the numbers one through six. When rolled along a surface, a random number will display on the upper face of the die as the rotating core comes to rest.

flair_dice_1_chance_a.label: Chance Cube
flair_dice_1_chance_a.description: This six-sided die houses a rotating sphere covered in blue and red lights. When rolled, one of the two colors will display on the upper face of the die, helping the user to make binary decisions.

flair_dice_1_d20_a.label: Twenty-Sided Plushie Red
flair_dice_1_d20_a.description: Ready to roll? Make your randomly generated numbers a little more squeezable with this plush icosahedron. Each surface of the large red die features a different easy-to-read number.

flair_dice_1_d20_b.label: Twenty-Sided Plushie Green
flair_dice_1_d20_b.description: Ready to roll? Make your randomly generated numbers a little more squeezable with this plush icosahedron. Each surface of the large green die features a different easy-to-read number.

flair_dice_1_d20_c.label: Twenty-Sided Plushie Blue
flair_dice_1_d20_c.description: Ready to roll? Make your randomly generated numbers a little more squeezable with this plush icosahedron. Each surface of the large blue die features a different easy-to-read number.

flair_dice_2_a.label: Twenty-Sided Die Red
flair_dice_2_a.description: When rolled along a surface, this red twenty-sided die will display a numerical result on the upper face as it comes to rest.

flair_dice_2_b.label: Twenty-Sided Die Green
flair_dice_2_b.description: When rolled along a surface, this green twenty-sided die will display a numerical result on the upper face as it comes to rest.

flair_dice_2_c.label: Twenty-Sided Die Blue
flair_dice_2_c.description: When rolled along a surface, this blue twenty-sided die will display a numerical result on the upper face as it comes to rest.

flair_medal_200m_1_a.label: One Empire 200th Anniversary Coin
flair_medal_200m_1_a.description: A coin commemorating the 200th anniversary for One Empire, a community-based government initiative.

flair_mug_frontier_ornate_1_a.label: Ornate Drinking Gourd
flair_mug_frontier_ornate_1_a.description: Made from a calabash gourd, this spherical drinking vessel fits warmly in the hand and features intricate metal latticework detailing.

flair_mug_frontier_stoneware_1_a.label: Handmade Glazed Mug
flair_mug_frontier_stoneware_1_a.description: This slab-built pottery mug with ridged detailing was crafted by hand and finished with a speckled glaze.

flair_mug_luminalia_1_a.label: Luminalia Mug
flair_mug_luminalia_1_a.description: Ready to spread some Luminalia "cheers?" Cozy up with this festive red and white patterned mug decorated with Banu messages of celebration and understanding.

flair_plant_pot_1_a.label: Hello Sunshine Cheeky Planter
flair_plant_pot_1_a.description: Bring a little life to your decor with the Hello Sunshine Planter from Sakura Sun. Available in a number of colors and unique facial expressions, this charming ceramic container makes for a cheerful place for your plant to call home.

flair_plant_pot_1_b.label: Hello Sunshine Happy Planter
flair_plant_pot_1_b.description: Bring a little life to your decor with the Hello Sunshine Planter from Sakura Sun. Available in a number of colors and unique facial expressions, this charming ceramic container makes for a cheerful place for your plant to call home.

flair_plant_pot_1_c.label: Hello Sunshine Surprised Planter
flair_plant_pot_1_c.description: Bring a little life to your decor with the Hello Sunshine Planter from Sakura Sun. Available in a number of colors and unique facial expressions, this charming ceramic container makes for a cheerful place for your plant to call home.

flair_plushy_corsair_1_a.label: Corsair Plushie
flair_plushy_corsair_1_a.description: This soft plushie is modeled after the Drake Interplanetary Corsair, a versatile explorer able to go wherever the winds of adventure steer you.

flair_poster_dov_1_a.label: Blood Bank Poster
flair_poster_dov_1_a.description: A poster for the cult classic horror vid “Blood Bank” that tells the story of a heist that goes very, very wrong.

flair_poster_dov_1_b.label: Hill Horror Reborn Poster
flair_poster_dov_1_b.description: A poster for the horror sequel vid “The Hill Horror Reborn” that tells the continuing story of rampaging masked killer Neville Lott.

flair_poster_dov_1_c.label: Parasite Special Edition Poster
flair_poster_dov_1_c.description: A poster for the special edition re-release of the body horror classic vid “Parasite” that tells the story of an alien life-form who takes over the bodies of Human hosts.

flair_poster_ht_bis_3_a.label: Polaris 2955 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_3_a.description: Congratulations to the Polaris for winning the 2955 Ship Showdown. This poster celebrates the beloved corvette-class capital ship that sports devastating firepower and a hangar that can fit a light fighter.

flair_poster_ht_bis_3_b.label: Asgard 2955 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_3_b.description: Featuring a massive ramp designed to accommodate large ground vehicles and the rapid deployment of troops and supplies, it's no surprise the Anvil Asgard found itself in the final four of the 2955 Ship Showdown. This poster honors the accomplishment with an image of the ship streaking across colorful, cloud-filled sky.

flair_poster_ht_bis_3_c.label: Zeus 2955 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_3_c.description: The legacy of the first commercially available ship only continues to grow. This poster celebrates the Zeus' selection as one of the final four ships in the 2955 Ship Showdown.

flair_poster_ht_bis_3_d.label: Gladiator 2955 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_3_d.description: A poster commemorating the Gladiator making the final four of the 2955 Ship Showdown. A stalwart of fighter squadrons, this versatile ship walks the line between fighter and bomber.

flair_toy_volleyball_1_a_2h.label: Picoball
flair_toy_volleyball_1_a_2h.description: An athletic ball modified to resemble the famous microTech mascot Pico the Penguin.

flair_vivid_display.label: viVid Display
flair_vivid_display.description: From microTech, the makers of mobiGlas and VI Specs, comes the latest generation multi-viewer, the viVid display, featuring full spectrum color-bleed and first-in-class holo-optics to bring a wide array of visuals to vivid life.

food_carafi_plain.label: Carafi Cube
food_carafi_plain.description: NDR: 10 Effects: Hypermetabolic A flavorless nutrient jelly with a firm, slippery texture.

food_grub_seanut_1_lemon.label: Fried Seanut with Sauce
food_grub_seanut_1_lemon.description: NDR: 15 Effects: Dehydrating Easy to grow and care for, these tubular sea creatures have become a popular food in the outer reaches of systems. This seanut has been fried and topped with a vinegar-based sauce for a salty, roasted and tangy taste.

food_grub_seanut_1_live.label: Seanut
food_grub_seanut_1_live.description: NDR: 17 HEI: 07 Effects: None Easy to grow and care for, these tubular sea creatures have become a popular food in the outer reaches of systems. When eaten raw, seanuts have a chewy and crisp texture with a bright briny and nutty flavor.

food_grub_seanut_1_plain.label: Fried Seanut
food_grub_seanut_1_plain.description: NDR: 15 Effects: Dehydrating Easy to grow and care for, these tubular sea creatures have become a popular food in the outer reaches of systems. This seanut has been fried and has a salty, roasted flavor.

food_sachet_carafi.label: Carafi Packet
food_sachet_carafi.description: NDR: 10 Effects: Hypermetabolic A package containing small pieces of carafi, a flavorless nutrient jelly.

food_sachet_grub_seanut_2_a.label: Nomo Grub Packet
food_sachet_grub_seanut_2_a.description: NDR: 15 Effects: Energizing, Hypermetabolic A package of dried, protein rich nomo grubs that have a savory and slightly bitter taste.

food_skewered_mystery_meat_1_a.label: Meat Skewer
food_skewered_mystery_meat_1_a.description: NDR: 20 Effects: Immune Suppressing Chunks of what is most definitely meat that have been skewered and roasted.

food_skewered_rat_1_a.label: Aloprat Skewer
food_skewered_rat_1_a.description: NDR: 25 Effects: Immune Suppressing Aloprat is a hearty species of rodent found across Human occupied space, and even can survive aboard space stations and ships eating a variety of food and scraps. This aloprat has been skewered and roasted rotisserie style for crisp skin and gamey, fatty meat.

food_bar_busters_01_a.label: Buster's Chocolate Bar
food_bar_busters_01_a.description: NDR: 10 Effects: Energizing, Hyper-Metabolic Smooth sesame paste, salty roasted nuts, and a rich chocolate coating all combine to make Buster's, the classic treat that the Empire has loved for over two hundred years. Buster's or Bust!

food_bar_com_01_a.label: Cal-O-Meal "Chocolate Deluxe" Protein Bar
food_bar_com_01_a.description: NDR: 20 Effects: Hypertrophic Cal-O-Meal bars are loaded with high quality protein and packed with a concentrated dose of vitamins, minerals, and rich chocolate flavor, making it a convenient way to maintain nutrition and lean muscle mass on the go.

food_bar_com_01_lunes_a.label: Cal-O-Meal "Lunes" Protein Bar
food_bar_com_01_lunes_a.description: NDR: 20 Effects: Hypertrophic Cal-O-Meal bars are loaded with high quality protein and packed with a concentrated dose of vitamins, minerals, and rich Lunes fruit-flavor, making it a convenient way to maintain nutrition and lean muscle mass on the go.

food_bar_com_01_vanilla_a.label: Cal-O-Meal "Vanilla" Protein Bar
food_bar_com_01_vanilla_a.description: NDR: 20 Effects: Hypertrophic Cal-O-Meal bars are loaded with high quality protein and packed with a concentrated dose of vitamins, minerals, and rich vanilla flavor, making it a convenient way to maintain nutrition and lean muscle mass on the go.

food_bar_karoby_01_a.label: Karoby Energy Bar (Tahini & Carob)
food_bar_karoby_01_a.description: NDR: 18 Effects: Energizing Made with nutritious, wholesome ingredients, this great tasting bar is formulated to provide sustained energy to help you maintain your best performance.

food_bar_karoby_01_cranberry_a.label: Karoby Energy Bar (Cranberry, Green Tea & Carob)
food_bar_karoby_01_cranberry_a.description: NDR: 18 Effects: Energizing Made with nutritious, wholesome ingredients, this great tasting bar is formulated to provide sustained energy to help you maintain your best performance.

food_bar_onemeal_01_a.label: OneMeal Nutrition Bar (Roast Chicken)
food_bar_onemeal_01_a.description: NDR: 21 Effects: Hypo-Metabolic OneMeal optimal nutrition bars are a scientifically balanced and complete meal replacement that's "ready when you are."

food_bar_onemeal_01_salmon_a.label: OneMeal Nutrition Bar (Spicy Salmon)
food_bar_onemeal_01_salmon_a.description: NDR: 21 Effects: Hypo-Metabolic OneMeal optimal nutrition bars are a scientifically balanced and complete meal replacement that's "ready when you are."

food_bar_onemeal_01_steak_a.label: OneMeal Nutrition Bar (Grilled Steak)
food_bar_onemeal_01_steak_a.description: NDR: 21 Effects: Hypo-Metabolic OneMeal optimal nutrition bars are a scientifically balanced and complete meal replacement that's "ready when you are."

food_bar_onemeal_01_tofu_a.label: OneMeal Nutrition Bar (Fried Tofu)
food_bar_onemeal_01_tofu_a.description: NDR: 21 Effects: Hypo-Metabolic OneMeal optimal nutrition bars are a scientifically balanced and complete meal replacement that's "ready when you are."

food_bar_snaggle_01_a.label: Snaggle Stick (Original)
food_bar_snaggle_01_a.description: NDR: 14 Effects: Hypertrophic, Dehydrating Snag one of these premium protein sticks and experience the ultimate in "real meat" snacking. Original Snaggle sticks feature a classic blend of smoke and spices for a pure boost of flavor energy.

fortune_paint_2955redfestival_red_gold_p.label: Fortune 2955 Auspicious Red Pig Livery
fortune_paint_2955redfestival_red_gold_p.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Pig livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a pig.

fortune_paint_2955redfestival_red_gold_s.label: Fortune 2955 Auspicious Red Snake Livery
fortune_paint_2955redfestival_red_gold_s.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Snake livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a snake.

fortune_paint_black_orange.label: Fortune Sunspot Livery
fortune_paint_black_orange.description: The deep contrast of the warm orange against the cold black of the Sunspot livery highlights the distinctive profile of the Fortune.

fortune_paint_black_tan.label: Fortune Reserve Livery
fortune_paint_black_tan.description: A subtle tan accent cuts through an otherwise all black appearance in the Fortune Reserve livery.

fortune_paint_black_white.label: Fortune Iceberg Livery
fortune_paint_black_white.description: Black and white paints juxtapose each other across the Iceberg livery, with a sleek blue finish around the Fortune's more shapely areas.

fortune_paint_blue_gray.label: Fortune Hightide Livery
fortune_paint_blue_gray.description: Oceanic blues drench the Hightide livery, with strong blacks and greys deepening the Fortune's impact further.

fortune_paint_copper_black.label: Fortune Windfall Livery
fortune_paint_copper_black.description: Make a lasting impression while sailing the stars in your Fortune with the Windfall livery's stunning copper finish.

fortune_paint_green_copper.label: Fortune Highlander Livery
fortune_paint_green_copper.description: A deep, earthen green dominates the Fortune Highlander livery, accompanied by a unique copper tinted cockpit.

fortune_paint_scavengers_black_black_bla.label: Fortune Outcast Livery (Modified)
fortune_paint_scavengers_black_black_bla.description: This version of the livery has been modified from its original form with the addition of graffiti. Embrace chaos with the Outcast livery. It features rough splashes of neon green against black to give the Fortune an aggressively chaotic appearance.

fortune_paint_yellow_white.label: Fortune Luminance Livery
fortune_paint_yellow_white.description: The cool white of the Fortune Luminance livery are offset by metallic greys and bright dashes of yellow.

fortune_paint_pink_grey_black_iridescent.label: Fortune Lovestruck Livery
fortune_paint_pink_grey_black_iridescent.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a iridescent pink and black look for your Fortune.

freelancer_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Freelancer Black Livery
freelancer_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Customize your Freelancer with this black chrome livery.

freelancer_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Freelancer Woodland Livery
freelancer_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Freelancer with this fragmented light green livery.

freelancer_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Freelancer Storm Surge Livery
freelancer_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Freelancer with this fragmented blue livery.

freelancer_paint_2951redfestival_red_gol.label: Freelancer 2951 Auspicious Red Ram Livery
freelancer_paint_2951redfestival_red_gol.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the 2951 Auspicious Red Ram livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complimented by gold accents and a silhouette of a ram's head.

freelancer_paint_black_red.label: Freelancer Whammer's Livery
freelancer_paint_black_red.description: Cravin' a special look for your Freelancer? Then equip this Whammer's branded black and red paint scheme and have yourself a good time.

freelancer_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Freelancer ArcCorp Livery
freelancer_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Freelancer features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

freelancer_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Freelancer Crusader Livery
freelancer_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Freelancer features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

freelancer_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Freelancer Hurston Livery
freelancer_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Freelancer features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

freelancer_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Freelancer microTech Livery
freelancer_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Freelancer features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

freelancer_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Freelancer Deck the Hull Livery
freelancer_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

freelancer_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Freelancer IceBreak Livery
freelancer_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Freelancer with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

freelancer_paint_orange_brown.label: Freelancer Big Benny's Livery
freelancer_paint_orange_brown.description: Let Big Benny spice up the look of your Freelancer with this orange and brown livery featuring the famous smiling bowl of kacho and Benny's motto "Grab Eat!"

freelancer_paint_pink_blue.label: Freelancer Star Kitten Livery
freelancer_paint_pink_blue.description: Bring joy and a pastel palette to the Freelancer with the Star Kitten livery, which features bright pink and pale blue alongside images of the famous cartoon space cat Sally.

freelancer_paint_unity.label: Freelancer Foundation Fest Livery
freelancer_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

freelancer_paint_white_red.label: Freelancer Ellroy's Livery
freelancer_paint_white_red.description: Ready to give your Freelancer a jolt of energy? The iconic, coffee serving mascot pops on the Ellroy's livery, which is primarily crisp white with red and black highlights.

furylx_paint_black_black_black.label: Fury Black Star Livery
furylx_paint_black_black_black.description: The Black Star livery gives the Fury a classic black finish with bold brand decals in silver.

furylx_paint_red_white_white.label: Fury Sunrise Livery
furylx_paint_red_white_white.description: Primarily white with red accents streaking across the ship, the design of the Sunrise livery gives the Fury an exciting, aerodynamic look.

furylx_paint_white_blue_grey.label: Fury Cloudburst Livery
furylx_paint_white_blue_grey.description: Go with the flow in your Fury with the Cloudburst livery, which blends blue and light grey for a distinct finish evoking the harmony between water and sky.

fury_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.label: Fury Fortuna Livery
fury_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

fury_paint_blue_black_black.label: Fury Waverider Livery
fury_paint_blue_black_black.description: The Waverider livery gives the Fury a distinct blue finish with black highlights.

fury_paint_brown_black_brown_camo.label: Fury Wasteland Camo Livery
fury_paint_brown_black_brown_camo.description: Outfit the Fury in tan camo with the Wasteland Camo livery.

fury_paint_green_green_red.label: Fury Leatherback Livery
fury_paint_green_green_red.description: Primarily green with red highlights, the Leatherback livery delivers style along with the intimidating payload of the Fury.

fury_paint_grey_black_gold.label: Fury Nightwatch Livery
fury_paint_grey_black_gold.description: Embrace the darkness of space with the Nightwatch livery for the Fury, which is grey and black with subtle gold highlights.

fury_paint_racing_red_blue_blue.label: Fury Racing Livery
fury_paint_racing_red_blue_blue.description: Pull away from the pack with this daring Racing livery for the Fury. Combining coral reds with an undercurrent of teal, you're guaranteed to grab the attention of those you overtake when racing in these bold colors.

fury_paint_red_black_black.label: Fury Tengu Livery
fury_paint_red_black_black.description: Announce the presence of the Fury with the Tengu livery, featuring a bold red look with black highlights.

fury_paint_white_white_red.label: Fury Templar Livery
fury_paint_white_white_red.description: Mirai made the Templar livery a stark white with red and black highlights to give the Fury a look that would be at home among the clouds.

fuse_standard.label: Fuse
fuse_standard.description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.

gats_ballisticcannon_s1.label: Tarantula GT-870 Mark 1 Cannon
gats_ballisticcannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 1 Fed by Gallenson Tactical’s patented SpinGlide drum ammunition system, the Tarantula GT-870 Mk1 can smoothly and accurately deliver a consistent stream of ballistic shells. Though it only has a moderate rate of fire, its trustworthy durability makes it a dependable addition to any fight.

gats_ballisticcannon_s2.label: Tarantula GT-870 Mark 2 Cannon
gats_ballisticcannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 2 Fed by Gallenson Tactical’s patented SpinGlide drum ammunition system, the Tarantula GT-870 Mk2 can smoothly and accurately deliver a consistent stream of ballistic shells. Though it only has a moderate rate of fire, its trustworthy durability makes it a dependable addition to any fight.

gats_ballisticcannon_s3.label: Tarantula GT-870 Mark 3 Cannon
gats_ballisticcannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 3 Fed by Gallenson Tactical’s patented SpinGlide drum ammunition system, the Tarantula GT-870 Mk3 can smoothly and accurately deliver a consistent stream of ballistic shells. Though it only has a moderate rate of fire, its trustworthy durability makes it a dependable addition to any fight.

gats_ballisticgatling_s1.label: YellowJacket GT-210 Gatling
gats_ballisticgatling_s1.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 1 While the GT-210 YellowJacket may be small, it packs a mighty sting. This high-speed ballistic weapon is perfect for targeting smaller, more mobile targets and its DTX-8 ammo supply system almost completely eliminates weapon jams due to bad rounds.

gats_ballisticgatling_s2.label: Scorpion GT-215 Gatling
gats_ballisticgatling_s2.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 2 The Scorpion GT-215 is a hydraulically-driven Gatling-type rotary cannon designed to deliver smaller rounds at a very high rate of fire. The Scorpion is designed to shred armor on very fast targets, sacrificing power for absolute saturation of the target area.

gats_ballisticgatling_s3.label: Mantis GT-220 Gatling
gats_ballisticgatling_s3.description: Manufacturer: Gallenson Tactical Systems Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 3 The Mantis GT-220 is a hydraulically-driven Gatling-type rotary cannon designed to deliver smaller rounds at a very high rate of fire. The Mantis is designed to shred armor on very fast targets, sacrificing power for absolute saturation of the target area.

glsn_ballisticgatling_s4.label: Breakneck S4 Gatling
glsn_ballisticgatling_s4.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 4 While the exact origins and designer are unknown, the Breakneck is built off an existing ballistic gatling then modified to cause more mayhem. When the Breakneck starts shooting, the fun begins.

glsn_laserrepeater_s3.label: Tormenter S3 Repeater
glsn_laserrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 3 Scorch and torch those who dare get in your way with the Tormenter. Overhauled from an existing laser repeater, the Tormenter can somehow unleash an absolute firestorm without melting the weapon's barrel.

gmisl_s01_cs_fski_spark.label: Spark I-G Missile
gmisl_s01_cs_fski_spark.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 1 Those that believe size doesn’t matter would do well to stay clear of the Firestorm Kinetics Spark. Using cross section targeting, this lightweight proximity missile packs a considerable punch. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s01_em_behr_pioneer.label: Pioneer I-G Missile
gmisl_s01_em_behr_pioneer.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 1 Behring prides itself on dependability and the Pioneer is no exception. The updated Oracle EM tracking system has proven itself time and again in numerous consumer-testing reports against similarly classed proximity missiles. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s01_em_thcn_taskforce.label: TaskForce I-G Missile
gmisl_s01_em_thcn_taskforce.description: Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 1 Venturing into the weapons market, Thermyte Concern have pooled their extensive knowledge of demolition explosives to create the TaskForce. A lightweight EM tracking strike missile with a top-in-class propulsion system provides an efficient mixture of speed and firepower to establish battlefield dominance. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s01_ir_behr_marksman.label: Marksman I-G Missile
gmisl_s01_ir_behr_marksman.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 1 Behring's Marksman series of proximity missiles has earned as much of a reputation for its ability to track a wide range of heat signatures as it has for its area-effect proximity damage. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s02_cs_fski_tempest.label: Tempest II-G Missile
gmisl_s02_cs_fski_tempest.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 2 The Tempest was designed with nothing but annihilation in mind. Utilizing FireStorm Kinetics' targeting technology, this proximity missile locks onto a target's cross section to draw conflicts to a swift conclusion. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s02_cs_thcn_strikeforce.label: StrikeForce II-G Missile
gmisl_s02_cs_thcn_strikeforce.description: Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 2 The StrikeForce is the latest culmination of Thermyte Concern's expansion into the missile industry, showcasing notable design and cross-section targeting improvements. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s02_em_taln_dominator.label: Dominator II-G Missile
gmisl_s02_em_taln_dominator.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 2 Designed to track an opponent’s electromagnetic signature, the Dominator strike missile is a precision ordnance package designed to establish tactical battlefield dominance. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s02_ir_fski_ignite.label: Ignite II-G Missile
gmisl_s02_ir_fski_ignite.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 2 The Ignite is Firestorm's premier brand of heat-seeking strike missile that is the definition of Fire and Forget. Simply let it fly and enjoy the show. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s03_cs_fski_arrester.label: Arrester III-G Missile
gmisl_s03_cs_fski_arrester.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 3 Using cross section targeting to hunt for its prey, the Firestorm Arrester proximity missile makes quick work of enemies caught in the crosshairs. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s03_em_fski_thunderbolt.label: Thunderbolt III-G Missile
gmisl_s03_em_fski_thunderbolt.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 3 Thanks to the Firestorm Thunderbolt's agile frame and EM targeting system, this proximity missile is a solid choice for a wide variety of combat scenarios. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s03_ir_novp_viper.label: Viper III-G Missile
gmisl_s03_ir_novp_viper.description: Manufacturer: Nova Pyrotechnica Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 3 Nova has worked hard to insure that their infrared tracking Viper strike missile lives up to its name by delivering agile and lethal attacks against hostile targets. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s04_cs_taln_assailant.label: Assailant IV-G Missile
gmisl_s04_cs_taln_assailant.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 4 The Assailant missile from Talon is a perfect weapon solution for precision strikes against motivated opponents. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s04_ir_behr_pathfinder.label: Pathfinder IV-G Missile
gmisl_s04_ir_behr_pathfinder.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 4 The Pathfinder proximity missile has been a consistent member of Behring's already robust arsenal thanks to its tried and tested propulsion system and heat seeking guidance array. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s05_cs_taln_stalker.label: Stalker V-G Missile
gmisl_s05_cs_taln_stalker.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 5 With dedicated cross section tracking, the Talon Stalker has endured over the years as a precision strike torpedo with maximum stopping power. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s05_em_taln_reaper.label: Reaper V-G Missile
gmisl_s05_em_taln_reaper.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 5 The Reaper strike torpedo features a favorable destructive yield-to-expense ratio and a proven Talon EM tracking suite. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s05_em_taln_scimitar.label: Scimitar V-G Missile
gmisl_s05_em_taln_scimitar.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 5 The Scimitar missile tracks targets via their EM signature to deliver a devastating size five payload. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s05_ir_taln_valkyrie.label: Valkyrie V-G Missile
gmisl_s05_ir_taln_valkyrie.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 5 Talon's torpedo design team pulled out all the stops for their latest Valkyrie strike torpedo by creating a multitiered thrust solution with state of the art infrared tracking capabilities. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s07_ir_taln_hellion.label: Hellion VII-G Missile
gmisl_s07_ir_taln_hellion.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 7 Carrying a sizable payload and an advanced heat-seeking sensor suite, the Hellion missile from Talon can be effective against aggressors of all sizes. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s09_cs_taln_argos.label: Argos IX-G Torpedo
gmisl_s09_cs_taln_argos.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 9 The Talon Argos strike torpedo features a classic, straightforward design that relies on exacting manufacturing standards and a classic cross section targeting system. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s09_em_taln_seeker.label: Seeker IX-G Torpedo
gmisl_s09_em_taln_seeker.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 9 Talon's Seeker torpedo is a precision, EM-targeting torpedo capable of delivering a massive payload quickly and accurately. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmisl_s09_ir_taln_typhoon.label: Typhoon IX-G Torpedo
gmisl_s09_ir_taln_typhoon.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 9 Designed by Talon, the Typhoon heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions. Note: This missile may only be launched by ground vehicles.

gmni_rifle_ballistic_01.label: S71 Rifle
gmni_rifle_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm / 900 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) With the S71, Gemini designed an ergonomic assault rifle ideal for mid-range engagements. Chambered with a smaller caliber round than other weapons in its class, the S71 has become popular among private military professionals for its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy.

gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_collector01.label: S71 "Hemlock Camo" Rifle
gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_collector01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm / 900 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) With the S71, Gemini designed an ergonomic assault rifle ideal for mid-range engagements. Chambered with a smaller caliber round than other weapons in its class, the S71 has become popular among private military professionals for its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy. The Hemlock edition features a green camo pattern.

gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_grey_red01.label: S71 "Justified" Rifle
gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_grey_red01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm / 900 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) With the S71, Gemini designed an ergonomic assault rifle ideal for mid-range engagements. Chambered with a smaller caliber round than other weapons in its class, the S71 has become popular among private military professionals for its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy. The "Justified" edition features a cool grey and bright red highlights.

gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_yellow_blue01.label: S71 "Murray Cup Racing" Rifle
gmni_rifle_ballistic_01_yellow_blue01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm / 900 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) With the S71, Gemini designed an ergonomic assault rifle ideal for mid-range engagements. Chambered with a smaller caliber round than other weapons in its class, the S71 has become popular among private military professionals for its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy. Bold neon yellow and vivid blue combine to make the official Murray Cup Racing rifle stand out from the crowd.

gmni_smg_ballistic_01.label: C54 SMG
gmni_smg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 50 Rate Of Fire: 1,100 rpm Effective Range: 35m Attachments: Barrel (S1), Optics (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Easy to handle and a beauty to behold with its purple accented styling, the C54 is a sleek and precisely balanced SMG from Gemini. Its lightweight polymer frame and ergonomic design makes it ideal for close quarter engagements. The C54 is capable of firing 10mm rounds on full auto to provide maximum support and target saturation to ensure that any engagement ends quick.

gmni_smg_ballistic_01_grey_red01.label: C54 "Justified" SMG
gmni_smg_ballistic_01_grey_red01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 50 Rate Of Fire: 1,100 rpm Effective Range: 35m Attachments: Barrel (S1), Optics (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Easy to handle and a beauty to behold with its purple accented styling, the C54 is a sleek and precisely balanced SMG from Gemini. Its lightweight polymer frame and ergonomic design makes it ideal for close quarter engagements. The C54 is capable of firing 10mm rounds on full auto to provide maximum support and target saturation to ensure that any engagement ends quick. The "Justified" edition features a cool grey and bright red highlights.

gmni_smg_ballistic_01_mag.label: C54 SMG Magazine (50 cap)
gmni_smg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 50 This magazine for the C54 SMG holds fifty 10mm rounds.

gmnt_misc_s03_pl01.label: Reliant Gilroy Gimbal
gmnt_misc_s03_pl01.description: Item Type: Weapon Mount (Reliant Exclusive) Manufacturer: MISC Size: 4 MISC built the Gilroy as a custom wing mounted gimbal for use exclusively with the Reliant. Standard on the Tana, it allows a S4 weapon better movement when tracking targets.

grin_roc_mining_turret.label: ROC Mining Arm
grin_roc_mining_turret.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial With a wide range of motion and smooth movement, this highly precise mining arm was designed by Greycat Industrial to allow the operator full gimbaled control of the mining laser head when deployed.

grin_tractorbeam_002_shared.label: SureGrip S1 Tractor Beam
grin_tractorbeam_002_shared.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m Backed by their certified Soft-Touch® guarantee, Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam is a mainstay of its product catalogue thanks to its dependable range and control.

grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_cargo.label: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m Backed by their certified Soft-Touch® guarantee, Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam is a mainstay of its product catalogue thanks to its dependable range and control. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo. Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m Backed by their certified Soft-Touch® guarantee, Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam is a mainstay of its product catalogue thanks to its dependable range and control. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.
grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m Backed by their certified Soft-Touch® guarantee, Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam is a mainstay of its product catalogue thanks to its dependable range and control. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.

grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut1.label: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 130 m Full Strength Distance: 55 m This heavy-duty variant of Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam sacrifices range in exchange for additional power to handle larger and heavier objects making it an essential tool in a variety of industrial applications.
