grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut1_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 130 m Full Strength Distance: 55 m This heavy-duty variant of Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam sacrifices range in exchange for additional power to handle larger and heavier objects making it an essential tool in a variety of industrial applications. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.

grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut2.label: Grin Tractor Beam 002 Shared Ut2
grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut2.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Max Angle: 80° Max Range: 130 m Full Strength Distance: 55 m This precision variant of Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam sacrifices some of the power and range of the base model in exchange for a wider angle of manipulation and greater tether grip, allowing for careful handling of more delicate goods.

grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut2_cargo.label: Grin Tractor Beam 002 Shared Ut2 Cargo
grin_tractorbeam_002_shared_ut2_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Max Angle: 80° Max Range: 130 m Full Strength Distance: 55 m This precision variant of Greycat’s SureGrip tractor beam sacrifices some of the power and range of the base model in exchange for a wider angle of manipulation and greater tether grip, allowing for careful handling of more delicate goods. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.

grin_tractorbeam_003_shared.label: ViseLock S1 Tractor Beam
grin_tractorbeam_003_shared.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 80° Max Range: 135 m Full Strength Distance: 50 m The ViseLock tractor beam is an evolution of Greycat’s industry-standard tech, with added improvements specifically intended to help security forces restrain their targets. In its design, Greycat sacrificed some hold strength at greater distances to achieve a more powerful tether that is harder to escape.

grin_tractorbeam_003_shared_cargo.label: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 80° Max Range: 135 m Full Strength Distance: 50 m The ViseLock tractor beam is an evolution of Greycat’s industry-standard tech, with added improvements specifically intended to help security forces restrain their targets. In its design, Greycat sacrificed some hold strength at greater distances to achieve a more powerful tether that is harder to escape. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo. In its design, Greycat sacrificed some hold strength at greater distances to achieve a more powerful tether that is harder to escape. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.
grin_tractorbeam_003_shared_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 80° Max Range: 135 m Full Strength Distance: 50 m The ViseLock tractor beam is an evolution of Greycat’s industry-standard tech, with added improvements specifically intended to help security forces restrain their targets. In its design, Greycat sacrificed some hold strength at greater distances to achieve a more powerful tether that is harder to escape. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.

grin_tractorbeam_004_s3.label: SafeTow S3 Towing Beam
grin_tractorbeam_004_s3.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Towing Beam Max Angle: 160° Max Range: 250 m Full Strength Distance: 200 m The safe and secure choice of recovery teams across the empire, the SafeTow towing beam from Greycat Industrial boasts enough strength, power, and control to transport both heavy cargo and vehicles across the ‘verse.

grin_tractorbeam_004_s3_cargo.label: SafeTow S3-Q Towing Beam
grin_tractorbeam_004_s3_cargo.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Towing Beam Max Angle: 160° Max Range: 250 m Full Strength Distance: 200 m The safe and secure choice of recovery teams across the empire, the SafeTow towing beam from Greycat Industrial boasts enough strength, power, and control to transport both heavy cargo and vehicles across the ‘verse. This "Q" model includes a special quick placement mode to assist with the transfer of cargo.

grin_tractorbeam_s1.label: SureGrip TH1 Tractor Beam
grin_tractorbeam_s1.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Greycat’s latest addition to their field-tested tractor beam line is a dependable addition to their catalog. Aside from a more efficient pull/draw ratio, the latest model does little to advance from the previous models. The SureGrip has settings to target and extract everything from asteroid fragments to drifting crewmen, backed by Greycat’s certified Soft-Touch® guarantee.

grin_tractorbeam_module_001.label: ReadyGrip Tractor Module
grin_tractorbeam_module_001.description: Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Tractor Beam Max Angle: 60° Max Range: 150 m Full Strength Distance: 75 m The Ready Grip Tractor Module compresses the dependability and power of Greycat’s signature tractor beam technology into a smaller sub-component that can be attached to a salvaging laser head.

gladiator_paint_bis2955_orange_black_ora.label: Gladiator Best in Show 2955 Livery
gladiator_paint_bis2955_orange_black_ora.description: Commemorate the Gladiator making the final four of the 2955 Ship Showdown with this striking metallic orange and black Best in Show livery.

gladiator_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Gladiator Nightbreak Livery
gladiator_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Gladiator with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

gladius_paint_black_grey_grey_geometric.label: Gladius Disrupt Camo Livery
gladius_paint_black_grey_grey_geometric.description: The Disrupt Camo livery utilizes carbon fiber grays and blacks printed in a disruptive pattern to keep your enemies guessing.

gladius_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Gladius Nightbreak Livery
gladius_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Gladius with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

gladius_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Gladius Timberline Livery
gladius_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Gladius with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

gladius_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Gladius Frostbite Camo Livery
gladius_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Gladius.

gladius_paint_grey_black_red.label: Gladius Dunlevy
gladius_paint_grey_black_red.description: Honor the famed Captain who shaped the course of the UEE Navy's elite fighter squadron with the Dunlevy livery for the Aegis Gladius. It pays to tribute to Captain Alexandra Dunlevy and Squadron 42 with red highlights against a grey base paint.

gladius_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Gladius Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
gladius_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Gladius a striking style.

gladius_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Gladius Deck the Hull Livery
gladius_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

gladius_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Gladius IceBreak Livery
gladius_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Gladius with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

gladius_paint_pirate.label: Gladius Pirate Livery
gladius_paint_pirate.description: Red and black with white highlights this special edition Gladius livery was created to celebrate those unafraid to engage pirate forces.

gladius_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.label: Gladius Solar Winds Livery
gladius_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.description: Fly in style with the Solar Winds livery that gives the Gladius a metallic silver finish with maroon highlights.

gladius_paint_unity.label: Gladius Foundation Fest Livery
gladius_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

gladius_paint_valiant.label: Gladius Valiant Livery
gladius_paint_valiant.description: Part of the ?Masters of Flight? series, this special edition livery honors the look of the Gladius used by famed defense pilot Condi Hillard who became the first Human on record to defeat a Vanduul in combat.

glass.label: Glass
glass.description: A drinking vessel made from tempered glassware.

glass_highball.label: Highball Glass
glass_highball.description: A tall and narrow drinking vessel made from tempered glassware.

glass_pint.label: Pint Glass
glass_pint.description: A large drinking vessel able to hold a pint (568 ml) of liquid and made from tempered glassware.

glass_tumbler.label: Tumbler Glass
glass_tumbler.description: A short and wide drinking vessel made from tempered glassware.

goldfish.label: Midas Fish
goldfish.description: Found in the rivers on Cassel in the Goss System, the Midas fish's golden color and nocturnal schedule make it a highly sought after addition to aquariums around the universe.

golem_paint_black_green_grey.label: Golem Rockfall Livery
golem_paint_black_green_grey.description: The Rockfall livery blends green and grey earth tones with black to give the Golem a look fitting for a ship made to rip apart rocks.

golem_paint_black_red_black.label: Golem Strongheart Livery
golem_paint_black_red_black.description: The Strongheart livery for the Golem is a bright and bold red with black highlights.

golem_paint_blue_black_green.label: Golem Cypher Livery
golem_paint_blue_black_green.description: Striking green and blue highlights elevate the black base paint of the Cypher livery.

golem_paint_gray_metal_metal.label: Golem Greysteel Livery
golem_paint_gray_metal_metal.description: The Greysteel livery artfully deploys various shades of grey across the Golem for a subtle yet captivating look.

golem_paint_grey_black_black.label: Golem Coalheart Livery
golem_paint_grey_black_black.description: Mine and make yourself less visible against the dark expanse of space with the black and grey Coalheart livery for the Golem.

golem_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Golem Deck the Hull Livery
golem_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

golem_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Golem IceBreak Livery
golem_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Golem with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

golem_paint_orange_white_orange.label: Golem Flashpoint Livery
golem_paint_orange_white_orange.description: Prominent use of orange offset against white makes the Golem Flashpoint livery highly visible on busy and dangerous work sites.

golem_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.label: Golem Keystone Livery
golem_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

golem_paint_yellow_gray_white.label: Golem Sunstruck Livery
golem_paint_yellow_gray_white.description: Yellow and white highlights atop a grey base paint gives the Golem a distinct look thanks to the Sunstruck livery.

golem_paint_yellow_grey_orange.label: Golem Faultline Livery
golem_paint_yellow_grey_orange.description: The Golem gets a distinct look with the Faultline livery with strategically placed yellow and orange stripes making the ship more visible.

guardian_paint_black_black_red.label: Guardian Blackout Livery
guardian_paint_black_black_red.description: Fly under the cover of darkness with the Blackout livery, coating the Guardian in a deep, matte black.

guardian_paint_black_white_red.label: Guardian Vector Livery
guardian_paint_black_white_red.description: Contrasting whites, reds, and blacks create strikingly angular design on the Vector livery.

guardian_paint_blue_blue_blue.label: Guardian Eventide Livery
guardian_paint_blue_blue_blue.description: The white lettering of the Mirai name and logo pop against the midnight blue and crimson red of the Eventide livery.

guardian_paint_blue_grey_black.label: Guardian Downpour Livery
guardian_paint_blue_grey_black.description: A bold blue and grey combination that bellows with the power of a storm, the Downpour livery demands attention.

guardian_paint_green_green_red.label: Guardian Harlequin Livery
guardian_paint_green_green_red.description: Primarily a sharp green with black accents, the Harlequin livery proudly displays the Mirai name and logo.

guardian_paint_grey_black_gold_camo.label: Guardian Shadow Gild Livery
guardian_paint_grey_black_gold_camo.description: For those Guardian pilots who prefer to subtly show their ostentatious side, the Shadow Gild livery variant features a dark gray and black camo hull and stylish gold highlights.

guardian_paint_greyblue_tan_grey.label: Guardian Desert Dusk Livery
guardian_paint_greyblue_tan_grey.description: Bold and adventurous, the Desert Dusk Guardian livery creates a gritty sense of sandblasted stone and darkened desert storms.

guardian_paint_halloween25_orange_black.label: Guardian Black Magic Livery
guardian_paint_halloween25_orange_black.description: The Black Magic livery for the Guardian mixes a macabre black with glowing orange highlights for a look inspired by the sinister spirit of Day of the Vara.

guardian_paint_red_grey_white.label: Guardian Red Skies Livery
guardian_paint_red_grey_white.description: Soar into the setting sun with this sharp collection of reds and whites in the Guardian Red Skies livery.

guardian_paint_red_red_red.label: Guardian Burnout Livery
guardian_paint_red_red_red.description: Predominately a piercing red, the Burnout livery is adorned with deep black highlights and Mirai's signature branding.

guardian_paint_tan_green_tan.label: Guardian Peninsula Livery
guardian_paint_tan_green_tan.description: Shades of stony tans and earthen browns create a grounded look for the Peninsula livery.

guardian_paint_tan_grey_gold.label: Guardian Sovereign Livery
guardian_paint_tan_grey_gold.description: An austere blend of tan and grey offset by an imperial gold highlight brings a sense of authority to the Sovereign livery.

guardian_paint_tan_grey_silver.label: Guardian Stormburst Livery
guardian_paint_tan_grey_silver.description: A new twist on a understated color combination, the silver of this palette adds a subtle majesty to the more earthen tans and greys of the Stormburst livery.

guardian_paint_white_white_white.label: Guardian Whiteout Livery
guardian_paint_white_white_white.description: Featuring a dramatically stark all-white finish, the Whiteout livery highlights the powerful form of the Guardian.

hapr_hl24_s4_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HL 2.4 (TR4)
hapr_hl24_s4_q2.description: Hammer Propulsion's HL 2.4 utilizes award-winning Gated 4 Grid Iron technology to provide a high output thrust with minimal emissions.

hapr_vp_esi_s2_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HM 4.2
hapr_vp_esi_s2_q2.description: Hammer Propulsion's HM 4.2 thrusters are built with Electrostatic Ion technology, tuned for maximum thrust at the expense of signature profile and fuel efficiency. Making this an ideal option for racers or anyone who doesn't mind making an impression.

hapr_vp_esi_s3_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HM 4.3
hapr_vp_esi_s3_q2.description: If speed is what you're after, the HM4.3 engine can give it to you. Built under supervision of the Racing Division at Hammer Propulsion, the 4.3 is a single-thruster system iteration of the award-winning Twin HM4.3 propulsion units made famous by the Origin 350r racers. The 4.3 has been specifically crafted down to the smallest pinion to give you the most boost possible in a single engine system.

hapr_vp_esi_s4_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HM 4.4
hapr_vp_esi_s4_q2.description: Capable of powering a medium class vessel, the HM4.4 is all speed and no caution. It's main selling point, the heavy output, becomes its biggest detriment as the engine flash will make conventional countermeasures useless when attempting to distract missiles. But, like the ad says, if it's speed you want...

hapr_vp_rmi_s5_q2.label: Hammer Propulsion HE 5.5
hapr_vp_rmi_s5_q2.description: Hammer Propulsion's HE 5.5 offers the same high quality, high output design that you find in the 5.3 but amplified to handle larger class vessels. the 5.5 is one of the most durable and robust thrusters on the market for commercial and shipping vehicles.

hrst_ballisticcannon_s7.label: Conqueror-7
hrst_ballisticcannon_s7.description: Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Turret Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Size: 7 Bring your conquest to the skies using Hurston Dynamics' Conqueror-7 ballistic cannon. Bespoke built for the Aegis Idris dorsal turret, these cannons are able to engage larger ships from a distance, finishing fights before they even begin.

hrst_laserbeam_s10_bespoke.label: Exodus-10 Laser Beam
hrst_laserbeam_s10_bespoke.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Type: Laser Beam Size: 10 Built in conjunction with the engineers at Aegis, this bespoke laser beam weapon from Hurston Dynamics is highly accurate, giving the Idris-K a devastating weapon in its arsenal.

hrst_laserrepeater_s1.label: Attrition-1 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 1 The Attrition-1 laser repeater features Hurston Dynamics' unique cascade technology which provides increased performance while sustained laser fire is maintained. The result is a size one weapon that rewards a deft operator.

hrst_laserrepeater_s2.label: Attrition-2 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 2 When the battle is heating up, that's when Hurston Dynamics' cascade laser technology really shines. With the size two Attrition-2 repeater, an operator can utilize sustained bursts of laser fire in order to translate excess heat into greater weapon performance.

hrst_laserrepeater_s3.label: Attrition-3 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 3 Rather than limiting their weapon's performance to increase stability, Hurston Dynamics' cascade technology allows the operator to decide. While overheating is a risk, longer periods of sustained fire with the Attrition-3 laser repeater will increase performance as excess heat is translated into greater energy output.

hrst_laserrepeater_s4.label: Attrition-4 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s4.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 4 Hurston Dynamics has fully integrated it's cascade laser technology into their Attrition-line of repeaters. The size four Attrition-4 is no exception, operating at peak performance when near its maximum thermal capacity.

hrst_laserrepeater_s5.label: Attrition-5 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s5.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 5 More than a simple size five laser repeater, the Attrition-5 from Hurston Dynamics features advanced cascade technology to allow the weapon significant performance improvements the longer it sustains its energy output.

hrst_laserrepeater_s6.label: Attrition-6 Repeater
hrst_laserrepeater_s6.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 6 With Hurston Dynamics' cascade technology, the Attrition-6 laser repeater maximizes it's combat potential. It's common for weapons to heat up when used heavily in combat, but what sets this size six repeater apart is that thermal energy is translating directly into increased offensive strength.

hrst_laserscattergun_s1.label: Dominance-1 Scattergun
hrst_laserscattergun_s1.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Scattergun Size: 1 Thanks to its integration of Hurston Dynamics' laser cascade technology, the Dominance-1 scattergun is able to deliver more damage the closer the size one weapon operates to its maximum safe thermal capacity.

hrst_laserscattergun_s2.label: Dominance-2 Scattergun
hrst_laserscattergun_s2.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Scattergun Size: 2 The harder the fight, the harder the Dominance-2 scattergun works. As its thermal levels increase, the size two weapon from Hurston Dynamics is able utilize cascade technology to turn that thermal potential into an even deadlier close-quarters attack.

hrst_laserscattergun_s3.label: Dominance-3 Scattergun
hrst_laserscattergun_s3.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Scattergun Size: 3 The Dominance-3 scattergun from Hurston Dynamics showcases the weapons manufacturer's cascade technology. As the operator continues to fire the size three weapon, the better able it is to convert the heat generated into increasingly devastating attacks.

hrst_nova_ballisticcannon_s5.label: Slayer Cannon
hrst_nova_ballisticcannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 5 Designed specifically for the Nova tank, Hurston Dynamics' Slayer ballistic cannon earned its illustrious reputation through countless battlefield engagements during the Second Tevarin War. This battlefield beast excels against armored targets and fortified emplacements by firing large caliber artillery rounds with astounding accuracy and velocity. Hurston worked closely with Tumbril when the tank manufacturer decided to bring back the Nova. Though they painstakingly honored the original Slayer design, Hurston also updated it for the 30th century by improving the pivot speed, heat resistance, and associated software to provide a state-of-the-art gunner UI.

hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s1.label: Ardor-1 Salvaged Repeater
hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 1 This Ardor-1 laser repeater was salvaged in the Pyro system. First manufactured in 2724, the Ardor series became popular for its split barrel design that helped mitigate heat when sustaining fire. Hurston eventually stopped manufacturing the weapon in favor of the Attrition line of laser repeaters. Despite the effects of time and constant usage, the weapon is still sought after because of the consistent performance delivered by Hurston Dynamic's expert design and solid construction.

hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s2.label: Ardor-2 Salvaged Repeater
hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 2 This Ardor-2 laser repeater was salvaged in the Pyro system. First manufactured in 2724, the Ardor series became popular for its split barrel design that helped mitigate heat when sustaining fire. Hurston eventually stopped manufacturing the weapon in favor of the Attrition line of laser repeaters. Despite the effects of time and constant usage, the weapon is still sought after because of the consistent performance delivered by Hurston Dynamic's expert design and solid construction.

hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s3.label: Ardor-3 Salvaged Repeater
hrst_pyro_laserrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 3 This Ardor-3 laser repeater was salvaged in the Pyro system. First manufactured in 2724, the Ardor series became popular for its split barrel design that helped mitigate heat when sustaining fire. Hurston eventually stopped manufacturing the weapon in favor of the Attrition line of laser repeaters. Despite the effects of time and constant usage, the weapon is still sought after because of the consistent performance delivered by Hurston Dynamic's expert design and solid construction.

hrst_s1_rpod_6x_s1.label: Jericho
hrst_s1_rpod_6x_s1.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Size: 1 Rockets: 6xS1 The Jericho rocket pod from Hurston Dynamics is compatible with any size one hardpoint and capable of carrying six S1 rockets.

hrst_s2_rpod_12x_s1.label: Jericho X
hrst_s2_rpod_12x_s1.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Size: 2 Rockets: 12xS1 The Jericho X rocket pod from Hurston Dynamics is compatible with any size two hardpoint and capable of carrying twelve S1 rockets.

hrst_s3_rpod_18x_s1.label: Jericho XL
hrst_s3_rpod_18x_s1.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Size: 3 Rockets: 18xS1 The Jericho XL rocket pod from Hurston Dynamics is compatible with any size three hardpoint and capable of carrying eighteen S1 rockets.

hrst_storm_laserrepeater_s3.label: Reign-3 Repeater
hrst_storm_laserrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 3 Hurston Dynamics has partnered with Tumbril Land Systems to craft the powerful Reign-3 laser repeater specifically for the Storm assault vehicle's turret. Utilizing Hurston Dynamics' proprietary cascade technology, the Reign-3 delivers increased performance and greater energy output as the frenetic pace of combat starts to heat up.

htnk_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Hydrogen Fuel Tank
htnk_vncl_s04_mauler.description: The Vanduul Mauler's Hydrogen Fuel Tank stores fuel to power the Mauler conventional engines and thrusters.

hypr_m116_s1_q1.label: 8x Hydra Propulsion M1-16 (TR1)
hypr_m116_s1_q1.description: Welcome to the next level of maneuverability. The M1-16 line of thrusters from Hydra Propulsion features ultra-fine precision bursts to allow pilots an unprecedented level of control.

hammer_propulsion_twin_hm_4_3.label: Hammer Propulsion Twin HM 4.3
hammer_propulsion_twin_hm_4_3.description: The luxury version of the HM4.3, Hammer Propulsion's HMX4.3 engine system features customized racing parts from some of the league's top engineers to help weather corrosion and general part decay.

hammerhead_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.label: Hammerhead Fortuna Livery
hammerhead_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

hammerhead_paint_bis2949.label: Hammerhead 2949 Best In Show Livery
hammerhead_paint_bis2949.description: Customize your Hammerhead with this special 2949 Best in Show livery.

hammerhead_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_c.label: Hammerhead Nightbreak Livery
hammerhead_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_c.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Hammerhead with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

hammerhead_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Hammerhead Stormbringer Livery
hammerhead_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Hammerhead livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

hammerhead_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.label: Hammerhead Polar Camo Livery
hammerhead_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Hammerhead with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

hawk_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Hawk Timberline Livery
hawk_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Hawk with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

hawk_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Hawk Frostbite Camo Livery
hawk_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Hawk.

hawk_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Hawk Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
hawk_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Hawk a striking style.

hawk_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.label: Hawk Hosanna Livery
hawk_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.description: Inspired by the gorgeous clouds that enshroud Orison, the Hosanna livery blends red, ivory, and pink to give the Hawk a distinct appearance. It also features a silhouette of the landing zone's famous Hosanna tree complete with its pink flowers.

hawk_paint_sand_orange_hurston.label: Hawk Central Tower Livery
hawk_paint_sand_orange_hurston.description: Give the Hawk a dramatic new look with the Central Tower livery. The orange and black color scheme is inspired by the furnaces of industry powering Lorville, and also features a representation of the landing zone's iconic Central Headquarters and Shared Services Center, aka Central Tower.

hawk_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.label: Hawk Aspire Livery
hawk_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.description: With the Aspire livery, blue and white combine to evoke both the colors and frigid temperatures of New Babbage. In honor of the landing zone that inspired it, the livery also features a depiction of the Aspire Grand building that dominates the city's skyline.

herald_paint_green_black.label: Herald Ghoulish Green Livery
herald_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Herald livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

herald_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Herald Stormbringer Livery
herald_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Herald livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

herald_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Herald Polar Livery
herald_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Herald with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

hermes_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Hermes Nightbreak Livery
hermes_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Hermes with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

hermes_paint_black_silver.label: Hermes Tripline Livery
hermes_paint_black_silver.description: Sharp, silver accents cuts through the stark black of the Tripline livery's metallic color scheme.

hermes_paint_blue_black_red.label: Hermes Disco Livery
hermes_paint_blue_black_red.description: Equip the ship livery used by ace pilot Disco in the classic children's cartoon Rory Nova. While it turns the Hermes metallic dark blue, black, and red, whether you turn into the 'dynamic, instinctive spacecraft operator' that inspired the livery's name is up to you.

hermes_paint_creme_black.label: Hermes Earthfall Livery
hermes_paint_creme_black.description: Black, beige, and red come together to create a grounded color scheme for the Earthfall livery.

hermes_paint_green_bronze.label: Hermes Honorbound Livery
hermes_paint_green_bronze.description: Fight for glory with the Honorbound livery, consisting of a muted military green accompanied by a subtle bronze.

hermes_paint_indigo_gold.label: Hermes Paragon Livery
hermes_paint_indigo_gold.description: The Paragon livery consists of a cool, crisp white, with regal blue and gold accents worthy of admiration.

hermes_paint_paint_red_blue.label: Hermes Disco Livery
hermes_paint_paint_red_blue.description: Carve a path through the unknown with the Dauntless livery. Featuring a deep, slate blue and striking red details, this color palette is for the bold and the brave.

hermes_paint_purple_black.label: Hermes Pulsar Livery
hermes_paint_purple_black.description: Primarily a brilliant purple offset by a vivid orange, the Pulsar livery blends these contrasting colors into an interstellar mix.

hermes_paint_sand_blue.label: Hermes Navarra Livery
hermes_paint_sand_blue.description: Evoking the sandy browns of an arid savanna, the Navarra livery is offset with a splash of bright blue.

hermes_paint_white_blue_blue.label: Hermes Keystone Livery
hermes_paint_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

hermes_paint_yellow_black.label: Hermes Lockdown Livery
hermes_paint_yellow_black.description: Featuring yellow highlights that pops against a rich black hull, the Lockdown livery is sure to make a statement.

hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_blue_blue_red.label: Hornet Kilian Blue Livery
hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_blue_blue_red.description: Inspired by the deep blue skies frequently seen in the Navy's home system, the Kilian Blue livery was designed in 2880 to celebrate the 500th anniversary of Pax Humana and the formation of the Navy. Made specifically for the Hornet Mk I, the livery is dark blue with grey highlights and crisp white UEE logos.

hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_green_red_green_cam.label: Hornet Corin Camo Livery
hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_green_red_green_cam.description: Show your support for the UEE's most elite fighting force with the Corin Camo livery for the Hornet Mk I. Commissioned in 2860 to celebrate the 300th anniversary of the Marines becoming their own branch of the military, the livery is a classic green camo with red highlights and the UEE logo.

hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_steel_red_orange.label: Hornet Ironheart Livery
hornet_f7a_mk1_paint_steel_red_orange.description: The Ironheart is a special livery for the Hornet Mk I. This unique livery was previously used by the Navy on Hornets escorting diplomats before being retired and released to the public. It is primarily grey with yellow and orange highlights and the UEE logo.

hornet_f7a_mk2_paint_desert_camo.label: Hornet Simoom Livery
hornet_f7a_mk2_paint_desert_camo.description: Gain an advantage when patrolling or exploring deserts in the Hornet F7A Mk2 with the Simoom livery, which mixes tan camo with black highlights.

hornet_f7a_mk2_paint_lovestruck_pink_bla.label: Hornet Mk II Lovestruck Livery
hornet_f7a_mk2_paint_lovestruck_pink_bla.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Hornet Mk II.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_bluegrey_orange_bl.label: Hornet Mk II Tigerveil Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_bluegrey_orange_bl.description: The dynamic Hornet Mk II deserves a livery to match. The Tigerveil livery consists of a steely blue with bold orange and subtle black highlights.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_grey_grey_blue.label: Hornet Mk II Fortitude Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_grey_grey_blue.description: Primarily dark grey, the Fortitude livery uses vibrant blue highlights to accentuate the silhouette of the iconic Hornet Mk II.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_grey_olive_green.label: Hornet Mk II Silva Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_grey_olive_green.description: Featuring various shades of green, the Silva livery brings a bold and distinct look to the Hornet Mk II.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_heartseeker.label: Hornet Mk II Heartseeker Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_heartseeker.description: Made for pilots whose true love is the thrill of a harrowing dogfight, the Heartseeker livery for the Hornet Mk II features a white base paint, red highlights, and a heart decal near the cockpit.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_olive_green_tan_ca.label: Hornet Mk II Canopy Camo Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_olive_green_tan_ca.description: Get in close for the kill with the Canopy Camo livery. It utilizes a digital camo pattern consisting of tan, olive, and green to help disguise the Hornet Mk II.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_silver_bluesilver_.label: Hornet Mk II Shikari Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_silver_bluesilver_.description: The Shikari livery gives the Hornet Mk II a unique silver and blue camo design.

hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_tan_tan_black.label: Hornet Mk II Quicksand Livery
hornet_f7cm_mk2_paint_tan_tan_black.description: Bring to bear the incredible firepower of the Hornet Mk II in distinct style with the tan and black Quicksand livery.

hornet_f7c_mk2_paint_black_gold.label: Hornet Ironscale Livery
hornet_f7c_mk2_paint_black_gold.description: Primarily black with bronze highlights, the Ironscale livery gives the Hornet Mk2 a subtle yet elegant style.

hornet_f7c_mk2_paint_white_blue.label: Hornet Icebound Livery
hornet_f7c_mk2_paint_white_blue.description: The Icebound livery covers the Hornet Mk2 in crisp white with light blue highlights.

hornet_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Hornet Timberline Livery
hornet_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Hornet with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

hornet_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Hornet Frostbite Camo Livery
hornet_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Hornet.

hornet_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Hornet Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
hornet_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Hornet a striking style.

hoverquad_paint_copperhead_white_bronze.label: HoverQuad Copperhead Livery
hoverquad_paint_copperhead_white_bronze.description: Speed across picturesque landscapes in this sublime HoverQuad Copperhead livery, which is white, bronze, and black.

hoverquad_paint_lightspeed_orange_yellow.label: HoverQuad Lightspeed Livery
hoverquad_paint_lightspeed_orange_yellow.description: Speed across picturesque landscapes in this sublime HoverQuad Lightspeed livery, which is orange with yellow flourishes.

hoverquad_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: HoverQuad Lovestruck Livery
hoverquad_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your HoverQuad.

hoverquad_paint_racing_blue_white.label: HoverQuad Slipstream Livery
hoverquad_paint_racing_blue_white.description: The Slipstream livery will have your HoverQuad ready and raring to race with this sleek blue and white paint scheme.

hoverquad_paint_racing_purple_white.label: HoverQuad Turbocharged Livery
hoverquad_paint_racing_purple_white.description: The Turbocharged is a distinct, purple racing livery for the HoverQuad that will make you stand out from the rest of the field.

hoverquad_paint_racing_red_silver.label: HoverQuad Overdrive Livery
hoverquad_paint_racing_red_silver.description: Blast past other racers in your HoverQuad with the Overdrive livery, which features a stylish blend red and silver coloring.

hoverquad_paint_terminus_black_red.label: HoverQuad Terminus Livery
hoverquad_paint_terminus_black_red.description: Speed across picturesque landscapes in this sublime HoverQuad Terminus livery, which is black with red flourishes.

hulla_paint_blue_darkblue_orange_stripe.label: Hull A Bombora Livery
hulla_paint_blue_darkblue_orange_stripe.description: Featuring a color scheme that's vibrant blue on the top and a vivid orange on the bottom, the Bombora livery gives that Hull A a strikingly distinct look.

hulla_paint_darkgreen_grey_red_stripe.label: Hull A Trailblazer Livery
hulla_paint_darkgreen_grey_red_stripe.description: The Trailblazer livery creates a cool, understated style for your Hull A with grey on top and dark red on the bottom.

hulla_paint_dusk.label: Hull A Dusk Livery
hulla_paint_dusk.description: For the long haul cargo captains who prefer to make a subtle statement when it comes to their freighter, MISC offers the distinguished Hull A Dusk Livery. A complete grey hull highlights the ship's classic silhouette with tasteful gold trim.

hulla_paint_empyrean.label: Hull A Empyrean Livery
hulla_paint_empyrean.description: Cargo hauling takes on a bold new look with the Hull A Empyrean Livery which features a dynamic tricolor design. Yellow highlights divide a white nose from a grey engineering section lending the appearance of speed to the freighter.

hulla_paint_horizon.label: Hull A Horizon Livery
hulla_paint_horizon.description: Even a hard working spacecraft deserves to look its best. The Hull A Horizon Livery offers a stylish two-tone grey-and-white color scheme that's ideal for turning heads at the spaceport.

hullb_paint_black_white_yellow.label: Hull B Empyrean Livery
hullb_paint_black_white_yellow.description: Cargo hauling takes on a bold new look with the Hull B Empyrean Livery which features a dynamic tricolor design. Yellow highlights divide a white nose from a grey engineering section lending the appearance of speed to the freighter.

hullb_paint_black_yellow_black.label: Hull B Dusk Livery
hullb_paint_black_yellow_black.description: For the long haul cargo captains who prefer to make a subtle statement when it comes to their freighter, MISC offers the distinguished Hull B Dusk Livery. A complete grey hull highlights the ship's classic silhouette with tasteful gold trim.

hullb_paint_brown_white_bronze.label: Hull B Horizon Livery
hullb_paint_brown_white_bronze.description: Even a hard working spacecraft deserves to look its best. The Hull B Horizon Livery offers a stylish two-tone grey-and-white color scheme that's ideal for turning heads at the spaceport.

hullb_paint_white_blue_blue.label: Hull B Keystone Livery
hullb_paint_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

hullb_paint_yellow_yellow_black.label: Hull B First Light Livery
hullb_paint_yellow_yellow_black.description: Haulers looking to create buzz about the look of their Hull B should equip the First Light livery with its black front and yellow back sections.

hullc_paint_blue_darkblue_orange_stripe.label: Hull C Bombora Livery
hullc_paint_blue_darkblue_orange_stripe.description: Featuring a color scheme that's vibrant blue on the top and a vivid orange on the bottom, the Bombora livery gives that Hull C a strikingly distinct look.

hullc_paint_darkgreen_grey_red_stripe.label: Hull C Trailblazer Livery
hullc_paint_darkgreen_grey_red_stripe.description: The Trailblazer livery creates a cool, understated style for your Hull C with grey on top and dark red on the bottom.

hullc_paint_dusk.label: Hull C Dusk Livery
hullc_paint_dusk.description: For the long haul cargo captains who prefer to make a subtle statement when it comes to their freighter, MISC offers the distinguished Hull C Dusk Livery. A complete grey hull highlights the ship's classic silhouette with tasteful gold trim.

hullc_paint_empyrean.label: Hull C Empyrean Livery
hullc_paint_empyrean.description: Cargo hauling takes on a bold new look with the Hull C Empyrean Livery which features a dynamic tricolor layout. Yellow highlights divide a white front from a grey back section lending the appearance of speed to the freighter.

hullc_paint_horizon.label: Hull C Horizon Livery
hullc_paint_horizon.description: Even a hard working spacecraft deserves to look its best. The Hull C Horizon Livery offers a stylish two-tone grey-and-white color scheme that's ideal for turning heads at the spaceport.

hurricane_paint_fleetweek_red_white.label: Hurricane Flashfire Livery
hurricane_paint_fleetweek_red_white.description: Metallic red and crisp white stylings combine for the bright and bold Flashfire livery for the Hurricane.

hurricane_paint_fleetweek_tan_green_tige.label: Hurricane Waylay Camo Livery
hurricane_paint_fleetweek_tan_green_tige.description: Equip your Hurricane in classic camo colors and stylings with the Waylay Camo livery.

hurricane_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Hurricane Stormbringer Livery
hurricane_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Hurricane livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black and electric blue to give the ship a cool new look.

hurricane_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.label: Hurricane Polar Camo Livery
hurricane_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Hurricane with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

intk_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Fuel Intake
intk_vncl_s04_mauler.description: This Fuel Intake replenishes the hydrogen fuel stores for the Mauler to keep its tanks full during combat maneuvers.

idris_paint_beige_beige_black_shark.label: Idris Sharktooth Livery
idris_paint_beige_beige_black_shark.description: Charge into battle in stylish and dramatic fashion with the Sharktooth livery. It gives the Idris a distinct look using beige and black for a disruptive coloration pattern that helps break up the silhouette of the ship.

idris_paint_beige_beige_brown.label: Idris Beachhead Livery
idris_paint_beige_beige_brown.description: Proclaim your presence with the Beachhead livery for the Idris. It uses various shades of beige and brown for a look that stands out against the dark of space.

idris_paint_black_black_black_red.label: Idris Marauder Livery
idris_paint_black_black_black_red.description: Designed for the Idris-K aftermarket kit, the Marauder livery is primarily black with subtle red highlights.

idris_paint_blue_blue_black.label: Idris Sea Serpent Livery
idris_paint_blue_blue_black.description: Cool blues and black combine for this subdued Idris Sea Serpent livery.

idris_paint_blue_blue_blue_camo.label: Idris Triton Camo Livery
idris_paint_blue_blue_blue_camo.description: Conceal the shape of the Idris with the blue camo pattern of the Triton Camo livery.

idris_paint_chrome_chrome_black.label: Idris Ironcore Livery
idris_paint_chrome_chrome_black.description: The chrome and black colors of the Ironcore livery helps the Idris obscure itself against the dark expanse of space.

idris_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Idris Nightbreak Livery
idris_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Idris with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

idris_paint_grey_green_tan_camo.label: Idris Commando Camo Livery
idris_paint_grey_green_tan_camo.description: The Commando Camo livery brings a classic green and tan camo look to the Idris.

intrepid_paint_black_blue.label: Intrepid Nocturne Livery
intrepid_paint_black_blue.description: Bold blue highlights pop against the black base paint of the Nocturne livery.

intrepid_paint_black_gold.label: Intrepid Oblivion Livery
intrepid_paint_black_gold.description: The Oblivion livery cloaks the Intrepid in black with subtle but striking gold highlights.

intrepid_paint_blue_black_gold.label: Intrepid Epoque Livery
intrepid_paint_blue_black_gold.description: The Epoque livery features a navy and black coloring and is finished with gold detailing.

intrepid_paint_blue_white.label: Intrepid Wavefront Livery
intrepid_paint_blue_white.description: Featuring decorative white markings across a bluish-green base paint, the Wavefront livery brings a dynamic and distinct look to the Intrepid.

intrepid_paint_green_black.label: Intrepid Fusion Livery
intrepid_paint_green_black.description: Sporting two distinct and vibrant shades of green with black highlights, the Fusion livery gives the Intrepid an utterly unique look.

intrepid_paint_silver_teal_white.label: Intrepid Foundation Fest Livery
intrepid_paint_silver_teal_white.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

intrepid_paint_white_black_red.label: Intrepid Altair Livery
intrepid_paint_white_black_red.description: The Altair livery is primarily a crisp white with black and red highlights.

ironclad_beige_beige_beige.label: Ironclad Sediment Livery
ironclad_beige_beige_beige.description: When the job takes you to the back end of nowhere and back again, there's the Sediment livery which coats the Ironclad in a robust shade of brown.

ironclad_black_black_silver.label: Ironclad Dauntless Livery
ironclad_black_black_silver.description: Make the Ironclad even more imposing and impressive with the Dauntless livery, which is primarily black with striking silver highlight.

ironclad_cream_silver_silver.label: Ironclad Wind Chill Livery
ironclad_cream_silver_silver.description: The Wind Chill livery for the Ironclad features crisp white paint with black highlights and silver accents.

ironclad_metal_metal_yellow.label: Ironclad Aquamarine Livery
ironclad_metal_metal_yellow.description: The Aquamarine livery for the Ironclad gives a metallic teal base with subtle yellow accents to make a statement, before you throw a punch.

ironclad_olive_olive_yellow.label: Ironclad Commando Livery
ironclad_olive_olive_yellow.description: Primarily green with yellow accents, the Commando livery allows the Ironclad to blend in with forests and verdant locations.

jdrv_wetk_s04_idris.label: Exfiltrate
jdrv_wetk_s04_idris.description: Item Type: Jump Module Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 This capital-class jump module was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

jokr_distortioncannon_s1.label: Suckerpunch Cannon
jokr_distortioncannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Joker Engineering Item Type: Distortion Cannon Size: 1 The geniuses over at Joker have done it again. The Suckerpunch Distortion autocannon is a long-range weapon that drains your target's power supply rather than damaging the physical body of the ship, making it ideal for law-enforcement or other applications.

jokr_distortioncannon_s2.label: Suckerpunch-L Cannon
jokr_distortioncannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Joker Engineering Item Type: Distortion Cannon Size: 2 Silently strike from afar with the Suckerpunch. Joker's long-range size two distortion cannon drains a target's power system, leaving them helpless to defend against what you have planned next. An ideal choice for law enforcement, bounty hunters, and other non-lethal operations.

jokr_distortioncannon_s3.label: Suckerpunch-XL Cannon
jokr_distortioncannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Joker Engineering Item Type: Distortion Cannon Size: 3 When you want to catch your prey without doing damage use the Suckerpunch. This size three distortion cannon from Joker depletes the target's power system, making it an excellent and effective non-lethal addition to your arsenal.

jump_tars_s1_c.label: Explorer
jump_tars_s1_c.description: Item Type: Jump Module Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Journey across the ‘verse with Tarsus’ Explorer jump module, offering greater reliability to help take your wanderlust to new heights.

jump_tars_s2_c.label: Excelsior
jump_tars_s2_c.description: Item Type: Jump Module Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Journey across the ‘verse with Tarsus’ Excelsior jump module, offering greater reliability to help take your wanderlust to new heights.

jump_tars_s3_c.label: Exodus
jump_tars_s3_c.description: Item Type: Jump Module Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Journey across the ‘verse with Tarsus’ Exodus jump module, offering greater reliability to help take your wanderlust to new heights.

jellyfish.label: Oshi
jellyfish.description: A smaller cousin of a deep-sea bioluminescent species, the Oshi have only recently adapted to the lighter pressure closer to the surface of the vast oceans.

kbar_ballisticcannon_s1.label: 9-Series Longsword Cannon
kbar_ballisticcannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: KnightBridge Arms Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 1 The entry level autocannon of the KnightBridge Arms Sword-line, the 9-Series Longsword fires a ballistic round designed for use against a variety of armored hostiles while allowing pilots to keep a healthy distance from targets.

kbar_ballisticcannon_s2.label: 10-Series Greatsword Cannon
kbar_ballisticcannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: KnightBridge Arms Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 2 KnightBridge Arms knows that when it comes to battle, having the right weapon can make all the difference. With its powerful ballistic rounds, the versatile, size two 10-Series Greatsword will see you through to the conflict's end thanks to it long range and high damage potential.

kbar_ballisticcannon_s3.label: 11-Series Broadsword Cannon
kbar_ballisticcannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: KnightBridge Arms Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 3 The 11-Series Broadsword from KnightBridge Arms is the size three ballistic autocannon pilots come to when they want the 3 D’s: distance, dependability and damage.

klwe_laserrepeater_s1.label: CF-117 Bulldog Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 1 Featuring a three-barrel sequential fire design, the Klaus & Werner CF-117 Bulldog laser repeater is capable of delivering high velocity energy rounds while maintaining heat efficiency making it a favorite among new pilots who are outfitting their first ship.

klwe_laserrepeater_s2.label: CF-227 Badger Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 2 The CF-227 Badger is Klaus & Werner’s dependable size two repeating laser. Its increased output and high rate of fire make it a solid contender in any fight.

klwe_laserrepeater_s3.label: CF-337 Panther Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 3 The CF-337 Panther is the size three model in Klaus & Werner's laser repeater line. The Panther is a true fire-and-forget weapon with a respectable power consumption-to-damage ratio. Pilots who outfit their ships with Panthers rarely regret the decision.

klwe_laserrepeater_s4.label: CF-447 Rhino Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s4.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 4 When a ship comes charging at you with a CF-447 Rhino strapped on, it is an experience few pilots will ever forget. This formidable size four laser repeater from Klaus & Werner is well suited for medium-range engagements, but packs a wallop up close.

klwe_laserrepeater_s5.label: CF-557 Galdereen Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s5.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 5 With a bite as fearsome as its fanged namesake, the Klaus & Werner CF-557 Galdereen laser repeater is a solid choice for a wide range of vehicles thanks to its high rate of fire and consistent efficacy.

klwe_laserrepeater_s6.label: CF-667 Mammoth Repeater
klwe_laserrepeater_s6.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 6 This beast of a laser repeater from Klaus & Werner features three massive barrels that warn any who spot a ship bearing the CF-667 that they may want to think again before engaging.

klwe_massdrivercannon_s2.label: Sledge II Mass Driver Cannon
klwe_massdrivercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 2 The Klaus & Werner Sledge II Mass Driver Cannon is a 60mm hard-ammo ballistic weapon capable of firing multiple types of ammunition. This weapon’s increased shield penetration capabilities comes at a cost, however; magazine space is limited, and ammunition must be replenished regularly. Because it does not use energy-based projectiles, the K&W mass driver has a reduced power cost and therefore results in a reduced EM signature.

klwe_massdriver_s1.label: Sledge I Mass Driver Cannon
klwe_massdriver_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 1 Take down distant targets with the Sledge I Mass Driver Cannon. Klaus & Werner utilized railgun technology to accurately fire high damage ballistic projectiles over long distances. Be sure to make every shot count though, as the weapon sacrifices rate of fire for raw, devastating damage.

klwe_massdriver_s10.label: Destroyer Mass Driver Cannon
klwe_massdriver_s10.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 10 Made for the Aegis Idris utilizing railgun technology to accurately fire high damage ballistic projectiles over long distances, the Destroyer mass driver from Klaus & Werner has made it's presence known on the battlefield time and again with devastating impact.

klwe_massdriver_s2.label: Sledge II Mass Driver Cannon
klwe_massdriver_s2.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 2 The Klaus & Werner Sledge II Mass Driver Cannon is a hard-hitting ballistic weapon capable of firing multiple types of ammunition. This weapon’s increased shield penetration capabilities comes at a cost, however. Magazine space is limited, so ammunition must be replenished regularly. Because it does not use energy-based projectiles, the K&W mass driver has a reduced power cost and therefore results in a reduced EM signature.

klwe_massdriver_s3.label: Sledge III Mass Driver Cannon
klwe_massdriver_s3.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Mass Driver Cannon Size: 3 The Sledge III is the size three variant of Klaus & Werner's popular mass driver cannon series. Though slow to fire, the weapon successfully blends the company's philosophy of simple design with cutting edge railgun technology to fire ballistic projectiles with surgical precision at range.

kodk_tm4_roller_s1_q1.label: KDK TM-4 Roller Thruster
kodk_tm4_roller_s1_q1.description: The TM Series thrusters from Kosmicheskie Dvigateli Kunayeva (KDK) are high-power maneuvering thrusters built around cutting-edge Electrostatic ion technology to provide a heavy output without sacrificing precision.

kodk_tm4_slider_s1_q1.label: KDK TM-4 Slider Thruster
kodk_tm4_slider_s1_q1.description: The TM Series thrusters from Kosmicheskie Dvigateli Kunayeva (KDK) are high-power maneuvering thrusters built around cutting-edge Electrostatic ion technology to provide a heavy output without sacrificing precision.

krig_ballisticgatling_s2.label: Tigerstrike T-19P
krig_ballisticgatling_s2.description: Manufacturer: Kruger Intergalactic Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 2 A custom variant on Kruger Intergalactic’s Tigerstrike line of rotary cannons, this powerful gun was designed in conjunction with the team working on the P-52 Merlin to ensure that it fit seamlessly with the graceful lines of light fighter’s hull while still rapidly delivering round after round with the dependability that one expects from a Kruger weapon.

krig_ballisticgatling_s3.label: Tigerstrike T-21 Gatling
krig_ballisticgatling_s3.description: Manufacturer: Kruger Intergalactic Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 3 Simply put, the Tigerstrike T-21 from Kruger is an equalizer. This high-speed rotary cannon is capable of delivering a relentless stream of rounds on target with a minimal chance of weapon jam making it an essential addition to any arsenal.

krig_lasercannon_s3.label: Quarreler Cannon
krig_lasercannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Kruger Intergalactic Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 3 Crafted with precision manufactured parts forged to extremely tight tolerances, designed for top-of-class heat management and assembled to exceed all industry standards, the Quarreler laser autocannon was created by Kruger Intergalactic for true defensive dependability.

krig_wolf_ballisticgatling_s4.label: Relentless L-21 Gatling
krig_wolf_ballisticgatling_s4.description: Manufacturer: Kruger Intergalactic Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Size: 4 Enemies will regret getting within range of the L-21 Wolf and its bespoke Relentless L-21 gatling. Kruger's expert engineering allows this rotary cannon to fire rounds at a head spinning speed with little worry of a misfire.

krig_wolf_laserrepeater_s4.label: Axiom L-22 Repeater
krig_wolf_laserrepeater_s4.description: Manufacturer: Kruger Intergalactic Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 4 Meticulous design makes the Axiom L-22 an ideal armament for the L-22 Alpha Wolf. Premium parts and cutting-edge manufacturing have created a laser repeater made to thrive in the heat of battle.

krng_lasercannon_s4.label: FL-33 Cannon
krng_lasercannon_s4.description: Manufacturer: Kroneg Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 4 With a steady hand and a sharp eye, there are few similarly classed laser autocannons that can out perform Kroneg's FL-33. This versatile, high-yield weapon was constructed with newly designed compensators to deliver damage at long ranges.

kron_lasercannon_s1.label: FL-11 Cannon
kron_lasercannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Kroneg Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 1 Deliver massive damage from a distance with Kroneg's FL line of laser cannons. The FL-11 might shoot slow but provides considerable firepower for a size one weapon.

kron_lasercannon_s2.label: FL-22 Cannon
kron_lasercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Kroneg Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 2 Deliver massive damage from a distance with Kroneg's FL line of laser cannons. The size two FL-22 shines at medium and long ranges thanks to a design that minimizes damage falloff.

kron_lasercannon_s3.label: FL-33 Cannon
kron_lasercannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Kroneg Item Type: Laser Cannon Size: 3 Deliver massive damage from a distance with Kroneg's FL line of laser cannons. Embodying Kroneg's practical design philosophy, the FL-33 remains one of the most reliable and destructive size three laser cannons currently available.

ksar_pistol_ballistic_01.label: Coda Pistol
ksar_pistol_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Kastak Arms Item Type: Pistol Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 6 Rate Of Fire: 180 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Often called the Kastak Arms "hand cannon," the Coda can end an engagement with a single .50 caliber round, although the substantial power can make the Coda's recoil hard to handle. Considering its limited magazine size and substantial kick, sustained fire is discouraged in favor of more accurate single shots.

ksar_rifle_energy_01_blue_gold_01.label: Karna "Valor" Rifle
ksar_rifle_energy_01_blue_gold_01.description: Manufacturer: Kastak Arms Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Energy (Plasma) Battery Size: 35 Rate Of Fire: 500 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) The Karna is a classic Kastak Arms plasma assault rifle. This mid-range mauler features charged and full-auto fire modes to allow for quick and easy situational adjustments. Besides its renowned firepower, the Karna's rugged looks and reliability have made it one of Kastak Arms' most popular weapons. The bold blue and gold color scheme gives the Valor edition a valiant and dignified appeal.

lfsp_aegs_s04_idris.label: Safehab
lfsp_aegs_s04_idris.description: Item Type: Life Support Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 This capital-class life support system was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

life_just_s00_awaken_compact.description: Item Type: Life Support Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Industrial No matter the job, you need to be sure that you're life support system is going to do its part - day in, day out. That's why Juno Starwerk built the Awaken life support system to be tough enough so you could breath easy.
