life_tydt_s03_pureclean_max.label: PureClean Max
life_tydt_s03_pureclean_max.description: Item Type: Life Support Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian Designed to be able to process atmosphere to above UEE standards, the PureClean life support system from Tyler Design & Tech provides you and your crew with a clean and comfortable environment.

life_tydt_s03_ventscrub_max.label: VentScrub Max
life_tydt_s03_ventscrub_max.description: Item Type: Life Support Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian Designed to be able to process atmosphere to above UEE standards, the VentScrub life support system from Tyler Design & Tech provides you and your crew with a clean and comfortable environment.

loot_game_chess_1_a.label: Hyperion Brass Bishop
loot_game_chess_1_a.description: This brass chess piece is a part of the classic Hyperion set that has been imitated multiple times since its 25th century debut.

loot_game_chess_1_b.label: Hyperion Brass Bishop
loot_game_chess_1_b.description: This revenant wood chess piece is a part of the classic Hyperion set that has been imitated multiple times since its 25th century debut.

lplt_sqv_s1.label: Lightning Power LTD Powerbolt
lplt_sqv_s1.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Lightning Power Ltd's Powerbolt makes its living by offering the perfect blend of performance and signature masking. Lightning's proprietary Superfluid Quantum Vortex technology keeps energy emissions low while providing better output than typical stealth-oriented plants.

lightning_f8c_paint_bis2954.label: F8C Lightning 2954 Best in Show Livery
lightning_f8c_paint_bis2954.description: This purple and white 2954 Best in Show Livery celebrates the F8C Lightning winning the 2954 Ship Showdown.

lightning_f8c_paint_black_black_green_sp.label: F8C Lightning Shock Wave Livery
lightning_f8c_paint_black_black_green_sp.description: Turn heads and the tides of battle with the Shock Wave livery for the F8C Lightning. Featuring a striking green color with black highlights, the livery provides a dramatic and distinct look to a ship that's both a beauty and a beast.

lightning_f8c_paint_platinum.label: F8C Lightning Stormfire Livery
lightning_f8c_paint_platinum.description: Cut a classic profile through any battlefield with the Stormfire livery for Anvil's new F8C Lightning. Featuring a triple-coat of Kalding paint rated for a variety of atmospheres and conditions, this sleek platinum look will keep you looking good for years to come.

lightning_f8_paint_iae_black_green_green.label: F8 Lightning Nightweaver Livery
lightning_f8_paint_iae_black_green_green.description: Bring a distinct look to the F8 Lightning with the Nightweaver livery. It features a black fuselage intersected by green highlights in a unique and irregular pattern.

lynx_paint_purple_black_gold.label: Lynx Nebula Livery
lynx_paint_purple_black_gold.description: The Nebula livery brings a striking metallic purple finish to the Lynx.

lynx_paint_silver_black_silver.label: Lynx Moonrise Livery
lynx_paint_silver_black_silver.description: A metallic grey body with black highlights makes the Moonrise a subtle yet stylish livery for the Lynx.

lynx_paint_white_blue_blue.label: Lynx Moonshadow Livery
lynx_paint_white_blue_blue.description: Switch up the look of the Lynx with the Moonshadow livery, which is primarily white with blue highlights.

m50_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: M50 Stormbringer Livery
m50_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom M50 livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black, electric blue, and white to give the ship a cool new look.

m50_paint_iae2950_grey_white.label: M50 Polar Livery
m50_paint_iae2950_grey_white.description: Modify your M50 with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

m50_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.label: M50 Skullcrusher Livery
m50_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the M50, which features a massive skull across the top.

m50_paint_racing_blue_yellow_yellow.label: M50 Murray Cup Livery
m50_paint_racing_blue_yellow_yellow.description: Slipstream into pole position with this sporty racing tint. Featuring a blue and yellow paint scheme accented by stylish chevrons, this Murray Cup themed livery highlights the sleek and piercing nature of the M50.

m80_paint_black_black_orange.label: M80 Afterglow Livery
m80_paint_black_black_orange.description: Black envelopes most of the Afterglow livery for the M80 while orange accent lines provide a pop of color.

m80_paint_black_darkgrey_lightgrey_camo.label: M80 Slate Camo Livery
m80_paint_black_darkgrey_lightgrey_camo.description: Customize your M80 ship with this gray camo livery.

m80_paint_red_black_blue.label: M80 Blaze Livery
m80_paint_red_black_blue.description: Featuring a brilliant red that produces a radiant shine, the Blaze livery transforms the M80's nose with an inky black, pale blue accents, and dark gray wings.

m80_paint_teal_black_green.label: M80 Tetra Livery
m80_paint_teal_black_green.description: Turn heads with the Tetra livery, featuring a shimmering teal, light green accents, and a sharp black nose.

m80_paint_white_white_blue.label: M80 Dynasty Livery
m80_paint_white_white_blue.description: Soar through the sky in style with the Dynasty livery, predominantly featuring a crisp white with soft accents of black and blue.

mcrk_s01_crus_intrepid.label: Intrepid Missile Rack
mcrk_s01_crus_intrepid.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Crusader Industries Size: 1 Missiles: 1xS1 Made to defend the Intrepid from unexpected trouble, Crusader developed this bespoke missile rack to carry and deploy an S1 missile.

misc_freelancer_dur_shop.label: MISC Freelancer DUR
misc_freelancer_dur_shop.description: Manufacturer: MISC Focus: Expedition The Freelancer DUR variant specializes in exploration. Sacrificing 25% cargo capacity of the standard Freelancer for an enhanced jump drive, a more advanced scanner, and an expanded fuel tank may seem like a bad call to some, but those who value discovery over profit will find it to be their ship of choice.

misc_freelancer_max_shop.label: MISC Freelancer MAX
misc_freelancer_max_shop.description: Manufacturer: MISC Focus: Medium Freight Freelancer variant with additional cargo capacity at the expense of weapons. The Freelancer MAX variant sacrifices weaponry for an increased cargo capacity making it ideal for equipment or raw materials transport.

misc_freelancer_shop.label: MISC Freelancer
misc_freelancer_shop.description: Manufacturer: MISC Focus: Medium Freight Freelancers are used as long haul merchant ships by major corporations, but they are just as frequently repurposed as dedicated exploration vessels by independent captains who want to operate on the fringes of the galaxy.

misc_fury_s02_double_rack.label: Mirai Fury MX 2xS1 Missile Rack
misc_fury_s02_double_rack.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Mirai Size: 2 Missiles: 2xS1 To make the Fury a threat despite its small size, Mirai developed this bespoke missile rack, which can carry and deploy two S1 missiles without undermining the ship's compact profile.

misc_fury_s02_single_rack.label: Mirai Fury 1xS2 Missile Rack
misc_fury_s02_single_rack.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Mirai Size: 2 Missiles: 1xS2 To make the Fury a threat despite its small size, Mirai developed this bespoke missile rack, which can carry and deploy one S2 missile without undermining the ship's compact profile.

misc_fury_s03_double_rack.label: Mirai Fury MX 2xS2 Missile Rack
misc_fury_s03_double_rack.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Mirai Size: 3 Missiles: 2xS2 To make the Fury a threat despite its small size, Mirai developed this bespoke missile rack, which can carry and deploy two S2 missiles without undermining the ship's compact profile.

misc_hull_b_mrck_s06_bespoke.label: Hull B Missile Rack
misc_hull_b_mrck_s06_bespoke.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: MISC Size: 6 Missiles: 8xS3 Bespoke missile rack for the MISC Hull B that fires eight S3 missiles.

misc_reliant_mako_wing_mount.label: Reliant Cernan Camera Package
misc_reliant_mako_wing_mount.description: Item Type: Camera Package Manufacturer: MISC Size: 4 Capture heart-pounding action and the splendor of the stars with the Cernan camera package. Standard to the Reliant Mako, this state-of-the-art image enhancement suite is popular among news crews across the universe.

misc_reliant_missile_cap.label: Reliant Missile Launcher Cap
misc_reliant_missile_cap.description: Item Type: Missile Launcher Cap Manufacturer: MISC Size: 5 Bespoke missile launcher cap used by the MISC Reliant.

misc_reliant_sen_wing_mount.label: Reliant Samos Sensor Suite
misc_reliant_sen_wing_mount.description: Item Type: Sensor Suite Manufacturer: MISC Size: 4 Standard on the Reliant Sen, the Samos sensor suite was designed to aid in the discovery and study of space phenomena.

misc_reliant_wing_dual_turret.label: Reliant Toshima Turret
misc_reliant_wing_dual_turret.description: Item Type: Turret (Reliant Exclusive) Manufacturer: MISC Size: 4 Specifically built to be used exclusively on the MISC Reliant, the Toshima turret system comes with a camera that can be remoted into while providing a wide range of motion for two Size-2 weapons.

misl_s01_cs_behr_spearhead_ground.label: Spearhead GVI-CS Missile
misl_s01_cs_behr_spearhead_ground.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 1 (Ground Vehicle Only) Behring specifically designed the Spearhead line of missiles for ground vehicles. The company's rigorous testing and renowned precision ensures that this missile will elevate your surface-to-air defensive capabilities.

misl_s01_cs_fski_spark.label: Spark I Missile
misl_s01_cs_fski_spark.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 1 Those that believe size doesn’t matter would do well to stay clear of the Firestorm Kinetics Spark. Using cross section targeting, this lightweight proximity missile packs a considerable punch.

misl_s01_em_behr_pioneer.label: Pioneer I Missile
misl_s01_em_behr_pioneer.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 1 Behring prides itself on dependability and the Pioneer is no exception. The updated Oracle EM tracking system has proven itself time and again in numerous consumer-testing reports against similarly classed proximity missiles.

misl_s01_em_behr_spearhead_ground.label: Spearhead GVI-EM Missile
misl_s01_em_behr_spearhead_ground.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 1 (Ground Vehicle Only) Behring specifically designed the Spearhead line of missiles for ground vehicles. The company's rigorous testing and renowned precision ensures that this missile will elevate your surface-to-air defensive capabilities.

misl_s01_em_thcn_taskforce.label: TaskForce I Missile
misl_s01_em_thcn_taskforce.description: Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 1 Venturing into the weapons market, Thermyte Concern have pooled their extensive knowledge of demolition explosives to create the TaskForce. A lightweight EM tracking strike missile with a top-in-class propulsion system provides an efficient mixture of speed and firepower to establish battlefield dominance.

misl_s01_ir_behr_marksman.label: Marksman I Missile
misl_s01_ir_behr_marksman.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 1 Behring's Marksman series of proximity missiles has earned as much of a reputation for its ability to track a wide range of heat signatures as it has for its area-effect proximity damage.

misl_s01_ir_behr_spearhead_ground.label: Spearhead GVI-IR Missile
misl_s01_ir_behr_spearhead_ground.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 1 (Ground Vehicle Only) Behring specifically designed the Spearhead line of missiles for ground vehicles. The company's rigorous testing and renowned precision ensures that this missile will elevate your surface-to-air defensive capabilities.

misl_s01_ir_vncl_arrow.label: 'Arrow' I Missile
misl_s01_ir_vncl_arrow.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 1 Commonly known by its military designation, the Arrow is a small infrared strike missile that has become a mainstay of the Vanduul armory.

misl_s02_cs_fski_agitator_ground.label: Agitator II-CSV Missile
misl_s02_cs_fski_agitator_ground.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 2 (Ground Vehicle Only) Give ground vehicles a better chance to strike back with the Agitator line of missiles. Firestorm Kinetics refined this S2 missile to elevate your ground game and deliver its deadly payload to speedy spacecraft.

misl_s02_cs_fski_tempest.label: Tempest II Missile
misl_s02_cs_fski_tempest.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 2 The Tempest was designed with nothing but annihilation in mind. Utilizing FireStorm Kinetics' targeting technology, this proximity missile locks onto a target's cross section to draw conflicts to a swift conclusion.

misl_s02_cs_thcn_strikeforce.label: StrikeForce II Missile
misl_s02_cs_thcn_strikeforce.description: Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 2 The StrikeForce is the latest culmination of Thermyte Concern's expansion into the missile industry, showcasing notable design and cross-section targeting improvements.

misl_s02_em_fski_agitator_ground.label: Agitator II-EMV Missile
misl_s02_em_fski_agitator_ground.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 2 (Ground Vehicle Only) Give ground vehicles a better chance to strike back with the Agitator line of missiles. Firestorm Kinetics refined this S2 missile to elevate your ground game and deliver its deadly payload to speedy spacecraft.

misl_s02_em_taln_dominator.label: Dominator II Missile
misl_s02_em_taln_dominator.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 2 Designed to track an opponent’s electromagnetic signature, the Dominator strike missile is a precision ordnance package designed to establish tactical battlefield dominance.

misl_s02_ir_fski_agitator_ground.label: Agitator II-IRV Missile
misl_s02_ir_fski_agitator_ground.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 2 (Ground Vehicle Only) Give ground vehicles a better chance to strike back with the Agitator line of missiles. Firestorm Kinetics refined this S2 missile to elevate your ground game and deliver its deadly payload to speedy spacecraft.

misl_s02_ir_fski_ignite.label: Ignite II Missile
misl_s02_ir_fski_ignite.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 2 The Ignite is Firestorm's premier brand of heat-seeking strike missile that is the definition of Fire and Forget. Simply let it fly and enjoy the show.

misl_s02_ir_novp_rattler.label: Rattler II Missile
misl_s02_ir_novp_rattler.description: Manufacturer: Nova Pyrotechnica Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 2 The Rattler is a cost-effective cluster missile that will no doubt appeal to a wide variety of pilots. When fired, the Rattler will track the opponent’s IR signature and create an opening barrage that weakens the armor or shields, leaving the target vulnerable to the full payload that follows.

misl_s02_ir_vncl_bullet.label: 'Bullet' II Missile
misl_s02_ir_vncl_bullet.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 2 Pilots in the Navy have developed a healthy respect for this infrared targeting Vanduul strike missile, formally designated Bullet.

misl_s03_cs_fski_arrester.label: Arrester III Missile
misl_s03_cs_fski_arrester.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 3 Using cross section targeting to hunt for its prey, the Firestorm Arrester proximity missile makes quick work of enemies caught in the crosshairs.

misl_s03_em_fski_thunderbolt.label: Thunderbolt III Missile
misl_s03_em_fski_thunderbolt.description: Manufacturer: Firestorm Kinetics Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 3 Thanks to the Firestorm Thunderbolt's agile frame and EM targeting system, this proximity missile is a solid choice for a wide variety of combat scenarios.

misl_s03_ir_novp_viper.label: Viper III Missile
misl_s03_ir_novp_viper.description: Manufacturer: Nova Pyrotechnica Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 3 Nova has worked hard to insure that their infrared tracking Viper strike missile lives up to its name by delivering agile and lethal attacks against hostile targets.

misl_s03_ir_vncl_chaos.label: 'Chaos' III Missile
misl_s03_ir_vncl_chaos.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 3 Naval flight instructors often include the heat seeking Chaos strike missile in Vanduul attack simulations citing that its speed and strength gives new recruits the proper respect for the enemy they will be facing.

misl_s04_cs_taln_assailant.label: Assailant IV Missile
misl_s04_cs_taln_assailant.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 4 The Assailant missile from Talon is a perfect weapon solution for precision strikes against motivated opponents.

misl_s04_em_taln_raptor.label: Raptor IV Missile
misl_s04_em_taln_raptor.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 4 Utilizing advanced electromagnetic tracking and balanced precision flight, the Talon Raptor strike missile is a fierce addition to any ship's arsenal.

misl_s04_ir_behr_pathfinder.label: Pathfinder IV Missile
misl_s04_ir_behr_pathfinder.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 4 The Pathfinder proximity missile has been a consistent member of Behring's already robust arsenal thanks to its tried and tested propulsion system and heat seeking guidance array.

misl_s04_ir_vncl_dragon.label: 'Dragon' IV Missile
misl_s04_ir_vncl_dragon.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 4 Designated the Dragon, this Vanduul infrared tracking strike missile has a fearful reputation earned the number of destroyed Naval ships attributed to its destructive power.

misl_s05_cs_taln_stalker.label: Stalker V Missile
misl_s05_cs_taln_stalker.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 5 With dedicated cross section tracking, the Talon Stalker has endured over the years as a precision strike torpedo with maximum stopping power.

misl_s05_em_taln_reaper.label: Reaper V Missile
misl_s05_em_taln_reaper.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 5 The Reaper strike torpedo features a favorable destructive yield-to-expense ratio and a proven Talon EM tracking suite.

misl_s05_em_taln_scimitar.label: Scimitar V Missile
misl_s05_em_taln_scimitar.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 5 The Scimitar missile tracks targets via their EM signature to deliver a devastating size five payload.

misl_s05_ir_taln_valkyrie.label: Valkyrie V Missile
misl_s05_ir_taln_valkyrie.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 5 Talon's torpedo design team pulled out all the stops for their latest Valkyrie strike torpedo by creating a multitiered thrust solution with state of the art infrared tracking capabilities.

misl_s07_ir_taln_hellion.label: Hellion VII Missile
misl_s07_ir_taln_hellion.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 7 Carrying a sizable payload and an advanced heat-seeking sensor suite, the Hellion missile from Talon can be effective against aggressors of all sizes.

misl_s09_cs_taln_argos.label: Argos IX Torpedo
misl_s09_cs_taln_argos.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 9 The Talon Argos strike torpedo features a classic, straightforward design that relies on exacting manufacturing standards and a classic cross section targeting system.

misl_s09_em_taln_seeker.label: Seeker IX Torpedo
misl_s09_em_taln_seeker.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 9 Talon's Seeker torpedo is a precision, EM-targeting torpedo capable of delivering a massive payload quickly and accurately.

misl_s09_ir_taln_typhoon.label: Typhoon IX Torpedo
misl_s09_ir_taln_typhoon.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 9 Designed by Talon, the Typhoon heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s10_cs_behr_executor.label: EX-T10-CS "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s10_cs_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 10 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T10 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s10_cs_taln_vanquisher.label: Vanquisher X-CS Torpedo
misl_s10_cs_taln_vanquisher.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 10 Designed by Talon, the Vanquisher heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s10_em_behr_executor.label: EX-T10-EM "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s10_em_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 10 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T10 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s10_em_taln_vanquisher.label: Vanquisher X-EM Torpedo
misl_s10_em_taln_vanquisher.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 10 Designed by Talon, the Vanquisher heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s10_ir_behr_executor.label: EX-T10-IR "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s10_ir_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 10 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T10 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s10_ir_behr_torpedo.label: VT-T10 "Veritas" Torpedo
misl_s10_ir_behr_torpedo.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 10 Bring Behring's expert engineering to bear with the VT-T10 "Veritas" Torpedo. Originally designed for the Polaris, this size 10 torpedo has earned a reputation as a dependable and incredibly powerful ordnance.

misl_s10_ir_taln_vanquisher.label: Vanquisher X-IR Torpedo
misl_s10_ir_taln_vanquisher.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 10 Designed by Talon, the Vanquisher heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s12_cs_behr_executor.label: EX-T12-CS "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s12_cs_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 12 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T12 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s12_cs_taln_calamity.label: Calamity XII-CS Torpedo
misl_s12_cs_taln_calamity.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Cross Section Size: 12 Designed by Talon, the Calamity heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s12_em_behr_executor.label: EX-T12-EM "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s12_em_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 12 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T12 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s12_em_taln_calamity.label: Calamity XII-EM Torpedo
misl_s12_em_taln_calamity.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Electromagnetic Size: 12 Designed by Talon, the Calamity heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

misl_s12_ir_behr_apex.label: PX-T12 "Apex" Torpedo
misl_s12_ir_behr_apex.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 12 Behring precision meets devastating stopping power with the PX-T12 "Apex". Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement. The PX-T12 "Apex" features a wide blast radius ideal for when the ultimate defense is an overwhelming offensive attack.

misl_s12_ir_behr_executor.label: EX-T12-IR "Executor" Torpedo
misl_s12_ir_behr_executor.description: Manufacturer: Behring Tracking Signal: Infared Size: 12 Behring prides itself on crafting ordnance that is as dependable as it is powerful and the EX-T12 "Executor" is no exception. Designed as an anti-ship and anti-installation weapon, Behring engineers worked tirelessly to ensure this torpedo was a bold strategic statement.

misl_s12_ir_taln_calamity.label: Calamity XII-IR Torpedo
misl_s12_ir_taln_calamity.description: Manufacturer: Talon Tracking Signal: Infrared Size: 12 Designed by Talon, the Calamity heat seeking strike torpedo delivers a heavy payload sure to serve as a deterrent from any further hostile actions.

modu_aegs_front_base.label: Retaliator Unladen Front Module
modu_aegs_front_base.description: This empty front module comes equipped by default on the Retaliator's base chassis.

modu_aegs_front_cargo.label: Retaliator Cargo Front Module
modu_aegs_front_cargo.description: Retaliator owners can equip their ship with this front module to allow for storage of an additional 36 SCU of cargo.

modu_aegs_front_torpedo_placeholder.label: Retaliator Ordnance Front Module
modu_aegs_front_torpedo_placeholder.description: Standard equipment for most UEE military Retaliators, this front module can carry 4x S9 torpedoes.

modu_aegs_rear_base.label: Retaliator Unladen Rear Module
modu_aegs_rear_base.description: This empty rear module comes equipped by default on the Retaliator's base chassis.

modu_aegs_rear_cargo.label: Retaliator Cargo Rear Module
modu_aegs_rear_cargo.description: Retaliator owners can equip their ship with this rear module to allow for storage of an additional 36 SCU of cargo.

modu_aegs_rear_torpedo_placeholder.label: Retaliator Ordnance Rear Module
modu_aegs_rear_torpedo_placeholder.description: Standard equipment for most UEE military Retaliators, this rear module can carry 2x S9 torpedoes.

modu_grey_shiv_cosmetic_nose_seta.label: Shiv "Slasher" Bodykit Front
modu_grey_shiv_cosmetic_nose_seta.description: It's your ship, so shouldn't it match your style? With the Slasher bodykit you can give your Grey's Market Shiv an aggressive aftermarket makeover.

modu_grey_shiv_cosmetic_nose_setb.label: Shiv "Barebones" Bodykit Front
modu_grey_shiv_cosmetic_nose_setb.description: It's your ship, so shouldn't it match your style? With the Barebones bodykit you can give your Grey's Market Shiv a lean and mean aftermarket makeover.

modu_grey_shiv_cosmetic_nose_setc.label: Shiv "Lunatic" Bodykit Front

modu_rsi_apollo_right_tier_3.label: Apollo Tier 3 Module Right

mole_paint_aphorite_purple.label: MOLE Aphorite Livery
mole_paint_aphorite_purple.description: Decorate your MOLE with the Aphorite livery, which gets its name and color from the precious purple gemstone prized for its multi-hued tones.

mole_paint_carbon.label: MOLE Carbon Livery
mole_paint_carbon.description: The Carbon livery offers the MOLE's revered mining ability with a distinctive all-black finish.

mole_paint_dolivine_green.label: MOLE Dolivine Livery
mole_paint_dolivine_green.description: Sharing the name with a gemstone prized for its beauty and industrial applications, the Dolivine livery blends shades of light green to give your MOLE a unique look.

mole_paint_greycat_yellow_grey_black.label: MOLE Greycat Livery
mole_paint_greycat_yellow_grey_black.description: Proudly display your appreciation for one of Sol's most celebrated manufacturers with the Greycat livery, featuring the chrome yellows and industrial grays associated with the company's logo.

mole_paint_hadanite_pink.label: MOLE Hadanite Livery
mole_paint_hadanite_pink.description: The Hadanite livery for your MOLE gives the ship a distinct pink hue that mirrors the look of the gemstone of the same name.

mole_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: MOLE Lovestruck Livery
mole_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your MOLE.

mole_paint_pyrotechnic_a_yellow_black_bl.label: MOLE Pyrotechnic Livery
mole_paint_pyrotechnic_a_yellow_black_bl.description: Commemorating the ambitious but ultimately ruinous mining company, the Pyrotechnic livery displays the lively yellows and cooling blues that represented the business while it was still operational.

mole_paint_shubin_bronze_black_brown.label: MOLE Shubin Livery
mole_paint_shubin_bronze_black_brown.description: Showcasing the bold colors of bronze alloy and deep obsidian, the Shubin livery embodies the spirit of the powerful planetary mining conglomerate.

mole_paint_talus.label: MOLE Talus Livery
mole_paint_talus.description: The MOLE Talus livery delivers a discreet gray look for the ship.

mole_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.label: Mole Keystone Livery
mole_paint_workersweek_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

mpuv_1t_paint_lightgrey_grey.label: MPUV-1T Storm Grey Livery
mpuv_1t_paint_lightgrey_grey.description: The Storm Grey is an all grey livery for the MPUV-1T. Its subtle style is an ideal choice for those not wanting to draw too much attention.

mpuv_1t_paint_red_black_metallic.label: MPUV-1T Firebrand Livery
mpuv_1t_paint_red_black_metallic.description: Vibrant red and black, the Firebrand livery brings a bold look to the MPUV-1T.

mpuv_1t_paint_yellow_black.label: MPUV-1T Sunlight Livery
mpuv_1t_paint_yellow_black.description: Announce your arrival with the Sunlight livery for the MPUV-1T. Featuring a bold yellow base color, the livery makes it easier to see the ship during recovery operations.

mpuv_paint_bis2951.label: MPUV 2951 Best in Show Livery
mpuv_paint_bis2951.description: Celebrate the MPUV being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2951 with this special blue and black livery.

mpuv_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: MPUV Nightbreak Livery
mpuv_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the MPUV with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

mpuv_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: MPUV Lovestruck Livery
mpuv_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your MPUV.

mrck_s05_misc_reliant.description: Item Type: Missile Launcher Manufacturer: MISC Size: 5 Missiles: 8xS2 Bespoke missile launcher built into the wings of the Tana to make this Reliant variant a deceptively deadly dogfighter.

mrck_s05_vncl_stinger_s02.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Esperia Size: 5 Missiles: 8xS2 This S5 missile rack can be equipped with eight S2 missiles.

mrck_s06_behr_octo_s03.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Behring Size: 6 Missiles: 8xS3 Behring’s MSD-683 "Marsden" is a complete ordnance storage and deployment system that can be mounted on any compatible size 6 hardpoint for the reliable and effective launch of eight S3 missiles.

mrck_s07_anvl_ballista.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace Size: 7 Missiles: 1xS7 Bespoke missile rack for the Anvil Ballista that fires an S7 missile capable of massive destruction.

mrck_s07_crus_starfighter.description: Item Type: Missile Launcher Manufacturer: Crusader Industries Size: 7 Missiles: 12xS3 Bespoke missile launcher built into the body of the Ares Star Fighter that can carry and deploy twelve S3 missiles.

mrck_s10_rsi_polaris_side_missilerack.label: RSI Polaris Missile Rack
mrck_s10_rsi_polaris_side_missilerack.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: RSI Size: 10 Missiles: 8xS3 This bespoke S10 mount for the Polaris holds a missile rack carrying eight S3 missiles.

mrck_s10_rsi_polaris_torpedorack.label: RSI Polaris Torpedo Rack
mrck_s10_rsi_polaris_torpedorack.description: Item Type: Torpedo Rack Manufacturer: RSI Size: 10 Torpedo: 7xS10 Bring the impressive firepower of the Polaris to bear with this bespoke torpedo rack holding seven massive S10 torpedoes.

mrck_s4_rsi_polaris_turret.label: RSI Polaris Remote Turret Missile Rack
mrck_s4_rsi_polaris_turret.description: Item Type: Missile Rack Manufacturer: RSI Size: 4 Missiles: 12xS2 A bespoke remote turret for the Polaris outfitted with a S4 mount holding a missile rack equipped with twelve S2 missiles.

mtc_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.label: MTC Headhunters Reaper Livery
mtc_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.description: The Headhunters Reaper livery lets you proudly proclaim your allegiance to the gang. It features the gang's name and highlights in red on a beige and grey paint scheme. Compatible with all Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_black_black_gold_solid.label: MXC Perdition Livery
mtc_paint_black_black_gold_solid.description: The Perdition livery envelops the MXC, and other Greycat M-Series vehicles, in dark black with gold highlights.

mtc_paint_black_grey_blue_solid.label: MTC Moonstone Livery
mtc_paint_black_grey_blue_solid.description: Crisp, metallic blue with grey and black highlights provide the Moonstone livery a spirited look for the MTC, which can also be applied to other Greycat M-Series vehicles.

mtc_paint_black_grey_red_camo.label: MTC Brushwood Camo Livery
mtc_paint_black_grey_red_camo.description: The Brushwood Camo livery for the MTC features a digital green and grey camo pattern with a red line cutting through each side. It's also compatible with other Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_brown_brown_red_camo_a.label: MXC Timberwolf Camo Livery
mtc_paint_brown_brown_red_camo_a.description: An ideal choice for cloaking the MXC in woodland environs, the Timberwolf Camo livery features a brown camo pattern and subtle red highlights. It's also compatible with other Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.label: MTC Citizens for Prosperity Liberation Livery
mtc_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.description: Be a beacon of hope by equipping the Citizens for Prosperity Liberation livery, which features the group's name and symbol atop a green, black, and grey paint job. Compatible with all Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_grey_black_red_solid.label: MTC Baracus Livery
mtc_paint_grey_black_red_solid.description: Bold red highlights add a bit of color and break up the black base paint of the MTC Baracus livery, which can also be applied to other Greycat M-Series vehicles.

mtc_paint_grey_black_yellow_solid.label: MTC Filament Livery
mtc_paint_grey_black_yellow_solid.description: Equip the Filament livery to make the MTC grey with black and yellow highlights. It's also compatible with other Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_grey_grey_red_camo_a.label: MXC Icefront Camo Livery
mtc_paint_grey_grey_red_camo_a.description: Disguise the silhouette of the MXC with the white and grey digital camo of the Icefront Camo livery, which is also compatible with other Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_grey_lightgrey_orange_solid.label: MTC Boreal Livery
mtc_paint_grey_lightgrey_orange_solid.description: The Boreal livery brings a mix of metallic light grey, grey, and orange highlights to the MTC. It's also compatible with other Greycat M-series vehicles.

mtc_paint_lightgrey_lightgrey_red_solid.label: MXC Cadet Livery
mtc_paint_lightgrey_lightgrey_red_solid.description: Make the MXC light grey with red highlights by equipping the Cadet livery, which can also be applied to other Greycat M-Series vehicles.

mxox_emp_device.label: TroMag Burst Generator
mxox_emp_device.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Burst Generator Size: 1 Damage Type: EMP The TroMag from MaxOx is a well-designed and reliable EMP-focused burst generator. Its popularity has risen over the years as pilots look for alternatives to Behring’s REP-8. The TroMag boasts a faster charge time than their main competitor but has a smaller effective radius, leaving pilots to decide whether they prefer speed or size.

mxox_neutroncannon_s1.label: NN-13 Cannon
mxox_neutroncannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Cannon Size: 1 MaxOx’s NN-13 neutron cannon offers a massive energy payload at the expense of speed and energy efficiency. One could argue the virtues of speed, rate of fire and distance over damage, but the argument becomes irrelevant if you only need to hit them once.

mxox_neutroncannon_s2.label: NN-14 Cannon
mxox_neutroncannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Cannon Size: 2 Building on the technology of the NN-13, MaxOx’s NN-14 offers a significant increase in power for the neutron autocannon to give each shot a devastating punch. With that increased damage however, comes a heavier draw on your power plant.

mxox_neutroncannon_s3.label: NN-15 Cannon
mxox_neutroncannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Cannon Size: 3 Building on the technology of the successful NN-series, MaxOx’s NN-15 offers a significant increase in power for the neutron autocannon to give each shot a devastating punch. With that increased damage however, comes a heavier draw on your power plant.

mxox_neutronrepeater_s1.label: NDB-26 Repeater
mxox_neutronrepeater_s1.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Repeater Size: 1 The NDB-26 uses a twin barrel system to fire neutron projectiles at a rapid rate. Devastating at close range, this neutron repeater still packs enough of a wallop at medium range to persuade any attackers to reconsider their assault.

mxox_neutronrepeater_s2.label: NDB-28 Repeater
mxox_neutronrepeater_s2.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Repeater Size: 2 Featuring a sleek, scientific design, the MaxOx NDB-28 is the next step in serious stopping power. Twin barrels overlap blasts for sustained neutron fire that remains effective at short to medium range.

mxox_neutronrepeater_s3.label: NDB-30 Repeater
mxox_neutronrepeater_s3.description: Manufacturer: MaxOx Item Type: Neutron Repeater Size: 3 Decades of design work went into perfecting the NDB line of neutron repeaters. The S3 NDB-30 rapidly fires powerful and precise neutron projectiles that will quickly deter anyone foolish enough to get too close.

m_rsi_pilot_flightsuit_jetpack.description: RSI's Intrepid has been a reliable name in flight suit components for decades. The focused nozzle system provides consistent thrust for precise control in zero gravity.

m_slaver_medium_jetpack.description: Designed to attach to most medium combat armor sets, the Fireshot is an EVA upgrade system that provides a little more thrust and control than usual. The understated components are designed to maintain your profile, so you don't sacrifice mobility or combat effectiveness.

mantis_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Mantis Stormbringer Livery
mantis_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Mantis livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black and electric blue to give the ship a cool new look.

mantis_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.label: Mantis Polar Camo Livery
mantis_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Mantis with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

mantis_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.label: Mantis Skullcrusher Livery
mantis_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Mantis, which features a massive skull decal across the top.

marine_heavy_armor.label: Achilles Heavy Armor
marine_heavy_armor.description: Designed to endure when others fail, Virgil's Achilles personal heavy armor features full body protection and multiple attachment points for added loadout customization, so that you can focus on standing your ground and defending what's important.

marine_heavy_armor_pu.label: Achilles Heavy Armor
marine_heavy_armor_pu.description: Designed to endure when others fail, Virgil's Achilles personal heavy armor features full body protection and multiple attachment points for added loadout customization, so that you can focus on standing your ground and defending what's important.

marine_light_armor.label: PAB-4 Light Armor
marine_light_armor.description: When speed and mobility are essential, CDS’s PAB-4 light personal armor balances durability while still providing for maximum maneuverability. Widely used amongst the Advocacy, security forces, and discerning civilians.

marine_light_armor_pu.label: PAB-4 Light Armor
marine_light_armor_pu.description: When speed and mobility are essential, CDS’s PAB-4 light personal armor balances durability while still providing for maximum maneuverability. Widely used amongst the Advocacy, security forces, and discerning civilians.

marine_medium_armor.label: MCA-mk2 Medium Armor
marine_medium_armor.description: Clark Defense Systems’ MCA-mk2 armor is a composite mesh of fibers reinforced with ablative plates, offering modest protection against both energy and kinetic weapons. The armor is a baseline solution for any number of situations the average Marine will encounter on a given day.

marine_medium_armor_pu.label: MCA-mk2 Medium Armor
marine_medium_armor_pu.description: Clark Defense Systems’ MCA-mk2 armor is a composite mesh of fibers reinforced with ablative plates, offering modest protection against both energy and kinetic weapons. The armor is a baseline solution for any number of situations the average Marine will encounter on a given day.

medal_1_damaged_a.label: UNE Unification War Medal (Damaged)
medal_1_damaged_a.description: A campaign medal from the United Nations of Earth (UNE) military that commemorates meritorious service during the Unification Wars (2380-2384). Considered to be in poor condition due to the faded ribbons colors and broken, corroded metal.

medal_1_damaged_b.label: UEE 6th Platoon Medal (Damaged)
medal_1_damaged_b.description: A medal given to members of the UEE Marines 6th Platoon for distinguished service. The esteemed 6th Platoon 'Phantoms' have received this honor on numerous occasions, including for operations during the Second Tevarin War, on the Vanduul front and for rescuing a UEE survey team taken hostage by the Outsiders on Leir III. The discoloration of the ribbon and broken, corroded metal have left this medal in damaged condition.

medal_1_damaged_c.label: Tevarin War Service Marker (Damaged)
medal_1_damaged_c.description: A service marker awarded by the United Planets of Earth (UPE) to all members of the military who served during the First Tevarin War. Though many were produced in their time, those numbers have dwindled significantly and collectors are eager to pick up any found. This marker is considered in poor condition due to the broken and corroded state of the metal that's obscured the etchings.

medal_1_damaged_d.label: Government Cartography Agency Medal (Damaged)
medal_1_damaged_d.description: This medal was awarded by United Planets of Earth (UPE) to members of the Government Cartography Agency who flew or supported missions involving the discovery, exploration, or scanning of new systems. It features a star woven with one large and three smaller interlocking circles that was the central symbol on the UPE flag. The tattered ribbon and broken and corroded metal has left this one in poor condition.

medal_1_pristine_a.label: UNE Unification War Medal (Pristine)
medal_1_pristine_a.description: A campaign medal from the United Nations of Earth (UNE) military that commemorates meritorious service during the Unification Wars (2380-2384). Considered to be in pristine condition thanks to the bright colors still present in the ribbon and well-preserved etching on the medal itself.

medal_1_pristine_b.label: UEE 6th Platoon Medal (Pristine)
medal_1_pristine_b.description: A medal given to members of the UEE Marines 6th Platoon for distinguished service. The esteemed 6th Platoon 'Phantoms' have received this honor on numerous occasions, including for operations during the Second Tevarin War, on the Vanduul front and for rescuing a UEE survey team taken hostage by the Outsiders on Leir III. The excellent appearance of the ribbon and etchings on the observe have left this medal in pristine condition.

medal_1_pristine_c.label: Tevarin War Service Marker (Pristine)
medal_1_pristine_c.description: A service marker awarded by the United Planets of Earth (UPE) to all members of the military who served during the First Tevarin War. Though many were produced in their time, those numbers have dwindled significantly and collectors are eager to pick up any found. Well-preserved despite its age, this marker is considered in pristine condition and features clean etchings and minimal wear.

medal_1_pristine_d.label: Government Cartography Agency Medal (Pristine)
medal_1_pristine_d.description: This medal was awarded by United Planets of Earth (UPE) to members of the Government Cartography Agency who flew or supported missions involving the discovery, exploration, or scanning of new systems. It features a star woven with one large and three smaller interlocking circles that was the central symbol on the UPE flag. The exquisite state of the ribbon and metal has left this one in pristine condition.

medal_1_worn_a.label: UNE Unification War Medal (Worn)
medal_1_worn_a.description: A campaign medal from the United Nations of Earth (UNE) military that commemorates meritorious service during the Unification Wars (2380-2384). Considered to be in worn condition due to the faded ribbons colors and corroded metal.

medal_1_worn_b.label: UEE 6th Platoon Medal (Worn)
medal_1_worn_b.description: A medal given to members of the UEE Marines 6th Platoon for distinguished service. The esteemed 6th Platoon 'Phantoms' have received this honor on numerous occasions, including for operations during the Second Tevarin War, on the Vanduul front and for rescuing a UEE survey team taken hostage by the Outsiders on Leir III. The discoloration of the ribbon and corroded metal have left this medal in worn condition.

medal_1_worn_c.label: Tevarin War Service Marker (Worn)
medal_1_worn_c.description: A service marker awarded by the United Planets of Earth (UPE) to all members of the military who served during the First Tevarin War. Though many were produced in their time, those numbers have dwindled significantly and collectors are eager to pick up any found. This marker is considered in worn condition due to the corroded state of the metal and etchings.

medal_1_worn_d.label: Government Cartography Agency Medal (Worn)
medal_1_worn_d.description: This medal was awarded by United Planets of Earth (UPE) to members of the Government Cartography Agency who flew or supported missions involving the discovery, exploration, or scanning of new systems. It features a star woven with one large and three smaller interlocking circles that was the central symbol on the UPE flag. The aged ribbon and corroded metal has left this one in worn condition.

medical_fluid_storage_destructible.label: Pancea MedGel Canister
medical_fluid_storage_destructible.description: This Pancea canister from CureLife is used to refill the MedGel supply of medical beds.

merlin_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: P-52 Merlin Deck the Hull Livery
merlin_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

merlin_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: P-52 Merlin IceBreak Livery
merlin_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your P-52 Merlin with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

merlin_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.label: P-Series Fortuna Livery
merlin_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme for the Archimedes and Merlin is primarily green with gray accents.

merlin_paint_yellow_blue_white.label: P-Series Murray Cup Livery
merlin_paint_yellow_blue_white.description: Slipstream into pole position with this sporty racing tint. Featuring blue emboldened by stylish yellow chevrons, this Murray Cup themed livery highlights the sleek and piercing nature of the P-52 Merlin and P-72 Archimedes ships.

meteor_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Meteor Nightbreak Livery
meteor_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Meteor with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

meteor_paint_black_red_red.label: Meteor Bolide Livery
meteor_paint_black_red_red.description: Make the Meteor a striking metallic red and black with the Bolide livery.

meteor_paint_black_teal_black.label: Meteor Skylark Livery
meteor_paint_black_teal_black.description: The Skylark livery for the Meteor is primarily black and teal.

meteor_paint_blue_black_red_metal.label: Meteor Disco Livery
meteor_paint_blue_black_red_metal.description: Equip the ship livery used by ace pilot Disco in the classic children's cartoon Rory Nova. While it turns the Meteor metallic dark blue, black, and red, whether you turn into the 'dynamic, instinctive spacecraft operator' that inspired the livery's name is up to you.

meteor_paint_vip_black_black_gold.label: Meteor Shimmer Livery
meteor_paint_vip_black_black_gold.description: The eye-catching Shimmer livery brings a beautiful luster to the Meteor with a paint that shifts between gold and dark blue depending on the lighting and viewing angle.

mobiglas_paint_shared.label: mobiGlas Original Casing
mobiglas_paint_shared.description: Apply your own style to your mobiGlas with this custom paint casing.

moth_paint_blue_grey_green.description: The colorful Tide Pool livery makes the MOTH blue with grey and green highlights.

moth_paint_grey_grey_grey.label: MOTH Rockwell Livery
moth_paint_grey_grey_grey.description: Maintain a low profile with the Rockwell livery, which covers the MOTH in subtle shades of grey.

moth_paint_orange_grey_black.label: MOTH Sundial Livery
moth_paint_orange_grey_black.description: With an orange front and black back section, the Sundial livery divides the MOTH in two.

moth_paint_white_grey_orange.label: MOTH Dolomite Livery

moth_paint_pink_grey_black_iridescent.label: MOTH Lovestruck Livery
moth_paint_pink_grey_black_iridescent.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish iridescent pink and black look for your MOTH.

mount_gimbal_s1.label: VariPuck S1 Gimbal Mount
mount_gimbal_s1.description: Manufacturer: Flashfire Systems Item Type: Weapon Mount Size: 1 The VariPuck fits between your weapon and the ship hardpoint to transform a fixed weapon mount into a gimballed mount, allowing the pilot to independently aim their weapon’s fire. This special VariPuck will accept any weapon the same size as the hardpoint it is mounting to.

mule_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Mule livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

mustang_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Mustang with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

mustang_paint_luminalia_2021_white_blue.description: Equip your Mustang with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

mustang_paint_omega.description: Standard livery for the C.O. Mustang Omega.

mustang_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.label: Mustang Fortuna Livery
mustang_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with gray accents.

mustang_paint_yellow_blue_white.label: Mustang Murray Cup Livery
mustang_paint_yellow_blue_white.description: With a deep blue base and a bright yellow finish with chevron accents, this lively Murray Cup livery shows spectators that you've got a true competitor's spirit.

nvy_bdu_trousers_01.label: Combat Readiness Uniform Trousers
nvy_bdu_trousers_01.description: Made to military specification, the Combat Readiness Uniform pants are made from tough nylon synthetics to make them durable and comfortable enough for any kind of field operations. They also feature several multi-stitched pouches to keep small items secure, but accessible.

nomad_paint_2951redfestival_red_gold.label: Nomad 2951 Auspicious Red Ram Livery

nomad_paint_amber_orange_white.label: Nomad Sandstone Livery
nomad_paint_amber_orange_white.description: Make your Nomad stick out among the stars with the Sandstone livery featuring a metallic orange finish with black and white highlights.

nomad_paint_evergreen_green_yellow.label: Nomad Conifer Livery
nomad_paint_evergreen_green_yellow.description: Complete deliveries in style with the Conifer livery that's primarily green with yellow highlights.

nomad_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.label: Nomad Polar Camo Livery
nomad_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Nomad with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

nomad_paint_jackal_black_red.label: Nomad Jackal Livery
nomad_paint_jackal_black_red.description: Discreetly roam the stars with this custom Nomad livery featuring a jet black paint scheme with red accents.

nomad_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Nomad Lovestruck Livery
nomad_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Nomad.

nomad_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Nomad Deck the Hull Livery
nomad_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

nomad_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Nomad with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.
