nomad_paint_overdrive_white_black_pink.description: Upgrade your Nomad with the Cherry Blossom livery featuring a bold black and white styling with pink highlights.

nomad_paint_unity2952_metal_teal_grey.label: Nomad Foundation Fest Livery
nomad_paint_unity2952_metal_teal_grey.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

nova_paint_badlands.label: Nova Badlands Livery
nova_paint_badlands.description: Featuring a tan paint scheme ideal for desert environments, the Nova Badlands livery offers a devastating combination of weaponry to eliminate threats on the ground and in the air.

nova_paint_emberstorm.label: Nova Ember Storm Livery
nova_paint_emberstorm.description: Featuring a tan, red and black camo paint scheme ideal for desert environments, the Nova Ember Storm livery offers a devastating combination of weaponry to eliminate threats on the ground and in the air.

nova_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Nova Nightbreak Livery
nova_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly traverse under the night sky in the Nova with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

nova_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Nova Timberline Livery
nova_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Nova with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

nova_paint_gunmetal.label: Nova Gunmetal Livery
nova_paint_gunmetal.description: Featuring a metallic silver paint scheme, the Nova Gunmetal livery offers a devastating combination of weaponry to eliminate threats on the ground and in the air.

nova_paint_shiftingsands.label: Nova Shifting Sands Livery
nova_paint_shiftingsands.description: Featuring a tan and white paint scheme for desert environments, the Nova Shifting Sands livery offers a devastating combination of weaponry to eliminate threats on the ground and in the air.

nova_paint_snowblind.label: Nova Snowblind Livery
nova_paint_snowblind.description: Featuring a grey, black and white camo paint scheme ideal for arctic environments, the Nova Snowblind livery offers a devastating combination of weaponry to eliminate threats on the ground and in the air.

nox_paint_alienweek_green_red.label: Nox Ocellus Livery
nox_paint_alienweek_green_red.description: The Ocellus livery adapts and updates the iconic colors and design used on some Tevarin ships to bring a striking new look to the Nox. The livery gives the top of the fuselage a prominent red ridge while shimmering green covers the rest of the ship. Thick grey lines swoop through both colors to provide a unique geometric element.

nox_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_purp.label: Nox Wanderer Livery
nox_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_purp.description: The Wanderer livery features crisscrossing purple and grey lines over a platinum foundation. Inspired by the sacred Xi'an gardens of R.aip?uang, famous for its trails that wander in surprising ways and encourage a focus on the journey instead of the destination.

nox_paint_harmony.label: Nox Harmony Livery
nox_paint_harmony.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with alien species with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Aopoa Nox owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

nox_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tigerstr.label: Nox Whirlwind Livery
nox_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tigerstr.description: The Whirlwind livery mixes various shades of blue in a memorable animal stripe pattern to give the Nox a daring look.

nox_paint_racing_blue_white.label: Nox Slipstream Livery
nox_paint_racing_blue_white.description: The Slipstream livery will have your Nox ready and raring to race with this sleek blue and white paint scheme.

nox_paint_racing_purple_white.label: Nox Turbocharged Livery
nox_paint_racing_purple_white.description: The Turbocharged is a distinct, purple racing livery for the Nox that will make you stand out from the rest of the field.

nox_paint_racing_red_silver.label: Nox Overdrive Livery
nox_paint_racing_red_silver.description: Blast past other racers in your Nox with the Overdrive livery, which features a stylish blend red and silver coloring.

nox_paint_racing_white_pink_blue.label: Nox Star Kitten Livery
nox_paint_racing_white_pink_blue.description: Embody Sally the Star Kitten's racing spirit with this custom Nox livery. Combining the bright pink, vibrant blue, and crisp white of the beloved cartoon mascot, this livery brings a playfulness your competitors are sure to enjoy.

nox_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_strip.label: Nox Finish Line Livery
nox_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_strip.description: Give the Nox a classic racing design with the Finish Line livery. It features a yellow stripe across the front, a white one through the middle, and a grey one on the back.

nox_paint_thli_silver_black.label: Nox Thli Livery
nox_paint_thli_silver_black.description: Speed and style combine with the Nox Thli livery that artfully blends silver and black across this open-canopy racer.

okbv_fp_esci_s2_q1.label: OKB Voskhod Energia IV
okbv_fp_esci_s2_q1.description: OKB Voskhod has been in the thruster game for decades and recently unveiled the Energia IV at the thruster manufacturer trade show in Prime. Benchmarks show that this thruster mostly lives up to the marketing hype from the show floor: it has good fuel efficiency, and the extra shielding OKB Voskhod has added results in minimal heat signature. It lags a bit in the performance tests but the manufacturer maintains it not a marketed as a solution where maximum thrust is required.

okbv_silentiv_s3_q1.label: OKB Voskhod Silent IV Advanced (TR4)
okbv_silentiv_s3_q1.description: The Silent IV Advanced from OKB Voskhod is a field emission ion engine optimized to provide a decreased heat signature, making the ship more difficult to track via conventional scans.

orig_300i_shop.label: Origin Jumpworks 300i
orig_300i_shop.description: Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks Focus: Touring If you're going to travel the stars... why not do it in style? The 300i is Origin Jumpworks' premiere luxury spacecraft. It is a sleek, silver killer that sends as much of a message with its silhouette as it does with its particle cannons.

orig_315p_shop.label: Origin Jumpworks 315p
orig_315p_shop.description: Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks Focus: Pathfinder Exploration is man's highest calling. Prepare to chart distant horizons with man's most sophisticated piece of technology, the Origin 315p. Featuring a more robust power plant and a custom scanning package, exclusively designed by Chimera Communications.

orig_325a_shop.label: Origin Jumpworks 325a
orig_325a_shop.description: Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks Focus: Interdiction Just because it's a rough galaxy doesn't mean you need to sacrifice your comfort: the 325a can come out on top in any dogfight. The 325a features an advanced weapon payload as well as a custom targeting system designed especially for the 325a by WillsOp.

orig_350r_shop.label: Origin Jumpworks 350r
orig_350r_shop.description: Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks Focus: Racing The combination of a Gangleri BP 707 Standard powerplant with a 300i fuselage re-engineered to accommodate twin Hammer Propulsion HM 4.3 thrusters makes the 350r the fastest personal craft you'll ever call your own.

orig_m50_shop.label: Origin Jumpworks M50 Interceptor
orig_m50_shop.description: Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks Focus: Racing If you want to get from point A to point B as quickly as possible and with as much style as possible then Origin's M50 is for you. Featuring supercharged engines that counter a tiny weapons loadout, the M50 is a ship for going FAST.

ori_game_chess_1_a.label: Origin White Bishop
ori_game_chess_1_a.description: Made exclusively for Origin Jumpworks and included with the 890 Jump, this white chess piece is a modern version of a classic set.

ori_game_chess_1_b.label: Origin White Bishop
ori_game_chess_1_b.description: Made exclusively for Origin Jumpworks and included with the 890 Jump, this black chess piece is a modern version of a classic set.

outlaw_heavy_armor.label: Slugger Heavy Armor
outlaw_heavy_armor.description: Be an immovable force with Kastak Arm's Slugger heavy armor. Its resilient armor plating and variety of attachment points are designed to withstand attacks long enough to give you the opportunity to react and respond to combat on your own terms.

outlaw_heavy_armor_pu.label: Slugger Heavy Armor
outlaw_heavy_armor_pu.description: Be an immovable force with Kastak Arm's Slugger heavy armor. Its resilient armor plating and variety of attachment points are designed to withstand attacks long enough to give you the opportunity to react and respond to combat on your own terms.

outlaw_light_armor.label: Sparrer Light Armor
outlaw_light_armor.description: When evasion is essential, Kastak Arm's Sparrer armor won't drag you down. Its patented lightweight weave is sufficiently strong to maintain the suit's integrity long enough for you to get where you need to go.

outlaw_light_armor_pu.label: Sparrer Light Armor
outlaw_light_armor_pu.description: When evasion is essential, Kastak Arm's Sparrer armor won't drag you down. Its patented lightweight weave is sufficiently strong to maintain the suit's integrity long enough for you to get where you need to go.

outlaw_medium_armor.label: Brawler Medium Armor
outlaw_medium_armor.description: The ideal balance of security and speed, Kastak Arm's Brawler armor is graded to be durable while also retaining combat flexibility, ensuring you can adapt your tactics to the situation at hand.

outlaw_medium_armor_pu.label: Brawler Medium Armor
outlaw_medium_armor_pu.description: The ideal balance of security and speed, Kastak Arm's Brawler armor is graded to be durable while also retaining combat flexibility, ensuring you can adapt your tactics to the situation at hand.

outlaw_medium_armor_pu_lite.label: Brawler Medium Armor
outlaw_medium_armor_pu_lite.description: The ideal balance of security and speed, Kastak Arm's Brawler armor is graded to be durable while also retaining combat flexibility, ensuring you can adapt your tactics to the situation at hand.

powr_acom_s01_starheart.label: StarHeart
powr_acom_s01_starheart.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition Four generations of racing knowledge and know-how are behind ACOM’s StarHeart power plant. Known for its rapid power distribution, the StarHeart has become a favorite among speedsters.

powr_acom_s01_sunflare.label: Sunflare
powr_acom_s01_sunflare.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition Harness the power of a star with this high performance power plant from ACOM. Ideal for racers and those who seek speed.

powr_acom_s02_luxcore_scitem.label: LuxCore
powr_acom_s02_luxcore_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Competition Famous for performance that laps the competition, the LuxCore provides all the speed your ship needs. You'll leave other medium power plants in the dust with this first-class component from the racing experts at ACOM.

powr_acom_s02_starburn_scitem.label: StarBurn
powr_acom_s02_starburn_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Competition The StarBurn power plant is another excellent addition to the ACOM line of components. This medium-sized component delivers solid performance without overheating, so you won't risk burning your hands while making important repairs on the fly.

powr_aegs_s01_charger.label: Charger
powr_aegs_s01_charger.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military The Aegis Charger has powered military fighters for generations. Tried and tested in the most demanding of situations, the Charger can handle sudden or sustained power draws with ease.

powr_aegs_s01_fierellcascade.label: Fierell Cascade
powr_aegs_s01_fierellcascade.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Rely on Aegis’ expertise to power your ship. The Fierell Cascade is a military-grade power plant that prioritizes performance over everything else.

powr_aegs_s01_regulus.label: Regulus
powr_aegs_s01_regulus.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military The Regulus is the power plant you can count on when everyone is counting on you. Made to exceed exacting military standards, Aegis’ design team has made sure that you have the extra power you need, when you need it most.

powr_aegs_s02_maelstrom.label: Maelstrom
powr_aegs_s02_maelstrom.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military This military-grade component has been put through the paces by the UEE Navy, so you know the Maelstrom can handle the havoc of battle.

powr_aegs_s02_quadracellmt_scitem.label: QuadraCell MT
powr_aegs_s02_quadracellmt_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military An Aegis intern crafted the initial design for the QuadraCell MT power plant, inspiring a phrase often heard around their office, “Fresh eyes bring fresh innovation.” This military-grade component still outperforms any other medium power plant they make.

powr_aegs_s02_vortex.label: Vortex
powr_aegs_s02_vortex.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Military Turn the tide of battle with the Aegis Vortex. Counted on by the UEE Navy, this power plant can be found on ships defending every corner of the universe.

powr_aegs_s03_drassik_scitem.label: Drassik
powr_aegs_s03_drassik_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Military The Drassik is a military-grade power plant from Aegis Dynamics. The large component is known for providing decent durability but unremarkable performance.

powr_aegs_s03_quadracellmx_scitem.label: QuadraCell MX
powr_aegs_s03_quadracellmx_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Aegis engineers set out to create a power plant that could deliver the performance and durability needed during prolonged engagements. The QuadraCell MX was the result. This large power plant received years of strenuous field testing before finally becoming available to the public.

powr_amrs_s01_hypergen.label: HyperGen
powr_amrs_s01_hypergen.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military The HyperGen power plant is popular among both civilians and the military for its high quality. As a bonus, the manufacture, Amon & Reese, is famous for its stellar customer service.

powr_amrs_s01_js300_scitem.label: JS-300
powr_amrs_s01_js300_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military This high-end, military-grade component from A&R delivers excellent performance and solid durability at the expense of slightly increased emission levels. However with the JS-300 pedigree, it’s easy to see why this small power plant has many fans in the military.

powr_amrs_s01_overdrive.label: OverDrive
powr_amrs_s01_overdrive.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military Amon & Reese knows from years of experience just how hard the military can push their ships. Their OverDrive power plant was designed from the ground up to not only handle those tough conditions with less overheating, but to provide the same dependability and power to civilians as well.

powr_amrs_s02_exogen.label: ExoGen
powr_amrs_s02_exogen.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Military Simple and direct, the ExoGen generates power in traditional A&R style: no fuss, just solid craftsmanship.

powr_amrs_s02_js400_scitem.label: JS-400
powr_amrs_s02_js400_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military As the UEE’s oldest energy weapon manufacturer, A&R expanded into power plants to interface more efficiently with their weapons. The JS-400 was their first attempt at a medium power plant, and it’s a testament to the quality of this military-grade component that it’s still around.

powr_amrs_s02_ultraflux_scitem.label: UltraFlux
powr_amrs_s02_ultraflux_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Initially designed under a military contract, A&R's UltraFlux medium power plant decimated the required performance milestones and enjoyed a storied career as a dependable military asset. When the military’s exclusive rights to this high quality component lapsed, A&R eagerly released this to the commercial market.

powr_amrs_s03_js500_scitem.label: JS-500
powr_amrs_s03_js500_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military The JS-500 is A&R’s best performing large power plant. This military-grade component receives consistent praise from users both in the military and civilian market.

powr_amrs_s03_superdrive.label: SuperDrive
powr_amrs_s03_superdrive.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military A&R’s award winning customer service sets the SuperDrive apart from other military power plants in its class. Consumers love that they can depend on both the component and company when the going gets tough.

powr_just_s00_jennet_scitem.label: Jennet
powr_just_s00_jennet_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk’s foray into vehicle power plants begins with the Jennet. While not as highly-rated as similar components, the company’s reputation for dependability and ease of maintenance still make it a favorite in some circles.

powr_just_s00_steadfast.label: Steadfast
powr_just_s00_steadfast.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Industrial When the road ahead is long, Juno Starwerk’s Steadfast power plant is there to see you and your vehicle through to the end by providing on-demand power and durability.

powr_just_s01_endurance.label: Endurance
powr_just_s01_endurance.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk’s Endurance has been in service since the 26th century. This industrial strength, utilitarian power plant is a favorite of mechanics since spare parts are easily acquired.

powr_just_s01_roughneck.label: Roughneck
powr_just_s01_roughneck.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial For its class, the Roughneck power plant from Juno Starwerk is an ideal component for haulers looking for maximum performance.

powr_just_s02_genoa_scitem.label: Genoa
powr_just_s02_genoa_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Industrial According to Juno Starwerk, good industrial design is meant to go unnoticed, yet it’s hard not to marvel at the Genoa medium power plant, as its outstanding performance and noted durability make it a first-rate component.

powr_just_s02_trommel.label: Trommel
powr_just_s02_trommel.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Industrial Utilitarian to its core, the Trommel’s lack of frills has made the power plant a favorite of mechanics around the Empire.

powr_just_s03_endurance.label: Endurance
powr_just_s03_endurance.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk’s Endurance has been in service since the 26th century. This industrial strength, utilitarian power plant is a favorite of mechanics since spare parts are easily acquired.

powr_just_s03_ginzel.label: Ginzel
powr_just_s03_ginzel.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Industrial The unique name for this stalwart industrial power plant was inspired by the nickname of a Juno Starwerk junior engineer who helped design it.

powr_lplt_s00_durajet_scitem.label: DuraJet
powr_lplt_s00_durajet_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Civilian The DuraJet is Lightning Power Ltd.’s base vehicle power plant. Not only does its design catch the eye, but its reliable construction and affordable price point make it a prime option to keep power flowing through your vehicle.

powr_lplt_s00_radix.label: Radix
powr_lplt_s00_radix.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

powr_lplt_s01_ionburst.label: IonBurst
powr_lplt_s01_ionburst.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian The IonBurst is touted by Lightning Power as being a best-in-class power plant, providing unequaled performance for the price.

powr_lplt_s01_powerbolt.label: PowerBolt
powr_lplt_s01_powerbolt.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The PowerBolt provides all the power and performance you need for your journey through the stars. You can trust Lightning Power to get you there.

powr_lplt_s01_zapjet.label: ZapJet
powr_lplt_s01_zapjet.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Lightning Power ZapJet is an ideal streamlined package perfect for anybody who wants a straightforward no-fuss power solution.

powr_lplt_s02_fullforce_scitem.label: FullForce
powr_lplt_s02_fullforce_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian This power plant from Lightning Power Ltd. delivers balanced performance, durability and emissions, providing consumers with a “FullForce” of options as to how to use it.

powr_lplt_s02_ionsurge_scitem.label: IonSurge
powr_lplt_s02_ionsurge_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lighting Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Lightning Power Ltd.’s line of medium power plants reach their pinnacle with the IonSurge. Design innovation and higher quality materials push this component's performance higher than others in its class.

powr_lplt_s03_fullforcepro.label: FullForce Pro
powr_lplt_s03_fullforcepro.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Even though Lightning Power Ltd has updated the look of the FullForce Pro power plant, it still delivers that same balanced performance people have come to expect.

powr_lplt_s03_sparkjetpro_scitem.label: SparkJet Pro
powr_lplt_s03_sparkjetpro_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lighting Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian Looking to upgrade your power plant on a budget? Lightning Power Ltd's SparkJet Pro gives you reliability across the board, making it a solid choice to get you out and flying.

powr_orig_s04_890j_scitem.label: Stellate
powr_orig_s04_890j_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Civilian Sakura Sun worked with Origin to fine tune the Stellate into the perfect power plant for the 890 Jump, providing the power and performance necessary for a ship of such grand design.

powr_sasu_s01_lightblossom.label: LightBlossom
powr_sasu_s01_lightblossom.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Featuring stylish design and strong performance, the LightBlossom is a worthy addition to Sakura Sun’s line-up, continuing the reputation the conglomerate has for making everything and making it well.

powr_sasu_s01_whiterose_scitem.label: WhiteRose
powr_sasu_s01_whiterose_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Civilian Pull incredible performance from the WhiteRose. This small power plant from Sakura Sun shines when generating the kind of power that leaves the other small power plants in its wake.

powr_sasu_s02_daybreak.label: DayBreak
powr_sasu_s02_daybreak.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Sakura Sun knows exactly what you need. The DayBreak is a straightforward power plant that provides parity to its performance, durability, and stealth stats.

powr_sasu_s02_lotus_scitem.label: Lotus
powr_sasu_s02_lotus_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian When it comes to medium sized, civilian power plants Whitley’s Guide continues to rate the Lotus highly. Few can touch this Sakura Sun component when it comes to both performance and durability.

powr_sasu_s03_tigerlilly_scitem.label: TigerLilly
powr_sasu_s03_tigerlilly_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian The Sakura Sun engineer leading the design for this large power plant named it after his cat, claiming she was the only family member awake when he got home from work every night. The component does its namesake justice by receiving rave reviews for its reliability.

powr_tydt_s01_deltamax.label: DeltaMax
powr_tydt_s01_deltamax.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth Expert engineering made significant breakthroughs possible when designing the DeltaMax, resulting in a stealth signature even lower than originally estimated by the team at Tyler Design and Tech.

powr_tydt_s01_soniclite.label: SonicLite
powr_tydt_s01_soniclite.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Stealth Constructed from the ground up to minimize your heat signature, Tyler Design’s SonicLite power plant has gained a following among pilots who appreciate a subtler approach.

powr_tydt_s02_eclipse_scitem.label: Eclipse
powr_tydt_s02_eclipse_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Stealth Competing medium power plants struggle to match the heat and signature reduction of the Eclipse. Tyler Design & Tech’s mastery of stealth tech makes this component a must own by those who prefer to go unnoticed.

powr_tydt_s02_gammamax_scitem.label: GammaMax
powr_tydt_s02_gammamax_scitem.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Stealth A complete overhaul of the materials in the heatsinks dramatically decreased the emission level of the GammaMax. Few medium power plants run as quiet at the same price point of this one from Tyler Design & Tech.

powr_vncl_s01_blade.label: Vanduul Blade Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_blade.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Blade.

powr_vncl_s01_cleaver.label: Vanduul Cleaver Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_cleaver.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Cleaver.

powr_vncl_s01_pulse.label: Vanduul Pulse Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_pulse.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Pulse.

powr_vncl_s01_scythe.label: Vanduul Scythe Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_scythe.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Scythe.

powr_vncl_s01_stinger.label: Vanduul Stinger Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_stinger.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Stinger.

powr_vncl_s01_void.label: Vanduul Void Powerplant
powr_vncl_s01_void.description: Standard power plant for the Vanduul Void.

powr_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Mauler Power Plant
powr_vncl_s04_mauler.description: The Vanduul Mauler's built-in Power Plant generates enough energy for the operation of essential systems, even in heavy combat.

prar_distortionscattergun_s3.label: Reformation Distortion Scattergun
prar_distortionscattergun_s3.description: Manufacturer: Preacher Armaments Item Type: Distortion Scattergun Size: 3 Turn hostiles into non-combatants with the Reformation. This size three scattergun from Preacher Armaments delivers devastating distortion damage at a close range.

prar_distortionscattergun_s4.label: Salvation Distortion Scattergun
prar_distortionscattergun_s4.description: Manufacturer: Preacher Armaments Item Type: Distortion Scattergun Size: 4 Disable an enemy's ship without damaging it with the Salvation scattergun from Preacher Armaments. With its wide spread and low rate of fire this size four scattergun is most potent at close range.

prar_distortionscattergun_s5.label: Absolution Distortion Scattergun
prar_distortionscattergun_s5.description: Manufacturer: Preacher Armaments Item Type: Distortion Scattergun Size: 5 Deliver high distortion damage in close quarters with Preacher Armaments' Absolution scattergun. This size five weapon is an ideal loadout option for those interested in capturing or boarding their target.

prar_distortionscattergun_s6.label: Condemnation Distortion Scattergun
prar_distortionscattergun_s6.description: Manufacturer: Preacher Armaments Item Type: Distortion Scattergun Size: 6 The Condemnation is a massive size six scattergun from Preacher Armaments. Its high distortion damage incapacitates the electronics, though its wide spreads makes it less effective as the target gets farther away.

paint_300_series_metallic_blue.label: 300 Series Ultramarine Paint
paint_300_series_metallic_blue.description: Ultramarine paint job for the Origin 300 Series.

paint_300_series_metallic_grey.label: 300 Series Obsidian Paint
paint_300_series_metallic_grey.description: Obsidian?paint job for the Origin 300 Series.

paint_300_series_metallic_silver.label: 300 Series Sterling Paint
paint_300_series_metallic_silver.description: Sterling?paint job for the Origin 300 Series.

paint_315p_white_blue.label: 300 Series White Lightning Paint

paint_325a_base.description: Standard paint job for the Origin 325a.

paint_325a_black_grey.label: 300 Series Evening Onyx Paint

paint_350r_base.description: Standard paint job for the Origin 350r.

paint_350r_racing_black_blue.label: 300 Series Black & Royal Paint
paint_350r_racing_black_blue.description: Black & Royal paint job for the Origin 350r.

paint_350r_racing_red.label: 300 Series Solar Flare Paint
paint_350r_racing_red.description: Solar Flare paint job for the Origin 350r.

paint_350r_racing_yellow.label: 300 Series Amber Wave Paint
paint_350r_racing_yellow.description: Amber Wave paint job for the Origin 350r.

paint_aurora_cl.label: Aurora Mk I CL Livery
paint_aurora_cl.description: Standard livery for the RSI Aurora Mk I CL.

paint_aurora_es.label: Aurora Mk I ES Livery
paint_aurora_es.description: Standard livery for the RSI Aurora Mk I ES.

paint_aurora_ln.label: Aurora Mk I LN Livery
paint_aurora_ln.description: Standard livery for the RSI Aurora Mk I LN.

paint_aurora_lx.label: Aurora Mk I LX Livery
paint_aurora_lx.description: Standard livery for the RSI Aurora Mk I LX.

paint_aurora_mr.label: Aurora Mk I MR Livery
paint_aurora_mr.description: Standard livery for the RSI Aurora Mk I MR.

paladin_paint_black_black_black.label: Paladin Shadowfall Livery
paladin_paint_black_black_black.description: Slip under the radar using this foreboding collection of blacks and greys, featured in the Shadowfall livery.

paladin_paint_blue_black_black.label: Paladin Downstream Livery
paladin_paint_blue_black_black.description: The Downstream livery features subtle shades of blue and black to help the Paladin discreetly reach drop zones.

paladin_paint_clean_air_black_grey_grey.label: Paladin Alliance Aid Camo Livery
paladin_paint_clean_air_black_grey_grey.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this grey camo livery.

paladin_paint_cream_yellow_green.label: Paladin Solaris Livery
paladin_paint_cream_yellow_green.description: Showcasing the Paladin's powerful design, the wild greens, beige, and yellow of the Solaris livery demonstrate that this is not a ship to be trifled with.

paladin_paint_grey_black_green.label: Paladin Steadfast Livery
paladin_paint_grey_black_green.description: Bring a grey base paint with green highlights to the Paladin with the Steadfast livery.

paladin_paint_grey_black_red.label: Paladin Carmine Livery
paladin_paint_grey_black_red.description: Equip the Carmine livery with its bold red highlights atop a grey base paint to make the Paladin easier to spot amidst the fog the war.

paladin_paint_white_black_grey.label: Paladin Galahad Livery
paladin_paint_white_black_grey.description: Blend into the clouds until ready to strike with the Galahad livery for the Paladin, which features a white base paint with black and grey highlights.

perseus_paint_clean_air_black_grey_grey_.label: Perseus Alliance Aid Camo Livery
perseus_paint_clean_air_black_grey_grey_.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this grey camo livery.

perseus_paint_beige_blue_red.label: Perseus Repute Livery
perseus_paint_beige_blue_red.description: The unique Repute livery divides the Perseus into distinct sections with a tan front half and a red and blue back half.

perseus_paint_black_black_red.label: Perseus Deadfire Livery
perseus_paint_black_black_red.description: Maintain your cover and an air of mystique with the Deadfire livery with its inky black base paint and red highlights.

perseus_paint_black_grey_white.label: Perseus Thundercloud Livery
perseus_paint_black_grey_white.description: Restyle your Perseus with a dazzle camouflage inspired paint scheme using various abstract patterns and shades of black, grey, and white.

perseus_paint_gold_marble_gold.label: Perseus Hieron Livery
perseus_paint_gold_marble_gold.description: The Hieron livery bring classical beauty to the modern war machine with its marble-inspired base paint and gold highlights.

perseus_paint_grey_black_white.label: Perseus Flintlock Livery
perseus_paint_grey_black_white.description: Accentuate the strong, angular design of the Perseus with the Flintlock livery. A distinct white section across the middle of the ship divides the pointed front half from the dark foreboding back.

perseus_paint_grey_blue_red.label: Perseus Resilient Livery
perseus_paint_grey_blue_red.description: The Resilient livery for the Perseus elegantly mixes grey and blue with red highlights.

perseus_paint_red_grey_black.label: Perseus Incite Livery
perseus_paint_red_grey_black.description: Proclaim the presence of the Perseus with the Incite livery, featuring a bold red front and grey and black rear.

pisces_paint_2953redfestival_red_gold.label: Pisces 2953 Auspicious Red Rooster Livery
pisces_paint_2953redfestival_red_gold.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Rooster livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a rooster.

pisces_paint_bis2952_black_red.label: C8 Pisces Red Alert Livery
pisces_paint_bis2952_black_red.description: Metallic red and black makes the Red Alert livery a striking choice for the C8 Pisces.

pisces_paint_reward_faction_cfp.label: Pisces Citizens for Prosperity Garnet Livery
pisces_paint_reward_faction_cfp.description: Join the Citizens for Prosperity in their mission to bring peace to the frontier with this dark grey and burgandy livery featuring the group's signature logo.

pisces_paint_reward_faction_frontierfigh.label: Pisces Frontier Fighters Camo Livery
pisces_paint_reward_faction_frontierfigh.description: Be ready to battle in the untamed wilds with this green camo livery featuring the logo of the Frontier Fighters vigilante group.

pisces_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.label: Pisces Headhunters Trauma Livery
pisces_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.description: Show your loyalty to the Headhunters gang with this livery featuring their logo emblazoned on a dark grey hull accented with a vibrant purple.

pisces_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.label: Pisces XenoThreat Purge Livery
pisces_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.description: Let Humanity know you won't bow down to alien invaders with this XenoThreat livery featuring a muted teal with bright red accents.

pisces_paint_blue_white.label: C8 Pisces Code Blue Livery
pisces_paint_blue_white.description: Race to the rescue in style with the C8 Pisces Code Blue livery, featuring a vivid blue hue with white highlights and markings.

pisces_paint_red_black_stripe.label: C8 Pisces Heartbeat Livery
pisces_paint_red_black_stripe.description: A bright red base color and neon yellow highlights makes the Heartbeat livery for the C8 Pisces easy to identify from a distance during rescue operations.

pisces_paint_white_red.label: C8 Pisces Responder Livery
pisces_paint_white_red.description: Outfit the C8 Pisces in pristine white with red highlights with the Responder livery.

pitbull_cream_silver_silver.label: Pitbull Wind Chill Livery
pitbull_cream_silver_silver.description: The Wind Chill livery for the Pitbull features crisp white paint with black highlights and silver accents.

pitbull_metal_metal_yellow.label: Pitbull Aquamarine Livery
pitbull_metal_metal_yellow.description: The Aquamarine livery gives a metallic teal base with subtle yellow accents to make a statement, before you throw a punch.

pitbull_red_black_black.label: Pitbull Bloodlet Livery
pitbull_red_black_black.description: Dive into combat with this blood red livery for your Pitbull to show everyone on the battlefield exactly what you're out for.

pitbull_yellow_black_black.label: Pitbull Hardstrike Livery
pitbull_yellow_black_black.description: When you want them to see you coming, the Hardstrike livery is a bold explosion of yellow to make every fight even more vibrant.

plant_pot_1_luminalia_a.label: Hello Sunshine Luminalia Planter
plant_pot_1_luminalia_a.description: Bring a little life to your Luminalia decor with the Hello Sunshine Planter from Sakura Sun. Featuring a red and green pot with a Banu season greeting and a charming facial expression, this festive tree is decorated with ornaments and spinning stars.

playerdeco_doublebed_flair_coramor_a.label: Heartseeker Double Bed
playerdeco_doublebed_flair_coramor_a.description: With a luxurious bedspread featuring the iconic image of a spacesuit clad pilot that can be found on the Anvil Hornet Heartseeker, this opulent bed is framed by a red velvet, heart-shaped headboard that is sure to make every night a bit more pleasurable.

playerdeco_flair_banu_instrument_1_a.label: Ochelo
playerdeco_flair_banu_instrument_1_a.description: Inspired by Human-made instruments which were the Banu's first introduction to music, this ornately decorated Ochelo features four strings on a raised fret and a leather-skinned drum base. Some of the most popular practitioners of the instrument have risen to fame performing as buskers in markets and city squares.

playerdeco_flair_bigbennyrank100.label: Big Benny's "Classic" Vending Machine
playerdeco_flair_bigbennyrank100.description: A replica of the original Big Benny's vending machine designed to bring a nostalgic touch to any environment.

playerdeco_flair_cafemusain_sign_1_a.label: Café Musain Sign
playerdeco_flair_cafemusain_sign_1_a.description: Show off your rebellious streak with this replica Café Musain bar sign. Originally a communal living area for the first settlers of Levski, over time this spot evolved into a performance space, an art gallery, and eventually a bar.

playerdeco_flair_canister_anomaly_asd_1_.label: GRX Prototype
playerdeco_flair_canister_anomaly_asd_1_.description: Developed by ASD scientists, this experimental power core showed promise thanks to its exceptional output rates, but suffered from energy fluctuations and gravity anomalies that proved to be insurmountable issues which rendered it unusable. ASD has ceased all future development of this technology.

playerdeco_flair_canister_worm_asd_1_a.label: Valakkar Specimen Tank
playerdeco_flair_canister_worm_asd_1_a.description: Collected by the scientists at Associated Science & Development, this specimen tank holds a well-preserved juvenile valakkar. Once used in various research experiments, the valakkar inside is now ready to serve as biological curio and decorative conversation piece.

playerdeco_flair_hanger_flag_iae_2954_bi.label: F8C Lightning 2954 Ship Showdown Holographic Flag
playerdeco_flair_hanger_flag_iae_2954_bi.description: Though the 2954 Ship Showdown may be over, your memories of the F8C Lightning taking the top spot can last thanks to this large holographic standing flag honoring the winner.

playerdeco_flair_hanger_flag_iae_2955_bi.label: Polaris 2955 Ship Showdown Holographic Flag
playerdeco_flair_hanger_flag_iae_2955_bi.description: Though the 2955 Ship Showdown may be over, your memories of the Polaris taking the top spot can last thanks to this large holographic standing flag honoring the winner.

playerdeco_flair_heart_table_1_a.label: Carmilla Nightstand
playerdeco_flair_heart_table_1_a.description: Bring a touch of class to your bedside with this exquisitely designed table. Standing atop two curled legs resembling a heart, this luscious ruby tabletop is perfect for reminding you that love is always within reach.

playerdeco_flair_light_rope_luminalia_1_.label: Festive Kopion Display
playerdeco_flair_light_rope_luminalia_1_.description: This festive light display brings a bit of mirth to your holiday decorations with its charming depiction of a fierce kopion. Perfect for the wildlife appreciator in your life.

playerdeco_flair_lunar_envelope_stand.label: Red Festival Envelope Display
playerdeco_flair_lunar_envelope_stand.description: Showcase your Red Festival envelopes with this beautiful display. This three-level stand is made with sustainably sourced mahogany and features a red quilted backing with fringe detailing and a golden trim.

playerdeco_flair_vanduullance_displaycas.label: Shattered Vanduul Lance Display
playerdeco_flair_vanduullance_displaycas.description: Mounted onto a standing case, this display shows the remains of a Vanduul lance recovered from the aftermath of the Battle of Vega.

playerdeco_it_couch_improvised_1_combine.label: Salvaged Skull Couch
playerdeco_it_couch_improvised_1_combine.description: Why risk your reputation as a serious outlaw by sitting on anything but the most hardcore of couches? Featuring hand-printed skulls and make-shift repairs, this couch will have your guests saying, “this person is definitely a criminal.”

playerdeco_seat_armchair_headhunter_1_a.label: Warlord Throne
playerdeco_seat_armchair_headhunter_1_a.description: Reign over your subjects from the haughty heights of your very own throne. Fabricated from a disused engine, animal bones, scavenged metal parts, and a swathe of vibrant red feathers, this chair's menacing presence is reinforced by a golden plated skull sculpted into the back.

playerdeco_seat_barstool_col_1_a.label: Baltazar Stool
playerdeco_seat_barstool_col_1_a.description: Popularized by famed furniture designer Aldean Baltazar, the iconic Baltazar Stool has seen little iteration in its design since its inception fifty years ago.

playerdeco_seat_bench_2_seat_heart_1_a.label: Coramor '55 Loveseat
playerdeco_seat_bench_2_seat_heart_1_a.description: Snuggle up this Coramor on this luxurious heart-shaped couch. Featuring a captivating crimson covering, the nano-woven fibers of this settee guarantee you'll stay comfortable all night long.

playerdeco_seat_chair_anvil_carrack_1_a.label: Anvil Accent Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_anvil_carrack_1_a.description: Styled after the seats aboard the Anvil Carrack, this grey and white accent chair is fantastic way to show your love of space travel even when staying at home.

playerdeco_seat_chair_crus_starlifter_1_.label: Crusader Accent Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_crus_starlifter_1_.description: Styled after the seats aboard the Crusader Starlifter, this grey and white accent chair is fantastic way to show your love of space travel even when staying at home.

playerdeco_seat_chair_drak_pirate.label: Salvaged Skull Lounge Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_drak_pirate.description: Ripped out of a busted ship and ready for lounging, this former cockpit seat has been tagged with a vivid skull print to make for an aggressive seating addition to your hideout.

playerdeco_seat_chair_rsi_phoenix_1_a.label: RSI Accent Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_rsi_phoenix_1_a.description: Styled after the seats aboard the RSI Constellation Phoenix, this grey and white accent chair is fantastic way to show your love of space travel even when staying at home.

playerdeco_seat_chair_rsi_polaris_1_a.label: Salvaged Polaris Captain's Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_rsi_polaris_1_a.description: Salvaged from the wreckage of a UEE Polaris ship, this mostly intact captain's seat makes for a good talking point inside your hangar.

playerdeco_seat_chair_cargo_1_scavanger_.label: Hazardous Cargo Chair
playerdeco_seat_chair_cargo_1_scavanger_.description: Ready to rest your weary legs after a long day of hauling dangerous materials? Look no further than this unique chair upcycled from a repurposed hazardous cargo box.

playerdeco_static_diorama_cargo_scavange.label: Pyro Resupply Commemorative Display
playerdeco_static_diorama_cargo_scavange.description: Remember your part in resupplying the dangerous Pyro system with this commemorative display featuring artfully arrayed large cargo containers tagged with decorative graffiti.

playerdeco_static_diorama_worm_irradiate.label: Irradiated Valakkar Statue
playerdeco_static_diorama_worm_irradiate.description: Face down the dangerous valakkar without risking your life with this exquisite statue. Irradiated by the toxic storms of Pyro I, this apex predator bursts forth from the ground ready to defend its young.

playerdeco_static_diorama_worm_yormandi_.label: Yormandi Statue
playerdeco_static_diorama_worm_yormandi_.description: Artfully hewn from rock with resin accents, this fiercely realistic statue captures the indomitable spirit of the Yormandi as it faces down unsee prey.

playerdeco_static_hologram_lunar_lantern.label: Year of the Rat Lantern Display
playerdeco_static_hologram_lunar_lantern.description: Celebrate Red Festival in style with this eye-catching homage to traditional lanterns. Giving off a warm and inviting light, this beautiful lantern sits within a large, intricately carved circular frame adorned with a rat in honor of 2956.

playerdeco_static_hologram_shatteredblad.label: Shattered Blade Holographic Banner
playerdeco_static_hologram_shatteredblad.description: Looted from one of the infamous smugglers' hideouts, this red holographic banner features the Shattered Blade's fearsome iconography that serves as warning to any who dare enter, Human and Vanduul alike.

playerdeco_static_hologram_wikelo_1_a.label: Wikelo Emporium Bust
playerdeco_static_hologram_wikelo_1_a.description: Hello, human neighbor. I am Wikelo and now live in your human system of Stanton. Have many things if you would like to come visit. Can make too. If not, I understand. Enjoy this gift from me. Bye.

playerdeco_statue_stand_lifesizevanduul.label: Enemy of the Empire Statue
playerdeco_statue_stand_lifesizevanduul.description: Based on the original model used as military propaganda after the UEE's first encounter with the Vanduul in 2681, this towering figure serves as a sombre reminder of the unrelenting destructive nature of the Vanduul species.

playerdeco_statue_stand_navypilot.label: Spirit of the Starman Statue
playerdeco_statue_stand_navypilot.description: Originally commissioned for the UEE Navy recruitment center in New York City on Earth, 'Spirit of the Starman' proudly displays an unnamed pilot, serving as a reminder of the solidarity and sacrifice the Empire's military demonstrate everyday as they serve as guardians of freedom and justice, and champions of honor and valor.

playerdeco_table_improvised_poker_pirate.label: Salvaged Skull Table
playerdeco_table_improvised_poker_pirate.description: From planning your next heist to high-stakes card games, this salvaged table featuring a large skull marking is the perfect place for gathering with your last known associates.

plushy_hercules_1_b.label: A2 Hercules Starlifter Plushie
plushy_hercules_1_b.description: Get your hands on Crusader's devastating gunship and bomb delivery platform with this plushie version of the A2 Hercules Starlifter.

plushy_hercules_1_c.label: M2 Hercules Starlifter Plushie
plushy_hercules_1_c.description: Get your hands on Crusader's premier tactical military transporter with this plushie version of the M2 Hercules Starlifter.

plushy_zeus_1_a.label: Zeus Plushie
plushy_zeus_1_a.description: This soft plushie is a huggable bit of history celebrating the original 2140 RSI Zeus, the first civilian spaceship equipped with a quantum drive.

polaris_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orang.label: Polaris Best in Show 2955 Livery
polaris_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orang.description: Commemorate the Polaris taking the crown as the winner of the 2955 Ship Showdown with this striking metallic orange and black Best in Show livery.

polaris_paint_black_grey_gold.label: Polaris Quasar Livery
polaris_paint_black_grey_gold.description: Ribbons of gold set against a matte black base paint bring a restrained and elevated beauty to the Polaris Quasar livery.

polaris_paint_blue_black_yellow.label: Polaris Sirius Livery
polaris_paint_blue_black_yellow.description: Patrol, protect, and impress with the Polaris by outfitting it with the Sirius livery, which masterfully mixes blue, grey, and tan.

polaris_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.label: Polaris Nightbreak Livery
polaris_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Polaris with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

polaris_paint_green_green_grey.label: Polaris Apex Livery
polaris_paint_green_green_grey.description: Equip the Apex livery to give the mighty Polaris a distinct green and grey look.

polaris_paint_halloween25_orange_black.label: Polaris Black Magic Livery
polaris_paint_halloween25_orange_black.description: The Black Magic livery for the Polaris mixes a macabre black with glowing orange highlights for a look inspired by the sinister spirit of Day of the Vara.

prospector_paint_aphorite_purple.label: Prospector Aphorite Livery
prospector_paint_aphorite_purple.description: Decorate your Prospector with the Aphorite livery, which gets its name and color from the precious purple gemstone prized for its multi-hued tones.

prospector_paint_dolivine_green.label: Prospector Dolivine Livery
prospector_paint_dolivine_green.description: Sharing the name with a gemstone prized for its beauty and industrial applications, the Dolivine livery blends shades of light green to give your Prospector a unique look.

prospector_paint_hadanite_pink.label: Prospector Hadanite Livery
prospector_paint_hadanite_pink.description: The Hadanite livery for your Prospector gives the ship a distinct pink hue that mirrors the look of the gemstone of the same name.

prospector_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Prospector Stormbringer Livery
prospector_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Prospector livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black and electric blue to give the ship a cool new look.

prospector_paint_iae2950_grey_white.label: Prospector Polar Livery
prospector_paint_iae2950_grey_white.description: Modify your Prospector with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

prospector_paint_iae_2952_black.label: Prospector Nebula Livery
prospector_paint_iae_2952_black.description: Balancing black and white, the Nebula livery for the Prospector lets you blast rocks in style.

prospector_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Prospector Deck the Hull Livery
prospector_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

prospector_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Prospector IceBreak Livery
prospector_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Prospector with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

prospector_paint_scavengers_black_black_.label: Prospector Outcast Livery (Modified)
prospector_paint_scavengers_black_black_.description: This version of the livery has been modified from its original form with the addition of graffiti. Embrace chaos with the Outcast livery. It features rough splashes of neon green against black to give the Prospector an aggressively chaotic appearance.

prospector_paint_unity.label: Prospector Foundation Fest Livery
prospector_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

prospector_paint_workersweek_white_blue_.label: Prospector Keystone Livery
prospector_paint_workersweek_white_blue_.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

prowler_paint_alienweek_green_brown_brow.label: Prowler Luminary Livery
prowler_paint_alienweek_green_brown_brow.description: The Luminary livery gives the Prowler a glossy green base paint with brown highlights for a dazzlingly beautiful and complex design.

prowler_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_.label: Prowler Wanderer Livery
prowler_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_.description: The Wanderer livery features crisscrossing purple and grey lines over a platinum foundation. Inspired by the sacred Xi'an gardens of R.aip?uang, famous for its trails that wander in surprising ways and encourage a focus on the journey instead of the destination.

prowler_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.label: Prowler Deadlock Camo Livery
prowler_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.description: Disguise the silhouette of the Prowler with the Deadlock Camo livery, featuring a grey camo pattern with yellow highlights.

prowler_paint_harmony.label: Prowler Harmony Livery
prowler_paint_harmony.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with aliens with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Esperia Prowler owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

prowler_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Prowler Stormbringer Livery
prowler_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Prowler livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It integrates black and electric blue accents to give the ship a cool new look.

prowler_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.label: Prowler Polar Camo Livery
prowler_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Prowler with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

prowler_paint_icysilver_titanium_titaniu.label: Prowler Elysian Livery
prowler_paint_icysilver_titanium_titaniu.description: Beautiful blues swirl together with the Elysian livery to bring a truly special look to the Prowler.

prowler_paint_ocellus_green_red.label: Prowler Ocellus Livery
prowler_paint_ocellus_green_red.description: The Ocellus livery replicates the look of the Prowler during the Second Tevarin War. It features a bold red fuselage meant to draw attention and trick aggressors into shooting at the most heavily armored part of the ship.

prowler_paint_orange_gray_lightgray.label: Prowler Panthera Livery
prowler_paint_orange_gray_lightgray.description: The Panthera livery brings bright orange and black highlights to the Prowler.

prowler_paint_orange_gray_orange.label: Prowler Torchbearer Livery
prowler_paint_orange_gray_orange.description: A special shimmering finish makes the Torchbearer livery either orange or red depending on the angle your viewing the Prowler.

prowler_paint_silver_steel_gunmetal.label: Prowler Darkrift Livery
prowler_paint_silver_steel_gunmetal.description: Slyly drift through darkened skies with the Darkrift livery, which tampers the luster of its metal finishes to make it less conspicuous.

prowler_paint_silver_titanium_gold.label: Prowler Silverado Livery
prowler_paint_silver_titanium_gold.description: Elevate the Prowler above the ordinary with the Silverado livery featuring striking silver with black and gold highlight.

prowler_paint_tan_brown_cream.label: Prowler Hamada Livery
prowler_paint_tan_brown_cream.description: The Hamada livery mixes tan and various shade of brown on the Prowler.

pulse_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.label: Pulse 2956 Auspicious Red Rat Livery
pulse_paint_2956redfestival_red_gold_rat.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Rat livery. Outfit your Pulse with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a rat.

pulse_paint_black_gold_silver.label: Pulse Dominion Livery
pulse_paint_black_gold_silver.description: Primarily black with sumptuous bronze highlights, the Dominion livery is a prestigious Pulse tint that displays a striking but understated elegance.

pulse_paint_grey_gold_camo.label: Pulse GCD-Army Livery
pulse_paint_grey_gold_camo.description: In honor of the soldiers who protect the Empire, Mirai crafted this limited-edition GCD-Army livery. The glints of gold against grey camo makes it a memorable choice for the Pulse.

pulse_paint_orange_blue_blue.label: Pulse Corona Livery
pulse_paint_orange_blue_blue.description: Spotlight the incredible speed of the Pulse with Corona livery. Its dynamic stylings feature a two-tone blue with an angular orange across the front.

pulse_paint_redfestival_red_gold.label: Pulse Auspicious Red Livery
pulse_paint_redfestival_red_gold.description: The Auspicious Red livery brings a bold red base paint and striking gold accents to the Pulse.

pulse_paint_red_red_red.label: Pulse Crossfire Livery
pulse_paint_red_red_red.description: The Crossfire livery is a rich red with black highlights, which includes lettering spelling Mirai across the bottom half.

pulse_paint_silver_black_blue.label: Pulse Undertow Livery
pulse_paint_silver_black_blue.description: Speed through the shadows with the Undertow livery and its subtle style mixing black and silver with blue highlights.

pulse_paint_silver_silver_silver.label: Pulse Nightrider Livery
pulse_paint_silver_silver_silver.description: The Nightrider livery can easily blend into the blackness of space, but upon closer inspection reveals itself to be silver with lettering spelling Mirai across the bottom half.

pulse_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.label: Pulse Fortuna Livery
pulse_paint_stellafortuna2955_green.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with gray accents.

pulse_paint_white_pink_blue.label: Pulse Star Kitten Livery
pulse_paint_white_pink_blue.description: Embody Sally the Star Kitten's racing spirit with this custom Mirai Pulse livery. Combining the bright pinks and pale blues of the beloved cartoon mascot, this livery's smiling decals bring a playfulness your competitors are sure to enjoy.

qdmp_rsi_s03_captor.label: Captor QD
qdmp_rsi_s03_captor.description: Item Type: Quantum Dampener Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Designed by Roberts Space Industries in partnership with Mirai exclusively for the Guardian QI, the carefully crafted Captor Quantum Dampener generates a field that prevents quantum drive activation.

qdmp_wetk_s01_burke.label: Burke QD
qdmp_wetk_s01_burke.description: Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Type: Quantum Dampener Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military See that justice is served with the Burke QD. This powerful quantum dampener from Wei-Tek projects a massive field that keeps ships from engaging their quantum drives, making it a valuable component for both law enforcement and security professionals.

qdrv_acas_s02_sparkfire_scitem.label: SparkFire
qdrv_acas_s02_sparkfire_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Competition The SparkFire quantum drive from Ace Astrogation delivers fined tuned performance at a reasonable price.

qdrv_acas_s02_sunfire_scitem.label: SunFire
qdrv_acas_s02_sunfire_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Competition Great performance and elegant design makes the Ace Astrogation SunFire quantum drive a favorite among race fans and enthusiasts.

qdrv_arcc_s01_flood_scitem.label: Flood
qdrv_arcc_s01_flood_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian Experience the true joy of the journey with the Flood. This small quantum drive from ArcCorp has been a staple around the Empire for years.

qdrv_arcc_s01_rush.label: Rush
qdrv_arcc_s01_rush.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Rush is a popular commercial quantum drive that lives up to its name.

qdrv_arcc_s02_cascade_scitem.label: Cascade
qdrv_arcc_s02_cascade_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian The latest medium-sized quantum drive from ArcCorp, the Cascade will confidently carry you to your destination time and time again.

qdrv_arcc_s03_echo.label: Echo
qdrv_arcc_s03_echo.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian ArcCorp carefully crafted and calibrated the Echo into an affordable yet effective quantum drive.

qdrv_arcc_s03_echo_scitem.label: Echo
qdrv_arcc_s03_echo_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian ArcCorp careful crafted and calibrated the Echo into an affordable yet effective quantum drive.

qdrv_arcc_s03_fissure.label: Fissure
qdrv_arcc_s03_fissure.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Spool up the Fissure and speed through space with the component ArcCorp claims has successfully completed billions of quantum travels over the centuries.

qdrv_arcc_s03_fissure_scitem.label: Fissure
qdrv_arcc_s03_fissure_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Spool up the Fissure and speed through space with the component ArcCorp claims has successfully completed billions of quantum travels over the centuries.

qdrv_arcc_s03_impulse.label: Impulse
qdrv_arcc_s03_impulse.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Legend claims an inaccurate lathe cut materials thinner than expected on the Impulse prototype. When its test performance exceeded expectations, engineers adopted the changes, and ArcCorp's premiere size three quantum drive was born.

qdrv_arcc_s03_impulse_scitem.label: Impulse
qdrv_arcc_s03_impulse_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Legend claims an inaccurate lathe cut materials thinner than expected on the Impulse prototype. When its test performance exceeded expectations, engineers adopted the changes, and ArcCorp's premiere size three quantum drive was born.

qdrv_just_s01_goliath.label: Goliath
qdrv_just_s01_goliath.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Goliath was designed to be more durable than other quantum drives in its class. That’s made it a staple of industrial ship since Humanity first started to explore the stars.

qdrv_just_s01_vulcan_scitem.label: Vulcan
qdrv_just_s01_vulcan_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk designed the Vulcan to be both cost efficient and durable. It won’t win any awards for its performance but can be trusted to get you to your destination.

qdrv_just_s02_bolon.label: Bolon
qdrv_just_s02_bolon.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial Don’t let lesser craftsmanship put you and your precious cargo at risk. The Bolon industrial quantum drive was built with durability in mind to keep it working when you need it most.

qdrv_just_s02_huracan_scitem.label: Huracan
qdrv_just_s02_huracan_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk understands that your most important job is to keep your cargo safe. That’s why their Huracan quantum drive prioritizes interdiction shielding, stability, and damage efficiency above everything else.

qdrv_just_s03_agni.label: Agni
qdrv_just_s03_agni.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Industrial Haulers have relied on Juno Starwerk's stellar industrial craftsmanship for centuries. The company constantly updates and improves the design of the Agni quantum drive to ensure it remains a top-of-the-line industrial component.

qdrv_just_s03_agni_scitem.label: Agni
qdrv_just_s03_agni_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Industrial Haulers have relied on Juno Starwerk's stellar industrial craftsmanship for centuries. The company constantly updates and improves the design of the Agni quantum drive to ensure it remains a top-of-the-line industrial component.

qdrv_just_s03_kama.label: Kama
qdrv_just_s03_kama.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Kama from Juno Starwerk has won more “Fan Favorite” reader’s poll from ‘Long Haul Quarterly’ than any other industrial quantum drive in its class.

qdrv_just_s03_vesta.label: Vesta
qdrv_just_s03_vesta.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Industrial Ensure your goods get to where they need to go with the Vesta quantum drive. Juno Starwerk specifically designed the component to handle all the trials and tribulations of the long haul.

qdrv_just_s03_vesta_scitem.label: Vesta
qdrv_just_s03_vesta_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Industrial Ensure your goods get to where they need to go with the Vesta quantum drive. Juno Starwerk specifically designed the component to handle all the trials and tribulations of the long haul.

qdrv_orig_s04_890j_scitem.label: Allegro
qdrv_orig_s04_890j_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Civilian Designed specifically for the 890 Jump, the Allegro quantum drive blends ArcCorp's expertise with Origin's exceptionally high standards, making it the ideal companion for a luxury cruise through the stars.

qdrv_raco_s01_drift.label: Drift
qdrv_raco_s01_drift.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Stealth Built to keep heat and signature levels low, the Drift quantum drive from RAMP Corporation helps to minimize emissions generated while spooling.

qdrv_raco_s01_spectre_scitem.label: Spectre
qdrv_raco_s01_spectre_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth The Spectre can't make your ship invisible, but it comes close. Expertly crafted by RAMP, this quantum drive disperses heat and hides IR and EM signatures to make it a great small component for those that want to go unnoticed.

qdrv_raco_s02_bolt_scitem.label: Bolt
qdrv_raco_s02_bolt_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Stealth The RAMP Corporation continues their line of low emission quantum drives with the Bolt. This medium-sized component will blast you from one location to the next while producing a minimal signature.

qdrv_raco_s02_nova_scitem.label: Nova
qdrv_raco_s02_nova_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth Don't draw attention to yourself with the Nova, which is RAMP Corporation’s base, medium-sized stealth quantum drive.

qdrv_raco_s02_spicule_scitem.label: Spicule
qdrv_raco_s02_spicule_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Stealth Here one second and gone the next. That’s what you’ll get with the Spicule quantum drive, which RAMP engineered to keep the component’s emission signature as low as possible.

qdrv_rsi_s01_eos.label: Eos
qdrv_rsi_s01_eos.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Eos quantum drive has been a staple in the RSI product line for centuries. Its original design was so perfectly fine-tuned that it has remained basically unchanged since.

qdrv_rsi_s01_hyperion_scitem.label: Hyperion
qdrv_rsi_s01_hyperion_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian In honor of the name, the first test flight destination for this popular RSI quantum drive was the similarly named satellite of Saturn.

qdrv_rsi_s02_aither_scitem.label: Aither
qdrv_rsi_s02_aither_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Named for an ancient god of light and the heavens, the Aither quantum drive honors its namesake as it ferries people places their ancestors could never imagine. This classic RSI medium-sized component has graced civilian ships for centuries.

qdrv_rsi_s02_hemera_scitem.label: Hemera
qdrv_rsi_s02_hemera_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian Designing the Hemera quantum drive has allowed the technicians at Robert Space Industries to push the boundaries of quantum travel technology even further, and allow you to go even farther.

qdrv_rsi_s03_erebos.label: Erebos
qdrv_rsi_s03_erebos.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian The Erebos exemplifies RSI's commitment to excellence. This high quality quantum drive constantly ranks atop "Best of" lists for both critics and consumers.

qdrv_rsi_s03_metis.label: Metis
qdrv_rsi_s03_metis.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian There's no room for error when bending space and time to travel incredible distances. So put your trust in RSI, a company that's delivered quality components to the public since the dawn of space flight.

qdrv_rsi_s03_tyche.label: Tyche
qdrv_rsi_s03_tyche.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian The Tyche quantum drive harmoniously balances performance, durability, and stealth to create a well-rounded component capable of adeptly handling a variety of situations.

qdrv_tars_s01_expedition.label: Expedition
qdrv_tars_s01_expedition.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Cruise through space confident that your perfectly balanced Expedition quantum drive from Tarsus will get you exactly where you’re going.

qdrv_tars_s02_odyssey.label: Odyssey
qdrv_tars_s02_odyssey.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Adventure amidst the stars awaits with the Odyssey quantum drive. Careful and continued refinement from the Tarsus team has kept this component on the cutting edge for centuries.

qdrv_tars_s03_drifter.label: Drifter
qdrv_tars_s03_drifter.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian Balancing craftsmanship and cost, the Drifter provides renowned Tarsus performance at an affordable price.

qdrv_tars_s03_ranger.label: Ranger
qdrv_tars_s03_ranger.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Rely on the Ranger to guide you through the stars. The quality and reliability of this classic Tarsus quantum drive has made it a ship staple for centuries.

qdrv_tars_s03_wanderer.label: Wanderer
qdrv_tars_s03_wanderer.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Tarsus carefully designed and tuned the Wanderer into an all-around solid quantum drive, making it one of the more popular components in their revered line-up.

qdrv_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Mauler Quantum Drive
qdrv_vncl_s04_mauler.description: This Quantum Drive has been calibrated to allow for the Mauler to undertake long and short quantum travel as well as access jump points.

qdrv_wetk_s01_beacon.label: Beacon
qdrv_wetk_s01_beacon.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military Wei-Tek has made other mil-spec component manufacturers sit up and take notice with the introduction of the highly praised Beacon quantum drive.

qdrv_wetk_s01_siren.label: Siren
qdrv_wetk_s01_siren.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Recent changes by Wei-Tek to the alloys used in the Siren have improved its performance without sacrificing durability, making it a respectable military-grade quantum drive.

qdrv_wetk_s02_crossfield.label: Crossfield
qdrv_wetk_s02_crossfield.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military Wei-Tek has marketed the Crossfield specifically to target military personnel and veteran pilots who will appreciate the stats that the mil-spec quantum drive offers.

qdrv_wetk_s03_balandin.label: Balandin
qdrv_wetk_s03_balandin.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military Wei-Tek built the Balandin with military and security personnel in mind. Following a series of test runs by veterans, engineers accelerated the spool and calibration times while also improving the component's precision and stability.

qdrv_wetk_s03_pontes.label: Pontes
qdrv_wetk_s03_pontes.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military When placed under stress tests, the proprietary alloys used by Wei-Tek to build the Pontes proved themselves against competitors in the same class.

qdrv_wetk_s03_ts2.label: TS-2
qdrv_wetk_s03_ts2.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Advanced protective plating provides the TS-2 with superior durability and protection against the elements and aggressors, making it an ideal quantum drive for those moments when danger calls.

qdrv_wetk_s04_idris.label: Frontline
qdrv_wetk_s04_idris.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 This capital-class quantum drive was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

qed_rsi_s04_tidelock.label: Tidelock QD
qed_rsi_s04_tidelock.description: Item Type: Quantum Dampener Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Internally designed by Roberts Space Industries for the Scorpius Antares, the carefully crafted Tidelock Quantum Dampener generates a field that prevents quantum drive activation.

qed_wetk_s03_reynie.label: Reynie QED
qed_wetk_s03_reynie.description: Item Type: Quantum Enforcement Device Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military This combination Quantum Enforcement Device from Wei-Tek contains both a Quantum Snare for pulling crafts out of quantum travel and a Quantum Dampener for preventing the engaging of quantum drives. With the ability to catch and hold, the Reynie offers an ideal all-in-one solution for security personnel.

qtnk_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Quantum Fuel Tank
qtnk_vncl_s04_mauler.description: This Quantum Fuel Tank stores fuel to power the Mauler's quantum engine.

radr_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Mauler Radar
radr_vncl_s04_mauler.description: The Radar system for the Vanduul Mauler allowing it to detect objects large and small for navigational and combat data.

raft_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: RAFT Stormbringer Livery
raft_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom RAFT livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

raft_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: RAFT Polar Livery
raft_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your RAFT with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

raft_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: RAFT Lovestruck Livery
raft_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your RAFT.

raft_paint_white_blue_blue.label: RAFT Keystone Livery
raft_paint_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

roc_paint_aphorite_purple.label: ROC Aphorite Livery
roc_paint_aphorite_purple.description: Decorate your ROC with the Aphorite livery, which gets its name and color from the precious purple gemstone prized for its multi-hued tones.

roc_paint_blackcherry_black_red.label: ROC Black Cherry Livery
roc_paint_blackcherry_black_red.description: Black paint with red highlights make the Black Cherry livery a subtle yet stylish look for the ROC and ROC-DS.

roc_paint_dolivine_green.label: ROC Dolivine Livery
roc_paint_dolivine_green.description: Sharing the name with a gemstone prized for its beauty and industrial applications, the Dolivine livery blends shades of light green to give your ROC a unique look.

roc_paint_hadanite_pink.label: ROC Hadanite Livery
roc_paint_hadanite_pink.description: The Hadanite livery for your ROC gives the ship a distinct pink hue that mirrors the look of the gemstone of the same name.

roc_paint_harvester_orange.label: ROC Harvester Livery
roc_paint_harvester_orange.description: The Harvester livery for the ROC and ROC-DS brings a bold look to any jobsite.

roc_paint_hazard_yellow.label: ROC Hazard Livery
roc_paint_hazard_yellow.description: Live bold with this high visibility ROC and ROC-DS Hazard livery.

roc_paint_quicksilver_grey.label: ROC Quicksilver Livery
roc_paint_quicksilver_grey.description: Turn heads with this slick Quicksilver livery for your ROC and ROC-DS.

rrs_consumable_sedative.label: Drema Injector
rrs_consumable_sedative.description: Manufacturer: Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems Item Type: Medical Consumable Designed by RRS for field applications, this single-use device injects a fast-acting sedative into the target's body that will incapacitate the subject for a short duration preventing them from hurting themselves or others.
