rrs_consumable_sedative_01.label: Drema Injector
rrs_consumable_sedative_01.description: Manufacturer: Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems Item Type: Medical Consumable Designed by RRS for field applications, this single-use device injects a fast-acting sedative into the target's body that will incapacitate the subject for a short duration preventing them from hurting themselves or others.

rrs_flashbang_grenade_01.label: Shutter Flashbang
rrs_flashbang_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems (RRS) Item Type: Grenade Area of Effect: 15 m Damage Type: None The Shutter Flashbang is a cornerstone of RRS's line of non-lethal armaments. The device is designed to temporarily incapacitate targets within its blast radius, disorienting their senses.

rrs_smoke_grenade_01.label: Haze Smoke Grenade
rrs_smoke_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems (RRS) Item Type: Grenade Area of Effect: 15 m Damage Type: None Duration: 3s The Haze smoke grenade is a perennial bestseller in RRS's line of non-lethal armaments. The device is designed to hinder enemy sight and sound by spreading smoke over a large area that will gradually dissipate over a few seconds.

rsi_apollo_medivac_shop.label: RSI Apollo Medivac
rsi_apollo_medivac_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Medical Along with superior armor and dual missile racks, the 2948 Apollo Medivac model pays homage to the classic 2910 film, Astromedics: Back from the Brink, with livery that accurately recreates the headlining Kithara.

rsi_apollo_triage_shop.label: RSI Apollo Triage
rsi_apollo_triage_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Medical The legendary Apollo chassis from Roberts Space Industries is the gold standard in medevac and rapid emergency response, having provided critical aid to the known universe for well over two centuries.

rsi_aurora_cl_shop.label: RSI Aurora CL
rsi_aurora_cl_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Light Freight Customized for mercantile and trading excursions, the Aurora Clipper is the perfect vessel for aspiring entrepreneurs and seasoned traders alike. Swapping a smaller power plant and armor capabilities for an expanded cargo capacity, the Clipper ups the ante for personal merchant craft.

rsi_aurora_es_shop.label: RSI Aurora ES
rsi_aurora_es_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Pathfinder The Aurora is the modern day descendant of the Roberts Space Industries X-7 spacecraft which tested the very first jump engines. Utilitarian to a T, the Aurora is the perfect beginner's ship: what it lacks in style it makes up for in ample room for upgrade modules.

rsi_aurora_ln_shop.label: RSI Aurora LN
rsi_aurora_ln_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Light Fighter With a more robust shield generator and a pair of additional weapon hard points, the Legionnaire is a dedicated combat fighter, built to handle any obstacle the universe can throw at you.

rsi_aurora_lx_shop.label: RSI Aurora Lx
rsi_aurora_lx_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Pathfinder Be proud of your roots with the brand new Aurora Deluxe, built for the discerning pilot who never forgets where he or she came from. The LX features patent leather interior to guarantee comfort for those long stretches in the black.

rsi_aurora_mr_shop.label: RSI Aurora MR
rsi_aurora_mr_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Light Fighter Perhaps you're looking for something that offers carrying capacity but has combat capabilities too? The Aurora Marque comes with a pair of Behring-quality lasers and a high quality gun cooler system.

rsi_ballisticcannon_meteor_bespoke.label: Leonids Cannon
rsi_ballisticcannon_meteor_bespoke.description: Manufacturer: RSI Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 5 Built specifically for the Meteor, the Leonids ballistic cannon provides formidable firepower designed to overwhelm aggressors that dare get within range. RSI expertly incorporated the cannon atop both sides of the ship to seamlessly integrate with the ship's components and provide full forward coverage.

rsi_ballisticcannon_s8.label: RSI Medusa Cannon
rsi_ballisticcannon_s8.description: Manufacturer: RSI Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 8 Building on centuries of RSI weapon technology, the Perseus utilizes bespoke size 8 Medusa Cannons that deliver devastating salvos of ballistic fire, capable of starting fights just as easily as ending them. These custom made RSI cannons excel at punishing larger targets at long, making it a formidable battlefield equalizer.

rsi_bespoke_ballisticcannon_a.label: Maris Cannon
rsi_bespoke_ballisticcannon_a.description: Manufacturer: Roberts Space Industries Item Type: Ballistic Cannon Size: 6 This powerful ballistic cannon was designed by RSI as a bespoke armament for their Polaris corvette.

rsi_constellation_andromeda_shop.label: RSI Constellation Andromeda
rsi_constellation_andromeda_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Medium Freight / Gunship The Constellation Andromeda, a multi-person freighter, is the most popular ship in RSI's current production array. Constellations are beloved by smugglers and merchants alike because they are modular, high powered... and just downright iconic-looking.

rsi_constellation_aquila_shop.label: RSI Constellation Aquila
rsi_constellation_aquila_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Expedition Explore any distant horizons! The Constellation Aquila features a redesigned cockpit for maximum visibility, advanced sensors and an onboard Ursa rover for planetary exploration. Let’s see what’s out there!

rsi_constellation_phoenixemerald_shop.label: RSI Constellation Phoenixemerald
rsi_constellation_phoenixemerald_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Touring A dedicated luxury spacecraft for the discerning captain, the Constellation Phoenix features a luxurious redesigned interior, a Lynx rover, and a Kruger P-72 Archimedes Snub ship.

rsi_constellation_phoenix_shop.label: RSI Constellation Phoenix
rsi_constellation_phoenix_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Medium Freight Enjoy the adventure of a multi-crew Constellation on a budget. The Constellation Taurus is a dedicated freighter. Fully configurable but without all the bells and whistles, the Taurus is a great way to get started with crewed ships.

rsi_constellation_taurus_shop.label: RSI Constellation Taurus
rsi_constellation_taurus_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Medium Freight Enjoy the adventure of a multi-crew Constellation on a budget! The Constellation Taurus is a dedicated freighter. Fully configurable but without all the bells-and-whistles, the Taurus is a great way to get started with crewed ships.

rsi_defaultflashlight.label: MicroTorch Flashlight
rsi_defaultflashlight.description: RSI's MicroTorch flashlight is a high-powered hands-free flashlight that clips onto standard accessory slots to provide consistent visibility in a variety of environmental conditions.

rsi_emp_magstrand_s4.label: Magstrand EMP Generator
rsi_emp_magstrand_s4.description: Item Type: Burst Generator Manufacturer: RSI Size: 4 The Magstrand from RSI is an EMP burst generator designed specifically for the Scorpius Antares. When fully charged, the device creates a powerful wave of distortion damage that can disable electric components within its blast radius.

rsi_laserrepeater_s5.label: Echion Repeater
rsi_laserrepeater_s5.description: Manufacturer: Robert Space Industries Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 5 Designed to overwhelm shields with a barrage of laserfire, this custom-made RSI Echion laser repeater will strip enemies of their defenses leaving them vulnerable to more devastating attacks.

rsi_orion_shop.label: RSI Orion
rsi_orion_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Heavy Mining Roberts Space Industries' goal has always been to make the stars available to individual Citizens. Now, with the RSI Orion mining platform, RSI is letting individuals take over a process formerly controlled by megacorporations. The Orion's features include high-grade turret-mounted tractor beam arrays, plenty of mineral storage, and a cabin designed by the team that brought you the Aurora and Constellation. The listed Cargo Capacity is only for the dedicated Cargo Room and does not account for the mined material capacity in the storage pods.

rsi_scorpius_missileturret.label: RSI Lesath Missile Turret
rsi_scorpius_missileturret.description: Item Type: Missile Turret Manufacturer: RSI Perfect for producing a wave of rapid-fire destruction, this bespoke RSI Scorpius missile turret, the Lesath, holds up to sixteen S2 missiles and offers a powerful alternative to the gun turret that comes as standard.

rsi_ursa_shop.label: RSI Ursa
rsi_ursa_shop.description: Manufacturer: RSI Focus: Exploration Built by RSI specifically for the planetside explorer, the Ursa Rover offers civilians military-grade all-terrain capabilities and stands as the rugged standard in ground-based scouting, mapping, and discovery applications.

rsi_vp_esi_s1.label: RSI-KRIG Main Thruster
rsi_vp_esi_s1.description: RSI Thruster developed in conjunction with KRIG specifically for use on the P-52 Merlin and P-72 Archimedes.

raft_paint_black_yellow.label: RAFT Hazard Livery
raft_paint_black_yellow.description: Black with yellow highlights, the Hazard is another great livery option for the Argo RAFT.

raft_paint_clean_air_green_green_yellow.label: RAFT Alliance Aid Green Livery
raft_paint_clean_air_green_green_yellow.description: Showcase your dedication to helping Alliance Aid assist the people of Levski during their time of need with this green livery with yellow accents.

raft_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: RAFT ArcCorp Livery
raft_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the RAFT features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

raft_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: RAFT Crusader Livery
raft_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the RAFT features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

raft_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: RAFT Hurston Livery
raft_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the RAFT features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

raft_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: RAFT microTech Livery
raft_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the RAFT features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

raft_paint_grey_lightgrey.label: RAFT Anchor Livery
raft_paint_grey_lightgrey.description: The Anchor livery for the Argo RAFT gets it great look by blending various shades of grey with green undertones.

railen_paint_black_black_black_stencil_1.label: Railen Hyaotan Livery
railen_paint_black_black_black_stencil_1.description: The Hyaotan edition features a subtle dark grey, wave-like pattern over its light grey base, with embedded blue lights unique to this edition to give off that otherworldly shine.

railen_paint_black_black_black_stencil_2.label: Railen Malachitus Livery
railen_paint_black_black_black_stencil_2.description: The Malachitus edition features an iridescent green, wave-like pattern over it's black base, which gives off a mesmerizing glow in the light of the stars.

railen_paint_bronze_grey_teal.label: Railen Insularis Livery
railen_paint_bronze_grey_teal.description: The Insularis livery adds a sleek, ethereal teal and patina metal finish to emphasize and celebrate the otherworldly nature of the Railen.

railen_paint_gold_grey_grey_stencil_1.label: Railen Uamchuai Livery
railen_paint_gold_grey_grey_stencil_1.description: The Uamchuai edition breaks the mold with grey and sand-brown base, with flattering dusty gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

railen_paint_grey_grey_gold.label: Railen Agapanthia Livery
railen_paint_grey_grey_gold.description: The Agapanthia edition bears a sleek black base with subtle dark gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

railen_paint_hyaotan_black_blue.label: Railen Hyaotan Livery
railen_paint_hyaotan_black_blue.description: Make your Railen cargo ship even more visually distinct and dynamic with the Hyaotan livery that's black with blue highlights.

railen_paint_white_grey_gold.label: Railen Ch.iiing Livery
railen_paint_white_grey_gold.description: The Ch.iiing edition boasts a bold white base with eye-catching gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

razor_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.label: Razor Fortuna Livery
razor_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

razor_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Razor Stormbringer Livery
razor_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Razor livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

razor_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Razor Polar Livery
razor_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Razor with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

razor_paint_red_blue_blue.label: Razor Racing Livery
razor_paint_red_blue_blue.description: Pull away from the pack with this daring Mirai Racing livery. Combining coral reds with an undercurrent of teal, you're guaranteed to grab the attention of those you overtake when racing in these bold colors.

razor_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.label: Razor Hosanna Livery
razor_paint_red_white_pink_crusader.description: Inspired by the gorgeous clouds that enshroud Orison, the Hosanna livery blends red, ivory, and pink to give the Razor a distinct appearance. It also features a silhouette of the landing zone's famous Hosanna tree complete with its pink flowers.

razor_paint_sand_orange_hurston.label: Razor Central Tower Livery
razor_paint_sand_orange_hurston.description: Give the Razor a dramatic new look with the Central Tower livery. The orange and black color scheme is inspired by the furnaces of industry powering Lorville, and also features a representation of the landing zone's iconic Central Headquarters and Shared Services Center, aka Central Tower.

razor_paint_unity.label: Razor Foundation Fest Livery
razor_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

razor_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.label: Razor Aspire Livery
razor_paint_white_blue_blue_microtech.description: With the Aspire livery, blue and white combine to evoke both the colors and frigid temperatures of New Babbage. In honor of the landing zone that inspired it, the livery also features a depiction of the Aspire Grand building that dominates the city's skyline.

reclaimer_paint_aphorite_purple.label: Reclaimer Aphorite Livery
reclaimer_paint_aphorite_purple.description: Decorate your Reclaimer with the Aphorite livery, which gets its name and color from the precious purple gemstone prized for its multi-hued tones.

reclaimer_paint_bis2949.label: Reclaimer 2949 Best In Show Livery
reclaimer_paint_bis2949.description: Customize your Reclaimer with this special 2949 Best in Show livery.

reclaimer_paint_bis2954.label: Reclaimer 2954 Best in Show Livery
reclaimer_paint_bis2954.description: This purple and white 2954 Best in Show Livery celebrates the Reclaimer making it to the final four of the 2954 Ship Showdown.

reclaimer_paint_dolivine_green.label: Reclaimer Dolivine Livery
reclaimer_paint_dolivine_green.description: Sharing the name with a gemstone prized for its beauty and industrial applications, the Dolivine livery blends shades of light green to give your Reclaimer a unique look.

reclaimer_paint_hadanite_pink.label: Reclaimer Hadanite Livery
reclaimer_paint_hadanite_pink.description: The Hadanite livery for your Reclaimer gives the ship a distinct pink hue that mirrors the look of the gemstone of the same name.

redeemer_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.label: Redeemer Fortuna Livery
redeemer_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

redeemer_paint_bis2953_purple_blue_cyan.label: Redeemer 2953 Best in Show Livery
redeemer_paint_bis2953_purple_blue_cyan.description: Celebrate the Aegis Redeemer being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2953 with this pearlescent purple and cyan livery.

redeemer_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_cam.label: Redeemer Nightbreak Livery
redeemer_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_cam.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Redeemer with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

redeemer_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Redeemer Stormbringer Livery
redeemer_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Redeemer livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

redeemer_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.label: Redeemer Polar Camo Livery
redeemer_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Redeemer with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

redeemer_paint_scrubland_camo.label: Redeemer Scrubland Camo Livery
redeemer_paint_scrubland_camo.description: Use the Scrubland Camo livery to outfit the Redeemer in green camo. A classic and commanding look that's also ideal for excursions across forests and grasslands.

redeemer_paint_seraphim_white_black.label: Redeemer Seraphim Livery
redeemer_paint_seraphim_white_black.description: The striking white Seraphim livery for the Redeemer helps make the ship both a beauty and a beast.

redeemer_paint_underworld_black_yellow.label: Redeemer Underworld Livery
redeemer_paint_underworld_black_yellow.description: Apply the Underworld livery to the Redeemer and it will be pitch black and ready to attack.

redeemer_paint_valencia.label: Redeemer Valencia Livery
redeemer_paint_valencia.description: Mixing metallic orange and black, the Valencia livery brings a bold and beautiful styling to the Redeemer.

reliant_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Reliant Timberline Livery
reliant_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Reliant with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

reliant_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Reliant Frostbite Camo Livery
reliant_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Reliant.

reliant_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Reliant Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
reliant_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Reliant a striking style.

retaliator_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Retaliator Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
retaliator_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Show your support for the newest batch of Navy recruits by customizing your Retaliator with this special Blue and Gold livery to commemorate the 2950 Invictus Launch Week.

retaliator_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Retaliator Grey Livery
retaliator_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Retaliator with this grey livery.

retaliator_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Retaliator Twilight Livery
retaliator_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Retaliator with this fragmented grey livery.

retaliator_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Retaliator Nightbreak Livery
retaliator_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Retaliator with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

retaliator_paint_desert_sand_red.label: Retaliator Calico Livery
retaliator_paint_desert_sand_red.description: Inspired by the subtle shifts in color when sunlight strikes desert sands, the Calico livery for the Retaliator features shades of tan and brown with red highlights.

retaliator_paint_green_dark_green_yellow.label: Retaliator Underbrush Livery
retaliator_paint_green_dark_green_yellow.description: The Underbrush livery for the Retaliator was introduced during the First Tevarin War. This classic styling uses various shades of green and yellow highlights.

retaliator_paint_yellow_black.label: Retaliator Backlash Livery
retaliator_paint_yellow_black.description: The bright and bold Backlash livery brings a dynamic design to the Retaliator, featuring a black central stripe ringed in yellow with red highlights.

sasu_carryable_1h_cy_medical_canister_he.label: C-71 Medical Case
sasu_carryable_1h_cy_medical_canister_he.description: Item Type: Container (Medical) This sturdy container can be used to safely store and carry medical-grade supplies and devices. Built with shock-absorbing polycarbonate, its outer shell was designed to protect the contents in the event of sudden impacts.

seco_s1_f4_dd.label: INK-Mark 104-ID
seco_s1_f4_dd.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian By bolstering the direct fire absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Mark generator sacrifices some resistance to splash damage to allow a ship to better weather a focused attack.

seco_s1_f4_sd.label: INK-Splash 104-IS
seco_s1_f4_sd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By focusing on improving the splash damage absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Splash generator exchanges some protection from direct fire for extra strength against missiles.

seco_s2_f4_dd.label: INK-Mark 204-ID
seco_s2_f4_dd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By bolstering the direct fire absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Mark generator sacrifices some resistance to splash damage to allow a ship to better weather a focused attack.

seco_s2_f4_sd.label: INK-Splash 204-IS
seco_s2_f4_sd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By focusing on improving the splash damage absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Splash generator exchanges some protection from direct fire for extra strength against missiles.

seco_s3_f4_dd.label: INK-Mark 304-ID
seco_s3_f4_dd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By bolstering the direct fire absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Mark generator sacrifices some resistance to splash damage to allow a ship to better weather a focused attack.

seco_s3_f4_sd.label: INK-Splash 304-IS
seco_s3_f4_sd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By focusing on improving the splash damage absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Splash generator exchanges some protection from direct fire for extra strength against missiles.

seco_s4_f4_dd.label: INK-Mark 404-ID
seco_s4_f4_dd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By bolstering the direct fire absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Mark generator sacrifices some resistance to splash damage to allow a ship to better weather a focused attack.

seco_s4_f4_sd.label: INK-Splash 404-IS
seco_s4_f4_sd.description: Manufacturer: Seal Corporation By focusing on improving the splash damage absorption of their all-purpose shield generator line, Seal Corporation’s INK-Splash generator exchanges some protection from direct fire for extra strength against missiles.

shld_aegs_s04_reclaimer_scitem.label: RS-Barrier
shld_aegs_s04_reclaimer_scitem.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Industrial Designed to defend against the debris common during large-scale salvage projects, Aegis Dynamics developed this bespoke industrial shield generator in-house for the Reclaimer.

shld_asas_s01_cloak.label: Cloak
shld_asas_s01_cloak.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Stealth Discreet security is within your reach thanks to this small shield generator from Ascension Astro. With a lower signature then many other generators in its class, the Cloak provides protection without drawing unnecessary attention.

shld_asas_s01_obscura.label: Obscura
shld_asas_s01_obscura.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth Respected for its lower emissions, the Obscura shield generator uses an advanced signature dispersal system to help give your ship a quieter signature while still remaining shielded.

shld_asas_s01_shimmer.label: Shimmer
shld_asas_s01_shimmer.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Stealth Ascension Astro is known for one thing — quality stealth components. Their Shimmer shield generator was built not only to help avoid detection, but also provide protection when needed most.

shld_asas_s01_veil.label: Veil
shld_asas_s01_veil.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth An advanced cooling system significantly reduces the heat produced by the Veil stealth shield generator. No other component in its class even comes close to rivaling its heat suppression technology.

shld_asas_s02_shroud.label: Shroud
shld_asas_s02_shroud.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Stealth The Shroud shield generator from Ascension Astro provides a layer of protection for your vessel while still helping you maintain emission levels to provide a lower signature.

shld_banu_s01_suldrath.label: Suldrath
shld_banu_s01_suldrath.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Banu Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military Classic Tevarin tech melds with modern design for the Suldrath shield generator. The Banu beautifully blend the best parts of historic Tevarin shield tech with contemporary upgrades and conveniences expected of this component generation. The result is an effective and unique xeno-crafted shield ready to shroud your ship and protect you from whatever dangers come your way.

shld_banu_s02_sukoran.label: Sukoran
shld_banu_s02_sukoran.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Banu Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military Good design always survives with the Banu. The Sukoran shield generator updates Tevarin technology in a number of interesting ways. Its efficient design draws less power, while still effectively producing a robust shield capable of absorbing most ballistic and energy attacks until it's fully depleted. However, this greater efficiency comes with a price as the Sukoran's slower regen rate may temporarily render the shield offline.

shld_basl_s00_castra.label: Castra
shld_basl_s00_castra.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Industrial When performance meets price for vehicle shield generators, the Castra is the clear winner. It has been a Whitley’s Guide “Best Buy” for five consecutive years.

shld_basl_s01_bulwark.label: Bulwark
shld_basl_s01_bulwark.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Bulwark shield generator provides industrial-grade durability and increased performance, but at the expense of a higher emission level.

shld_basl_s01_guardian.label: Guardian
shld_basl_s01_guardian.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial Upgrade to the Guardian for increased absorption of ballistic, energy, and distortion damage. Making this industrial shield generator one of the most durable in its class.

shld_basl_s01_palisade.label: Palisade
shld_basl_s01_palisade.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Industrial No other small shield generator can match the durability of the Basilisk Palisade. This top-of-the-line industrial component forfeits stealth for the ability to absorb an unrivaled amount of damage.

shld_basl_s02_aspis.label: Aspis
shld_basl_s02_aspis.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial Basilisk’s Aspis industrial shield generator features durable design and reliable performance, earning it a place on Whitley’s Guide ‘Best Buy’ list.

shld_basl_s03_stronghold.label: Stronghold
shld_basl_s03_stronghold.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Stronghold shield generator uses patented hull plating techniques to reinforce the generator’s body to make it one of the sturdiest on the market. That means the shield and component are both built to last.

shld_behr_s01_5sa.label: 5SA 'Rhada'
shld_behr_s01_5sa.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The 5SA ‘Rhada’ delivers Behring’s expert engineering and trusted performance to make it a worthy shield generator for any commercial ship.

shld_behr_s01_6sa.label: 6SA
shld_behr_s01_6sa.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian Providing above average shield health and damage absorption, the 6SA ‘Arbiter’ has been a trusted component for centuries. Experience the Behring advantage by installing this small shield generator today.

shld_behr_s01_7sa.label: 7SA
shld_behr_s01_7sa.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Civilian A top-of-the-line shield generator that runs loud and proud. What it sacrifices in stealth it more than makes up for with supreme durability and excellent performance. So, even if enemies see you coming, they’ll have a hard time disabling Behring’s 7SA ‘Concord’.

shld_behr_s02_5ma.label: 5MA 'Chimalli'
shld_behr_s02_5ma.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Thanks to Behring’s expert engineers, the 5MA ‘Chimalli’ shield generator balances the need for a solid regeneration rate with dependable damage absorption.

shld_behr_s03_5ca.label: 5CA 'Akura'
shld_behr_s03_5ca.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Behring’s belief in balanced shield design is evident with the 5CA. This large shield generator is equally focused on providing acceptable shield health along with decent damage absorption.

shld_godi_s01_allstop.label: AllStop
shld_godi_s01_allstop.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military Gorgon Defender Industries first created the AllStop shield generator to hold off the Vanduul. They worked so well that many military crafts were known to prefer the AllStop. Just one of the many reasons to have one on your ship.

shld_godi_s01_fr66.label: FR-66
shld_godi_s01_fr66.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military The FR-66 is one of the most versatile small shield generator currently on the market. Get military strength protection and performance from Gorgon Defender Industries to ensure your ship can survive any onslaught.

shld_godi_s01_forcewall.label: ForceWall
shld_godi_s01_forcewall.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Want to stay in the thick of battle a bit longer? Gorgon’s ForceWall is a military-grade shield generator that’s able to absorb more damage, providing a notable uptick to your shield’s durability.

shld_godi_s01_securehyde.label: SecureHyde
shld_godi_s01_securehyde.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military Get extra protection with the SecureHyde shield generator. This military-grade component provides superior durability over every other shield generator in its class.

shld_godi_s02_fullstop.label: FullStop
shld_godi_s02_fullstop.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military Featuring proprietary recoil tech, the FullStop shield generator was built to better absorb attacks from a multitude of damage types.

shld_godi_s03_surestop.label: SureStop
shld_godi_s03_surestop.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military Gorgon’s SureStop shield generator was initially developed for military applications, aiming for a middle-of-the-road alternative for circumstances that are anything but. Featuring new Envelop projection technology, the SureStop emphasizes performance and dependability over lower signature.

shld_godi_s04_idris.label: Holdstrong
shld_godi_s04_idris.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 4 This capital-class shield generator was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

shld_orig_s04_890j_scitem.label: Glacis
shld_orig_s04_890j_scitem.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 4 Grade: Bespoke Class: Industrial Origin turned to the experts at Basilisk to build a bespoke shield generator for the 890 Jump. The Glacis blends centuries of cutting edge innovation to produce a strong and stable shield capable of defending the valuable ship and passengers aboard.

shld_s01_civ_seco_ink.label: INK
shld_s01_civ_seco_ink.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian When you’re looking for a dependable shield, why not trust the company that’s been doing it longer than anyone else? Seal Corporation’s original INK shield generator has been a staple around the Empire for generations.

shld_s01_cmp_yorm_targa.label: Targa
shld_s01_cmp_yorm_targa.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Yorm Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition Based on Gotlieb Yorm’s original design, the Targa is a light, high performance, competition-grade generator that revolutionized racing.

shld_s01_ind_basl_steward.label: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial The Steward is Basilisk’s entry level industrial shield generator. Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions. Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial The Steward is Basilisk’s entry level industrial shield generator. Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions.

Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions.

shld_s01_mirage.label: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth
shld_s01_mirage.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth

shld_seco_s00_pin.label: PIN
shld_seco_s00_pin.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian With the PIN vehicle shield generator you can now trust Seal Corp to protect you whether you’re in space or atmosphere.

shld_seco_s01_hex.label: HEX
shld_seco_s01_hex.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian Prepare your ship for any circumstance by installing a HEX from Seal Corporation. Balanced performance and durability make this an ideal, versatile choice for those who don’t know where their next adventure may take them.

shld_seco_s01_ink.label: INK
shld_seco_s01_ink.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian When you’re looking for a dependable shield, why not trust the company that’s been doing it longer than anyone else? Seal Corporation’s original INK shield generator has been a staple around the Empire for generations.

shld_seco_s01_web.label: WEB
shld_seco_s01_web.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Tried, tested, and refined for centuries, the WEB shield generator balances sleek design with stellar performance to keep your ship safe under a wide variety of circumstances.

shld_seco_s02_stop.label: STOP
shld_seco_s02_stop.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Utilizing a design that has proven itself time and again, the STOP shield generator by Seal Corporation has featured the same classic design for years due to its consistent, stellar performance.

shld_vncl_s04_mauler.label: Mauler Shield Generator
shld_vncl_s04_mauler.description: The Mauler's shield generator provides defensive coverage against incoming fire and other threats to the ship.

shld_yorm_s01_falco.label: Falco
shld_yorm_s01_falco.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: YORM Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Competition Falco is the perfect shield generator for those always on the go. Its lightweight build won’t hurt your top speed, while still being able to absorb enough damage for you to make your escape.

shld_yorm_s01_targa.label: Targa
shld_yorm_s01_targa.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: YORM Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition Based on Gotlieb Yorm’s original design, the Targa is a light, high performance, competition-grade generator that revolutionized racing.

sq_flair_coin_1_a_1h.label: Ship Showdown '52 Mercury Coin
sq_flair_coin_1_a_1h.description: The Mercury Star Runner delivered a strong showing in the 2952 Ship Showdown with its second place finish. Ringed in blue, this coin commemorates the iconic courier ship with its image on one side and the Crusader Industries logo on the other.

sq_flair_coin_1_b_1h.label: Ship Showdown '52 Scorpius Coin
sq_flair_coin_1_b_1h.description: Thanks to its revolutionary rail-mounted turret the Scorpius blast its way into the final four of the 2952 Ship Showdown. This commemorative coin features the ship's unmistakable bi-wing design on one side with the Roberts Space Industries logo on the reverse.

sq_flair_coin_1_c_1h.label: Ship Showdown '52 C8X Pisces Coin
sq_flair_coin_1_c_1h.description: Voters in the 2952 Ship Showdown definitely didn't snub the C8X Pisces Expedition. This coin honors its top four finish with an image of the ship on one side and the Anvil Aerospace logo on the other.

sq_flair_coin_1_d_1h.label: Ship Showdown '52 Carrack Coin
sq_flair_coin_1_d_1h.description: A coin to celebrate the Carrack winning the 2952 Ship Showdown. The beloved expedition ship soars across one side of the coin ringed in red with the Anvil Aerospace logo appearing on the reverse.

sq_flair_coin_1_e_1h.label: Ship Showdown '52 Coin
sq_flair_coin_1_e_1h.description: This commemorative coin from the 2952 Ship Showdown embodies the spirit of the competition by featuring the silhouette of a Cutlass and Hornet facing off against a blue and orange background divided by a lightning bolt.

srv_paint_black_yellow.label: SRV Dark Storm Livery
srv_paint_black_yellow.description: Black with yellow highlights, the Dark Storm livery gives the SRV a sleek yet discreet look.

srv_paint_blue_beige.label: SRV Sky Blue Livery
srv_paint_blue_beige.description: The Sky Blue livery is a striking light blue that helps make it easily seen during space-based operations.

srv_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: SRV Lovestruck Livery
srv_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your SRV.

srv_paint_white_grey.label: SRV Overcast Livery
srv_paint_white_grey.description: Have your SRV looking good on recovery operations with the Overcast livery, which is white with black highlights.

stka_agh36_s3.label: Sterne Katzen AG Hornisse-36
stka_agh36_s3.description: Sterne Katzen AG known about protection. With their low emissions bubble shield the Hornisse-36, you'll keep attacks at bay while keeping your sig low.

stor_opencontainer_1_8_scu.label: Stor*All 1/8 SCU Storage Box
stor_opencontainer_1_8_scu.description: Designed by one of the most trusted names in cargo pods, the Stor*All Storage Box provides a convenient place to keep any small items. Its durable impact-resistant construction is sealed to survive the vacuum of space.

stv_paint_green_black.label: STV Electric Green Livery
stv_paint_green_black.description: Style and a striking color combine with the Electric Green livery. It gives the STV a vivid green look with black accents.

stv_paint_grey.label: STV Cobalt Grey Livery
stv_paint_grey.description: The Cobalt Grey livery for the STV is a black base with grey accents and features cool blue seat coverings.

stv_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tigerstr.label: STV Whirlwind Livery
stv_paint_racing_blue_blue_blue_tigerstr.description: The Whirlwind livery mixes various shades of blue in a memorable animal stripe pattern to give the STV a daring look.

stv_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_strip.label: STV Finish Line Livery
stv_paint_racing_yellow_white_grey_strip.description: Give the STV a classic racing design with the Finish Line livery. It features a yellow stripe across the front, a grey one on the back, and white highlights.

stv_paint_silver_blue.label: STV Blue Steel Livery
stv_paint_silver_blue.description: Ground adventures never looked so good with the Blue Steel livery, which gives the STV a sleek silver finish trimmed with vibrant blue.

sabre_paint_2952redfestival_red_gold.label: Sabre 2952 Auspicious Red Monkey Livery
sabre_paint_2952redfestival_red_gold.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Monkey livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a monkey's head.

sabre_paint_beige_black_black.label: Sabre Landslide Livery
sabre_paint_beige_black_black.description: The Landslide livery for the Sabre features a tan fuselage with grey wings and subtle silver highlights.

sabre_paint_black_black_gold_carbon.label: Sabre Ashcloud Livery
sabre_paint_black_black_gold_carbon.description: Equip the Sabre in this dark and discreet Ashcloud livery that's predominantly black with beautiful carbon fiber and copper details.

sabre_paint_black_black_orange.label: Sabre Harvest Livery
sabre_paint_black_black_orange.description: The Harvest livery for the Sabre features orange highlights that stand in bold contrast to the black base paint.

sabre_paint_black_black_red.label: Sabre Firebreak Livery
sabre_paint_black_black_red.description: Ignite envy in others with the Sabre Firebreak livery, featuring vibrant red highlights against the black base paint.

sabre_paint_black_silver_silver_polish.label: Sabre Starlight Livery
sabre_paint_black_silver_silver_polish.description: An elegant black with chrome highlights, the Starlight livery brings a subtly striking and timeless look to the Sabre.

sabre_paint_green_black_orange.label: Sabre Windbreak Livery
sabre_paint_green_black_orange.description: The Windbreak livery exudes style by giving the Sabre a green body, dark grey wings, and silver and orange highlights.

sabre_paint_halloween25_orange_black.label: Sabre Black Magic Livery
sabre_paint_halloween25_orange_black.description: The Black Magic livery for the Sabre mixes a macabre black with glowing orange highlights for a look inspired by the sinister spirit of Day of the Vara.

sabre_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.label: Sabre Stormbringer Livery
sabre_paint_iae2950_grey_blue.description: This custom Sabre livery was created to celebrate the 2950 IAE on microTech. It blends black and electric blue with white accents to give the ship a cool new look.

sabre_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.label: Sabre Polar Camo Livery
sabre_paint_iae2950_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Sabre with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

sabre_paint_racing_white_pink_blue.label: Sabre Star Kitten Livery
sabre_paint_racing_white_pink_blue.description: Embody Sally the Star Kitten's racing spirit with this custom Sabre livery. Combining the bright pink, vibrant blue, and crisp white of the beloved cartoon mascot, this livery brings a playfulness your competitors are sure to enjoy.

salvation_paint_black_gold_black.label: Salvation Eureka Livery
salvation_paint_black_gold_black.description: The Eureka livery features glittering gold highlights against a black base paint for the Salvation.

salvation_paint_black_white_orange.label: Salvation Vespid Livery
salvation_paint_black_white_orange.description: The Vespid livery turns the Salvation white with orange highlights that stand in stark contrast to its black base paint.

salvation_paint_blue_black_black_stripes.label: Salvation Safeguard Livery
salvation_paint_blue_black_black_stripes.description: The colorful industrial design of the Safeguard livery for the Salvation includes a vibrant blue and yellow stripes.

salvation_paint_blue_black_yellow.label: Salvation Chimaera Livery
salvation_paint_blue_black_yellow.description: The Chimaera livery for the Salvation is primarily blue and black with yellow highlights.

salvation_paint_blue_silver_red.label: Salvation Disco Livery
salvation_paint_blue_silver_red.description: Equip the ship livery used by ace pilot Disco in the classic children's cartoon Rory Nova. While it turns the Salvation metallic dark blue, black, and red, whether you turn into the 'dynamic, instinctive spacecraft operator' that inspired the livery's name is up to you.

salvation_paint_pink_grey_black_iridesce.label: Salvation Lovestruck Livery
salvation_paint_pink_grey_black_iridesce.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish iridescent pink and black look for your Salvation.

santokyai_paint_alienweek_teal_pink.label: San'tok.yai Harmony Livery
santokyai_paint_alienweek_teal_pink.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with alien species with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Aopoa San'tok.yai owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

santokyai_paint_alienweek_teal_red.label: San'tok.yai Ocellus Livery
santokyai_paint_alienweek_teal_red.description: The Ocellus livery adapts and updates the iconic colors and design used on some Tevarin ships to bring a striking new look to the San'tok.yai. The livery adds a distinct red pattern to the fuselage while shimmering green covers the rest of the ship. Grey lines swoop across the entire ship to help break up its silhouette.

santokyai_paint_black_black_black_tiger.label: San'tok.yai Yilen Livery
santokyai_paint_black_black_black_tiger.description: The shimmering iridescence of the Yilen livery delivers a distinct look for the San'tok.yai.

santokyai_paint_red_black_black.label: San'tok.yai Xua'cha Livery
santokyai_paint_red_black_black.description: Outfit the San'tok.yai in fiery red and black trim with the Xua'cha livery.

santokyai_paint_white_white_red.label: San'tok.yai Tuiping Livery
santokyai_paint_white_white_red.description: Make the San'tok.yai pristine white with red trim with the Tuiping livery.

scorpius_paint_avalanche_white_grey.label: Scorpius Avalanche Livery
scorpius_paint_avalanche_white_grey.description: White with grey and orange accents, the Avalanche livery for the Scorpius gives the ship a pristine and refined style.

scorpius_paint_bis2952_black_red.label: Scorpius Red Alert Livery
scorpius_paint_bis2952_black_red.description: Embody the furious firepower of the Scorpius with the metallic red and black look of the Red Alert livery.

scorpius_paint_blight_green.label: Scorpius Blight Livery
scorpius_paint_blight_green.description: The Blight livery for the Scorpius paints this advanced combat platform green with black and tan highlights.

scorpius_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_cam.label: Scorpius Nightbreak Livery
scorpius_paint_fw2955_grey_black_red_cam.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Scorpius with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

scorpius_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Scorpius Lovestruck Livery
scorpius_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Scorpius.

scorpius_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Scorpius Deck the Hull Livery
scorpius_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

scorpius_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Scorpius IceBreak Livery
scorpius_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Scorpius with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

scorpius_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skul.label: Scorpius Skullcrusher Livery
scorpius_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skul.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Scorpius, which features a massive skull decal across the top.

scorpius_paint_shockforce_yellow_orange.label: Scorpius Shock Force Livery
scorpius_paint_shockforce_yellow_orange.description: Featuring ferocious firepower and a bold bi-wing design, the Scorpius deserves a paint scheme to match. The eye-catching Shock Force livery pairs a blend of yellow and orange hues with a dark grey trim.

scorpius_paint_stiletto_grey_orange.label: Scorpius Stiletto Livery
scorpius_paint_stiletto_grey_orange.description: The Scorpius features a sleek and dynamic design that's highlighted by the Stiletto livery, which mixes shades of blue and orange and white highlights.

scorpius_paint_stinger_black_orange.label: Scorpius Stinger Livery
scorpius_paint_stinger_black_orange.description: The exclusive Scorpius Stinger livery features a black finish and an orange decal in the shape the famously lethal arachnid that is the ship's namesake.

scorpius_paint_stormcloud_grey.label: Scorpius Storm Cloud Livery
scorpius_paint_stormcloud_grey.description: Strike true and deliver justice with the Scorpius Storm Cloud livery featuring slate-teal panels with black trim and subtle orange highlights.

scorpius_paint_sunburn_white_orange.label: Scorpius Sunburn Livery
scorpius_paint_sunburn_white_orange.description: A ship designed to be a daring dogfighter deserves an equally audacious look. The Scorpius Sunburn livery is primarily white with a dynamic mix of orange and black highlights.

scorpius_paint_tiburon_grey_red.label: Scorpius Tiburon Livery
scorpius_paint_tiburon_grey_red.description: As if the Scorpius and its rail-mounted turret isn't menacing enough, the exclusive Tiburon livery features two rows of sharpened teeth flanking the cockpit. The rest of the paint scheme features shades of grey intermixed with red and white highlights.

scout_paint_alienweek_green_red.label: Khartu-al Ocellus Livery
scout_paint_alienweek_green_red.description: The Ocellus livery adapts and updates the iconic colors and design used on some Tevarin ships to bring a striking new look to the Khartu-al. The livery gives the fuselage a prominent red ridge while shimmering green covers the rest of the ship. Thick grey lines swoop through both colors to provide a unique geometric element.

scout_paint_alienweek_teal_red.label: Khartu-al Harmony Livery
scout_paint_alienweek_teal_red.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with alien species with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Khartu-al owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

scout_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Khartu-al Stormbringer Livery
scout_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Khartu-al livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

scout_paint_iae2951_grey_white.label: Khartu-al Polar Livery
scout_paint_iae2951_grey_white.description: Modify your Khartu-al with this white and grey livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

shiv_paint_beige_beige_black.label: Shiv Earthquake Livery
shiv_paint_beige_beige_black.description: Upgrade the patchwork look of the Shiv with the Earthquake livery, which artfully mixes shades of beige and black.

shiv_paint_black_black_black.label: Shiv Spectre Livery
shiv_paint_black_black_black.description: Make the Shiv dark and discreet with the all black Spectre livery.

shiv_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Shiv Nightbreak Livery
shiv_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Shiv with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

shiv_paint_brown_white_brown.label: Shiv Nightmare Livery
shiv_paint_brown_white_brown.description: Featuring a sinister skull atop a brown base paint, the Nightmare livery gives the Shiv a look that sends shivers down the spine.

shiv_paint_green_grey_yellow.label: Shiv Gideon Livery
shiv_paint_green_grey_yellow.description: The Gideon livery for the Shiv features a heavily worn green and grey finish with yellow accents.

shiv_paint_silver_silver_silver.label: Shiv Meridian Livery
shiv_paint_silver_silver_silver.description: The Meridian livery gives the Shiv a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

shiv_paint_white_blue_black.label: Shiv Blue Blossom Livery
shiv_paint_white_blue_black.description: Turn the Shiv into a beauty and a brute with the Blue Blossom livery, featuring a colorful and ornate flower pattern across the top of the ship.

shubin_turretmissilerack.label: Behring Marksman HS Quad Platform
shubin_turretmissilerack.description: The Behring Marksman heat seeking missile utilizes an enemy's heat signature to obtain and maintain a lock on the target. This tried-and-true method of target acquisition has a few drawbacks: it is easily confused by flares and it may be difficult to establish lock on ships with low heat signatures. These issues aside, the Marksman is the go-to missile of choice for many independent operators and pilots. Rack of four (4).

smallfish.label: Ribbon Fish
smallfish.description: Ribbon fish (Vario Vitas) have become a very popular first pet among children due to the minimal amount of care needed to keep them alive and the variety of their vibrant coloration.

spartan_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Spartan Stormbringer Livery
spartan_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Spartan livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

spartan_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.label: Spartan Polar Camo Livery
spartan_paint_iae2951_grey_white_camo.description: Modify your Spartan with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

spartan_paint_ranger_greencamo.label: Spartan Ranger Livery
spartan_paint_ranger_greencamo.description: With its camo green paint scheme, the Spartan Ranger livery is an ideal choice when traveling and deploying troops in verdant fields or forests.

spartan_paint_sidewinder_brown.label: Spartan Sidewinder Livery
spartan_paint_sidewinder_brown.description: Blend into rocky, desert landscapes with the Sidewinder livery for the Spartan.

spartan_paint_snowstorm_white.label: Spartan Snowstorm Livery
spartan_paint_snowstorm_white.description: Primarily white with grey and black accents, the Snowstorm livery for the Spartan gives this troop transport a crisp and cool look.

spirit_a1_paint_green_black_orange.label: Spirit Intrepid Livery
spirit_a1_paint_green_black_orange.description: Featuring a matte moss green with dusty orange highlights and accent stripes, this livery ensures your Crusader Spirit is one to watch.

spirit_c1_paint_red_black_white.label: Spirit Crimson Livery
spirit_c1_paint_red_black_white.description: Strike a bold impression with this deep red paint scheme featuring an enlarged Crusader logo angling across both wings.

spirit_e1_paint_black_black_gold.label: Spirit Olympia Livery
spirit_e1_paint_black_black_gold.description: Exude understated elegance with the Olympia livery for the Spirit. The beautiful and bold black and gold paint scheme makes sure you'll be remembered.

spirit_paint_bis2954.label: Spirit 2954 Best in Show Livery
spirit_paint_bis2954.description: This purple and white 2954 Best in Show Livery celebrates the Spirit making it to the finals of the 2954 Ship Showdown.

spirit_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.label: Spirit Headhunters Reaper Livery
spirit_paint_beige_grey_red_headhunters.description: The Headhunters Reaper livery lets you proudly proclaim your allegiance to the gang. It features the gang's name and highlights in red on a beige and grey paint scheme.

spirit_paint_black_blue_white.label: Spirit Valor Livery
spirit_paint_black_blue_white.description: Where ever your mission takes you, this livery featuring dark grey with sky blue highlights and white trim will make sure that your Crusader Spirit looks the part.

spirit_paint_blue_white_red.label: Spirit Stalwart Livery
spirit_paint_blue_white_red.description: The Stalwart livery gives the Spirit a look that is blue as the sky with subtle white and red highlights.

spirit_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Spirit ArcCorp Livery
spirit_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Spirit features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

spirit_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Spirit Crusader Livery
spirit_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Spirit features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

spirit_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Spirit Hurston Livery
spirit_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Spirit features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

spirit_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Spirit microTech Livery
spirit_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Spirit features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

spirit_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.label: Spirit Citizens for Prosperity Liberation Livery
spirit_paint_green_black_grey_cfp.description: Be a beacon of hope by equipping the Citizens for Prosperity Liberation livery, which features the group's name and symbol atop a green, black, and grey paint job.

spirit_paint_grey_grey_blue.label: Spirit Resolute Livery
spirit_paint_grey_grey_blue.description: With a dual tone grey body and steel blue trim, this subtle livery will ensure you Crusader Spirit is worth a second look.

spirit_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Spirit Deck the Hull Livery
spirit_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

spirit_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Spirit IceBreak Livery
spirit_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Spirit with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

spirit_paint_maroon_beige_blue.label: Spirit Ruby Livery
spirit_paint_maroon_beige_blue.description: The deep red of this livery enhances the already bold lines of the Crusader Spirit, while the subtle taupe and navy highlights give it extra panache.

spirit_paint_white_black_red.label: Spirit Allegiant Livery
spirit_paint_white_black_red.description: The Allegiant livery for the Spirit is a crisp white with black and red highlights.

spirit_paint_white_blue_black.label: Spirit Ardent Livery
spirit_paint_white_blue_black.description: With clean white panels and an azure trim, this livery elevates the look of the Crusader Spirit to the next level.

spirit_paint_yellow_black_black.label: Spirit Radiant Livery
spirit_paint_yellow_black_black.description: Let the sight of the Spirit burn brightly with the Radiant livery, which is a vibrant yellow with black highlights.

spirit_paint_yellow_black_chevron.label: Spirit Hazard Livery
spirit_paint_yellow_black_chevron.description: Make the Spirit stand out with the Hazard livery featuring a bright yellow base paint and diagonal black stripes.

starlifter_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.label: Hercules Starlifter Meridian Livery
starlifter_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.description: The Meridian livery gives the Hercules Starlifter a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

star_fighter_inferno_paint_ember_black_g.label: Ares Star Fighter Inferno Ember Livery
star_fighter_inferno_paint_ember_black_g.description: With the Ember livery, the blazing barrel of the massive gatling gun isn't the only red thing on the Ares Star Fighter Inferno. This special livery uses vibrant red streaks to break up the grey and black paint that dominates the ship.

star_fighter_ion_paint_radiance_white_gr.label: Ares Star Fighter Ion Radiance Livery
star_fighter_ion_paint_radiance_white_gr.description: White and grey with red trim, the Radiance livery makes the Ares Star Fighter Ion a sight to behold even when it's not blasting its massive laser cannon.

star_fighter_paint_black_gold.label: Ares Star Fighter Golden Blossom Livery
star_fighter_paint_black_gold.description: The Golden Blossom livery weaves an intricate golden flower pattern across the matte black paint of the Ares Star Fighter.

star_fighter_paint_celestial_blue.label: Ares Star Fighter Celestial Blue Livery
star_fighter_paint_celestial_blue.description: A beautiful light blue base and grey highlights makes the Celestial Blue livery a stunning choice for the Ares Star Fighter.

star_fighter_paint_cinder_grey_black.label: Ares Star Fighter Cinder Livery
star_fighter_paint_cinder_grey_black.description: The Cinder livery for the Ares Star Fighter is predominantly grey with a black trim accenting the ship's lines and enwrapping the cockpit.

star_fighter_paint_flint_lightgrey.label: Ares Star Fighter Flint Livery
star_fighter_paint_flint_lightgrey.description: Cut through the clouds with the Flint livery for the Ares Star Fighter. The livery uses several shades of grey and dark blue accent lines to give the ship its sharp look.

star_fighter_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.label: Ares Star Fighter Deadlock Camo Livery
star_fighter_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.description: Disguise the silhouette of the Ares Star Fighter with the Deadlock Camo livery, featuring a grey camo pattern with yellow highlights.

star_fighter_paint_iae2951_blue_black.label: Ares Star Fighter Stormbringer Livery
star_fighter_paint_iae2951_blue_black.description: Celebrate the 2951 IAE with this custom Ares Star Fighter livery. Blending blue and black with white accents, the paint scheme gives the ship an electric new look.

star_fighter_paint_iae2951_grey_white_ca.label: Ares Star Fighter Polar Camo Livery
star_fighter_paint_iae2951_grey_white_ca.description: Modify your Ares Star Fighter with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2951 IAE.

star_fighter_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Ares Star Fighter Lovestruck Livery
star_fighter_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Ares Star Fighter.

star_fighter_paint_outrider_green_black.label: Ares Star Fighter Outrider Livery
star_fighter_paint_outrider_green_black.description: The Outrider livery blends black with dark military green to highlight the Ares Star Fighter's warrior spirit.

star_fighter_paint_pirateweek_black_clea.label: Ares Star Fighter Meridian Livery
star_fighter_paint_pirateweek_black_clea.description: The Meridian livery gives the Ares Star Fighter a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

star_fighter_paint_red_white_pink_crusad.label: Ares Star Fighter Hosanna Livery
star_fighter_paint_red_white_pink_crusad.description: Inspired by the gorgeous clouds that enshroud Orison, the Hosanna livery blends red, ivory, and pink to give the Ares Star Fighter a distinct appearance. It also features a silhouette of the landing zone's famous Hosanna tree complete with its pink flowers.

star_fighter_paint_sand_orange_hurston.label: Ares Star Fighter Central Tower Livery
star_fighter_paint_sand_orange_hurston.description: Give the Ares Star Fighter a dramatic new look with the Central Tower livery. The orange and black color scheme is inspired by the furnaces of industry powering Lorville, and also features a representation of the landing zone's iconic Central Headquarters and Shared Services Center, aka Central Tower.

star_fighter_paint_scrubland_camo.label: Ares Star Fighter Scrubland Camo Livery
star_fighter_paint_scrubland_camo.description: Use the Scrubland Camo livery to outfit the Ares Star Fight in green camo. A classic and commanding look that's also ideal for excursions across forests and grasslands.

star_fighter_paint_white_blue_blue_micro.label: Ares Star Fighter Aspire Livery
star_fighter_paint_white_blue_blue_micro.description: With the Aspire livery, blue and white combine to evoke both the colors and frigid temperatures of New Babbage. In honor of the landing zone that inspired it, the livery also features a depiction of the Aspire Grand building that dominates the city's skyline.

star_runner_paint_2951fortuna_green_grey.label: Mercury Star Runner Fortuna Livery
star_runner_paint_2951fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

star_runner_paint_bis2951.label: Mercury Star Runner 2951 Best in Show Livery
star_runner_paint_bis2951.description: Celebrate the Star Runner being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2951 with this special blue and black livery.

star_runner_paint_bis2952_black_red.label: Mercury Star Runner Red Alert Livery
star_runner_paint_bis2952_black_red.description: Stand out from the crowd of conventional courier ships with the Red Alert livery, which makes the Mercury Star Runner metallic red and black.

star_runner_paint_blackguard_black_blue.label: Mercury Star Runner Blackguard Livery
star_runner_paint_blackguard_black_blue.description: Featuring a blue left wing and highlights, the Blackguard livery will make your Mercury Star Runner stand out from the crowd.

star_runner_paint_equinox_orange_black.label: Mercury Star Runner Equinox Livery
star_runner_paint_equinox_orange_black.description: The Mercury Star Runner Equinox livery blends orange and black for a paint scheme highlighting the unique look of this asymmetrical ship.

star_runner_paint_iae2950_grey_white_cam.label: Mercury Star Runner Polar Camo Livery
star_runner_paint_iae2950_grey_white_cam.description: Modify your Star Runner with this white and grey camo livery specifically designed for the 2950 IAE event on microTech.

star_runner_paint_night_runner.label: Mercury Star Runner Nightrunner Livery
star_runner_paint_night_runner.description: Meld into the pitch-dark expanse of space with this livery featuring a black paint scheme with gold accents for your Mercury Star Runner.

star_runner_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.label: Mercury Star Runner Meridian Livery
star_runner_paint_pirateweek_black_clear.description: The Meridian livery gives the Mercury Star Runner a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

star_runner_paint_silver_spark_grey_yell.label: Mercury Star Runner Silver Spark Livery
star_runner_paint_silver_spark_grey_yell.description: Emphasize the special shape of the Mercury Star Runner with the Silver Spark livery featuring yellow highlights expertly integrated into the grey and black paint scheme.

star_runner_paint_skyrider_blue.label: Mercury Star Runner Skyrider Livery
star_runner_paint_skyrider_blue.description: Stylishly stay ahead of schedule, trouble, and the competition with this custom livery featuring a smoky blue and black paint scheme with bright blue accents for the Mercury Star Runner.

star_runner_paint_unity.label: Mercury Star Runner Foundation Fest Livery
star_runner_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

starfarer_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Starfarer Black Livery
starfarer_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Customize your Starfarer with this black chrome livery.

starfarer_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Starfarer Light Grey Livery
starfarer_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Starfarer with this light grey livery.

starfarer_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Starfarer Storm Surge Livery
starfarer_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Starfarer with this fragmented blue livery.

starfarer_paint_unity.label: Starfarer Foundation Fest Livery
starfarer_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

starlancer_paint_blue_black_white.label: Starlancer Snowcap Livery
starlancer_paint_blue_black_white.description: The dynamic stylings of the Snowcap livery gives the Starlancer a white front with a crisp shift to black in the back.

starlancer_paint_blue_blue_yellow.label: Starlancer Atlantic Livery
starlancer_paint_blue_blue_yellow.description: Become one with the sky with the Atlantic livery for the Starlancer, which is dark blue with ribbons of yellow.

starlancer_paint_citcon2954_blue_black_w.label: Starlancer Sapphire Livery
starlancer_paint_citcon2954_blue_black_w.description: A bold blue top and black underbelly give the Sapphire livery a distinct and dazzling look.

starlancer_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Starlancer ArcCorp Livery
starlancer_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Starlancer features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

starlancer_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Starlancer Crusader Livery
starlancer_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Starlancer features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

starlancer_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Starlancer Hurston Livery
starlancer_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Starlancer features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

starlancer_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Starlancer microTech Livery
starlancer_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Starlancer features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

starlancer_paint_green_black_orange.label: Starlancer Tellus Livery
starlancer_paint_green_black_orange.description: The Tellus livery features a distinct orange line that separates the light green top of the Starlancer from the black bottom.

starlancer_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.label: Starlancer Deadlock Camo Livery
starlancer_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.description: Disguise the silhouette of the Starlancer with the Deadlock Camo livery, featuring a grey camo pattern with yellow highlights.

starlancer_paint_grey_red_black.label: Starlancer Bonfire Livery
starlancer_paint_grey_red_black.description: The Starlancer gets a cool grey top and vivid red bottom with the subtle yet striking Bonfire livery.

starlancer_paint_grey_white_grey.label: Starlancer Updraft Livery
starlancer_paint_grey_white_grey.description: Cool grey atop crisp white from the Updraft livery gives the Starlancer a classic and clean look.

starlancer_paint_orange_blue_white.label: Starlancer Wildcat Livery
starlancer_paint_orange_blue_white.description: The Wildcat livery divides the Starlancer between being orange in front and black in back.

starlancer_paint_tan_blue_white.label: Starlancer Mojave Livery
starlancer_paint_tan_blue_white.description: Turn the Starlancer tan with the Mojave livery.

starlancer_paint_yellow_blue_white.label: Starlancer Pacific Livery
starlancer_paint_yellow_blue_white.description: Stand out from the crowd with the Pacific livery for the Starlancer. It features a sun soaked yellow on top of the ship with a crisp blue underneath.

starlifter_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.label: Hercules Starlifter Fortuna Livery
starlifter_paint_2954fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

starlifter_paint_argent_silver.label: Hercules Starlifter Argent Livery
starlifter_paint_argent_silver.description: A metallic silver finish makes the Argent livery a striking choice for the Hercules Starlifter.

starlifter_paint_bis2951.label: Hercules Starlifter 2951 Best in Show Livery
starlifter_paint_bis2951.description: Celebrate the Starlifter being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2951 with this special blue and black livery.

starlifter_paint_cerberus_black.label: Hercules Starlifter Cerberus Livery
starlifter_paint_cerberus_black.description: Let your Hercules Starlifter become one with the vast, black expanse of space with the Cerberus livery.

starlifter_paint_draco_gold.label: Hercules Starlifter Draco Livery
starlifter_paint_draco_gold.description: Customize your Hercules Starlifter with the exquisite Draco livery that's gold with black highlights.

starlifter_paint_dryad_greencamo.label: Hercules Starlifter Dryad Livery
starlifter_paint_dryad_greencamo.description: A woodland camo inspired design distinguishes the Dryad livery from other options for the Hercules Starlifter.

starlifter_paint_fleetweek_level1_milita.label: Hercules Starlifter Timberline Livery
starlifter_paint_fleetweek_level1_milita.description: Customize your Hercules Starlifter with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

starlifter_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Hercules Starlifter Frostbite Camo Livery
starlifter_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Hercules Starlifter.

starlifter_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Hercules Starlifter ArcCorp Livery
starlifter_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Starlifter features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

starlifter_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Hercules Starlifter Crusader Livery
starlifter_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Starlifter features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

starlifter_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Hercules Starlifter Hurston Livery
starlifter_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Starlifter features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

starlifter_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Hercules Starlifter microTech Livery
starlifter_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Starlifter features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

starlifter_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.label: Hercules Starlifter Deadlock Camo Livery
starlifter_paint_grey_grey_yellow_camo.description: Disguise the silhouette of the Hercules Starlifter with the Deadlock Camo livery, featuring a grey camo pattern with yellow highlights.

starlifter_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Hercules Starlifter Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
starlifter_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Starlifter a striking style.

starlifter_paint_sylvan_green.label: Hercules Starlifter Sylvan Livery
starlifter_paint_sylvan_green.description: The Sylvan livery for the Hercules Starlifter is a distinct, no-nonsense matte green with light grey accents.

starlite_paint_black_black_gold.label: Starlite Dusk Livery
starlite_paint_black_black_gold.description: For the Starlite captains who prefer to make a subtle statement, MISC offers the distinguished Dusk Livery. A complete grey hull highlights the ship's classic silhouette with tasteful gold trim.

starlite_paint_grey_red_black.label: Starlite Bonfire Livery
starlite_paint_grey_red_black.description: The Starlite gets a cool grey top and vivid red bottom with the subtle yet striking Bonfire livery.

starlite_paint_khaki_black_white.label: Starlite Mojave Livery
starlite_paint_khaki_black_white.description: Prepare your Starlite for the journey ahead with the Mojave livery featuring a tan top, gray lower, and white trim.

starlite_paint_white_black_yellow.label: Starlite Empyrean Livery
starlite_paint_white_black_yellow.description: Give the Starlite a bold new look with the Empyrean Livery which features a dynamic tricolor design. Yellow highlights divide a white nose from a grey mid-section lending the ship an added appearance of speed.

stimpack.label: OneClick
stimpack.description: CureLife's OneClick is a first-line treatment system capable of providing temporary relief against a variety of medical conditions.

stinger_paint_black_black_black.label: Stinger Mamba Livery
stinger_paint_black_black_black.description: Your enemies will never see you coming with the black-on-black Mamba livery for the Esperia Stinger.

stinger_paint_black_black_bronze.label: Stinger Deathstalker Livery
stinger_paint_black_black_bronze.description: Bring pain to the battlefield on bronze-clad wings with the Deathstalker livery for the Esperia Stinger.

stinger_paint_green_green_brown.label: Stinger Pit Viper Livery
stinger_paint_green_green_brown.description: The Pit Viper livery for the Esperia Stinger features metallic green plating accented with dark bronze.

stinger_paint_red_black_grey.label: Stinger Black Widow Livery
stinger_paint_red_black_grey.description: Sink your claws into your prey with the black and deep reds of the Esperia Stinger's Black Widow livery.

stinger_paint_silver_grey_teal.label: Stinger Insularis Livery
stinger_paint_silver_grey_teal.description: The Insularis livery adds a sleek, ethereal teal and patina metal finish to emphasize and celebrate the otherworldly nature of the Stinger.

stinger_paint_silver_silver_silver.label: Stinger Meridian Livery
stinger_paint_silver_silver_silver.description: The Meridian livery gives the Stinger a simple yet stylish metallic silver finish.

storall_atls_inventory.label: GEO Resource Pod
