storall_atls_inventory.description: Capacity: 10 cSCU Lightweight yet durable, the GEO Resource Pod was constructed to extend the function of your ATLS by providing additional storage for mined ores as well as a convenient way to transport resources to their final destination.

storall_big_box_model_a.label: Stor*All Big Box Model A
storall_big_box_model_a.description: Manufacturer: Stor*All Item Type: Storage Made with the same rugged construction techniques as the smaller 5 ton model, the Stor*All model A Big Box cargo pod upgrade for the Aurora doubles the available cargo space. (Replaces default cargo option.)

storall_big_box_model_h.label: Stor*All Big Box Model H
storall_big_box_model_h.description: Manufacturer: Stor*All Item Type: Storage Designed exclusively for the Hornet F7C, the Stor*All Big Box model H replaces the void left by the turret system of the military-spec craft with a respectable cargo hold. Transforming the flagship fighter of the UEEN into a durable hauling ship.

storall_mini.label: Stor*All Mini
storall_mini.description: Manufacturer: Stor*All Item Type: Storage The 5 ton Stor*All Mini cargo pod allows the enterprising Aurora pilot to begin his business in the commodities transportation sector. It has a double wall and pressurized construction that can withstand the rigors of space or the occasional laser blast.

storm_paint_dark_camo.label: Storm Darkside Livery
storm_paint_dark_camo.description: The Darkside livery gives the Storm a black and grey camouflage pattern to make it hard to see in low light situations.

storm_paint_green_green_camo.label: Storm Landfall Livery
storm_paint_green_green_camo.description: Ready the Storm for adventures through forests and grasslands with the Landfall livery with its various shades of green.

storm_paint_grey_gold_camo.label: Storm GCD-Army Livery
storm_paint_grey_gold_camo.description: In honor of the soldiers who protect the Empire, Tumbril crafted this limited-edition GCD-Army livery for the Storm. The golden seal of the UEE army and gold highlights stand out against the grey camo base paint.

storm_paint_white_grey_twotone.label: Storm Summit Livery
storm_paint_white_grey_twotone.description: The Summit is a two-tone livery for the Storm with a white front half and grey back half.

storm_paint_white_white_camo.label: Storm Frost Line Livery
storm_paint_white_white_camo.description: White with grey accents, the Frost Line livery for the Storm is ideal for blending in with cold weather regions.

stripedfish.label: Banded Fessle
stripedfish.description: Known for its distinct blue and white banding, the Banded Fessle is indigenous to the warmer areas of the Anasazi Sea on Terra up to a depth of twelve meters. These carnivorous fish can grow to anywhere between forty and fifty centimeters and are known to eat small insects and fish.

syulen_paint_alienweek_green_brown_brown.label: Syulen Luminary Livery
syulen_paint_alienweek_green_brown_brown.description: The Luminary livery gives the Syulen a glossy green base paint with brown highlights for a dazzlingly beautiful and complex design.

syulen_paint_alienweek_teal_pink.label: Syulen Harmony Livery
syulen_paint_alienweek_teal_pink.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with alien species with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Gatac Syulen owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

syulen_paint_alienweek_teal_red.label: Syulen Ocellus Livery
syulen_paint_alienweek_teal_red.description: The Ocellus livery adapts and updates the iconic colors and design used on some Tevarin ships to bring a striking new look to the Syulen. The livery features red markings circling the cockpit and shimmering green across the rest of the wings. Grey lines cut through both colors to break up the pattern and silhouette of the ship.

syulen_paint_halloween2024_blood.label: Syulen Purple Haze Livery
syulen_paint_halloween2024_blood.description: Celebrate Day of the Vara in style with the Purple Haze livery, featuring a glimmering metallic purple base paint splattered in green.

syulen_paint_bronze_grey_red.label: Syulen Xy'kara Livery
syulen_paint_bronze_grey_red.description: Make your Syulen one worthy of admiration with the Xy'kara livery that provides the ship a rich bronze marbled look in shades of gray and red undertones.

thcn_s1_rpod_4x_s2.label: Liberator
thcn_s1_rpod_4x_s2.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Size: 1 Rockets: 4xS2 Thermyte Concern's Liberator rocket pod carries four S2 rockets and can be attached to any size one hardpoint.

thcn_s2_rpod_8x_s2.label: Liberator Prime
thcn_s2_rpod_8x_s2.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Size: 2 Rockets: 8xS2 Thermyte Concern's Liberator Prime rocket pod carries eight S2 rockets and can be attached to any size two hardpoint.

thcn_s3_rpod_12x_s2.label: Liberator Ultra
thcn_s3_rpod_12x_s2.description: Item Type: Rocket Pod Manufacturer: Thermyte Concern Size: 3 Rockets: 12xS2 Thermyte Concern's Liberator Ultra rocket pod carries twelve S2 rockets and can be attached to any size three hardpoint.

tmbl_storm_aa_turret.label: Tumbril Storm AA Turret
tmbl_storm_aa_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems A bespoke turret designed for the Tumbril Storm AA single-operator mini-tank.

tmbl_storm_turret.label: Tumbril Storm Turret
tmbl_storm_turret.description: Item Type: Turret Manufacturer: Tumbril Land Systems A bespoke turret designed for the Tumbril Storm single-operator mini-tank.

toag_lasergatling_s2.label: Thlilye Laser Gatling
toag_lasergatling_s2.description: Manufacturer: Torral Aggregate Item Type: Laser Gatling Size: 2 Experience the cutting edge of Xi'an technology with the Thlilye laser gatling, designed by Torral Aggregate. Made exclusively for the Mirai Pulse, this size 2, fully automatic laser gatling features a lightning-quick rate of fire, making it ideal for close-range battle.

toag_laserrepeater_s3.label: Yeng’tu Repeater
toag_laserrepeater_s3.description: Item Type: Laser Repeater Manufacturer: Torral Aggregate Size: 3 Inspired by Xi'an mil-tech and tailor-made by Torral Aggregate exclusively for the Aopoa San'tok.yāi, the Yeng'tu laser repeater accentuates the ship's dexterity with a fighter's edge.

toag_launcher_ballistic_01.label: Kahix Missile Launcher
toag_launcher_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Torral Aggregate Item Type: Launcher Class: Missile Magazine Size: 1 Rate Of Fire: 6 rpm Effective Range: 2 km Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (N/A) A powerful and portable large caliber projectile launcher from Torral Aggregate, the Kahix features two fire modes, dumbfire and targeted, and can utilize a variety of special missiles. This versatile Xi'an weapon is a perfect battlefield equalizer for ground troops, effective in a multitude of engagement scenarios and capable of dealing massive damage to ships and vehicles.

toag_launcher_ballistic_01_mag.label: Kahix M-Launcher Missile
toag_launcher_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Ammo Missile ammo for the Kahix missile launcher.

tras_laserbeam_s4.label: Arame Laser Beam
tras_laserbeam_s4.description: Manufacturer: Trident Attack Systems Item Type: Laser Beam Size: 4 Pulsating energy powers the Arame from Trident Attack Systems. This size four weapon produces a laser beam that’s particularly effective from short to medium ranges.

tras_laserbeam_s5.label: Kombu Laser Beam
tras_laserbeam_s5.description: Manufacturer: Trident Attack Systems Item Type: Laser Beam Size: 5 Trident Attack Systems’ successful transition from hard ammo producer to energy weapon specialist continues with the Kombu. Its laser beam can deliver reliable, sustained damage, though users must use it strategically to not overheat the weapon.

tras_laserbeam_s6.label: Wakame Laser Beam
tras_laserbeam_s6.description: Manufacturer: Trident Attack Systems Item Type: Laser Beam Size: 6 Trident Attack Systems' size six energy weapon, the Wakame, can quickly overwhelm nearby adversaries before they have a chance to respond thanks to the targeted focus and sustained damage delivery of this laser beam.

talon_dominator_platform_x4.label: Talon Quad Rack
talon_dominator_platform_x4.description: Manufacturer: Talon Weapon Systems Built to Talon's standard of rugged excellence, this Quad Rack fits to any compatible hardpoint to carry four missiles.

talon_executioner_ir_twin.label: Talon Executioner IR Twin
talon_executioner_ir_twin.description: Talon's Executioner missiles track and lock their target by use of highly sensitive optical cameras and image processing software. The Executioners deliver a combination of hull-breaching and high-explosive payload, making them effective weapons against smaller capital ships.

talon_paint_alienweek_green_green_brown.label: Talon Luminary Livery
talon_paint_alienweek_green_green_brown.description: The Luminary livery gives the Talon a glossy green base paint with brown highlights for a dazzlingly beautiful and complex design.

talon_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_pu.label: Talon Wanderer Livery
talon_paint_alienweek_platinum_silver_pu.description: The Wanderer livery features crisscrossing purple and grey lines over a platinum foundation. Inspired by the sacred Xi'an gardens of R.aip?uang, famous for its trails that wander in surprising ways and encourage a focus on the journey instead of the destination.

talon_paint_blue.label: Talon Cobalt Livery
talon_paint_blue.description: Standout with this cool blue livery custom designed for the Esperia Talon and its Shrike variant.

talon_paint_harmony.label: Talon Harmony Livery
talon_paint_harmony.description: The Harmony livery is meant to showcase Humanity's peaceful relationship with aliens with a semi-pearlescent blue main coat marked with organic reflective red to suggest the coming together of disparate species and cultures. The Harmony livery has been designed and produced by the UEE's Diplomatic Corps and freely licensed to all spacecraft manufacturers. Now Esperia Talon owners can celebrate the UEE's intentions of working toward a peaceful galaxy.

talon_paint_ocellus_green_red.label: Talon Ocellus Livery
talon_paint_ocellus_green_red.description: The Ocellus livery replicates the look of the Talon during the Second Tevarin War. It features a bold red fuselage meant to draw attention and trick aggressors into shooting at the most heavily armored part of the ship.

talon_paint_red.label: Talon Crimson Livery
talon_paint_red.description: Standout with this striking red livery custom designed for the Esperia Talon and its Shrike variant.

talon_stalker_platform_x4.label: Talon Stalker Quad Rack
talon_stalker_platform_x4.description: Talon Stalker missiles track and lock their target by use of highly sensitive optical cameras and image processing software. Although they have an increased lock time over other missile types, they are much more difficult for targets to shake once lock is attained. Rack of four (4).

talon_stalker_quad.label: Talon Quad Rack
talon_stalker_quad.description: Manufacturer: Talon Weapon Systems Built to Talon’s standard of rugged excellence, this Quad Rack fits to any compatible hardpoint to carry four missiles.

talon_stalker_twin.label: Talon Twin Rack
talon_stalker_twin.description: Manufacturer: Talon Weapon Systems Built to Talon's standard of rugged excellence, this Double Rack fits to any compatible hardpoint to carry four missiles.

terrapin_paint_bis2954.label: Terrapin 2954 Best in Show Livery
terrapin_paint_bis2954.description: This purple and white 2954 Best in Show Livery celebrates the Terrapin making it to the final four of the 2954 Ship Showdown.

terrapin_paint_blue_green.label: Terrapin Seabed Livery
terrapin_paint_blue_green.description: Bring a beautiful blue with grey and green highlights to the Terrapin with the Seabed livery.

terrapin_paint_halloween2024_blood.label: Terrapin Purple Haze Livery
terrapin_paint_halloween2024_blood.description: Celebrate Day of the Vara in style with the Purple Haze livery, featuring a glimmering metallic purple base paint splattered in green.

terrapin_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Terrapin Deck the Hull Livery
terrapin_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

terrapin_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Terrapin IceBreak Livery
terrapin_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Terrapin with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

terrapin_paint_red_teal.label: Terrapin Vitality Livery
terrapin_paint_red_teal.description: The Vitality livery brings a bright white base paint with teal and red accents to the Terrapin.

terrapin_paint_yellow_red.label: Terrapin Felicity Livery
terrapin_paint_yellow_red.description: Make the Terrapin highly visible with the Felicity livery, featuring a primarily yellow base with grey and red accents.

tiburon_paint_blue_lightblue_red.label: Tiburon Colmillos Livery
tiburon_paint_blue_lightblue_red.description: Tear your enemies to pieces with the Colmillos livery, transforming the Tiburon with a steely blue and ferocious shark teeth.

tiburon_paint_green_green_red.label: Tiburon Pinnacle Livery
tiburon_paint_green_green_red.description: Predominately a military green with touches of red, the Pinnacle livery brings a grounded aesthetic to the Tiburon.

tiburon_paint_grey_white_silver.label: Tiburon Enforcer Livery
tiburon_paint_grey_white_silver.description: Combining shades of gray, white and silver, the Enforcer livery emphasizes the sturdiness of the Tiburon with its layered appearance.

tiburon_paint_red_grey_grey.label: Tiburon Vermillion Livery
tiburon_paint_red_grey_grey.description: The Vermillion livery utilizes a striking red as its primary color, complete with deep black accents.

ticket_darkwater_gold_01.label: CDF F8C Certification Pass (Gold)
ticket_darkwater_gold_01.description: The Civilian Defense Force is working in conjunction with Anvil Aerospace to test the next generation of volunteers. This certification ticket can be redeemed at any rental kiosk to unlock an F8C rental for twenty-four (24) Standard Earth Hours and make the ship available for purchase via the web pledge store. Congratulations.

ticket_darkwater_plat_01.label: CDF F8C Certification Pass (Platinum)
ticket_darkwater_plat_01.description: The Civilian Defense Force is working in conjunction with Anvil Aerospace to test the next generation of volunteers. This platinum certification entitles you to a free F8C from Anvil Aerospace, if you can make it to an eligible ship sale kiosk to turn it in. Check your mobi for details. Good luck and let the hunt begin.

torshucrab.label: Thorshu Grey
torshucrab.description: Considered to be quite a delicacy in many restaurants due to the tender meat, the Thorshu can be found in the colder climates of southern Terra. Also was the basis of Waka Grey, the sidekick from a 27th century children’s show.

turret_pdc_behr_g.label: MRX "Torrent"
turret_pdc_behr_g.description: Item Type: Ballistic Gatling Turret Manufacturer: Behring The latest generation of point-defense technology, the MRX "Torrent" utilizes advanced search, detection, and tracking software to unleash a swift barrage of ballistic fire, protecting ships from incoming missiles, torpedoes, and other high-speed threats.

tyilui_paint_black_black_black_stencil_2.label: Tyilui Tatomidae Livery
tyilui_paint_black_black_black_stencil_2.description: The Tatomidae edition features an elegant, metallic, maroon wave-pattern across the sleek, dark hull.

tyilui_paint_bronze_grey_teal.label: Tyilui Insularis Livery
tyilui_paint_bronze_grey_teal.description: The Insularis livery adds a sleek, ethereal teal and patina metal finish to emphasize and celebrate the otherworldly nature of the Tyilui.

tyilui_paint_gold_grey_grey_stencil_1.label: Tyilui Uamchuai Livery
tyilui_paint_gold_grey_grey_stencil_1.description: The Uamchuai edition breaks the mold with grey and sand-brown base, with flattering dusty gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

tyilui_paint_grey_grey_gold.label: Tyilui Agapanthia Livery
tyilui_paint_grey_grey_gold.description: The Agapanthia edition bears a sleek black base with subtle dark gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

tyilui_paint_white_grey_gold.label: Tyilui Ch.iing Livery
tyilui_paint_white_grey_gold.description: The Ch.iing edition boasts a bold white base with eye-catching gold highlights that flow down the ship's hull.

umnt_anvl_s5_cap.label: Anvil Hornet Ghost Center Cap
umnt_anvl_s5_cap.description: This special center cap designed for the Hornet Ghost features additional faceted surfaces to potentially help radiate incoming radar energy.

umnt_anvl_s5_cap_mk2.label: Anvil Hornet Ghost Mk II Center Cap
umnt_anvl_s5_cap_mk2.description: This special center cap designed for the Hornet Ghost features additional faceted surfaces to potentially help mitigate incoming radar energy.

umnt_anvl_s5_rotodome.label: WillsOp Long Look Radar
umnt_anvl_s5_rotodome.description: Manufacturer: WillsOp Item Type: Radar Size: 5 When the UEEN came to Anvil needing a ship to handle mobile C&C, Anvil turned to WillsOp, one of the most trusted names in scanning and deep-space radar. Together they developed the Long Look Radar (LLR) system as a way to upgrade the modern Hornets rather than developing an entirely new ship. Fully loaded with WillsOp’s suite of scan systems, the LLR now brings its raw analytical power to the civilian market, turning an already dependable vessel into a perfect scanning fighter.

umnt_misc_s03_pl01.label: Reliant Utility Mount Cap
umnt_misc_s03_pl01.description: Item Type: Utility Mount Cap (Reliant Exclusive) Manufacturer: MISC Size: 4 A utility mount cap designed specifically for use on the wings of the MISC Reliant.

utv_paint_brown_grey_red.label: UTV Resistor Camo Livery
utv_paint_brown_grey_red.description: Light brown and grey camo combine with red highlights for the Resistor Camo livery.

utv_paint_gold_black_black.label: UTV Bonanza Livery
utv_paint_gold_black_black.description: The Bonanza livery gives the UTV a lustrous look with its gold and black finish.

utv_paint_green_grey_red.label: UTV Wilderness Camo Livery
utv_paint_green_grey_red.description: The Wilderness Camo livery brings a classic green and grey camo pattern to the UTV with red highlights.

utv_paint_grey_black_orange.label: UTV Reckoner Livery
utv_paint_grey_black_orange.description: Bright pops of orange stand out against the grey base paint of the Reckoner livery.

utv_paint_white_blue_blue.label: UTV Keystone Livery
utv_paint_white_blue_blue.description: Crisp white with blue accents, the Keystone livery celebrates the workers whose mining, refining, hauling, salvaging, and more have made the empire what it is today.

ursa_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skull.label: Ursa Skullcrusher Livery
ursa_paint_black_grey_red_pirate_skull.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Ursa, which features a massive skull across the top.

ursa_paint_black_white_grey.label: Ursa Respite Livery
ursa_paint_black_white_grey.description: The Respite is an exclusive livery for the Ursa, which is black and grey with white highlights.

ursa_paint_blue_white_grey.label: Ursa Aja Livery
ursa_paint_blue_white_grey.description: Inspired by the hue of a medicinal plant found on Terra, the Aja livery for the Ursa is dark blue with white and grey highlights.

ursa_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Ursa Deck the Hull Livery
ursa_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

ursa_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Ursa IceBreak Livery
ursa_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Ursa with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

ursa_paint_red.label: Ursa Red Livery
ursa_paint_red.description: Customize your RSI Ursa Rover with this red livery.

ursa_paint_teal_white_grey.label: Ursa Oasis Livery
ursa_paint_teal_white_grey.description: Announce your arrival with the Oasis livery for the Ursa, which is a vibrant teal tint with grey and white accents.

vncl_blade_laserrepeater_s3.label: Vanduul S3 Repeater
vncl_blade_laserrepeater_s3.description: A Size 3 Laser Repeater of Vanduul construction.

vncl_blade_plasmacannon_s2.label: Vanduul S2 Repeater
vncl_blade_plasmacannon_s2.description: A Size 2 Plasma Repeater of Vanduul construction.

vncl_gen2_laserbeam_s9.label: Vanduul Mauler 'IGNITER' Beam
vncl_gen2_laserbeam_s9.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Laser Beam This destructive laser beam typically found on Vanduul warships, is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation, 'IGNITER'.

vncl_gen2_laserrepeater_s6.label: Vanduul Mauler 'STRIKER' Repeater
vncl_gen2_laserrepeater_s6.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Laser Repeater This close range laser repeater, standard for larger Vanduul capital ships, is referred to by the UEE Navy's designation of 'STRIKER'.

vncl_gen2_plasmacannon_s8.label: Vanduul Mauler 'RAGE' Cannon
vncl_gen2_plasmacannon_s8.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Plasma Cannon This hard-hitting plasma cannon, often seen on Vanduul battleships, is referred to as 'RAGE,' its UEE designation.

vncl_gen2_tachyoncannon_s10.label: Vanduul Mauler 'ANNIHILATOR' Cannon
vncl_gen2_tachyoncannon_s10.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Tachyon Cannon This devestatingly powerful Tachyon cannon, typically found on large-scale Vanduul capital ships, is more commonly referred to by its UEE Navy designation of 'ANNIHILATOR'.

vncl_gen2_tachyoncannon_s7.label: Vanduul Mauler 'ERADICATOR' Cannon
vncl_gen2_tachyoncannon_s7.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Tachyon Cannon This powerful Tachyon cannon, prized on Vanduul warships for it's long range, is more commonly referred to by it's designated UEE designation of 'ERADICATOR'.

vncl_lasercannon_s1.label: 'WEAK' Repeater
vncl_lasercannon_s1.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 1 This laser repeater is typically found on Vanduul war ships and is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WEAK'.

vncl_lasercannon_s2.label: 'WASP' Repeater
vncl_lasercannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Laser Repeater Size: 2 This laser repeater is typically found on Vanduul war ships and is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WASP'.

vncl_mark_platform_x3.label: Vanduul Scythe Missile Platform x3
vncl_mark_platform_x3.description: Missile platform for the Vanduul Scythe. Holds three missiles.

vncl_mark_platform_x4.label: Vanduul Scythe Missile Platform x4
vncl_mark_platform_x4.description: Missile platform for the Vanduul Scythe. Holds four missiles.

vncl_missilerack_blade.label: Ramming Blade
vncl_missilerack_blade.description: Blade component that can be used for ramming.

vncl_neutroncannon_s5.label: 'WAR' Cannon
vncl_neutroncannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Neutron Cannon Size: 5 This neutron cannon is typically found on Vanduul war ships and is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WAR'.

vncl_plasmacannon_s2.label: 'WHIP' Cannon
vncl_plasmacannon_s2.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Plasma Cannon Size: 2 This plasma cannon typically found on Vanduul war ships is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WHIP'.

vncl_plasmacannon_s3.label: 'WARLORD' Cannon
vncl_plasmacannon_s3.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Plasma Cannon Size: 3 This plasma cannon typically found on Vanduul war ships is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WARLORD'.

vncl_plasmacannon_s5.label: 'WRATH' Cannon
vncl_plasmacannon_s5.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul / Esperia Item Type: Plasma Canon Size: 5 This laser repeater is typically found on Vanduul war ships and is commonly known by its UEE Navy designation of 'WRATH'.

vncl_plasmacannon_stinger_s5.label: Vanduul S5 Cannon
vncl_plasmacannon_stinger_s5.description: A Size 5 Plasma Autocannon of Vanduul construction.

vncl_tachyoncannon_kingship.label: Kingship Tachyon
vncl_tachyoncannon_kingship.description: Manufacturer: Vanduul Item Type: Tachyon Cannon

valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_1.label: Valkyrie Light Grey Livery
valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_1.description: Customize your Valkyrie with this livery featuring a light grey color scheme with dark, bold patterns.

valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_2.label: Valkyrie Sage Livery
valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_2.description: Customize your Valkyrie with this light green livery.

valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_3.label: Valkyrie Splinter Livery
valkyrie_paint_2950invictus_3.description: Customize your Valkyrie with this fragmented green livery.

valkyrie_paint_bis2950.label: Valkyrie 2950 Best In Show Livery
valkyrie_paint_bis2950.description: Customize your Valkyrie with this special 2950 Best in Show livery that is white with grey and gold accents.

valkyrie_paint_unity.label: Valkyrie Foundation Fest Livery
valkyrie_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

vanguard_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.label: Vanguard Fortuna Livery
vanguard_paint_2953fortuna_green_grey.description: Make luck your co-pilot. Boldly set your sights on the stars and adventure forth in style with the Fortuna livery. This Stella Fortuna themed paint scheme is primarily green with grey accents.

vanguard_paint_blue_blue_white_stripe.label: Vanguard Clawed Steel Livery
vanguard_paint_blue_blue_white_stripe.description: The Clawed Steel livery blends several shades of blue for a livery that beautifully breaks up the Vanguard's silhouette.

vanguard_paint_blue_white_yellow_stripe.label: Vanguard True Valor Livery
vanguard_paint_blue_white_yellow_stripe.description: The striking True Valor livery gives the Vanguard a white cockpit, blue body, and yellow tails and fins.

vanguard_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.label: Vanguard Timberline Livery
vanguard_paint_fleetweek_level1_military.description: Customize your Vanguard with the Timberline livery that's olive green with orange accents.

vanguard_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.label: Vanguard Frostbite Camo Livery
vanguard_paint_fleetweek_level2_camo.description: Soar like the winter winds with the Frostbite Camo livery for your Vanguard.

vanguard_paint_gold_gold_black_stripe.label: Vanguard New Dawn Livery
vanguard_paint_gold_gold_black_stripe.description: Proudly proclaim that your Vanguard is a predator with the New Dawn livery. Inspired by the patterns seen in nature, this livery mixes orange and gold with black stripes for a supremely unique look.

vanguard_paint_invictus_blue_gold.label: Vanguard Invictus Blue and Gold Livery
vanguard_paint_invictus_blue_gold.description: Featuring a vibrant blue base color and gold highlights, the Invictus Blue and Gold livery will give your Vanguard a striking style.

vanguard_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.label: Vanguard Solar Winds Livery
vanguard_paint_solarwinds_metal_red.description: Fly in style with the Solar Winds livery that gives the Vanguard a metallic silver finish with maroon highlights.

vulture_paint_assembly.label: Vulture Assembly Livery
vulture_paint_assembly.description: Make them see red! The Assembly livery is a full fuselage red design with black and silver accents that makes sure your spacecraft is easily identifiable during salvage operations.

vulture_paint_bis2953_purple_blue_cyan.label: Vulture 2953 Best in Show Livery
vulture_paint_bis2953_purple_blue_cyan.description: Celebrate the Drake Vulture being voted a Best in Show finalist for 2953 with this pearlescent purple and cyan livery.

vulture_paint_beige_tan_beige_pyro_graff.label: Vulture Dying Star Livery (Modified)
vulture_paint_beige_tan_beige_pyro_graff.description: This version of the livery has been modified from its original form with the addition of graffiti. Sold in 2943 to celebrate the 450th anniversary of Pyro's discovery, the Dying Star livery is tan with brown and black highlights. It also features branding from Pyrotechnic Amalgamated, the now defunct mining company that found and named the system.

vulture_paint_carbonide.label: Vulture Carbonide Livery
vulture_paint_carbonide.description: When salvage operations need to be done quietly, the Carbonide livery offers a distinct grey-on-grey alternating layout intended to obscure the spacecraft against a usual starfield.

vulture_paint_coramor_2956_purple_pink_g.label: Vulture Heartthrob Livery
vulture_paint_coramor_2956_purple_pink_g.description: Make people weak in the knees by adorning the Vulture with the Hearthrob livery, featuring a shimmering violet paint scheme.

vulture_paint_fleetweek_black_pink_strip.label: Vulture Carnival Livery
vulture_paint_fleetweek_black_pink_strip.description: A working salvage crew needs any advantage they can get to be noticed in a busy environment. Enter the Carnival livery, a stunning pink hull with black highlights and distinctive stripes running down the ship's arms.

vulture_paint_fleetweek_black_yellow.label: Vulture Pyrite Livery
vulture_paint_fleetweek_black_yellow.description: Vulture operators who choose the Pyrite livery never have to apologize for sporting a little style. A stealthy matte black and silver hull contrasts sharply with silver and yellow topped arms.

vulture_paint_green_black.label: Vulture Ghoulish Green Livery
vulture_paint_green_black.description: Embrace Day of the Vara mischievousness and mayhem any time of the year with this custom Vulture livery. It combines metallic green and black for a striking look that highlights the holiday's classic colors.

vulture_paint_longhorn.label: Vulture Longhorn Livery
vulture_paint_longhorn.description: For the Vulture captain dedicated to a hard day's work, the Longhorn livery's black-and-burnt orange hull with rough silver highlights lend a classic industrial feel to the famed spacecraft.

vulture_paint_luminalia_green_red.label: Vulture Deck the Hull Livery
vulture_paint_luminalia_green_red.description: Express your holiday spirit with the Deck the Hull livery, which uses the traditional Luminalia colors of green and red to celebrate the popular Banu festival that's become beloved by Humans.

vulture_paint_luminalia_white_blue.label: Vulture IceBreak Livery
vulture_paint_luminalia_white_blue.description: Equip your Vulture with a paint scheme cooler than a snow storm. The IceBreak livery mixes crisp, cool white with a frostbitten blue for an exciting look suitable for any season.

vulture_paint_oriole.label: Vulture Oriole Livery
vulture_paint_oriole.description: The Oriole livery offers Vulture captains a no-nonsense matte grey toned hull patterned after those operated by military organizations. Understated orange highlights mark the craft's salvage-and-recovery role.

vulture_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.label: Vulture Skullcrusher Livery
vulture_paint_pirateweek_red_black_skull.description: Exude attitude with the Skullcrusher livery for the Vulture, which features a massive skull across the top.

vulture_paint_scavengers_black_black_bla.label: Vulture Outcast Livery (Modified)
vulture_paint_scavengers_black_black_bla.description: This version of the livery has been modified from its original form with the addition of graffiti. Embrace chaos with the Outcast livery. It features rough splashes of neon green against black to give the Vulture an aggressively chaotic appearance.

vulture_paint_unity.label: Vulture Foundation Fest Livery
vulture_paint_unity.description: Foundation Festival is an opportunity for Citizens and Civilians to come together and strengthen the foundation of our community. Show your commitment to a better universe with this custom livery.

wolf_paint_black_black_red_camo.label: Wolf Nightbreak Livery
wolf_paint_black_black_red_camo.description: Discreetly soar through the night sky in the Wolf with the Nightbreak livery, which is primarily black with red highlights.

wolf_paint_black_bronze_blue.label: Wolf Riftwalker Livery
wolf_paint_black_bronze_blue.description: Complement the elegant design of the Kruger Wolf with the Riftwalker livery, which is primarily black with bronze and blue highlights.

wolf_paint_blue_yellow_red_stripes.label: Wolf Heatsink Livery
wolf_paint_blue_yellow_red_stripes.description: The Heatsink livery features a two-tone striped blue base paint with bold yellow and red highlights.

wolf_paint_carbon_red_white.label: Wolf HighSec Livery
wolf_paint_carbon_red_white.description: The HighSec livery gives the Wolf a carbon fiber finish with red accents.

wolf_paint_green_red_yellow_camo.label: Wolf Sylvan Camo Livery
wolf_paint_green_red_yellow_camo.description: Brandish a green and brown camo pattern with red and yellow highlights on the Kruger Wolf with the Sylvan Camo livery.

wolf_paint_lightgrey_grey_red_camo.label: Wolf Frost Camo Livery
wolf_paint_lightgrey_grey_red_camo.description: The Frost Camo livery is crisp white with a subtle camo pattern and grey and red highlights.

wolf_paint_red_grey_blue.label: Wolf Rosso Livery
wolf_paint_red_grey_blue.description: Live bright and bold with the stark red of the Rosso livery and ensure that everyone will see the unique beauty of the Kruger Wolf.

wolf_paint_blue_red_white_stripes.label: Wolf Antilles Livery
wolf_paint_blue_red_white_stripes.description: The Antilles livery for the Wolf features a vibrant, electric blue base paint and bright red tail section.

wolf_paint_green_yellow_white_camo.label: Wolf Ranger Camo Livery
wolf_paint_green_yellow_white_camo.description: Mixing a green camo pattern on the front with a bright yellow back makes the Ranger Camo an attention-getting choice for the Wolf.

wolf_paint_grey_black_orange_camo.label: Wolf Nighttide Camo Livery
wolf_paint_grey_black_orange_camo.description: Orange highlights provide a bit of color to the gray and black Nighttide Camo livery.

wolf_paint_silver_yellow_white_stripes.label: Wolf Allegro Livery
wolf_paint_silver_yellow_white_stripes.description: With a look inspired by racing ships, the Allegro livery spotlights the sleek, aerodynamic design of the Wolf.

wolf_paint_white_grey_white_spots.label: Wolf Iceflash Livery
wolf_paint_white_grey_white_spots.description: The Iceflash livery provides the Wolf a distinct look with grey spots breaking up its grey and white base paint.

x1_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.label: X1 2954 Auspicious Red Dog Livery
x1_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dog.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dog livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dog.

x1_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dragon.label: X1 2954 Auspicious Red Dragon Livery
x1_paint_2954redfestival_red_gold_dragon.description: Seek peace and prosperity in the new year with the Auspicious Red Dragon livery. Outfit your ship with this bold red base paint complemented by gold accents and a stylized graphic of a dragon.

x1_paint_black_black_orange.label: X1 Shadow Livery
x1_paint_black_black_orange.description: Infinity Custom worked with Origin on the Shadow livery for the X1, which is primarily black with grey lettering and orange highlights.

x1_paint_blue_black_white.label: X1 Blueshift Livery
x1_paint_blue_black_white.description: Infinity Custom worked with Origin on the Blueshift livery, which is dark blue and black with X1 in vibrant white.

x1_paint_grey_orange_white.label: X1 Supersonic Livery
x1_paint_grey_orange_white.description: Infinity Custom worked with Origin to design the Supersonic livery for the X1. It is grey with orange highlights to accent the vehicle's streamlined design.

x1_paint_red_white_black.label: X1 Scarlet Livery
x1_paint_red_white_black.description: Infinity Custom worked closely with Origin to develop the exclusive Scarlet livery, which enhances the striking look of the X1 with bold red accents.

xfrg_fp_rmi_s2_q1.label: XForge P/S2-80 Main Engine
xfrg_fp_rmi_s2_q1.description: The X-Forge P/S2-80 is a small thruster that mainly finds use on Aurora class starships. Boasting good thrust output and fuel efficiency, the P/S2-80 is an excellent choice for those with a bit of wanderlust.

xian_lasercannon_s3.label: XIAN S3 Cannon
xian_lasercannon_s3.description: A Size 3 Laser Autocannon S3 of Xi'an construction.

xnaa_santokyai_mount_gimbal.label: San'tok.yāi Gimbal Mount
xnaa_santokyai_mount_gimbal.description: Manufacturer: Aopoa Item Type: Weapon Mount Size: 3 Line up the perfect shot with help from this S3 gimbal mount. Made by Aopoa specifically for the San'tok.yāi, this gimbal can handle weapons up to S3.

zeus_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orange.label: Zeus Best in Show 2955 Livery
zeus_paint_bis2955_orange_black_orange.description: Commemorate the Zeus making the final four of the 2955 Ship Showdown with this striking metallic orange and black Best in Show livery.

zeus_paint_black_steel_orange.label: Zeus MK II Starscape Livery
zeus_paint_black_steel_orange.description: The subtle style of the Starscape livery features black and steel-colored panels with orange highlights.

zeus_paint_blue_black_white.label: Zeus Mk II Firmament Livery
zeus_paint_blue_black_white.description: The Firmament livery makes the Zeus Mk II a beautiful light blue with black and white highlights.

zeus_paint_gobling_a_red_black.label: Zeus ArcCorp Livery
zeus_paint_gobling_a_red_black.description: The ArcCorp livery for the Zeus features the company's logo atop a maroon base paint with black and yellow highlights.

zeus_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.label: Zeus Crusader Livery
zeus_paint_gobling_c_blue_black.description: The Crusader livery for the Zeus features the company's logo atop a light blue base paint with black and white highlights.

zeus_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.label: Zeus Hurston Livery
zeus_paint_gobling_h_black_yellow.description: The Hurston livery for the Zeus features the company's logo atop a grey base paint with yellow highlights.

zeus_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.label: Zeus microTech Livery
zeus_paint_gobling_m_white_blue.description: The microTech livery for the Zeus features the company's logo atop a white base paint with light blue and grey highlights.

zeus_paint_green_black_yellow.label: Zeus Mk II Monteverde Livery
zeus_paint_green_black_yellow.description: Featuring a lush green with yellow and black highlights, the Monteverde livery gives you a colorful option for the Zeus Mk II.

zeus_paint_halloween2024_blood.label: Zeus MK II Purple Haze Livery
zeus_paint_halloween2024_blood.description: Celebrate Day of the Vara in style with the Purple Haze livery, featuring a glimmering metallic purple base paint splattered in green.

zeus_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.label: Zeus Lovestruck Livery
zeus_paint_lovestruck_pink_black.description: Inspired by the colors of Coramor, the Lovestruck livery is a stylish metallic pink and black look for your Zeus.

zeus_paint_metal_black_white.label: Zeus Mk II Obsidian Livery
zeus_paint_metal_black_white.description: The Obsidian livery uses black, white, and a metallic finish to give the Zeus Mk II a distinctly bold look.

zeus_paint_orange_grey_black.label: Zeus MK II Solar Livery
zeus_paint_orange_grey_black.description: Primarily orange with a grey central line and highlights, the Solar livery for the Zeus Mk II was designed to match the colors of the iconic Zeus suit variant of the same name.

zeus_paint_reward_faction_cfp.label: Zeus Citizens for Prosperity Garnet Livery
zeus_paint_reward_faction_cfp.description: Join the Citizens for Prosperity in their mission to bring peace to the frontier with this dark grey and burgandy livery featuring the group's signature logo.

zeus_paint_reward_faction_frontierfighte.label: Zeus Frontier Fighters Camo Livery
zeus_paint_reward_faction_frontierfighte.description: Be ready to battle in the untamed wilds with this green camo livery featuring the logo of the Frontier Fighters vigilante group.

zeus_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.label: Zeus Headhunters Trauma Livery
zeus_paint_reward_faction_headhunters.description: Show your loyalty to the Headhunters gang with this livery featuring their logo emblazoned on a dark grey hull accented with a vibrant purple.

zeus_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.label: Zeus XenoThreat Purge Livery
zeus_paint_reward_faction_xenothreat.description: Let Humanity know you won't bow down to alien invaders with this XenoThreat livery featuring a muted teal with bright red accents.

zeus_paint_vip_paleblue_gold_black.label: Zeus Mk II Solstice Livery
zeus_paint_vip_paleblue_gold_black.description: Outfit the ship that launched Humanity into the stars with the gorgeous Solstice livery. Grey and black panels accented by ribbons of gold give the Zeus Mk II a distinguished and unforgettable appearance.

zeus_paint_white_grey_black.label: Zeus Mk II Frontier Livery
zeus_paint_white_grey_black.description: The Frontier livery highlights the dynamic angular design of the Zeus Mk II. The white in the front extends into the grey back half of the ship down the center of the fuselage and edge of each wing.

zeus_paint_yellow_black_yellow.label: Zeus Mk II Sunswept Livery
zeus_paint_yellow_black_yellow.description: Proclaim your presence with the Sunswept livery for the Zeus Mk II, which features a vibrant yellow with black highlights.

987_jacket_01_01_01.label: Legion Jacket
987_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Crafted from a slick, high-shine weave, the Legion was conceived by 987 and famed Terran underground designer, Jieto, to shock the status quo of hooded jackets and usher in a new era of aesthetic functionality. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

987_jacket_02_01_01.label: Horde Jacket
987_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Complementary pieces come together to form the Horde. This striking jacket from 987 features a strong asymmetrical design with a high-lo hem and aggressive detailing on the sleeves. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

987_hat_01_01_01.label: Bantam Hat Orange
987_hat_01_01_01.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a white front with an orange back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_badgerbad.label: Bantam Hat Badger Bad
987_hat_01_01_badgerbad.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Badger Bad logo on the front with a gray back and red bill.

987_hat_01_01_dmc.label: Bantam Hat DMC
987_hat_01_01_dmc.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Denim Manufacture Corporation logo on the front with an dark slate back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_philsfillup.label: Bantam Hat Phill's Fill-Up
987_hat_01_01_philsfillup.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Phil's Fill-Up logo on the front with a red back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_storall.label: Bantam Hat Stor*All
987_hat_01_01_storall.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a Stor*All logo on the front with an orange back and gray bill.

987_hat_01_01_taba.label: Bantam Hat TABA
987_hat_01_01_taba.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a green front with a T.A.B.A Freightline logo paired with a dark gray back and bill.

987_hat_01_01_urw.label: Bantam Hat URW
987_hat_01_01_urw.description: The Bantam hat from 987 offers a large bill and cushioned banding for all-day comfort. This version features a United Resource Worker's logo on the front with a gray back and bill.

987_jacket_03_01_01.label: Tempo Jacket Gold
987_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Fashionable, fun and flashy, the Tempo is a quilt studded jacket featuring a unique metallic finish to make you stand out from the crowd. 987 balanced this bold design with sections of synthetic leather and complementary colors ringing the waistband and inner collar.

987_jacket_03_01_9tails01.label: Tempo Jacket (Modified)
987_jacket_03_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This version of 987's Tempo jacket has been modified from its original form. Fashionable, fun and flashy, the Tempo is a quilt studded jacket featuring a unique metallic finish to make you stand out from the crowd. 987 balanced this bold design with sections of synthetic leather and complementary colors ringing the waistband and inner collar.

987_jacket_05_01_01.label: Faction Jacket Purple
987_jacket_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Whether you're coasting through outdoor adventures or cruising to exclusive afterparties, the Faction coat is sure to turn heads. Fusing sections of ultra-insulated brick quilting with 987's DuraBull ripstop reinforced fabric, you'll stay warm while still looking cool.

987_pants_01_01_01.label: Torreto Pants Blue
987_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU 987 redefines classic slacks with the Torreto. These mid-rise, straight cut pants incorporate a section of fabric studding along the side seam to provide a pop of personality.

987_pants_01_01_9tails01.label: Torreto Pants (Modified)
987_pants_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU This version of 987's Torreto pants has been modified from its original form. 987 redefines classic slacks with the Torreto. These mid-rise, straight cut pants incorporate a section of fabric studding along the side seam to provide a pop of personality.

987_pants_03_01_01.label: Union Pants Blue
987_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU 987 delivers comfort, durability, and style with the Union pants. Designed with a special, next-gen blend of high-performance synthetic fabrics, these pants are enduringly fashionable in these modern times.

987_pants_03_01_9tails01.label: Union Pants (Modified)
987_pants_03_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU This version of 987's Union pants has been modified from its original form. 987 delivers comfort, durability, and style with the Union pants. Designed with a special, next-gen blend of high-performance synthetic fabrics, these pants are enduringly fashionable in these modern times.

987_shirt_01_01_01.label: Hyper Vanguard Force T-Shirt
987_shirt_01_01_01.description: The battle against pirate captain Balthazar jumps from the arcade to this animated t-shirt. Special fabric scrolls graphics from 'Hyper Vanguard Force IV' to celebrate this arcade classic from Original System.

987_shirt_03_01_01.label: Adrift Shirt Purple
987_shirt_03_01_01.description: The Adrift mock neck sweater takes the idea of fashion as entertainment to the next level. This comfortable fiber blend material features a special vid-fabric depicting a dynamic space scene to ensure that people won't be able to keep their eyes off you.

987_shoes_01_01_01.label: UrbEx Boots Grey
987_shoes_01_01_01.description: From bustling backstreets to crowded clubs, the UrbEx boots will make your next step a bold one. The boots blend a stylish design with reinforced high ankle support and ultra durable outsoles.

987_shoes_01_01_20.label: ThermoWeave Boots ASD Edition
987_shoes_01_01_20.description: The ThermoWeave boots receive a special dual-coat to achieve the same fire-rating as the rest of the suit. The boots also have reinforced high ankle support and ultra durable, anti-slip outsoles. Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

alb_bandana_01_01_shared.label: Burgundy Paisley Bandana
alb_bandana_01_01_shared.description: Made from only the finest cotton, this bandana from Alejo Brothers features a double-sided print and sewn edges to guarantee durability.

alb_jacket_01_01_01.label: Tuvic Outerwear Jacket Mil-Green
alb_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Alejo Brothers have seamlessly blended functionality and style with the Tuvic line of outerwear. These rugged jackets feature reinforced leather padding to offer additional protection and support while still maintaining a modern aesthetic. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

alb_jacket_01_ruso.label: Tuvic Outerwear Jacket Rust Society
alb_jacket_01_ruso.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Proudly wear your support of the Rust Society with this custom version of Alejo Brothers' classic Tuvic Outerwear industrial jacket. The perfect companion for those long hauls and endless digs. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

basl_combat_light_core_01_01_01.label: Advocacy Interceptor Core
basl_combat_light_core_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU Backpack Compatibility: NA The Advocacy Interceptor is lightweight yet ultra resilient armor that provides protection without sacrificing mobility. Mixing impact resistant fabrics with precision plating, the armor also comes with easily accessible pouches on the waist and adjustable straps to ensure an ideal fit. This system is extensively used by the Advocacy thanks to the armor's excellent comfort, quality, and protection.

basl_combat_light_helmet_01_01_01.label: Advocacy Interceptor Helmet
basl_combat_light_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -31 / 61 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The unique open-faced design makes the Advocacy Interceptor helmet a lightweight and liberating option for operating in atmosphere. It features precisely layered plating to protect the head from a variety of combat and environmental hazards and an impact resistant, anti-glare visor over the eyes. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

basl_undersuit_01_01_01.label: Advocacy Interceptor Racing Flight Suit
basl_undersuit_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Flight Suit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +100% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Featuring a deceptively simple design, the Advocacy Interceptor is jet black with reinforced grey protective padding on the arms and legs. Basilisk's renowned craftsmanship make this flight suit durable and supremely comfortable, leaving no mystery as to why it's widely used by the Advocacy.

cbd_hat_01_01_01.label: MC-DFA Hat
cbd_hat_01_01_01.description: This military cadet hat from CBD blends lightweight fabric and leather for a striking design. Featuring a white skull offset on the front and "Death From Above" on the side. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_01_01_shared.label: MC-DFA Hat
cbd_hat_01_01_shared.description: This military cadet hat from CBD blends lightweight fabric and leather for a striking design. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_02_01_shared.label: MC-Pinhead Hat
cbd_hat_02_01_shared.description: Metal bullet studs are embedded into the front of this military cadet hat from CBD, which also features RAGE written across the side. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_jacket_01_01_shared.label: Daredevil Jacket
cbd_jacket_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Express your attitude with this ultramodern crash jacket from CBD. An asymmetrical front zipper, arm and shoulder straps help provide additional style for this unique piece.

cbd_pants_01_01_01.label: Skellig Pants Dark
cbd_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Get down and dirty with CBD's Skellig-wear. These utility pants feature durable vinyl-composite material with reinforced ridged kneepads.

cbd_shirt_01_01_01.label: Liar T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_01_01_01.description: Most may believe in Admiral Bishop, but you're not most people. You prefer to address him as Admiral Bullsh*t, so flaunt your intellectual independence with this shirt from CBD. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_02_01.label: Loudmouth T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_01_02_01.description: CBD's proud to introduce this graphic tee featuring the album artwork from The Leedos' classic debut album Never Silent. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_03_01.label: UEEx T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_01_03_01.description: Proclaim your passion for poli-rock rebels The Leedos with this lightweight and supremely soft shirt from CBD, featuring artwork from their United Empire of Extinction tour. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_01_04_01.label: Curser T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_01_04_01.description: Be crass and comfortable with this swearing skull shirt from CBD made from 100% ring-spun cotton. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_01_01.label: Thrasher T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_02_01_01.description: This thrash-tacular tee from CBD rocks Gutterwash's infamous half-human, half-Vanduul logo, and also features leather straps sewn into the shoulder slope seam. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_02_01.label: Basher T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_02_02_01.description: Be an officially authorized party monster in this Gutterwash graphic tee from CBD with double-stitched hem and sleeves to help it survive those wild nights. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_03_01.label: Slacker T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_02_03_01.description: Announce your apathy in this Gutterwash tee. Or don't. Like it'll really make a difference either way. CBD out. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_shirt_02_04_01.label: Face Melter T-Shirt
cbd_shirt_02_04_01.description: This shirt from CBD features an athletic cut and an eye-catching dripping skull graphic. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_trenchcoat_01.label: Duotone Duster
cbd_trenchcoat_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU A modern update of CBD's classic duster, this full-length coat features two-tone coloring and inlaid accents to make a bold statement whatever environment you're in.

cds_undersuit_armor_02_shared.label: TCS-4 Undersuit
cds_undersuit_armor_02_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% The FBL-8u is the first CDS undersuit to utilize the manufacturers new orb-weave technology that produces an impressively light yet strong material that can withstand the rigors of space travel. Originally developed to pair perfectly with CDS's FBL-8a light armor, it remains compatible with other armor sets.

cds_undersuit_armor_shared.label: TCS-4 Undersuit Woodland
cds_undersuit_armor_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% This comprehensive Tactical Combat Suit provides a complete sealed suit against vacuum, free range of motion, and interfaces seamlessly with compatible armor systems.

cds_undersuit_01_03_01.label: TCS-4 Undersuit Lifeforce
cds_undersuit_01_03_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% This comprehensive Tactical Combat Suit provides a complete sealed suit against vacuum, free range of motion, and interfaces seamlessly with compatible armor systems. The Lifeforce edition was designed with first responders in mind with a highly visible white, red, and grey color scheme.

clda_combat_light_helmet_01.label: Badami Helmet
clda_combat_light_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -38 / 68 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Badami helmet from Caldera provides premium head protection with a tough polycarbonate shell and an anti-microbial liner. Allowing you to boldly brave untamed locales and explore the dark corners of space.

comp_behr_s00_csvrp.label: CSV-RP
comp_behr_s00_csvrp.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Military Specced to meet the high demands of the military, Behring’s CSV-RP vehicle computer has been a staple in UEE tanks and other ground vehicles for centuries.

comp_behr_s00_csvtl.label: CSV-TL
comp_behr_s00_csvtl.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Military The CSV-TL computer system is powered by Behring to deliver more processing than previous- generation systems alongside innovative new processing algorithms for improved data handling.

comp_behr_s01_csrrp.label: CSR-RP
comp_behr_s01_csrrp.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military The CSR-RP from Behring provides trusted and consistent computing power in a streamlined package.

comp_behr_s01_csrtl.label: CSR-TL
comp_behr_s01_csrtl.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Fly with next-generation computer performance. The CSR-TL has low latency and plug-and-play compatibility with additional blade slots, all driven by Behring’s advanced operating technologies.

comp_behr_s02_csmrp.label: CSM-RP
comp_behr_s02_csmrp.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military The CSM-RP computer system brings Behring’s esteemed line of military-grade processors to private-sector ships.

comp_behr_s02_csmtl.label: CSM-TL
comp_behr_s02_csmtl.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Behring Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Behring packed plenty of raw power into the CSM-TL computer system. Armed with advanced data-cores running hex-threaded processors, it’s sure to provide all the computational brute force you need.

comp_bltr_s01_crypt.label: Crypt
comp_bltr_s01_crypt.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth The new Crypt from Blue Triangle Inc. is meticulously crafted to offer superior heat dissipation using advanced venting technology and premium materials, so that this computer system runs as cool as it looks.

comp_bltr_s01_cypher.label: Cypher
comp_bltr_s01_cypher.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth Designed to dispel both IR and EM signatures, the Cypher from Blue Triangle Inc has quietly been making a name for itself amongst consumers that prefer stealth components.

comp_brra_s01_lamarr.label: Lamarr
comp_brra_s01_lamarr.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Broad & Rabiee Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition The eccentric upstarts behind Broad & Rabiee cheekily named their competition-grade computer Lamarr in honor of a 28th century cult vid about an alien CPU that single-handedly overthrows the UEE government.

comp_brra_s01_pascal.label: Pascal
comp_brra_s01_pascal.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Broad & Rabiee Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition Broad and Rabiee engineered the ultimate computing experience when they designed the new lighter and faster Pascal data system.

comp_fsin_s02_compuware.label: CompuWare
comp_fsin_s02_compuware.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Friskers Semiconductor Inc. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Built to meet the demands of next generation ships, Friskers’ CompuWare features proprietary technologies for smooth data processing.

comp_mite_s01_dynasys.label: dynaSys
comp_mite_s01_dynasys.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: microTech Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian From trusted computer expert microTech, the dynaSys onboard system handles rapid data processing in a streamlined designed frame.

comp_sada_s01_ferric.label: Ferric
comp_sada_s01_ferric.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Saga Datasystems Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial Innovation never ends at Saga Datasystems. The Ferric computer was specifically refined to suit industrial ships and all their processing needs.

comp_sada_s01_wolfram.label: Wolfram
comp_sada_s01_wolfram.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Saga Datasystems Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial The Wolfram is one of the universe’s most powerful onboard computer systems. With Saga Datasystem’s incredible computing power and groundbreaking architecture, you’ll accomplish more than you ever thought possible.

comp_sada_s02_chrome.label: Chrome
comp_sada_s02_chrome.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Saga Datasystems Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial The new Saga Datasystems Chrome computational system works intelligently to improve data handling while simultaneously allowing for dynamic core processing.

comp_sada_s02_inox.label: Inox
comp_sada_s02_inox.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: Saga Datasystems Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial Before founding Saga Datasystem, Lavinia Kilo was an industrial engineer. Her love of versatile yet utilitarian components is reflected in the Inox — a computer system designed with the hauler in mind.

comp_wlop_s00_adze.label: Adze
comp_wlop_s00_adze.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian You can now experience the robust data processing of WillsOp in a mobile form factor with the Adze computing system.

comp_wlop_s00_chamfer.label: Chamfer
comp_wlop_s00_chamfer.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian You can now experience the power and performance of WillsOp in a mobile form factor. The Chamfer computing system provides all you data processing needs as you travel.

comp_wlop_s00_lattice.label: Lattice
comp_wlop_s00_lattice.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian This vehicle computer from WillsOp was designed to withstand the many harsh conditions you and your vehicle could find yourselves in as you explore the universe.

comp_wlop_s01_baier.label: Baier
comp_wlop_s01_baier.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Baier computer from WillsOp has a legion of fans thanks to consistent performance and renowned targeting software.

comp_wlop_s01_mitre.label: Mitre
comp_wlop_s01_mitre.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian The Mitre computing system is truly unique. Designed and built by WillsOp and crafted with premium materials and components, it is cooled by an advanced radial vapor exchanged for improved performance in most environments.

comp_wlop_s02_baas.label: Baas
comp_wlop_s02_baas.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Baas from WillsOp gives you superior performance to deliver one of the fastest and comprehensive computational experiences.

comp_wlop_s02_dado.label: Dado
comp_wlop_s02_dado.description: Item Type: Computer Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Dado ship computer from WillsOp comes standard with their proprietary targeting system software to help keep your ship safe.

cool_acom_s01_zerorush.label: ZeroRush
cool_acom_s01_zerorush.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition Few things can push your ship to its limits like racing. Going faster and harder generates a lot of excess heat that can take a toll on your system if not properly managed. The ZeroRush cooler from ACOM has what it takes to get you across the finish line.

cool_aegs_s01_glacier.label: Glacier
cool_aegs_s01_glacier.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military Your weapons, your shields, your thrusters. All vital during combat, all generating heat. Enter the Glacier cooler from Aegis Dynamics. A best-in-class heat management system designed to keep you cool as the pressure mounts.

cool_aegs_s02_avalanche.label: Avalanche
cool_aegs_s02_avalanche.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military Showcasing the best of mil-spec cooler technology, the Aegis Avalanche thermal management unit has been built from the ground up to endure the demanding needs of the battlefield.

cool_aegs_s02_permafrost.label: Permafrost
cool_aegs_s02_permafrost.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Designed by Aegis to military standards, the Permafrost cooler has proven itself time and again to be more than capable of handling heat processing even while under the strains of combat.

cool_aegs_s03_tempest.label: Tempest
cool_aegs_s03_tempest.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military On the frontlines, you want to know that your ship is going to perform as expected when you need it most. The mil-spec Tempest cooler sees to it that you can operate within safe thermal ratings for longer thanks to advanced manufacturing by Aegis.

cool_jspn_s00_cryostarsl.label: Cryo-Star SL
cool_jspn_s00_cryostarsl.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian J-Span’s done it again. The Cryo-Star SL incorporates the same consumer award winning performance and durability you’ve come to expect from a Cryo-Star, but now available for smaller vehicles.

cool_jspn_s03_cryostarxl.label: Cryo-Star XL
cool_jspn_s03_cryostarxl.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: J-Span Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian With its well-crafted design and dependable performance, the Cryo-Star XL cooler proves from the moment you use it that no one understands heat management better than J-Span.

cool_just_s01_ultraflow.label: Ultra-Flow
cool_just_s01_ultraflow.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk has crafted the Ultra-Flow to not only withstand the demanding cooling needs of your ship’s systems as it works, but to do it longer and better than other coolers in its class.

cool_just_s02_snowfall.label: Snowfall
cool_just_s02_snowfall.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial Few things can be as damaging to your ship over time as excess heat build up. The Juno Starwerk Snowfall cooler helps ensure that your ship stays the right temperature for longer, which means that you can keep flying for longer.

cool_just_s03_iceflush.label: Ice-Flush
cool_just_s03_iceflush.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Industrial The Juno Starwerk Ice-Flush cooler is built to withstand the heat demands and thermal strains that many industrial ships deal with as part of their average workday.

cool_lplt_s02_fullfrost.label: FullFrost
cool_lplt_s02_fullfrost.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Proper thermal management and heat distribution is a concern for any pilot who cares about the longevity and performance of their ship. Now you can fly easy knowing you have the advanced FullFrost cooler by Lightning Power aboard.

cool_lplt_s02_whiteout.label: WhiteOut
cool_lplt_s02_whiteout.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian Your ship faces a lot of extreme conditions while flying. From the coldness of space to the burning heat of a desert planet, the last thing you want to worry about is if your cooler can keep up. The entry-level WhiteOut from Lightning Power provides thermal management that can help make sure you get where you’re going.

cool_lplt_s03_frostbite.label: FrostBite
cool_lplt_s03_frostbite.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Keep your ship running smoothly with the Lightning Power FrostBite handling your thermal management needs. This consumer-grade cooler can process extra-heat and help maintain optimal running temperatures for all your components.

cool_tydt_s01_snowblind.label: SnowBlind
cool_tydt_s01_snowblind.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth An IR signature that is running hot is a surefire way to alert the entire sector to your whereabouts and can often potentially prove to be dangerous. With the Tyler Design & Tech Snowblind cooling system onboard you can significantly reduce your heat emissions while keeping your ship running within optimal thermal conditions.

cool_vncl_s01_cold.label: Vanduul Cold Cooler
cool_vncl_s01_cold.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Vanduul Size: 1 Grade: N/A Class: Military A small cooler found aboard Vanduul crafts and code-named “Cold” by the military, its thermo-tolerances have been tuned to meet the aggressive needs of Vanduul pilots.

cool_wcpr_s00_kelvid.label: Kelvid
cool_wcpr_s00_kelvid.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian The Kelvid is a high performance, rough and tumble cooler system designed to keep your vehicle humming for longer, rather than catching its breath.

cool_wcpr_s01_gelid.label: Gelid
cool_wcpr_s01_gelid.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Civilian Allowing for greater thermo-dispersal and improved performance output, the top-of-the-line Gelid cooler from Wen/Cassel is an all-inclusive heat management system ideal for a variety of ships.

cool_wcpr_s02_taiga.label: Taiga
cool_wcpr_s02_taiga.description: Item Type: Cooler Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Wen/Cassel has worked long and hard to develop quality coolers like the latest edition Taiga, which can process and manage excess heat while consistently maintaining the high standards that they have become known for.

ctl_hat_01_01_shared.label: Rabat Hat Blue
ctl_hat_01_01_shared.description: A classic structured baseball cap with an accent stripe to add a pop of color. City Lights' proprietary COOL-WEV technology keeps your head cool and dry in any environment. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_jacket_01_01_shared.label: Sturgis Jacket Original
ctl_jacket_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU A modern take on the iconic crash jacket, the Sturgis from City Lights stands out thanks to its asymmetrical main zipper and plethora of pockets, but its timeless design will keep you in style for years. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_jacket_02_01_shared.label: Rhodes Jacket White
ctl_jacket_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU A classic racer jacket elevated by detailed seam work, a collar strap and decorative, eye-catching flourishes on the chest and arms. City Lights has once again redefined fashion and comfort.

ctl_jacket_03_01_shared.label: Lanxi Jacket Gray
ctl_jacket_03_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This simple knit jacket from City Lights features a classic cut and chic microseam technology to create a thoroughly modern addition to any wardrobe. It also features a stand collar to help keep you warm. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_pants_01_01_shared.label: Perth Pants
ctl_pants_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU These straight-leg pants from City Lights are essential for everyday work and play. Both the front and back pockets feature metallic button accents to provide that perfect amount of flair. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_pants_02_01_shared.label: Guri Pants Lime
ctl_pants_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Step up the style with these bold pants from City Lights. Six zipper pockets and a slanted fly will bring a bit of attitude to your wardrobe. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ctl_shirt_03_01_shared.label: Bello T-Shirt Blue
ctl_shirt_03_01_shared.description: This stylish t-shirt from City Lights is made from a lighter fabric that's perfect for warmer climates.

ctl_shirt_06_01_shared.label: Bellito Shirt
ctl_shirt_06_01_shared.description: Enhance your basic t-shirt game with this stylish short sleeve t-shirt from City Lights, which features a dynamic, asymmetrical line across the front. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

carryable_2h_cy_collectormaterial_001.label: Metamaterial Test #146
carryable_2h_cy_collectormaterial_001.description: This is a test for new metamaterial with special design by Wikelo. It will be light and strong but maybe not! Good to test.

carryable_2h_sq_collectormaterial_002.label: Metamaterial Test #152
carryable_2h_sq_collectormaterial_002.description: This a new metamaterial test with design by Wikelo. I think one will this help make things go faster. Last two tests not so good, but maybe this one works.

compboard_paf.label: Alignment Blade
compboard_paf.description: An alignment blade essential to the function of mining lasers. Terminals at Platform Alignment Facilities require three of these blades to make the precise calculations needed to orientate the dish before the Orbital Laser Platform can fire.

countermeasure_decoy.label: Decoy
countermeasure_decoy.description: These countermeasures are designed to act like compact ship emulators. These specialty rounds emit high concentrations of EM and phosphorous heat to attract missile guidance systems or pilots flying by radar/scans.

countermeasure_smokescreen.label: Noise
countermeasure_smokescreen.description: This area effect countermeasure consists of a grapeshot canister that when launched explodes and scatters hundreds of smaller explosions that scatter and detonate, creating a wide dispersal volume of electrically charged metal and glass particles that can disrupt electromagnetic, infrared, and cross-section scanners. Ships and missiles will lose targeting on any ships that are inside of or obscured by the field.

crus_whale_suit_01_01_01.label: Finley Mascot Costume
crus_whale_suit_01_01_01.description: A large, soft plush costume of Crusader's beloved mascot Finley the Stormwal. Made exclusively for Crusader Industries to greet and welcome visitors to the floating city of Orison.

dmc_gloves_02_01_01.label: Mercury Gloves
dmc_gloves_02_01_01.description: Designed to provide warmth to your hands while still allowing you to precisely manipulate things, the Mercury gloves from DMC are perfect for outdoor activities or colder work environments.

dmc_jacket_01_01_01.label: Mountaintop Jacket Multitone
dmc_jacket_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -20 / 10 °C Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU These insulated, water-resistant jackets are perfect for any jobsite where temperature can be a factor. The Mountaintop from DMC features secure pockets and is made with a vinyl-weave exterior, guaranteeing that rough environments won't compromise your warmth. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_jacket_02_01_shared.label: Selby Jacket Black
dmc_jacket_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Look as good as you feel with this trendy jacket from DMC. The Selby also features a soft inner lining to provide extra comfort and insulation. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_jacket_03_01_01.label: RangeFinder Jacket Element
dmc_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU This insulation outdoor jacket from DMC is lined with reinforced padding to provide durable comfort for everyday wear.

dmc_jacket_04_01_01.label: Invictus Flight Jacket
dmc_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Celebrate launch week in iconic style with this commemorative flight jacket featuring a Navy patch on the front and a large Invictus patch on the back. This synthetic leather jacket comes with two front pockets and ribbed waistband and cuffs that guarantee a good fit.

dmc_jacket_13_02_01.label: Wikelo Emporium Jacket
dmc_jacket_13_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Super style! Supreme comfort! The Wikelo Emporium jacket is made with premium synthetic leather for a resilient and fashionable exterior, and an ultra-soft lining that enwraps the Human body like friend. Expect nothing less than the absolute best when Wikelo put their name on it.

dmc_pants_01_01_01.label: Foundation Pants Grey
dmc_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU DMC's Foundation line is just that; the foundation for your work wear. Featuring a simple, elegant cut with easy-access pockets, the Foundation is both professional and functional. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_pants_02_01_shared.label: Astley Pants Black
dmc_pants_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Flaunt your rugged yet refined sensibility with these cargo pants from DMC. With grey accents and contrast stripes down each side, Astleys are durable, comfortable, and always on point. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_pants_03_01_01.label: Frontier 05 Pants Classic
dmc_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU DMC's Frontier collection has been a staple of frontier living for centuries. These heavy denim workpants have double-stitched reinforcement and stainguard technology, making them dependable pants for any environment day in and day out.

dmc_gloves_01.label: Gauntlet Gloves
dmc_gloves_01.description: DMC's Gauntlet gloves feel like a hard day's work. Built with resilient GranTec composite weaves, these Gauntlets live up to their name, providing maximum protection against environments and impacts so you can work another day.

dmc_gloves_02_01_centurion.label: Mercury Gloves "Voyager"
dmc_gloves_02_01_centurion.description: Keep your hands warm and fingers nimble with Mercury gloves from DMC. Ideal for outdoor activities or colder work environments, the special Voyager edition comes in red with gold trim.

dead_tree.label: Altrucia Lacus (Revenant Tree) Plant
dead_tree.description: Contrary to its ominous name, the Revenant is actually a variety of the Altrucia tree, an indigenous plant of Terra III known for its thick and colorful leaves. Geoengineers introduced fields of Altrucias to Hyperion in an effort to break up the dust storms. Although the project failed, the Altrucia trees adapted to the perpetual wind patterns, shedding its leaves and thickening the wood in the trunk. Botanists initially believed that the Altrucias had died, but on closer inspection, discovered that they were quite alive and thus, the name was born.

eld_jacket_01_01_01.label: Archibald Jacket Cinder
eld_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Simple, comfortable and understated. While most fashion designers avoid these terms, Escar Limited understands that sometimes you just want something that feels right. Based on the classic design from Centauri II, the Archibald is a simple, comfortable and understated light jacket made from a polyweave that doesn't restrict airflow.

eld_jacket_02_01_01.label: Geoffrey Jacket
