eld_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Stay stylishly protected from the elements with the Geoffrey. Escar Limited's casual jacket features a durable water-repellent finish with a slick brushed look, alongside sleeves featuring an articulated elbow.

eld_pants_01_01_shared.label: 78-WH Pants
eld_pants_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Embody the Escar aesthetic of casual comfort with these classic pants. Ideal for lounging. Ideal for errands. Ideal for you. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_01_02_shared.label: 99-GR/BL Pants
eld_pants_01_02_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Spice up your wardrobe with a pair of 99 pants from Escar Limited. The juxtaposition of colors, each made from a different fabric, form a striking design for when you want to make a statement. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_02_01_shared.label: 88-RD Pants
eld_pants_02_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU 88s are the ultimate leisure attire from Escar Limited. From the striking color to the tailored fit, they are the perfect complement for laid back days and festive nights. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_03_01_01.label: EQ-B Pants
eld_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Keep it easy with EQ athletic pants from Escar Limited. Made with a sweat-wicking microweave and a subtle pleated design, the EQ are a comfortable and stylish choice for those days when you're looking to keep it cool. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_pants_04_01_01.label: CS-L Pants
eld_pants_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Keep it CS-L with these soft, fleece-lined athletic pants from Escar Limited. These loose, relaxed pants provide supreme comfort whether on the move or unwinding.

eld_pants_05_01_01.label: 55-GR Pants
eld_pants_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU With the help of iconic designer Ubaid, Escar Limited created these crop pants for the fashion forward who don't want to be overly flashy. The 55-GR features a subtle tartan pattern and baggy cuffs. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_01_01_01.label: Hannu Shirt
eld_shirt_01_01_01.description: Be bold. Be you. Escar LImited's Hannu line of ultra-cas shirts features a fading asymmetrical cut and patchweave material that feels both rustic and thoroughly modern. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_02_01_01.label: Shackleton Shirt
eld_shirt_02_01_01.description: Distressed to impress, the Shackleton line provides comfort with an edge. Escar Limited abrades the shirt fabric to give it a repurposed charm and unique look that fits in at home or on the streets.

eld_shirt_03_01_01.label: Balboa Shirt
eld_shirt_03_01_01.description: A partial zip pullover shirt with mesh arm accents and a button collar. Escar Limited's Balboa line delivers cutting edge style suitable for any system or situation. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

eld_shirt_04_assistance_dec.label: Rescue Required T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_assistance_dec.description: In space, no one can hear your scream. That's why they created ECN alerts. Commemorate the kindness of strangers with the Rescue Required shirt, featuring an astronaut fleeing from danger.

eld_shirt_04_ejection_dec.label: Ejection Rejection T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_ejection_dec.description: Commiserate with other Captains whose chair won't go anywhere. The Ejection Rejection shirt features a smoldering Cutlass while wondering why anyone would ever need an ejection seat.

eld_shirt_04_grimhex_dec.label: Lost Wallet T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_grimhex_dec.description: Scoundrels, scalawags, and scum gather at Grim HEX, so show that you're part of such illustrious company with the Lost Wallet shirt made from comfortable, synthetic cotton.

eld_shirt_04_lorville_dec.label: Lorville Blues T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_lorville_dec.description: Lorville, come for the low wages and leave with a lethal respiratory condition. The Lorville Blues shirt celebrates the iconic, corporate-owned landing zone best seen with a plastic bag over your head.

eld_shirt_04_olisar_dec.label: Stuck at Olisar T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_olisar_dec.description: The Stuck at Olisar shirt recreates the infamous ASOP terminal screen frequently seen at Port Olisar. Anyone who's visited this bustling transportation hub can relate to the gnawing fear of seeing this screen appear as a result of Olisar officials clearing abandoned, crashed, or improperly parked spacecraft from their landing pads.

eld_shirt_04_required_dec.label: Vacuums Kill T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_required_dec.description: This short sleeve shirt features the iconic warning sign found near airlocks across the universe. Wear the Vacuums Kill shirt to remind everyone of the horrors that happens when one removes their helmet in the vacuum of space.

eld_shirt_10_01_01.label: Idris-P T-Shirt
eld_shirt_10_01_01.description: When a civilian version of the long-admired Idris-M frigate debuted in 2875, it caught the imagination of countless pilots and quickly became one of Aegis' most popular capital ships. Celebrate 80 years of the Idris-P with this limited-edition T-Shirt, featuring a schematic-style image of the capital ship on the front and the logo of Aegis Dynamics on the back.

eld_jacket_03_01_shared.label: Parvat Jacket Stony Brae
eld_jacket_03_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Weather the cold with this waterproof and insulated jacket from Escar Limited. Featuring a stylish design and unique dual-layer collar, the Parvat will keep you warm when you need it most.

eld_shirt_04_01_cubby_blast.label: Cubby Blast T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_cubby_blast.description: Show your support for local and independently owned businesses with this Cubby Blast t-shirt. From its infectious holo-jingle promising "racks of rifles, stacks of shotguns, piles of pistols" to Clor Vee, the eccentric owner with a thick Cathcart accent, Cubby Blast remains one of Area18's most unique shops, and a refreshing change of pace from the corporate-owned chain stores that dominant the Empire.

eld_shirt_04_01_big_bennys.label: Big Benny's T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_big_bennys.description: This Big Benny's shirt embodies the joy of dining on their delicious kacho with an animated image that rotates between two versions of the brand's iconic logo. Wearing it is bound to remind everyone to grab and eat this tasty treat.

eld_shirt_04_01_carrack.label: Carrack T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_carrack.description: Express your passion for the unknown with this Carrack t-shirt. Celebrate the popular and iconic exploration ship with this comfortable black t-shirt that creatively combines an overhead view of the Carrack with the Anvil logo on the front and the ship's name on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_cutlass.label: Cutlass T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_cutlass.description: Don't judge a ship by its reputation. Show that pilots of all ilk love the Cutlass line of ships because of their versatility, affordability, and general bad-assery. The front of this black t-shirt features the iconic ship swooping before of the Drake logo and has the ship's name proudly displayed on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_dumpers_depo.label: Dumper's Depot T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_dumpers_depo.description: Be sure to keep this shirt off the scrap heap. Made from ring-spun cotton for an ultra-comfortable fit, this Dumper's Depot shirt features an animated spinning gear in the logo that's bound to get people's attention.

eld_shirt_04_01_eclipse.label: Eclipse T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_eclipse.description: An Eclipse silhouetted against a planet is a rare sight, considering that this high-tech, stealth bomber is notorious for striking targets before it's even spotted. After years of military service, Aegis Dynamics, whose logo appears the back of the t-shirt, brought the ship to the civilian market in 2947 to rave review and stellar sales.

eld_shirt_04_01_pips.label: Pips T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_pips.description: Comfort meets refreshing style with this Pips graphic t-shirt, which features the popular energy drink's logo on the front and "Power Up" on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_torpedo_burrito.label: Torpedo Burrito T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_torpedo_burrito.description: Show your affinity for the meal guaranteed to destroy your hunger. This ultra-soft natural fiber shirt features the Torpedo Burrito logo on the front and their very appropriate catch phrase "Unleash A Payload of Flavor" on the back.

eld_shirt_04_01_valkyrie.label: Valkyrie T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_valkyrie.description: Built for the battlefield, the Valkyrie bravely dives into the kind of danger that other ships avoid. Its ability to deploy ground troops and vehicles swiftly has made it a military favorite for decades. Now popular in the civilian market, this black t-shirt does the Valkyrie justice with a dynamic design across the front and the ship's name on the back.

evl_jacket_01_01_shared.label: Manaslu Jacket
evl_jacket_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU The Manaslu from EvaLight's asymmetrical design is only one of its unique attributes. Made from a patented blend of fabrics, this jacket's surprisingly lightweight insulation will keep you warm in the coldest corners of the universe. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

evl_jacket_01_01_ruso.label: Manaslu Jacket Rust Society
evl_jacket_01_01_ruso.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU The Rust Society edition adds eye-catching colors to this jacket's unique asymmetrical design. Made from a patented blend of fabrics, the Manaslu's surprisingly lightweight insulation will keep you warm in the coldest corners of the universe. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

evl_glasses_01.label: Theaters of War: Supreme Glasses
evl_glasses_01.description: Inspired by the infamous Nexus-based outlaw group featured in the Star Marine game mode Theaters of War (Working Title), this intimidating and ostentatious limited-run eyewear is made with impact resistant red lens set in an intricately designed metal frame with gold plating.

fio_glasses_01.label: Sarrab Glasses
fio_glasses_01.description: The Sarrab are stylish half-rim glasses that are so light you'll forget you're wearing them. Ideal for everyday use, these glasses feature clear polycarbonate temple arms that complement the lens without demanding too much attention.

fio_glasses_02.label: Ectio Glasses
fio_glasses_02.description: Fashion and function merge with the Ectio glasses from Fiore. Adjustable temple arms provide the perfect fit to sit snugly in the ear, while crystal-tempered lenses guarantee a clear view under almost any atmospheric condition.

flair_coin_sq42_fw25.label: Invictus Launch Week Coin
flair_coin_sq42_fw25.description: This collectible coin features the UEE logo emblazoned on one face and the Invictus Launch Week logo on the reverse.

grin_refinery_apron_01_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Coat
grin_refinery_apron_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The ThermoWeave coat provides complete upper body fire and heat defense. It features a high collar and additional frontside protection thanks to a lengthy apron made of aluminized fabric that reflects radiant heat.

grin_refinery_backpack_01_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Breathing Apparatus
grin_refinery_backpack_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 33.8K µSCU The ThermoWeave breathing apparatus integrates with the hood to ensure a constant flow of breathable oxygen regardless of air quality conditions.

grin_refinery_gloves_01_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Gloves
grin_refinery_gloves_01_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave gloves were designed with a special multilayer weave and extra insulated padding on the palm and fingers for additional protection when touching hot objects.

grin_refinery_gloves_02_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Gloves ASD Edition
grin_refinery_gloves_02_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave gloves were designed with a special multilayer weave and extra insulated padding on the palm and fingers for additional protection when touching hot objects. Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_helmet_01_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Hood
grin_refinery_helmet_01_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave hood integrates a heat and impact resistant hard hat with a neck covering hood that includes a vapor barrier to keep moisture build-up to a minimum. A large faceplate provides a wide field of view and the built-in respirator features a state-of-the-art filter to help you breathe easy.

grin_refinery_helmet_02_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Hood ASD Edition
grin_refinery_helmet_02_01_01.description: The ThermoWeave hood integrates a heat and impact resistant hard hat with a neck covering hood that includes a vapor barrier to keep moisture build-up to a minimum. A large faceplate provides a wide field of view and the built-in respirator features a state-of-the-art filter to help you breathe easy. Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_jacket_02_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Coat ASD Edition
grin_refinery_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The ThermoWeave coat provides complete upper body fire and heat defense. It features a high collar and additional frontside protection thanks to a lengthy apron made of aluminized fabric that reflects radiant heat. Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_refinery_pants_01_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Pants
grin_refinery_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU The ThermoWeave pants have a large, easy-access pocket on each leg and feature a special fire-resistant synthetic moisture-wicking lining that makes them comfortable to wear for an entire shift.

grin_refinery_pants_02_01_01.label: ThermoWeave Pants ASD Edition
grin_refinery_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU The ThermoWeave pants have a large, easy-access pocket on each leg and feature a special fire-resistant synthetic moisture-wicking lining that makes them comfortable to wear for an entire shift. Worn by employees who require an extra level of protection in their field, the ASD Edition showcases the reds and greens of the ASD branding.

grin_utility_medium_arms_01.label: Aril Arms
grin_utility_medium_arms_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

grin_utility_medium_arms_02.label: Strata Arms
grin_utility_medium_arms_02.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design has been copied by other manufacturers, but the original still reigns supreme with its high quality materials and next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres.

grin_utility_medium_legs_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

grin_utility_medium_legs_02.label: Strata Legs
grin_utility_medium_legs_02.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Carrying Capacity: 10k µSCU Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design has been copied by other manufacturers, but the original still reigns supreme with its high quality materials and next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres.

grin_utility_medium_legs_02_02_10.label: Strata Legs microTech Edition
grin_utility_medium_legs_02_02_10.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Carrying Capacity: 10k µSCU Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. The microTech Edition was made specifically for the company.

grin_utility_medium_legs_03_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Carrying Capacity: 10k µSCU Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features.
