grin_utility_medium_legs_03_04_01.label: Strata Legs Heatwave
grin_utility_medium_legs_03_04_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Carrying Capacity: 10k µSCU Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design has been copied by other manufacturers, but the original still reigns supreme with its high quality materials and next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres. The Heatwave edition is primarily black with glowing red highlights.

gsb_boots_01_01_01.label: Wanderer Boots Base
gsb_boots_01_01_01.description: Grindstone's Wanderer line is an all-purpose boot designed to take any punishment you throw at it.

gsb_shoes_01_01_01.label: Bedrock Boots
gsb_shoes_01_01_01.description: This steel-toe workboot from Grindstone features SureFire grip technology, giving you firm traction even on slip, oil and abrasion surfaces.

gsb_boots_01_01_imperator.label: Wanderer Boots "Pathfinder"
gsb_boots_01_01_imperator.description: Grindstone's Wanderer line is an all-purpose boot designed to take any punishment you throw at it. The rare Pathfinder edition is purple with silver highlights, discreetly bringing style to the jobsite.

gsb_boots_04_01_centurion.label: Landlite Boots "Voyager"
gsb_boots_04_01_centurion.description: Who says work boots can't be comfortable? Grindstone's Landlite boots are built with a breathable synth-leather material to keep your feet dry, a contoured, memory footbed, and a slip-resistant outsole. The exclusive Voyager edition comes in black with red soles to provide a pop of color.

gys_helmet_01_01_imperator.label: Ready-Up Helmet "Pathfinder"
gys_helmet_01_01_imperator.description: The Ready-Up is a dependable, affordable softshell helmet alternative that provides a vacuum-ready seal to keep you breathing for longer. The Pathfinder edition uses special space-age plastic with a purple tint to produce a truly unique look.

glowing_vine.label: Ophelia Vine Plant
glowing_vine.description: Similar to how the plant’s fictional namesake drowned in the ancient Earth play Hamlet, the bioluminescent Ophelia vine is submerged regularly by the tide that rises over the brackish sands it grows upon. The plants bright radiance is owing to the high quantity of luciferin it naturally absorbs from the heavy bacteria content found in its homemoon’s oceans.

hdh_hat_01_01_01.label: Rabum Hat
hdh_hat_01_01_01.description: Habidash's simple and stylish head covering provides warmth, along with protection from the elements and prying eyes. The Rabum is made from a synthetic extra-long cotton to be light, absorbent, and easily laundered.

hrst_tiburon_s10_laserbeam.label: Supremacy-10T Laser Beam
hrst_tiburon_s10_laserbeam.description: Manufacturer: Hurston Dynamics Type: Laser Beam Size: 10 Developed in concert with the weapons specialists of Aegis to form part of the dedicated anti-capital ship loadout of the Tiburon, the Supremacy-10T combines surgical precision with devastating destructive power.

hwk_shoes_01_01_shared.label: Couloir Shoes WhiteHex
hwk_shoes_01_01_shared.description: Hawksworth's timeless Couloir low ankle, slip-on shoes are perfect for both casual and formal occasions. A forward facing seam and tapered toe give the shoe a subtle but uniquely elegant shape. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

hwk_shoes_02_01_01.label: De Leon Shoes Black
hwk_shoes_02_01_01.description: Hawksworth's De Leon take the classic cap toed Oxford design but incorporate a laceless slip-on design to create an exciting new addition to the world of formal footwear.

hat_monocle.label: Hat and Monocle
hat_monocle.description: As part of their Dafne collection, commissioned in honor of the Port Retanus Metropolitan Opera House Quincentennial, Derion is proud to present their Jacopo line of accessories. Perfect for an elegant night on the town, this diamond-laminate monocle with tungsten chain and gossamer-lined top hat feature the latest upgradable optiVis interface for unmatched comfort.

keycard_olp_access.label: OLP Storage Keycard
keycard_olp_access.description: A single-use keycard that grants Orbital Laser Platform employees access to storage areas.

keycard_olp_security.label: OLP Supervisor Keycard
keycard_olp_security.description: A single-use keycard used by Supervisors at Orbital Laser Platforms to access secured storage. To ensure restricted access to the area, this card loses its admin permissions after one use and cannot be reproduced.

keycard_paf_maintenance.label: PAF Maintenance Keycard
keycard_paf_maintenance.description: A single-use keycard that grants Platform Alignment Facility employees access to maintenance doors.

keycard_paf_security.label: PAF Security Keycard
keycard_paf_security.description: A single-use keycard that grants Platform Alignment Facility employees access to security doors.

keycard_olp_paf_bunkercard.label: Laser Activation Keycard
keycard_olp_paf_bunkercard.description: This encoded keycard is required to activate an orbital mining laser. Security protocols require this single-use keycard be stored at orbital laser platforms until all pre-firing procedures have been met. The keycard must then be inserted into a terminal at a ground-based Laser Activation Bunker to activate the mining laser.

mym_shirt_02_01_01.label: Atavi Shirt Dark
mym_shirt_02_01_01.description: MuyMuy's Atavi line of casual shirts are comfortable enough to wear at home, but stylish enough for a night out. They are made with EasyCare technology to maintain the colors during repeated washes.

mym_shirt_01_01_01.label: Davlos Shirt Charcoal
mym_shirt_01_01_01.description: Live in comfort with MuyMuy's Davlos line of cotton-synthetic shirts. The durable, yet soft, fabric contains a patented SweatGuard technology that not only whisks away perspiration but helps prevent stains.

mym_shirt_02_01_imperator.label: Atavi Shirt "Pathfinder"
mym_shirt_02_01_imperator.description: A casual and comfortable grey long sleeve shirt that looks good whether you're out and about or just lounging at home. MuyMuy's exclusive Pathfinder edition of the Atavi steps up the style by including striking silver sleeves.

moss_head.label: Ecosphere Replica
moss_head.description: Though simple looking, Conner’s Beard moss holds the notable distinction of being considered the first plant subspecies to have naturally evolved on a spacestation. Tied intrinsically with its unique place of birth, the bryophyte can only survive in the specific conditions that the aging station’s life support systems created. The sculpture featured in the Ecosphere is a replica of the gift shop souvenir the moss was originally discovered on by a waylaid botanist.

nrs_shoes_01_01_01.label: RipTops Shoes
nrs_shoes_01_01_01.description: Fun and funky. That was the directive NorthStar designers were given when tasked with creating a new sneaker. The result? NorthStar's RipTop line of all-purpose footwear. Mission accomplished.

nrs_shoes_02_01_01.label: Hi&Tight Shoes
nrs_shoes_02_01_01.description: Take your next step in these versatile high-tops from NorthStar. The Hi&Tight's cut an intriguing profile by blending nylon and microweave fabric with a vulcanized rubber soul, padded collar, and cross foot fastening strap.

nvs_jacket_01_01_01.label: Second Tevarin War Service Jacket
nvs_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The Service Jacket is primarily blue with a white and red stripe across the right shoulder and arm.

nvs_jacket_02_01_01.label: Second Tevarin War Red Dress Jacket
nvs_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The red Dress Jacket features a sash adorned with metals and was worn for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_jacket_02_01_10.label: Second Tevarin War White Dress Jacket
nvs_jacket_02_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The white Dress Jacket features a sash adorned with metals and was worn for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_pants_01_01_01.label: Second Tevarin War Service Trousers
nvs_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The Service Trousers are blue with red piping and worn with the matching jacket.

nvs_pants_01_01_10.label: Second Tevarin War White Dress Trousers
nvs_pants_01_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The white Dress Trousers were worn with the matching jacket for formal occasions and ceremonies.

nvs_pants_01_01_13.label: Second Tevarin War Red Dress Trousers
nvs_pants_01_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Honor the heroes that served in the Second Tevarin War by wearing a replica Navy uniform. Historically accurate down to every last stitch, period appropriate materials were used to make these uniforms match military specifications of the era. The red Dress Trousers were worn with the matching jacket for formal occasions and ceremonies.

ops_pants_01_01_01.label: Devereaux Pants
ops_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU From modern work environments to casual gatherings, OpalSky's Devereaux slacks have been a consistent member of everyday wardrobe.

ops_shirt_01_01_01.label: Thorby Shirt
ops_shirt_01_01_01.description: OpalSky's Thorby features a classic asymmetrical design and high collar that evokes timeless style and elegance.

outlaw_heavy_helmet.label: Slugger Helmet
outlaw_heavy_helmet.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 105 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Seems like common knowledge to place the most protection on the most vital parts, right? Kastak Arms' Slugger helmet doublesdown on that approach. This heavy combat helmet features multiple layers of composite armor types providing maximum protection against everything from environments to weapon fire. Although field of view may be slightly compromised, the Slugger will keep you alive long enough to see your enemy.

outlaw_light_helmet.label: Sparrer Helmet
outlaw_light_helmet.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Kastak Arm's Sparrer helmet features a single-sheet laminate covering with reinforced understructure to protect against impact and penetration, but is mostly known for its projected HUD elements, which, while providing valuable tactical data, also provides an intimidating sight for would-be enemies.

outlaw_medium_helmet.label: Brawler Helmet
outlaw_medium_helmet.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s True to its name, the Brawler is built to back you up in a fight. The helmet is an enclosed, full-cover shell made from molded titanium alloy designed to strike an imposing presence while offering maximum protection from incoming fire.

powr_acom_s01_lumacore.label: LumaCore
powr_acom_s01_lumacore.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Competition Among small power plants, ACOM’s LumaCore consistently ranks among the best for its power rate, cool rate, and high overheat temperature. That’s why if you value your ship’s performance over anything else, this competition-grade component is perfect for you.

powr_acom_s02_solarflare.label: SolarFlare
powr_acom_s02_solarflare.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: ACOM Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Competition The ACOM team took their years of experience in the racing world and applied it to their component designs. That focus has helped make the SolarFlare a popular power plant among pilots that want to prioritize performance.

powr_aegs_s01_quadracell.label: QuadraCell
powr_aegs_s01_quadracell.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military Few military-grade power plants get better than the Aegis QuadraCell. It wasn’t just built to survive the heat of battle, it was built to thrive in it.

powr_aegs_s02_bolide.label: Bolide
powr_aegs_s02_bolide.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military The Bolide power plant from Aegis has logged innumerable hours of flight experience and is frequently used by the UEE Navy and security forces across the Empire.

powr_aegs_s03_centurion.label: Centurion
powr_aegs_s03_centurion.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military The Centurion stands ready to power your ship. This large power plant from Aegis Dynamics has been in service for centuries and has consistently proven to supply solid performance and durability.

powr_aegs_s03_fulgur.label: Fulgur
powr_aegs_s03_fulgur.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military Tried and tested by the UEE Navy on the Vanduul front, the Fulgur large power plant from Aegis Dynamics is now available for all to put to use protecting what’s important.

powr_amrs_s01_dynaflux.label: DynaFlux
powr_amrs_s01_dynaflux.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military The DynaFlux was one of the first components A&R Co. built when they expanded their product line to more than energy weapons. Their years of experience manufacturing military-grade equipment went a long way to making the DynaFlux power plant a standout right from the beginning.

powr_amrs_s02_turbodrive.label: TurboDrive
powr_amrs_s02_turbodrive.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military The TurboDrive is a common military-grade power plant from A&R that slightly favors performance over durability and stealth.

powr_amrs_s03_megaflux.label: MegaFlux
powr_amrs_s03_megaflux.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military Repeated requests from military veterans to make the MegaFlux commercially available convinced A&R Co. to release this large power plant to the public.

powr_amrs_s03_smartgen.label: SmartGen
powr_amrs_s03_smartgen.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Amon & Reese Co. Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Military The no-frills SmartGen is A&R’s entry-level large power plant that delivers solid performance for the price.

powr_default.label: Power Plant
powr_default.description: Default Description space for power plant.

powr_just_s00_defiant.label: Defiant
powr_just_s00_defiant.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Industrial In this cutthroat universe, the competition doesn’t stop when you do. That’s why you need the Defiant industrial power plant equipped in your vehicle. It’s optimized by the experts at Juno Starwerk to provide unmatched performance compared to other components in its class.

powr_just_s01_breton.label: Breton
powr_just_s01_breton.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Industrial The Breton embodies exactly what Juno Starwerk engineers wanted out of an industrial power plant — utilitarian, easy to repair and extremely powerful. You’ll be hard pressed to find a better balance of performance and durability from a unit this size.

powr_just_s01_fortitude.label: Fortitude
powr_just_s01_fortitude.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial Beloved by haulers for centuries, the Fortitude lives up to its name by reliably producing power when needed most.

powr_just_s02_diligence.label: Diligence
powr_just_s02_diligence.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial Though the Diligence delivers high performance compared to other components in its class, this power plant’s dependability and ease of maintenance is what makes it a favorite of haulers.

powr_just_s02_sedulity.label: Sedulity
powr_just_s02_sedulity.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial When you need a power plant that’s as reliable as you are, then snag yourself a Sedulity. This component has been a staple of the Juno Starwerk line for years, making it truly worthy of the name.

powr_just_s03_durango.label: Durango
powr_just_s03_durango.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Industrial The Durango is the peak of large power plants produced by Juno Starwerk. This top-of-the-line industrial component provides unmatched energy dispersion that minimizes fluctuations and surges during heavy demand.

powr_just_s03_reliance.label: Reliance
powr_just_s03_reliance.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Industrial Haulers have been a fan of the Reliance power plant for years. The component’s clean design and Juno Starwerk’s lauded customer support have made this power plant a fixture on ships around the Empire.

powr_lplt_s00_ionwave.label: IonWave
powr_lplt_s00_ionwave.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian The IonWave vehicle power plant can help you confidently summit the heights of most peaks without overheating thanks to the incredible technology inside designed by the folks at Lightning Power Ltd.

powr_lplt_s02_fullforce.label: FullForce
powr_lplt_s02_fullforce.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian This power plant from Lightning Power Ltd. delivers balanced performance, durability and emissions, providing consumers with a “FullForce” of options as to how to use it.

powr_lplt_s02_sparkjet.label: SparkJet
powr_lplt_s02_sparkjet.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian The SparkJet is a basic power plant from Lighting Power Ltd. that strives to balance heat and EM emissions with overall performance and durability.

powr_lplt_s03_ionsurgepro.label: IonSurge Pro
powr_lplt_s03_ionsurgepro.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd. Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian Power plants from Lightning Power Ltd. don’t get much bigger or better than the IonSurge Pro. This top-of-the-line large power plant focuses on delivering solid results to keep your ship working longer.

powr_sasu_s01_magnabloom.label: MagnaBloom
powr_sasu_s01_magnabloom.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian The MagnaBloom power plant achieves above average performance and durability with minimal excess emissions, making it another exquisitely designed component from Sakura Sun.

powr_sasu_s02_radiance.label: Radiance
powr_sasu_s02_radiance.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Considering its extensive and extremely diverse line of products, it’s incredible that Sakura Sun can maintain such quality and consistency. The Radiance power plant is a perfect example. A staple of their product line for years, the Radiance has won multiple consumer awards for its reliability and overall performance.

powr_sasu_s03_celestial.label: Celestial
powr_sasu_s03_celestial.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian The Celestial from Sakura Sun improves upon the company’s base large power plant by redesigning the power rate and other key aspects to raise the component’s overall performance.

powr_sasu_s03_newdawn.label: NewDawn
powr_sasu_s03_newdawn.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian The NewDawn was appropriately named, as it was the first large power plant built by Sakura Sun. Following its commercial success, the company decided to expand and improve upon their line of large power plants.

powr_tydt_s01_slipstream.label: Slipstream
powr_tydt_s01_slipstream.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth Tyler Design & Tech uses an expensive alloy on its Slipstream power plant to reduce its overall emissions. This design choice is key to making this small power plant’s detectable signature one of the lowest on the market.

powr_tydt_s02_cirrus.label: Cirrus
powr_tydt_s02_cirrus.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Tyler Design & Tech Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth The Cirrus is for pilots that prioritize stealth above all else. This medium power plant from Tyler Design & Tech intelligently manages its energy distribution flow and performance output to achieve that end.

powr_vncl_s01_hellsheart.label: Hell’s Heart
powr_vncl_s01_hellsheart.description: Item Type: Power Plant Manufacturer: Vanduul Size: 1 Grade: N/A Class: Military The military designation for this Vanduul power plant is thought to have originated as a reference made by a well-educated pilot that the Vanduul fighters seem to be “stabbing at us from hell's heart.”

patch_case_1_a.label: Invictus Patch Collection
patch_case_1_a.description: Mounted inside a beautiful display case, this collection features three patches honoring the naval bases used over the centuries to train recruits into the brave starmen who dedicate their lives to defending Humanity.

powerbank.label: GP-XP Industrial Battery
powerbank.description: An extremely powerful battery used in industrial processes, like powering mining lasers. Its proprietary design generates significantly more energy than other batteries of its size but makes the GP-XP extremely heavy and unwieldy. Please use caution when attempting to move.

qdrv_arcc_s01_burst.label: Burst
qdrv_arcc_s01_burst.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian With the Burst quantum drive, ArcCorp has taken their popular Rush model and through streamlined re-engineering, managed to improve upon it.

qdrv_arcc_s02_flash.label: Flash
qdrv_arcc_s02_flash.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian With improved spooling and calibration, the new ArcCorp Flash drive can get you in and out of quantum easier and faster.

qdrv_arcc_s02_torrent.label: Torrent
qdrv_arcc_s02_torrent.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: ArcCorp Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian Whatever destination you choose, the ArcCorp Torrent quantum drive is a solid choice to help get you there direct and hassle-free.

qdrv_default.label: Quantum Drive
qdrv_default.description: Default description for quantum drive component.

qdrv_just_s01_colossus.label: Colossus
qdrv_just_s01_colossus.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial Juno Starwerk makes quantum drives that can go the distance and the Colossus is no exception. Though, once you experience its dependable performance for yourself, you might just want to call it exceptional.

qdrv_just_s02_yaluk.label: Yaluk
qdrv_just_s02_yaluk.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Juno Starwerk Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Industrial The bigger the haul, the harder your quantum drive has to work. With Juno Starwerk’s Yaluk onboard, you’ll know that you have a quantum drive that is up to the challenge of getting the job done.

qdrv_raco_s01_zephyr.label: Zephyr
qdrv_raco_s01_zephyr.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RAMP Corporation Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth By minimizing emissions through an advanced reduced outflow filtration process, the RAMP Zephyr quantum drive helps ensure privacy while traveling wherever you go.

qdrv_rsi_s01_atlas.label: Atlas
qdrv_rsi_s01_atlas.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Civilian Though it may seem commonplace today, Humanity’s ability to travel across solar systems at quantum speeds was built upon a foundation of Roberts Space Industries’ technology and craftsmanship. Now, space travel has reached even higher heights thanks to the top-of-class performance of RSI’s Atlas pushing quantum drive technology farther than it’s ever gone.

qdrv_rsi_s02_hemera.label: Hemera
qdrv_rsi_s02_hemera.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian Designing the Hemera quantum drive has allowed the technicians at Robert Space Industries to push the boundaries of quantum travel technology even further, and allow you to go even farther.

qdrv_tars_s01_voyage.label: Voyage
qdrv_tars_s01_voyage.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian Crafted by passionate people who have been leading the way in space exploration and travel for over six centuries, the Voyage by Tarsus is a quantum drive worthy of your next expedition.

qdrv_tars_s02_sojourn.label: Sojourn
qdrv_tars_s02_sojourn.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian When you explore a star system, it should be about the experiences, the sights, the memories. The Tarsus Sojourn quantum drive takes all the worry out of quantum travel so that you can focus on what’s important, the journey.

qdrv_wetk_s01_vk00.label: VK-00
qdrv_wetk_s01_vk00.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military When the stakes are high, Wei-Tek’s advanced VK-00 quantum drive is the only choice you should trust to get you where you need to be.

qdrv_wetk_s02_yeager.label: Yeager
qdrv_wetk_s02_yeager.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Whether you’re rushing to the rescue or simply patrolling through a sector, the Yeager quantum drive from Wei-Tek allows for greater performance when you need it most.

qrdv_acas_s01_foxfire.label: FoxFire
qrdv_acas_s01_foxfire.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition The FoxFire won't leave a burning trail in your wake, but this quantum drive’s strong performance leaves an equal impression. Making it another elegant and powerful component from the folks at Ace Astrogation.

qrdv_acas_s01_lightfire.label: LightFire
qrdv_acas_s01_lightfire.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Ace Astrogation Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition Ace Astrogation built the LightFire for pilots who like to push the edge, but not break the bank. Its focused design provides solid performance at the expense of the component’s durability and stealth.

r6p_boots_01_01_shared.label: Protean Boots
r6p_boots_01_01_shared.description: These rugged and durable boots from R6 Pro are perfect to wear on your ship or while planetside. Padded insole cushions ensure they'll also be comfortable in any situation. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

r6p_shoes_01_01_01.label: WK-8 Shoes
r6p_shoes_01_01_01.description: The WK-8 impact boots from R6 Pro continue the company's proud tradition of affordable, durable utility footwear. Designed to thrive in all kinds of environments, the WK-8's are the result of extensive field testing with the Empire's most trusted security operatives.

radr_bltr_s01_hunter.label: Hunter
radr_bltr_s01_hunter.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Stealth When a low signature is of the utmost importance, the Hunter stealth radar will keep you aware of what’s around without getting you found.

radr_bltr_s01_pelerous.label: Pelerous
radr_bltr_s01_pelerous.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Stealth Aggressors can’t attack what they can’t see, so keep your signature low with the Pelorous stealth radar from Blue Triangle Inc.

radr_bltr_s01_prophet.label: Prophet
radr_bltr_s01_prophet.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth The art of seeing without being seen has never been better exemplified than by the Prophet radar system. Blue Triangle Inc. has managed to maximize sensitivity while minimizing pulse emissions to create a radar ideal for remaining off other people’s.

radr_bltr_s02_cassandra.label: Cassandra
radr_bltr_s02_cassandra.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Stealth When staying undetected is the key to operational security, the Cassandra radar features reduced emissions while still providing above average performance.

radr_bltr_s02_predator.label: Predator
radr_bltr_s02_predator.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Stealth Created for those that want to keep a low profile, the Predator radar operates with low electromagnetic emissions, to help reduce your signature.

radr_bltr_s02_spyglass.label: Spyglass
radr_bltr_s02_spyglass.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Blue Triangle Inc. Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth Designed to help you remain undetected by hostile parties, the Spyglass radar operates with lower emissions while still giving you the full picture.

radr_chco_s00_broadspecgo.label: BroadSpec-Go
radr_chco_s00_broadspecgo.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Industrial The BroadSpec-Go was designed with accuracy, reliability, and durability in mind. And that's exactly what this radar provides.

radr_chco_s00_fullspecgo.label: FullSpec-Go
radr_chco_s00_fullspecgo.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 0 Grade: A Class: Industrial Chimera Communications knows that for a high quality radar, consistency is key. The FullSpec-Go, specifically designed to offer clarity in the most hazardous of terrain, guarantees you'll get where you need to go without any surprises.

radr_chco_s00_surveyorgo.label: Surveyor-Go
radr_chco_s00_surveyorgo.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Industrial The SurveyorGo is a vehicle-sized version of Chimera Communications' popular line of radars.

radr_chco_s01_broadspeclite.label: Broadspec-Lite
radr_chco_s01_broadspeclite.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Industrial Whether it’s tracking the members of your convoy or keeping an eye out for trouble, Chimera Communications understands how important your radar can be. That’s why they developed the Broadspec-Lite to have the range and sensitivity that’s so crucial to today’s operators.

radr_chco_s01_observergo.label: Observer-Go
radr_chco_s01_observergo.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial Designed to be as accessible as possible, the Observer-Go is a strong entry-level radar for those that want to keep themselves informed without breaking the bank.

radr_chco_s01_observerlite.label: Observer-Lite
radr_chco_s01_observerlite.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial The Observer-Lite is a no-frills radar ready for those long hauls. Trust the brand that focuses on how good a radar works and not just how it looks.

radr_chco_s01_surveyorlite.label: Surveyor-Lite
radr_chco_s01_surveyorlite.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Industrial There’s a lot for you to worry about on those long hauls. Don’t let your radar’s performance be one of them. You can count on the Surveyor-Lite from Chimera Communications to provide the durability and performance that you need.

radr_chco_s02_broadspec.label: BroadSpec
radr_chco_s02_broadspec.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.

radr_chco_s02_fullspec.label: FullSpec
radr_chco_s02_fullspec.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Industrial The FullSpec radar is considered by many to be one of the most dependable radar systems you can equip your rig with on the market today. Chimera Communications has worked hard to reduce false positives while improving consistency over range and the results speak for themselves.

radr_chco_s02_observer.label: Observer
radr_chco_s02_observer.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Industrial Using formerly classified military technology, this now publically available radar is designed to offer key information to the user.

radr_chco_s02_surveyor.label: Surveyor
radr_chco_s02_surveyor.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Surveyor radar from Chimera Communications does away with all the unnecessary extras other manufacturers hide behind to focus on what matters: signature and emission detection that works the way you need it to.

radr_chco_s03_fullspecmax.label: FullSpec-Max
radr_chco_s03_fullspecmax.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Industrial Keep your targets in your sights with the FullSpec-Max radar featuring advanced hard-working systems that excel at identifying potential threats.

radr_chco_s03_observermax.label: Observer-Max
radr_chco_s03_observermax.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Industrial Dependable and built to last, the Observer-Max offers standard radar detection.

radr_chco_s03_surveyormax.label: Surveyor-Max
radr_chco_s03_surveyormax.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Industrial The Surveyor-Max radar system is designed to effectively identify nearby objects so that you can stay focused on what matters.

radr_chco_s04_broadspecmax.label: BroadSpec-Max
radr_chco_s04_broadspecmax.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Chimera Communications Size: 4 Grade: B Class: Industrial Keep your eyes on the prize with the BroadSpec-Max. Suitable for the largest of ships, this radar performs effectively without compromise.

radr_grnp_s00_agure.label: Agure
radr_grnp_s00_agure.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Military Trusted by many security firms for their vehicles, this reliable and consistent radar will keep your operation on track.

radr_grnp_s00_prevenir.label: Prevenir
radr_grnp_s00_prevenir.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Military The Prevenir has been refined by extensive military field testing, making it the go-to vehicle radar for many across the UEE.

radr_grnp_s00_sens.label: Sens
radr_grnp_s00_sens.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Military The cutting-edge GNP Sens design elevates radar technology to meet or exceed the specifications used by most military organizations operating today.

radr_grnp_s00_v6026.label: V60-26
radr_grnp_s00_v6026.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 0 Grade: A Class: Military Providing crucial information during your operation, the V60-26 radar offers highly accurate and detailed updates on nearby emissions.

radr_grnp_s01_ecouter.label: Ecouter
radr_grnp_s01_ecouter.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Military Space is vast and unknowable, that’s why discerning pilots rely on the Ecouter small radar from GNP to keep them in the know about what’s around them.

radr_grnp_s01_tige.label: Tige
radr_grnp_s01_tige.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Military Situational awareness is key when engaging with hostiles. The GNP developed the Tige radar with improved accuracy to helps ensure that any viable contacts are detected.

radr_grnp_s01_v80111.label: V801-11
radr_grnp_s01_v80111.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Military Designed for the battlefield, the V801-11 is a cut above the rest thanks to the rigid, iterative testing, guaranteeing its performance when you need it most.

radr_grnp_s01_voir.label: Voir
radr_grnp_s01_voir.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Military The Voir is not just for the military anymore. Now you too can attach this small radar to your ship to stay safe.

radr_grnp_s02_epier.label: Epier
radr_grnp_s02_epier.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Military GNP’s finely tuned Epier medium radar delivers military grade stats for advanced signature detection wherever your mission takes you.

radr_grnp_s02_savoir.label: Savoir
radr_grnp_s02_savoir.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Military Boasting a decent range and energy efficiency, the Savoir is a radar designed for those that favor reliability.

radr_grnp_s02_v80112.label: V801-12
radr_grnp_s02_v80112.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military During field operations, the GNP V801-12 radar system allows for increased strategic planning owing to its capability for detecting a wide variety of emission signatures, revealing hazards and hostiles alike.

radr_grnp_s02_vigilance.label: Vigilance
radr_grnp_s02_vigilance.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: GNP Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Vigilance means keeping a careful watch for any possible dangerous threats and the GNP radar that bears this name allows you to do just that with its proprietary emission accrual.

radr_grnp_s03_devoue.label: Devoue
radr_grnp_s03_devoue.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military The Devoue radar is able to render nearby energy emissions accurately and quickly, allowing you to retain control even in the most dire situations.

radr_grnp_s03_fidele.label: Fidele
radr_grnp_s03_fidele.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Military Focusing on the core features of a radar, the Fidele operates efficiently even in battle conditions.

radr_grnp_s03_resolu.label: Resolu
radr_grnp_s03_resolu.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Military Invented with larger ships in mind, the Resolu radar provides the same level of three-dimensional scanning technology without sacrificing dependability.

radr_grnp_s03_v880.label: V880
radr_grnp_s03_v880.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Groupe Nouveau Paradigme Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Providing useful assistance when detecting hostiles, the V880 brings the power of military technology to the consumer market.

radr_nave_s01_snsr5.label: SNSR5
radr_nave_s01_snsr5.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Competition The SNSR5 radar small size and dependable performance makes it the perfect device for entry-level users.

radr_nave_s01_snsr6.label: SNS-R6
radr_nave_s01_snsr6.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Competition Increased power and performance makes the SNS-R6 stand out from other radars in its class. Get yours today to see why pilots the Empire over love components from Nav-E7 Gadgets.

radr_nave_s01_snsr7.label: SNSR7
radr_nave_s01_snsr7.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition Engineered to give your vehicle the edge, the SNSR7 provides real-time tracking information on all surrounding emissions.

radr_nave_s02_snsr5x.label: SNS-R5x
radr_nave_s02_snsr5x.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Competition Perfect for an entry-level pilot, the SNS-R5x trades excessive frills for energy efficiency.

radr_nave_s02_snsr6x.label: SNS-R6x
radr_nave_s02_snsr6x.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Competition The SNS-R6x provides certainty when detecting electromagnetic emissions, as well as offering reasonable levels of energy efficiency.

radr_nave_s02_snsr7x.label: SNS-R7x
radr_nave_s02_snsr7x.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: Nav-E7 Gadgets Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Competition Favoring energy efficiency above all, the SNS-R7x is a radar is ideal for those looking to manage their ship's levels effectively, whilst still providing excellent vision.

radr_wlop_s00_denning.label: Denning
radr_wlop_s00_denning.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: C Class: Civilian With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

radr_wlop_s00_fabian.label: Fabian
radr_wlop_s00_fabian.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: A Class: Civilian Utilizing best-in-class scanning technology, the Fabian radar ensures you won't be caught unaware.

radr_wlop_s00_vogel.label: Vogel
radr_wlop_s00_vogel.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian As you ride to destinations new and afar, uncover the unknown with the Vogel radar from WillsOp that features innovative signature filtration and detection algorithms.

radr_wlop_s01_abetti.label: Abetti
radr_wlop_s01_abetti.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Civilian Supplying high powered detection technology, the Abetti's advanced systems offer a responsive radar experience.

radr_wlop_s01_backlund.label: Backlund
radr_wlop_s01_backlund.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Civilian Wherever you fly, the WillsOp Backlund radar is perfect for gathering information on what’s nearby and detecting a variety of emission signatures.

radr_wlop_s01_capston.label: Capston
radr_wlop_s01_capston.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: C Class: Civilian Experience why WillsOp is a premiere manufacturer of ship electronics with their Capston radar. Outfit your ship with one today so you know what’s nearby.

radr_wlop_s01_fleming.label: Fleming
radr_wlop_s01_fleming.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Fleming is WillsOp’s base small radar. What it lacks in bells and whistles, it makes up for with consistent performance.

radr_wlop_s02_agrippa.label: Agrippa
radr_wlop_s02_agrippa.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian A superior quality radar able to accurate provide information on your vehicle's surroundings.

radr_wlop_s02_battani.label: Battani
radr_wlop_s02_battani.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Expand your horizons with the WilsOp Battani radar and its advanced passive detection system.

radr_wlop_s02_chernykh.label: Chernykh
radr_wlop_s02_chernykh.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian The Chernykh is named after the famed 26th century engineer who designed some of the most prized radars of that era. This medium radar from WillsOp celebrates both the look and performance of those classic components.

radr_wlop_s02_fawad.label: Fawad
radr_wlop_s02_fawad.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Fawad entry-level radar from WillsOp is the perfect choice for someone who is looking for a no-frills signature detection system perfect for everyday use.

radr_wlop_s03_anysta.label: Anysta
radr_wlop_s03_anysta.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian Avoid getting tunnel vision with the Anysta radar. Offering exceptional performance all round, this radar will help keep you informed.

radr_wlop_s03_capsulo.label: Capsulo
radr_wlop_s03_capsulo.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian For a dependable radar with above average performance, the Capsulo is a trustworthy option.

radr_wlop_s03_socoria.label: Socoria
radr_wlop_s03_socoria.description: Item Type: Radar Manufacturer: WillsOp Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian The Socoria is a well-rounded radar providing everything a pilot needs for an effective radar at a reasonable price point.

rmb_goggles_01.label: Avalos Scout Goggles
rmb_goggles_01.description: Tech meets tough with the Avalos Scout goggles. Their unique and sturdy frame ensures that the lenses remain intact even after unexpected impacts or sudden atmospheric changes. Built for harsh environments but bold enough to be worn anywhere.

rmb_goggles_02.label: Aponte Explorer Goggles
rmb_goggles_02.description: Outfitted with Rambler's scratch resistant lenses, the Aponte Explorer goggles provides a clear view of the path ahead. Their wraparound design keeps dirt and debris away while on windy plains, but still look stylish enough to wear when walking through bustling city streets.

scu_hat_02_01_01.label: IronBand Hard Hat
scu_hat_02_01_01.description: The IronBand is another in Stegman's award-winning line of safety wear. Built from top-grade impact resistant materials, the IronBand has undergone rigorous safety testing to provide maximum protection in the worst of conditions.

scu_hat_03_01_01.label: Hardline Hard Hat Black
scu_hat_03_01_01.description: Stegman's Hardline 7800 is the latest in a proud line of safety wear. The Hardline is constructed from the same high-density plastics used in some body armor.

scu_pants_01_01_01.label: WorkLife Pants Black
scu_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU With Stegman's, you know you're getting clothes made for workers, by workers. Featuring multiple external pockets with easy access tabs, WorkLife pants are rugged, functional and professional. Just like you.

scu_gloves_02_01_imperator.label: Davin Work Gloves "Pathfinder"
scu_gloves_02_01_imperator.description: Toss out your old boring work gloves and replace them with the Davin Pathfinder edition. These special work gloves combine Stegman's classic, sturdy construction with a supremely comfortable lining and a striking silver color.

scu_goggles_01.label: Haruspec Goggles
scu_goggles_01.description: Supremely comfortable yet light as a feather, the Haruspec goggles also provide excellent protection against the elements thanks to their sturdy side shields. Stegman's fitted the goggles with polycarbonate performance lenses and a special slip-resistant nose pad to ensure they stay in place.

scu_goggles_02.label: SightRight Goggles
scu_goggles_02.description: Stegman's SightRight goggles strike a careful balance between ultralight comfort and professional-quality protection. The enhanced polycarbonate frame offers maximum eye safety with a durable scratch-resistant lens construction that also features an award-winning anti-fog coating to maintain visibility in the harshest of worksites.

scu_jacket_02_01_imperator.label: IndVest Jacket "Pathfinder"
scu_jacket_02_01_imperator.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU Keep your tools within easy reach with Stegman's IndVest. The exclusive Pathfinder edition is made from black industrial strength materials that includes both purple and silver highlights. A rare jacket that's both stylish and sensible. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

scu_jacket_03_01_centurion.label: Cordimon Jacket "Voyager"
scu_jacket_03_01_centurion.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Stegman's classic worker's jacket has been a staple of job sites for over seventy years. The exclusive Voyager edition blends red and black with gold highlights to provide a stylish edge, making the Cordimon tough, durable, and perfect to wear anytime, anywhere.

scu_pants_02_01_imperator.label: Edgewear Pants "Pathfinder"
scu_pants_02_01_imperator.description: Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU A reinforced nylon weave and temperature-rated quilted technology make Edgewear pants ideal for any jobsite. This staple of Stegman's line of utility clothes comes with double knees, reinforced joint pads, and extra pockets. The exclusive Pathfinder edition comes in purple with black and silver accents.

scu_pants_03_01_centurion.label: Clempt Pants "Voyager"
scu_pants_03_01_centurion.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Stegman uses a tough composite weave fabric and double knees to ensure these all-purpose pants are comfortable yet durable. The Voyager edition is black with a large red tool pocket and gold knee pads.

scu_shirt_01_01_centurion.label: Day One Shirt "Voyager"
scu_shirt_01_01_centurion.description: The Voyager edition of this Henley shirt is red with black trim and gold sleeves. It features Stegman's famous AirFlow technology, a stain-resistant, air-cooled fabric that keeps you comfortable and dry. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

shld_asas_s01_mirage.label: Mirage
shld_asas_s01_mirage.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 1 Grade: A Class: Stealth By boasting a signature so faint most won’t believe it’s there, Ascension Astro’s top of the line small shield generator lives up to its name — Mirage. It’s the ultimate component for those who want to go unnoticed.

shld_asas_s02_obscura.label: Obscura
shld_asas_s02_obscura.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Stealth Respected for its lower emissions, the Obscura shield generator uses an advanced signature dispersal system to help give your ship a quieter signature while still remaining shielded.

shld_asas_s02_sheut.label: Sheut
shld_asas_s02_sheut.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Stealth Keep your shield’s heat from giving you away by using a Sheut. Another outstanding stealth shield generator from Ascension Astro.

shld_asas_s02_umbra.label: Umbra
shld_asas_s02_umbra.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Ascension Astro Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Stealth Slip through the darkness of space like a phantom with the Umbra stealth shield generator. Best when used in conjunction with other low signature components from Ascension Astro.

shld_basl_s00_bastion.label: Bastion
shld_basl_s00_bastion.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Industrial You don’t need to be a multi-system megacorp to afford an industrial-grade shield generator for your vehicle. Basilisk’s Bastion provides enhanced shield durability without breaking the bank.

shld_basl_s00_siege.label: Siege
shld_basl_s00_siege.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Industrial The Siege generates top-of-the-line, industrial-grade durability for your vehicle’s shield. That’s why it’s the most trusted vehicle shield component.

shld_basl_s01_steward.label: Steward
shld_basl_s01_steward.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Industrial The Steward is Basilisk’s entry-level industrial shield generator. Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions.

shld_basl_s02_armada.label: Armada
shld_basl_s02_armada.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Industrial Basilisk started by making cutting edge hull plating that was renowned for being durable and dependable. Today they carry on that proud legacy with industrial shield generators like the Armada.

shld_basl_s02_citadel.label: Citadel
shld_basl_s02_citadel.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Industrial Fortify your ship with Basilisk’s Citadel shield generator. Tailored toward industrial vessels, the component emits a robust and reliable shield.

shld_basl_s02_rampart.label: Rampart
shld_basl_s02_rampart.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Industrial Basilisk understands that escape isn’t always an option. That’s why they built the Rampart industrial shield generator to take an incredible amount of damage before it’s depleted.

shld_basl_s03_barbican.label: Barbican
shld_basl_s03_barbican.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Industrial Barricade your ship against external forces with the Basilisk Barbican. Originally fabricated for large industrial vessels, this shield generator has became quite popular due to its high damage absorption.

shld_basl_s03_parapet.label: Parapet
shld_basl_s03_parapet.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Industrial As the peak of Basilisk’s large industrial shield generators, it’s easy to see why the Parapet is so beloved. With one of the industry’s best shield generation to damage ratio, it’s difficult to degrade the shield and expose the hull.

shld_basl_s03_ward.label: Ward
shld_basl_s03_ward.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Basilisk Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Industrial The Ward is Basilisk’s basic industrial-grade shield generator for large ships. It provides decent performance and durability while also keeping its signature respectable.

shld_behr_s02_6ma.label: 6MA 'Kozane'
shld_behr_s02_6ma.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Behring’s ironclad reputation is almost as impenetrable as the shield produced by the 6MA ‘Kozane’. If it’s good enough for Behring, it’s good enough for you.

shld_behr_s02_7ma.label: 7MA 'Lorica'
shld_behr_s02_7ma.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Civilian Trust a component that has been equipped on crafts for centuries — the 7MA ‘Lorica’. Experience Behring’s top-of-the-line shield generator on your ship today.

shld_behr_s03_6ca.label: 6CA 'Bila'
shld_behr_s03_6ca.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian “Built by Behring” is a phrase synonymous with quality. That’s why so many around the Empire trust their 6CA ‘Bila’ large shield generator to provide them with solid performance, impressive durable, and an acceptable degree of stealth.

shld_behr_s03_7ca.label: 7CA 'Nargun'
shld_behr_s03_7ca.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Behring Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian Commercial-grade shield generators don’t get any better than the 7CA ‘Nargun’. The component utilizes Behring’s patented ‘Freeze Flow’ tech to keep its heat signature in check while increasing both its overall performance and durability.

shld_default.label: Shield Generator
shld_default.description: Default Description for the ship generator component.

shld_godi_s02_coverall.label: CoverAll
shld_godi_s02_coverall.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Military Don’t sacrifice performance for durability. Get both with Gorgon Defender Industries’ CoverAll shield generator.

shld_godi_s02_fr76.label: FR-76
shld_godi_s02_fr76.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military Refined by years of extensive, real world testing by the military, Gorgon Defender Industries FR-76 is the ultimate shield generator. Perfect for everyone from folks defending the frontline to those exploring the frontier.

shld_godi_s02_secureshield.label: SecureShield
shld_godi_s02_secureshield.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Military Get military-grade protection for your ship with the SecureShield from Gorgon Defender Industries. Their cutting edge emitter tech allows for superior shield absorption across the spectrum of damage types.

shld_godi_s03_fr86.label: FR-86
shld_godi_s03_fr86.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Gorgon’s FR-86 is tried, tested, and trusted. No other large shield generator delivers both exceptional performance and durability to this degree.

shld_godi_s03_fullblock.label: FullBlock
shld_godi_s03_fullblock.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military Crafted by former residents of Caliban, Gorgon’s FullBlock large shield generator has been repeatedly put to the test by members of the military and public. That means you can count on it regardless of what you come up against.

shld_godi_s03_securescreen.label: SecureScreen
shld_godi_s03_securescreen.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Gorgon Defender Industries Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Military Gorgon Defender Industries brings military might to their entry-level, large shield generator. Featuring best-in-class durability, the SecureScreen was built to take a beating and survive.

shld_seco_s00_loc.label: LOC
shld_seco_s00_loc.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 0 Grade: B Class: Civilian The LOC adapts Seal Corp’s revolutionary ship energy shield for vehicles. It provides premiere protection against oppressive forces found on the ground or hovering above.

shld_seco_s00_red.label: RED
shld_seco_s00_red.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 0 Grade: D Class: Civilian Seal Corp reworked their classic component to make the RED vehicle shield generator both effective and affordable.

shld_seco_s02_bloc.label: BLOC
shld_seco_s02_bloc.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Civilian Seal Corporation’s BLOC shield generator was the first to use the company’s revolutionary quantum core semiconductor to reduce the component’s power draw without compromising performance.

shld_seco_s02_rpel.label: RPEL
shld_seco_s02_rpel.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian See why more people trust Seal Corporation to protect their ship than any other company. With the RPEL shield generator you can be certain you’ll be sealed off from danger.

shld_seco_s03_armor.label: ARMOR
shld_seco_s03_armor.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian ARMOR is Seal Corps’ top-of-the-line shield generator. It was used extensively by the military prior to its shield tech being declassified for civilian use.

shld_seco_s03_guard.label: GUARD
shld_seco_s03_guard.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Don’t be afraid to go up against the unknown with Seal Corp’s GUARD. This shield generator balances performance, durability, and stealth to allow the user to utilize the shield in whatever way suits them best.

shld_seco_s03_haven.label: HAVEN
shld_seco_s03_haven.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Seal Corporation Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian The HAVEN is an admired shield generator for large ships. Seal Corp’s simple, clean design makes repairing the component an easy and affordable task, and has only increased its popularity over the years.

shld_vncl_s01_hide.label: Hide
shld_vncl_s01_hide.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Vanduul Size: 1 Grade: N/A Class: Military The Vanduul’s aggressive dog fighting tactics are possible because this shield generator provides them the protection to do so.

shld_yorm_s01_jaghte.label: Jaghte
shld_yorm_s01_jaghte.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Yorm Size: 1 Grade: B Class: Competition Built with performance in mind, Yorm’s Jaghte competition shield generator prioritizes shield health and generation rate over strength and stealth.

shld_yorm_s02_bamoty.label: Bamoty
shld_yorm_s02_bamoty.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Yorm Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Competition The Bamoty is Yorm’s take on a commercial style shield generator. This medium-sized component has won the company a wider fanbase because it expertly balances performance, durability, and stealth.

shld_yorm_s02_haltur.label: Haltur
shld_yorm_s02_haltur.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Yorm Size: 2 Grade: B Class: Competition Strong shield health and an exceptional generation rate gives the Haltur the best performance ranking of any shield in its class. Beloved by racers and those who prefer to navigate away from danger instead of soaking it up.

shld_yorm_s02_trenta.label: Trenta
shld_yorm_s02_trenta.description: Item Type: Shield Generator Manufacturer: Yorm Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Competition An ideal choice for racers looking for a shield generator that provides above average shield performance and durability. As a bonus, the Trenta’s casing is constructed out of a magnesium infused alloy which makes the component both sturdy yet lightweight.

spv_jacket_01_01_shared.label: Castillo Jacket Formal
spv_jacket_01_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Refined enough for day, but ready for night, this jacket is essential for any young professional's collection. Notched lapels and a center back seam provide a tailored look at the Spar Van Miles price. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

spv_glasses_01.label: AvantX Glasses
spv_glasses_01.description: A distinct one piece lens with a unique geometric design makes the AvantX glasses stand out from the crowd. SPV expertly blends cutting edge style and technology for a distinct look and feel that's fashion forward.

srvl_combat_light_arms_01.label: Piecemeal Armor Arms
srvl_combat_light_arms_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_combat_light_core_01.label: Piecemeal Armor Core
srvl_combat_light_core_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -32 / 62 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU Backpacks: Light This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_combat_light_legs_01.label: Piecemeal Armor Legs
srvl_combat_light_legs_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU This armor was created using repurposed parts from a Caldera armor set to provide the wearer with an extra layer of protection against aggressors and harsh environments.

srvl_parasite_helmet_01.label: Parasite Replica Helmet
srvl_parasite_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s The original Parasite vid established a new face of fear and terrified the Empire. This iconic look can now be yours with the Parasite Replica helmet from CC's Conversions. Digital scans of the original prop helped to reproduce every gruesome detail. Despite its distinct design, the Parasite Replica helmet is space-rated and fully functional. It can be safely worn both in and out of atmosphere, or wherever you're looking to scare someone.

srvl_parasite_helmet_02.label: Parasite V: Dark Birth Replica Helmet
srvl_parasite_helmet_02.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Seven years after the original vid shocked the empire, Parasite V: Dark Birth took terror to a new level. CC's Conversions celebrated the release of the latest installment by collaborating with the vid's creators on an official and fully functional replica helmet. A special sensor built into the parasite's eye allows you a clear view of the reactions to every appalling detail. Carefully designed to honor the original prop and withstand the real rigors of space travel, the helmet is a premiere replica that will turn you into a walking nightmare!

slaver_undersuit_armor_shared.label: Stoneskin Undersuit
slaver_undersuit_armor_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Kastak Arms' Stoneskin series of combat undersuits are built upon CDS' famous TCS-4 system based on extensive feedback from the operators who rely on this technology in the field. Offering a myriad of options for armor and EVA capabilities, the Stoneskin is set to rival CDS as a rugged and reliable undersuit.

space_cactus.label: Kavische Columnar
space_cactus.description: Capable of growing anywhere up to 5 meters in height, the Kavische is a columnar cactus hybrid that developed on Yar shortly after the introduction of floral into the newly terraformed ecosystem. Adapting the hue of the red sand, the Kavische quickly became one of the predominant plants on the planet.

space_flower.label: Tuserac Plena (Emperor Blossom) Plant
space_flower.description: A member of the Tuserac family of flowers, the Emperor Blossom is one of the most recognizable indigenous plants from Terra. For most of the year, the flower is obscured, covered by what appears to be an unremarkable brown husk, similar to the Typha/Cattail of Earth. When an ideal temperature is reached, the plant enters its blooming phase: the petals peel back, revealing the striking colors underneath. Tens of thousands cross the Zaffre Bay every year for the Twilight Festival which coincides with the blooming of this beautiful flower.

tmbl_vest_biker_01_01_01.label: Renegade Cut Vest
tmbl_vest_biker_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Reveal your inner rebel with the Renegade Cut vest, featuring a wide notched lapel and metal studs on the left shoulder. High quality synthetic leather and an insulated lining give the vest both comfort and style.

tmbl_vest_cargo_01_01_01.label: Renegade Vest Cargo
tmbl_vest_cargo_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Enjoy the open road and courier goods with the Renegade Cargo vest. A special synthetic weave bestows the vest with incredible tensile strength that can support the custom 0.375 SCU pannier, while reinforced straps keep it secured to your back even while traversing rugged terrain.

tmbl_vest_racing_01_01_01.label: Renegade Vest Racing
tmbl_vest_racing_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Renegade Racing vest provides protection against road rash without adding to your lap time. Graphene-based nanocomposite plating makes the vest extremely light yet ultra-durable. Ideal for everything from idyllic rides to heart pounding last laps.

turret_remote.label: Remote Turret
turret_remote.description: Multitask on the battlefield with this remote turret system. Featuring precise controls and a wide field of fire, the turret allows pilots to add combat support to their resume.

ups_shoes_01_01_01.label: Edgeriders Shoes
ups_shoes_01_01_01.description: Nothing will take you back to the golden era club scene of Prime in the 2920s like Upsiders' new Edgerider sneakers. These slip-on sneakers feature daz patterning and modern impact cushioning to keep you up and active for days on end.

ups_shoes_02_01_01.label: Crestfall Shoes
ups_shoes_02_01_01.description: Upsiders' Crestfall high-tops are slip-ons that blend suede and synthetic fabrics imbued with subtle patterns. They feature a deep U-cut collar, padded heel, and enlarged tongue. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

xian_plant.label: Centennial Bloom Plant
xian_plant.description: One of the most iconic images of the Xi’An Empire in the UEE is the unblossomed Centennial Bloom. The growth of this plant is so precarious, even the slightest deviation in atmosphere or nourishment can offset its blooming period. Under sustained optimal conditions, the bloom takes a hundred years to live up to its name, blossoming small bellflowers of striking white and crimson.

adv_agent_shared.label: TrueDef-Pro Core
adv_agent_shared.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Virgil's TrueDef line of personal body armor provide strategic protection of vital areas while keeping you fast and mobile. Numerous planetary law enforcement organizations and even the Advocacy use versions of the TrueDef for their officers and agents.

adv_agent_helmet_01.label: Argus Helmet
adv_agent_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Virgil's Argus helmet utilizes advanced multi-layered composite construction to provide incredible protection from weapon fire as well as environmental hazards. The tinted visor offers a wide field-of-view to improve situational awareness and unrestricted movement.

adv_agent_undersuit.label: Guardian Undersuit
adv_agent_undersuit.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% Virgil's Guardian is a multi-purpose combat undersuit that features basic reinforced plates for impact protection as well as natural integration with compatible armor sets.

alb_jacket_02_01_01.label: Softshell Jacket
alb_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Perfect for weathering any storm, Alejo Brothers' Softshell poncho is built from multi-layered waterproof weave technology and features an extra wide size to keep your personal gear clear and dry without restricting your arm movement.

alb_gloves_01.label: Deri Gloves
alb_gloves_01.description: Maintain a tactile sense of the world while also keeping your hands safe and dry with the Deri fingerless gloves. Featuring a comfortable inner lining, lightweight plating on the back of the hand and slip resistant palm padding, the Deri gloves are an ideal choice for a wide variety of tasks.

alb_gloves_02_01_01.label: Parway Gloves
alb_gloves_02_01_01.description: Whether engaged in work or play, the Parway gloves provide protection and the perfect fit. Synthetic leather cuffs overlap with a lightweight metal plate to offer protection from impacts. The fingers and palm mix fleece and a special perforated polymer to keep your hands dry and cool while still being able to interact with touchscreens.

alb_gloves_02_02_01.label: Chokehold Gloves
alb_gloves_02_02_01.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs.

alb_gloves_02_02_10.label: Chokehold Gloves Molten
alb_gloves_02_02_10.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Molten version is dyed a deep red to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_11.label: Chokehold Gloves Sleet
alb_gloves_02_02_11.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Sleet version is dyed a well-worn grey to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_15.label: Chokehold Gloves Molehill Brown
alb_gloves_02_02_15.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Molehill version is dyed a neutral brown to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_gloves_02_02_18.label: Chokehold Gloves Grime Blue
alb_gloves_02_02_18.description: When you can't afford to fumble. Flexible polyweave provide excellent grip plus ablative ceramic demi-gaunt reinforcement and close-fit cuffs. The Grime version is dyed a dusky blue to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

alb_hat_01_01_01.label: Ketchum Beanie
alb_hat_01_01_01.description: Complete your cool-weather wardrobe with the classic Ketchum beanie from Alejo Brothers.

alb_hat_02_foundation01.label: Foundation Festival Beanie Teal
alb_hat_02_foundation01.description: Show your solidarity and commitment to forging a brighter future for the UEE with this Foundation Festival beanie. Made from high-quality cashmere spun on Angeli, this double layer beanie is ultrasoft, warm, and features the Foundation Festival logo on the front.

alb_jacket_03.label: Taberna Jacket
alb_jacket_03.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU The Taberna jacket delivers refined design for rugged conditions. It features a weather resistant outer shell with additional paneling on the torso and arms. An integrated hood and shawl provide extra protection from the elements while a spacious toolbelt ensures gear remains within reach.

alb_jacket_04_01_01.label: Loscha Work Vest
alb_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_04.label: Loscha Work Vest Primrose
alb_jacket_04_01_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_10.label: Loscha Work Vest Valencia
alb_jacket_04_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_13.label: Loscha Work Vest Saddle
alb_jacket_04_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_04_01_17.label: Loscha Work Vest Sirocco
alb_jacket_04_01_17.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The heavy-duty Loscha Work Vest by Alejo Brothers is designed for people who want to be prepared for anything at any time.

alb_jacket_05_01_01.label: Marshal Sleeveless Vest
alb_jacket_05_01_01.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_04.label: Marshal Sleeveless Vest Sycamore
alb_jacket_05_01_04.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_16.label: Marhsal Sleeveless Vest Hunter Green
alb_jacket_05_01_16.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_18.label: Marhsal Sleeveless Vest Steel Blue
alb_jacket_05_01_18.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jacket_05_01_20.label: Marhsal Sleeveless Vest Copper
alb_jacket_05_01_20.description: The durable Marshal sleeveless vest by Alejo Brothers is made to endure life on the frontier while distinct stylings like shoulder straps, bold cross-chest placket, and a high-collar make sure the wearer stands out on any far flung world.

alb_jumpsuit_01_01_01.label: Bannock Jumpsuit Warm Ash
alb_jumpsuit_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Bannock jumpsuit combines comfort and durability. It features reinforced padding in critical areas, plenty of storage, and an adjustable belt to ensure a snug fit. Its unique design also includes a built-in secondary layer, allowing the wearer to unzip and cool down without fear of damaging their everyday clothes.

alb_mask_01.label: Taos Balaclava and Goggles
alb_mask_01.description: Fearlessly face any weather with the Taos balaclava and goggles. An ultra-soft inner lining provides warmth and comfort while a special exterior coating repels precipitation. The adjustable headband ensures an ideal fit, and the padding of the anti-fog goggles is integrated directly into the fabric to seal out the elements.

alb_mask_02.label: Katla Mask
alb_mask_02.description: The Katla mask provides full face coverage from the elements or prying eyes. Oversized eyes provide a wide field of vision and a built-in air filter helps you breathe easy. Please note that this mask is not space-rated and should only be worn in naturally breathable environs.

alb_mask_03_01_01.label: Salluq Mask Brown
alb_mask_03_01_01.description: Made for hostile environments, the Salluq Mask keeps dirt, dust, and grit out of your eyes while providing you with a wide field of vision. Please note that this mask is not space-rated and should only be worn in naturally breathable environments.

alb_pants_01.label: Tekaw Pants
alb_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Comfortable enough to wear all day yet designed to thrive under harsh conditions, the Tekaw pants are perfect whether you're on or off duty. Their stylish yet durable design includes a water-wicking coating and padded shins guards with wrappings that ensure a snug fit.

alb_pants_01_02_01.label: Strode Pants
alb_pants_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. Made from loose-fit tear-resistant polyweave with rigid greaves, these pants won't tie you up when things get tight.

alb_pants_01_02_10.label: Strode Pants Molten
