alb_pants_02_01_01.label: Slickdry Waders
alb_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The popular Slickdry Waders by Alejo Brothers are a combination of pants and boots made of a synthetic hydrophobic material and ensure the wearer will stay dry even if just stepping out of a river.

alb_pants_03.label: Allpa Pants Brown
alb_pants_03.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU If you're in the adventure business, you'll need clothing that can take the heat. The Allpa Pants were made with heavyweight cotton that features AlejoFlex technology, providing the wearer with a wide range of movement during tough jobs while maintaining its durability.

alb_pants_04.label: Navoi Boots and Pants
alb_pants_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU Be ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg.

alb_pants_04_01_04.label: Navoi Boots and Pants Veritas
alb_pants_04_01_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU Be ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg. The Veritas edition is a bloody red, with black belts and leather straps.

alb_pants_04_05_01.label: Navoi Boot and Pants Striker
alb_pants_04_05_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU Be ready to take on whatever the day brings when wearing the Navoi. This unique piece integrates the pants perfectly into knee high boots. Made from a combination of synthetic materials to be tough yet comfortable, the Navoi also comes with shin pads and pouches strapped onto each leg. The Striker edition is a green camo with rust colored boots.

alb_shirt_01_01_01.label: Harlowe Shirt
alb_shirt_01_01_01.description: Capable as being worn on its own or as a base for layers, this long-sleeve henley style shirt from Alejo Brothers keeps you stylish and comfortable.

alb_shirt_02_01_01.label: Cliffback T-Shirt
alb_shirt_02_01_01.description: Alejo Brothers' classic loop tee with a spatter pattern.

alb_shirt_03_01_microtech.label: Harlowe Shirt microTech
alb_shirt_03_01_microtech.description: Capable as being worn on its own or as a base for layers, this long-sleeve henley style shirt decked out in microTech colors and branding keeps you stylish but comfortable.

alb_shirt_05.label: Amaris Shirt
alb_shirt_05.description: The rugged Amaris Shirt is a breathable long-sleeve shirt reinforced by raised fabric on the shoulders to create an elegant but industrial look.

alb_shirt_06.label: Cassidy Shirt
alb_shirt_06.description: Habidash's Cassidy short-sleeved henley t-shirt features a lightweight, breathable fabric blend paired with a neck covering and separated arm sleeves for a stylish look that remains practical in dustier climates.

alb_shoes_01.label: Nivala Shoes
alb_shoes_01.description: The Alejo Brothers expertly engineered the Nivala shoes to provide high ankle support while remaining lightweight. The shoes mix the company's patented FullFlex rubber with synthetic nubuck leather for flexible yet strategic support, and feature cushioning on the heels and balls of the feet for supreme comfort.

banu_lum_gloves_01_01_01.label: Good Gift Gloves
banu_lum_gloves_01_01_01.description: The Good Gift gloves are made to match the festive sweater of the same name. These comfortable holiday hand warmers not only look good but are fingerless to make interacting with items a breeze.

banu_lum_jacket_01_01_01.label: Good Gift Sweater
banu_lum_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This Banu-made mock turtleneck lets you celebrate Luminalia in comfort and style. Cozy up around the lamp with this luxurious red and green fabric blend with an asymmetrical front and three adjustable straps that guarantee the perfect fit. Banu phrases calling for merriment and a prosperous future adorn the front and back in golden script.

banu_lum_jacket_01_02_01.label: Good Gift Sweater Blue
banu_lum_jacket_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This Banu-made mock turtleneck lets you celebrate Luminalia in comfort and style. Cozy up around the lamp with this luxurious blue and grey fabric blend with an asymmetrical front and three adjustable straps that guarantee the perfect fit. Banu phrases calling for merriment and a prosperous future adorn the front and back in white script.

basl_combat_light_flightsuit_02_01_01.label: Ace Interceptor Racing Flight Suit
basl_combat_light_flightsuit_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Flight Suit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +100% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Featuring a deceptively simple design, the Ace Interceptor flight suit is jet black with reinforced grey protective padding on the arms and legs. Basilisk's renowned craftsmanship make this flight suit durable and supremely comfortable, leaving no mystery as to why it's widely used by top pilots across the empire.

basl_combat_light_helmet_02_01_01.label: Ace Interceptor Helmet
basl_combat_light_helmet_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The unique open-faced design makes the Ace Interceptor helmet a lightweight and liberating option for operating in atmosphere. It features precisely layered plating to protect the head from a variety of combat and environmental hazards and an impact resistant, anti-glare visor over the eyes. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

cba_boots_01_01_01.label: Cirrus Boots Gray
cba_boots_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 15 °C These rugged, high ankle boots will keep your feet warm when venturing into wintry conditions. The Cirrus also integrates steel alloy links into the sole for added traction on icy surfaces.

cba_boots_02_01_01.label: Pampero Boots Maroon
cba_boots_02_01_01.description: The Pampero are sleek ankle high boots feature lightweight yet durable soles to make it feel like you're walking on clouds even when trekking across the most unforgiving terrain.

cba_chef_hat_01_01_01.label: Grammercy Food Service Cover
cba_chef_hat_01_01_01.description: The Grammercy Food Service Cover is a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Featuring a flexible one-size-fits-all form that expands or contracts firmly to the wearer's head, the hat design is both sleek and efficient.

cba_chef_jacket_01_01_01.label: Grammercy Food Service Jacket
cba_chef_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Grammercy Food Service Jacket is a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The jacket, first adapted from one of the company's bespoke surgeons coats, is the modern standard for chefs and line cooks. The jacket is constructed from a patented stain-resistant material that can be quickly cleaned.

cba_chef_pants_01_01_01.label: Grammercy Food Service Pants
cba_chef_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The Grammercy Food Service Pants are a standard food service accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Designed to merge style and functionality, the pants offer support for all members of a food service team and are constructed from a patented stain-resistant material that can be quickly cleaned.

cba_chef_shoes_01_01_01.label: Variable Service Shoes
cba_chef_shoes_01_01_01.description: Code Blue Apparel's Variable Service Shoes are constructed from a rigid rubber-carbon splice that help provide protection from physical impacts or piercings. The exterior is sprayed with artileather for a professional finish and offers maximum ease-of-cleaning.

cba_doctor_jacket_01_01_01.label: Galen Surgical Scrub Top
cba_doctor_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU You can count on Code Blue Apparel to deliver professional and comfortable medical clothing. The Galen Surgical Scrub Top features a large pocket and a wide wrap across the mid-section for a secure fit. Made with a special anti-bacterial fabric that's 99% effective while also being lightweight and wrinkle free.

cba_doctor_pants_01_01_01.label: Galen Surgical Scrub Pants
cba_doctor_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU You can count on Code Blue Apparel to deliver professional and comfortable medical clothing. The Galen Surgical Scrub Pants feature ribbing around the knees, and are made with a special anti-bacterial fabric that's 99% effective while also being lightweight and wrinkle free.

cba_gloves_01_01_01.label: Arcus Gloves Gray
cba_gloves_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 25 °C The Arcus gloves are thin enough to wear on everyday excursions, yet capable of keeping your hands warm in frigid conditions. Textured touch fingertips even allow you to easily access your mobi and other touch screens without removing your gloves.

cba_gloves_02_01_01.label: Fractus Gloves Maroon
cba_gloves_02_01_01.description: Developed for work sites, but refined enough for everyday use, the Fractus gloves layer StretchStrong fabric for a tight yet breathable fit. Reinforced knuckle plating and scaled fingertips provide extra durability and a stylish flourish.

cba_jacket_01_01_01.label: Cumulus Jacket Gray
cba_jacket_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 10 °C Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU Be bold and brave the cold in frigid conditions up to -35 °C with the Cumulus's special thermal lining. An oversized, insulated hood provides additional protection around the head, while the distinct quilted torso stops snow, ice, and wind from seeping in, ensuring the wearer remains warm and dry.

cba_jacket_02_01_01.label: Stratus Jacket Maroon
cba_jacket_02_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -20 / 20 °C Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Even though it's rated to withstand arctic conditions, you won't want any snow accumulating on this distinct and dazzling jacket. The Stratus will keep you warm from neck to knees thanks to its high collar and precisely layered pieces.

cba_mask_01_01_01.label: Col Head Cover Maroon
cba_mask_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -30 / 15 °C The Col is an insulated yet lightweight head cover that keeps heat from escaping. The large, chip-resistant faceplate features a cutting-edge GX coating to ensure the purest light quality for viewing the surrounding environs.

cba_mask_02_01_01.label: Gale Head Cover Maroon
cba_mask_02_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -30 / 15 °C Protect your head from the wind and cold with the Gale. Code Blue Apparel paired a wide-view visor with a dynamic synthetic fabric to create an excellent thermal barrier to keep heat from escaping without sacrificing your visibility.

cba_medical_gown_01_01_01.label: GME 338-10 Medical Gown
cba_medical_gown_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU The GME 338-10 Medical Gown is the de facto medical gown assigned to in-patients at hospitals and other care facilities across the Empire. This standard gown was designed so that patients could be dressed or undressed easily, and made with antibacterial fabric to help facilitate keeping wounds clean, lowering the risk of infection.

cba_medical_slippers_01_01_01.label: GME 240-15 Patient Slippers
cba_medical_slippers_01_01_01.description: The standard GME 240-15 Patient Slippers offer necessary foot protection and comfort during a patient's visit to a medical facility. Constructed from the same antibacterial fabric as the GME 338-10 Medical Gown, the slippers feature an easy on/off design and an anti-slip coating on the sole.

cba_nurse_pants_01.label: Mahoney Nurse Scrub Pants
cba_nurse_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The Mahoney Nurse Scrub Pants are made for medical professionals looking for a comfortable but durable fit. They feature two front pockets and a stretch waistband. Moisture wicking and anti-stain fabric makes these pants ready to withstand long shifts and repeated washing.

cba_nurse_scrubs_01_01_01.label: Mahoney Nurse Scrub Top
cba_nurse_scrubs_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU The Mahoney Nurse Scrub shirt is made for medical professionals looking an accommodating and comfortable fit. This top has a pocket and strips of fabric forming subtle geometric patterns on the right shoulder. It's also made with moisture wicking and anti-stain fabric ready to withstand long shifts and repeated washing.

cba_pants_01_01_01.label: Cumulus Pants Gray
cba_pants_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -35 / 15 °C Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Be bold and brave the cold with Cumulus pants. Designed with a synthetic fabric that insulates the inside and wicks away moisture from the outside, these pants provide protection against temperature drops to -35 °C.

cba_pants_02_01_01.label: Stratus Pants Maroon
cba_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Casual comfort that you can wear anywhere. The Stratus pants feature a soft comfort waistband that perfectly embraces your hips, and distinct reinforced paneling to ensure long wear and supreme style.

cba_security_hat_01_01_01.label: Ajax Security Uniform Hat
cba_security_hat_01_01_01.description: This black soft-domed, billed hat from Code Blue Apparel features eye-catching bronze accents and is imprinted boldly with "Security" across the front. Comfortable and distinct, it makes for an ideal accessory to any security professional's uniform.

cba_security_jacket_01_01_01.label: Ajax Security Uniform Jacket
cba_security_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU The Ajax Security Uniform Jacket is a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The jacket is a uniform intended for security professionals and does not provide any armored protection.

cba_security_pants_01_01_01.label: Ajax Security Uniform Pants
cba_security_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The Ajax Security Uniform Pants are a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. Flexible and durable, the pants are designed to match the Ajax Security Uniform Jacket and feature the same high-visibility piping. The pants are flexible and allow for a full range of motion.

cba_security_shoes_01_01_01.label: Ajax Security Uniform Shoes
cba_security_shoes_01_01_01.description: Ajax Security Uniform Shoes are a standard security accessory produced by Code Blue Apparel's professional division. The boot-styled shoes feature a unique thick-body construction that increases durability in exchange for overall bulk. A heavy-duty rubberized exterior protects the shoes from weather and general day-to-day wear.

cba_surgeon_dress_01.label: Shizhen Surgical Gown
cba_surgeon_dress_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Ensure complete upper body coverage and comfort with the Shizhen surgical gown. Its unique design features a light, breathable long sleeve shirt underneath a see through surgical gown, delivering dual layer protection against fluids and pathogens.

cba_surgeon_gloves_01.label: Ignaz Surgical Gloves
cba_surgeon_gloves_01.description: The Ignaz surgical gloves are sterile and strong without sacrifice the manual dexterity necessary for delicate surgeries. Made with a special anti-puncture material and featuring a beaded cuff that guarantees a snug fit, the inside of the glove is also coated with a special gel to keep your hands from drying and cracking.

cba_surgeon_mask_01.label: Shizhen Surgical Head Cover
cba_surgeon_mask_01.description: The Shizhen surgical head cover provides complete coverage during medical procedures. Lightweight, breathable and anti-bacterial, the head cover even includes a tinted lens to reduce heat and eye strain that may occur during procedures involving lasers.

cba_surgeon_pants_01.label: Taussig Surgical Pants
cba_surgeon_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: .05K µSCU Comfortable, lightweight, and breathable are the top three traits surgeons look for in their work pants, so CBA started there. The Taussig are not only comfortable to wear but are made from an antibacterial and anti-rip fabric that provides excellent protection against fluids, pathogens, and other hazards of the job.

cba_surgeon_shoes_01_01_01.label: Lister Surgical Shoes
cba_surgeon_shoes_01_01_01.description: The Lister surgical shoes are designed to provide comfort and support even after hours on your feet. Made out of a crisp white material for easy identification of contamination, the shoes feature padded insoles and are made from a proprietary material that's both breathable and antibacterial.

cbd_gloves_01.label: Grappler Gloves
cbd_gloves_01.description: Originally made for open-canopy racers, the Grappler gloves became beloved for their versatility and durability. Their mix of leather and synthetic fabrics make for a lightweight and warm wear. They also feature an adjustable strap to guarantee the perfect fit, and a special tactile fingertip design so wearers don't have to remove the gloves to interact with screens.

cbd_gloves_01_01_04.label: Grappler Gloves Veritas
cbd_gloves_01_01_04.description: Originally made for open-canopy racers, the Grappler gloves became beloved for their versatility and durability. Their mix of leather and synthetic fabrics make for a lightweight and warm wear. They also feature an adjustable strap to guarantee the perfect fit, and a special tactile fingertip design so wearers don't have to remove the gloves to interact with screens. The Veritas edition is a bloody red, with black belts and leather straps.

cbd_hat_02_01_centurion.label: MC-Pinhead Hat "Voyager"
cbd_hat_02_01_centurion.description: The MC-Pinhead military cadet hat from CBD features metal bullet studs embedded into its panels. The special Voyager edition comes in red with a gold band. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

cbd_hat_03_01_cfp.label: CFP Hat
cbd_hat_03_01_cfp.description: A comfortable blue and black cadet hat with the CFP's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_01_cargo.label: Cargo Hat
cbd_hat_03_01_cargo.description: The front panel of this grey cadet hat features Cargo written in yellow and purple. A bright band of yellow also rings the hat to make it highly visible from a distance.

cbd_hat_03_01_fleetweek2021.label: Invictus Hat Blue
cbd_hat_03_01_fleetweek2021.description: Show your support for the Navy and the brave souls that serve the Empire with this classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week.

cbd_hat_03_arccorp_01.label: ArcCorp Hat
cbd_hat_03_arccorp_01.description: A red and gray cadet hat with ArcCorp's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2020.label: IAE 2950 Hat
cbd_hat_03_iae2020.description: Boast about attending the UEE's most prominent ship showcase with the official hat of the 2950 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This grey cadet hat has the logo across the front panel and as a pop of color on the back.

cbd_hat_03_microtech_01.label: microTech Hat
cbd_hat_03_microtech_01.description: A blue, green, and gray cadet hat with microTech's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_sakurasun_01.label: Sakura Sun Hat
cbd_hat_03_sakurasun_01.description: A purple and pink cadet hat with Sakura Sun's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_aegis_dec.label: Aegis Dynamics Hat
cbd_hat_03_aegis_dec.description: This two-tone cap is mainly dark grey with a light grey accent stripe, featuring an Aegis Dynamics patch across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_anvil_dec.label: Anvil Aerospace Hat
cbd_hat_03_anvil_dec.description: A dark green Anvil Aerospace cap that features metal eyelets on the side.

cbd_hat_03_argo_dec.label: Argo Astronautics Hat
cbd_hat_03_argo_dec.description: Spacecraft manufacturer Argo Astronautics has been around for centuries. Support this indispensable UEE industrial brand by wearing this burnt orange hat bearing their name across the front.

cbd_hat_03_asd_01.label: ASD Hat
cbd_hat_03_asd_01.description: A red and green cadet hat with ASD's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_asd_10.label: ASD Technician Hat
cbd_hat_03_asd_10.description: A white and black cadet hat with ASD's name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_consolidated_dec.label: Consolidated Outland Hat
cbd_hat_03_consolidated_dec.description: Consolidated Outland thrives on the edge of innovation. Promote their initiative by wearing this dark grey hat with the company's branding gracing the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_crusader_01.label: Crusader Hat
cbd_hat_03_crusader_01.description: A blue, white, and gray cadet hat with Crusader Industries' name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_crusader_dec.label: Crusader Industries Hat
cbd_hat_03_crusader_dec.description: To celebrate Pax Humana 2949, Crusader Industries released this hat in the colors associated with the holiday, blue and white. Wear this hat to join the company in supporting those that focus on the greater good. All proceeds from its purchase will go to the Terra-based nonprofit Empire's Overlooked.

cbd_hat_03_cvx01_01.label: Covalex Hat
cbd_hat_03_cvx01_01.description: A black cadet hat with Covalex's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_defcon2956.label: DefenseCon '56 Hat
cbd_hat_03_defcon2956.description: Show your appreciation for the everyday heroes of the UEE with the official DefenseCon 2956 hat.

cbd_hat_03_drake_03.label: Drake Hat Red Logo
cbd_hat_03_drake_03.description: Embody the boldness of Drake Interplanetary by wearing this black hat with the company's name in strong red lettering.

cbd_hat_03_drake_dec.label: Drake Hat Yellow Logo
cbd_hat_03_drake_dec.description: Embody the boldness of Drake Interplanetary by wearing this black hat with the company's name in strong yellow lettering.

cbd_hat_03_expo_dec.label: 2949 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo Hat
cbd_hat_03_expo_dec.description: A magenta hat emblazoned with the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo name and logo in white on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_11.label: Invictus Flyby Hat Grey
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_11.description: A classic grey cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_17.label: Invictus Flyby Hat Blue
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2023_17.description: A classic blue cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025anvil.label: Anvil Hat Olive
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025anvil.description: This dark green cadet hat is decorated with two diagonal yellow stripes, representing celebrated ship manufacturer Anvil Aerospace.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025argo.label: Argo Hat Slate
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025argo.description: This dark gray cadet hat features a stylized, understated version of Argo's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025invictus.label: Invictus Cadet Hat
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025invictus.description: A classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week. It features the Invictus logo across the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025misc.label: MISC Hat Blue and White
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek2025misc.description: This blue and white cadet hat features a minimalistic version of MISC's logo on the front.

cbd_hat_03_fleetweek_dec.label: Invictus Hat Olive Green
cbd_hat_03_fleetweek_dec.description: Show your support for the Navy and the brave souls that serve the Empire with this classic cadet hat commemorating Invictus Launch Week.

cbd_hat_03_foundation01.label: Foundation Festival Hat Grey
cbd_hat_03_foundation01.description: Celebrate the nations of Earth joining together to explore the stars with this special Foundation Festival hat featuring the logo across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_hd_01.label: Hurston Hat
cbd_hat_03_hd_01.description: A brown and gray cadet hat with Hurston Dynamics' name and logo emblazoned across the front panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2021_07.description: The official hat of the 2951 IAE carries the logo for the event on the front and a smaller version of it on the back right panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2021_10.label: IAE 2951 Hat White
cbd_hat_03_iae2021_10.description: The official hat of the 2951 IAE carries the logo for the event on the front and a smaller version of it on the back right panel.

cbd_hat_03_iae2022_02.label: IAE 2952 Hat Red
cbd_hat_03_iae2022_02.description: A red cadet hat celebrating the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo featuring the event's logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2022_12.label: IAE 2952 Hat Black
cbd_hat_03_iae2022_12.description: A black cadet hat celebrating the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo featuring the event's logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2023_10.label: IAE 2953 Hat Purple
cbd_hat_03_iae2023_10.description: Celebrate the UEE's premier ship expo with the official hat of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This purple hat displays the IAE logo on the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_iae2023_19.label: IAE 2953 Hat White
cbd_hat_03_iae2023_19.description: Celebrate the UEE's premier ship expo with the official hat of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This white hat displays the IAE logo on the front and back.

cbd_hat_03_iae2024_10.label: IAE 2954 Hat White
cbd_hat_03_iae2024_10.description: The official hat of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo is a crisp white with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2024_19.label: IAE 2954 Hat Purple
cbd_hat_03_iae2024_19.description: The official hat of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo is a vibrant purple with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2025_10.label: IAE 2955 Hat Gray
cbd_hat_03_iae2025_10.description: The official hat of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo features gray fabric with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_iae2025_12.label: IAE 2955 Hat Black
cbd_hat_03_iae2025_12.description: The official hat of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo features black fabric with the logo across the front.

cbd_hat_03_itg_01.label: ITG Hat
cbd_hat_03_itg_01.description: A blue and black cadet hat with the Interstellar Transport Guild's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_ling_01.label: Ling Hat
cbd_hat_03_ling_01.description: A red and white cadet hat with Ling Family Hauling's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_misc_dec.label: MISC Hat
cbd_hat_03_misc_dec.description: Evoke the industrial spirit of MISC by sporting this tan hat featuring the company's emblem.

cbd_hat_03_origin_dec.label: Origin Jumpworks Hat
cbd_hat_03_origin_dec.description: This light grey hat featuring Origin's name and signature logo is a perennial best seller at their showroom in New Austin.

cbd_hat_03_redwind_01.label: Red Wind Hat
cbd_hat_03_redwind_01.description: A gray cadet hat with Red Wind Linehaul's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_rsi_dec.label: RSI Hat
cbd_hat_03_rsi_dec.description: The iconic RSI logo graces the front panel of this black hat featuring a burnt orange accent stripe.

cbd_hat_03_taba_01.label: TABA Hat
cbd_hat_03_taba_01.description: A black and white cadet hat with TABA Freightline's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_hat_03_tumbril_01.label: Tumbril Hat
cbd_hat_03_tumbril_01.description: Tumbril Land Systems made this hat to celebrate the release of their legendary Nova tank to the civilian market.

cbd_hat_03_unified_01.label: UDF Hat
cbd_hat_03_unified_01.description: A blue and red cadet hat with Unified Distribution Management's name and logo emblazoned across the front and back panels.

cbd_jacket_02_01_01.label: Placeholder - CBD Jacket
cbd_jacket_02_01_01.description: Placeholder - CBD Jacket Desc Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

cbd_jacket_05.label: Misfit Jacket
cbd_jacket_05.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front.

cbd_jacket_05_01_04.label: Misfit Jacket Veritas
cbd_jacket_05_01_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front. The Veritas edition is a bloody red, with a kopion's spine and ribcage printed along the back.

cbd_jacket_05_05_01.label: Misfit Jacket Bonefire
cbd_jacket_05_05_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front. Favored by members of the infamous Headhunters gang, the Bonefire edition features a stylized image of skulls and spines surrounded by red streaks on the back.

cbd_jacket_05_06_01.label: Misfit Jacket Striker
cbd_jacket_05_06_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Embody the hardcore attitude with the Misfit jacket. Durable synthetic leather combines with anarchic stylings for a jacket meant to send a message. Its distinct look includes spikes across the shoulder and right arm, two buckled straps on the left arm, and a badass image on the back highlighted by three lights powered via electronic boxes affixed to the front. The Striker edition is a green camo with a white bone pattern on the back.

cbd_mask_01.label: Chrome Dome Head Gear
cbd_mask_01.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight and reflective hat with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you.

cbd_mask_01_01_04.label: Chrome Dome Head Gear Minefield
cbd_mask_01_01_04.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight and reflective hat with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you. The Minefield edition features metal rivet detailing.

cbd_mask_01_05_01.label: Chrome Dome Head Gear Striker
cbd_mask_01_05_01.description: The Chrome Dome was designed to make hostile environments manageable. This unique head gear features a lightweight helmet with a sloped brim, goggles that automatically adjust to lighting conditions, large ear flaps, and a neck gaiter to cover the face. Whether trudging through snow or sand, the Chrome Dome is ready to brave the elements with you. The Striker edition is a rust color with silver and gold rivets.

cbd_pants_02_01_01.label: Franz Pants
cbd_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU The Franz monochrome striped pants from CBD are elevated with the addition of bold black brush strokes applied freehand. Men's sizes currently not available.

cbd_pants_05.label: Courser Jeans Smoke
cbd_pants_05.description: Made with soft yet sturdy cotton, these jeans are ripped and then "repaired" with colorful thread alongside misshapen patches that give them a touch of history.

ccc_bear_helmet_01_01_01.label: Fieldsbury Dark Bear Helmet
ccc_bear_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -40 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style with this officially licensed Fieldsbury Dark Bear helmet. This twisted version of the Fieldsbury Bear mascot launched a seasonal soda flavor before being co-opted into a series of high-profile pranks. Ever since, the bear's big, toothy grin and off-set flickering eyes have become a standard sight at Day of the Vara celebrations. Now CC's Conversions has designed and delivered an official, high quality reproduction of this iconic mascot, available in six striking colors.

ccc_combat_heavy_helmet_01.label: Berserker Helmet
ccc_combat_heavy_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -90 / 115 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Modern and ancient armor converge with the Berserker helmet. This wildly original armor from CC's Conversions features golden horns and wings, plus a face covering inspired by lamellar armor. Beneath these unique aesthetic flourishes, this heavy helmet provides supreme protection with plating that extends low enough to protect your neck. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

ccc_heavy_armor_helmet_01.label: Neoni Tengubi Helmet
ccc_heavy_armor_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Show that you serve no master with the Neoni helmet. Drawing inspiration from monster myths and warrior cultures of old, this menacing visage courtesy of CC's Conversions features a dramatic paint job, fang-filled grin, and pointed holographic horns, providing protection and intimidation in one memorable helmet. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

ccc_medium_armor_arms_01_01_01.label: Aves Arms
ccc_medium_armor_arms_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Honor and embody the Tevarin aesthetic with the Aves armor. Cutting edge manufacturing techniques were used to place white, red, grey, and black plating perfectly to fit the Human form and evoke the shape language imbued into the Tevarin's iconic ships. This medium armor from CC's Conversions is both sensational and practical, providing solid protection while keeping you light on your feet. When paired with the Aves helmet, the suit combines for a striking and unforgettable look.

Rating: -55 / 85 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s CC's Conversions is proud to release the Aves to celebrate the beautiful and unique history of the Tevarin culture. This medium helmet honors traditional stylings while perfectly fitting a Human head. Red highlights provide colorful and vibrant accents to the black and white plating, giving the helmet a bold and dynamic feel worthy of this great species. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_01.label: The Hill Horror Helmet
ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Haunt your friends with a helmet inspired by the terrifying appearance adopted by famed serial killer Neville Lott. The classic slasher vid 'The Hill Horror' helped make this look a staple at Day of the Vara festivals, and this high-quality reproduction replicates the iconic movie look down to every last devious stitch. The Hill Horror helmet is made with an actual gunny sack sealed with a special finish that can withstand a wide variety of environmental conditions, and covering a comfortable space-rate helmet. Become a walking nightmare and celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style with this helmet.

ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_12.label: The Hill Horror Reborn Helmet
ccc_scarecrow_helmet_01_01_12.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Haunt your friends with this custom, high-quality reproduction of the terrifying helmet from the popular slasher vid 'The Hill Horror Reborn.' Inspired by the terrifying appearance of notorious serial killer Neville Lott, this collector's edition space-safe helmet replicates the killer's look in the second vid of the series with a black gunny sack and neon green lights. Now you can celebrate Day of the Vara in sinister style, while standing apart from other menaces.

ccc_vanduul_helmet_01_01_01.label: Snarling Vanduul Helmet
ccc_vanduul_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s With the Snarling Vanduul helmet, CC's Conversions developed a special space-age vulcanized silicone rubber to replicate everything from the Vanduul's menacing smile to the ridges on the back of its head. Molded over a lightweight flight helmet, this Vanduul visage is wearable both in and out of atmosphere, allowing you to be the ultimate space invader wherever you celebrate Day of the Vara.

ccc_viral_helmet_01_01_01.label: Lost Plague Helmet Radioactive Yellow
ccc_viral_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -40 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Infect your friends with your Day of the Vara spirit when you wear this helmet inspired by the hit vid Lost Plague. The helmet perfectly replicates the horrific death of xenoarchaeologist Diane Wu, first victim of the ancient alien virus she unwittingly unleashes on an unsuspecting galaxy. CC's Conversions utilized a proprietary lightweight yet sturdy rubber to accurately reproduce the deadly plague's signature spines so you can enjoy hours of wear without straining your neck.

Rating: -80 / 105 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Based on CDS' ADP-mk4 heavy combat armor, this set has been modified from its original form. When there's a difficult job at hand, you want to ensure that you can see it through to the end. This armor allows Marines to remain in active combat situations for a longer duration with more loadout options, while its powered frame provides near unfettered movement despite the protection it offers.

cds_armor_heavy_arms_03.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -70 / 100 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Endure the most brutal attacks with the DCP heavy armor. This set features easy-swing joints that provide freedom of movement in the heat of battle, and was crafted with a multi-layer shock-absorbing shell that helps its wearer shake off the hardest hits.

Rating: -75 / 105 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Revolutionary when first released, the ADP heavy armor system was heralded as the pinnacle of personal protection. Clark Defense Systems' maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor. The Hurston Edition was made specifically for the company's security services.

cds_legacy_armor_heavy_helmet_01_01_hd_s.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. The Covalex Edition was made specifically for the company.

cds_legacy_heavy_armor_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -75 / 105 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Revolutionary when first released, the ADP heavy armor system was heralded as the pinnacle of personal protection. Clark Defense Systems' maximalist design provides plenty of attachment points and excellent protection against the elements and enemy fire. CDS refined and reshaped the ADP line over the years, but many still consider the original ADP to be the touchstone of military-grade heavy armor.

It was made to match the limited-edition GCD-Army medium armor, but is compatible with a wide range of other sets.

cds_undersuit_helmet_01.label: A23 Flight Helmet Woodland
cds_undersuit_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 15% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s The A23 has been one of CDS' mainstay helmet systems for years. Built out of impact-resistant composite technology and a hardened laminate faceplate, the A23 is perfect for hazardous environment and basic EVA operations. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

clda_env_armor_backpack_01.label: Novikov Backpack
clda_env_armor_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Confidently explore cold environments while wearing the Novikov. Caldera designed a spacious backpack to compliment this advanced exploration suit, so those venturing across unknown terrain can bring enough supplies to survive the journey.

Rating: -225 / 75 °C Radiation Protection: 33600 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 147.42 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Backpacks: All This version of Caldera's Novikov exploration suit has been modified from its original form. Confidently explore cold environments while wearing the Novikov. Caldera built the armor with an advanced sensor suite that intelligently adjusts to environmental conditions so the wearer's body temperature remains stable. Also featuring a cutting edge life support system and spacious backpack, those venturing across unknown terrain can count on the Novikov to help them survive the journey.

clda_env_heat_armor_backpack_01.label: Pembroke Backpack
clda_env_heat_armor_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 120K µSCU Temp. Rating: -75 / 225 °C Designed to extend the limits of Human endurance, the Pembroke was built to withstand the extreme heat of inhospitable high temperature environments. Based off of Caldera's best-in-class exploration armor platform, an advanced sensor suite intelligently adjusts to environmental conditions so the wearer's body temperature remains stable. Also featuring a cutting edge life support system and spacious carryall, those seeking to cross bold new horizons can depend on the Pembroke to see them to the journey's end.

clda_gloves_01.label: Badami Gloves Deadwood
clda_gloves_01.description: The Badami Gloves are lined with an advanced cut-resistant barrier that combines with a triple-layered interior to create an advanced impact protection system that could only have been designed by Caldera.

clda_undersuit_01_01_01.label: Levin Undersuit (Refurbished)
clda_undersuit_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Featuring flexible gaskets for greater comfort and more natural movement, along with a convenient range of chest connector port options, the Levin from Caldera has been a practical choice for explorers everywhere. This particular undersuit has been repaired for extended use.

clda_undersuit_02.label: Markanda Undersuit (Refurbished)
clda_undersuit_02.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Built for adventure but comfortable enough for everyday, the Markanda undersuit has become beloved by explorers. A unique patchwork design creates a flexible yet resilient undersuit, while an odor resistant SureSoft inner lining will keep you from wanting to take it off. This particular undersuit has been repaired for extended use.

clda_undersuit_02_02_01.label: Markanda Undersuit Pyrotechnic
clda_undersuit_02_02_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Built for adventure but comfortable enough for everyday, the Markanda undersuit has become beloved by explorers. A unique patchwork design creates a flexible yet resilient undersuit, while an odor resistant SureSoft inner lining will keep you from wanting to take it off. This edition features the colors and logo of the now defunct Pyrotechnic Amalgamated.

clda_utility_heavy_backpack_01.label: Pembroke Backpack
clda_utility_heavy_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Designed to extend the limits of Human endurance, the Pembroke was built to withstand the extreme heat of inhospitable high temperature environments. Based off of Caldera's best-in-class exploration armor platform, an advanced sensor suite intelligently adjusts to environmental conditions so the wearer's body temperature remains stable. A spacious backpack compliments this advanced armor, so those seeking to cross bold new horizons can depend on the Pembroke to see them to the journey's end.

clda_utility_heavy_backpack_02.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Designed to extend the limits of Human endurance, the Pembroke RSI Edition was built to withstand the extreme heat of inhospitable high temperature environments. clda_utility_heavy_helmet_03.description: Item Type: Heavy Utility Damage Reduction: 25% Temp. Rating: -75 / 225 °C Radiation Protection: 33600 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 147.42 REM/s Durability and a classic aesthetic combine with the Siebe helmet; designed by Caldera to thrive amidst extreme conditions found both in space and atmosphere. Resilient yet lightweight plating and an impact resistant visor provide premium protection, while an integrated monitoring system helps protect the wearer from environmental fluctuations.

clda_utility_heavy_helmet_04.label: Stirling Exploration Helmet
clda_utility_heavy_helmet_04.description: Item Type: Heavy Utility Damage Reduction: 25% Temp. Rating: -75 / 225 °C Radiation Protection: 33600 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 147.42 REM/s Designed to withstand inhospitable environments, the Stirling Exploration Suit provides a base level of protection from environmental hazards including radiation. Combining Caldera's advanced insulation fabrics with sophisticated polymers, the Stirling is able to safeguard the wearer whilst minimizing disruption to movement. Additionally, a self-cleaning system automatically activates after radiation exposure to expunge dangerous excess down to nominal levels. This helmet is only compatible with the Stirling Exploration Suit.

dmc_boots_04_01_01.label: Hardy Boots
dmc_boots_04_01_01.description: Walk to the ends of the earth with DMC's Hardy line of rugged all-terrain boots. Featuring increased ankle support and waterproof materials, you can trudge through desert or mountain in comfort.

dmc_frontier_gloves_01_01_01.label: Adroit Gloves Charcoal
dmc_frontier_gloves_01_01_01.description: Lightweight, quick-drying, and durable, the Adroit fingerless gloves keep your hands warm while giving your fingers the freedom to perform delicate work. The material on the wrist extends to meet long-sleeved apparel, cutting down on places that might be exposed to the elements.

dmc_frontier_gloves_01_02_01.label: Adroit Gloves CFP
dmc_frontier_gloves_01_02_01.description: Lightweight, quick-drying, and durable, the Adroit fingerless gloves keep your hands warm without sacrificing agility to perform delicate work. The material on the wrist extends to meet long-sleeved apparel, cutting down on places that might be exposed to the elements. The CFP edition is a deep fjord blue with black accents.

dmc_frontier_jacket_01_01_01.label: Silverton Jacket Brown
dmc_frontier_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU When you're on the frontier, you need reliable clothing that won't fray when the going gets tough. That's why DMC made the Silverton jacket with double-stitched, element-resistant leather and plenty of roomy pockets so you can keep your supplies on hand. With the Silverton, you'll be prepared for anything.

dmc_frontier_jacket_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU When you're on the frontier, you need reliable clothing that won't fray when the going gets tough. That's why DMC made the Silverton jacket with double-stitched, element-resistant leather and plenty of roomy pockets so you can keep your supplies on hand. With the Silverton, you'll be prepared for anything. The CFP edition is a deep, fjord blue with the CFP's distinctive logo printed across the chest and back.

dmc_frontier_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Made with a sturdy blend of tough and flexible materials, the Silverton pants are the perfect fit for someone who needs heavy-duty workwear without sacrificing mobility. Got a job to do? We've got you covered.

dmc_frontier_pants_01_02_01.label: Silverton Pants CFP
dmc_frontier_pants_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Made with a sturdy blend of tough and flexible materials, the Silverton pants are the perfect fit for someone who needs heavy-duty workwear without sacrificing mobility.
