dmc_gloves_02_01_9tails01.label: Mercury Gloves (Modified)
dmc_gloves_02_01_9tails01.description: This version of DMC's Mercury gloves has been modified from its original form. Keep your hands warm and fingers nimble with Mercury gloves from DMC. Ideal for outdoor activities or colder work environments.

dmc_jacket_04_600i01_01.label: 600i Flight Jacket
dmc_jacket_04_600i01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Embrace elegance with the 600i flight jacket. Featuring beautiful brown synthetic leather and an ultra-soft yet durable inner lining, the jacket honors the stunning ship with the best bedtime view in the verse. Origin's logo graces the jacket's front and a patch featuring a top down view of the ship's classic contours adorns the back.

dmc_jacket_04_fleetweek2024_01.label: Invictus Flight Jacket Steel
dmc_jacket_04_fleetweek2024_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Celebrate Launch Week in iconic style with this commemorative flight jacket featuring a Navy patch on the front and a large Invictus patch on the back. This synthetic leather jacket comes with two front pockets and ribbed waistband and cuffs that guarantee a good fit.

dmc_jacket_04_mpuv01_01.label: MPUV-1C Flight Jacket
dmc_jacket_04_mpuv01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Show how far you'll go for the Argo Cargo. This flight jacket celebrates the ship that changed the cargo game and became ubiquitous at spaceports across the empire. Made from synthetic leather, it features two front pockets, a ribbed waistband, and cuffs that guarantees a good fit. There's also an Argo logo on the front and a stylish silhouette of the ship across the back.

dmc_jacket_04_starlifter01_01.label: Hercules Starlifter Flight Jacket
dmc_jacket_04_starlifter01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU A flight jacket dedicated to the Hercules Starlifter and its ability to handle more than twelve labors. Made from synthetic leather, the jacket is styled with two front pockets, a ribbed waistband and cuffs to guarantee a good fit. The front features a Crusader logo while the back sports the ship serenely soaring through the clouds.

dmc_jacket_04_starrunner01_01.label: Mercury Star Runner Flight Jacket
dmc_jacket_04_starrunner01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU The Mercury Star Runner is more than a memorable silhouette. Crusader's beloved asymmetrical ship gets it own comfortable flight jacket made of high quality synthetic leather. Complete with Crusader's logo on the front and a patch with the ship mid-flight on the back.

dmc_jacket_05.label: Coloma Coat Navy and Sage
dmc_jacket_05.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Stuffed with water-resistant gilly down, the Coloma coat blocks wind, traps body heat, and allows the wearer to move freely, making it the perfect choice for changeable weather conditions. Additionally, its roomy pockets provide plenty of storage.

dmc_jacket_06_01_01.label: Cardona Jacket Sand
dmc_jacket_06_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU DMC’s Cardona is a utility jacket designed for performance in cold weather environments. Featuring a high collar for better wind protection and numerous pockets to store any survival essentials.

dmc_jacket_07_01_01.label: Kaswal Jacket Taupe
dmc_jacket_07_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU DMC’s Kaswal is a cold-weather jacket designed with additional lining throughout the chest and sleeves for added warmth and comfort.

dmc_jacket_08_01_01.label: Carbide Jacket
dmc_jacket_08_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The rugged, all-weather Carbide jacket from DMC features diamond-quilt detailing, stretch-comfort cuffs, and numerous attachment points for versatile storage options.

dmc_jacket_09_01_01.label: Omnitrek Jacket
dmc_jacket_09_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Be ready for anything with DMC’s Omnitrek, the survival jacket designed for maximal performance in adverse weather conditions with the addition of the water-resistant collapsible collar. The Omnitrek also provides numerous storage options across both sleeve and chest pockets.

dmc_jacket_10_01_01.label: Keystone Jacket Taupe
dmc_jacket_10_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU DMC’s Keystone is a two-layer jacket that puts utility first. The top-most vest layer ensures the Keystone jacket remains warm and durable, while the underlayer is designed to avoid restricting your range of motion. Various pockets adorn the jacket to provide convenient storage options.

dmc_jacket_11_01_01.label: Ridgely Jacket
dmc_jacket_11_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The extra-thick high collar of DMC’s Ridgely is part of a removable hood that makes the jacket surprisingly versatile and is a major reason why the Ridgely jacket is a perennial favorite amongst customers that live in, or venture through, cold environments.

dmc_jacket_12_01_01.label: Camion Jacket
dmc_jacket_12_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Come prepared with the Camion. This button up blue jacket delivers on style with complimentary dark brown synthetic leather around the neck, shoulders, and arms. A cross-shoulder sling bag and integrated utility belt allows you to carry plenty of gear and keep it organized.

dmc_jacket_14_01_01.label: ASD Bomber Jacket
dmc_jacket_14_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Associated Science and Development is a company that defines what it means to be on the bleeding edge of technology. Originally exclusive to ASD workers in the Biological Research Division, this synthetic leather has the look, feel, and smell of the real thing. The company's logo is featured on the front and back.

dmc_pants_01_01_9tails01.label: Foundation Pants (Modified)
dmc_pants_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This version of DMC's Foundation pants has been modified from its original form. DMC's Foundation line is just that; the foundation for your work wear. Featuring a simple, elegant cut with easy-access pockets, the Foundation is both professional and functional.

dmc_pants_02_01_9tails01.label: Astley Pants (Modified)
dmc_pants_02_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This version of DMC's Astley pants has been modified from its original form. Flaunt your rugged yet refined sensibility with these cargo pants from DMC. With grey accents and contrast stripes down each side, Astleys are durable, comfortable, and always on point.

dmc_pants_03_01_9tails01.label: Frontier Pants (Modified)
dmc_pants_03_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU This version of DMC's Frontier pants has been modified from its original form. DMC's Frontier collection has been a staple of frontier living for centuries. These heavy denim workpants have double-stitched reinforcement and stainguard technology, making them dependable pants for any environment day in and day out.

dmc_pants_04_01_01.label: K7 Pants
dmc_pants_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU DMC's K7 are an all-purpose cargo pants. Four easy access pockets provide extra storage while the triple-stitched polymer weave fabric is designed to withstand all kinds of weather conditions.

dmc_pants_04_defcon2956.label: DefenseCon '56 Pants
dmc_pants_04_defcon2956.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Turn up the heat and celebrate DefenseCon 2956 in style in these flame-accented cargo pants made from triple-stitched polymer weave fabric, with four easy access pockets.

dmc_pants_05_01_01.label: Razorback Pants
dmc_pants_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU DMC's Razorback pants are made to be worn. Built from industrial quality material, they feature reinforced kneepads to prevent tears on the job and stay rugged yet comfortable. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

dmc_pants_06_01_01.label: Roughneck Pants
dmc_pants_06_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU DMC's Roughneck pants are low cut for maximum comfort with extra size pockets and built to weather the storms of life.

dmc_pants_06_01_9tails01.label: Roughneck Pants (Modified)
dmc_pants_06_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This version of DMC's Roughneck pants has been modified from its original form. DMC's Roughneck pants are low cut for maximum comfort with extra size pockets and built to weather the storms of life.

dmc_pants_07.label: Frontier 11 Classic Sand
dmc_pants_07.description: Carrying Capacity: 2k µSCU Constructed with large pockets and made from durable synth-cloth, the Frontier 11 Classic pants from DMC are a rugged garment designed to handle whatever life might throw your way.

dmc_pants_08_01_01.label: Chamar Pants
dmc_pants_08_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Decades of design experience helped DMC make the Chamar pants ready for any adventure. The pants utilize a unique seam design to deliver durability while maintaining flexibility. A built-in belt ensures an ideal fit, while leather front pockets and a padded back-panel provide rugged reinforcement where needed most.

dmc_shirt_01.label: Greenwater Shirt Walnut
dmc_shirt_01.description: The Greenwater is a long-sleeved shirt tailor-made to be worn underneath most standard sets of armor. Crafted with a durable mix of natural and synthetic fibers, it stands up to daily wear and tear without sacrificing comfort.

doom_armor_medium_arms_02_01_01.label: Stitcher Arms
doom_armor_medium_arms_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Dress to impress in scrapheap chic! The Stitcher armor might look like it's held together with tape and good intentions but we swear it's space safe. The intentional ramshackle design features a funky double collar, plenty of storage, and a ribbed industrial hose attached to a metal cylinder on the back just for the hell of it.

doom_armor_medium_core_02_01_01.label: Stitcher Core
doom_armor_medium_core_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 6.4 µSCU Backpacks: Medium, Light Dress to impress in scrapheap chic! The Stitcher armor might look like it's held together with tape and good intentions but we swear it's space safe. The intentional ramshackle design features a funky double collar, plenty of storage, and a ribbed industrial hose attached to a metal cylinder on the back just for the hell of it.

doom_armor_medium_legs_02_01_01.label: Stitcher Legs
doom_armor_medium_legs_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU Dress to impress in scrapheap chic! The Stitcher armor might look like it's held together with tape and good intentions but we swear it's space safe. The intentional ramshackle design features a funky double collar, plenty of storage, and a ribbed industrial hose attached to a metal cylinder on the back just for the hell of it.

doom_combat_medium_arms_01_01_01.label: Clash Arms
doom_combat_medium_arms_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Sometimes all you gotta do is put on the right piece of armor to make your message loud and clear. Clash armor first started popping up when the Dredge got strong-armed into mass-producing their armor and it's been scaring everyone stupid since. Now everybody's stealing it. Clash features a reinforced medium plating to get you a good balance of protection without giving up too much speed.

doom_combat_medium_backpack_01.label: Sinkhole Backpack
doom_combat_medium_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Medium Backpack Carrying Capacity: 105K µSCU Core Compatibility: Medium & Heavy Stop lugging all your loot by hand. The Sinkhole backpack gives you plenty of space to store everything you need, while leaving your hands free for whatever mischief you have in mind.

doom_combat_medium_core_01_01_01.label: Clash Core
doom_combat_medium_core_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 7.5K µSCU Backpacks: Medium, Light Sometimes all you gotta do is put on the right piece of armor to make your message loud and clear. Clash armor first started popping up when the Dredge got strong-armed into mass-producing their armor and it's been scaring everyone stupid since. Now everybody's stealing it. Clash features a reinforced medium plating to get you a good balance of protection without giving up too much speed.

doom_combat_medium_helmet_01_01_01.label: Death's Head Helmet
doom_combat_medium_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -56 / 86 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU Built using high quality scavenge with a molded faceplate, the Death's Head is built to take an absolute beating. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

doom_combat_medium_legs_01_01_01.label: Clash Legs
doom_combat_medium_legs_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -52 / 82 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.5K µSCU Sometimes all you gotta do is put on the right piece of armor to make your message loud and clear. Clash armor first started popping up when the Dredge got strong-armed into mass-producing their armor and it's been scaring everyone stupid since. Now everybody's stealing it. Clash features a reinforced medium plating to get you a good balance of protection without giving up too much speed.

doom_medium_armor_helmet_02.label: The Butcher Helmet
doom_medium_armor_helmet_02.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -56 / 86 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU Be the reaper with this terrifying battle helmet molded after some kind of animal. We aren't a vet, it just looked cool. All we know is that it'll withstand some serious punishment and look bad ass doing it. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

doom_medium_armor_helmet_02_holiday.label: Holiday Butcher Helmet
doom_medium_armor_helmet_02_holiday.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -56 / 86 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU Celebrate the season with the festive Holiday Butcher helmet. Doomsday designed this twisted bit of armor to withstand a firefight, raucous holiday party, and everything in between. The snout's custom armor plating provides protection while remaining lightweight, and the synthetic spiral horns are more durable than the real deal. The Holiday Butcher adds to Doomsday's reputation as the universe's premiere engineer of warped gear. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

drn_business_jacket_01_01_01.label: Saskia Jacket
drn_business_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Be formal and fashionable with the Saskia jacket. This hybrid jacket and collared shirt features dynamic geometric patterns, including diagonal lines that swoop across the front and back.

drn_business_pants_01_01_01.label: Emilion Pants
drn_business_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Derion has done it again. The Emilion pants deliver a simple silhouette that reveals strikingly stylish details upon closer inspection. Made from a subtly textured stain-resistant fabric, the pants feature micropleats on the front and back that converge into a single decorative seam at the knees before splitting off again near the ankles, giving the Emilion pants an artful geometric design down the length of the leg.

drn_business_shoes_01_01_01.label: Lorber Shoes
drn_business_shoes_01_01_01.description: The Lorber shoes feature classic style with modern flourishes. Constructed with dark brown synthetic leather, the shoes also feature a light brown toe box with gold colored metallic accents to catch the eye, a magnetic closure that ensures a snug fit, and a soft faux-sheepskin footbed for supreme comfort.

drn_gloves_01_01_01.label: Debnam Gloves
drn_gloves_01_01_01.description: Named after the influential Terran tailor, Debnam gloves incorporate that famous tailor's classic design to keep your hands comfortable in colder temperatures.

drn_gloves_01_01_9tails01.label: Debnam Gloves (Modified)
drn_gloves_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Derion's Debnam gloves has been modified from its original form. Named after the influential Terran tailor, Debnam gloves incorporate that famous tailor's classic design to keep your hands comfortable in colder temperatures.

drn_jacket_01_01_01.label: Adiva Jacket
drn_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Define your ultimate you. The Adiva is an asymmetrical pullover with bold mixed-materials and solid reinforced trim.

drn_jacket_10_01_01.label: Rokmor Suit Jacket
drn_jacket_10_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1k µSCU The Rokmor is a stylish suit jacket ideal for the executive with an eye for quality. Not only is it wrinkle-resistant and able to retain its shape well, but the angular design of both the shoulder pads and the lapels strengthen the wearer's silhouette for a strong aesthetic sure to impress any boardroom.

drn_pants_01_01_01.label: LeMarque Pants
drn_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Classic cuts never go out of style. A staple of any wardrobe, Derion's LeMarque are built for work or play and feature microseam pleats and wrinkle-free material that will guarantee that you'll get years out of this classic. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

drn_pants_10_01_01.label: Furtimo Pants
drn_pants_10_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 500 µSCU The Furtimo pants are sleek, elegant, and under-stated, suitable to both a busy day at the office or a fancy night out. Soft beyond the measure, these pants will make you feel as good as you look.

drn_senator_pants_03.label: Ember Pants
drn_senator_pants_03.description: These two-tone pants from Derion are the perfect blend of modern and classic, the Ember's dual polymer weave provides a durable, professional look guaranteed to strike a commanding presence wherever you go.

drn_senator_shirt_03_01_01.label: Aero Shirt
drn_senator_shirt_03_01_01.description: Derion's Aero is a lightweight longsleeve top features a stitched V-pattern and short high collar, perfect for the office or a night out.

drn_shoes_01_01_01.label: Kino Shoes
drn_shoes_01_01_01.description: These two-tone slip-on shoes are comfortable enough for casual wear, but stylish enough for the workplace.

drn_shoes_10_01_01.label: Torga Shoes
drn_shoes_10_01_01.description: For their simplicity, the Torga shoes are as timeless as they are comfortable. The synthetic leather used in their construction is wear-resistant and sure to keep shining even with only the occasional polish. The line that separates the vamp of the shoe from the rest of the toe draws the eye making this otherwise understated design stand out.

dyl_dress_01_01_01.label: Martel Dress
dyl_dress_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This open-front grey dress from Dyna Lei reveals a draped, checkered layer offset by gold trim beneath its wide cinched belt. The finished look is paired with black bodysuit and a fetching handkerchief to complete the ensemble. Men's sizes currently not available.

dyl_gloves_01_01_01.label: Opus Gloves
dyl_gloves_01_01_01.description: Give any outfit that final elegant touch with the Opus opera gloves from Dyna Lei. Contrasting black velvet and rich leather impeccably trimmed with gold satin to create an understated impact that's sure to liven any evening. Men sizes are currently unavailable.

dyl_gloves_02_01_01.label: Ahmanson Gloves
dyl_gloves_02_01_01.description: The Ahmanson gloves achieve elegance with an edge thanks to Dyna Lei. These leather opera gloves have a sumptuous black patina that will become more spectacular with time, and are made with a comfortable cashmere lining. Men sizes are currently unavailable.

dyl_pants_02_01_01.label: Koal Pants
dyl_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Dyna Lei updates an old classic with the Koal black leather pants that feature metallic trim along each leg for a thoroughly modern, dynamic look. Men's sizes currently not available.

dyl_shirt_02_01_01.label: Benaderet Dress
dyl_shirt_02_01_01.description: Dyna Lei has crafted the Benaderet dress out of rich, quilted, mocha-colored leather and gilded the look with a belted waist, off-the-shoulder straps, asymmetrical lines, and a matching choker to top it all off. Men's sizes currently not available.

dyl_shoes_01_01_01.label: Barrymore Pumps
dyl_shoes_01_01_01.description: The Barrymore pumps are part of the Dyna Lei essentials collection. The shoes feature classic yet subtle curves and supportive insoles for an ultra-comfortable fit ideal for all day wear. Men sizes are currently unavailable.

dyl_shoes_02_01_01.label: Barrymore Pumps
dyl_shoes_02_01_01.description: The Barrymore pumps are part of the Dyna Lei essentials collection. The shoes feature classic yet subtle curves and supportive insoles for an ultra-comfortable fit ideal for all day wear. Men sizes are currently unavailable.

eld_jacket_05_01_01.label: Hardean Jacket and Shirt Sunday
eld_jacket_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This olive green and brown collarless synth-leather jacket from Escar Limited features quilted detailing around the opening and down the sleeves, and pairs effortlessly with a bold button-down, tropical-print shirt in light pink.

eld_jacket_05_01_07.label: Hardean Jacket and Shirt Dallas
eld_jacket_05_01_07.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This blue and brown collarless synth-leather jacket from Escar Limited features quilted detailing around the opening and down the sleeves, and pairs effortlessly with a bold button-down, tropical-print shirt in pale yellow.

eld_jacket_05_01_11.label: Hardean Jacket and Shirt Parker
eld_jacket_05_01_11.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This grey and blue collarless synth-leather jacket from Escar Limited features quilted detailing around the opening and down the sleeves, and pairs effortlessly with a bold button-down, tropical-print shirt in orange.

eld_jacket_05_01_12.label: Hardean Jacket and Shirt Ash
eld_jacket_05_01_12.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This gray and brown collarless synth-leather jacket from Escar Limited features quilted detailing around the opening and down the sleeves, and pairs effortlessly with a bold button-down, tropical-print shirt in light blue.

eld_jacket_05_01_13.label: Hardean Jacket and Shirt Croon
eld_jacket_05_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU This maroon and brown collarless synth-leather jacket from Escar Limited features quilted detailing around the opening and down the sleeves, and pairs effortlessly with a bold button-down, tropical-print shirt in light brown.

eld_shirt_04_01_fleetweek2021.label: Invictus Flyby T-Shirt Blue
eld_shirt_04_01_fleetweek2021.description: Few things are as awe-inspiring as a UEE Navy fleet flyby. This comfortable, cotton blend Invictus Launch Week t-shirt celebrates that memorable sight.

eld_shirt_04_01_subfeb25.label: Big Winner T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_01_subfeb25.description: Featuring a stylized, neon-green X on the front and the phrase "Big winner!" on the back, when you wear this T-shirt, everyone will know that you're going places.

eld_shirt_04_aegis_dec.label: Aegis Dynamics T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_aegis_dec.description: From the Avenger to the Idris, Aegis Dynamics' impact on modern spacecraft is undeniable. Extol their achievements with this 100% cotton grey shirt featuring the company's iconic logo.

eld_shirt_04_anvil_dec.label: Anvil Aerospace T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_anvil_dec.description: This dark green t-shirt sports the familiar logo of Anvil Aerospace, a name inspired by Robert Calvin's famous quote referencing "the anvils of innovation."

eld_shirt_04_argo_dec.label: Argo Astronautics T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_argo_dec.description: This orange shirt features the logo of Argo Astronautics. Before changing their name, the company was known as AR-GO Technologies with the 'AR' referencing founder Alana Redmond.

eld_shirt_04_banu01_01.label: Dream Wishes T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu01_01.description: The Dream Wishes t-shirt was proudly produced by a Banu souli to celebrate the magical world of Human dreams.

eld_shirt_04_banu02_01.label: Tonk T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu02_01.description: When Humans brought back the legendary Nova Tonk, a Banu souli excitedly made this shirt to commemorate its return.

eld_shirt_04_banu03_01.label: Duck Sword T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu03_01.description: Stories abound of Human's love of space adventures with Drake Cutlass, so a Banu souli enthusiastically designed this shirt.

eld_shirt_04_banu04_01.label: Normstar T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu04_01.description: Normstar knows the secret to making Human shoes that are comfortable on the feet and pleasing to the eye. A Banu souli created this shirt in honor of that great accomplishment.

eld_shirt_04_banu05_01.label: Human Food Bars T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu05_01.description: Eat, Humans! A Banu souli made this shirt to promote Human Food Bars, an all-around excellent energy source for hungry Humans. Be sure to track down these yummy, Human friendly treats when visiting Banu space.

eld_shirt_04_banu06_01.label: Big Barrys T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu06_01.description: Humans can't get enough of Big Barrys grab and go kacho. This shirt made by a Banu souli is for all Humans that love eating noodles so hot that they turn your eyes red!

eld_shirt_04_banu07_01.label: Pyro Crab T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu07_01.description: Pyro may be a dangerous system but worth a visit to see their famous whip crabs. The shirt was created by a Banu souli as part of a series dedicated to the cute creature found in Human space.

eld_shirt_04_banu08_01.label: Flatcat Fail T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu08_01.description: A Banu souli used special vid-capable fabric when designing this shirt so it loops the Flatcat Fail vid Humans find so funny at a super high resolution!

eld_shirt_04_banu09_01.label: Talen T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_banu09_01.description: Human-made Talen missiles pack an impressively big boom! This Banu made t-shirt salutes their engineering excellence.

eld_shirt_04_consolidated_dec.label: Consolidated Outland T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_consolidated_dec.description: Silas Koerner founded Consolidated Outland to push the boundaries of modern spacecraft design. Celebrate his ambition with this dark grey t-shirt featuring the company's logo.

eld_shirt_04_crus01.label: Cloud City T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus01.description: Due to its unique location, Orison is known as the city above the clouds. This shirt features the phrase and a truly unique view from one of its platforms.

eld_shirt_04_crus02.label: Orison T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus02.description: Named after an old word for "prayer," the city of Orison is unlike any other in the empire. Commemorate this special locale with the image of one of the city's iconic cloud vistas framed inside the name.

eld_shirt_04_crus03.label: Worthy Journey T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus03.description: Whether you're piloting or simply enjoying the ride, a Crusader ship makes it a journey worth taking. This shirt celebrates that spirit by featuring a fleet of Crusader ships plus their iconic logo and tagline.

eld_shirt_04_crus04.label: Crusader Industries T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus04.description: This shirt features the iconic Crusader Industries logo across the chest.

eld_shirt_04_crus05.label: Builders of Tomorrow T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus05.description: Crusader strives to be the builders of tomorrow through aerospace innovations and an unwavering commitment to philanthropy. Signal your support for Crusader's future-focused initiative with this shirt featuring the company logo and a cloudy Orison vista.

eld_shirt_04_crus06.label: Skyhigh City T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus06.description: There's no need for ground when each of Orison's platforms is outfitted with special thrusters to maintain a constant elevation. This shirt features a stylized shot of Orison's famous floating platforms sitting comfortably among the clouds.

eld_shirt_04_crus07.label: Orison Shipyards T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_crus07.description: The massive Orison shipyards are a sight unlike any other in the UEE. This shirt features a floating ring platform flanked by blossoms from the Hosanna tree, which was specifically cultivated to grow in the gardens of Orison.

eld_shirt_04_crusader_dec.label: Crusader Industries T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_crusader_dec.description: Crusader Industries created this striking blue shirt sporting their "sword & C" logo to further their corporate mandate to support charitable organizations. The company has promised that all proceeds from the sale of this shirt will go to the Terra-based nonprofit Empire's Overlooked.

eld_shirt_04_drake_04.label: Drake T-Shirt Red Logo
eld_shirt_04_drake_04.description: Drake Interplanetary's designs have caught the public's imagination. From the Kraken to the Cutlass, share your love for their ships with this comfortable black and red shirt, featuring the company's logo.

eld_shirt_04_drake_dec.label: Drake T-Shirt Yellow Logo
eld_shirt_04_drake_dec.description: The success of Drake Interplanetary has gone a long way to bring legitimate business back to the Magnus system. Support the scrappy manufacturer of affordable, utilitarian ships with this black shirt emblazoned with the company name in yellow.

eld_shirt_04_expo_dec.label: Intergalactic Aerospace Expo T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_expo_dec.description: The logo for the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo graces this magenta shirt made from 100% cotton.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2023_11.label: Invictus 2953 T-Shirt Grey
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2023_11.description: Celebrate Invictus Launch Week 2953 with this grey t-shirt made from a comfortable cotton blend and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2023_17.label: Invictus 2953 T-Shirt Blue
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2023_17.description: Celebrate Invictus Launch Week 2953 with this blue t-shirt made from a comfortable cotton blend and featuring the silhouette of a ship across the front.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_anvil.label: Anvil T-Shirt Olive
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_anvil.description: Show your love for the iconic manufacturer Anvil Aerospace with this dark green shirt, featuring the company's logo on the front.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_argo.label: Argo T-Shirt Slate
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_argo.description: This dark gray cadet hat features a simple version of Argo's logo on the front, representing company with understated style.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_invictus.label: Invictus T-Shirt Blue
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_invictus.description: Commemorate the biggest fleet flyby of the year with this comfortable t-shirt, featuring the seal of the UEE Navy on the front and the Invictus Launch Week logo on the back.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_misc.label: MISC T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek2025_misc.description: Proclaim your admiration for MISC's cutting-edge ships with this high-quality white t-shirt, featuring the company's logo on the front and back.

eld_shirt_04_fleetweek_dec.label: Invictus Flyby T-Shirt Olive Green
eld_shirt_04_fleetweek_dec.description: Few things are as awe-inspiring as a UEE Navy fleet flyby. This comfortable, cotton blend Invictus Launch Week t-shirt celebrates that memorable sight.

eld_shirt_04_iae2021_07.label: IAE 2951 T-Shirt Blue
eld_shirt_04_iae2021_07.description: Commemorate the UEE's ultimate ship celebration with this blue ringer t-shirt that features a large version of the 2951 logo on the front and a smaller version across the back.

eld_shirt_04_iae2021_10.label: IAE 2951 T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_iae2021_10.description: Commemorate the UEE's ultimate ship celebration with this white ringer t-shirt that features a large version of the 2951 logo on the front and a smaller version across the back.

eld_shirt_04_iae2022_02.label: IAE 2952 T-shirt Red
eld_shirt_04_iae2022_02.description: Commemorate the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo with this red t-shirt featuring the event's logo across the front.

eld_shirt_04_iae2022_12.label: IAE 2952 T-shirt Black
eld_shirt_04_iae2022_12.description: Commemorate the 2952 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo with this black t-shirt featuring the event's logo across the front.

eld_shirt_04_iae2023_10.label: IAE 2953 Shirt Purple
eld_shirt_04_iae2023_10.description: Commemorate the UEE's foremost celebration of ships with the official shirt of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This purple shirt features the IAE logo on the front, with a smaller version on the back.

eld_shirt_04_iae2023_19.label: IAE 2953 Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_iae2023_19.description: Commemorate the UEE's foremost celebration of ships with the official shirt of the 2953 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This white shirt features the IAE logo on the front, with a smaller version on the back.

eld_shirt_04_iae2024_10.label: IAE 2954 T-Shirt White
eld_shirt_04_iae2024_10.description: The official shirt of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This soft and supremely comfortable cotton t-shirt is a crisp white with the IAE logo on the front, "The Next Frontier" tagline across the back, and the year on the right sleeve.

eld_shirt_04_iae2024_19.label: IAE 2954 T-Shirt Purple
eld_shirt_04_iae2024_19.description: The official shirt of the 2954 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This soft and supremely comfortable cotton t-shirt is a vibrant purple with the IAE logo on the front, "The Next Frontier" tagline across the back, and the year on the right sleeve.

eld_shirt_04_iae2025_10.label: IAE 2955 T-Shirt Gray
eld_shirt_04_iae2025_10.description: The official shirt of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This soft and supremely comfortable cotton t-shirt is gray with the IAE logo on the front, the event's tagline across the back, and the year on the right sleeve.

eld_shirt_04_iae2025_12.label: IAE 2955 T-Shirt Black
eld_shirt_04_iae2025_12.description: The official shirt of the 2955 Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. This soft and supremely comfortable cotton t-shirt is black with the IAE logo on the front, the event's tagline across the back, and the year on the right sleeve.

eld_shirt_04_levski01_01.label: Stronger Together T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_levski01_01.description: This denim-blue t-shirt has the famous "Welcome to Levski" mural on the front which features the symbol of the People's Alliance behind two hands clasped in solidarity and the motto "Stronger Together."

eld_shirt_04_microtech_gift.label: microTech T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_microtech_gift.description: A comfortable white cotton t-shirt featuring a large microTech logo across the front and a smaller one on the back.

eld_shirt_04_misc_dec.label: MISC T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_misc_dec.description: This tan shirt sports the MISC name and logo. Perfect for those with an affinity for reliable industrial ships imbued with a slight Xi'an influence.

eld_shirt_04_origin_dec.label: Origin Jumpworks T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_origin_dec.description: Origin Jumpworks ships have been described as a symphony in motion. That elegant aesthetic extends to the circular logo gracing the front of this light grey t-shirt.

eld_shirt_04_rsi_dec.label: RSI T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_rsi_dec.description: Celebrate the company most responsible for bringing Humanity to the stars. This classic black t-shirt features the iconic RSI logo.

eld_shirt_04_tumbril_01.label: Tumbril T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_tumbril_01.description: This orange and gray shirt displays the famed logo of Tumbril Land Systems, makers of legendary land vehicles such as the Nova tank and the Cyclone buggy. In need of a military-grade vehicle at a civilian price? Think Tumbril.

eld_shirt_07_01_01.label: Yenny Shirt
eld_shirt_07_01_01.description: A simple, light grey, long-sleeved shirt constructed from moisture wicking fabric ideal for keeping you comfortable during work and play.

eld_shirt_10_02_01.label: Future Navy Pilot T-Shirt
eld_shirt_10_02_01.description: Are you ready to shoot for the stars? Show the 'verse that you're on the way to being the best of the best: a pilot of the UEE Navy. In addition to the message emblazoned on the front, this show-stopping t-shirt features an all-over image of a blue and white nebula, the seal of the UEE Navy, and the Invictus logo.

fio_bar_pants_01_01_01.label: Lux Pants
fio_bar_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Lux are elegant pinstripe pants infused with a modern edge. Fiore elevates these classic slacks with a stylish blue and grey geometric pattern along the outer seam to create a look that would work in any era.

fio_bar_shirt_01_01_01.label: Bibiana Shirt
fio_bar_shirt_01_01_01.description: Part of their Essential Professional line, Fiore designed the Bibiana for those who want that retro look but with modern durability. The top features a refined pinpoint Oxford long sleeve shirt woven into a dark grey vest and suspenders adorned with gold clips as colorful accents. Additional eye-catching accessories include a black bow tie and sleeve garters.

fio_executive_jacket_01.label: Giotto Jacket Crusader Edition
fio_executive_jacket_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Fiore elevates the typical suit jacket with the Giotto. Subtle and stylish flourishes include light lines running down the left lapel and a strip of accent fabric along the arm seams that connect across the back of the jacket. The end result is an elegant and inspired addition to any wardrobe. The Crusader Edition was made specifically for employees of Crusader Industries.

fio_executive_jacket_02.label: Giotto Jacket
fio_executive_jacket_02.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Fiore elevates the typical suit jacket with the Giotto. Subtle and stylish flourishes include light lines running down the left lapel and a strip of accent fabric along the arm seams that connect across the back of the jacket. The end result is an elegant and inspired addition to any wardrobe.

fio_executive_pants_01.label: Koya Pants
fio_executive_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Koya are stylish slim cut pants featuring color accents on the pockets and cuffs. Made from a special stain resistant, soft fabric blend, they are paired with a brown belt featuring a gold buckle.

fio_executive_shirt_01.label: Aranda Shirt Crusader Edition
fio_executive_shirt_01.description: Fiore makes it easy to be fashionable with the Aranda. This unique top combines a dress shirt and waistcoat styled in complementary colors. The shirt comes with short sleeves cuffed at the elbows while the waistcoat features a small geometric flourish on the front pockets that's mirrored across the back. The Crusader Edition was made specifically for employees of Crusader Industries.

fio_executive_shirt_02.label: Radford Shirt Crusader Edition
fio_executive_shirt_02.description: The Radford dress shirt and tie combo proves that simple elegance is eternal. The shirt features a unique side seam that provides a tailored fit. A silver tie bar is the perfect finishing accent to make sure everything stays in place. The Crusader Edition was made specifically for employees of Crusader Industries.

fio_executive_shirt_03.label: Radford Shirt Crusader Edition White Pinstripe
fio_executive_shirt_03.description: The Radford dress shirt and tie combo proves that simple elegance is eternal. The shirt features a unique side seam that provides a tailored fit. A silver tie bar is the perfect finishing accent to make sure everything stays in place. The Crusader Edition was made specifically for employees of Crusader Industries.

fio_executive_shirt_04.label: Aranda Shirt
fio_executive_shirt_04.description: Fiore makes it easy to be fashionable with the Aranda. This unique top combines a dress shirt and waistcoat styled in complementary colors. The shirt comes with short sleeves cuffed at the elbows while the waistcoat features a small geometric flourish on the front pockets that's mirrored across the back.

fio_executive_shirt_05.label: Radford Shirt
fio_executive_shirt_05.description: The Radford dress shirt and tie combo proves that simple elegance is eternal. The shirt features a unique side seam that provides a tailored fit. A silver tie bar is the perfect finishing accent to make sure everything stays in place.

fio_executive_shirt_06.label: Radford Shirt White Pinstripe
fio_executive_shirt_06.description: The Radford dress shirt and tie combo proves that simple elegance is eternal. The shirt features a unique side seam that provides a tailored fit. A silver tie bar is the perfect finishing accent to make sure everything stays in place.

fio_gloves_01_01_01.label: Ventra Gloves
fio_gloves_01_01_01.description: Keep your hands warm and dry with Fiore's Ventra gloves. Microstitching creates a snug, tailored fit to keep you looking stylish and warm.

fio_gloves_02_01_01.label: Montara Gloves
fio_gloves_02_01_01.description: Simple style meets exquisite execution with the Montara gloves. A chic outer material and ultra-soft lining make the gloves ideal for both bad weather and elegant events.

fio_hat_01_01_01.label: Pacifica Hat
fio_hat_01_01_01.description: The Pacifica is a white wide-brimmed sun hat featuring a large decorative flower and striped hat band secured by a gold clasp.

fio_jacket_01_01_01.label: Ati Jacket
fio_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Fiore's is a modern update of traditional Earth design. Slim tailoring, a high collar, and striking asymmetrical design make this overcoat a must-have item for any wardrobe.

fio_jacket_04_01_01.label: Esteril Lab Coat ASD Edition
fio_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU The Esteril Lab Coat from luxury brand Fiore dares to answer the question, "Should laboratory clothing be fashionable?" with a resounding, "Yes." Based on the bestselling Ati Jacket, this coat features slim tailoring, a high collar, and striking asymmetrical design.

fio_pants_01_01_01.label: Lillo Pants
fio_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU These slim cut pants from Fiore give you a tailored feel at a fraction of the cost. Built from space-age weaves, the Lillo are a low maintenance, high impact addition to your office wardrobe.

fio_shirt_01_01_01.label: Concept Shirt
fio_shirt_01_01_01.description: This crisp, versatile button-front shirt from Fiore is made with cutting edge stain resistant and wrinkle-free technology, guaranteeing that you stay professional at all times.

fio_shirt_01_01_9tails01.label: Concept Shirt (Modified)
fio_shirt_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Fiore's Concept shirt has been modified from its original form. This crisp, versatile button-front shirt from Fiore is made with cutting edge stain resistant and wrinkle-free technology, guaranteeing that you stay professional at all times.

fio_shirt_02_01_01.label: Deo Shirt
fio_shirt_02_01_01.description: Fiore's Deo is a slim cut work shirt that's as practical as it is timeless. Featuring a high collar and metal neck clasp, the Deo has been a mainstay in business attire. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

fio_shirt_02_01_9tails01.label: Deo Shirt (Modified)
fio_shirt_02_01_9tails01.description: This version of Fiore's Deo shirt has been modified from its original form. Fiore's Deo is a slim cut work shirt that's as practical as it is timeless. Featuring a high collar and metal neck clasp, the Deo has been a mainstay in business attire.

fio_shoes_01_01_01.label: Prim Shoes
fio_shoes_01_01_01.description: Professional yet casual, the Prim utilizes cutting-edge synthetic construction to provide maximum comfort and a shine that won't fade.

fio_shoes_01_01_9tails01.label: Prim Shoes (Modified)
fio_shoes_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Fiore's Prim shoes has been modified from its original form. Professional yet casual, the Prim utilizes cutting-edge synthetic construction to provide maximum comfort and a shine that won't fade.

fio_suit_01_01_01.label: Marias Suit
fio_suit_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU Fiore elevates the three-piece suit with this modern and elegant interpretation. The Marias suit features a stylishly cropped white suit coat with gold accents. Underneath the jacket sits a grey shirt secured at the collar by two golden circular clasps and featuring an elongated, decorated front panel meant to be tucked under the unique lace waistband of the suit's black pants.

fro_shoes_01_01_01.label: Kinolo Shoes
fro_shoes_01_01_01.description: The Kinolo shoes deliver a subtle yet striking look. Made from grey synthetic leather punctuated with gold highlights, these slip-on shoes feature a heel cushion for extra support and a special non-slip sole.

fta_medium_helmet_01_01_01.label: Strata Helmet Shooting Star
fta_medium_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -50 / 80 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Made for miners but ready for any adventure, Greycat Industrial's Strata armor provides premium protection and convenient features. Each piece features an angular and precise design to deliver coverage where it's most needed most. A toolbelt with convenient pouches and a reinforced backpack offers plenty of storage. The award-winning helmet design features high quality materials and a next-gen air filtration system that enables clean breathing whether in a deep mine or hostile atmospheres.

fta_medium_helmet_01_01_03.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. grin_toxic_jumpsuit_01.label: TruBarrier Hazard Suit Moss
grin_toxic_jumpsuit_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Temp. Rating: -5 / 32 °C Guard yourself from toxic environmental hazards with the TruBarrier Hazard Suit, constructed from industrial-grade fabric and coated with a multi-layered, laminated polymer that offers a broad range of chemical protection without sacrificing mobility. The encapsulated design provides full-body protection from direct contact with dangerous materials when worn with its accompanying mask.

grin_toxic_mask_01.label: TruBarrier Hazard Suit Mask Moss
grin_toxic_mask_01.description: Temp. Rating: -30 / 15 °C The TruBarrier Hazard Mask by Greycat Industrial helps its user face unexpected environmental hazards while keeping the most vulnerable parts of the head safe from damage. The encapsualted design provides full-body protection from direct contact with dangerous materials when worn with its accompanying jumpsuit.

grin_utility_medium_helmet_01_01_9tails0.label: Aril Helmet (Modified)
grin_utility_medium_helmet_01_01_9tails0.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -56 / 86 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Greycat Industrial's Aril helmet has been modified from its original form. Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

grin_utility_medium_legs_01_01_9tails01.label: Aril Legs (Modified)
grin_utility_medium_legs_01_01_9tails01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU This version of Greycat Industrial's Aril legs has been modified from its original form. Originally designed for miners, the Aril armor includes a fully enclosed helmet and high collar providing additional support and protection for the neck and back of the head. An integrated tool belt and attachable backpack can accommodate a variety of tools and supplies to keep your hands free. The Aril armor is available in a variety of vibrant colors to fit your personal taste and for easy identification on the jobsite.

gsb_boots_02_01_01.label: LifeCore Boots
gsb_boots_02_01_01.description: These all-purpose, all-terrain workboots from Grindstone feature full ankle support, molded heel counter and a waterproof, abrasion resistant material.

gsb_boots_03_01_01.label: Toughlife Boots
gsb_boots_03_01_01.description: Grindstone's done it again. The Toughlife is an all-purpose workboot designed to provide comfort, durability and quality. Featuring a reinforced composite toe and lasercut sole to maximize traction on all surfaces, Toughlife is sure to be your dependable boot, day in and day out.

gsb_boots_04_01_01.label: Landlite Boots
gsb_boots_04_01_01.description: Who says work boots can't be comfortable? Grindstone's Landlite boots are built with a breathable synth-leather material to keep your feet dry, a contoured, memory footbed, and a slip-resistant outsole, making it perfect for whatever worksite you throw at it.

gsb_boots_05.label: Trailblazer Boots
gsb_boots_05.description: These leather ankle-high boots feature a dura-tread sole, reinforced metal eyeholes for secure lacing, and a soft-stretch ankle to make taking them on and off a breeze. A classic design from Grindstone that can easily go from the office to the trail.

gsb_boots_06.label: TrailTuff Boots
gsb_boots_06.description: Whether you're charting new territory on an untouched world or fixing fences at your homestead, Grindstone's TrailTuff boots are sturdy enough to take on the toughest terrain. Made with a proprietary synthetic leather that has all the qualities you love of the real thing and none of the downsides.

gsb_boots_08_01_01.label: SafeCore Boots
gsb_boots_08_01_01.description: The SafeCore boots are a soft-shelled offering from Grindstone intended to provide more flexibility while traversing in adverse conditions.

gsb_boots_08_01_13.label: SafeCore Boots Tosca
gsb_boots_08_01_13.description: The SafeCore boots are a soft-shelled offering from Grindstone intended to provide more flexibility while traversing in adverse conditions.

gsb_boots_08_01_15.label: SafeCore Boots Westar
gsb_boots_08_01_15.description: The SafeCore boots are a soft-shelled offering from Grindstone intended to provide more flexibility while traversing in adverse conditions.

gsb_boots_08_01_17.label: SafeCore Boots Shuttle Gray
gsb_boots_08_01_17.description: The SafeCore boots are a soft-shelled offering from Grindstone intended to provide more flexibility while traversing in adverse conditions.

gsb_boots_08_01_20.label: SafeCore Boots Armadillo
gsb_boots_08_01_20.description: The SafeCore boots are a soft-shelled offering from Grindstone intended to provide more flexibility while traversing in adverse conditions.

gsb_boots_09.label: Rockridge Boots
gsb_boots_09.description: With the Rockridge, Grindstone has created a comfortable boot with a wide laced collar that allows wearers to adjust the fit to their level of comfort while still keeping the elements out.

gsb_boots_10.label: Desert Cat Boots
gsb_boots_10.description: When you walk on untamed worlds, dirt is just a part of the job. These Desert Cat Boots are coated with a thin membrane that helps repel grime while allowing heat and sweat to escape.

gsb_frontier_boots_01_01_01.label: Corsti Boots
gsb_frontier_boots_01_01_01.description: Made with hardy and adaptable materials, the Corsti boots are suitable for any conditions, whether you're taking a day-long hike on a well-worn road or exploring a strange landscape on an untamed world.

gsb_frontier_boots_01_02_01.label: Corsti Boots CFP
gsb_frontier_boots_01_02_01.description: Made with hardy and adaptable materials, the Corsti boots are suitable for any conditions, whether you're taking a day-long hike on a well-worn road or exploring a strange landscape on an untamed world. The CFP edition is a deep fjord blue with black vamp detailing.

gsb_pants_01.label: Millrun Waders
gsb_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU A combination of waterproof and weather-resistant pants and boots, the Millrun Waders are a comfortable option for uncomfortable work.

gsb_shoes_01_01_9tails01.label: Bedrock Boots (Modified)
gsb_shoes_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Grindstone's Bedrock boots has been modified from its original form. This steel-toe workboot from Grindstone features SureFire grip technology, giving you firm traction even on slip, oil and abrasion surfaces.

gsb_shoes_03_01_01.label: Hillcrest Boots
gsb_shoes_03_01_01.description: Spend all day in your Hillcrest boots. Rugged yet refined, the boots feature a stylish and waterproof brown synthetic leather with red inlays and yellow stitching. A comfortable, odor absorbing insole and slip resistant outer sole will keep you comfortable and on your feet.

gsb_shoes_04_01_01.label: Snapback Boots
gsb_shoes_04_01_01.description: Vibrant light green leather and bold metallic accents bring an eye catching look to the Snapback boots. Grindstone Boots' classic thick, cushioned sole and an odor absorbing insole are complemented by a steel toe, magnetic clasps protecting the laces, and a metallic counter for additional support.

gsb_shoes_05.label: Trekker Boots
gsb_shoes_05.description: Designed for unfamiliar terrain, these boots are made with our SureFire grip technology and feature ankle support and steel-reinforced lacing to ensure stability on unfamiliar ground. Guaranteed to fit comfortably, even when worn with armor.

gsb_shoes_05_02_01.label: Venator Boots
gsb_shoes_05_02_01.description: Whether you need to run or stand your ground, these rugged, lightweight all-terrain boots with reinforced uppers and acid-resistant tru-grip soles are the perfect choice.

gsb_shoes_05_02_10.label: Venator Boots Molten
gsb_shoes_05_02_10.description: Whether you need to run or stand your ground, these rugged, lightweight all-terrain boots with reinforced uppers and acid-resistant tru-grip soles are the perfect choice. The Molten version is dyed a deep red to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

gsb_shoes_05_02_11.label: Venator Boots Sleet
gsb_shoes_05_02_11.description: Whether you need to run or stand your ground, these rugged, lightweight all-terrain boots with reinforced uppers and acid-resistant tru-grip soles are the perfect choice. The Sleet version is dyed a well-worn grey to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

gsb_shoes_05_02_15.label: Venator Boots Molehill Brown
gsb_shoes_05_02_15.description: Whether you need to run or stand your ground, these rugged, lightweight all-terrain boots with reinforced uppers and acid-resistant tru-grip soles are the perfect choice. The Molehill version is dyed a neutral brown to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

gsb_shoes_05_02_18.label: Venator Boots Grime Blue
gsb_shoes_05_02_18.description: Whether you need to run or stand your ground, these rugged, lightweight all-terrain boots with reinforced uppers and acid-resistant tru-grip soles are the perfect choice. The Grime version is dyed a dusky blue to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

gys_hathor_hat_01_01_01.label: Theaters of War: Hathor Group Hat
gys_hathor_hat_01_01_01.description: This Hathor Group hat resurrects the original design worn by workers in Nexus when the company controlled the system. It has been intentionally distressed to reflect the harsh conditions in the system, and released as a special Theaters of War (Working Title) tie-in to promote their Nexus sim map.

gys_helmet_01_01_01.label: Ready-Up Helmet
gys_helmet_01_01_01.description: The Ready-Up is a dependable, affordable softshell helmet alternative. Built from space-age plastic, the Ready-Up provides a vacuum-ready seal to keep you breathing for longer.

gys_helmet_02_01_01.label: J-5 Helmet
gys_helmet_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Light Helmet Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -25 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Gyson delivers another unique softshell helmet with the J-5. Large optic sensors and an oversized breathing apparatus deliver a striking visage. The distinct design is space-rated and provides a modicum of protection, while keeping the helmet lightweight and affordable.

gys_helmet_02_02_01.label: J-5 Helmet Pyrotechnic
gys_helmet_02_02_01.description: Item Type: Light Helmet Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -25 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Gyson delivers another unique softshell helmet with the J-5. Large optic sensors and an oversized breathing apparatus deliver a striking visage. The distinct design is space-rated and provides a modicum of protection, while keeping the helmet lightweight and affordable. This edition features the colors and logo of the now defunct Pyrotechnic Amalgamated.

gys_helmet_03_01_01.label: Exo-8 Helmet (Used)
gys_helmet_03_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -60 / 90 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Featuring a large face shield and torches on each side, the Exo-8 helmet lets you keep your eyes on the prize. Gyson designers smartly integrated space-safe fabrics into the helmet, so it can provide the protection you deserve at a price that won't break the bank. This used helmet has been certified space-safe but may contain cosmetic defects not seen on the standard model.

gys_jacket_01.label: Carnifex Armor Core
gys_jacket_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -5 / 38 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Backpack Compatibility: Light This homemade armor provides a marginal amount of protection but maximum attitude. It's aggressively styled with skulls and other intimidating accessories associated with those living on the edge. Wearing such a distinct look may either keep people away... or draw them to you.

gys_mask_01_01_01.label: Purifier Mask AA Support
gys_mask_01_01_01.description: Temp. Rating: -5 / 50 °C Ensure every breath you take is crisp and clean with the Purifier mask. It features a wide faceplate rimmed with a special synthetic rubber to provide an airtight fit, while two small lights on each side deliver a clear view ahead. The AA Support edition is sharp red, blue, and black. An Alliance Aid decal on the front guarantees that the filter is certified to purify the air of Molina Mold.

gys_pants_01.label: Carnifex Armor Legs
gys_pants_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -5 / 35 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU This homemade armor provides a marginal amount of protection but maximum attitude. It's aggressively styled with skulls and other intimidating accessories associated with those living on the edge. Wearing such a distinct look may either keep people away... or draw them to you.

gys_undersuit_01.label: Deep-Space Undersuit
gys_undersuit_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Confidently venture into the unknown with the Deep-Space undersuit. Smartly designed with several overlapping sections to guarantee the suit's integrity, Gyson has created an affordable and fashionable undersuit that helps make space travel more accessible to all.

hdh_boots_01.label: Paradan Boots
hdh_boots_01.description: Built to last, the Paradan boots from Habidash are simple, sturdy, and reliable. The outer layer of the boots is made from a thick synthetic material that will protect the wearer from water, sand, or snow, while the inside features a pliable foam that ensures the boots will remain comfortable for years to come.

hdh_boots_02.label: Taftan Boots Sandalwood
hdh_boots_02.description: Strong, practical, and stylish, these high-cut boots with reinforced straps will be just the thing you need for those long outdoor treks. The slip- and abrasion-resistant soles were constructed from a proprietary composite of recycled plastic and rubber to improve traction without sacrificing flexibility.

hdh_gloves_01.label: Sootho Gloves
hdh_gloves_01.description: Pros at keeping your hands safe without sacrificing dexterity, the slip-resistant Sootho gloves deliver solid protection and lasting warmth during chilly or hostile conditions. The tough synthetic leather breaks in well and will stand up to years of frequent use.

hdh_hat_03_01_01.label: Sorel Hat
hdh_hat_03_01_01.description: The wide-brim bucket-style design of Habidash's Sorel hat provides the wearer with lots of cover from any overbearing rain or sunshine.

hdh_hat_03_01_13.label: Sorel Hat Tosca
hdh_hat_03_01_13.description: The wide-brim bucket-style design of Habidash's Sorel hat provides the wearer with lots of cover from any overbearing rain or sunshine.

hdh_hat_03_01_15.label: Sorel Hat Westar
hdh_hat_03_01_15.description: The wide-brim bucket-style design of Habidash's Sorel hat provides the wearer with lots of cover from any overbearing rain or sunshine.

hdh_hat_03_01_17.label: Sorel Hat Shuttle Gray
hdh_hat_03_01_17.description: The wide-brim bucket-style design of Habidash's Sorel hat provides the wearer with lots of cover from any overbearing rain or sunshine.

hdh_hat_03_01_20.label: Sorel Hat Armadillo
hdh_hat_03_01_20.description: The wide-brim bucket-style design of Habidash's Sorel hat provides the wearer with lots of cover from any overbearing rain or sunshine.

hdh_hat_04_01_01.label: Keldur Hat and Indigo Goggles
hdh_hat_04_01_01.description: Blowing winds and blazing sun won't be an issue when wearing the Keldur hat and goggles. Insulated flaps keep the sun and elements off your neck, while a lightweight metal brim and scratch resistant, industrial-grade goggles protect your eyes.

hdh_jacket_01.label: Reno Work Vest
hdh_jacket_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Reno work vest was crafted by Habidash from durable synth-leather cut in a bold asymmetric patchwork pattern, and features a secure double-clasp with reinforced armholes to extend the longevity of the garment.

hdh_jacket_02.label: Tyros Jacket
hdh_jacket_02.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Tyros white synth-leather jacket from Habidash features a striking side-closure pattern with silver clasps, reinforced ribbing at the cuffs and collars, and a silver-inlaid polygonal pattern across the chest and sleeve.

hdh_jacket_05_01_01.label: Tulsi Jacket Conifer
hdh_jacket_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This Tulsi jacket features an outer shell designed to cut down on wind shear and an inner shell made to retain warmth without sacrificing comfort. For ease of use, it also features an gentle-glide zipper with a secure top stop and roomy pockets that guarantee you'll always have what you need on hand.

hdh_jacket_06.label: Vacha Jacket Sandalwood
hdh_jacket_06.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU The Vacha jacket offers the wearer an admirable degree of comfort across a wide range of environments thanks to its sealed cuffs and utility neck collar. Additionally, the rugged design features a sealed cross closure, incorporated belt, and auxiliary ports. The garment's sheer durability and utility has cemented the Vacha jacket as a perennial favorite in Habidash's collection.

hdh_jacket_07.label: Chada Collar and Panniers Sandalwood
hdh_jacket_07.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU Need extra inventory? We've got you covered. Designed for hands-free carrying, the Chada Panniers by Habidash come with an adjustable strap that lets you securely attach them around your hips. Each set of panniers comes with a fashionable steel and leather gorget.

hdh_jacket_08_01_01.label: Detara Jacket
hdh_jacket_08_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity:1000 µSCU The Detara Jacket by Habidash weaves several long panels of durable fabric together to create a unique silhouette well suited to harsh environments.

hdh_jacket_09_01_01.label: Calister Jacket
hdh_jacket_09_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Jacket by Habidash is made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure full body coverage. The cross-body panel that shapes the silhouette of the design provides additional insulation in harsher conditions.

hdh_jacket_09_01_13.label: Calister Jacket Tosca
hdh_jacket_09_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Jacket by Habidash is made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure full body coverage. The cross-body panel that shapes the silhouette of the design provides additional insulation in harsher conditions.

hdh_jacket_09_01_15.label: Calister Jacket Westar
hdh_jacket_09_01_15.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Jacket by Habidash is made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure full body coverage. The cross-body panel that shapes the silhouette of the design provides additional insulation in harsher conditions.

hdh_jacket_09_01_17.label: Calister Jacket Shuttle Gray
hdh_jacket_09_01_17.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Jacket by Habidash is made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure full body coverage. The cross-body panel that shapes the silhouette of the design provides additional insulation in harsher conditions.

hdh_jacket_09_01_20.label: Calister Jacket Armadillo
hdh_jacket_09_01_20.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Jacket by Habidash is made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure full body coverage. The cross-body panel that shapes the silhouette of the design provides additional insulation in harsher conditions.

hdh_jacket_10.label: Brocius Waist Apron
hdh_jacket_10.description: Habidash's Brocius Waist Apron features a quilted front panel paired with side skirting to protect the wearer from any overspills or other dirtying work while still providing freedom of movement.

hdh_jacket_11.label: Sharud Wrap and Arm Bands
hdh_jacket_11.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Sharud is an ideal top for staying cool in hot weather. Advanced production techniques allow Habidash to make a light yet absorbent shawl that looks and feels like handspun natural cotton but at a fraction of the cost. The three arm band pieces provide stylish accents and come embedded with microchips that tracks body temperature and other vitals.

hdh_pants_01_01_01.label: Zelena Pants Conifer and Bisbee Boots
hdh_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Stay warm and dry on rainy days in the Zelena pants and the Bisbee boots. Both made with water-repellant materials and built-in sweat-wicking technology, they'll be your go-to choice for adventures on even the most hostile worlds.

hdh_pants_02_01_01.label: Zelena Pants and Tall Bisbee Boots
hdh_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 7.3K µSCU Stay warm and dry on rainy days in the Zelena pants and the Bisbee boots. Both made with water-repellant materials and built-in sweat-wicking technology, they'll be your go-to choice for adventures on even the most hostile worlds.

hdh_pants_03.label: Canelo Pants Marigold
hdh_pants_03.description: Carrying Capacity: 400 µSCU Whether you need them for work, play, or rest, the adaptable Canelo Pants from Habidash are guaranteed to fit the bill. Its convenient pockets allow you to carry all your essentials, and its stain-resistant fabric is comfortable enough to be worn for hours.

hdh_pants_04_01_01.label: Calister Pants
hdh_pants_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Pants by Habidash are made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure coverage of the wearer's legs even in adverse environmental conditions.

hdh_pants_04_01_13.label: Calister Pants Tosca
hdh_pants_04_01_13.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Pants by Habidash are made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure coverage of the wearer's legs even in adverse environmental conditions.

hdh_pants_04_01_15.label: Calister Pants Westar
hdh_pants_04_01_15.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Pants by Habidash are made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure coverage of the wearer's legs even in adverse environmental conditions.

hdh_pants_04_01_17.label: Calister Pants Shuttle Gray
hdh_pants_04_01_17.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Pants by Habidash are made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure coverage of the wearer's legs even in adverse environmental conditions.

hdh_pants_04_01_20.label: Calister Pants Armadillo
hdh_pants_04_01_20.description: Carrying Capacity: 1000 µSCU The Calister Pants by Habidash are made with thick synthetic fabric intended to ensure coverage of the wearer's legs even in adverse environmental conditions.

hdh_pants_05.label: Guerra Pants
hdh_pants_05.description: The Guerra pants by Alejo Brothers are a staple for daily wear. The synthetic fabric ensures adequate protection from the general wear and tear of frontier life while remaining easy to patch up if the need arises.

hdh_pants_06.label: Kavir Pants
hdh_pants_06.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU Blending Habidash style and ingenuity, the Kavir pants feature fashionable flourishes alongside practical perks ideal for managing extreme environments. Several fabric pieces are sewn directly into a thick, integrated belt that divides the pants between a large elastic waistband and looser, breathable cotton blend fabric through the legs. There are also two bands of fabric that ring the shins to keep dirt and other elements out.

hdh_shirt_01.label: Samya Tank White
hdh_shirt_01.description: This Samya Tank is your perfect staple for hot weather. Made with soft and breathable fabric, it features moisture-wicking technology and reinforced binding at the openings to protect it from wear and tear. A detachable sleeve is included with each shirt.

hdh_shirt_02_01_01.label: Silco Shirt
hdh_shirt_02_01_01.description: With a sleek design and durable material, the Silco Shirt by Habidash is a comfortable shirt that can be conveniently worn either as an undershirt or on its own.

hdh_shirt_03_01_01.label: Enkel Shirt
hdh_shirt_03_01_01.description: Habidash's Enkel is a simple, no-frills shirt designed to be comfortable, first and foremost.

hdh_shirt_03_01_04.label: Enkel Shirt Primrose
hdh_shirt_03_01_04.description: Habidash's Enkel is a simple, no-frills shirt designed to be comfortable, first and foremost.

hdh_shirt_03_01_10.label: Enkel Shirt Valencia
hdh_shirt_03_01_10.description: Habidash's Enkel is a simple, no-frills shirt designed to be comfortable, first and foremost.

hdh_shirt_03_01_13.label: Enkel Shirt Saddle
hdh_shirt_03_01_13.description: Habidash's Enkel is a simple, no-frills shirt designed to be comfortable, first and foremost.

hdh_shirt_03_01_17.label: Enkel Shirt Sirocco
hdh_shirt_03_01_17.description: Habidash's Enkel is a simple, no-frills shirt designed to be comfortable, first and foremost.

hdh_shirt_04.label: Alban Shirt
hdh_shirt_04.description: The Alban is a long sleeve shirt made from comfortable, natural fabrics. Featuring a deep V-neck, its asymmetrical patchwork design provides it with a bit of texture and a two-toned look.

hdh_shirt_04_04.label: Alban Shirt
hdh_shirt_04_04.description: The Alban is a long sleeve shirt made from comfortable, natural fabrics. Featuring a deep V-neck, its asymmetrical patchwork design provides it with a bit of texture and a two-toned look. The Smoke edition features a worn gray color.

hdh_shirt_04_05_01.label: Alban Shirt Striker
hdh_shirt_04_05_01.description: The Alban is a long sleeve shirt made from comfortable, natural fabrics. Featuring a deep V-neck, its asymmetrical patchwork design provides it with a bit of texture and a two-toned look. The Striker edition is a worn grey with dark grey patches.

hdtc_undersuit_01_01_01.label: Lamont Undersuit
hdtc_undersuit_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU The Lamont looks so good you won't want to wear armor over it. Seamlessly blending lightweight plating with durable synthetic weaves, the Lamont will be as comfortable in the cockpit as it is stylish in the streets. Embrace personal protection gear suitable for both work and play, and gain the Hardin Tactical advantage.

hdtc_undersuit_01_01_02.label: Lamont Xy'kara Undersuit
hdtc_undersuit_01_01_02.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU The Lamont looks so good you won't want to wear armor over it. Seamlessly blending lightweight plating with durable synthetic weaves, the Lamont will be as comfortable in the cockpit as it is stylish in the streets. Embrace personal protection gear suitable for both work and play, and gain the Hardin Tactical advantage. The Xy'kara undersuit draws inspiration from the millennia-long heritage of the Xi'an.

hdtc_utility_light_backpack_01.label: Cataby Backpack MPUV-1C Edition
hdtc_utility_light_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Light Backpack Carrying Capacity: 75K µSCU Core Compatibility: All The Cataby is a stylish backpack built by Hardin Tactical to withstand rigorous adventures. The unique rectangle shape features a hard frame fitted around a durable and expandable softshell with two zippered pockets allowing for easy access to essentials. The MPUV-1C Edition also comes with a commemorative patch to celebrate the Argo Cargo's 2951 Best in Show victory.

hdtc_utility_light_backpack_01_02_01.label: Cataby Backpack Lifeforce Edition
hdtc_utility_light_backpack_01_02_01.description: Item Type: Light Backpack Carrying Capacity: 75K µSCU Core Compatibility: All The Cataby is a stylish backpack built by Hardin Tactical to withstand rigorous adventures. The unique rectangle shape features a hard frame fitted around a durable and expandable softshell with two zippered pockets allowing for easy access to essentials. The Lifeforce edition was designed with first responders in mind with a highly visible white, red, and grey color scheme.

hwk_executive_shoes_01.label: Vivant Shoes
hwk_executive_shoes_01.description: Slip into style and comfort with the Vivant shoes from Hawksworth's. These synthetic leather loafers feature an accentuated cap toe, metallic inlay atop the vamp, and a lightweight yet durable outsole made from a unique blend of rubber nanocomposites.

hwk_fashion_shoes_01_01_01.label: Matiese Shoes
hwk_fashion_shoes_01_01_01.description: Embody timeless elegance with the Matiese shoes from Hawksworth's. Made with fine artificial leather, the detailed upper design gives the shoes a clean, sleek profile suited to any occasion.

kap_combat_heavy_arms_02_01_01.label: Monde Arms
kap_combat_heavy_arms_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -77 / 107 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 7.5 µSCU From the masterwork designers of Kilgore & Poole comes the Monde heavy armor. Effortlessly integrating triple-laminate plating with the latest in defensive technology, this armor provides battle-ready protection with a next-class comfort system and specialized flex-point joints.

kap_combat_light_arms_01.label: Geist Armor Arms
kap_combat_light_arms_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s An ideal synthesis of strength and technology, the Geist Stealth Armor has been crafted from military-grade carbon silk sourced from the same manufacturers that protect the UEE's special forces. Hair-thin filaments woven into the fabric mask the wearer's emissions, making them undetectable via radar, and specialized tubing built into the soles of the boots dampens the sound of footsteps.

Rating: -33 / 63 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Who'd have thought a suit of armor could be affordable and effective? Kastak Arms' Microid Battle Suit is a perfect entry-level armor set. Ceramic plates protect vital areas while a microweave covers the rest, allowing you to stay light, mobile and protected.

mrai_boots_01_01_01.label: Mirai Racing Boots
mrai_boots_01_01_01.description: Mirai’s Racing Boots use synthetic fabrics sourced from the Xi’an to create a comfortable flight suit durable enough to endure the stresses of high-velocity racing.
