mym_fashion_suit_01_01_01.label: Ambrus Suit
mym_fashion_suit_01_01_01.description: MuyMuy's Ambrus suit was expertly crafted by artisans on Saisei from natural brocade silk and worsted ma'xy.un wool. Featuring bold coloration and a relaxed fit, it lets the wearer maintain comfort without sacrificing style.

mym_shirt_01_lum02_02.label: Forgiveness Sweater
mym_shirt_01_lum02_02.description: This Luminalia, don't just strengthen your bonds with physical presents. Remember to offer your friends and family the most important thing you can: the gift of forgiveness. Featuring a cheeky member of the Nine Tails gang that has been causing havoc in the Stanton system, this collab from MuyMuy and Vaporwear shows that during the holiday season, anyone can turn over a new leaf.

mym_shirt_01_lum02_07.label: Piconalia Sweater
mym_shirt_01_lum02_07.description: Light up the night this Luminalia with a little help from Pico the Penguin. Designed by MuyMuy in collaboration with microTech, the Piconalia Sweater was made with a blend of wools optimized to create long-lasting softness while preventing wear and tear.

mym_shirt_01_lum02_16.label: Piconalia Sweater Tannenbaum
mym_shirt_01_lum02_16.description: Light up the night this Luminalia with a little help from Pico the Penguin. Designed by MuyMuy in collaboration with microTech, the Piconalia Sweater was made with a blend of wools optimized to create long-lasting softness while preventing wear and tear.

mym_shirt_03_01_01.label: Livia Shirt
mym_shirt_03_01_01.description: MuyMuy's loose hooded shirt is an ultra-modern take on a classic look. The Livia features a soft knit blend, designed for comfort and elegance.

mym_shirt_03_01_9tails01.label: Livia Shirt (Modified)
mym_shirt_03_01_9tails01.description: This version of MuyMuy's Livia shirt has been modified from its original form. MuyMuy's loose hooded shirt is an ultra-modern take on a classic look. The Livia features a soft knit blend, designed for comfort and elegance.

nbr_hat_01_01_01.label: Samark Woven Hat
nbr_hat_01_01_01.description: Shade yourself from the sun with the Samark Woven hat. Its precisely woven to divert rain off the wide brim instead of seeping through onto you. The hat also features an adjustable strap to ensure a snug and comfortable fit.

nrs_shoes_03_01_01.label: Li-Tok Boots
nrs_shoes_03_01_01.description: Stylish yet rugged, NorthStar's Li-Tok boots are made from a composite nylon fabric, vulcanized rubber grips that hold fast to a variety of surfaces, and reinforced ankle support making these perfect for hanging out or on the job. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

nrs_shoes_05_01_01.label: Ardent Boots
nrs_shoes_05_01_01.description: Who says NorthStar can't keep it pro? The Ardent boot features a molded rubber sole and all-weather construction to withstand a constant battery from the elements. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

nvs_shoes_01_01_01.label: Cuesta Shoes
nvs_shoes_01_01_01.description: An all-season ankle boot, the Cuesta features a practical design that can stand up to all kinds of weather and terrain, while the supportive insole provides comfort to last through your shift and beyond.

nvs_boots_01_01_01.label: Bison Military Boots
nvs_boots_01_01_01.description: Thick and robust, these black faux-leather military boots provide durable protection for your feet on a variety of terrains.

Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +97.5% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Inspired by the armored flight suit worn by UEE Navy pilots, the OMNI-AFS-Sapphire has been battle tested and refined for centuries to become the ultimate wear for any pilot. Its sturdy yet comfortable construction can not only withstand hostile environments, but comes with integrated arm, core, and leg armor for combat encounters. The only way a pilot can get closer to the real thing is by enlisting.

nvs_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01.label: OMNI-AFS-Sapphire Flight Helmet
nvs_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 15% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Similar to the helmet worn by UEE Navy pilots, the OMNI-AFS-Sapphire helmet delivers excellent protection and visibility. Multilayered plating protects against impacts while its wide faceplate ensures clear, unobstructed views whether in the cockpit or on foot.

nvs_shirt_01_01_01.label: Oxhorn Service Sweater InterSec
nvs_shirt_01_01_01.description: A favored piece by many serving aboard drafty starships, this military-green InterSec sweater is designed to provide comfort, insulation, and instill a sense of professionalism. This version features InterSec Defense Solutions branding and is often worn by their employees and contractors.

nvy_pilot_flightsuit.label: OMNI-CFS-Diamond Flight Suit
nvy_pilot_flightsuit.description: Item Type: Flight Suit Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +97.5% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU The Navy has spent centuries refining the flight suits that their combat pilots wear. The Omni features reinforced construction to withstand a variety of hostile environments and integrates flawlessly with appropriately classic armor systems.

nvy_pilot_flightsuit_armor.label: AVS-E Undersuit
nvy_pilot_flightsuit_armor.description: The AVS-E is a unique armor set designed to integrate seamlessly with the OMNI-CFS series of flight suits. The AVS features component armor plating, strategically placed to protect vital areas, but also integrates numerous pouches to keep you equipped in the field.

nvy_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01_shared.label: AVS-E Helmet
nvy_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01_shared.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 15% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s The AVS-E helmet's carbon fiber shell offers superb impact and penetration protection, an uninterrupted field of view and excellent stability making it ideal for all kinds of operations in the field.

nvy_shoes_01_01_shared.label: Waylite Shoes Cobalt
nvy_shoes_01_01_shared.description: Stay on your feet all day with Northstar's Waylite. These slip resistant shoes utilize comfortable memory foam and shock absorbent technology to make these casual sneakers perfect for the office or home. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

nvy_shoes_02.label: PH - DF80s Shoes
nvy_shoes_02.description: PH - Standard issue sneaker for recruits and training, DF80s feature increased arch support for long runs and a polyweave material that keeps your feet dry.

nvy_training_shirt_01.label: ActiveWear Training T-Shirt
nvy_training_shirt_01.description: The ActiveWear training t-shirt will help you get the most out of your next workout. Standard issues to all Navy personnel, it's made with special lightweight and breathable fabric that keeps you cool and comfortable even when your heart is pumping.

nvy_training_shirt_02_02_01.label: Malenky T-Shirt Skullsplitter
nvy_training_shirt_02_02_01.description: "Inspired" by classic military designs with CBD's own twist, the Malenky t-shirt features collar accents on both sides, a rear quarter-zip, and is made out of premium recycled materials to ensure just the right fit. The gray and red Skullsplitter version showcases a red Vanduul skull shattered by a bloody streak.

nvy_training_shirt_02_defcon2956.label: DefenseCon '56 T-Shirt
nvy_training_shirt_02_defcon2956.description: Turn up the heat and celebrate DefenseCon 2956 in style this flame-accented t-shirt with front collar tabs and a rear quarter zip.

nvy_training_shoes_01.label: CloudSprint Shoes
nvy_training_shoes_01.description: Keep your feet moving and stay comfortable with the CloudSprint shoes from NorthStar. Whether working out or relaxing, you won't regret slipping on these shoes thanks to their cushioned and supportive soles.

nvy_training_shorts_01_01_shared.label: ActiveWear Training Shorts
nvy_training_shorts_01_01_shared.description: Standard issue ActiveWear training shorts are constructed from four-way stretch fabric technology to allow for increased airflow and a larger range of motion while keeping you cool and dry during the most intensive training sessions.

oct_boots_01_shared.label: Bracewell Boots
oct_boots_01_shared.description: Durable, dependable, and comfortable. The Bracewell are high ankle boots designed to thrive amidst unpredictable weather conditions with a water-resistant finish, high-traction soles, and a toggle-locked top enclosure to help keep out any precipitation.

oct_boots_02_01_9tails01.label: Ridgewalker Boots (Modified)
oct_boots_02_01_9tails01.description: This version of Octagon's Ridgewalker boots has been modified from its original form. Functional style meets modern comfort with the Ridgewalker boots. Made with a lightweight yet durable synthetic leather, these boots feature a custom cushioned footbed and total traction soles that will keep you on your feet for hours. Fit for adventure or fashion the Ridgewalker boots are perfect for any occasion.

oct_boots_02_shared.label: Ridgewalker Boots
oct_boots_02_shared.description: Functional style meets modern comfort with the Ridgewalker boots. Made with a lightweight yet durable synthetic leather, these boots feature a custom cushioned footbed and total traction soles that will keep you on your feet for hours. Fit for adventure or fashion the Ridgewalker boots are perfect for any occasion.

oct_boots_03_shared.label: Gilick Boots
oct_boots_03_shared.description: Gain the Octagon advantage with the Gilick boots. Whether on a work site or exploring the wilds, these boots will provide the comfort and support you crave. They feature an all-terrain tread, a supportive inner sole, and adjustable gaiters to cover your ankles and lower legs from the elements.

oct_jacket_01_shared.label: Tolo Jacket Crusader Edition
oct_jacket_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU A creatively integrated dickey gives the Tolo its fashionable and unconventional look. This three quarter sleeve shirt also features small epaulettes perched atop each shoulder. The Crusader Edition was made to be worn by Crusader employees and features the company's sword & C logo on each shoulder.

oct_jacket_01_logoless_shared.label: Tolo Shirt
oct_jacket_01_logoless_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU A creatively integrated dickey gives the Tolo its fashionable and unconventional look. This three quarter sleeve shirt also features small epaulettes perched atop each shoulder.

oct_jacket_02_shared.label: Kamar Jacket
oct_jacket_02_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Kamar is a modern update on a classic style featuring a truly unique design and silhouette. Centered around an ultra-soft velvet front panel, it features a fitted collar, wide pleated waistband, and bishop sleeves cinched by extra long cuffs. The result is a formal top that's bold yet timeless.

oct_jacket_03_01_01.label: Zerua Jacket Crusader Edition
oct_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Masterfully blending various colors and materials, the Zerua is a stylish jacket that features light yet breathable synthetics. Thanks to a unique dual layer design the jacket is meant to be worn open but is closable against the cold thanks to a snap button collar and zipper on the outer layer. The Crusader Edition is made specifically for company employees to weather the conditions present at Orison, and features the famous sword and C logo down the front and across the back of the jacket.

oct_jacket_03_02_01.label: Zerua Jacket
oct_jacket_03_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Masterfully blending various colors and materials, the Zerua is a stylish jacket that features light yet breathable synthetics. Thanks to a unique dual layer design the jacket is meant to be worn open but is closable against the cold thanks to a snap button collar and zipper on the outer layer.

oct_jumpsuit_01_shared.label: Ventris Jumpsuit Crusader Edition
oct_jumpsuit_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Ventris is a sleek jumpsuit that mixes several rip and stain resistant polymer fabrics for a dynamic design. It also features a half-zip front and adjustable belt to ensure an ideal fit while the soft inner lining makes it an ideal choice for all day wear. The special Crusader Edition was made to be worn by employees of the company and features the sword and C logo on the front.

oct_jumpsuit_01_shared_logoless.label: Ventris Jumpsuit
oct_jumpsuit_01_shared_logoless.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Ventris is a sleek jumpsuit that mixes several rip and stain resistant polymer fabrics for a dynamic design. It also features a half-zip front and adjustable belt to ensure an ideal fit while the soft inner lining makes it an ideal choice for all day wear.

oct_pants_01_shared.label: Altimont Pants
oct_pants_01_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Octagon embraces a classic look and makes it boldly modern with the Altimont. These jodhpur style pants feature a slightly flared hip that becomes snug under the knees thanks to built-in garters. A uniquely shaped front seam secured by silver clips on the waist and shin provide further detailing that's both subtle and stylish.

oct_pants_02_shared.label: Cleo Pants
oct_pants_02_shared.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Elegantly simple, the intriguing design of Cleo becomes more apparent upon closer inspection thanks to a mock fall front lined with subtle diagonal pleats that provide extra texture and detail to the design.

oct_pants_03_01_01.label: Auditor Pants Grey
oct_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Auditor is Octagon's top rated line of tactical dress pants. The Auditor's unique double-weave fibers allow for increased durability when action calls while its modern-cut, flat-front design disappears easily into the crowd. The Auditor also features an attached belt crafted from synthetic leather.

oct_shirt_01_01_01.label: Auditor Shirt Crusader Edition
oct_shirt_01_01_01.description: Octagon's Auditor line of shirts offers the ultimate in urban styling. The simple long-sleeve, button-down shirts feature an accent color and a collar that matches the modern fashion. Octagon's patented altsilk fabric allows for high breathability and a full range of flexible motion.

oct_shirt_03_01_01.label: Auditor Shirt Covalex Edition
oct_shirt_03_01_01.description: Octagon's Auditor line of shirts offers the ultimate in urban styling. The simple short-sleeve, button-down shirts feature an accent color and a collar that matches the modern fashion. Octagon's patented altsilk fabric allows for high breathability and a full range of flexible motion.

oct_shoes_01_01_01.label: Treadlight Shoes
oct_shoes_01_01_01.description: Make business casual with Octagon's elite Treadlight line of shoes. Elegant but unassuming for the truly independent operator, the Treadlight's premium construction looks as at home in the boardroom as it does at the spaceport. Extremely durable rubber-mesh soles and an easy-to-clean artificial leather exterior allow for extended use without the usual wear and tear.

oct_shoes_02.label: Laska Shoes
oct_shoes_02.description: The Laska are two-toned dress shoes that deliver both comfort and style. A dynamic diagonal color separation makes the shoes black in front and white in the back and accentuates the slight rise to the heel. An ideal complement to any outfit, Laska shoes also features supremely comfortable padded insoles and can be easily slipped off and on thanks to side zippers.

omc_light_armor_01_shared.label: Bastion
omc_light_armor_01_shared.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Work harder for longer with GreyCat's award-winning Bastion safety harness. Featuring a reinforced composite harness and pads, the Bastion provides your workers with affordable impact protection that are capable of surviving the harshest of environments.

omc_undersuit_armor.label: Foundation Undersuit
omc_undersuit_armor.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% Greycat's Foundation is just that, their long-standing industrial undersuit has been tested in every kind of worksite imaginable. It's basic, functional and dependable. While that might not sound like much to a marketing team, it makes all the difference to the workers trusting their lives to it day in and day out.

omc_utility_heavy_arms_01_01_01.label: Corbel Arms Smolder
omc_utility_heavy_arms_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -70 / 100 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Originally designed as a strength enhancement suit to give factory workers better lifting power, CDS found wider application in utilizing its defensive capabilities. It's triple-enforced armor plating provides extreme physical protection, with deliberate placing of materials to protect the most vulnerable parts of the body. A series of pneumatic levers offer increased flexibility in the joints, alleviating pressure and weight in key areas to create an accessible and highly protective armor despite its heavy weight. The Smolder edition is primarily gray and black with sharp red segments.

ops_jacket_01_01_01.label: Nyman Jacket
ops_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU OpalSky's Nyman light pullover is perfect to have on hand when lounging poolside or on those chilly nights.

ops_jacket_03_01_01.label: Tuvois Jacket
ops_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Created in collaboration with legendary designer Avon, OpalSky is proud to unveil the Tuvois, an open vest featuring stark, bold styling that's destined to make an impression. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ops_jacket_04_01_01.label: Libio Jacket
ops_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU One of OpalSky's classic pullovers, the Libio features a two-tone asymmetrical pattern and polyweave blend to keep it elegant and striking every time you wear it. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ops_jacket_06_01_01.label: Carragio Jacket Charcoal
ops_jacket_06_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This charcoal jacket is sure to turn heads with its felted, forest green accented sleeves and tails, geometric graphic inlay, and metallic collar accents. The finishing touch to complete the look is a deep burgundy pocket square. Women's sizes currently not available.

ops_jacket_06_01_10.label: Carragio Jacket Grey
ops_jacket_06_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This light grey jacket is sure to turn heads with its diamond accented sleeves and tails, geometric graphic inlay, and metallic collar accents. The finishing touch to complete the look is a deep burgundy pocket square. Women's sizes currently not available.

ops_jacket_07_01_01.label: Waldron Jacket Blue
ops_jacket_07_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Waldron suit exudes sophistication by fusing classic style with contemporary flourishes. OpalSky redefines success with this geometric patterned jacket, featuring a pinstriped false-shirt and tie layered underneath, plus a unique split-seam back.

ops_pants_02_01_01.label: Mivaldi Pants
ops_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Cut to a narrow fit, OpalSky's Mivaldi pants feature bold asymmetrical design with smart yet casual dual material styling, making it the perfect addition to any wardrobe. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

ops_pants_02_01_9tails01.label: Mivaldi Pants (Modified)
ops_pants_02_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU This version of OpalSky's Mivaldi pants has been modified from its original form. Cut to a narrow fit, OpalSky's Mivaldi pants feature bold asymmetrical design with smart yet casual dual material styling, making it the perfect addition to any wardrobe.

ops_pants_05_01_01.label: Lavelle Pants
ops_pants_05_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU Part of the OpalSky Essentials collection, the Lavelle are classic dress pants with a timeless cut and look that make them an indispensable part of any wardrobe.

ops_pants_05_01_9tails01.label: Lavelle Pants (Modified)
ops_pants_05_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU This version of OpalSky's Lavelle pants has been modified from its original form. Part of the OpalSky Essentials collection, the Lavelle are classic dress pants with a timeless cut and look that make them an indispensable part of any wardrobe.

ops_pants_06_01_01.label: Waldron Pants Blue
ops_pants_06_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The Waldron suit fuses classic style with contemporary flourishes in a way that's become definitively OpalSky. The repeating geometric pattern travels the length of the jacket and pants to create a cutting edge look that will turn heads wherever you go.

ops_shirt_04_01_01.label: Torreto Shirt
ops_shirt_04_01_01.description: A versatile addition to your wardrobe, this classic button down has double breast pockets, a spread collar, and pairs beautifully with an simple black tie. Women's sizes currently not available.

ops_shoes_02_01_01.label: Wan Shoes
ops_shoes_02_01_01.description: The Wan are synthetic leather loafers that perfectly balance a classic but modern style. Equally appropriate for work or casual wear, OpalSky designed these supremely comfortable slip-ons with an anti-scuff coating so there's no need for a polish and shine to keep them looking pristine.

ops_shoes_03_01_01.label: Ivers Boots Blue
ops_shoes_03_01_01.description: OpalSky imbued these ankle boots with their iconic panache. The Ivers are thoroughly fashionable but not flashy, and fitted with special KindSole insoles that provide exceptional comfort.

orig_armor_medium_helmet_01.label: Giocoso Racing Helmet Ivory
orig_armor_medium_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -55 / 85 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Inspired by the sleek stylings of the 100 series, the Giocoso is a helmet worthy of Origin Jumpworks. It features a wide face shield to provide excellent peripheral vision and a special internal air flow system to dissipate heat and humidity. In a nod to the 100 series, the back of the helmet slyly integrates the iconic shape language of the ship's tail into the form.

orig_flightsuit_01_01_01.label: Origin 350r Racing Flight Suit
orig_flightsuit_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Flight Suit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +100% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Embody luxury, style, and speed by stepping into this official flight suit worn by the Origin racing team. This gray and yellow flight suit features the Origin and 350r logo in several prominent places.

orig_flightsuit_helmet_01_01_01.label: Origin 350r Racing Helmet
orig_flightsuit_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Plunge headlong into extreme speed in comfort and style with the Origin racing helmet. This gray and yellow helmet sports the Origin logo and features a wide visor for unobstructed views as you speed by.

outlaw_legacy_armor_heavy_arms_01_01_9ta.label: Citadel Arms (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_heavy_arms_01_01_9ta.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s This version of Kastak Arms' Citadel arms has been modified from its original form. Kastak Arms' aggressive design reached its peak with the Citadel. Layers of reinforced armor plating provide maximum security while its striking angular silhouette cuts an imposing figure.

outlaw_legacy_armor_heavy_core_01_01_9ta.label: Citadel Core (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_heavy_core_01_01_9ta.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Backpacks: All This version of Kastak Arms' Citadel core has been modified from its original form. Kastak Arms' aggressive design reached its peak with the Citadel. Layers of reinforced armor plating provide maximum security while its striking angular silhouette cuts an imposing figure.

outlaw_legacy_armor_light_arms_01_04_9ta.label: Lynx Arms (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_light_arms_01_04_9ta.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -31 / 61 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Kastak Arms' Lynx arms has been modified from its original form. Maintain your mobility with the Lynx combat armor. A high tech polymer weave allows the wearer to withstand enough damage to quickly escape danger. The suit's striking look became famous after being worn by the Seeker in the widely popular "Fire and Fury" vids of the mid-2800s.

outlaw_legacy_armor_light_helmet_01_04_9.label: Oracle Helmet (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_light_helmet_01_04_9.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -31 / 61 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Kastak Arms' Oracle helmet has been modified from its original form. Kastak Arms' Oracle provides an enclosed reinforced plating helmet with integrated diamond laminate over the eyes. It allows for maximum situational awareness while keeping the wearer safe in space and on the battlefield. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

outlaw_legacy_armor_medium_helmet_01_01_.label: Morningstar Helmet (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_medium_helmet_01_01_.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Kastak Arms' Morningstar helmet has been modified from its original form. Show no weakness while wearing the Morningstar. This fully-enclosed combat helmet is tailored to endure a variety of combat situations and provides protection against an array of threats from ballistic to concussive to energy. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

outlaw_legacy_armor_medium_legs_01_01_9t.label: Inquisitor Legs (Modified)
outlaw_legacy_armor_medium_legs_01_01_9t.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -56 / 86 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 4.0 µSCU This version of Kastak Arms' Inquisitor legs has been modified from its original form. Strength and speed combine with the new Inquisitor armor set. Strong yet lightweight alloy plating works alongside reinforced polyfiber weaving to save your skin, but not slow you down. When combined with Kastak Arms' intimidating aesthetic, it's easy to see why this medium armor has become infamous across the Empire.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor.label: Citadel-SE Arms Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Kastak Arms' aggressive design reached its peak with the Citadel. Layers of reinforced armor plating provide maximum security while its striking angular silhouette cuts an imposing figure.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_arms_02.label: Citadel-SE Arms Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_arms_02.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Kastak Arms' aggressive design reached its peak with the Citadel. Layers of reinforced armor plating provide maximum security while its striking angular silhouette cuts an imposing figure. The Citadel-SE features a flourish of stylish script on the front chest plate and provides the same stellar protections thanks to advanced nanocomposite ballistic materials.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_core.label: Citadel-SE Core Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_core.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Backpacks: All Kastak Arms' aggressive design reached its peak with the Citadel. Layers of reinforced armor plating provide maximum security while its striking angular silhouette cuts an imposing figure.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_core_02.label: Citadel-SE Core Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_core_02.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. The Citadel-SE features a flourish of stylish script on the front chest plate and provides the same stellar protections thanks to advanced nanocomposite ballistic materials.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_helmet.label: Fortifier Helmet Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_helmet.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Protect your most valuable asset with the Fortifier. Intended for extremely hostile environments, this heavy helmet makes up for its limited visibility with extra plating that protects the neck and back of the head.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_helmet_neoni.label: Fortifier Helmet Neoni Mod
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_helmet_neoni.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Show that you serve no master with the Neoni modification for the Fortifier helmet. Drawing inspiration from the myths of old, this menacing variant of the Kastak Arms Fortifier features a devilish paint job, fang-filled grin, and pointed horns. Providing protection and intimidation in one memorable helmet. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_legs.label: Citadel-SE Legs Maroon
outlaw_legacy_heavy_armor_legs.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. This armor set masterfully mixes reinforced plating with patented new materials that are light-weight and flexible, yet rated to withstand heavy damage allowing the wearer to be fashionable, light on their feet, and able to withstand serious firepower. The Mark I variant is primarily icy white with blue and red highlights.

r6p_boots_01_01_9tails01.label: Protean Boots (Modified)
r6p_boots_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of R6 Pro's Protean boots has been modified from its original form. These rugged and durable boots from R6 Pro are perfect to wear on your ship or while planetside. Padded insole cushions ensure they'll also be comfortable in any situation.

r6p_boots_02_01_01.label: Ponos Boots
r6p_boots_02_01_01.description: Quite simply, R6 Pro's Ponos boots were built for backbreaking work. Constructed out of Thermosulate technology, these waterproof and insulated workboots are rated for sub-arctic environments while the composite outsole ignores hazards to maintain traction when you need it most.

r6p_boots_04_01_01.label: Cerrado Boots Wood
r6p_boots_04_01_01.description: These trail-rated Cerrado Boots from R6 Pro are comfortable, waterproof, and built to last. The tall cuff and lacing at the top provide a seamless combination of exceptional ankle support and the stability.

r6p_boots_05.label: Tussock Boots Coal
r6p_boots_05.description: A proprietary blend of natural and artificial leather provides the Tussock Boot with unbeatable toughness, making it the perfect fit for both work and leisure.

r6p_glasses_01_01_01.label: Yaeger Aviator Glasses
r6p_glasses_01_01_01.description: When the future's looking bright, reach for these aviator shades from R6 Pro. With a design that has remained an acknowledged classic for centuries, you can salute the trailblazing aviators of the past as you seek tomorrow's new horizons.

r6p_gloves_01.label: Baru Gloves (Left Only)
r6p_gloves_01.description: Ensure you hands are always dry and at the right temperature with the Baru gloves. An advanced sensor system protected by a metal plate on the back of the hand monitors and regulates conditions within the glove. A patented synthetic leather woven with special microfibers works with the sensors and a strap cuff provides a snug fit.

r6p_gloves_02_01_01.label: Aster Gloves Sand
r6p_gloves_02_01_01.description: Pros at keeping your hands safe without sacrificing dexterity, the slip-resistant Aster Gloves deliver solid protection and lasting warmth during chilly or hostile conditions. The tough synthetic leather breaks in well and will stand up to years of frequent use.

r6p_shoes_02_01_01.label: Tona Shoes
r6p_shoes_02_01_01.description: Perfect for hiking or fieldwork, the Tona from R6 Pro is a low-top sneaker built out of breathable Cheofreme materials which not only provide extra protection against impacts, but keep your feet dry.

r6p_shoes_03.label: Varhey Boots
r6p_shoes_03.description: The Varhey by R6Pro is a widely popular lightweight workboot made of a durable, but flexible, polyweave that ensures a safe, snug fit.

r6p_shoes_04.label: Campo Shoes
r6p_shoes_04.description: Slip into comfort with the Campo shoes, which have a supportive midsole, cushioned footbed, and a molded, slip-resistant outsole. These ankle high slip-ons deliver an ideal fit thanks to two adjustable straps with metal clasps.

rmb_gloves_01.label: Cody Gloves
rmb_gloves_01.description: The Cody gloves are pros at keeping hands warm whether you're holding a multi-tool in a mine or an ice-cold drink at the bar. Made for frigid environments but stylish enough to be worn anywhere.

rmb_goggles_01_01_9tails01.label: Avalos Scout Goggles (Modified)
rmb_goggles_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Rambler's Avalos Scout goggles has been modified from its original form. Tech meets tough with the Avalos Scout goggles. Their unique and sturdy frame ensures that the lenses remain intact even after unexpected impacts or sudden atmospheric changes. Built for harsh environments but bold enough to be worn anywhere.

rmb_goggles_04.label: XS-90 Explorer Goggles
rmb_goggles_04.description: With a sleek design suitable for all face shapes, the XS-98 Explorer goggles ensure a fog-free view in any climate, and come with a patented coating that offers strong UV-protection and cuts down on unwanted glare.

rmb_jacket_01_01_01.label: Kutty Jacket
rmb_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Rambler's Kutty two-tone jacket features a racer-strap collar and an asymmetrical button design to bring a vintage look into the modern era. Women's sizes currently out of stock.

rmb_jacket_01_01_9tails01.label: Kutty Jacket (Modified)
rmb_jacket_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This version of Rambler's Kutty jacket has been modified from its original form. Rambler's Kutty two-tone jacket features a racer-strap collar and an asymmetrical button design to bring a vintage look into the modern era.

rmb_pants_01_01_01.label: Pollux Pants
rmb_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Durable comfort becomes fashion forward thanks to the edgy details in the Pollux pants from Rambler. The thick, woven fabric is reinforced with leather panels and accented by the unique lace front. Men's sizes currently not available.

roo_tvshow_host.label: Nightfire Dress
roo_tvshow_host.description: Republic of One dares to blur the line between power and pleasure with Nightfire, the new dress from famed designer, Callista. Featuring a form-fitting knit black microweave with bold gold trim, the high, buckled collar features striking cutouts on the chest, shoulders and arms to keep you as evocative as what you're wearing.

rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01.label: Morozov-CH Backpack
rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 150K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Comfortably carry vital gear with the Morozov-CH backpack. This softshell bag is made with an advanced duraweave that's lightweight yet ready for battlefield action. It also features several easy to access pockets and a plethora of straps to keep supplies secure and tight to your back.

rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01_01_9tails01.label: Morozov-CH Backpack (Modified)
rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01_01_9tails01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 150K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy This version of Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems' Morozov-CH backpack has been modified from its original form. Comfortably carry vital gear with the Morozov-CH backpack. This softshell bag is made with an advanced duraweave that's lightweight yet ready for battlefield action. It also features several easy to access pockets and a plethora of straps to keep supplies secure and tight to your back.

rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01_03_01.label: Morozov-CH Backpack Lifeforce
rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_01_03_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 150K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Comfortably carry vital gear with the Morozov-CH backpack. This softshell bag is made with an advanced duraweave that's lightweight yet ready for battlefield action. It also features several easy to access pockets and a plethora of straps to keep supplies secure and tight to your back. The Lifeforce edition was designed with first responders in mind with a highly visible white, red, and grey color scheme.

rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_04_01_01.label: Morozov-CH Backpack Pyrotechnic
rrs_combat_heavy_backpack_04_01_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 150K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy Comfortably carry vital gear with the RRS Morozov-CH backpack. This softshell bag is made with an advanced duraweave that's lightweight yet ready for all manner of industrial work. Rating: -38 / 68 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s RSI's Venture helmet is built from impact-resistant composites and designed to weather the harshest of environments. It also features an anti-scuff laminate faceplate that offers an unparalleled upward field of view, providing unobstructed sightlines to whatever wonders you discover. The special Pathfinder edition is purple with gold highlights that match the sleek base suit.

rsi_explorer_light_helmet_01_concierge.label: Venture Helmet Executive
rsi_explorer_light_helmet_01_concierge.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -38 / 68 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s RSI's Venture helmet is built from impact-resistant composites and designed to weather the harshest of environments. It also features an anti-scuff laminate faceplate that offers an unparalleled upward field of view, providing unobstructed sightlines to whatever wonders you discover. And now you no longer have to choose between exceptional styling and performance thanks to the tasteful gold detailing only available with the special limited Executive Edition.

rsi_explorer_light_legs_01_01_coramor.label: Venture Legs Lovestruck
rsi_explorer_light_legs_01_01_coramor.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -41 / 71 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU Robert Space Industries’ Venture Explorer Suit provides exceptional protection against the dangers of space. Designed for those who don't know where their next adventure might go, the suit combines comfort and safety without sacrificing mobility. This special Lovestruck edition features a stylish metallic pink and black color scheme inspired by the colors of the Coramor festival.

rsi_explorer_undersuit_01.label: Venture Undersuit Alpha
rsi_explorer_undersuit_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Whether you’re discovering bold new frontiers or simply stretching your legs after a long spaceflight, Robert Space Industries’ Venture Explorer Suit takes vacuum-safe wear to the next level with its incorporation of top-of-class safety features seamlessly blended with phenomenal freedom of movement.

rsi_light_utility_backpack_01.label: MacFlex "Rucksack" Backpack
rsi_light_utility_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Light Backpack Carrying Capacity: 50K µSCU Core Compatibility: All The MacFlex Backpack is a back-mounted hard-shell case that provides extra commodity storage options. Whether bringing extra supplies on a long excursion or filling it with ore after a successful mining run, the MacFlex Backpack will be there to carry the load.

rsi_odyssey_caudillo_helmet_01_01_01.label: Caudillo Helmet Cobalt
rsi_odyssey_caudillo_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Adept at surviving firefights in both atmosphere and in space, the Caudillo helmet provides solid head protection while offering the wearer the stylish look of classical armor thanks to its visually striking metal crest. The Cobalt variant is being offered as a limited edition run.

rsi_odyssey_undersuit_01_shared.label: Odyssey II Undersuit Alpha
rsi_odyssey_undersuit_01_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU The latest generation of RSI's classic Odyssey undersuit features a new rugged design capable of withstanding the harshest of conditions in space or planetside. Built using the latest microweave technology, the Odyssey II undersuit provides hours of comfort in locations that are anything but comfortable.

rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_01_01_coram.label: Odyssey II Racing Helmet Lovestruck
rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_01_01_coram.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Continuing RSI's legacy of rugged and reliable helmets, the Odyssey II streamlines the original design into a lighter frame without sacrificing durability. This omni-purpose helmet was extensively field-tested in a variety of conditions and environments to keep you safe every time you suit up. This special Lovestruck edition features a stylish metallic pink and black color scheme inspired by the colors of the Coramor festival.

rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_01_01_opaqu.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_02_01_01.label: Azrael Racing Helmet
rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s When flying through the dangerous reaches of space, it's common for brave pilots to routinely face down death as part of their every day. Now with the Azrael helmet from CC's Conversions you can look the part with the grim visage of a skull peering out from beneath the visor of this otherwise normal looking helmet.

rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_02_02_01.label: Azrael Racing Helmet Ruby
rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_02_02_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. rsi_odyssey_undersuit_helmet_02_03_01.label: Azrael Racing Helmet Sapphire

rsi_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01.label: Odyssey Helmet Tan
rsi_pilot_flightsuit_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Racing Helmet Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s RSI's Odyssey helmet is so light and unobtrusive, you'll almost forget you're wearing it. The durable impact-resistant carbon fiber construction with shock-absorbing foam inserts and a single piece molded laminate visor that provides maximum field of view horizontally and vertically.

rsi_utility_heavy_backpack_01_01_01.label: Zeus Exploration Suit Backpack
rsi_utility_heavy_backpack_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K SP Core Compatibility: Heavy The Zeus Exploration Suit has been designed to honor some of the earliest space pioneers, the RSI crews who developed and tested the Zeus, the first commercial spacecraft. While the suit is styled to match those used centuries ago with attachments for a helmet and backpack, it contains all of the modern technology and conveniences expected by present-day explorers. The Zeus offers good resistance to harsh environments and excellent storage space for sample-collecting during EVAs.

rsi_utility_heavy_backpack_01_01_03.label: Zeus Exploration Suit Backpack Solar
rsi_utility_heavy_backpack_01_01_03.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K SP Core Compatibility: Heavy The Zeus Exploration Suit has been designed to honor some of the earliest space pioneers, the RSI crews who developed and tested the Zeus, the first commercial spacecraft. While the suit is styled to match those used centuries ago with attachments for a helmet and backpack, it contains all of the modern technology and conveniences expected by present-day explorers. The Zeus offers good resistance to harsh environments and excellent storage space for sample-collecting during EVAs. The Solar variant honors the orange color scheme worn by RSI test pilots.

rsi_utility_heavy_backpack_02_02_01_asd.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 180K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy This heavy duty backpack is compatible with the Stirling suit and provides a convenient storage solution. The Zeus offers good resistance to harsh environments and excellent storage space for sample-collecting during EVAs. The Starscape variant honors the black color scheme worn by RSI engineers.

sasu_armor_light_helmet_01_01_9tails01.label: Mandible Helmet (Modified)
sasu_armor_light_helmet_01_01_9tails01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Sakura Sun's Mandible helmet has been modified from its original form. Show that you're ready to 'bug out' with the exclusive Mandible helmet from Sakura Sun. Lightweight plating provides protection while metal fangs protrude from the front for an intimidating insectoid shape that walks the line between fun and frightening.

sasu_combat_heavy_helmet_01.label: Voidripper Helmet
sasu_combat_heavy_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -90 / 115 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Embrace your inner beast by equipping the Voidripper helmet. Layers of heavy armor plating provide premium protection and an unforgettable visage featuring a heavy brow and piercing turquoise eyes. Sakura Sun designers complimented this striking form with supreme function, including a state of the art sensor suite attached to the helmet's right side. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

sasu_combat_heavy_helmet_01_01_9tails01.label: Voidripper Helmet (Modified)
sasu_combat_heavy_helmet_01_01_9tails01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_01.label: Star Kitten Helmet
sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Celebrate your love of Genady Kuzo's classic Star Kitten cartoon with this commemorative helmet from Sakura Sun. The custom molding for this medium helmet faithfully recreates the show's icon character design without sacrificing its defensive capabilities. Integrated accent lights provide pops of color and highlight the helmet's unique silhouette. The pink Star Kitten helmet is sure to be a collectible among fans of the show and unusual armor enthusiasts.

sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_10.label: Star Kitten Sally Helmet
sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_10.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Integrated accent lights provide pops of color and highlight the helmet's unique silhouette. The helmet is sure to be a collectible among fans of the show and unusual armor enthusiasts. The Star Kitten Sally edition is white to look like the show's good-natured main character.

sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_19.label: Star Kitten Damon Helmet
sasu_medium_armor_helmet_01_01_19.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. The Star Kitten Damon edition is primarily black to look like Sally's close friend who constantly tempts her to join his mischievous adventures.

scu_apron_01.label: Clean and Clear Work Apron
scu_apron_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Don't let your clothes suffer when you're just doing your job. Designed to be waterproof, stain resistant and easy to clean, the Clean and Clear work apron is ideal protection for your clothes when your job requires getting down and dirty.

scu_gloves_02_01_01.label: Davin Work Gloves
scu_gloves_02_01_01.description: Field-tested for over fifty years, you can find Davin work gloves at numerous sites and ships around the Empire. Stegman's rugged construction and comfort lining have made them a customer favorite.

scu_goggles_01_01_9tails01.label: Haruspec Goggles (Modified)
scu_goggles_01_01_9tails01.description: This version of Stegman's Haruspec goggles has been modified from its original form. Supremely comfortable yet light as a feather, the Haruspec goggles also provide excellent protection against the elements thanks to their sturdy side shields. Stegman's fitted the goggles with polycarbonate performance lenses and a special slip-resistant nose pad to ensure they stay in place.

scu_hat_04.label: FirmWear Hard Hat
scu_hat_04.description: The FirmWear helmet is ready to go to work with you. Stegman's use of armor-rated plastic will keep it light on your head while still delivering top-of-the-line protection.

scu_hat_05.label: FirmWear SoundGuard Hard Hat
scu_hat_05.description: The FirmWear SoundGuard helmet is ready to go to work with you. Stegman's use of armor-rated plastic alloys keeps it light on your head while still delivering top-of-the-line protection. The SoundGuard edition includes earcups that you can comfortably wear all day when noise reduction is essential.

scu_jacket_01_01_01.label: ClipVest Work Harness
scu_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Stegman's ClipVest is a multi-purpose work harness that keeps your tools handy when and where you need them. Built from industrial strength materials, this harness offers a back piece to help alleviate strain and provide counterbalance.

scu_jacket_02_01_01.label: IndVest Jacket
scu_jacket_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 5K µSCU Keep your tools within easy reach with Stegman's IndVest. Made from industrial strength materials, this is a rare jacket that's both stylish and sensible.

scu_jacket_03_01_01.label: Cordimon Jacket
scu_jacket_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 3K µSCU Stegman's classic worker's jacket has been a staple of job sites for over seventy years. This duotone pattern is cut from the toughest material meaning you can wear it anywhere, anytime. It may not be armor, but it damn sure feels like it.

scu_jacket_04_01_01.label: ODOK Jacket
scu_jacket_04_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU A plain jacket covered by a thick apron, shoulder pauldrons, dust flaps, and a reinforced metal collar complete with tether. Women's sizes currently not available.

scu_jacket_07.label: ToolSafe Vest
scu_jacket_07.description: Carrying Capacity: 10000 µSCU The ToolSafe Vest is constructed with thick materials accentuated by high-visibility straps to ensure worker safety. The inclusion of numerous pouches gives this jacket a generous amount of storage to make it a staple of worksites everywhere.

scu_jacket_08_01_01.label: Vagabond Jacket
scu_jacket_08_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. This lightweight layered jacket-and-poncho combination won't tie you up when things get tight. Finished with a hooded cowl, cross straps, and kit-webbing, the Vagabond is ready for whatever your day may have in store.

scu_jacket_08_01_10.label: Vagabond Jacket Molten
scu_jacket_08_01_10.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. This lightweight layered jacket-and-poncho combination won't tie you up when things get tight. Finished with a hooded cowl, cross straps, and kit-webbing, the Vagabond is ready for whatever your day may have in store. The Molten version is dyed a deep red to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

scu_jacket_08_01_11.label: Vagabond Jacket Sleet
scu_jacket_08_01_11.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. This lightweight layered jacket-and-poncho combination won't tie you up when things get tight. Finished with a hooded cowl, cross straps, and kit-webbing, the Vagabond is ready for whatever your day may have in store. The Sleet version is dyed a well-worn grey to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

scu_jacket_08_01_15.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. The Molehill version is dyed a neutral brown to keep you subtle, but not unsightly.

scu_jacket_08_01_18.label: Vagabond Jacket Grime Blue
scu_jacket_08_01_18.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. This lightweight layered jacket-and-poncho combination won't tie you up when things get tight. Finished with a hooded cowl, cross straps, and kit-webbing, the Vagabond is ready for whatever your day may have in store.

scu_jacket_08_02_01.label: Vagabond Jacket Red Menace
scu_jacket_08_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU When you need to move like your life depends on it. This lightweight layered jacket-and-poncho combination won't tie you up when things get tight. Finished with a hooded cowl, cross straps, and kit-webbing, the Vagabond is ready for whatever your day may have in store. The Red Menace version is dyed gray and features bold red striping.

scu_jumpsuit_01_01_01.label: Ambit Coverall
scu_jumpsuit_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.4K µSCU The Ambit Coverall is ideal jobsite attire with its multiple pockets, special super-stain resistant fabric, and a generous cut to allow for unrestricted movement. Step in, zip up, and work all day in comfort thanks to Stegman's.

scu_mask_01_01_01.label: Tanuki Mask
scu_mask_01_01_01.description: This sealed face mask from Stegman's provides all-day comfort with easy-wear gaskets around the red-trimmed goggles that provide a light but firm seal while the lower half of the mask provides a respirator to help you breathe in harsh work conditions.

scu_pants_02_01_01.label: Edgewear Pants
scu_pants_02_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 4K µSCU Stegman's Edgewear utility clothes are made from reinforced nylon weaves and lined with temperature-rated quilted technology to provide you with a little extra protection while on the jobsite. Double knees, reinforced joint pads and extra pockets add comfort and durability to this field-tested and worker-approved clothing line.

scu_pants_03_01_01.label: Clempt Pants
scu_pants_03_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU Stegman's factory pants have been taken to the next level with the Clempt line. These rugged all-purpose pants come with double knees for extra comfort and protection and are made from tough composite weave fabric to last as long as the work needs.

scu_pants_04.label: Caret Pants Dark Grey
scu_pants_04.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU With the fortitude of workwear and the comfort of khakis, the Caret pants are sure to become your standard go-to for tough jobs. Built with strong fabric and quality stitching so you can focus on what needs to be done.

scu_pants_05.label: DuraWork Pants
scu_pants_05.description: Carrying Capacity: 2000 µSCU Made of a durable synthetic material, Stegman's designed the DuraWork to provide a comfortable and reliable clothing option to workers around the 'verse.

scu_service_apron_01.label: Artisan Apron
scu_service_apron_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU With a reinforced front pocket and colorful accent piping, Stegman's Artisan apron is a reliable choice for your next shift.

scu_service_apron_02.label: Dash Apron
scu_service_apron_02.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Stegman's Dash apron is made from a thick, stain-resistant polyfiber that not only protects the wearer but looks as good at the end of the shift as it does at the beginning. The practical design is embellished with a bold waistline and pocket detailing alongside a fun accent color panel on the lower skirt.

scu_service_hat_01.label: Tipper Hat
scu_service_hat_01.description: The Tipper hat from Stegman's features a pre-curved bill for comfortable wear from day one.

scu_service_hat_02.label: Tipper Hat
scu_service_hat_02.description: The Tipper hat from Stegman's features a pre-curved bill for comfortable wear from day one.

scu_service_hat_03.label: Spruce Cap Kel-To
scu_service_hat_03.description: Lightweight and constructed from a sweat absorbant material that is easy to wash, Stegman's Spruce cap is ideal for comfortable all day wear.

scu_service_pants_01.label: TopLine Apron Pants
scu_service_pants_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 2K µSCU With an attached apron and deep side pockets, the TopLine pants from Stegman's make even the toughest service jobs a little bit easier.

scu_shirt_01_01_01.label: Day One Shirt
scu_shirt_01_01_01.description: This Henley shirt from Stegman's is made with AirFlow technology, a stain-resistant, air-cooled fabric that keeps you comfortable and dry.

shb_security_uniform_01_shared.label: Regal-CS1 Helmet Scarlet
shb_security_uniform_01_shared.description: The Regal Combat Set from RRS is a cost-effective way to provide a little extra protection on the job. Whether you're running local security or just want a little extra assurance on the long haul, the Regal's StopTac plating provides extra protection for you head, vitals and extremities. The Regal's helmet features a uniquely angled design intended to increase chances of ricochets and the integrated visor tech gives you protection while not hampering your visibilty.

shb_security_uniform_undersuit_shared.label: ProtSkin Undersuit Scarlet
shb_security_uniform_undersuit_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% RRS' ProtSkin combat undersuit provides basic protection against impacts and scuffs while serving as a foundation for compatible body armor options.

shb_starfarerpilot_flightsuit.label: GP-88 Undersuit
shb_starfarerpilot_flightsuit.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% The GP-88 is a general protection suit, providing basic impact resistance, EVA upgrades and a sealed helmet mount so users can work in toxic atmospheres.

slaver_armor_heavy_arms_01.label: Defiance Arms Tactical
slaver_armor_heavy_arms_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -72 / 102 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Incorporating the same manufacturing know-how and expertise that the UEE Marines have come to rely on, Clark Defense Systems has designed their civilian-line of Defiance heavy armors to stand firm in the face of even the most adverse combat scenarios with its three-star rated protective plating and fully integrated mobility framework.

slaver_armor_heavy_helmet_01.label: Defiance Helmet Tactical
slaver_armor_heavy_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -72 / 102 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Defiance features a fully enclosed battle helmet constructed with two layers of composite weaves underneath armor plating, providing you maximum protection against penetrating and concussive attacks. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

slaver_armor_light_01_shared.label: Calico Arms Tactical
slaver_armor_light_01_shared.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -39 / 69 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Designed to be an EVA-compliant light combat suit, the Calico set is the perfect armor suit for infiltrators, snipers, thieves, basically anyone who likes to avoid kicking in doors. Built out of a combination of PAB3 armor and a custom helmet, it can help you weather some incoming fire without slowing you down.

slaver_armor_light_helmet_02.label: Renegade Helmet Tactical
slaver_armor_light_helmet_02.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -39 / 69 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Kastak Arm's Renegade combat helmet is a light but durable infantry helmet designed for added protection and impact-reduction during in-atmosphere operations. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

slaver_armor_light_legs_01_01_9tails01.label: Calico Legs (Modified)
slaver_armor_light_legs_01_01_9tails01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -39 / 69 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU This version of Kastak Arms' Calico legs has been modified from its original form. Built out of a combination of PAB3 armor and a custom helmet, it can help you weather some incoming fire without slowing you down.

slaver_armor_medium_01_shared.label: DustUp Arms Tactical
slaver_armor_medium_01_shared.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -60 / 90 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The DustUp has your back if you’re looking to get into some trouble. The body plating is built off of the same CDS undersuit used by the UEE Marines, it adds reconstructed Omni-Role mkII pieces to give you solid protection against incoming fire, but the real gem is the modified helmet. That thing was built to withstand explosions, so it should totally protect you against some shots. The whole thing’s been reasonably tested against vacuum too, so you can feel free to EVA all you want without worrying about dying.

slaver_armor_medium_01_core.label: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -60 / 90 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 6.4 µSCU Backpacks: Medium, Light The DustUp has your back if you’re looking to get into some trouble. Sure to be a collectible, this custom molding also features embedded lighting to create a stunning silhouette without sacrificing any of the defensive capabilities of this medium helmet. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

slaver_undersuit_armor_01_01_01.label: Stoneskin Undersuit
slaver_undersuit_armor_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -77 / 107 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Overlord armor lets your foes know that you mean business. srvl_heavy_helmet_01.label: Overlord Helmet Supernova

Rating: -77 / 107 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Overlord helmet delivers heavy armor protection while using a special lightweight composite plating that makes it feel like nothing's there. Visor is AR crosshair compatible.

srvl_helmet_01.label: Deadhead Helmet
srvl_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -50 / 80 °C Remind your enemies that death is coming with the Deadhead helmet. In place of a visor, the ghastly visage of a Human skull, lit from within by an infernal glow, is sure to send any opponent running.

srvl_jacket_01_01_01.label: Rustic Jacket Brown
srvl_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU Assembled from an old Dusters flag, salvaged armor, and derelict ship parts, this serviceable jacket is secured to its wearer via sturdy leather straps.

srvl_mask_01_01_01.label: Sureshot Mask
srvl_mask_01_01_01.description: This white ablative ceramic mask is as intimidating as it is striking, with embedded scars to let them know that you aren't just another pretty face.

srvl_mask_01_02_01.label: Sureshot Mask Red Menace
srvl_mask_01_02_01.description: This white ablative ceramic mask is as intimidating as it is striking, with embedded scars to let them know that you aren't just another pretty face. The Red Menace edition features bold markings across the faceplate.

srvl_pants_01_01_01.label: Restored Pants Brown
srvl_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU These pants may have seen better days, but they've got a lot of life left in them yet. Years of use have made them more comfortable than the day they were purchased.

srvl_shirt_01_01_01.label: Good Enough Shirt Brown
srvl_shirt_01_01_01.description: This shirt from an unknown manufacturer has been mended and refashioned to give it a second life. Half of the right sleeve was beyond repair, so the rest of it was turned into an elbow cuff.

srvl_undersuit_01.label: Second Life Undersuit
srvl_undersuit_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Featuring the same relatively reliable construction as the Why Not helmet, the Second Life takes some of those tattered old undersuits and gives them new life.

srvl_undersuit_02_01_01.label: Wastelander Undersuit Ransacker
srvl_undersuit_02_01_01.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Roughly sewn together from a variety of ransacked materials, the Wastelander undersuit will just about do the job.

srvl_undersuit_02_01_02.label: Wastelander Undersuit
srvl_undersuit_02_01_02.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Roughly sewn together from a variety of ransacked materials, the Wastelander undersuit will just about do the job. This version features a bold rust color.

srvl_undersuit_helmet_01.label: Why Not? Flight Helmet
srvl_undersuit_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Flight Helmet Damage Reduction: 15% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Just because a helmet's broken doesn't mean it's useless. This scavenged undersuit helmet should provide suitable protection against vacuum. If you like taking chances, take a chance on this. Why not?

srvl_utility_light_arms_01_01_07.label: Outback Arms Grime Blue

thp_gloves_01.label: Ixonia Gloves Green
thp_gloves_01.description: When you're preparing for the tough day ahead, don't leave your hands ungarded. These gloves feature built-in knuckle plates, secured to the durable synthetic leather and cotton fabric with a strong polymer-reinforced thread.

thp_helmet_01.label: Ixonia Helmet Desert Camo
thp_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Made to withstand the heaviest hits, the Ixonia helmet was crafted with the needs of on-the-ground combat in mind. It features a hybrid composite shell and foam inner core that work in tandem to ensure stability and high impact-reisistance. An optional hood and camo cape provide protection from the wind when worn with the matching jacket. Please note that this mask is not space-rated and should only be worn in naturally breathable environs.

thp_jacket_01.label: Ixonia Armor Desert Camo
thp_jacket_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -80 / 110 °C Radiation Protection: 52800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 251.1 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Backpacks: All Tehachapi knows that you can never have too much storage. This lightweight protective gear comes with a sturdy tool belt, reinforced pouches, and hidden pockets so you can be sure your cargo will stay in place even when you're at your most active. An optional hood and adorned cape provide protection from the wind when worn with the matching helmet.

thp_light_arms_01.label: Aztalan Arms
thp_light_arms_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -38 / 68 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Fear no frontier while wearing the Aztalan armor. This mixture of armor plating and reinforced fabrics will keep you safe yet swift on your feet. Tehachapi's masterful design gives the armor a subtle yet unmistakable frontier style that also providing ample storage. Suitable for everything from sand dunes to bustling backstreets, the Aztalan is the ideal choice for your next adventure.

tmbl_vest_biker_01_01_9tails01.label: Renegade Cut Vest (Modified)
tmbl_vest_biker_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This version of the Renegade Cut vest has been modified from its original form. Reveal your inner rebel with the Renegade Cut vest, featuring a wide notched lapel and metal studs on the left shoulder. High quality synthetic leather and an insulated lining give the vest both comfort and style.

tmbl_vest_racing_01_01_9tails01.label: Renegade Racing Vest (Modified)
tmbl_vest_racing_01_01_9tails01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU This version of the Renegade Racing vest has been modified from its original form. The Renegade Racing vest provides protection against road rash without adding to your lap time. Graphene-based nanocomposite plating makes the vest extremely light yet ultra-durable. Ideal for everything from idyllic rides to heart pounding last laps.

uba_prison_backpack_01.label: Inmate Workpack
uba_prison_backpack_01.description: Item Type: Light Backpack Carrying Capacity: 50K µSCU Core Compatibility: All This sturdy Inmate Workpack provides ample storage capacity and evenly distributes weight across the wearer's back allowing them to carry more during every shift. It also features secure bottom straps to allow you to determine oxygen tank size on a per inmate basis, minimizing escape risk.

uba_prison_undersuit_01.label: Inmate Worksuit
uba_prison_undersuit_01.description: Item Type: Worksuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -75 / 75 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU The Inmate Worksuit is a durable and highly visible worksuit designed to survive harsh conditions often faced by inmates during work release programs. The worksuit integrated reinforced padding for protection with a strong synthetic weave that meets the minimal government standard for thermal insulation while keeping costs low. The sturdy workpack provides ample storage capacity and evenly distributes weight across the wearer's back allowing them to carry more during every shift. It also features secure bottom straps to allow you to determine oxygen tank size on a per inmate basis, minimizing escape risk.

uba_prison_undersuit_helmet_01.label: Inmate Work Helmet
uba_prison_undersuit_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Worksuit Helmet Damage Reduction: 10% Temp. Rating: -75 / 75 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s The Inmate Work Helmet features a highly visible design for easy visual tracking, alongside an anti-fogging, crack resistant faceplate sealed into reinforced plating that's rated to withstand falling debris, which helps minimize costly accidents to your labor pool.

Rating: -61 / 91 °C Radiation Protection: 26400 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Paladin came out of Virgil's industrial division as a prototype helmet for salvage and repair operations. While the helmet's look stayed the same, Virgil reworked the design to use a combat rated, durable alloy for its distinct frame and reinforced the plating protecting the back of the head.

Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s Styled on classic racing helmets, the Tailwind helmet offers crucial insulation and neck support from the rigors of the racing cockpit. The double layered visor provides essential protection from glare whilst ensuring the helmet remains airtight and that the wearer's vision remains unimpeded. The Big Bite edition features jagged teeth and menacing eyes set against a camo green.

vgl_heavy_backpack_01_03_01.label: Warden Backpack Keystone
vgl_heavy_backpack_01_03_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Backpack Carrying Capacity: 150K µSCU Core Compatibility: Heavy This hard backpack from Virgil, Ltd. makes travel easy. Whether you need a place to carry your weapons or you've decided to bring some extra rations along for a long journey, this backpack was designed to handle any occasion. The interior features a generous, closeable pocket to keep your small items from falling out of place. The Keystone edition features a white, gray and blue finish with URW logos.

vgl_specialist_heavy_helmet_01.label: Sangar Helmet
vgl_specialist_heavy_helmet_01.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -90 / 115 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s The Sangar helmet from Vigil is both practical and eye-catching, thanks to a prominent brow ridge meant to absorb and disperse strikes through the helmet's special impact-resistant inner lining. Featuring high quality diamond laminate lens over the eyes and a top tier dual sensor air filtration system protruding from the front like fangs, Virgil has ensured that the Sangar helmet can take a beating and look good doing it in every situation from a hostile environment to a frantic firefight.

vgl_specialist_heavy_helmet_01_01_9tails.label: Sangar Helmet (Modified)
vgl_specialist_heavy_helmet_01_01_9tails.description: Item Type: Heavy Armor Damage Reduction: 40% Temp. Rating: -90 / 115 °C Radiation Protection: 26800 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s This version of Virgil's Sangar helmet has been modified from its original form. The Sangar helmet from Vigil is both practical and eye-catching, thanks to a prominent brow ridge meant to absorb and disperse strikes through the helmet's special impact-resistant inner lining. Featuring high quality diamond laminate lens over the eyes and a top tier dual sensor air filtration system protruding from the front like fangs, Virgil has ensured that the Sangar helmet can take a beating and look good doing it in every situation from a hostile environment to a frantic firefight.

vgl_specialist_light_core_01_01_xenothre.label: TrueDef-Pro Core CDF
vgl_specialist_light_core_01_01_xenothre.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Carrying Capacity: 2.0 µSCU Backpacks: Light Virgil's TrueDef line of personal body armor provide strategic protection of vital areas while keeping you fast and mobile. Numerous planetary law enforcement organizations and even the Advocacy use versions of the TrueDef to protect their officers and agents. This special version honors those who bravely fight alongside law enforcement and the Navy when called upon during times of great need by featuring a Civilian Defense Force logo on the front and back.

vgl_undersuit_01_01_shared.label: ForceFlex Undersuit Black/Gold
vgl_undersuit_01_01_shared.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Virgil's ForceFlex is the next generation in undersuit technology. Rated for combat as well as industrial work, you can rest assured that the comboweave will keep you protected in whatever situation you put it through.

vgl_utility_light_arms_01_01_01.label: Chiron Arms
vgl_utility_light_arms_01_01_01.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -35 / 65 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Be the first on the scene with the Chiron armor. Designed to provide the essential protection that combat medics need, the armor features ultra-lightweight paneling to keep the wearer quick on their feet without compromising on safety. Crucial, high-impact sections have been reinforced with raised carbon plating on top of a highly durable polyfiber for maximum flexibility.
