vpw_bouncer_boots_01_01_01.label: Good Boot
vpw_bouncer_boots_01_01_01.description: The Vaporwear Good Boot is the result of a design collaboration between seven up-and-coming designers who were each tasked to answer one question: what makes a good boot? The result is a fusion of supreme comfort with supergrip rubber soles, reinforced toe safeguards, and a variety of decorative zippers and buckles around the top quarter.

vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_01_01.label: Creese Jacket
vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Vaporwear Creese jacket features an old-Earth collar and tags around the shoulders. Armored shoulder accents and ventilated sleeves allow the jacket to be worn casually or piloting an open canopy vehicle.

vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_02_01.label: Creese Skullsnap Jacket
vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Vaporwear Creese jacket features an old-Earth collar and tags around the shoulders. Armored shoulder accents and ventilated sleeves provide protection without restricting movement, allowing the jacket to be worn casually or piloting an open canopy vehicle. The special Skullsnap edition is a slick silver with geometric stylings and a screaming skull on the back.

vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_03_01.label: Creese Toxic Fog Jacket
vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_03_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Vaporwear Creese jacket features an old-Earth collar and tags around the shoulders. Armored shoulder accents and ventilated sleeves provide protection without restricting movement, allowing the jacket to be worn casually or piloting an open canopy vehicle. The special Toxic Fog edition is black with poison gas green accents and a skull on the front and back.

vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_04_01.label: Creese Copperhead Jacket
vpw_bouncer_jacket_01_04_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU The Vaporwear Creese jacket features an old-Earth collar and tags around the shoulders. Armored shoulder accents and ventilated sleeves provide protection without restricting movement, allowing the jacket to be worn casually or piloting an open canopy vehicle. The special Copperhead edition features a snake enwrapping the front, back, and left arm of the jacket.

vpw_bouncer_jacket_05_01_01.label: Creese Yormandi Jacket
vpw_bouncer_jacket_05_01_01.description: Make a splash with this Yormandi-themed jacket. Featuring the ferocious creature erupting from water, this predator snakes around the side of the dark teal jacket to showcase Vaporwear's logo on the back.

vpw_bouncer_mask_01_01_01.label: Brace Mask
vpw_bouncer_mask_01_01_01.description: Ever dream of standing out in a crowd while remaining completely anonymous? Vaporwear's Brace hood offer total facial coverage that keeps the wearer's identity hidden. Small optical sensors woven into the hood and run through a digital interface on the back provides the wearer with a perfect view of their surroundings.

vpw_bouncer_pants_01_01_01.label: Threshold Pants
vpw_bouncer_pants_01_01_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The company's classic pant, the Threshold line features a glossy faux-organic exterior, an attached belt with real metal buckle, and reinforced knee pads. Additionally, the pants are decorated with non-constructive stitching and include two hip pockets.

vpw_bouncer_pants_01_02_01.label: Threshold Skullsnap Pants
vpw_bouncer_pants_01_02_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The company's classic pant, the Threshold line features a glossy faux-organic exterior, an attached belt, and reinforced silver knee and shin pads. Additionally, the pants are decorated with non-constructive stitching and include two hip pockets. The Skullsnap edition features the Vaporwear logo over an orange and blue stripe on the front left leg.

vpw_bouncer_pants_01_03_01.label: Threshold Toxic Fog Pants
vpw_bouncer_pants_01_03_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The company's classic pant, the Threshold line features a glossy faux-organic exterior, an attached belt, and reinforced knee and shin pads. Additionally, the pants are decorated with non-constructive stitching and include two hip pockets. The Toxic Fog edition features Vaporwear in green across the front left leg.

vpw_bouncer_pants_01_04_01.label: Threshold Copperhead Pants
vpw_bouncer_pants_01_04_01.description: Carrying Capacity: 0.5K µSCU The company's classic pant, the Threshold line features a glossy faux-organic exterior, an attached belt with real metal buckle, and reinforced knee and shin pads. Additionally, the pants are decorated with non-constructive stitching and include two hip pockets. The Copperhead edition features golden accents on knee and shin pads.

vpw_bouncer_shirt_01_01_01.label: Tyger (Project Purple) Shirt
vpw_bouncer_shirt_01_01_01.description: Vaporwear's Tyger messaging shirt features the brand's distinct camo pattern with a programmable monocolor digital cloth statement strip. The all-purple and black design isn't likely to keep anyone truly camouflage in all but the most alien jungle, but it's sure to make a statement in any crowded metropolis.

apar_melee_01.label: Demon Fang Combat Knife
apar_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 15 cm The Demon Fang is a simple yet sinister split blade knife supported by a sturdy and lightly textured handle. Vibrant red cutting edges highlight the knife's unusual and intimidating look, guaranteeing to give anyone second thoughts about getting in its way.

apar_special_ballistic_01.label: Scourge Railgun
apar_special_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Railgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 5 Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm Effective Range: 200 m Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S4) Equally devastating to larger threats and hostile vehicles, this shoulder mounted railgun from Apocalypse Arms uses electromagnets to deliver its payload accurately over great distances, making it the Scourge of land, air and space.

apar_special_ballistic_01_mag.label: Scourge Railgun Magazine (5 cap)
apar_special_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 5 This magazine holds the large specially designed .937 caliber tungsten sabot rounds fired by the Apocalypse Arms Scourge railgun.

apar_special_ballistic_01_mat01.label: Scourge "Quite Useful" Railgun
apar_special_ballistic_01_mat01.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Railgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 5 Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm Effective Range: 200 m Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S4) Equally devastating to larger threats and hostile vehicles, this shoulder mounted railgun from Apocalypse Arms uses electromagnets to deliver its payload accurately over great distances, making it the Scourge of land, air and space. One of the many items Wikelo has acquired in his travels, the 'Quite Useful' edition is a must have for any serious collector.

apar_special_ballistic_02.label: Animus Missile Launcher
apar_special_ballistic_02.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Missile Launcher Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 3 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm (3 shot burst) Effective Range: 2 km Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (N/A) Lift the Animus onto your shoulder and level the opposition on the battlefield. This missile launcher from Apocalypse Arms features a rotating barrel that quickly fires three missiles, making it the perfect weapon to obliterate ground forces or damage vehicles and small ships. When you need to sow destruction to save yourself, you can trust Apocalypse Arms to deliver.

apar_special_ballistic_02_mag.label: Animus Missile Launcher Magazine (3 cap)
apar_special_ballistic_02_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 3 This magazine for the Animus missile launcher holds three missiles.

apar_special_ballistic_02_mat01.label: Animus "Quite Useful" Missile Launcher
apar_special_ballistic_02_mat01.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Missile Launcher Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 3 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm (3 shot burst) Effective Range: 2 km Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (N/A) Lift the Animus onto your shoulder and level the opposition on the battlefield. This missile launcher from Apocalypse Arms features a rotating barrel that quickly fires three missiles, making it the perfect weapon to obliterate ground forces or damage vehicles and small ships. When you need to sow destruction to save yourself, you can trust Apocalypse Arms to deliver. One of the many items Wikelo has acquired in his travels, the 'Quite Useful' edition is a must have for any serious collector.

apar_special_ballistic_02_missile.label: Animus Missile
apar_special_ballistic_02_missile.description: Item Type: Ammo Ballistic missile ammo for the Animus missile launcher.

arma_barrel_comp_s1.label: Sion Compensator1
arma_barrel_comp_s1.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Aim Recoil: -30% Visual Recoil: -20% Audible Range: +20% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator1. ArmaMod's expertly designed S1 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target.

arma_barrel_comp_s1_02.label: Vera Compensator1
arma_barrel_comp_s1_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Aim Time: +20% Spread: +35% Visual Recoil: -33% Recoil Time: -25% Ideal for operators that specialize in precision aiming, the Vera Compensator1's high density materials increases aim time in favor of reduced recoil.

arma_barrel_comp_s1_03.label: Torrent Compensator1
arma_barrel_comp_s1_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Aim Time: +15% Spread: -20% Aim Recoil: +15% Visual Recoil: -30% Recoil Time: -15% Fire Rate: +7.5% The Torrent Compensator1 rewards those with a steady hand and a sharp eye with faster, more controlled fire.

arma_barrel_comp_s1_04.label: Stark Compensator1
arma_barrel_comp_s1_04.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Recoil Time: +10% Fire Rate: -20% Damage: +17.5% Redirecting gases from the barrel to increase the force of bullet impact, this Stark Compensator1 slows the rate of fire but significantly increases damage output.

arma_barrel_comp_s2.label: Sion Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Recoil: -30% Visual Recoil: -20% Audible Range: +20% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator2. ArmaMod's expertly designed S2 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target.

arma_barrel_comp_s2_02.label: Vera Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Time: +30% Spread: +40% Aim Recoil: -30% Visual Recoil: -30% Recoil Time: -6% Fire Rate: +6% The heavy-duty materials utilized in the Vera Compensator2 reduce recoil and increase aim time for precise, controlled bursts.

arma_barrel_comp_s2_03.label: Torrent Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Time: +10% Spread: +22.5% Projectile Speed: +35% Aim Recoil: +17.5% Visual Recoil: -12.5% Damage: +5% Designed to overwhelm opponents in the heat of battle, the Torrent Compensator2 increases projectile speed whilst reducing accuracy.

arma_barrel_comp_s2_04.label: Stark Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2_04.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Time: +7.5% Spread: +15% Aim Recoil: -25% Visual Recoil: -35% The Stark Compensator2 disperses energy more evenly from the gun barrel to counteract recoil, helping you stay sure and steady with every shot.

arma_barrel_comp_s2_firerats01.label: Sion "Scorched" Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Spread: -10% Projectile Speed: -12.5% Aim Recoil: -20% Visual Recoil: -40% Damage: -10% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator2. ArmaMod's expertly designed S2 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

arma_barrel_comp_s3.label: Sion Compensator3
arma_barrel_comp_s3.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Aim Recoil: -30% Visual Recoil: -20% Audible Range: +20% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator3. ArmaMod's expertly designed S3 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target.

arma_barrel_comp_s3_02.label: Vera Compensator3
arma_barrel_comp_s3_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Aim Time: -35% Spread Min: -10% Spread Max: +10% Aim Recoil: +50% Recoil Time: -15% Projectile Speed: -25% Fire Rate: +15% When modified with the Vera Compensator3, your weapon will have a faster recovery time at cost of some loss of finesse allowing you to provide devastating salvos of suppressive fire.

arma_barrel_comp_s3_03.label: Torrent Compensator3
arma_barrel_comp_s3_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Pellets: -3 Spread: -33% The Torrent Compensator3 uses its unique shape to combine the total number of pellets into a tighter spread, increasing accuracy at the cost of lower damage output.

arma_barrel_comp_s3_04.label: Stark Compensator3
arma_barrel_comp_s3_04.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Spread: +30% Projectile Speed: +7.5% Fire Rate: +15% Damage: +7.5% Designed by ArmaMod to cycle rounds quicker, the Stark Compensator3 amplifies the speed in which the bullets leave the chamber in exchange for reduced accuracy.

arma_barrel_flhd_s1.label: Veil Flash Hider1
arma_barrel_flhd_s1.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Flash Hider Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Recoil Stability: +15% Recoil Smoothness: +15% The Veil Flash Hider1 is an S1 flash hider from ArmaMod. Designed to reduce muzzle flash, it will help keep your position hidden once the action begins.

arma_barrel_flhd_s2.label: Veil Flash Hider2
arma_barrel_flhd_s2.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Flash Hider Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Recoil Stability: +15% Recoil Smoothness: +15% The Veil Flash Hider2 is an S2 flash hider from ArmaMod. Designed to reduce muzzle flash, it will help keep your position hidden once the action begins.

arma_barrel_flhd_s3.label: Veil Flash Hider3
arma_barrel_flhd_s3.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Flash Hider Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Recoil Stability: +15% Recoil Smoothness: +15% The Veil Flash Hider3 is an S3 flash hider from ArmaMod. Designed to reduce muzzle flash, it will help keep your position hidden once the action begins.

arma_barrel_stab_s1.label: Emod Stabilizer1
arma_barrel_stab_s1.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Visual Recoil: -30% ArmaMod designed the Emod Stabilizer1 attachment to improve visual stability allowing for a more precise shot.

arma_barrel_stab_s1_02.label: Escalate Stabilizer1
arma_barrel_stab_s1_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Aim Recoil: +50% Visual Recoil: +50% Fire Rate: +30% Damage: -10% Additional Burst Shots: +1 ArmaMod's enhanced circuitry in the Escalate Stabilizer1 boosts the output of handheld weapons substantially, trading control for power.

arma_barrel_stab_s1_firerats01.label: Emod "Scorched" Stabilizer1
arma_barrel_stab_s1_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Spread: -20% Projectile Speed: -12.5% Aim Recoil: +40% Visual Recoil: +40% ArmaMod designed the Emod Stabilizer1 attachment to improve spread for a slower but more precise shot. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

arma_barrel_stab_s2.label: Emod Stabilizer2
arma_barrel_stab_s2.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Visual Recoil: -30% ArmaMod designed the Emod Stabilizer2 attachment to improve visual stability allowing for a more precise shot.

arma_barrel_stab_s2_02.label: Escalate Stabilizer2
arma_barrel_stab_s2_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Spread per Shot: +30% Aim Recoil: +30% Visual Recoil: +30% Fire Rate: +10% Damage: -5% Charge Time: -30% Unleash the full destructive potential of your weapon with the Escalate Stabilizer2, increasing the fire rate and shot spread at the cost of accuracy.

arma_barrel_stab_s3.label: Emod Stabilizer3
arma_barrel_stab_s3.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Visual Recoil: -30% Reduce energy weapon recoil with the Emod Stabilizer3. ArmaMod designed the attachment to improve both horizontal and vertical recoil to ensure a more precise shot.

arma_barrel_stab_s3_02.label: Escalate Stabilizer3
arma_barrel_stab_s3_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Damage: +10% Charge Time: -50% Ammo Consumption: +100% By allowing for increased energy consumption, the Escalate Stabilizer3 can overclock your weapon to significantly reduce charge time and increase damage output.

arma_barrel_supp_s1.label: Tacit Suppressor1
arma_barrel_supp_s1.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Damage: -8% Audible Range: -60% Strike silently with the Tacit Supressor1. ArmaMod uses a proprietary ceramic coating inside the suppressor to ensure the sound of gunfire remains minimal.

arma_barrel_supp_s1_02.label: Quell Suppressor1
arma_barrel_supp_s1_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Heat: +10% Spread: -25% Aim Recoil: -25% Visual Recoil: -25% Fire Rate: -5% Audible Range: -33% The Quell Suppressor1 utilizes an advanced carbon polymer that reduces both noise and recoil at the cost of increased heat build-up.

arma_barrel_supp_s1_03.label: Stoic Suppressor1
arma_barrel_supp_s1_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Spread: +20% Horizontal Aim Recoil: -45% Vertical Aim Recoil: -15% Visual Recoil: -33% Recoil Time: -20% Audible Range: -33% Featuring a more spacious chamber that widens shot spread, the Stoic Suppressor1's increased size reduces noise while allowing for superior recoil control.

arma_barrel_supp_s2.label: Tacit Suppressor2
arma_barrel_supp_s2.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Damage: -8% Audible Range: -60% Strike silently with the Tacit Supressor2. ArmaMod uses a proprietary ceramic coating inside the suppressor to ensure the sound of gunfire remains minimal.

arma_barrel_supp_s2_02.label: Quell Suppressor2
arma_barrel_supp_s2_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Heat: -25% Spread: +7.5% Aim Recoil: -22.5% Visual Recoil: - 22.5% Audible Range: -33% With careful placement of high insulation materials to allow increased heat dissipation, the Quell Suppressor2 ensures you'll stay cool under pressure in favor of a slightly wider bullet spread.

arma_barrel_supp_s2_03.label: Stoic Suppressor2
arma_barrel_supp_s2_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Time: +12.5% Spread: -12.5% Horizontal Aim Recoil: -45% Vertical Aim Recoil: -15% Visual Recoil: -33% Recoil Time: -5% Audible Range: -33% Using a more heavyweight barrel attachment for increased control, the longer chamber of the Stoic Suppressor2 grants reduced noise and increased accuracy at the cost of slower responsiveness.

arma_barrel_supp_s3.label: Tacit Suppressor3
arma_barrel_supp_s3.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Damage: -8% Audible Range: -60% Strike silently with the Tacit Supressor3. ArmaMod uses a proprietary ceramic coating inside the suppressor to ensure the sound of gunfire remains minimal.

arma_barrel_supp_s3_02.label: Quell Suppressor3
arma_barrel_supp_s3_02.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Spread Min: -15% Spread Per Shot: +25% Audible Range: -33% Designed for stealth work, the Quell Suppressor3 rewards those who take slow, steady shots.

arma_barrel_supp_s3_03.label: Stoic Suppressor3
arma_barrel_supp_s3_03.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Suppressor Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 3 Aim Time: -10% Spread Max: -50% Aim Recoil: -25% Audible Range: -33% As the largest suppressor in the series, the Stoic Suppressor3's heavy duty design reduces noise and recoil, while tightening shot spread.

banu_melee_01.label: Njakte Knife
banu_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm Banu engineering and ingenuity combine in the Njakte knife. Its distinct curved blade and serrated edge is rust resistant and remains ultra-sharp even after extensive use thanks to a proprietary metal alloy that's a trade secret of the souli that manufacturers it. The intricately detailed handle gives it a distinctly Banu visual style and provides texture to ensure a great grip.

banu_melee_01_blue01.label: Pambada Knife
banu_melee_01_blue01.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm Honed to a razor-fine edge, the Pambada knife has a wide range of applications. The serrated edge is great for cutting through soft and flexible materials like ropes or fabrics while the gut hook can be used to overcome materials with a tougher resistance. The sharpened angular point of the blade ensures the Pambada can still pierce, rounding out the weapon's versatile toolset. It is made with the same rust-resistant, ultra-sharp metal alloy found in other Banu knives and features an intricately detailed handle of distinctively Banu origin.

banu_melee_01_green01.label: Zogo Knife
banu_melee_01_green01.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm The Zogo knife is prized among many soulis for its versatility and cutting edge. The strong tip and wide belly of the blade make the Zogo knife particularly durable, a crucial feature in survival situations in which this blade excels. The proprietary metal alloy used in the knife's design is also rust-resistant and remains ultra-sharp even after extensive use while the intricately detailed handle gives it a distinctly Banu style and provides texture to ensure a tight grip.

banu_melee_01_red01.label: Myuda Knife
banu_melee_01_red01.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm A brutally effective product of Banu engineering, the Myuda knife is a vicious weapon designed for leaving wounds that won't heal easily. The proprietary metal alloy used in the construction of the blade is rust-resistant and remains ultra-sharp even after extensive use. The intricately detailed handle gives it a distinctly Banu style and provides texture to ensure a tight grip.

banu_melee_02.label: Myondo Knife
banu_melee_02.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: N/A The Myondo is a distinct, curved blade with a notched finger-well and bejeweled pommel. The texture on both the blade and handle come from the unique forging process used by the Banu craftsmen who make them.

banu_melee_03.label: Sizi Knife
banu_melee_03.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm With its trailing point tip, curved belly, and sturdy spine, the Sizi knife was crafted with meticulous attention to detail, balance, and usability. Featuring an intricate Banu design, additional chromium was added to the metal to ensure long-term resistance against corrosion.

banu_melee_04.label: Eyaja Knife
banu_melee_04.description: Manufacturer: Banu Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm Worthy of any celebration, this Banu-crafted knife features a subtle s-curve along its length with a layered hand-forged blade, a central spine finger-hole, and a golden-hued handle. Intricate filigree is woven throughout the piece and a vibrant blue gemstone adorns the pommel.

bathfloat_crusader_01.label: Finley the Stormwal Bath Float
bathfloat_crusader_01.description: Space isn't the only place for Finley the Stormwal anymore. Crusader's cute mascot can now also surf the suds in your bathtub with this fun bath float.

behr_areadenialsystem_01.label: BEHR PK-1 Sweeper
behr_areadenialsystem_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring The PK-1 is a non-lethal anti-personnel mine that projects a dual-axis concussive and EMP energy to stun opponents and disrupt electronics caught in the blast.

behr_areadenialsystem_01_ammo.label: BEHR PK-1 Sweeper
behr_areadenialsystem_01_ammo.description: The PK-1 is a non-lethal anti-personnel mine that projects a dual-axis concussive and EMP energy to stun opponents and disrupt electronics caught in the blast.

behr_binoculars_01.label: XDL Monocular Rangefinder
behr_binoculars_01.description: The highly accurate XDL Monocular Rangefinder from Behring is as suitable on an expedition as it is on the battlefield. Ruggedly constructed with high-quality lenses, easy-to-read display, and a light-amplification mode, the XDL provides 10x magnification to reliably provide exact-distance laser measurements on faraway targets.

behr_binoculars_01_collector01.label: XDL "Mark I" Monocular Rangefinder
behr_binoculars_01_collector01.description: The highly accurate XDL Monocular Rangefinder from Behring is as suitable on an expedition as it is on the battlefield. Ruggedly constructed with high-quality lenses, easy-to-read display, and a light-amplification mode, the XDL provides 10x magnification to reliably provide exact-distance laser measurements on faraway targets. The Mark I edition features a grey and steel-blue finish.

behr_conc_grenade_01.label: AP-7 Concussion Grenade
behr_conc_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Area of Effect: 15 m Damage Type: Non-Lethal (Concussion) The Behring AP-7 is a battle-tested and operator approved tool for the field. This non-lethal explosive device is designed to disorient and disable enemy targets, allowing friendlies to safely breach and secure an area. Behring's proprietary reinforced casing construction minimizes the potential for accidental injury or death.

behr_conc_grenade_01_ammo.label: Behring AP-7 Concussion Grenade
behr_conc_grenade_01_ammo.description: The AP-7 is a battle-tested and operator approved tool for the field. This non-lethal explosive device is designed to disorient and disable enemy targets, allowing friendlies to safely breach and secure an area. Behring's proprietary reinforced casing construction minimizes the potential for accidental injury or death.

behr_emp_grenade_01.label: EP-5 EMP Grenade
behr_emp_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Area of Effect: 20 m Damage Type: Non-Lethal (EMP) Behring’s EP5 grenade produces a controlled electromagnetic burst to disrupt unshielded electronics for a short time, making it an invaluable addition to the loadout of military and law enforcement operators.

behr_emp_grenade_01_ammo.label: Behring EP-5 EMP Grenade
behr_emp_grenade_01_ammo.description: Behring’s EP5 grenade produces a controlled electromagnetic burst to disrupt unshielded electronics for a short time, making it an invaluable addition to the loadout of military and law enforcement operators.

behr_frag_grenade_01.label: MK-4 Frag Grenade
behr_frag_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Area of Effect: 20 m Damage Type: Frag A continuation of the iconic hand grenade first produced by Behring in 2894, the MK-4 is an anti-personnel fragmentation grenade capable of saturating the kill-zone with lethal projectiles and a devastating concussive blast.

behr_frag_grenade_01_ammo.label: Behring MK4 Frag Grenade
behr_frag_grenade_01_ammo.description: A continuation of the iconic hand grenade first produced by Behring in 2894, the MK4 is an anti-personnel fragmentation grenade capable of saturating the kill-zone with lethal projectiles and a devastating concussive blast.

behr_glauncher_ballistic_01.label: GP-33 MOD Grenade Launcher
behr_glauncher_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Launcher Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 6 Rate Of Fire: 40 rpm Effective Range: Variable (80m) Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S1) The military-grade GP-33 MOD launcher fires 40mm grenades to clear rooms and flush out enemies behind cover thanks to Behring's precision design that primes each grenade to explode on impact.

behr_grav_grenade_01.label: DS-12 Force Propulsion Grenade
behr_grav_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Damage Type: Non-Lethal The Behring DS-12 is the latest in pacification technology, delivering a non-lethal force push intended to displace opponents in low or zero gravity situations.

behr_grav_grenade_01_ammo.label: Behring DS-12 Force Propulsion Grenade
behr_grav_grenade_01_ammo.description: The DS12 is the latest in pacification technology, delivering a non-lethal force push intended to displace opponents in low or zero gravity situations.

behr_hmg_ballistic_01.label: FS-9H HMG
behr_hmg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: HMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 80 Rate Of Fire: 400 rpm Effective Range: 60 m Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S4) Behring's vaunted craftsmanship and use of precision parts means the FS-9H heavy machine gun can withstand the heat of battle while still packing a potent punch. With a slow and steady rate of automatic fire, the FS-9H blasts 7mm ballistic shells that remain effective at distances up to 60 meters.

behr_hmg_ballistic_01_mag.label: FS-9H Magazine (80 cap)
behr_hmg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 80 This magazine for the Behring FS-9H HMG holds eighty 7mm rounds.

behr_lidar_grenade_01.label: SC-1 LIDAR Grenade
behr_lidar_grenade_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Grenade Damage Type: Non-Lethal The Behring SC-1 LIDAR allows users to understand the battlefield before entering it. Once activated in the field, it emits an omni-directional scan that maps everyone in its radius and then sends their precise positions to the operator.

behr_lidar_grenade_01_ammo.label: Behring SC-1 LIDAR Grenade
behr_lidar_grenade_01_ammo.description: LIDAR allows users to understand the battlefield before entering it. Once activated in the field, it emits an omni-directional scan that maps everyone in its radius. Then sends their precise positions to the operator.

behr_lmg_ballistic_01.label: FS-9 LMG
behr_lmg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 75 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 40 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S3) Behring designed the FS-9 to be an overwhelming battlefield force. This light machine gun features a full auto mode that makes it ideal for laying down covering fire or holding back advancing enemies. The FS-9 is also acclaimed for its ability to maintain accuracy while unleashing sustained fire.

behr_lmg_ballistic_01_mag.label: FS-9 Magazine (75 cap)
behr_lmg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 75 This magazine for the Behring FS-9 LMG holds seventy five 5mm rounds.

behr_lmg_ballistic_01_tint01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 75 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 40 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S3) Behring designed the FS-9 to be an overwhelming battlefield force. behr_lmg_ballistic_01_xenothreat01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 75 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 40 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S3) Behring designed the FS-9 to be an overwhelming battlefield force. behr_lmg_ballistic_01_yellow_grey01.label: FS-9 "Finish Line" LMG

behr_ltm_kinetic_01.label: ADO-5 Laser Mine
behr_ltm_kinetic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Laser Mine Area of Effect: 15 m Damage Type: Kinetic he ADO-5, or commonly called ADOSS is a Laser Mine from Behring. It is a deadly tool you want to own to protect your precious goods, but you never want to accidentally step into. Where ADO stand for Area Denial Ordnance you can be sure that your property is well protected. This deadly gadget is made of an light weight aluminum case that holds a strong explosive. It can be easily attached to any surface with our state of the art attachment technology. The laser beam comes in predefined lengths for all your use cases, to provide a good variance for various room types, hallways or even giant hangars. Handle with care! Once activated the only way to turn it off is by destruction.

behr_optics_holo_x3_s1_tint01.label: PT3 "Deadfall" (3x Holographic)
behr_optics_holo_x3_s1_tint01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Zoom: 3x-3.5x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Get up close and personal with this 3x magnifying optic from Behring. The PT3 projects a highly visible target marker allowing you to confidently cover your field of view across various lighting and environmental conditions. The "Deadfall" variant of the scope is muted green.

behr_optics_holo_x1_s1.label: PT1 (1x Holographic)
behr_optics_holo_x1_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Zoom: 1x-1.5x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Experience Behring precision with this non-magnifying projection sight. Featuring a highly visible target marker, the PT1 provides ultimate target acquisition to find and lock onto hostiles with ease.

behr_optics_holo_x2_s1.label: PT2 (2x Holographic)
behr_optics_holo_x2_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x Zoom: 2x-2.5x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Improve your combat accuracy with this 2x magnifying sight from Behring. Built with meticulous care and craftsmanship, the PT2 has become an essential optic for everyone from sport shooters to law enforcement professionals.

behr_optics_holo_x3_s1.label: PT3 (3x Holographic)
behr_optics_holo_x3_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Zoom: 3x-3.5x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Get up close and personal with this 3x magnifying optic from Behring. behr_optics_rdot_x1_s1.label: RF1 (1x Reflex)
behr_optics_rdot_x1_s1.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Reflex Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Perfect for close-quarter combat, the RF1 non-magnifying reflex optic was the first to use Behring's Hyper-Lumen substrate coating to ensure the aiming reticle could be seen in wide range of light conditions, day or night.

behr_optics_tsco_x16_s3.label: EE16 (16x Telescopic)
behr_optics_tsco_x16_s3.description: Manufacturer: Behring Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 16x Aim Time: +0% Size: S3 Get a clear view of your target from afar with the EE16. Behring craftsmanship produced a 16x scope that's lightweight, durable, and deadly accurate. A rigorous 22-step testing process ensures the EE16 can deliver precision targeting even after encountering extreme weather or surviving battlefield wear and tear.

behr_pistol_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Pistol Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 450 rpm Effective Range: 25 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Thanks to a streamlined design and a lightweight polymer frame that helps to minimize recoil, it's easy to see why the versatile and dependable S-38 from Behring has become a trusted sidearm across the Empire for both citizens and law enforcement officers.

The "Metro Camo" edition features a grey-tone digicamo pattern.

behr_rifle_ballistic_02_civilian_mag.label: P8-AR Rifle Magazine (15 Cap)
behr_rifle_ballistic_02_civilian_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 15 This magazine for the Behring P8-AR rifle comes pre-loaded with fifteen rounds.

behr_rifle_ballistic_02_civilian_store01.label: P8-AR "Dominion Camo" Rifle
behr_rifle_ballistic_02_civilian_store01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 15 Rate Of Fire: 475 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) The direct descendant of the UEE Marines standard issue weapon, Behring has crafted the semi-automatic P8-AR to provide civilians across the empire a straight-forward and dependable weapon to defend themselves against aggressive hostiles. The Dominion Camo edition adds a dark green camo pattern to the rifle.

behr_rifle_ballistic_02_mag.label: P8-ARM Rifle Magazine (30 cap)
behr_rifle_ballistic_02_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 30 This magazine for the Behring P8-ARM rifle comes pre-loaded with thirty 7.62mm rounds.

behr_rifle_ballistic_02a.label: P8-ARM Rifle
behr_rifle_ballistic_02a.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 600 rpm Effective Range: 60 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) Built to be the standard issue weapon of UEE Marines, the Behring P8-ARM excels in its dependability and straightforward operation to allow you to focus on the fight at hand.

behr_shotgun_ballistic_01.label: BR-2 Shotgun
behr_shotgun_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Shotgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 75 rpm Effective Range: 15 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S3), Underbarrel (S2) Originally designed for the military, Behring decided to sell the BR-2 ballistic shotgun to the general public after the initial weapon testers kept requesting to take one home. Featuring a semi-auto fire mode that can rapidly deliver devastating stopping power, the BR-2 is the ideal choice for both offensive and defensive operations.

behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_blue_white01.label: BR-2 "Permafrost" Shotgun
behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_blue_white01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Shotgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 75 rpm Effective Range: 15 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S3), Underbarrel (S2) Originally designed for the military, Behring decided to sell the BR-2 ballistic shotgun to the general public after the initial weapon testers kept requesting to take one home. Featuring a semi-auto fire mode that can rapidly deliver devastating stopping power, the BR-2 is the ideal choice for both offensive and defensive operations. This special Permafrost edition features blue and grey coloring reminiscent of a glacier under a blinding winter sky.

behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_mag.label: BR-2 Shotgun Magazine (12 cap)
behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 12 This magazine for the Behring BR-2 shotgun holds twelve 12-gauge rounds.

behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_mr01.label: BR-2 "Purgatory Camo" Shotgun
behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_mr01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Shotgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 75 rpm Effective Range: 15 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S3), Underbarrel (S2) Originally designed for the military, Behring decided to sell the BR-2 ballistic shotgun to the general public after the initial weapon testers kept requesting to take one home. Featuring a semi-auto fire mode that can rapidly deliver devastating stopping power, the BR-2 is the ideal choice for both offensive and defensive operations. The Purgatory Camo edition's grey-on-grey dressing creates a sleek, utilitarian profile.

behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_tint01.label: BR-2 "Blacklist" Shotgun
behr_shotgun_ballistic_01_tint01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Shotgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 75 rpm Effective Range: 15 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S3), Underbarrel (S2) Originally designed for the military, Behring decided to sell the BR-2 ballistic shotgun to the general public after the initial weapon testers kept requesting to take one home. Featuring a semi-auto fire mode that can rapidly deliver devastating stopping power, the BR-2 is the ideal choice for both offensive and defensive operations. The Blacklist edition features a black finish.

behr_smg_ballistic_01.label: P8-SC SMG
behr_smg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) When the top fighting force in the universe chooses a weapon as their standard, it pays to stand up and take notice. The Behring-crafted P8-SC has been the ballistic submachine gun of choice for the UEE Marines since it first came off the production line, but since then, many have come to rely on this weapon for their own personal safety and protection.

behr_smg_ballistic_01_iae2022.label: P8-SC "Red Alert" SMG
behr_smg_ballistic_01_iae2022.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) When the top fighting force in the universe chooses a weapon as their standard, it pays to stand up and take notice. The Behring-crafted P8-SC has been the ballistic submachine gun of choice for the UEE Marines since it first came off the production line, but since then, many have come to rely on this weapon for their own personal safety and protection. The "Red Alert" edition mixes grey and a vibrant red for a bold and dynamic design.

behr_smg_ballistic_01_iae2501.label: P8-SC "Epoque" SMG
behr_smg_ballistic_01_iae2501.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) When the top fighting force in the universe chooses a weapon as their standard, it pays to stand up and take notice. The Behring-crafted P8-SC has been the ballistic submachine gun of choice for the UEE Marines since it first came off the production line, but since then, many have come to rely on this weapon for their own personal safety and protection. The Epoque edition features a navy and black coloring with baroque gold detailing and stylized wings on either side of the grip.

behr_smg_ballistic_01_iron.label: P8-SC SMG Iron Sight
behr_smg_ballistic_01_iron.description: Accurate sighting attachment for the P8-SC SMG.

behr_smg_ballistic_01_mag.label: P8-SC SMG Magazine (45 cap)
behr_smg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 45 This magazine for the Behring P8-SC SMG holds forty-five 10mm rounds.

behr_sniper_ballistic_01.label: P6-LR Sniper Rifle
behr_sniper_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 8 Rate Of Fire: 20 rpm Effective Range: 120 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) The Behring P6-LR ballistic sniper rifle more than makes up for its slow rate of fire with a high powered round that's effective from long range. Featuring a scope with variable zoom modes and a barrel composed of a proprietary high-strength alloy, the P6-LR was designed to deliver when needed most.

behr_sniper_ballistic_01_mag.label: P6-LR Magazine (8 cap)
behr_sniper_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 8 This magazine for the Behring P6-LR sniper rifle holds eight rounds.

behr_sniper_ballistic_01_store01.label: P6-LR "Gideon" Sniper Rifle
behr_sniper_ballistic_01_store01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 8 Rate Of Fire: 20 rpm Effective Range: 120 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) The Behring P6-LR ballistic sniper rifle more than makes up for its slow rate of fire with a high powered round that's effective from long range. Featuring a scope with variable zoom modes and a barrel composed of a proprietary high-strength alloy, the P6-LR was designed to deliver when needed most. The Gideon edition features a worn teal and yellow finish.

behr_sniper_ballistic_01_tint01.label: P6-LR "Blacklist" Sniper Rifle
behr_sniper_ballistic_01_tint01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 8 Rate Of Fire: 20 rpm Effective Range: 120 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) The Behring P6-LR ballistic sniper rifle more than makes up for its slow rate of fire with a high powered round that's effective from long range. Featuring a scope with variable zoom modes and a barrel composed of a proprietary high-strength alloy, the P6-LR was designed to deliver when needed most. The Blacklist edition features a dark black finish.

behr_special_ballistic_01.label: HP-284 Rocket Launcher
behr_special_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Launcher Class: Rocket Magazine Size: 2 Rate Of Fire: 20 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Attachments: Optics (N/A), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (N/A) Deliver a one-two punch with the HP-284 rocket launcher from Behring. Designed to blast two dumbfire rockets in quick succession, the weapon can have a quick and devastating impact on adversaries and is effective against vehicles.

behr_special_ballistic_01_mag.label: mX-SR Ammo
behr_special_ballistic_01_mag.description: The mX-Shatter rocket from Badger Bad scatters small explosives on impact or after a very brief period of time. Whenever the rocket shoots out, smaller explosives fire off in random directions making it excellent for clearing out areas. Every mX-Shatter rocket has a cluster of about 8 small explosives that when combined are about equal in force to a frag grenade.

cds_deployable_shield_01.label: CDS QuickCade
cds_deployable_shield_01.description: Manufacturer: CDS Initially designed for high-risk raids for the Advocacy, CDS has finally released their QDB tech to the public. This Quick Deployment Barricade or QuikCade is mobile system capable of projecting a localized protection field capable of temporarily shielding two operators from incoming fire.

crlf_consumable_adrenaline_01.label: AdrenaPen (Demexatrine)
crlf_consumable_adrenaline_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife AdrenaPen can rapidly dispense doses of the synthetic adrenaline Demexatrine during emergency situations to help relieve muscle fatigue and symptoms related to being concussed. Use only as recommended.

crlf_consumable_adrenaline_02.label: AdrenaPen Xtra
crlf_consumable_adrenaline_02.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife AdrenaPen Xtra contains a mixture of the synthetic adrenaline Demexatrine and an anticholinergic antiemetic, giving it extra power to relieve muscle fatigue and symptoms related to being concussed.

crlf_consumable_gopill_01.label: BoostPen (Modamphetamine)
crlf_consumable_gopill_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife BoostPen delivers a dose of the potent stimulant Modamphetamine to increase wakefulness and diminish awareness of pain in emergency situations.

crlf_consumable_gopill_02.label: BoostPen Xtra
crlf_consumable_gopill_02.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife BoostPen Xtra delivers a high dose of the potent stimulant Modamphetamine to greatly increase wakefulness and diminish awareness of pain in emergency situations.

crlf_consumable_healing_01.label: MedPen (Hemozal)
crlf_consumable_healing_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife MedPen can rapidly dispense doses of the coagulant Hemozal during emergency situations to help relieve bleeding and improve a patient’s overall vitals. Use only as recommended.

crlf_consumable_overdoserevival_01.label: DetoxPen (Resurgera)
crlf_consumable_overdoserevival_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife DetoxPen can rapidly dispense doses of the detoxicant Resurgera during emergency situations to help relieve symptoms associated with high blood drug levels (BDL) and overdoses. Use only as recommended.

crlf_consumable_oxygen_01.label: OxyPen
crlf_consumable_oxygen_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife This easy-to-carry disposable first-aid system is designed to refill pressure suit oxygen reserves in emergency situations. Compatible with most standard suits, the Curelife OxyPen is an ideal solution for preventing hypoxia and providing immediate access to lifesaving oxygen.

crlf_consumable_painkiller_01.label: OpioPen (Roxaphen)
crlf_consumable_painkiller_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife OpioPen can rapidly dispense doses of the pain reliever Roxaphen during emergency situations to help relieve symptoms associated with impaired mobility and partial paralysis. Use only as recommended.

crlf_consumable_radiation_01.label: DeconPen (Canoiodide)
crlf_consumable_radiation_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable The DeconPen from CureLife delivers a rapid injection of Canoiodide, a proprietary medicinal compound that treats radiation exposure.

crlf_consumable_radiation_02.label: DeconPen Xtra
crlf_consumable_radiation_02.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable The DeconPen Xtra from CureLife delivers a rapid injection of both Canoiodide and Hemozal to not only treat radiation exposure but also improve a patient’s overall vitals, getting patients stabilized faster than ever.

crlf_consumable_steroid_02.label: CorticoPen Xtra
crlf_consumable_steroid_02.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife CorticoPen Xtra dispenses the corticosteroid Sterogen with an extra boost of anticholinergic antiemetic to help relieve muscle weakness and blurred vision.

crlf_consumable_steroids_01.label: CorticoPen (Sterogen)
crlf_consumable_steroids_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife CorticoPen can rapidly dispense doses of the corticosteroid Sterogen during emergency situations to help relieve symptoms associated with muscle weakness and respiratory damage. Use only as recommended.

crlf_consumable_tpn_01.label: VitalityPen
crlf_consumable_tpn_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Consumable From the Empire’s most trusted medical company, the CureLife VitalityPen delivers a combination of total parenteral nutrition and the detoxicant Resurgera to help relieve symptoms associated with malnutrition and high blood drug levels (BDL).

crlf_medgun_01.label: ParaMed Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose.

crlf_medgun_01_grey01.label: ParaMed "Amalgam" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_grey01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The "Amalgam" edition features a sleek grey color.

crlf_medgun_01_mag.label: ParaMed Refill
crlf_medgun_01_mag.description: Item Type: MedGel Refill This vial is used to refill the ParaMed Medical Device with CureLife Pancea MedGel.

crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd01.label: ParaMed "AA Transport" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The AA Transport edition features a metallic green coloring and was intended for those who assisted Alliance Aid's Transport Division during Levski's time of need.

crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd02.label: ParaMed "AA Support" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd02.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The AA Support edition features a sharp red coloring and was intended for those who assisted Alliance Aid during Levski's time of need. Additionally, this special edition has an increased healing rate to allow injured individuals to return to their vital work even faster.

crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd03.label: ParaMed "AA Defense" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_msn_rwd03.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The AA Defense edition features a gray, urban camo pattern and was intended for those who assisted Alliance Aid's Defense Division during Levski's time of need.

crlf_medgun_01_purple01.label: ParaMed "Venule" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_purple01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The "Venule" edition features a rich purple color.

crlf_medgun_01_red01.label: ParaMed "Oxide" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_red01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The "Oxide" edition features a deep red color.

crlf_medgun_01_store01.label: ParaMed "Cyanosis" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_store01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The "Cyanosis" edition features a bold blue color.

crlf_medgun_01_yellow01.label: ParaMed "Xanthic" Medical Device
crlf_medgun_01_yellow01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife Item Type: Medical Device The ParaMed from CureLife is a professional-grade emergency medical device designed to stabilize patients suffering from possible life-threatening injuries. Offering extremely accurate diagnostics and dosing, the ParaMed can treat more patients and offer longer relief with less risk of overdose. The "Xanthic" edition features a bright yellow color.

crlf_medicalaid_01.label: CRLF DYNAPAK
crlf_medicalaid_01.description: Manufacturer: CureLife The DYNAPAK from CureLife is a complete multi-function individual first-aid system designed and constructed for the rigors of field use. With CureLife’s proprietary serum, a single DYNAPAK will promote healing in non-serious wounds to get you back on your feet.

flair_pot_col_medium_1_flair_a.label: Sand Nomad Plant Pot
flair_pot_col_medium_1_flair_a.description: Inspired by traditional sand nomad pottery, the desert hues of this plant pot are evocative of the immense dunes of Leir III.

flair_vase_col_large_1_flair_a.label: Bronze Mya Vase
flair_vase_col_large_1_flair_a.description: With subtle etched patterns and a brushed bronze finish, this artisanal vase emulates the original Mya vases used to store water during the planet's dry seasons.

flair_blackbox_citizencon2954.label: Cockpit Recorder Prop
flair_blackbox_citizencon2954.description: With true-to-life crash damage and a special recorded emergency message, this realistic facsimile of an actual cockpit voice recorder looks like it was salvaged straight from a wreck and makes a fun addition to your den or hangar.

flair_poster_ht_bis_2_a.label: F8C Lightning 2954 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_2_a.description: Congratulations to the F8C Lightning for winning the 2954 Ship Showdown. This poster honors the Lightning, a ship that has protected Humanity countless times from countless threats at home and far from civilization.

flair_poster_ht_bis_2_b.label: C1 Spirit 2954 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_2_b.description: With enough versatility to tackle multiple roles and unpredictable jobs, it's easy to understand why Crusader's C1 Spirit was part of the 2954 Ship Showdown's Final Four. A multi-purpose starship tuned for mid-range cargo delivery and courier work, this poster celebrates the C1 Spirit and Crusader Industries' commitment to excellence.

flair_poster_ht_bis_2_c.label: Terrapin 2954 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_2_c.description: A poster commemorating the Anvil Aerospace Terrapin making its way in the final four of the 2954 Ship Showdown. Outfitted with long-range scanners and encased in heavy armor and oversized shields, the Terrapin faces potentially hazardous circumstances with confidence.

flair_poster_ht_bis_2_d.label: Reclaimer 2954 Ship Showdown Poster
flair_poster_ht_bis_2_d.description: Celebrate the Reclaimer, Aegis Dynamics' industrial salvage ship, making the final four of the 2954 Ship Showdown with this poster. Equipped with a reinforced cargo bay, a long-range jump drive and launch pods for unmanned drones, the Reclaimer is an ideal ship for taking advantage of deep space wrecks.

flair_poster_ht_levski_1_a.label: Stronger Together Poster
flair_poster_ht_levski_1_a.description: A point of inspiration to those who seek asylum in Levski, this poster recreates the memorable mural that greets visitors to the remote asteroid base in Nyx. Painted by an unknown artist, it features two hands clasped in unity over the symbol of the People's Alliance and the stirring motto of the political activist group: "Stronger Together."

flair_toy_plushy_sandworm_1_a.label: Valakkar Plushie
flair_toy_plushy_sandworm_1_a.description: Always looking to dig up some trouble, this fearsomely adorable valakkar plushie imitates its real-life counterpart with a maw lined with fangs and pearls along its scaled hide.

flair_trophy_citizencon2954_1_a.label: CitizenCon 2954 Trophy
flair_trophy_citizencon2954_1_a.description: The trophy for CitizenCon 2954 embraces the spirit of building a better empire with bold chevrons and construction-themed styling that reveals a holographic event logo.

flair_vanduul_dmg_skul_1_a.label: Battle of Vega II Vanduul Skull
flair_vanduul_dmg_skul_1_a.description: Featuring a preserved skull from a defeated Vanduul footsoldier, this special commemorative display honors the brave members of the UEE military and public who fought so valiantly at the Battle of Vega II on October 5th, 2945.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01.label: F55 LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_blue_gold_01.label: F55 "Valor" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_blue_gold_01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. The bold blue and gold color scheme gives the Valor edition a valiant and dignified appeal.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_collector01.label: F55 "Mark I" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_collector01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. The Mark I edition features a white finish with blue and red highlights.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_firerats01.label: F55 "Scorched" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_green_red01.label: F55 "Alpine Sunset" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_green_red01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. This special green and red Alpine Sunset edition is sure to make a great Luminalia gift for your loved ones.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_mag.label: F55 LMG Magazine (150 cap)
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 150 This magazine for the Gemini F55 LMG holds one hundred and fifty 5mm rounds.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_purple01.label: F55 "Starchaser" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_purple01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. Created to celebrate the 2954 IAE, the Starchaser edition is a vivid purple with white and black highlights.

gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_store01.label: F55 "Deadlock" LMG
gmni_lmg_ballistic_01_store01.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 150 Rate Of Fire: 1000 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Barrel (N/A), Underbarrel (S3) Featuring an explosive rate of fire that tops at a 1000 rpm and Gemini's sleek and professional styling, the F55 is a light machine gun for discerning clientele who want the 'verse to know that they are not to be trifled with. The Deadlock variant features a grey camo pattern.

gmni_optics_tsco_x4_s2.label: OT4-RF (4x Telescopic)
gmni_optics_tsco_x4_s2.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 4x Aim Time: +25% Size: 2 Combining a premium 4x telescopic sight with Gemini's innovative echoburst rangefinder, the OT4-RF model allows you to accurately gauge the distance to your target; vital for effective precision shooting. When paired with the Gemini S71 or other compatible weapon, the OT4-RF is engineered to impress in a variety of situations and engagements.

gmni_optics_tsco_x4_s2_firerats02.label: OT4-RF "Scorched" (4x Telescopic)
gmni_optics_tsco_x4_s2_firerats02.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x - 4x Aim Time: +5% Visual Recoil: -10% Parallax: Medium Size: 2 Combining a premium 4x telescopic sight with Gemini's innovative echoburst rangefinder, the OT4-RF model allows you to accurately gauge the distance to your target; vital for effective precision shooting. When paired with the Gemini S71 or other compatible weapon, the OT4-RF is engineered to impress in a variety of situations and engagements. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

grin_multitool_01_mining.description: MUST BUY BASE MULTI-TOOL TO USE: "Pyro RYT Multi-Tool" Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Multi-Tool Attachment Class: Mining The OreBit attachment turns Greycat's Pyro RYT Multi-Tool into a handheld mining machine. It can scan rocks to find worthwhile deposits and then liberate the lode with its powerful mining laser. Next time you're planetside, be sure you bring this attachment or risk leaving easy credits behind.

grin_multitool_01_salvage.label: Cambio-Lite SRT Attachment
grin_multitool_01_salvage.description: MUST BUY BASE MULTI-TOOL TO USE: "Pyro RYT Multi-Tool" Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial Item Type: Multi-Tool Attachment Class: Salvage and Repair Greycat delivers once again, bringing their popular salvage and repair tool (SRT) as an attachment for the Multi-Tool. Though not as powerful as the Cambio, the Cambio-Lite also collects and converts alloys and polymers found in scrap into recycled material composite that can either be sold or used to make quick repairs. Whether stripping salvage for creds or patching a hull to make a ship space-safe, the Cambio-Lite is ready to get to work.

grin_multitool_01_tractorbeam.label: TruHold Tractor Beam Attachment

With its impressive and efficient pull/draw ratio and easy-to-read range finder, the TruHold can be used solo or paired with other beams to tackle heavier targets. Plus, the TruHold has the added benefit of functioning as a personal zero-G traversal device when coupled to an object with a high enough mass.

hdgw_pistol_ballistic_01.label: Salvo Frag Pistol
hdgw_pistol_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Hedeby Gunworks Item Type: Frag Pistol Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 8 Rate Of Fire: 140 rpm Effective Range: 80 m / 10 m (Charged) Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) While the Salvo can be used as a normal pistol, Hedeby didn’t stop there. With a longer trigger pull, a freezing primer is injected into the chamber and when released, the heavy firing pin hits with enough force to pulverize the supercooled casing. Accidentally developed as an attempt to mitigate overheating, this charged fire option discharges a deadly spray of high-velocity fragments followed by an ear-shattering boom.

hdgw_pistol_ballistic_01_engraved01.label: Salvo Saeed Frag Pistol

With a longer trigger pull, a freezing primer is injected into the chamber and when released, the heavy firing pin hits with enough force to pulverize the supercooled casing. Accidentally developed as an attempt to mitigate overheating, this charged fire option discharges a deadly spray of high-velocity fragments followed by an ear-shattering boom. This special edition pistol features beautifully detailed scrollwork personally design by Hedeby master gunsmith Keisha Saeed.

Enemy radars caught within the grenade’s radius get flooded with enough fake signals to make their heads spin. Allowing you the advantage to either attack or escape.

kegr_fire_extinguisher_01.label: APX Fire Extinguisher
kegr_fire_extinguisher_01.description: Manufacturer: KE Group Item Type: Fire Extinguisher Class: Gadget Magazine Size: Gas Canister Rate of Fire: Constant Effective Range: 3-4 m The KE Group's APX Fire Extinguisher has been rated a best-in-class consumer grade safety equipment for well-over a decade making it the industry standard in fire prevention. Filled with a patented gaseous cooling compound, the extinguisher can rapidly smother any fire in sight. The digital screen on the device allows you to monitor the local temperature to help you contain and eliminate fire hazards.

kegr_fire_extinguisher_01_mag.label: APX Fire Extinguisher Canister
kegr_fire_extinguisher_01_mag.description: Item Type: Extinguisher Refill This canister refills the APX Fire Extinguisher with a full tank of the KE Group's patented cooling compound.

klwe_grapplebeam_01.label: Kagi RTD
klwe_grapplebeam_01.description: Klaus & Werner’s Kagi RTD (Rapid Traversal Device) is an add-on for their popular Arclight II laser pistol. The Kagi generates a highly focused field for the rapid traversal of a zero-g environment and features a range sensor that dynamically shifts polarity to insure safe velocities during movement.

klwe_optics_disp_x8_s3.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Monitor Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 8x Aim Time: +0% Size: 3 While conventional scopes can induce eyestrain after extended periods of use, the Touchstone 8x monitor from Klaus & Werner provides ultra-critical eye relief and allows for “heads up” shooting where you are able to simultaneously track targets and observe environmental conditions. Built to cater to a variety of shooters, the Touchstone's reliability and clarity makes it the ideal choice for tactical rifles like the Arrowhead.

klwe_pistol_energy_01.label: Arclight Pistol
klwe_pistol_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Pistol Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) A handheld laser made famous as Kyle Fenris’ sidearm on the hit vid show The Frontier, the Klaus & Werner Model II Arclight has become extremely popular on the civilian market. Despite its media appeal, the Model II offers a higher rate of fire than any of its ballistic counterparts. While that may diminish the weapon's stopping power, its power cell offers more than enough shots to finish the job.

klwe_smg_energy_01.label: Lumin V SMG
klwe_smg_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: SMG Class: Laser Battery Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 562.5 rpm Effective Range: 25m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Klaus & Werner's expert craftsmanship is once again on full display to make the Lumin V laser compact energy rifle even more deadly and dependable. A new "interval autofire" mode blasts five-round barrages when the trigger is held down, utilizing the target saturation that comes with autofire while providing breaks to recompensate aim. Even when constantly on the attack, the gun's excellent design provides low recoil and a tight spread.

klwe_smg_energy_01_mag.label: Lumin V SMG Battery (45 cap)
klwe_smg_energy_01_mag.description: Item Type: Battery Capacity: 45 Replacement battery for Klaus & Werner's Lumin V SMG.

klwe_smg_energy_blue_gold_01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: SMG Class: Laser Battery Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 562.5 rpm Effective Range: 25m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Klaus & Werner's expert craftsmanship is once again on full display to make the Lumin V laser compact energy rifle even more deadly and dependable. klwe_sniper_energy_01_5x.label: Arrowhead Sniper Rifle 5x Scope
klwe_sniper_energy_01_5x.description: This telescopic sight attachment for the Arrowhead rifle allows 5 times optical magnification.

klwe_sniper_energy_01_luminalia_red01.label: Arrowhead "Lamplighter" Sniper Rifle
klwe_sniper_energy_01_luminalia_red01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 50 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) Klaus & Werner’s Arrowhead Model VI long-range energy rifle features a fiberglass composite body capable of withstanding any number of rigorous environments both in atmosphere and out. Built with a precision stock, compound scope and built-in bipod, the Arrowhead offers a stable and devastating weapon for operators who want to keep their distance, but stay in the fight. First released during Luminalia, the Lamplighter edition was inspired by the traditional red holiday color.

klwe_sniper_energy_01_cen01.label: Arrowhead "Voyager" Sniper Rifle
klwe_sniper_energy_01_cen01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 50 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Survey the way ahead with the Voyager edition of the Klaus & Werner Arrowhead energy sniper rifle. The fiberglass composite body features a checkered metallic finish, while its blue and orange high-powered scope honors the ICC Stellar Surveyors. Chart a path to safety or surprise the enemy with this reliable long-range energy rifle.

klwe_sniper_energy_01_imp01.label: Arrowhead "Pathfinder" Sniper Rifle
klwe_sniper_energy_01_imp01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 50 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Klaus & Werner elevate the Arrowhead energy sniper rifle with the Pathfinder edition. Its bronze precision stock and compound scope feature a satin finish and elegant etchings. These elements create a weapon that's devastating from a distance and dazzling from up close.

klwe_ubarrel_flsh_s1.label: Brightspot Flashlight Purple
klwe_ubarrel_flsh_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The Brightspot flashlight embodies Klaus & Werner's engineering ethos. A simple and sturdy design built to withstand intense combat and environmental conditions means the Brightspot always works when you need it most. lbco_pistol_energy_01_chromic01.description: Manufacturer: Lightning Bolt Co. Item Type: Pistol Class: Electron Battery Size: 10 Rate Of Fire: 350 rpm Effective Range: 35m Attachments: Optics (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Engineering excellence only scratches the surface of the distinct Yubarev pistol. Former merc turned weapon manufacturing mogul Irina Arkady oversaw every aspect of the weapon, imbuing it with power, practicality, and panache. Featuring a classic woodgrain grip and cutting edge barrel design, the Yubarev fires a charged electron shot that impacts not only your target, amplifying the charge with each hit, but can spread to additional conductive targets in range. A special pearlescent coating has been applied to the Mirage edition to make the weapon gleam a range of colors based on how you look at it.

lbco_pistol_energy_01_mag.label: Yubarev Pistol Battery (10 cap)
lbco_pistol_energy_01_mag.description: Item Type: Battery Capacity: 10 This battery for the Yubarev Pistol holds enough electron energy for 10 shots.

Featuring a classic woodgrain grip and cutting edge barrel design, the Yubarev fires a charged electron shot that impacts not only your target, amplifying the charge with each hit, but can spread to additional conductive targets in range. A lustrous orange coating makes the Igniter edition a colorful addition to any loadout.

The exclusive Deadeye edition is black with gold highlights.

lbco_sniper_energy_01.label: Atzkav Sniper Rifle
lbco_sniper_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Lightning Bolt Co. Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Electron Magazine Size: 5 Rate Of Fire: 30 rpm Effective Range: 150m+ Attachments: Optics (S3), Underbarrel (S2) The Atzkav is a unique precision sniper rifle from Lightning Bolt Co. Once the charging handle is engaged, it accurately fires a charged electron to deal significant energy damage that spreads to nearby conductive targets. This special pulse effect also leaves a residual charge in the strike area that increases damage delivered by subsequent electron shots. Alongside the rifle's special firing capabilities, the Atzkav is best known for its distinct barrel that crackles with energy when powering its next shot.

m_cds_undersuit_armor_02_star_marine_hea.label: ADP-mk4 Heavy Armor
m_cds_undersuit_armor_02_star_marine_hea.description: When there's a difficult job at hand, you want to ensure that you can see it through to the end. Clark Defense Systems' ADP-mk4 heavy armor allows Marines to remain in active combat situations for a longer duration with more loadout options, while it's powered frame provides near unfettered movement despite the protection it offers.

m_slaver_undersuit_armor_02_star_marine_.label: Defiance Heavy Armor
m_slaver_undersuit_armor_02_star_marine_.description: Incorporating the same manufacturing know-how and expertise that the UEE Marines have come to rely on, Clark Defense Systems has designed their civilian-line of Defiance heavy armors to stand firm in the face of even the most adverse combat scenarios with its three-star rated protective plating and fully integrated mobility framework.

mug_big_bennys_1_a.label: Big Benny's Mug
mug_big_bennys_1_a.description: Grab Drink! This playful Big Benny's mug features the brand's iconic mascot. Its unique dual layer design features a chip and fade proof ceramic that feels comfortable in the hand with special plastic coating on the lip and handle to ensure it's never too hot to touch.

mug_orison_2_a.label: Finley the Stormwal Mug
mug_orison_2_a.description: Made from durable stoneware, the Finley the Stormwal mug features the mascot's iconic grin and inquisitive eyes. This fun mug will keep beverages warm and bring a smile to your face.

mug_star_kitten_1_a.label: Star Kitten Mug
mug_star_kitten_1_a.description: The cuteness can't be contained but hot beverages can be with this Star Kitten mug. Personally designed by the character's legendary creator Genady Kuzo, it features an extra large handle that makes it easy to hold and is constructed with an ultra-durable ceramic so its adorableness won't chip or fade away.

none_lmg_ballistic_01.label: Pulverizer LMG
none_lmg_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: LMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 120 Rate Of Fire: 355 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Nothing like ripping through a huge mag of .50 cal bullets to scare away unwanted guests. Based on a modified FS9, the Pulverizer LMG wastes no time with pleasantries, instead lends itself to a more direct confrontational approach.
