none_lmg_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 120 This magazine for the Pulverizer LMG comes pre-loaded with one hundred and twenty .50 caliber rounds.

none_melee_01.label: Shiv
none_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: N/A A deadly, improvised knife made by an industrious prisoner by securing a sharpened piece of metal to an OxyPen with a bit of thin cord. Considered contraband within prison facilities.

none_pistol_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Pistol Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 185 rpm Effective Range: 10 m Attachments: Optics (S1), Barrel (NA), Underbarrel (S1) Firing three shotgun shells with each pull of the trigger thanks to it's triple-barrel construction, the bolt-action Tripledown pistol is ready to blast its way through anything from the smallest disagreements to massive dustups.

none_shotgun_ballistic_01.label: Deadrig Shotgun
none_shotgun_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Shotgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 8 Rate Of Fire: 120 rpm Effective Range: 0-10 m Attachments: N/A The Deadrig is a high powered, double-barreled shotgun with a simple design pieced together from junkyard scraps. Prioritizing power above all else, the Deadrig lacks the refinement of mass-produced weapons and suffers from heavy recoil.

none_shotgun_ballistic_01_green01.label: Deadrig 'Noxious' Shotgun

none_smg_energy_01.label: Ripper "Sunblock" SMG
none_smg_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: SMG Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 60 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m Scrapped together from whatever parts and pieces were available, the Ripper SMG can probably do enough damage to get you out of a tight spot. none_special_ballistic_01_collector01.label: Boomtube "Clanguard" Rocket Launcher
none_special_ballistic_01_collector01.description: Manufacturer: Unknown Item Type: Launcher Class: Rocket Magazine Size: 1 Rate Of Fire: 20 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Who's got time to aim? Once you got enough room to clear the arming distance, just point the Boomtube launcher at whatever you don't like, squeeze the trigger, and watch the triple-grenade rocket thingy take care of the rest. Sometimes simple is best. The Clanguard version has been modified with Vanduul materials and alien artifacts.

none_special_ballistic_01_rocket.label: Boomtube Rocket
none_special_ballistic_01_rocket.description: Item Type: Rocket Capacity: 1 Made for the Boomtube launcher, this "rocket" is pretty much three grenades strapped together. Good luck!

nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1.label: Gamma (1x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Whether under the blazing sun or on the dark side of a moon, the NV-TAC Gamma projects an easy to see reticle to help ensure your shot finds its mark.

nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1_tint01.label: Gamma "Black Op" (1x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x1_s1_tint01.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Whether under the blazing sun or on the dark side of a moon, the NV-TAC Gamma projects an easy to see reticle to help ensure your shot finds its mark. The "Black Op" scope variant is black.

nvtc_optics_holo_x2_s1.label: Gamma Duo (2x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x2_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 NV-TAC extensively tested the Gamma Duo across a range of extreme temperatures to assure that thermal drift doesn't affect the accuracy of this 2x magnifier sight.

nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1.label: Gamma Plus (3x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 NV-TAC's Gamma Plus is a 3x magnifier sight that utilizes ReadyBrite projection for quick target acquisition. Its durable design makes it perfect for any tactical situation.

nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1_tint01.label: Gamma Plus "Lumen" (3x Holographic)
nvtc_optics_holo_x3_s1_tint01.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Projection Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 NV-TAC's Gamma Plus is a 3x magnifier sight that utilizes ReadyBrite projection for quick target acquisition. Its durable design makes it perfect for any tactical situation. The "Lumen" edition is matte white.

nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1.label: Delta (1x Reflex)
nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Reflex Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x Aim Time: +15% Size: 1 Ideal for civilians and professionals, the Delta non-magnifying reflex sight from NV-TAC provides a precise illuminated target marker, visible across a wide range of light levels.

nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1_firerats01.label: Delta "Scorched" (1x Reflex)
nvtc_optics_rdot_x1_s1_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Reflex Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x - 3x Aim Time: +2.5% Aim Recoil: -10% Visual Recoil: -10% Parallax: Medium Size: 1 Ideal for civilians and professionals, the Delta non-magnifying reflex sight from NV-TAC provides a precise illuminated target marker, visible across a wide range of light levels. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2.label: Tau Plus (4x Telescopic)
nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 4x Aim Time: +25% Size: 2 The Tau Plus 4x telescopic sight from NV-TAC uses a proprietary optics coating to ensure a crystal clear image regardless of light levels and conditions, allowing you to precisely engage targets at medium range.

nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2_firerats01.label: Tau Plus "Scorched" (4x Telescopic)
nvtc_optics_tsco_x4_s2_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x - 4x Aim Time: +5% Visual Recoil: -25% Parallax: Medium Size: 2 The Tau Plus 4x telescopic sight from NV-TAC uses a proprietary optics coating to ensure a crystal clear image regardless of light levels and conditions, allowing you to precisely engage targets at medium range. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

nvtc_optics_tsco_x8_s3.label: Theta Pro (8x Telescopic)
nvtc_optics_tsco_x8_s3.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 8x Aim Time: +0% Size: 3 Carefully crafted and calibrated, the Theta Pro delivers precise and effective long distance combat engagement capabilities thanks to its powerful 8x telescopic sight.

nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1.label: FieldLite Flashlight
nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The FieldLite is a tough and tactical underbarrel flashlight. Featuring a corrosion-proof body and impact resistant lens, NV-TAC tested the attachment across a variety of environments and conditions to ensure it works when needed most.

nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_02.label: FieldLite Flashlight Blue
nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_02.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The FieldLite Blue is a tough and tactical underbarrel flashlight. Featuring a corrosion-proof body and impact resistant lens, NV-TAC tested the attachment across a variety of environments and conditions to ensure it works when needed most. This special Blue edition projects a focused blue light in the shape of a square. The molded lens keeps falloff to a minimum, making it perfect for illuminating targets at distance.

nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_03.label: FieldLite Flashlight Yellow
nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_03.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The FieldLite Yellow is a tough and tactical underbarrel flashlight. Featuring a corrosion-proof body and impact resistant lens, NV-TAC tested the attachment across a variety of environments and conditions to ensure it works when needed most. This special Yellow edition projects a scattered yellow starlike pattern making it preferable for target acquisition at medium distance.

nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_04.label: FieldLite Flashlight Red
nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_04.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The FieldLite Red is a tough and tactical underbarrel flashlight. Featuring a corrosion-proof body and impact resistant lens, NV-TAC tested the attachment across a variety of environments and conditions to ensure it works when needed most. This special Red edition projects a red light in the shape of a circle. Ideal for situations when illumination on close range targets is essential without projecting a bright light that could be easily spotted.

nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_firerats01.label: FieldLite "Scorched" Flashlight
nvtc_ubarrel_flsh_s1_firerats01.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Flashlight Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 The FieldLite is a tough and tactical underbarrel flashlight. Featuring a corrosion-proof body and impact resistant lens, NV-TAC tested the attachment across a variety of environments and conditions to ensure it works when needed most. The Scorched edition features a unique flame patina.

nvtc_ubarrel_lasr_s1.label: 250-E Laser Pointer
nvtc_ubarrel_lasr_s1.description: Manufacturer: NV-TAC Type: Laser Pointer Attachment Point: Underbarrel Size: 1 Spread: -12.5% The 250-E is an intuitive aiming aid that produces a laser visible to you and others. NV-TAC built the attachment to be lightweight yet durable so it won't add extra weight to your weapon.

plushy_hercules_1_a.label: C2 Hercules Starlifter Plushie
plushy_hercules_1_a.description: Get your hands on Crusader's cargo hauling stalwart with this plushie version of the C2 Hercules Starlifter.

plushy_carrack_1_a_uncarryable.label: Carrack Plushie
plushy_carrack_1_a_uncarryable.description: Encourage an adventurous spirit with this soft and squeezable Carrack plushie modeled after Anvil's classic exploration ship.

plushy_cutlass_black.label: Cutlass Black Plushie
plushy_cutlass_black.description: This soft plushie is modeled after Drake Interplanetary's widely popular multifunction ship the Cutlass Black. Even the most hardened spacefarer will appreciate its gentle squish.

plushy_cutlass_blue.label: Cutlass Blue Plushie
plushy_cutlass_blue.description: This soft plushie is modeled after Drake Interplanetary's Cutlass Blue, a patrol ship variant designed to protect citizens and suppress dangerous outlaws.

plushy_cutlass_red.label: Cutlass Red Plushie
plushy_cutlass_red.description: This soft plushie is modeled after Drake Interplanetary's Cutlass Red, a variant designed for emergency response. Whereas the real ship contains a med bay to help heal physical wounds, this plushie might just help heal emotional ones.

plushy_cutlass_steel.label: Cutlass Steel Plushie
plushy_cutlass_steel.description: This soft plushie is modeled after Drake Interplanetary's Cutlass Steel, a troop transport variant intended to serve as both dropship and gunship.

plushy_orison_whale_1_a_1h.label: Finley the Stormwal Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_a_1h.description: Finley the Stormwal loves sailing through the clouds in Crusader's atmosphere. Much like Crusader's ships, Finley is big, graceful, and quite the sight to behold. Now this majestic creature can accompany you on a journey through the stars with this soft and squeezable plushie.

plushy_orison_whale_1_a_2h.label: Finley the Stormwal Large Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_a_2h.description: Finley the Stormwal loves sailing through the clouds in Crusader's atmosphere. Much like Crusader's ships, Finley is big, graceful, and quite the sight to behold. Now this majestic blue stormwal can accompany you on a journey through the stars with this large, soft, and squeezable plushie.

plushy_orison_whale_1_b_1h.label: Francis the Stormwal Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_b_1h.description: Francis the Stormwal loves sailing through the clouds in Crusader's atmosphere. Much like Crusader's ships, Francis is big, graceful, and quite the sight to behold. Now this majestic creature can accompany you on a journey through the stars with this soft and squeezable plushie.

plushy_orison_whale_1_b_2h.label: Francis the Stormwal Large Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_b_2h.description: Francis the Stormwal loves sailing through the clouds in Crusader's atmosphere. Much like Crusader's ships, Francis is big, graceful, and quite the sight to behold. Now this majestic purple stormwal can accompany you on a journey through the stars with this large, soft, and squeezable plushie.

plushy_orison_whale_1_c_1h.label: Finley the Stormwal Luminalia Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_c_1h.description: Finley the Stormwal loves Luminalia so much they even gets dressed up for the occasion. This festive Finley plushie is decked out in red and green, making them an excellent guest for any Luminalia celebration.

plushy_orison_whale_1_c_2h.label: Finley the Stormwal Large Luminalia Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_c_2h.description: Finley the Stormwal loves Luminalia so much they even gets dressed up for the occasion. This festive and large Finley plushie is decked out in red and green, making them an excellent guest for any Luminalia celebration.

plushy_orison_whale_1_d_2h.label: Francis the Party Animal Plushie
plushy_orison_whale_1_d_2h.description: There's only one thing Francis the Stormwal loves more than sailing through the clouds in Crusader's atmosphere and that's a good party. Make Francis the featured guest at your next event with this soft and squeezable plushie that's already wearing a hat fit for the occasion.

plushy_penguin_1.label: Pico the Penguin Plushie
plushy_penguin_1.description: This adorable mascot of New Babbage loves nothing more than carving their way down the snow covered slopes of microTech.

plushy_penguin_1_b.label: Pico the Penguin Party Animal Green Plushie
plushy_penguin_1_b.description: No one can shred the slopes or celebrate quite like Pico the Penguin. This version of the charming microTech mascot makes any occasion more fun and festive by sporting a vibrant green jacket and playful party hat.

plushy_penguin_2_b.label: Pico the Penguin Party Animal Orange Plushie
plushy_penguin_2_b.description: No one can shred the slopes or celebrate quite like Pico the Penguin. This version of the charming microTech mascot makes any occasion more fun and festive by sporting a vibrant orange jacket and playful party hat.

plushy_penguin_2_c.label: Pico the Penguin Luminalia Plushie
plushy_penguin_2_c.description: Even Pico the Penguin takes time away from shredding the slopes to celebrate Luminalia. This version of microTech's charming mascot features him in a red and green jacket and holding a Luminalia-themed snowboard.

plushy_penguin_3_b.label: Pico the Penguin Party Animal Purple Plushie
plushy_penguin_3_b.description: No one can shred the slopes or celebrate quite like Pico the Penguin. This version of the charming microTech mascot makes any occasion more fun and festive by sporting a vibrant purple jacket and playful party hat.

plushy_vanduul_1_a.label: Vanduul Plushie
plushy_vanduul_1_a.description: Not all Vanduul crave battle, some crave cuddles. Intricately crafted using a high-grade polyester, this plushie is ready to conquer your heart with its durable plastic armor, felt shoulder pads, and elegant gold detailing.

prar_pistol_energy_01.label: Judge Stun Pistol
prar_pistol_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Preacher Armaments Item Type: Pistol Class: Energy (Electron) Battery Size: TBD Rate of Fire: Beam Effective Range: 10m Attachments: Optics (S1), Underbarrel (S1) Designed to stun and eventually incapacitate targets in close quarters, the Preacher Armaments Judge Stun Pistol is lightweight, functional, and effective.

rgrin_tractor_01_mag.label: Battery This replacement battery powers Greycat's MaxLift tractor beam, so you can keep working without any delay.
rgrin_tractor_01_mag.description: Item Type: Battery This replacement battery powers Greycat's MaxLift tractor beam, so you can keep working without any delay.

rrs_melee_01.label: TBF-4 Combat Knife
rrs_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: Roussimoff Rehabilitation Systems Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm Built for combat but ready for everyday use, the TBF-4 combat knife will get the job done. Built with an ultrastrong 1055 carbon steel blade, this tactical knife ends with a tanto point perfect for stabbing and penetrating hard surfaces while the serrated spine can be used to slice and shred. Beautifully balanced, the TBF-4 also features a grip with two finger grooves to ensure your hand stays in place during use.

rrs_melee_01_arctic01.label: TBF-4 "Rime" Combat Knife

sasu_pistol_toy_01_mag.label: WowBlast Desperado Toy Pistol Magazine (10 cap)
sasu_pistol_toy_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 10 This magazine for the WowBlast Desperado holds ten darts.

sasu_pistol_toy_01_shared.label: WowBlast Desperado Toy Pistol Magazine (10 cap)
sasu_pistol_toy_01_shared.description: Manufacturer: Sakura Sun Item Type: Toy Pistol Class: Foam Dart Magazine Size: 10 Rate Of Fire: 450 rpm Effective Range: 35m Make friendly fire fun with the Sakura Sun WowBlast Desperado. Playfully fire foam darts at friends or fictitious foes with these ultra-colorful plastic toy pistols. Whether killing time at a landing zone or during a long-haul through the stars, the WowBlast toy line provides lighthearted excitement and entertainment for the entire family. The Desperado toy pistol is available in several vibrant colors, each featuring a unique sound effect!

trophy_citizencon2955_1_a.label: CitizenCon 2955 Trophy
trophy_citizencon2955_1_a.description: Constructed from a core sample of rock extracted from the asteroid Delamar in Nyx, this commemorative CitizenCon 2955 trophy features a carved center inspired by Levski's signature borehole.

un_portable_light_1_a_cyan.label: Cyan QuikFlarePro
un_portable_light_1_a_cyan.description: Manufacturer: Shubin Interstellar Illuminate the way forward or signal for help with the Cyan QuikFlarePro from Shubin Interstellar. For centuries, miners have counted on this flare as part of their core toolkit, thanks to its tried and true design and durability that ensures it stays ablaze in the various harsh weather and difficult atmospheric conditions encountered across the 'verse. The QuikFlarePro uses advanced tech to glow longer than regular flares.

utfl_crossbow_ballistic_01.label: Novian Crossbow
utfl_crossbow_ballistic_01.description: Manufacturer: UltiFlex Item Type: Crossbow Magazine Size: 5 Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Underbarrel (S3) The craftsman at UltiFlex went through hundreds of prototypes to discover the perfect lightweight material with the right combination of strength and flexibility for its Novian crossbow, an ideal companion on everything from frontier expeditions to tactical infiltrations. With a pull of its firing action, the Novian near-silently launches a heavy bolt that shatters on impact causing devastating damage to close-range targets.

utfl_crossbow_ballistic_01_mag.label: Novian Bolt Magazine (5 Cap)
utfl_crossbow_ballistic_01_mag.description: Item Type: Magazine Capacity: 5 This magazine for the Novian crossbow comes preloaded with five bolts.

utfl_melee_01.label: FSK-8 Combat Knife
utfl_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: UltiFlex Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm The FSK-8 Combat Knife from UltiFlex is as sparse a weapon as you can get. While many become enamored with dazzling tech of modern weaponry, UltiFlex has focused on making a simple effective combat tool. Featuring a balanced 1055 carbon steel blade honed to a razor's edge, this knife is capable of handling all the abuse you can throw at it.

vncl_melee_01.label: VCK-1 Blade
vncl_melee_01.description: Manufacturer: UltiFlex Item Type: Knife Class: Melee Size: 16 cm Renowned as Humanity's fiercest enemy, the weapons wielded by the Vanduul are some of the most feared in the universe. Taking inspiration from those brutal knives, the VCK-1 from UltiFlex features a split blade, ceremonial detailing, and has been finished with a unique patina that closely resembles the Vanduul's own bespoke alloys.

volt_lmg_energy_01.label: Fresnel Energy LMG
volt_lmg_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Verified Offworld Laser Technologies Item Type: LMG Class: Energy (Electron) Battery Size: 165 Rate of Fire: 550 rpm - 220 rpm Effective Range: 50m Attachments: Optics (S3), Underbarrel (S3) The engineers at VOLT crafted the Fresnel LMG to bring a powerful energy weapon to the frontlines, one that can initiate a fight with a rapid spray of deadly blasts. As the weapon heats up, the shots become slower and more powerful, but be careful of overheating. A weapon of this magnitude demands a strong foundation; operators are encouraged to fire from a crouching position to allow for better recoil management.

mining_head_s00_arbor_scitem.label: S0 Arbor

mining_head_s00_hofstede_scitem.label: S00 Hofstede
mining_head_s00_hofstede_scitem.description: Manufacturer: Shubin Interstellar Item Type: Mining Laser Size: S0 Grade: B Optimal Range: 30 m Maximum Range: 30 m Gather Radius: 1 m Extraction Throughput: 4 cSCU/s Power Transfer: 35 Instability: +30 % Resistance: -40 % Optimal Charge Window Size: +40 % Optimal Charge Window Rate: +20 % Throttle min: 20% This is the default mining head for the ROC DS slightly stronger than the Arbor

mining_head_s00_klein_scitem.label: Lawson Mining Laser
mining_head_s00_klein_scitem.description: Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics Item Type: Mining Laser Size: S0 Grade: C Optimal Range: 25 m Maximum Range: 25 m Gather Radius: 1 m Extraction Throughput: 4 cSCU/s Power Transfer: 35 Instability: +30 % Resistance: -40 % Optimal Charge Window Size: +40 % Optimal Charge Window Rate: 0% Throttle min: 20% The Lawson mining laser was developed by Argo Astronautics and specifically tuned for the ATLS GEO to make mining resources from the power suit as intuitive as possible.

qdrv_rsi_s02_khaos_scitem.label: Khaos
qdrv_rsi_s02_khaos_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 2 Grade: C Class: Civilian RSI's Khaos has been tuned to provide dependable performance with reliable construction. Once you've got this strapped in, you'll appreciate the order this quantum drive brings to the chaos of travel.

qdrv_rsi_s03_erebos_scitem.label: Erebos
qdrv_rsi_s03_erebos_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Civilian The Erebos exemplifies RSI's commitment to excellence. This high quality quantum drive constantly ranks atop "Best of" lists for both critics and consumers.

qdrv_rsi_s03_metis_scitem.label: Metis
qdrv_rsi_s03_metis_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian There's no room for error when bending space and time to travel incredible distances. So put your trust in RSI, a company that's delivered quality components to the public since the dawn of space flight.

qdrv_rsi_s03_tyche_scitem.label: Tyche
qdrv_rsi_s03_tyche_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: RSI Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Civilian The Tyche quantum drive harmoniously balances performance, durability, and stealth to create a well-rounded component capable of adeptly handling a variety of situations.

qdrv_tars_s01_wayfare_scitem.label: Wayfare
qdrv_tars_s01_wayfare_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 1 Grade: D Class: Civilian Speed through space without breaking the bank. The Warfare is a small quantum drive from Tarsus that was specifically designed to help make space travel affordable for the masses.

qdrv_tars_s02_quest_scitem.label: Quest
qdrv_tars_s02_quest_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 2 Grade: D Class: Civilian Why mess with perfection? Tarsus has been manufacturing the Quest drive for centuries to provide everyone an affordable medium-sized component to carry them on their adventures.

qdrv_tars_s03_drifter_scitem.label: Drifter
qdrv_tars_s03_drifter_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: D Class: Civilian Balancing craftsmanship and cost, the Drifter provides renowned Tarsus performance at an affordable price.

qdrv_tars_s03_wanderer_scitem.label: Wanderer
qdrv_tars_s03_wanderer_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Tarsus Size: 3 Grade: C Class: Civilian Tarsus carefully designed and tuned the Wanderer into an all-around solid quantum drive, making it one of the more popular components in their revered line-up.

qdrv_wetk_s02_xl1_scitem.label: XL-1
qdrv_wetk_s02_xl1_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 2 Grade: A Class: Military Wei-Tek might be a new company, but their line of military-grade components is already gaining notoriety. The XL-1 is their premier medium quantum drive that expertly blends performance and durability.

qdrv_wetk_s03_balandin_scitem.label: Balandin
qdrv_wetk_s03_balandin_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: B Class: Military Wei-Tek built the Balandin with military and security personnel in mind. Following a series of test runs by veterans, engineers accelerated the spool and calibration times while also improving the component's precision and stability.

qdrv_wetk_s03_ts2_scitem.label: TS-2
qdrv_wetk_s03_ts2_scitem.description: Item Type: Quantum Drive Manufacturer: Wei-Tek Size: 3 Grade: A Class: Military Advanced protective plating provides the TS-2 with superior durability and protection against the elements and aggressors, making it an ideal quantum drive for those moments when danger calls.

ghostarena_keycard_01.description: The best rewards are worth fighting for!

ghostarena_keycard_03.description: The best rewards are worth fighting for!

hexpenetratorchip.label: XenoThreat Encryption Key
hexpenetratorchip.description: A custom chipset bearing a XenoThreat symbol. It appears to have a cryptokey interface for some encryption or decryption purpose.

physical_currency_scrip_council_1.label: Council Scrip
physical_currency_scrip_council_1.description: Consider this scrip your reward for a job well done. While not credits, it can be traded in to certain people for certain things.

physical_currency_scrip_merc_1.label: MG Scrip
physical_currency_scrip_merc_1.description: Issued by the Mercenary Guild, this scrip guarantees the bearer goods in trade at authorized locations as outlined in the guild’s bylaws and statutes 202C-05A. Not legal tender.

accesscard_001.label: Mainframe Access Card
accesscard_001.description: This electronic card is an authentication device used to control access to secure systems. To ensure stolen cards cannot lead to ongoing security issues, each card must be reauthorized at regular intervals to remain active.

eld_shirt_04_iae2020.label: IAE 2950 T-Shirt
eld_shirt_04_iae2020.description: When Audrey Timmerman and friends gathered in 2670 to test her ship's experimental thrusters no one could have predicted the event would evolve into the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo. Nearly three centuries later, this grey t-shirt with white ribbing commemorates the 2950 IAE. Featuring the event's logo on the front and back, all proceeds from the shirt's sale will go to Simpods Pals, a charity founded by Timmerman to help underprivileged children learn to fly.

gys_jacket_01_01_12.label: Carnifex Armor Core Shutdown
gys_jacket_01_01_12.description: Item Type: Light Armor Damage Reduction: 20% Temp. Rating: -5 / 38 °C Radiation Protection: 26000 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 145.8 REM/s Backpack Compatibility: Light This homemade armor provides a marginal amount of protection but maximum attitude. It's aggressively styled with skulls and other intimidating accessories associated with those living on the edge. Wearing such a distinct look may either keep people away... or draw them to you. The Shutdown version features black and gray coloring with dark metal accents.

gys_undersuit_01_01_12.description: Item Type: Undersuit Damage Reduction: 5% Temp. Rating: -30 / 60 °C Radiation Protection: 15200 REM Radiation Scrub Rate: 81 REM/s G-Force Tolerance: +90% Carrying Capacity: 8.0 µSCU Confidently venture into the unknown with the Deep-Space undersuit. Smartly designed with several overlapping sections to guarantee the suit's integrity, Gyson has created an affordable and fashionable undersuit that helps make space travel more accessible to all. The Shutdown version features black and gray coloring with dark metal accents.

hackingchip_001.label: FUNT
hackingchip_001.description: This powerful cryptokey is considered to be one of the highest caliber hacking tools available. Long rumored to have been originally designed for Advocacy use, these difficult to acquire devices have only recently been making its way into the hands of criminals. Most who have used them say they are worth the effort to acquire. With the cryptokey's official Advocacy designation unknown, the name FUNT is a shortening of the device's common descriptor - 'fast and untraceable.'

hackingchip_002.label: Ripper
hackingchip_002.description: A modified version of the Tigersclaw cryptokey, the Ripper earned its name for being able to "rip systems apart.' Incredibly fast, what it gains in speed, it also gains in instability as the extra draws on the processor results in greater error frequency.

hackingchip_003.label: Tigersclaw
hackingchip_003.description: A standard tool in many IT and CompSec kits, Blue Triangle's Tigersclaw is considered a go-to cryptokey for good reason. With decent speed and reliability, in the hands of a trained operator it can be used to gain admin-level repair privileges to most systems.

hackingchip_004.label: Re-Authorizer
hackingchip_004.description: Released by Lortell Computing as a way to gain access to a system with a lost or forgotten password, the slow but reliable Re-Authorizer cryptokey is considered an affordable option for people who want to attempt to repair their system themselves.

hackingchip_005.label: Walesko
hackingchip_005.description: Instructions for how to build this simple cryptokey were first published publicly in 2887 by political activist Aris Walesko who had hoped that it would lead to greater governmental transparency. Though not up to the standards of most modern security protocols, this slow and unreliable device it is still in use today owing to its ease of construction and wide availability from numerous small manufacturers.

hackingchip_006.label: icePick
hackingchip_006.description: Initially made to allow microTech customer support technicians to access and diagnose security-locked systems, the icePick cryptokey was named by the team for its ability to "quickly break through frozen code-blocks." Today, the powerful enterprise-level cryptokey has become available for direct purchase, allowing users and private IT professionals to problem solve issues themselves when they cannot be serviced by microTech technician.

rockcrack_laser_lens_a.label: Sadaryx Focus Lens
rockcrack_laser_lens_a.description: This lens is crafted from durable sadaryx crystals and can be used to focus and improve power-throughput of high-powered industrial laser beams.

rockcrack_laser_powercell_a.label: Lasing Catalyst
rockcrack_laser_powercell_a.description: A dense matrix of absorptive meta-materials that acts as a gain amplifier for high-powered industrial laser beams.

rockcrack_sparkplug_a.label: PGR Capacitor
rockcrack_sparkplug_a.description: This high-capacity industrial capacitor features optimized voltage output to minimize power fluctuations, improving the performance of generators and heavy machinery alike.

srvl_helmet_01_01_12.label: Deadhead Helmet Shutdown
srvl_helmet_01_01_12.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -50 / 80 °C Remind your enemies that death is coming with the Deadhead helmet. In place of a visor, the ghastly visage of a Human skull, lit from within by an infernal glow, is sure to send any opponent running. The Shutdown version features black and gray coloring with dark metal accents.

srvl_helmet_01_01_13.label: Deadhead Helmet Bruiser
srvl_helmet_01_01_13.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -50 / 80 °C Remind your enemies that death is coming with the Deadhead helmet. In place of a visor, the ghastly visage of a Human skull, lit from within by an infernal glow, is sure to send any opponent running. The Bruiser version features dark crimson and midnight blue coloring with polished metal accents.

srvl_helmet_01_01_14.label: Deadhead Helmet Brassy
srvl_helmet_01_01_14.description: Item Type: Medium Armor Damage Reduction: 30% Temp. Rating: -50 / 80 °C Remind your enemies that death is coming with the Deadhead helmet. In place of a visor, the ghastly visage of a Human skull, lit from within by an infernal glow, is sure to send any opponent running. The Brassy version features white coloring with bronze accents.

arma_barrel_comp_s1_contestedzonereward.label: Sion "Tweaker" Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s1_contestedzonereward.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 1 Aim Recoil: +35% Visual Recoil: -30% Recoil Time: -33% Fire Rate: +12.5% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator1. ArmaMod's expertly designed S1 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target. This "Tweaker" version has been unofficially modified for a faster fire rate.

arma_barrel_comp_s2_contestedzonereward.label: Sion "Tweaker" Compensator2
arma_barrel_comp_s2_contestedzonereward.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Ballistic Compensator Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Aim Time: +25% Spread: +25% Aim Recoil: -35% Visual Recoil: -50% Damage: -10% Maintain accuracy by countering muzzle rise with the Sion Compensator2. ArmaMod's expertly designed S2 barrel attachment efficiently expels gasses to keep every shot on target. This "Tweaker" version has been unofficially modified for a smoother firing experience.

arma_barrel_stab_s2_contestedzonereward.label: Emod "Tweaker" Stabilizer2
arma_barrel_stab_s2_contestedzonereward.description: Manufacturer: ArmaMod Type: Energy Stabilizer Attachment Point: Barrel Size: 2 Heat: -80% Aim Recoil: +40% Visual Recoil: -15% Damage: +12.5% Ammo Consumption: +100% ArmaMod designed the Emod Stabilizer2 attachment to improve heat distribution and visual stability allowing for a more precise shot. This "Tweaker" version has been unofficially modified to do more damage at the cost of expending more energy.

flair_inventorycontainer_citizencon2954.label: CitizenCon 2954 Storage Chest
flair_inventorycontainer_citizencon2954.description: Bring home too many keepsakes and memorabilia from the 2954 CitizenCon? Then this functional chest featuring the blue event logo is the perfect storage solution for your hab or hangar.

klwe_optics_holo_x1_5_s1.label: HG-15 Jaeger (1.5x Holographic)
klwe_optics_holo_x1_5_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Holographic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1.5x - 3x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 1 HG-15 Jaeger's features a low power variable magnification providing flexibility when engaging hostiles at close and longer ranges.

klwe_optics_holo_x2_s1.label: HG-2 Jaeger (2x Holographic)
klwe_optics_holo_x2_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Holographic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2x - 4x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 1 Specializing in medium distance combat, the HG-2 Jaeger excels in situations where you want to keep your distance from hostiles.

klwe_optics_holo_x3_s1.label: HG-3 Jaeger (3x Holographic)
klwe_optics_holo_x3_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Holographic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 1 Featuring KLWE's proprietary NocturnaLite hardware, the HG-3 Jaeger provides enhanced vision in low-light situations.

klwe_optics_rdot_x1_s1.label: RD-1 Jaeger (1x Red Dot)
klwe_optics_rdot_x1_s1.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Red Dot Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 1x - 3x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 1 The RD-1 Jaeger's simple and functional design provides pinpoint accuracy and rapid target acquisition in close-quarters combat.

klwe_optics_tsco_2_5x_s2.label: TS-25 Basara (2.5x Telescopic)
klwe_optics_tsco_2_5x_s2.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 2.5x - 5x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 2 Utilizing the precise and immaculately crafted lenses that Klaus & Werner are known for, the TS-25 Basara provides unparalleled clarity and accuracy when equipped.

klwe_optics_tsco_3_5x_s2.label: TS-35 Basara (3.5x Telescopic)
klwe_optics_tsco_3_5x_s2.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Type: Telescopic Attachment Point: Optic Magnification: 3x - 5.5x Aim Time: +5% Parallax: Low Size: 2 The TS-35 Basara continues to expand on the high quality of the Basara series, by adding enhanced magnification to the sights, without compromising on quality.

klwe_sniper_energy_01.label: Arrowhead Sniper Rifle
klwe_sniper_energy_01.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 50 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Attachments: Optics (S3), Barrel (S2), Underbarrel (S2) Klaus & Werner’s Arrowhead Model VI long-range energy rifle features a fiberglass composite body capable of withstanding any number of rigorous environments both in atmosphere and out. Built with a precision stock, compound scope and built-in bipod, the Arrowhead offers a stable and devastating weapon for operators who want to keep their distance, but stay in the fight.

klwe_sniper_energy_01_mag.label: Arrowhead Sniper Rifle Battery (16 cap)
klwe_sniper_energy_01_mag.description: Item Type: Battery Capacity: 16 This compact power source provides the Klaus & Werner Arrowhead rifle enough energy for 16 long-range precise shots.

ptv_paint_camo.label: PTV All Terrain Camouflage: Forest (ATC-F) Livery
ptv_paint_camo.description: ATC-F livery uses a non-reflective paint surface ideal for anyone looking to lower their profile in the wild. Perfect for military, sporting enthusiasts or naturalists.

ptv_paint_cherry.label: PTV Cherry Livery
ptv_paint_cherry.description: Speed isn?t just about mechanics, it?s about perception. Your Greycat will look and feel faster without changing a thing. The Cherry livery topcoat system uses cutting-edge raw materials and composition coating technology to maintain its glossy finish.

ptv_paint_double.label: PTV Agate Gray Livery
ptv_paint_double.description: One of the most popular liveries on the Greycat, Agate Gray is a two-toned paint scheme that brings the buggy?s interior colors as accents on the exterior, unifying the Greycat into a single cohesive aesthetic.

ptv_paint_metal.label: PTV Gunmetal Livery
ptv_paint_metal.description: Who says a buggy can?t be elegant? The Gunmetal livery is a medium gloss, two-component technology that maximizes gloss retention and durability.

ptv_paint_stealth.label: PTV Tactical Stealth Livery
ptv_paint_stealth.description: The Tactical Stealth livery uses a near zero gloss paint that incorporates a catalyzed urethane process for unsurpassed durability making it highly resistant to UV rays, chemicals and chips.

ptv_paint_willys.label: PTV Rifle Green Livery
ptv_paint_willys.description: Rifle Green livery uses a premium two-component technology designed to endure harsher environments without fading or scratching.

skin_scourge_railgun.label: Scourge Railgun (Desert Shadow, Nightstalker)
skin_scourge_railgun.description: Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms Item Type: Railgun Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 10 Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm Effective Range: 200 m Equally devastating to larger threats and hostile vehicles, this shoulder mounted railgun from Apocalypse Arms uses electromagnets to deliver its payload accurately over great distances, making it the Scourge of land, air and space.

skin_p4_ar_rifle.label: P4-AR Rifle (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Nightstalker, Warhawk)
skin_p4_ar_rifle.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 40 Rate Of Fire: 550 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Behring's classic P4-AR rifle features a collapsible stock and shortened barrel, making it an ideal choice for close-quarter firefights. Its accuracy and general ease of use make it universally valued among security, military and civilian users.

skin_p8_sc_smg.label: P8-SC SMG (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Midnight, Nightstalker, Stormfall, Warhawk)
skin_p8_sc_smg.description: Manufacturer: Behring Item Type: SMG Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m When the top fighting force in the universe chooses a weapon as their standard, it pays to stand up and take notice. The Behring-crafted P8-SC has been the ballistic submachine gun of choice for the UEE Marines since it first came off the production line, but since then, many have come to rely on this weapon for their own personal safety and protection.

skin_lh86_pistol.label: LH86 Pistol (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Nightstalker, Stormfall, Warhawk)
skin_lh86_pistol.description: Manufacturer: Gemini Item Type: Pistol Class: Ballistic Magazine Size: 25 Rate Of Fire: 1200 rpm Effective Range: 30 m The LH86 from Gemini is a compact kinetic handgun designed for personal defense and close-quarter combat. A keen eye on ergonomics and balance coupled with hardy construction makes this pistol a natural fit for any shooter in any number of hostile conditions. The LH86 also comes with Tritium low-light sight and a twenty-five round magazine.

skin_arclight_pistol.label: Arclight Pistol (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Midnight, Nightstalker, Stormfall, Warhawk)
skin_arclight_pistol.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Pistol Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 30 Rate Of Fire: 300 rpm Effective Range: 30 m A handheld laser made famous as Kyle Fenris’ sidearm on the hit vid show The Frontier, the Klaus & Werner Model II Arclight has become extremely popular on the civilian market. Despite its media appeal, the Model II offers a higher rate of fire than any of its ballistic counterparts. While that may diminish the weapon's stopping power, its power cell offers more than enough shots to finish the job.

skin_gallant_rifle.label: Gallant Rifle (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Midnight, Nightstalker, Stormfall, Warhawk)
skin_gallant_rifle.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 45 Rate Of Fire: 450 rpm Effective Range: 50 m Dependable assault weapons never go out of style. Klaus & Werner maintains that tradition by unveiling the Gallant. This energy-based assault rifle is capable of providing accurate and sustained fire at targets up to medium range, while its high-capacity power system allows operators to fire considerably more shots per battery.

skin_arrowhead_sniper_rifle.label: Arrowhead Sniper Rifle (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive, Midnight, Nightstalker, Stormfall, Warhawk)
skin_arrowhead_sniper_rifle.description: Manufacturer: Klaus & Werner Item Type: Sniper Rifle Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 20 Rate Of Fire: 50 rpm Effective Range: 100 m Klaus & Werner’s Arrowhead Model VI long-range energy rifle features a fiberglass composite body capable of withstanding any number of rigorous environments both in atmosphere and out. Built with a precision stock, compound scope and built-in bipod, the Arrowhead offers a stable and devastating weapon for operators who want to keep their distance, but stay in the fight.

skin_devastator_shotgun.label: Devastator Shotgun (Boneyard, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Midnight, Nightstalker, Warhawk)
skin_devastator_shotgun.description: Manufacturer: Kastak Arms Item Type: Shotgun Class: Energy (Plasma) Battery Size: 12 Rate Of Fire: 60 rpm Effective Range: 20 m Kastak Arms’ Devastator is a semi-automatic electric shotgun capable of delivering sustained medium range, high-impact plasma blasts for close combat, room clearances and other combat operations. If the situation requires a high-power presence, look no further than the Devastator.

skin_custodian_smg.label: Custodian SMG (Boneyard, Citizen's Pride, Desert Shadow, Executive Edition, Midnight, Nightstalker, Warhawk)
skin_custodian_smg.description: Manufacturer: Kastak Arms Item Type: SMG Class: Energy (Laser) Battery Size: 60 Rate Of Fire: 800 rpm Effective Range: 30 m The Custodian SMG from Kastak Arms focuses on a high rate of fire over damage and accuracy making it an ideal choice for sweeping through tight environments and close quarters combat.

skin_parallax_energy_assault_rifle.label: Parallax Energy Assault Rifle (Fun Military Skull, Fun Military Tooth)
skin_parallax_energy_assault_rifle.description: Manufacturer: Verified Offworld Laser Technologies Item Type: Assault Rifle Class: Energy (Electron) Battery Size: 80 Rate of Fire: 200 rpm - Beam Effective Range: 30 m Attachments: Optics (S2), Underbarrel (S2) With the Parallax, VOLT offers consumers a rugged assault rifle design with features like a larger-than-average battery and a unique actuator that enables the weapon to scale up into a persistent beam as it fires. This modified version of the original rifle consists of a lunar surface inspired camo pattern and a small kopion fang strapped to the muzzle.
